Esia nye miaƒe dzieheliƒo. 5Ɣedzeƒeliƒo tso Dzeƒu la nu vaseɖe Yordan nu, eye anyieheliƒo tso adɔ̃, si le Yordan ƒe mlɔenu la nu 6vaseɖe Bet-Xogla, eye wòmlo zã Bet-Araba ƒe anyiehe to Bohan, Ruben vi, ƒe kpe la gbɔ 7hezɔ Axor-bali la me vaseɖe Debir, eye wònyè kpo to Gilgal, si le Adumim-to dzi mo kasa la, ƒe anyiehe le tonu la ƒe dziehe gome; emegbe liƒo la va to En-Semes-tɔ la ŋu va ke ɖe Rogel ƒe vudo la gbɔ. 8Eye liƒo la zɔ Ben-Hinom-bali la me va to Yebusitɔwo ƒe to la ŋu le dziehe, esia nye Yerusalem; eyome liƒo la zɔ to, si le Hinom-bali la nu le ɣetoɖoƒe gome la tame le Refaim-bali la ƒe mlɔenu le anyiehe gome, 9eye wòtso to sia tame va to Neftoax ƒe tsivudo la gbɔ heɖo ta ɖu, siwo le Efron-to dzi la gbɔ vaseɖe Baala, esia nye Kiryat-Yearim. 10Eye liƒo la tro tso Baala ɖo ta Seir-to gbɔ le ɣetoɖoƒe heva zɔ Har-Yearim-to la ŋu le anyiehe, esia nye Kesalon, eye wòmlo to Bet-Semes vaseɖe Timna. 11Emegbe liƒo la zɔ Ekron-to la ŋu le anyiehe vaseɖe Sikron, eye wòmlo to Baala-to la tame ɖo ta Yabneel va wu nu ɖe ƒu nu. 12Eye ɣetoɖoƒeliƒo enye ƒu gã la kple eŋu nyigbawo. Esia nye Yuda-viwo ƒe liƒo godoo va kpe le woƒe ƒomeawo nu.
13Eye Yosua tso Arba, Enakitɔwo fofo, ƒe du, si nye Xebron la na Kaleb, Yefune vi, ɖe Yuda viwo dome, abe alesi Yehowa gblɔ ne ene. 14Eye Kaleb nyã Enakitɔ etɔ̃ Sesai, Aximan kple Talmai, amesiwo Enak ŋutɔ dzi la ɖa tso afima. 15Emegbe woho aʋa ɖe Debirtɔwo ŋu; tsã la woyia Debir bena Kiryat-Sefer. 16Eye Kaleb gblɔ bena: Amesi ke aɖu Kiryat-Sefer dzi, eye wòaxɔe la, matsɔ vinyenyɔnu Axsa nɛ wòaɖe. 17Esi Otniel, Kaleb nɔvi Kenas ƒe viŋutsu, xɔe la, etsɔ vianyɔnu Axsa nɛ wòɖe. 18Eye esi wòkplɔe la, nyɔnu la ɖo dali nɛ be, yeaɖabia agble ye fofo, eye wòɖi tso tedzi la dzi; tete Kaleb biae bena: Nya kae le asiwò? 19Eɖo ŋu be: Yram, elabena ètsɔ dziehenyigba nam xoxo, eyata tso tsivudoawo hã nam! Tete Kaleb tso vudo, siwo le to dzi kple bali me la nɛ.
20Esia nye Yuda-viwo ƒe to la ƒe anyigba le woƒe ƒomeawo nu. 21Du, siwo tso Yuda-viwo ƒe to la ƒe mlɔenu vaseɖe Edom ƒe liƒo ŋu le dziehe, wonye: Kabzel, Eder, Yagur, 22Kina, Dimona, Adada, 23Kedes, Xazor, Yitnan, 24Sif, Telem, Bealat, 25Xazor-Xadata, Keriot-Xezron, eya nye Xazor, 26Amam, Sema, Molada, 27Xazar-Gada, Xesmon, Bet-Palet, 28Xazar-Sual, Beer-Seba, Bizyoteya, 29Baala, Iyim, Azem, 30Eltolad, Kesil, Xorma, 31Ziklag, Madmana, Sansana, 32Lebaot, Silxim, Ain kple Rimon. Wo katã le du blaetɔ̃ vɔ asieke hekpe ɖe woƒe koƒewo ŋu.
33Esiwo le gbadzaƒe, wonye: Estaol, Zora, Asna, 34Zanoax, En-Ganim, Tapuax, Enam, 35Yarmut, Adulam, Soxo, Azeka, 36Saarayim, Aditayim, Gedera kple Gederotayim. Wole du wuiene hekpe ɖe woƒe koƒewo ŋu. 37Zenan, Xadasa, Migdal-Gad, 38Dilean, Mizpe, Yokteel, 39Laxis, Bozkat, Eglon, 40Kabon, Laxmas, Kitlis, 41Gederot, Bet-Dagon, Naama kple Makeda. Wole du wuiade hekpe ɖe woƒe koƒewo ŋu. 42Libna, Eter, Asan, 43Yiftax, Asna, Nezib, 44Kegila, Axsib, Masera. Wole ɖu asieke hekpe ɖe woƒe koƒewo ŋu. 45Ekron kple eŋu duwo kple eŋu koƒewo, 46du, siwo katã tso Ekron kple ɣetoɖoƒe gome va ke ɖe Asdod kple eŋu kɔƒewo gbɔ: 47Asdod kple eŋu duwo kple eŋu kɔƒewo, Gaza kple eŋu duwo kple eŋu kɔƒewo vaseɖe Egipte-tɔʋu la ŋu, eye ƒu gã la enye liƒo.
48Du, siwo le towo dzi, wonye: Samir, Yatir, Soxo, 49Dana, Kiryat-Sana, eya nye Debir, 50Anab, Estemo, Anim, 51Gosen, Xolon kple Gilo. Wole du wuiɖekɛ hekpe ɖe woƒe koƒewo ŋu. 52Arab, Duma, Esan, 53Yanum, Bet-Tapuax, Afeka, 54Xumta, Kiryat-Arba, eya nye Xebron kple Zion Wole du asieke hekpe ɖe woƒe koƒewo ŋu. 55Maon, Karmel, Zif, Yuta, 56Yesreel, Yokdeam, Zanoax. 57Hakayin, Gibea kple Timna. Wole du ewo hekpe ɖe woƒe koƒewo ŋu. 58Xalxul, Bet-Zur, Gedor, 59Maarat, Bet-Anot kple Eltekon. Wole du ade hekpe ɖe woƒe koƒewo ŋu. 60Kiryat-Baal, eya nye Kirvat-Yearim, kpakple Xaraba. Wole du eve hekpe ɖe woƒe kɔƒewo ŋu.
61Du, siwo le gbedzi, wonye: Bet-Araba, Midin, Sexaxa, 62Nibsan, Ir-Hamelax kple En-Gedi. Wole du ade hekpe ɖe woƒe kɔƒewo ŋu. 63Ke Yuda-viwo mete ŋu nyã Yebusitɔ, siwo le Yerusalem la ɖa o, eyata Yebusitɔwo tsi Yerusalem le Yuda-viwo dome vaseɖe egbe.

Title: YOSUA 16
Content:
Efrayimtɔwo ƒe domenyinu.
1Yoset-viwo ƒe anyigba tso Yordan nu le Yerixo gbɔ zɔ Yerixo-tɔ la ŋu le ɣedzeƒe, va to gbegbe, si tso Yerixo hezɔ toawo dzi vaseɖe Betel la me; 2eye liƒo la tso Betel va Luz heto Arkitɔwo ƒe anyigba me vaseɖe Atarot, 3eye wòmlo to Yafletitɔwo ƒe anyigba ŋu le ɣetoɖoƒe gome hezɔ Bet-Xoron-nyigba ƒe anyigbe gome va ke ɖe Gezer hewu nu ɖe ƒu la nu. 4Esia nye anyigba, si Yosef-viwo, Manase kple Efrayim, woxɔ.
5Efrayim-viwo ƒe anyigba enye si le woƒe ƒomeawo nu. Woƒe anyigba la ƒe ɣedzeƒeliƒo tso Aterot-Adar vaseɖe Bet-Xoron ƒe dzigbe gome 6hemlo to ƒu la ŋu. Anyieheliƒo tso Mixmetat henyè kpo to Taanat-Silo ƒe ɣedzeƒe, eye wòzɔ eƒe ɣedzeƒe gome vaseɖe Yanoxa, 7eye wòtso Yanoxa va to Atarot kple Naarat heto Yerixo ŋu vaseɖe Yordan nu. 8Ɣetoɖoƒeliƒo tso Tapuax heto Kana-tɔʋu la ŋu va wu nu ɖe ƒu nu. Esia nye Efrayim-viwo ƒe to la ƒe anyigba le woƒe ƒomeawo nu 9hekpe ɖe du, siwo katã wotia le Manase-viwo ƒe anyigba dzi na Efrayim-viwo la ŋuti. 10Ke Womenya Kanaanitɔ, siwo nɔ Geser la ɖa o, eyata Kanaanitɔwo tsi Efrayim dome vaseɖe egbe, eye wona wowɔ dɔ na wo yaka.

Title: YOSUA 17
Content:
Manase-to afã ƒe domenyinu.
1Manase-to la xɔ eƒe gome, elabena eyae nye Yosef ƒe ŋgɔgbevi; wotsɔ Gilead kple Basan na Maxir, Manase ƒe ŋgɔgbevi, amesi nye Gilead fofo, elabena miame wònye. 2Manase-vi mamleawo xɔ wo tɔ le woƒe ƒomeawo nu, woawo nye: Abiezer-viwo, Xelek-viwo, Asriel-viwo, Sexem-viwo, Xefer-viwo kple Semida-viwo, esiawo nye Yosef vi Manase ƒe viŋutsuwo le woƒe ƒomeawo nu. 3Ke Zelofxad, amesi nye Xefer vi, amesi nye Gilead vi, amesi nye Maxir vi, amesi nye Manase vi la, medzi ŋutsuvia ɖeke o, negbe nyɔnuviwo ko, eye vianyɔnuawo ƒe ŋkɔwo nye: Maxla, Noa, Xogla, Milka kple Tirza. 4Eye wova nunɔla Eleazar kple Yosua, Nun vi, kpakple amegãwo ŋku me gblɔ bena: Yehowa de se na Mose be, wòana anyigba mi ɖe mia nɔviwo dome. Tete wona anyigba wo ɖe wo fofo nɔviwo dome, abe alesi Yehowa gblɔ ene. 5Ale Manase xɔ akpa ewo hekpe ɖe Gilead-nyigba kple Basan-nyigba ŋuti le Yordan ƒe go keme dzi. 6Elabena Manase vinyɔnuwo xɔ anyigba ɖe viaŋutsuwo dome, ke Gilead-nyigba nye Manase-vi mamleawo tɔ.
7Eye Manase ƒe liƒo tso Aser va to Mixmetat le Sixem kasa, eye wòzɔ En-Tapuaxtɔwo ŋu le ɖusi me gome. 8Tapuax-nyigba enye Manase tɔ, ke Tapuax, si le Manase ƒe liƒo dzi la, enye Efrayim-viwo tɔ. 9Eye liƒo la to Kana-tɔʋu la ƒe dziehe gome, ke Efrayim ƒe duwo le Manase ƒe duwo dome le afima: eye Manase ƒe liƒo to tɔʋu la ƒe anyiehe gome heva wu nu ɖe ƒu nu. 10Dziehe gome enye Efrayim lɔ, eve anyiehe gome enye Manase tɔ, eye ƒu ɖo liƒo nɛ; wova kpe Aser le anyiehe, eye wokpe Isaxar le ɣedzeƒe. 11Du, siwo nye Manase tɔ, le Isaxar kple Aser gbɔ, wonye: Bet-Sean kple eƒe duwo, Yibleam kple eƒe duwo hekpe ɖe Dortɔwo kple woƒe duwo ŋu; En-Dortɔwo kple woƒe duwo, Tanaxtɔwo kple woƒe duwo kpakple Megidotɔwo kple woƒe duwo, woawo nye togbɛ etɔ̃awo. 12Ke Manase mete ŋu xɔ ɖu siawo o, ale Kanaanitɔwo do dzi nɔ anyigba sia dzi bɛ. 13Gake esi ŋusẽ va ɖo Israel-viwo ŋu la, wona Kanaanitɔwo wɔ dɔ na wo yaka; ke ɖeko womenya wo o.
14Eye Yosef-viwo gblɔ na Yosua bena: Nukaŋuti nèna anyigba kple gome ɖeka pɛ ko mi, evɔ míesɔ gbɔ, eye Yehowa yra mí vaseɖe fifi hafi? 15Yosua ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Ne míesɔ gbɔ la, ekema miyi Filistitɔwo kple Refaitɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi, eye miƒo aveawo ɖa le afima; elabena Efrayim-to la xaxa na mi akpa. 16Tete Yosef-viwo gblɔ bena: To la menya de mia nu-o, evɔ galasiaɖamwo hã le Kanaanitɔ, siwo katã le bali la me kple esiwo le Bet-Sean kple eƒe duwo me kpakple esiwo le Yezreel gbadzaƒe la si. 17Yosua gblɔ na Yosef ƒe aƒe, si nye Efrayim kple Manase bena: Miesɔ gbɔ, eye ŋusẽ geɖe le mia ŋu; menye gome ɖeka koe anɔ mia si o; 18ke boŋ mixɔ tonyigba la, eye miƒo aveawo ɖa le edzi, eye wòanye mia tɔ vaseɖe eƒe mlɔenu. Elabena mianyã Kanaanitɔ, siwo si gatasiaɖamwo le, eye ŋusẽ le wo ŋu la ɖa.

Title: YOSUA 18
Content:
Agbadɔxɔ la le Silo. Anyigba susɔe mamã.
1Esi anyigba la na ta wo vɔ la, Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la va kpe ta ɖe Silo, eye wotu Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la ɖe afima.
2Eye Israel-viwo ƒe to adre susɔ, siwo womemã anyigba na haɖe o. 3Eye Yosua gblɔ na Israel-viwo bena: Ɣekaɣi gɔ̃ miawɔ kuvia ase ɖo, eye miayi aɖaxɔ anyigba, si Yehowa, mia fofowo ƒe Mawu, na mi la wòanye mia tɔ oa? 4Miɖe ŋutsu etɔ̃etɔ̃ le to sia to me, ne madɔ wo woayi aɖatsa le anyigba la dzi, eye woaɖe anyigba, alesi nu ade wo nu la, agbalẽ me vɛ nam, 5eye woamãe ɖe akpa adre me; Yuda nenɔ eƒe anyigba dzi le dziehe, eye Yosef ƒe aƒe nenɔ etɔ dzi le anyiehe. 6Ke mide anyigba la agbalẽ me ɖe akpa adre me tsɔ vɛ nam le afisia, eye nudzidze nu ɖe dzi na mi le Yehowa, mía Mawu la ŋku me afi. 7Ke Lewitɔwo mexɔ gomea ɖeke ɖe mia dome o, elabena Yehowa ƒe nunɔladɔ enye woƒe domenyinu, eye Gad, Ruben kple Manase ƒe to afã xɔ woƒe anyigba, si Yehowa ƒe dɔla Mose na wo la, ɖe Yordan godo le ɣedzeƒe. 8Tete ŋutsuawo dze mɔ heyi, eye Yosua de se na amesiwo yina anyigba la de ge agbalẽ me la bena: Miyi ɖatsa le anyigba la dzi, eye miŋlɔe tsɔ ve nam, ekema madzidze nu ɖe dzi na mi le Yehowa ŋku me le Silo. 9Ale ŋutsuawo yi ɖatsa le anyigba la dzi, eye womãe ɖe akpa adre me le woƒe duwo nu heŋlɔe tsɔ vɛ na Yosua le asaɖa me le Silo. 10Tete Yosua dzidze nu ɖe dzi na wo le Yehowa ŋku me le Silo, eye wòmã anyigba la na Israel-viwo wo tɔ wo tɔe.
Benyamin ƒe domenyinu.
11Wodzidze nu ɖe Benyamin-viwo ƒe to la dzi le woƒe ƒomewo nu, eye anyigba, si ge ɖe wo si me la, le Yuda-viwo kple Yosef-viwo dome. 12Woƒe anyieheliƒo tso Yordan nu zɔ Yerixo-to la ƒe anyiehe heto toawo dzi le ɣetoɖoƒe gome, eye wòva ke ɖe Bet-Awen-gbedzi; 13emegbe liƒo la tso afisia ɖo ta Luz heva zɔ Luz-to la ƒe dziehe, eya nye Betel, eye wòto Aterot-Adar ŋu va zɔ toawo dzi le dziehe le Bet-Xoron ƒe anyigbe gome. 14Ɣetoɖoƒeliƒo la nyẽ kpo ɖo ta dziehe tso to, siwo le Bet-Xoron kasa la ƒe dziehe heva wu nu ɖe Kiryat-Baal, eya nye Kiryat-Yearim, si nye Yuda-viwo ƒe ɖu; esia nye ɣetoɖoƒekpa. 15Dziehekpa tso Kirvat-Yearim ƒe mlɔenu ɖo ta ɣetoɖoƒe gome heva se Neftoax ƒe tsivudo la gbɔ; 16eye liƒo la trɔ va zɔ to, si le Efrayim-tagba ƒe anyiehe le Ben-Hinom-bali la kasa la ƒe mlɔenu, eye wòzɔ Hinom-bali la me heto Yebusitɔwo ƒe to la ŋu vaseɖe Rogel ƒe vudo la gbɔ, 17eye wòtrɔ ɖo ta anyiehe gome va to En-Semes heto Gelilot ŋu le Adumim-to dzi mɔ kasa, eye wòva to Bohan, Ruben vi ƒe kpe la gbɔ 18hezɔ to la ŋu le gbadzaƒe la ƒe anyiehe vaseɖe Araba. 19Eye liƒo la va to Bet-Xogla-to da ŋu le anyiehe heva wu nu ɖe adɔ la nu le Dzeƒu la ƒe anyiehe, le Yordan ƒe dziehe mlɔeanu; esia nye dzieheliƒo la. 20Eye Yordan nye liƒo le ɣedzeƒe gome. Esia nye Benyamin-viwo ƒe anyigbe ƒe liƒowo godoo va kpe le woƒe ƒomeawo nu.
21Benyamin-viwo ƒe to la ƒe duwo nye si le woƒe ƒomeawo nu. Yerixo, Bet-Xogla, Emek-Keziz, 22Bet-Araba, Zemarayim, Betel, 23Haawim, Hapara, Ofra, 24Kefar-Amonai, Haofni kple Geba. Wole du wuieve hekpe ɖe woƒe kɔƒewo ŋu. 25Gibeon, Rama, Beerot, 26Mizpe, Kefira, Moza. 27Rekem, Yerpeel, Tarala, 28Zela, Elef, Yebusi, eya nye Yerusalem, Gibeat kple Kiryat. Wole ɖu wuiene hekpe ɖe woƒe kɔƒewo ŋu. Esia nye Benyamin-viwo ƒe anyigba le woƒe ƒomeawo nu.

Title: YOSUA 19
Content:
To ade susɔeawo ƒe domenyinu.
1Dzidze evelia dze Simeon-viwo ƒe to la dzi le woƒe ƒomeawo nu, eye woxɔ woƒe anyigba ɖe Yuda-viwo ƒe anyigba dzi. 2Du, siwo nye wo to le woƒe anyigba dzi, wonye: Beer-Seba, Seba, Molada. 3Xazar-Sual, Bala, Ezem. 4Eltolad, Betul, Xorma, 5Ziklag, Bet-Markabot, Xazar-Susa, 6Bet-Lebaot kple Saruxen. Wole du wuietɔ̃ kple woƒe kɔƒewo. 7Ayin, Rimon, Eter kple Asan. Wole du ene kple woƒe kɔƒewo, 8hekpe ɖe kɔƒe, siwo katã le du, siawo gbɔ vaseɖe Baalat-Beer la ŋuti, eya nye Ramat le dziehe. Esia nye Simeon-viwo ƒe to la ƒe anyigba le woƒe ƒomeawo nu. 9Yuda-viwo ƒe gome ŋu woɖe anyigba le na Simeon-viwo, elabena Yuda-viwo tɔ lolo na wo akpa, eyata Simeon-viwo xɔ woƒe anyigba ɖe wo dome.
10Dzidze etɔ̃lia dze Zebulon-viwo dzi le woƒe ƒomeawo nu, eye woƒe anyigba ƒe liƒo de Sarid. 11Woƒe liƒo zɔ ɣetoɖoƒe gome va to Marala heto Bedabaset ŋu, eye wòva ke ɖe tɔʋu la nu le Yokneam kasa. 12Eye liƒo la trɔ tso Sarid ɖo ta ɣedzeƒe gome va to Kislot-Tabor ƒe liƒo ŋu, eye wòto Daberat ŋu va ke ɖe Yafia, 13eye wòtso afisia ɖo ta ɣedzeƒe gome va to Gat-Xefer kple Et-Kazin hemlo to Rimon va ke ɖe Nea; 14eye liƒo la gɔdɔ̃ zɔ Xanaton ƒe anyiehe gome heva to Yiftax-El-bali la me. 15Katat, Nahalal, Simron, Yidala kple Betlexem. Wole du wuieve hekpe ɖe woƒe kɔƒewo ŋu. 16Esia nye Zebulon-viwo ƒe anyigba, woƒe duwo kple kɔƒewo le woƒe ƒomeawo nu.
17Dzidze enelia dze Isaxar-viwo dzi le woƒe ƒomeawo nu. 18Eye woƒe anyigba to Yezreel, Kesulot, Sunem, 19Xafarayim, Sion, Anaxarat, 20Harabit, Kision, Abez, 21Remel, En-Ganim, En-Xada kple Bet-Pazez. 22Eye liƒo la va ke ɖe Tabor, Saxazima kple Bet-Semes ŋu heva wu nu ɖe Yordan nu. Wole du wuiade hekpe ɖe woƒe kɔƒewo ŋu. 23Esia nye Isaxar-viwo ƒe to la ƒe anyigba, woƒe duwo kple kɔƒewo le woƒe ƒomeawo nu.
24Dzidze atɔ̃lia dze Aser-viwo ƒe to la dzi le woƒe ƒomeawo nu. 25Eye woƒe anyigba to Xelkat, Xali, Beten, Axsaf, 26Alamelex, Amad kple Misal va zɔ Karmel kple Sixor-Libnat ŋu le ƒu gome; 27eye wònyè kpo to ɣedzeƒe gome va ke ɖe Bet-Dagon, eye wòmlo to Zebulon, Yiftax-El-bali la ƒe anyiehe, Bet-Haemek kple Negiel, eye wòzɔ Kabul ƒe mia me gome 28va to Ebron, Rexob, Xamon kple Kana vaseɖe Zidon, ɖu gã la gbɔ. 29Eye liƒo la tro to Rama kple du sesẽ Tirus gbɔ, eye wònyè kpo to Xosa heva wu nu ɖe ƒu nu tso Axsib-nuto me 30vaseɖe Uma, Afek kple Rexob. Wole du blave vɔ eve hekpe ɖe woƒe kɔƒewo ŋu. 31Esia nye Aser-viwo ƒe to la ƒe anyigba, woƒe duwo kple kɔƒewo le woƒe ƒomeawo nu.
32Dzidze adelia dze Naftali-viwo dzi le woƒe ƒomeawo nu. 33Eye woƒe liƒo tso Xelef kple logotiwo gbɔ le Zaananim, Adami-Hanekeb kple Yabneel vaseɖe Lakum, eye wòva wu nu ɖe Yordan nu. 34Eye liƒo la nyẽ kpo ɖe ɣetoɖoƒe gome va to Aznot-Tabor, eye wòmlo zɔ Xukok ŋu va to Zebulon ŋu le dziehe, eto Aser ŋu le ɣetoɖoƒe, eye wòto Yuda ŋu le Yordan nu le ɣedzeƒe. 35Du sesẽwo nye: Zidim, Zer, Xamat, Rakat, Kineret, 36Adama, Rama, Xazor, 37Kedes, Edrei, En-Xazor, 38Yireon, Migdal-El, Xorem, Bet-Anat kple Bet-Semes. Wole du wuiasieke hekpe ɖe woƒe kɔƒewo ŋu. 39Esia nye Naftali-viwo ƒe anyigba, woƒe duwo kple kɔƒewo le woƒe ƒomeawo nu. 40Dzidze adrelia dze Dan-viwo ƒe to la dzi le woƒe ƒomeawo nu. 41Eye du, siwo le woƒe anyigba dzi, wonye: Zora, Estaol, Ir-Semes, 42Saalabin, Ayalon, Yitla, 43Elon, Timnat, Ekron, 44Elteke, Gibeton, Baalat, 45Yehud, Bene-Berak, Gal-Rimon, 46Me-Hayarkon kple Harakon kple eƒe anyigba, si le Yafo kasa. 47Ke Dan-viwo ƒe anyigba xaxa na wo akpa, eyata Dan-viwo yi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Lesem; woɖu wo dzi, wu wo kple yi, eye woxɔe hetso aƒe ɖe eme, eye wona ŋkɔ Lesem bena Dan, le wo fofo Dan ƒe ŋkɔ nu. 48Esia nye Dan-viwo ƒe to la ƒe anyigba, woƒe duwo kple kɔƒewo le woƒe ƒomeawo nu.
Yosua ƒe domenyinu.
49Esi wode liƒo anyigba la me hemãe vɔ keŋ la, Israel-viwo na anyigba Yosua, Nun vi, ɖe wo dome; 50wotsɔ ɖu Timnat-Serax, si wòbia la, nɛ ɖe Efrayim-to dzi, abe alesi Yehowa gblɔ ene, eye wògbugbɔ du la tso henɔ eme. 51Esia nye anyigba, siwo nunɔla Eleazar kple Yosua, Nun vi, kpakple Israel-viwo ƒe ƒomewo ƒe amegãwo dzidze nu ma le Silo le Yehowa ŋku me, le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu. Ale wowu anyigba la mamã nu.

Title: YOSUA 20
Content:
Dodo le sitsoƒeduwo ŋuti.
1Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Yosua bena; 2Gblɔ na Israel-viwo be, woatia sitsoƒedu, siwo ŋu meƒo nu le na mi to Mose dzi la; 3eye amesi menyae o, eye mebua wu ame o la, nasi ayi afima, eye woanye sitsoƒe na mi tso hlɔ̃tɔ si me. 4Ne esi yi du siawo dometɔ ɖeka me la, ekema wòatɔ ɖe ɖu la ƒe agbo nu, eye wòagblɔ eƒe nya la na dumegãwo, hafi woaxɔe ɖe dua me, eye woana teƒee wòanɔ wo gbɔ. 5Ke ne hlɔ̃tɔ ti eyome la, womegatsɔ amewula la de asi nɛ o; elabena mebua hafi wu nɔvia o, eye menye ɖe wòlé fui tsã hafi o. 6Eye wòana du ma me, vaseɖe esime woakplɔe ava ameha la ŋku me, eye woadzro nya la me; eye ne nunɔla gã, si fi ɣemaɣi ku la, ekema amewula la kpɔ mɔ agbugbɔ ayi du, si me wòsi tso kple eya ŋutɔ ƒe xɔ nu.
7Tete woɖo Kedes le Galilea le Naftali-to dzi kple Sixera le Efrayim-to dzi kpakple Kiryat-Arba, si nye Xebron le Yuda-to dzi. 8Eye woɖo Bezer, si le gbedzi kple tagba la, ɖe Ruben-to la me le Yordan ƒe go keme dzi le Yerixo ƒe ɣedzeƒe, kple Ramot le Gilead ɖe Gad-to la me, kpakple Golan le Basan ɖe Manase-to la me. 9Esiawo nye ɖu, siwo woɖo na Israel-viwo katã kple amedzro, si le wo dome bena, ne amea ɖe mebua wu nɔvia o la, wòasi ayi afima, ne magaku ɖe hlɔ̃tɔ si me, hafi woahe eƒe nya ava ameha la ŋku mee o.

Title: YOSUA 21
Content:
Lewitɔwo ƒe nɔƒewo.
1Eye Lewi-to la ƒe amegãwo va nunɔla Eleazar kple Yosua, Nun vi, kpakple Israel-tɔwo ƒe ƒomeawo ƒe amegãwo gbɔ, 2eye wogblɔ na wo le Silo le Kanaan-nyigba dzi bena: Yehowa ɖe se to Mose dzi bena, woana duwo mí mianɔ me kple wo ŋu nyigbawo hena míaƒe lãwo. 3Tete Israel-viwo ɖe du siawo kple wo ŋu nyigba wole woƒe anyigbawo ŋu tsɔ na Lewitɔwo, abe alesi Yehowa gblɔ ene.
4Tete dzidze dze Kehat-viwo ƒe ƒomewo dzi, eye wodzidze nu tsɔ du wuietɔ̃ na nunɔla Aron-viwo, siwo nye Lewitɔwo la, ɖe Yuda-to, Simeon-to kple Benyamin-to me; 5eye wodzidze nu tsɔ du ewo na Kehat-vi mamleawo ɖe Efrayim-to ƒe ƒomeawo kple Dan-to kpakple Manase ƒe to afã la me. 6Wodzidze nu tsɔ du wuietɔ̃ na Gerson-viwo ɖe Isaxar-to la ƒe ƒomeawo kple Aser-to, Naftali-to kple Manase ƒe to afã, si le Basan la me; 7eye wona du wuieve Merari-viwo le woƒe ƒomewo nu ɖe Ruben-to, Gad-to kple Zebulon-to la me. 8Eye Israel-viwo dzidze nu tsɔ du siawo kple wo ŋu nyigbawo na Lewitɔwo, abe alesi Yehowa de se to Mose dzi ene.
9Du, siwo wona ɖe Yuda-viwo to kple Simeon-viwo to me ƒe ŋkɔwo nye si: 10Du, siwo wona Aron-viwo, siwo nye Kehat-ƒomeawo tso Lewi-viwo dome la, wonye — elabena eya dzi dzidze; gbãtɔ dze — 11Arba, si nye Enak fofo ƒe du, eya nye Xebron le Yuda-to la dzi hekpe ɖe lãnyiƒe, si le eŋu la ŋuti. 12Ke wotsɔ, agble, si le dua ŋuti, kple eƒe kɔƒewo na Kaleb, Yefune vi, wònye etɔ. 13Du, siwo wotsɔ na nunɔla Aron-viwo, wonye: Xebron, si nye sitsoƒe na hlɔ̃dola kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Libna kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 14Yatir kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Estemoa kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 15Xolon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Debir kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 16Ayin kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Yuta kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Bet-Semes kple eŋu lãnyiƒe; wole du asieke le to eve siawo me, 17Esiwo le Benyamin-to la me, wonye: Gibeon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Geba kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 18Anatot kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Almon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe wole ɖu ene. 19Nunɔla Aron-viwo ƒe duwo katã le du wuietɔ̃ kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo. 20Du, siwo wodzidze nu tsɔ na Kehat-viwo ƒe ƒome mamleawo, siwo nye Lewitɔwo ɖe Efrayim-to la me, wonye. 21Sixem, si nye sitsoƒe na hlɔ̃dola, le Efrayim-to dzi kple eŋu lãnyiƒe. Gezer kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 22Kibzayim kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Bet-Xoron kple eŋu lãnyiƒe; wole du ene. 23Esiwo le Dan-to la me, wònye: Elteke kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Gibeton kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 24Ayalon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Gat-Rimon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe; wole du ene. 25Esiwo le Manase-to afã la me, wonye: Tanax kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Yibleam kple eŋu lãnyiƒe; wole du eve. 26Kehat-viwo ƒe ƒome mamlea ƒe duwo katã le du ewo kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo.
27Du, siwo Gerson-viwo, amesiwo tso Lewitɔwo ƒe ƒome la me, xɔ ɖe Manase ƒe to afã me, wonye: Golan le Basan, si nye sitsoƒe na hlɔ̃dola, kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Beestera kple eŋu lãnyiƒe; wole ɖu eve. 28Esiwo le Isaxar ƒe to la me, wonye Kisyon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Daberat kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 29Yarmut kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple En-Ganim kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, wole du ene. 30Esiwo le Aser-to la me, wonye: Misal kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Abdon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 31Xelkat kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Rexob kple eŋu lãnyiƒe; wole du ene 32Esiwo le Naftali-to la me, wonye. Kedes le Galilea, si nye sitsoƒe na hlɔ̃dola kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Xamot-Dor kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Kartan kple eŋu lãnyiƒe; wole du etɔ̃. 33Gerson-ƒomeawo ƒe duwo katã le du wuietɔ̃ kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo.
34Du, siwo Merari-viwo ƒe ƒomewo, siwo nye Lewitɔ mamleawo, xɔ ɖe Zebulon-to la me, wonye. Yokneam kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Karta kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 35Dimna kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Nahalal kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, wole du ene. 36Esiwo le Ruben-to la me, wonye: Bezer kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Yaza kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 37Kedemot kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Mefaat kple eŋu lãnyiƒe. 38Esiwo le Gad-to la me, wònye Ramot le Gilead, si nye sitsoƒe na hlɔ̃dola kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Maxanim kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 39Xesbon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Yazer kple eŋu lãnyiƒe; wo katã le du ene. 40Du, siwo katã wodzidze nu tsɔ na Merari-ƒomeawo, siwo nye Lewitɔwo ƒe ƒome mamleawo la, le du wuieve. 41Lewitɔwo ƒe du, siwo katã le Israel-viwo ƒe anyigba dzi la, le du blane vɔ enyi kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo. 42Du siawo katã nye du ɖekaɖekawo, eye lãnyiƒewo le wo ŋu godoo va kpe.
Ŋugbedodo la va me.
43Ale Yehowa tsɔ anyigba blibo la na Israel, abe alesi wòka atam na wo fofowo ene, eye woxɔe hetso aƒe ɖe edzi. 44Eye Yehowa na wokpɔ gbɔdzɔe le afisiafi, abe alesi wòka atam na wo fofowo pɛpɛpɛ ene; woƒe futɔwo katã dometɔa ɖeke menɔ te ɖe wo nu o, ke boŋ Yehowa tsɔ woƒe futɔwo katã de asi na wo. 45Nyaa ɖeke meto le nya nyui, siwo katã Yehowa gblɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe la me o, wo katã va me pɛpɛpɛ.

Title: YOSUA 22
Content:
To, siwo nɔ Yordan godo, ɖi vɔsamlekpui ɖe Yordan to; dukɔ susɔe la meli edzi gbã o.
1Ɣemaɣi Yosua ya Ruben-viwo kple Gad-viwo kpakple Manase-to afã la, 2eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Miewɔ nya, siwo katã Yehowa ƒe dɔla Mose gblɔ na mi la dzi, eye mieɖo to nye gbe le nusiwo katã megblɔ na mi la me. 3Miegblẽ mia nɔviwo ɖi le ɣeyiɣi didi siawo me vaseɖe egbe sia o, eye miewɔ Yehowa, mia Mawu ƒe se la dzi. 4Ke azɔ Yehowa, mia Mawu, na mia nɔviwò kpɔ gbɔdzɔe, abe alesi wòdo ŋugbe na wo ene; eyata migbugbɔ yi miaƒe agbadɔwo me le miaƒe anyigba, si Yehowa ƒe dɔla Mose na mi le Yordan godo la dzi. 5Ɖeko mikpɔ nyuie, be miawɔ ɖoɖo kple se, siwo Yehowa ƒe dɔla Mose gblɔ na mi la dzi; milɔ̃ Yehowa, mia Mawu la, eye mizɔ eƒe mowo katã dzi, midzra eƒe seawo ɖo, miku ɖe eŋu, eye misubɔe tso dzi blibo kple luʋɔ blibo me! 6Tete Yosua yra wo heɖe asi le wo ŋu, eye wodze mo yi woƒe agbadɔwo me.
7Mose na anyigba Manase-to afã ɖe Basan, eye Yosua na anyigba afã evelia ɖe wo nɔviwò gbɔ le Yordan ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe. Esi Yosua le asi ɖe ge le wo ŋu wòayi woƒe agbadɔwo me la, eyra wo 8gblɔ na wo bena: Mitsɔ kesinɔnu geɖewo kple lã geɖewo, klosalo kple sika, akɔbli kple gayibɔ kpakple avɔ geɖewo fũ gbugbɔ yi miaƒe agbadɔwo mee, eye mia kple mia nɔviwo mimã miaƒe futɔwo ƒe aboyonuwo me!
9Tete Ruben-viwo kple Gad-viwo kpakple Manase ƒe to afã la gbugbɔ tso Israel-viwo gbɔ le Silo le Kanaan-nyigba dzi heyi woawo ŋutɔ ƒe anyigba Gilead, si woxɔ la dzi, abe alesi Yehowa gblɔ to Mose dzi ene. 10Eye esi wova ɖo Yordan-nutowo me le Kanaan-nyigba dzi la, Ruben-viwo, Gad-viwo kple Manase-to afã la ɖi vɔsamlekpui gã nyuia ɖe ɖe Yordan nu afima.
11Eye Israel-viwo se bena, Ruben-viwo, Gad-viwo kple Manase ƒe to afã la ɖi vɔsamlekpui ɖe Yordan-nuto me dze ŋgɔ Kanaan-nyigba le Israel-viwo ƒe go keme dzi. 12Esi Israel-viwo see la, tete Israel-viwo ƒe ha blibo la kpe ta ɖe Silo, be yewoaho aʋa ɖe wo ŋu. 13Eye Israel-viwo ɖɔ Pinehas, si nye nunɔla Eleazar vi, ɖo ɖe Ruben-viwo, Gad-viwo kple Manase-to afã la gbɔ le Gilead-nyigba dzi, 14eye amegã ewo, siwo nye amegãwo le Israel-viwo ƒe toawo katã me la, kpe ɖe eŋu; woawo enye amegã ɖekaɖekawo le wo fofowo ƒe aƒewo nu le Israel ƒe ame akpeawo dome. 15Esi wova Ruben-viwo, Gad-viwo kple Manase-to afã la gbɔ le Gilead-nyigba dzi la, wogblɔ na wo bena: 16Ale Yehowa ƒe ha blibo la gblɔ esi: Nukaŋuti mieda vo ɖe Israel ƒe Mawu la ŋu, mietrɔ le Yehowa yome egbe, eye mieɖi vɔsamlekpui na mia ɖokui hedze aglã ɖe Yehowa ŋu egbe? 17Ɖe vo, si woda le Peor ta, eye mía ŋu mekɔ vaseɖe egbe haɖe o, eye dɔvɔ̃ va Yehowa ƒe ameha dzi la, mesɔ gbɔ na mí oa? 18Eye miawo mietrɔ le Yehowa yome egbe hedze aglã ɖe Yehowa ŋu, ne Yehowa nayi dɔmedzoe do ge ɖe Israel-ha blibo la ŋu etsɔa? 19Ke ne miaƒe anyigba ŋu mekɔ o la, ekema miva Yehowa ƒe anyigba dzi, afisi Yehowa ƒe nɔƒe la le, ne miatso aƒe ɖe mía dome; ɖeko migaɖi vɔsamlekpuia ɖeke kpe ɖe Yehowa, mía Mawu ƒe vɔsamlekpui la ŋuti ahadze aglã ɖe Yehowa kple mía ŋu o! 20Ɖe Axan, Serax vi, megbe anukwareɖiɖi le busunuawo me, eye dɔmedzoe va Israel-ha blibo la dzi, eye menye eya ɖeka kolia koe ku ɖe eƒe vodada la ta oa? 21Tete Ruben-viwo kple Gad-viwo kpakple Manase-to afã la ɖo ŋu na Israel ƒe ame akpeawo tatɔwo bena: 22Mawu, Mawu Yehowa, Mawu, Mawu Yehowa ŋutɔe nyae, eye Israel hã nanyae: Nenye aglãe miehe, miadze, alo voe míebe, míada ɖe Yehowa ŋu la, ekema megaxɔ mi ɖe agbe egbe sia o! 23Nenye vɔsamlekpui míeɖi, be míatrɔ le Yehowa yome, eye nenye ɖe míebe, míasa numevɔ kple nuɖuvɔ alo akpedavɔ le edzi la, ekema Yehowa ŋutɔ nekpɔ eme! 24Ke boŋ míewɔ alea, elabena mievɔ̃ ɖa be, mia viwo ava bia mía viwo gbaɖegbe bena: Miawo miele kadodoa ɖeke me kple Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la o. 25Yehowa tsɔ Yordan do liƒo mia kpli mi Ruben-viwo kple Gad-viwo dome; gomea ɖeke mele Yehowa gbɔ na mi o! Ale mia viwo ana be, mía viwo agbe Yehowa vovɔ̃. 26Eyata mieɖo be, míaɖi vɔsamlekpui, menye hena numevɔsa alo akpedavɔsa o, 27ke boŋ bena wòanye ɖase anɔ mía kple miawo kpakple miaƒe dzidzimeviwo dome, ne miawo hã míatsɔ míaƒe numevɔsawo, kafukafuvɔsawo kple akpedavɔsawo ava subɔ le Yehowa ŋku me, eye ne mia viwo magava gblɔ na mia viwo gbaɖegbe bena gomea ɖeke mele Yehowa gbɔ na mi o! 28Elabena miebu be, ne woava bia mía kple míaƒe dzidzimeviwo gbaɖegbe la, ekema miagblɔ be: Mikpɔ Yehowa ƒe vɔsamlekpui tɔgbe sia, si mia fofowo wɔ la ɖa, menye hena numevɔsa alo akpedavɔsa o, ke boŋ ne wòanye ɖase anɔ mía kple miawo dome. 29Nede megbe xaa tso mia gbɔ be, miadze aglã ɖe Yehowa ŋu, eye míatrɔ le Yehowa yome egbe, aɖi vɔsamlekpui hena numevɔsa, nuɖuvɔsa kple akpedavɔsa ahakpe ɖe Yehowa, mia Mawu ƒe vɔsamlekpui, si le eƒe nɔƒe nu la ŋuti.
30Esi nunɔla Pinehas kple ameha la ƒe amegãwo, siwo kpe ɖe eŋu, amesiwo nye tatɔwo le Israel ƒe ame akpeawo nu, se nya, siwo Ruben-viwo, Gad-viwo kple Manase-viwo gblɔ la, edze wo ŋu. 31Eye Pinehas, nunɔla Eleazar vi, gblɔ na Ruben-viwo, Gad-viwo kple Manase-vi wo bena: Egbe míedze sii bena, Yehowa le mía dome, elabena esi mieda vo ɖe Yehowa ŋu o la, eyata mieɖe Israel-viwo tso Yehowa si me. 32Tete Pinehas, nunɔla Eleazar vi, kple amegãwo gbugbɔ tso Ruben-viwo kple Gad-viwo gbɔ le Gilead-nyigba dzi va Israel-viwo gbɔ le Kanaan-nyigba dzi, eye wohe dɔgbedenya vɛ na wo. 33Eye nya la dze Israel-viwo ŋu, eye Israel-viwo kafu Mawu, eye womegadi be, yewoaho aʋa ɖe wo ŋu ahagblẽ anyigba, si dzi Ruben-viwo kple Gad-viwo le la o. 34Eye Ruben-viwo kple Gad-viwo na ŋkɔ vɔsamlekpui la bena: „Eya nye ɖase le mía dome be, Yehowae nye Mawu.“

Title: YOSUA 23
Content:
Yosua ƒo Israel-viwo katã nu ƒu le nu xlɔ̃ ge wo.
1Esi Yehowa na Israel kpɔ gbɔdzɔe tso eƒe futɔ, siwo katã ƒo xlãe godoo, si me eteƒe didi, eye Yosua tsi xɔ ƒe geɖe la, 2Yosua yɔ Israel blibo la, woƒe ame tsitsiwo kple tatɔwo, ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo kple dzikpɔlawo gblɔ na wo bena: Metsi, eye mexɔ ƒe geɖe. 3Mia ŋutɔwo miekpɔ nusiwo Yehowa, mia Mawu la, wɔ dukɔ siawo katã le mia ŋgɔ, elabena Yehowa, mia Mawue, wɔ aʋa na mi. 4Kpɔ ɖa, memã dukɔ kpɔtɔe siawo ƒe anyigba na miaƒe toawo tso Yordan nu kple dukɔ, siwo katã metsrɔ̃ la gbɔ, vaseɖe ƒu gã la nu le ɣetoɖoƒe. 5Yehowa, mia Mawu la, ŋutɔ ate wo ɖa le mia ŋgɔ, eye wòanya wo da le mia ŋgɔ, be miaxɔ woƒe anyigba, abe alesi Yehowa, mia Mawu la, do ŋugbe na mi ene. 6Eyata milé dzi ɖe ƒo vevie, ne mialé nusiwo katã woŋlɔ ɖe Mose ƒe segbalẽa me la me ɖe asi, eye miawɔ wo dzi, eye migadze ɖe ɖusi alo mia me o. 7Migatra ɖe dukɔ, siwo kpɔtɔ ɖi la, dome o, eye woƒe mawuwo ŋkɔ megava mia nu, alo miatsɔ wo aka atam o, migasubɔ wo, eye migade ta agu na wo o, 8ke boŋ nuku ɖe Yehowa, mia Mawu la ŋu, abe alesi miewɔ vaseɖe egbe ene. 9Yehowa nyã dukɔ gã kple dukɔ sesẽwo ɖa le nua ŋgɔ, ke miawo la amea ɖeke mete ŋu nɔ te ɖe mia nu vaseɖe fifi o. 10Mia dome ŋutsu ɖeka te ŋu nyã ame akpe, elabena Yehowa, mia Mawue, wɔ ana na mi, abe alesi wòdo ŋugbe na mi ene. 11Eyata mikpɔ nyuie le miaƒe agbe ŋu, ne míala Yehowa, mia Mawu la. 12Ke ne mietrɔ heku ɖe dukɔ, siwo kpɔtɔ ɖe mia gbɔ la ŋu, eye mieɖo ƒome kpli wo, mieyi wo dome, eye woawo hã va mia dome la, 13ekema minyae bena, Yehowa, mia Mawu la, maganyã dukɔ siawo ɖa le mia ŋgɔ akpɔ o, eye woatrɔ zu adoboli kple mɔ na mi, woanye atam anɔ miaƒe axada me, eye woanye gu anɔ ŋku dzi na mi, vaseɖe esime miatsrɔ̃ avɔ keŋkeŋ le anyigba nyui, si Yehowa, mia Mawu, na mi la dzi.
14Mikpɔ ɖa, mele demagbɔnugbe yi ge, ke miawo mienyae tso dzi blibo kple luʋɔ blibo me bena, nyaa ɖeke meto le nya nyui, siwo katã Yehowa, mia Mawu la, gblɔ na mi la me o, wo katã va me na mi, eye nya ku ɖeka hɔ̃ hã meto le eme o. 15Gake alesi nya nyui, siwo katã Yehowa, mia Mawu la gblɔ, va me na mi la, nenema ke Yehowa ana nya vɔ̃wo katã nava dzɔ mia dzi, vaseɖe esime woatsrɔ̃ mi avɔ le anyigba nyui, si Yehowa, mia Mawu la, na mi la dzi. 16Ne mietu Yehowa, mia Mawu la ƒe nu, si wòbia kpli mi, eye mieyi ɖasubɔ mawu bubuwo hede ta agu na wo la, ekema Yehowa ado dɔmedzoe ɖe mia ŋu, eye miatsrɔ̃ avɔ xoxoxo le anyigba nyui, si wòna mi la dzi.

Title: YOSUA 24
Content:
Yosua ƒo Israel-towo nu ƒu xi mamletɔ.
1Tete Yosua na Israel-toawo katã va kpe ta ɖe Sixem, eye wòyɔ ame tsitsiwo kple tatɔwo, ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo kple dzikpɔlawo, eye wova tsi tre ɖe Mawu ŋku me. 2Eye Yosua gblɔ na dukɔ blibo la bena: Ale Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la, gblɔ esi: Tsãtsãtsã la mia fofowo nɔ tɔsisi la ƒe go keme dzi, Tarax, Abraham kple Naxor fofo, eye wosubɔ mawu bubuwo. 3Tete mekplɔ mia fofo Abraham tso tɔsisi la ƒe go keme dzi, eye mena wotsa le Kanaan-nyigba blibo la dzi — mena viawo dzi ɖe dzi — eye metsɔ Isak nɛ. 4Metsɔ Yakob kple Esau na Isak, eye metsɔ Seir-to na Esau, be wòanye etɔ, ke Yakob kple viawo ya ʋu yi Egipte. 5Tete medo Mose kple Aron, eye metsɔ nusiwo mewo la, ɖe fu na Egiptetɔwo; emegbe me, kplɔ mi dzoe. 6Eye esi mekplɔ mia fofowo tso Egipte, eye mieva ƒua nu la, Egiptetɔwo tsɔ tasiaɖamwo kple sɔwo ti mia fofowo yome va Avaƒu la nu. 7Eye wodo ɣli yɔ Yehowa, tete wòde viviti mia kple Egiptetɔwo dome, eye wòna ƒu la ŋe gbagba ɖe wo dzi. Miekpɔ nusiwo mewo Egiptetɔwo la kple ŋku, eye mietsi gbedzi eteƒe didi. 8Emegbe mekplɔ mi va Amoritɔwo, siwo no Yordan ƒe go keme dzi la, ƒe anyigba dzi, eye wowɔ aʋa kpli mi; ke metsɔ wo de asi na mi, miexɔ woƒe anyigba, eye metsrɔ̃ wo le mia ŋgɔ. 9Tete Moab-fia Balak, Zipor vi, ho va wo aʋa kple Israel, eye wòdo woyi ɖayɔ Bileam, Beor vi vɛ, be wòaƒo fi ade mi; 10ke megbe toɖoɖo Bileam, eye wotso mi yra boŋ, eye meɖe mi tso esi me. 11Eyome mietso Yordan va Yerixo; tete Yerixotɔwo, Amoritɔwo, Perizitɔwo, Kanaanitɔwo, Xititɔwo, Girgasitɔwo, Xiwitɔwo kple Yebusitɔwo va wo aʋa kpli mi, eye metso wo ɖe asi na mi. 12Medɔ teamekplɔɖoewo ɖe mia ŋgɔ, eye wonyã Amoritɔwo ƒe fia eveawo le mia ŋgɔ; menye wò yi kple wò dae wɔe o. 13Metso anyigba, si ŋu miedze agbagba le o la, na mi kple ɖu, siwo mietso o la, be mianɔ wo me, eye metsɔ weinbɔ kple amitibɔ, siwo mietso o la, na mi, be miaɖu wo me nuwo. 14Eyata mivɔ̃ Yehowa, eye misubɔe blibo le nyateƒe me, miɖe mawu, siwo mia fofowo subɔ le tɔsisi la godo kple Egipte la ɖa, eye misubɔ Yehowa! 15Ke ne Yehowa subɔsubɔ medze mia ŋu o la, ekema mitia, amesi subɔ ge míala, egbea: eɖanye mawu, siwo mia fofowo subɔ le tɔsisi la godo, alo Amoritɔ, siwo ƒe anyigba dzi miele la, ƒe mawuwo o. Ke mía kple nye aƒe ya miasubɔ Yehowa!
16Tete dukɔ la ɖo ŋu gblɔ bena: Nede megbe xaa tso mía gbɔ be, miagblẽ Yehowa ɖi asubɔ mawu bubuwo! 17Ke boŋ Yehowa enye mía Mawu, eyae kplɔ mía kple mia fofowo tso Egipte-nyigba dzi le kluvinyenyeƒe me, eye wòwɔ dzesi gã siawo le mía ŋku me, eye wòkpɔ mia ta le mɔ blibo, si miezɔ heto dukɔ geɖewo dome la dzi. 18Yehowa nyã dukɔwo katã kple Amoritɔ, siwo nɔ anyigba dzi la, ɖa le mía ŋgɔ. Miawo hã miasubɔ Yehowa, elabena eyae nye mía Mawu! 19Yosua ɖo ŋu na dukɔ la bena: Miate ŋu asubɔ Yehowa o, elabena Mawu kɔkɔe kple Mawu hã ŋu wònye, matsɔ miaƒe vodadawo kple nuvɔ̃wo ake mi o. 20Ne miegblẽ Yehowa ɖi, eye miesubɔ mawu bubuwo la, ekema ahe vɔ̃ ava mia dzi, eye woatsrɔ̃ mi ɖa, evɔ wònye ewɔ nyuie na mi va yi hafi. 21Tete dukɔ la ɖo ŋu na Yosua bena: Gbeɖe, Yehowa ko miasubɔ! 22Yosua gblɔ na dukɔ la bena: Mia ŋutɔwoe nye ɖasefo na mia ɖokui be, mietia Yehowa, be miasubɔ. Woɖo ŋu be: Ẽ, mia ŋu tɔwoe nye ɖasefo. 23Ekema miɖe mawu bubuwo ɖa le mia dome, eye mitrɔ miaƒe dzi ɖe Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la ŋu! 24Eye dukɔ la ɖo ŋu na Yosua bena: Yehowa, mia Mawu ta, miasubɔ, eye eƒe gbe ko miase! 25Ale Yosua bia nu kple dukɔ la gbemagbe, eye wòtsɔ seawo kple ɖoɖoawo ɖo woƒe ŋku me le Sixem. 26Eye Yosua ŋlɔ nya siawo ɖe Mawu ƒe segbalẽ la me, eye wotsɔ kpe gãa ɖe ɖi ɖe afima le logoti, si le Yehowa ƒe kɔkɔeƒea gbɔ la te. 27Tete Yosua gblɔ na dukɔ blibo la bena: Kpɔ ɖa, kpe sia nye ɖase na mi, elabena ese nya, siwo katã Yehowa gblɔ na mi la, eye wòanye ɖase na mi, ne miagasẽ nu le mia Mawu la ŋu o. 28Emegbe Yosua de asi le dukɔ la ŋu, eye amesiame yi eƒe anyigba dzi.
Yosua kple Eleazar ƒe ku. Woɖi Yosef ƒe fuwo.
29Nya siawo megbe la Yehowa ƒe dɔla Yosua. Nun vi, amesi xɔ ƒe alafa ɖeka kple ewo la ku, 30eye woɖu ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe anyigba dzi le Timnat-Serax, si le Efrayim-to dzi, le Gaas-to ƒe anyiehe gome. 31Eye Israel subɔ Yehowa, ŋkeke alesi Yosua nɔ agbe kple ŋkeke alesi ame tsitsi, siwo nɔ agbe le Yosua megbe eteƒe didi, eye wokpɔ nusiwo katã Yehowa wɔ na Israel teƒe la, le agbe.
32Eye Israel-viwo ɖi Yosef ƒe ƒu, siwo wotsɔ tso Egipte vɛ la, ɖe Sixem, ɖe anyigba, si Yakob ƒle kesita alafa ɖeka le Sixem fofo Xamor ƒe viwo si la dzi, eye wòtrɔ zu Yosef-viwo ƒe domenyinu.
33Eye Eleazar, Aron vi, hã ku, eye woɖii ɖe Gibea, si wotsɔ na via Pinehas ɖe Efrayim-to dzi la.

Title: ƲƆNUDRƆ̃LAWO 1
Content:
Yuda-to de asi aʋawɔwɔ me le Yosua fe ku megbe.
1Le Yosua ƒe ku megbe la Israel-viwo bia Yehowa bena: Mia dometɔ kae atre hoho ayi aɖawɔ aʋa kple Kanaanitɔwo? 2Tete Yehowa gblɔ bena: Yuda neho yi; kpɔ ɖa, metsɔ anyigba la de asi nɛ! 3Eye Yuda gblɔ na nɔvia Simeon bena: Ho kplim, míayi nye anyigba dzi aɖawɔ aʋa kple Kanaanitɔwo, ekema nye hã makpe ɖe ŋuwò, míayi tɔwo dzi! Tete Simeon yi kplii. 4Eye esi Yuda ho yi la, Yehowa tsɔ Kanaanitɔwo kple Perizitɔwo de asi na wo, eye wowu ame akpe ewo sɔŋ le Bezek. 5Wova kpe Adoni-Bezek le Bezek, eye wowɔ aʋa kplii heɖu Kanaanitɔwo kple Perizitɔwo dzi. 6Ke Adoni-Bezek si, eye woti eyome ɖalée, eye wolã eƒe asidegblefetsuwo kple afɔdegblefetsuwo. 7Tete Adoni-Bezek gblɔ bena: Fia blaadre, siwo wolã asidegblefetsuwo kple afɔdegblefetsuwo na la, faa nu wuwlui le nye kplɔ te ɖuna; alesi mewo la, eya teƒe Mawu ɖo teƒe nam. Eye wokplɔe yi Yerusalem, afisi woku ɖo.
8Eye Yuda-viwo wɔ aʋa kple Yerusalem, woxɔe, eye wowu wo kple yi hetɔ dzo du lã. 9Emegbe Yuda-viwo ho yi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Kanaanitɔ, siwo le towo dzi kple dziehe kpakple gbadzaƒe. 10Eye Yuda ho aʋa ɖe Kanaanitɔ, siwo nɔ Xebron la ŋu, — tsã la woyɔ Xebron bena Kiryat-Arba — eye woɖu Sesai, Aximan kple Talmai dzi. 11Eyome woho aʋa tso afisia ɖe Debirtɔwo ŋu; tsã la woyɔ Debir bena Kiryat-Sefer. 12Tete Kaleb gblɔ bena. Amesi aɖu Kiryat-Sefer dzi, eye wòaxɔe la, matsɔ vinyenyɔnu Axsa ne wòaɖee. 13Eye esi Otniel, Kaleb ƒe tsɛ, Kenas ƒe vi, xɔe la, etso via Axsa nɛ woɖee. 14Eye esi wokplɔe la, nyɔnu la ɖo dalĩ nɛ be, yeabia agble ye fofo, eye wòɖi tso tedzi la dzi, Tete Kaleb biae bena: Nya kae le asiwò? 15Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Yram, etsɔ dziehenyigba nam xoxo, eyata tsɔ tsivudoawo hã nam! Tete Kaleb tsɔ vudo, siwo le to dzi kple bali me la nɛ.
16Eye Mose nyo, Keni ƒe viwo kpakple Yuda-viwo, ʋu tso devedu la me yi Yuda-gbedzi, si le Arad ƒe dziehe gome, eye wova no dukɔ la dome. 17Eye Yuda ho kpe ɖe nɔvia Simeon ŋu wova ɖu Kanaanitɔ, siwo no Zefat la dzi, eye wotsrɔ̃ wo gbidigbidi hena ŋkɔ ɖu la bena Xorma. 18Eye Yuda xɔ Gaza kple eƒe anyigba, Askalon kple eƒe anyigba kpakple Ekron kple eƒe anyigba. 19Eye Yehowa nɔ kple Yuda, ale be wòte ŋu xɔ to la, ke mete ŋu nyã amesiwo nɔ bali me la ɖa o, elabena gatasiaɖamwo le wo si. 20Wotsɔ Xebron na Kaleb, abe alesi Mose gblɔ ene, eye wònyã Enak vi elɔ̃awo le afima.
Womenya Kanaanitɔwo katã o.
21Ke Benyamin-viwo menya Yebusitɔ, siwo nɔ Yerusalem la ɖa o; eyata Yebusitɔwo kple Benyamin-viwo tsaka le Yerusalem vaseɖe egbe? 22Yosef-viwo ho yi Betel, eye Yehowa nɔ kpli wo, 23Eye Yosef-viwo na woyi ɖatsa ŋku le Betel; tsã la woyɔ du la bena Luz. 24Tete ŋkutsalawo kpɔ ŋutsua ɖe ɖo tso dua me, eye wogblɔ ne bena: Fia mɔnu, si míato age ɖe dua me la mí, ekema míave nuwò. 25Tete wòfiã dua me mɔnu wo, eye wowu duametɔwo kple yi; ke woɖe asi le ŋutsu la kple eƒe ƒometɔwo katã ŋu. 26Eye ŋutsu la yi ɖatso du ɖe Xititɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi, eye wòna ŋkɔe be Luz; ŋkɔ sia tsi eŋu vaseɖe egbe. 27Eye Manase mexɔ Bet-Sean kple eƒe duwo, Tanax kple eƒe duwo, Dortɔwo kple woƒe duwo, Yibleamtɔwo kple woƒe duwo kpakple Megidotɔwo kple woƒe duwo o, eyata Kanaanitɔwo do dzi nɔ anyigba sia dzi bɛ. 28Ke esi ŋusẽ do Israel ŋu la, ena Kanaanitɔwo wo do nɛ yaka, eye womenyã wo o. 29Eye Efrayim hã menya Kanaanitɔ, siwo nɔ Gezer la ɖa o; eyata Kanaanitɔwo tsi wo dome le Gezer. 30Zebulon menya Kidrontɔwo kple Nahaloltɔwo o; eyata Kanaanitɔwo tsi wo dome, ke wowɔ dɔ na wo yaka. 31Aser menya Akotɔwo, Zidontɔwo, Axlabtɔwo, Axzibtɔwo, Xelbatɔwo, Afiktɔwo kple Rexobtɔwo o; 32eyata Aser-viwo nɔ anyigbadzitɔ, siwo nye Kanaanitɔwo la dome, elabena womenyã wo da o. 33Eye Naftali menya Bet-Semestɔwo kple Bet-Anattɔwo ɖa o, eye wònɔ anyigbadzitɔ, siwo nye Kanaanitɔwo la dome; ke Bet-Semestɔwo kple Bet-Anattɔwo wɔ dɔ na wo yaka. 34Amoritɔwo nyã Dan-viwo ɖo ɖe towo dzi, eye womèna be, woava bali me o. 35Eye Amoritɔwo do dzi nɔ Xeres-towo dzi kple Ayalon kpakple Saalbim bɛ. Ke esi Yosef-viwo ƒe alɔ va kpe wo dzi la, wowɔ dɔ na wo yaka. 36Amoritɔwo ƒe liƒo tso Akrabim-to dzi mɔ gbɔ kple Sela hemlo ɖe nu yii.

Title: ƲƆNUDRƆ̃LAWO 2
Content:
Israel ƒe tomaɖomaɖo, veve, kemalimali kplu tohehe, Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe dɔla tso Gilgal va Boxim gblɔ bena: Mekplɔ mi tso Egipte va anyigba, si ŋu meka atam ɖo na mia fofowo gblɔ be, nyematu nye nu, si mebia kpli mi, akpɔ gbeɖe o la dzi; 2migabia nu kple anyigba sia dzitɔwo o, eye migbã woƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo! Gake mieɖo to nye gbe o. Nukaŋuti miewɔ alea ɖo? 3Eyata nye hã mele egblɔm na mi bena: nyemanyã wo le mia ŋgɔ o, ne woanye fuɖenametɔwo anɔ mia ŋu, eye woƒe mawuwo nanye mɔ̃ aɖe mi. 4Esi Yehowa ƒe dɔla gblɔ nya siawo na Israel-viwo katã la, tete dukɔ la fa avi hoo; 5eye wona ŋkɔ teƒe ma bena Boxim, eye wosa vɔ le afima na Yehowa.
6Esi Yosua ɖe asi le dukɔa ŋu la, Israel-viwo dome amesiame yi eƒe anyigba dzi, ne wòaxɔe wòanye etɔ. 7Eye dukɔ la subɔ Yehowa, ŋkeke alesi Yosua nɔ agbe kple ŋkeke alesi ame tsitsi, siwo nɔ agbe le Yosua megbe, amesiwo kpɔ nu gã, siwo katã Yehowa wɔ na Israel teƒe la, le agbe. 8Yehowa ƒe dɔla Yosua, Nun vi, xɔ ƒe alata ɖeka kple ewo hafi ku, 9eye woɖu ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe anyigba dzi le Timnat-Xeres, si le Efrayim-to dzi le Gaas-to ƒe anyiehe gome. 10Esi dzidzime mawo katã yi wo tɔgbuiwo gbɔ vɔ la, dzidzime bubu va dzɔ le wo megbe, amesiwo medze si Yehowa o, eye womenya naneke le nusiwo katã wòwɔ na Israel la ŋu o.
11Tete Israel-viwo wɔ nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o, eye wosubɔ Baalwo. 12Wogblẽ Yehowa, wo fofowo ƒe Mawu la ɖi, evɔ wònye eyae kplɔ wo tso Egipte-nyigba dzi hafi, eye wodze dukɔ, siwo ƒo xlã wo godoo la ƒe mawuwoyome, eye wode ta agu na wo hetsɔ do dɔmedzoe na Yehowa. 13Wogblẽ Yehowa ɖi hesubɔ Baal kple Astarot 14Eyata Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Israel ŋu, eye wòtsɔ wo de asi na adzowɔlawo woda adzo wo, eye wotsɔ wo dzra na woƒe futɔ, siwo ƒo xlã wo godoo la; eye womegale ŋu nɔ te ɖe woƒe futɔwo nu o. 15Eye Yehowa ƒe asi nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e le wo ŋu le afisiafi, si woyi ɖo, abe alesi Yehowa gblɔ na wo kple alesi Yehowa ka atam na wo ene, ale be woɖo xaxa me ŋutɔ. 16Eye Yehowa ɖo ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo, amesiwo ɖewo tso adzowɔlawo si me. 17Ke womeɖo to woƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo o, eye wodze mawu bubuwo yome de ta agu na wo, wote ɖa le mɔ, si dzi wo fofowo zɔ heɖo to Yehowa ƒe seawo la dzi, eye womewɔ nenema o. 18Ne Yehowa ɖo ʋɔnudrɔ̃la na wo la, Yehowa nɔa anyi kple ʋɔnudrɔ̃la la, eye wòɖea wo tsoa woƒe futɔwo si me, ŋkeke alesi ʋɔnudrɔ̃la la le agbe, elabena woƒe hũɖeɖe le fuɖenametɔwo kple ŋutasẽlawo ŋuti na be, Yehowa ƒe dɔme trɔ ɖe wo ŋu. 19Ke ne ʋɔnudrɔ̃la la ku la, ekema wotrɔna, eye wogblẽna de dzi wua wo fofowo, wodzea mawu bubuwo yome, subɔa wo hedea ta agu na wo, eye womedea asi le woƒe nuwɔwɔ kple tamesesẽ ŋu o. 20Tete Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Israel ŋu gblɔ bena: Esi dukɔ sia tu nye nu, si mebia kple wo fofowo, eye meɖo to nye gbe o la, 21eyata nye hã nyemaganyã dukɔ, siwo Yosua kpɔtɔ ɖi hafi ku la ɖa le wo ŋgɔ o; 22ne matsɔ wo ado Israel akpɔ be, wòalé ŋku ɖe Yehowa ƒe mɔ ŋu, eye woazɔ edzi abe wo fofowo ene loo, alo womalé ŋku ɖe eŋu o. 23Eyata Yehowa kpɔtɔ dukɔ siawo ɖi, menya wo enumake o, eye metsɔ wo de asi na Yosua o.

Title: ƲƆNUDRƆ̃LAWO 3
Content:
Israel subɔ ma wu bubuwo, eye wòge ɖe eƒe futɔwo si me, ke Otniel, Ehud kple Samgar ɖee.
1Esiawo nye dukɔ, siwo Yehowa kpɔtɔ ɖi be, wòatsɔ wo ado Israeltɔ, siwo katã mekpɔ Kanaan-ʋa teƒe o la akpɔ; 2ne Israel-viwo ƒe ƒome, siwo mekpɔ aʋa teƒe tsã o la, nadze aʋawɔwɔ 3Woawo nye. Filistitɔwo ƒe amegã atɔ̃awo, Kanaanitɔwo katã, Zidontɔwo kple Xiwitɔwo, siwo nɔ Libanon-towo dzi tso Baal-Xermon vaseɖe Xamat. 4Wotsi anyi, ne wòatsɔ aɖo Israel akpɔ, be woaɖo to Yehowa ƒe se, siwo wòde na wo fofowo to Mose dzi loo? 5Eye Israel-viwo nɔ Kanaanitɔwo, Xititɔwo, Amoritɔwo, Perizitɔwo, Xiwitɔwo kple Yebusitɔwo dome. 6Woɖe woƒe vinyɔnuwo, eye woawo hã tsɔ woƒe vinyɔnuwo na woƒe viŋutsuwo, eye wosubɔ woƒe mawuwo.
7Eye Israel-viwo wɔ nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o, woŋlɔ Yehowa, woƒe Mawu la be, eye wosubɔ Baalwo kple Aserawo. 8Eyata Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Israel ŋu, eye wotsɔ wo dzra na Mesopotamia-fia Kusan-Risatayim, eye Israel-viwo subɔ Kusan-Risatayim ƒe enyi sɔŋ. 9Eye Israel-viwo ɖo ɣli yɔ Yehowa, tete Yehowa ɖo xɔnametɔ na Israel-viwo, Otniel, Kaleb ƒe tsɛ, Kenas ƒe vi, eye wòɖe wo. 10Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ dze edzi, eye wòdrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na Israel; eho aʋa, eye Yehowa tsɔ Mesopotamia-fia Kusan-Risatayim de asi nɛ, eye eƒe alɔ kpe Kusan-Risatayim dzi. 11Eye anyigba la dzi fa ƒe blane, vaseɖe esime Otniel, Kenas vi la ku. 12Ke esi Israel-viwo gade asi nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o wowɔ me la, Yehowa do ŋusẽ Moab-fia Eglon ɖe Israel-viwo ŋu, elabena wowɔ nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o. 13Eye wòda Amon-viwo kple Amalekitɔwo kpe ɖe eɖokui ŋu, eye woho aʋa va si Israel, eye woxɔ devedu la. 14Israel-viwo subɔ Moab-fia Eglon ƒe wuienyi sɔŋ. 15Ke esi Israel-viwo do ɣli yɔ Yehowa la, Yehowa ɖo xɔnametɔ na wo, Ehud, ŋutsu miawɔla, si nye Benyamintɔ, Gera ƒe vi. Eye Israel-viwo tsɔ nudzɔdzɔ ɖe esi ɖo ɖe Moab-fia Eglon. 16Eye Ehud tu adekpui nuevee, si didi asi ɖeka, eye wòtae ɖe ɖusiklito le eƒe awu ʋlaya te. 17Eye wòtsɔ nudzɔdzɔ la ve na Moab-fia Eglon; Eglon enye ame lolo damia ɖe. 18Esi wotsa nudzɔdzɔ la na vɔ la, ekplɔ amesiwo tso nudzɔdzɔ vɛ la, yi ɖaɖo ɖa; 19ke etrɔ le legba, siwo le Gilgal la gbe va gblɔ bena: Fia, nya ɣaɣlaa ɖe le asinye na wò! Tete wògblɔ be: Ɖoɖoe nezi! Eye amesiwo katã tsi tre ɖe egbɔ la, do go. 20Eye Ehud yi egbɔ, esime wòle dziƒoxɔ, si me eya ɖeka nɔna xɔa ya la me. Ehud gblɔ ne bena: Mehe Mawu ƒe gbe vɛ na wò! Tete wòtsi tre tso eƒe zikpui la dzi. 21Enumake Ehud do mia ɖa di adekpui la le ɖusiklito heƒo ɖe dɔme nɛ, 22ale be atia ke hã bu ɖe me, eye ami nye tsyo adekpui la; mete ŋu ɖe adekpui la le dome nɛ o, elabena enu ɖo go ɖe megbe. 23Emegbe Ehud do go ɖe akpata me, eye woɖe ga dziƒoxɔ la ƒe ʋɔtru me ɖe enu. 24Esi wòdo go la, eƒe dolawo va, eye wokpɔ bena, dziƒoxɔ la ƒe ʋɔtruwo le dodo; eyata wobu be, afɔdzi ɖem wòanya le le yaxɔƒe la. 25Ke esi wolala ʋuu ɖokpoe meʋu ʋɔa o la, wotso safui va ʋu ʋɔ lae, eye kpɔ ɖa, woƒe amegã ku ɖe anyigba. 26Ke esi wole lalam nenema la, Ehud gbɔ legbawo ŋu, eye wòsi va Seira. 27Eye esi wògbɔ la, eku kpẽ le Efrayim-to dzi, tete Israel-viwo ɖi tso towo dzi va kpe ta ɖe eŋu, eye eya ŋutɔ dze wo ŋgɔ. 28Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Mikplɔm ɖo kaba, elabena Yehowa tso miaƒe futɔ Moabitɔwo de asi na mi! Enumake wodze eyome heva xe Yordan-tsoƒemɔ na Moabitɔwo, eye womena amea ɖeke tso tɔ la o. 29Eye wowu Moabitɔwo anɔ ame akpe ewo ɣemaɣi, ŋutsu, siwo nye ame kakowo kple aʋamewo, eye ame ɖeka hɔ̃ hã mesi o. 30Ale Moabitɔwo ge ɖe Israel ƒe asi te ɣemaɣi, eye anyigba dzi la ƒe blanyi sɔŋ.
31Eye Samgar, Anat vi, dze eyome, amesi tsɔ nyikplɔti wu Filistitɔ ame alafa ade, eye eya hã ɖe Israel.

Title: ƲƆNUDRƆ̃LAWO 4
Content:
Israel ge ɖe eƒe futɔ Yabin si me, ke Barak kple Debora ɖu edzi.
1Ke esi Ehud ku la, Israel viwo gade asi nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o la wɔwɔ me. 2Eyata Yehowa tso wo dzra na Kanaan-fia Yabin, amesi ɖu dzi le Xazor; eƒe aʋafia nye Sisera, amesi nɔ Xaroset-Goyim. 3Eye Israel-viwo ɖo ɣli na Yehowa, elabena gatasiaɖam alafa asieke le esi, eye wòle Israel-viwo ɖe anyi sesẽtɔe ƒe blave sɔŋ.
4Ɣemaɣi la nyɔnu-nyagblɔɖila Debora, Lapidot srɔ̃e, drɔ̃ ʋɔnu na Israel. 5Ena Debora ƒe ɖeti te le Rama kple Betel dome le Efrayim-to dzi, eye Israel-viwo yia egbɔ ɖadrɔ̃a ʋɔnu. 6Eye wòdɔ ame woyi ɖayɔ Barak, Abinoam vi, tso Kedes-Naftali vɛ, eye wògblɔ nɛ bena: Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la, ɖe se na wò be: Ho, yi Tabor-to la dzi, naɖe ame akpe ewo tso Naftali-viwo kple Zebulon-viwo dome kpe ɖe ɖokuiwò ŋu; 7makplɔ Sisera, Yabin ƒe aʋafia kple eƒe tasiaɖamwo kpakple eƒe aʋakɔ ava gbɔwò le Kison-toʋu la nu, eye matsɔe ade asi na wò! 8Tete Barak gblɔ nɛ bena: Ne ayi kplim la, ekema mayi; ke ne màyi kplim o la, ekema nye hã nyemayi o. 9Eɖo ŋu bena: Mele yiyi ge kpli wò tso; ke bubu, si le mɔ, si dzi dze ge nala me la, manye tɔwò o, elabena Yehowa atsɔ Sisera ade asi na nyɔnua ɖe! Eye Debora tso yi Kedes kple Barak. 10Tete Barak yɔ Zebulon kple Naftali va kpe ta ɖe Kedes, eye ŋutsu akpe ewo ho dze eyome, eye Debora hã yi kplii. 11Ke Xeber. Kenitɔ la, ʋu tso Mose ƒe nyo Xobab viwo, siwo nye Kenitɔwo la gbɔ, eye wòva tu eƒe agbadɔwo ɖe logotiwo gbɔ le Zaanayim le Kedes gbɔ.
12Eye esi wogblɔ na Sisera bena, Barak, Abinoam vi, ho va Tabor-to ŋu la, 13tete Sisera dzra eƒe gatasiaɖamwo katã ɖo, eye eya kple eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la ho tso Xaroset-Goyim va kpe ta ɖe Kison-tɔʋu la nu. 14Eye Debora gblɔ na Barak bena: Tso! Elabena egbe sia Yehowa le Sisera tso ge aɖe asi na wò. Alo ɖe Yehowa medze ŋgɔwò oa? Tete Barak ɖi tso Tabor-to la dzi, eye ame akpe ewo dze eyome. 15Eye Yehowa tsɔ yi de zi Sisera kple eƒe tasiaɖamwo katã kple eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la me le Barak ŋgɔ, eye Sisera ɖi le eƒe tasiaɖam me heto afɔ si. 16Ke Barak ti tasiaɖamwo kple aʋakɔ la yome vaseɖe Xaroset-Goyim; eye Sisera ƒe aʋakɔ blibo la tsi yi nu, ame ɖeka hɔ̃ hã mekpɔtɔ o.
Yael wu Sisera.
17Ke Sisera to afɔ si va Yael, Kenitɔ Xeber srɔ̃ ƒe agbadɔ gbɔ, elabena ŋutifafa le Xazor-fia, Yabin kple Kenitɔ Xeber ƒe aƒe la dome. 18Tete Yael yi ɖakpe Sisera gblɔ ne bena: Va, nye amegã, va dze gbɔnye, eye megavɔ̃ o! Enumake wòyi egbɔ le eƒe agbadɔ me, eye nyɔnu la tsɔ avɔ tsyɔ nɛ. 19Eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Taflatse, na tsi via ɖem mano, elabena tsikɔ le wuyem. Enumake wòʋu notsilãgbalẽgolo la, eye wonae wòno, emegbe wògatsyɔ avɔ nɛ. 20Eyome wògblɔ nɛ bena: Yi, natsi tre ɖe agbadɔ la ƒe mɔnu, eye ne amea ɖe va bia wò bena: amea ɖe le afisia hã la, ekema gblɔ bena: O! 21Tete Xeber srɔ̃ Yael tsɔ agbadɔtsyɔti, eye wotsɔ zu ɖe asi yi egbɔ dzaa, eye wòƒu tsyoti la ɖe tonu nɛ mimi ɖe anyigba. Ke edɔ alɔ yi me ʋĩ, elabena ɖeɖi le eŋu, eye woku. 22Esi Barak ti Sisera yome la, Yael do go va kpee, eye wògblɔ nɛ bena: Va, ne mafia amesi ɖim nèle la wò! Esi wòyi la, ekpa Sisera ku ɖi, eye tsyoti ƒo ɖe tonu nɛ. 23Ale Mawu baba Kanaan-fia Yabin ɖe anyi le ŋkeke ma dzi le Israel-viwo ŋku me enye si. 24Eye Israel-viwo ƒe asi kpe Kanaan-fia Yabin dzi, vaseɖe esime wotsɔe vo keŋkeŋ.

Title: ƲƆNUDRƆ̃LAWO 5
Content:
Debora kple Barak fe aseyetsoha.
1Tete Debora kple Barak, Abinoam vi, wodzi ha gbemagbe bena: 2Esi aʋafiawo dze Israel ŋgɔ, eye dukɔ la lɔ̃ faa ŋuti la, mikafu Yehowa! 3Mi fiawo, misee; mi amegãwo, miƒu to anyi! Mele ha dzi ge, Yehowae mele ha dzi ge na, Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu lae mele saŋku ƒo ge na! 4Yehowa, esi neho tso Seir, eye netsa to Edom-tagba la, anyigba ʋuʋu, dziŋgɔ ɖuɖu tsi, eye alilikpowo hã dza tsi; 5towo dzo kpekpekpe le Yehowa ŋku me, eye Sinai sia ʋuʋu le Yehowa. Israel ƒe Mawu ƒe ŋku me. 6Le Samgar, Anat vi, ŋɔli kple Yael ŋɔli la mɔwo to gbe, eye amesiwo zɔa mɔ tatawo dzi la, to gbedzemɔwo. 7Aʋafiawo nu tso le Israel, wo nu tso, vaseɖe esime nye Debora medo, medo abe Israel dada ene! 8Wotia mawu yeyewo; eyata aʋa va ke ɖe woƒe duwo ŋu. Womegakpɔ akpoxɔnu kple akplɔa ɖeke le Israel ƒe ame akpe blaneawo dome o. 9Nye dzi enye Israel ƒe tatɔwo kple amesiwo lã faa le dukɔa dome la to. Mikafu Yehowa! 10Mi amesiwo do tedzinɔ ɣiwo, kple mi amesiwo no kuntruwo dzi, kpakple mi amesiwo le mo la, midzi ha! 11Esi aŋutrɔdalawo tso aseye le lãtoawo gbɔ la, wokafu Yehowa ƒe nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔwo kple Israel ƒe aʋafiawo ƒe nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔwo le afima Emegbe Yehowa ƒe dukɔ la gbugbɔ yi duwo me. 12Nyɔ, nyɔ, Debora! nyɔ, nyɔ, nadzi ha! Tsi tre. Barak! Abinoam vi, kplɔ wò aboyomewo! 13Tete dukɔ la ƒe bubume mamleawo va, eye Yehowa ɖi va gbɔnye le kalẽtɔwo dome. 14Wotso Efrayim, amesi ƒe agunu le Amalek, eye Benyamin to wo megbe va ge ɖe woƒe amehawo dome. Tatɔwo ɖi abu tso Maxir kple Zebulon, amesiwo si tsiameti la le. 15Isaxar-amegãwo le Debora ŋu, eye Isaxar kpe ɖe Barak ŋu hedze eyome kpledu-kpledu yi bali la me. Ruben-tɔʋuwo nu wode adaŋu gãwo le. 16Nukaŋuti nètsi lãhawo gbɔ, be nalé to ɖe lãhawo ƒe xɔxlɔ̃ ŋu? Ruben-tɔʋuwo nu wode adaŋu gãwo le. 17Gilead tsi Yordan ƒe go keme dzi bɔkɔɔ. Nukaŋuti Dan nye amedzro le nuwo me? Aser baba nɔ ƒuta, eye wòtsyɔ akɔ anyi ɖe eƒe adɔ̃wo nu. 18Zebulon enye dukɔa ɖe, si ku kutsikpe, hekpe ɖe Naftali ŋu le gbadzaƒeto la dzi. 19Fiawo va wɔ aʋa, Kanaan-fiawo va wɔ aʋa ɣemaɣi le Tanax le Megido-tɔ la nu; ke womekpɔ klosaloa ɖeke xɔ o! 20Dziƒo wotso wɔ aʋa la, ɣletiviwo nɔ woƒe mɔwo dzi wɔ aʋa kple Sisera. 21Kison-tɔʋu la kplɔ wo yii, blematɔʋu Kison. Nye luʋɔ, do kple ŋusẽ! 22Kalẽtɔ, siwo si la, ƒe sɔwo ƒe afɔzi le ɖiɖim. 23Yehowa ƒe dɔla be; Aɖi Meros ŋu! Aɖi eme nɔlawo ŋu kpekpekpe; elabena womeva xɔ na Yehowa o, womeva xɔ na Yehowa le kalẽtɔwo dome o! 24Woayra Yael le nyɔnuwo dome, Kenitɔ Xeber srɔ̃, wõayrae le nyɔnu, siwo nɔa agbadɔ me la dome! 25Tsi wòbia, ke notsie wònae, bubumewo ƒe tre me woku notsi kpekẽ ɖo vɛ. 26Eɖo asi ɖa tsɔ tsyoti, eye wòlé gbeɖe ƒe zũ ɖe ɖusi; eda zũ ɖe Sisera ƒe ta dzi, eye wòfe eƒe tonu ŋɔe wòɖi go ɖe egodo. 27Etsra ɖe eƒe afɔ nu wɔɔ, eƒe afɔ nu wòtsra ɖo, eye afisi wòtsra ɖo la, afima woku ɖo. 28Sisera dada do mo ɖe fesre nu, eye wòdo ɣli to adzralawo me gblɔ bena: Nukaŋuti eƒe tasiaɖamwo gbe vava, eye nukaŋuti eƒe sɔwo ƒe afɔzi tsi megbe ale? 29Nyɔnu bubume, siwo le egbɔ la, ɖo eŋu nɛ; ke egale biabia dzi ko be: 30Ɖe womekpɔ aboyonu ma oa? Nyɔnuvi ɖeka alo eve na ŋutsu ɖeka, Sisera ƒe aboyonu nanye awu ŋɔŋɔewo, akɔgbavɔ ɖeka alo eve, siwo le ŋɔŋɔe, nanye fiasrɔ̃ ɖeka tɔ! 31Yehowa, alea wò futɔwo katã atsrɔ̃ enye si! Ke amesiwo lɔ̃nɛ la le, abe alesi ɣe dzena kple ŋusẽ ene.
Eye anyigba la ŋu fa ƒe blane sɔŋ.

Title: ƲƆNUDRƆ̃LAWO 6
Content:
Gideon zu ʋɔnudrɔ̃la.
1Esi Israel-viwo wɔ nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o la, Yehowa tsɔ wo ɖe asi na Midiantɔwo ƒe adre sɔŋ. 2Midiantɔwo ƒe asi kpe Israel dzi, eye Israel-viwo wɔ bebeƒewo ɖe towo dzi kple agadowo me kpakple nɔƒe sesẽwo le Midiantɔwo la. 3Godoo ne Israel ƒã nu la, Midiantɔwo kple Amalekitɔwo kpakple ɣedzeƒeviwo hona ɖe wo ŋu, 4eye woƒua asaɖa ɖe wo ŋu hegblẽa agblemenuawo vaseɖe Gaza ke, womekpɔa nuɖuɖua ɖeke, ale, nyi alo tedzi ɖe Israel o; 5elabena ɖe wohona vana kple woƒe lãwo kpakple agbadɔwo, eye woawo kple woƒe kposɔ naneawo ƒona ɖi bibibi abe ʋetsuviwo ene; ale wovana, be woagblẽ anyigba la. 6Ale Israel ɖi gbɔ le Midiantɔwo ŋku me, eye Israel-viwo do ɣli yɔ Yehowa.
7Esi Israel-viwo do ɣli yɔ Yehowa le Midiantɔwo ta la, 8Yehowa dɔ nyagblɔɖilaa ɖe ɖo ɖe Israel-viwo gbɔ wògblɔ na wo bena: Ale Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la, gblɔ esi: Nye ŋutɔe kplɔ mi tso Egipte, tso kluvinyenyeƒe me; 9meɖe mi tso Egiptetɔwo kple miaƒe futɔwo katã si me, eye menya wo ɖa le mia ŋgɔ hetsɔ woƒe anyigba na mi. 10Eye megblɔ na mi bena: Nyee nye Yehowa, mia Mawu, migasubɔ Amoritɔ, siwo ƒe anyigba dzi miele la, ƒe mawuwo o; ke miegbe toɖoɖo nye gbe.
11Eye Yehowa ƒe ɖɔla va bɔbɔ nɔ logoti te le Ofra, si nye Abiesritɔ Yoas tɔ, eye via Gideon le lu ƒom le lugbɔƒe, be wòatsɔ asii le Midiantɔwo nu. 12Eye Yehowa ƒe ɖɔla ɖo ɖe edzi gblɔ nɛ bena: Yehowa li kpli wò, wò ŋutsu kalẽtɔ! 13Gideon ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Tsoo, nye aƒetɔ! Ne Yehowa li kpli mi ɖe, nukaŋuti nusiawo katã dzɔ ɖe mia dzi? Eye afika eƒe nukunu, siwo katã ŋu mía fofowo nɔa dze ɖom le na mí be, Yehowa kplɔ mí tso Egipte la le? Azɔ Yehowa tutu mí ƒu gbe, eye wòtsɔ mí ɖe asi na Midiantɔwo. 14Tete Yehowa trɔ ɖe eŋu gblɔ bena: Yi le wò ŋusẽ sia nu, eye naɖe Israel tso Midiantɔwo si me, nye ŋutɔe le dɔwòm! 15Eɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Taflatse, nye aƒetɔ! Nuka tsɔ ge mala ade Israel? Kpɔ ɖa, nye ƒome enye suetɔ le Manase, eye nyee nye dɔmlɔea le tofonye ƒe me! 16Tete Yehowa gblɔ nɛ bena: Manɔ anyi kpli wò kokoko, eye asi Midiantɔwo abe ŋutsu ɖeka ene. 17Edo ŋu nɛ bena: Ne eve nunye la, ekema na dzesim be, wòe le nu ƒom kplim! 18Megadzo le afisia o, vaseɖe esime matsɔ nye vɔsanu aɖo akɔwòme hafi! Eɖo ŋu be: Manɔ anyi, vaseɖe esime natrɔ agbɔ.
19Tete Gideon yi ɖawu gbɔ̃tsuvi ɖeka, eye wotsɔ wɔ eta ɖeka tɔ tatali maʋamaʋã; efɔ lã la ɖe golo me, eye woku detsitsi la de kutu me hetsɔ va egbɔ le logoti la te, eye wòtsɔe ɖo ekɔme. 20Ke Mawu ƒe dɔla la gblɔ ne bena: Tsɔ lã kple tatali maʋamaʋã la da ɖe agakpe sia dzi, eye natsɔ detsitsi la akɔ ɖe anyi. Tete wòwɔ nenema 21Eye Yehowa ƒe dɔla la tsɔ atikplɔ, si le esi la nu tɔ lã kple tatali maʋamaʋã la dzi, enumake dzo do tso agakpe la me hefiã lã kple tatali maʋamaʋã la, eye Yehowa ƒe dɔla la bu vi le eƒe ŋku me. 22Esi Gideon kpɔ bena, Yehowa ƒe dɔlae la, egblɔ bena: Alele, Aƒetɔ Yehowa! Elabena mekpɔ Yehowa ƒe dɔla ŋku me kple ŋku me. 23Ke Yehowa gblɔ nɛ bena: Ŋuwo nafa, megavɔ̃ o, mele kuku ge o! 24Eye Gideon ɖi vɔsamlekpui na Yehowa ɖe afima, eye wòna ŋkɔe bena: Yehowae nye ŋutifafa. Ele Abiesritɔwo ƒe Ofra vaseɖe egbe.
25Eye Yehowa gblɔ nɛ le zã ma me bena: Lé fofowò ƒe nyitsu ɖeka kpe ɖe nyitsu bubu, si xɔ ƒe adre la ŋu; gbã Baal ƒe vɔsamlekpui, si nye fofowò tɔ, eye nalã Asera, si le eŋu la ɖa! 26Emegbe naɖi vɔsamlekpui na Yehowa, wò Mawu la, ɖe agakpe sia tame, tsɔ nyitsu evelia sa numevɔe, eye natsɔ Asera, si nèlã la, awɔ nakee. 27Tete Gideon ɖe ŋutsu ewo le eƒe dɔlawo dome, eye wòwɔ, abe alesi Yehowa gblɔ nɛ ene; mewɔe le keli o, ke boŋ ewɔe le zã, elabena ele fofoa ƒemetɔwo kple dua me ŋutsuwo vɔ̃m. 28Esi dua me ŋutsuwo fɔ ŋdi kanya la, kpɔ ɖa, wogbã Baal ƒe vɔsamlekpui la, lã Asera, si le eŋu la ɖa, eye wotsɔ nyitsu sa vɔ le vɔsamlekpui, si woɖi la dzi. 29Tete wode asi gbɔgblɔ me na wo nɔewo bena: Ameka wɔ nusia? Eye wodzro me hebia eta se, eye wose bena, Gideon, Yoas vi, wɔ nusia. 30Enumake dua me ŋutsuwo gblɔ na Yoas bena: Kplɔ viwò la doe, ne wòaku, elabena egbã Baal ƒe vɔsamlekpui, eye wòlã Asera, si le eŋu la ɖa. 31Tete Yoas gblɔ na amesiwo katã tsi tre ɖe egbɔ bena: Dzree miehe, yewoawɔ ɖe Baal nua? Alo ɖe miebe, yewoaxɔ nya ɖe enua? Ne amea ɖe be, yeawɔ dzre ɖe enu la, aku ŋdi sia! Nenye Mawue wonye la, ekema newɔ dzre ɖe eɖokui nu, le esi wogbã eƒe vɔsamlekpui la ta! 32Eye wona ŋkɔe tso gbemagbe be Yerub-Baal hegblɔ bena: Baal newɔ dzre kplii, elabena eyae gbã eƒe vɔsamlekpui.
33Eye Midiantɔwo katã kple Amalekitɔwo kpakple ɣedzeƒeviwo kpe la heho va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Yezreel-bali me. 34Eye Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ yɔ Gideon me fũ; tete woku kpẽ yɔ Abiesritɔwo bena, wòadze eyome. 35Edɔ lãme ɖo ɖe Manase blibo la yɔ wo be, wòadze eyome, eye wòdo ame ɖo ɖe Aser, Zebulon kple Naftali, eye wova kpe wo. 36Tete Gideon gblɔ na Mawu bena: Nenye dzinye to ge nala aɖe Israel, abe alesi nègblɔ ene la, 37ekema matsɔ alẽgbalẽ da ɖe lugbɔƒe, eye ne zãmu ƒo alẽgbalẽ la ɖeɖeko, eye anyigba blibo la le ƒuƒuie la, ekema madze sii be, dzinye to ge nala aɖe Israel, abe alesi nègblɔ ene. 38Eye wòva me nenema. Esi wòfɔ ŋdi la, efiã zãmu le alẽgbalẽa me wòyɔ tre bana. 39Eye Gideon gblɔ na Mawu bena: Taflatse, megado dɔmedzoe ɖe ŋunye be, megale nu ƒo ge fifia o! Na magatsɔ alẽgbalẽ la atee akpɔ zi ɖeka! Alẽgbalẽ la ɖeɖeko nanɔ ƒuƒuie, ke zãmu naƒo anyigba blibo la dzi! 40Eye Mawu wɔ nenema le zã ma me Alẽgbalẽ la ɖeɖeko dzi le ƒuƒuie, ke zãmu ƒo anyigba la: dzi.

Title: ƲƆNUDRƆ̃LAWO 7
Content:
Gideon ɖu Midiantɔwo dzi.
1Tete Yerub-Baal, si nye Gideon, kple dukɔ blibo, si le eŋu la, fɔ ŋdi kanya va ƒu asaɖa anyi de Xarod-vudo la gbɔ, eye Midiantɔwo ƒe asaɖa le woƒe anyiehe gome, tso More-togbɛ la gbɔ ɖo ta bali la me. 2Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Gideon bena: Amesiwo le ŋuwò la, sɔ gbɔ akpa be, matsɔ Midiantɔwo ade asi na wo; ne Israel magaƒu asi akɔ ɖe ŋunye agblɔ bena: nye ŋutɔ nye asi metsɔ xɔ na ɖokuinye o! 3Eyata ɖe gbe ƒã ɖe amea wo ƒe to me bena: Amesi ke le vɔvɔ̃m, eye dzi mele eƒo o la, netrɔ, eye wòagbugbɔ tso Gilead-to la gbɔ! Tete ameawo dome ame akpe blave vɔ eve trɔ dzo, eye ame akpe ewo susɔ. 4Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Gideon bena: Ameawo: gasɔ gbɔ akpa ko. Kplɔ wo yi tɔ la nu, ne mado wo akpɔ na wò le afima, eye amesi ke magblɔ na wò be, neyi kpli wò la, eya nayi kpli wò; ke amesi ke magblɔ na wò be, megayi kpli wò o la, mayi kpli wò o! 5Esi wòkplɔ ameawo va tɔa nu la, Yehowa gblɔ na Gideon bena: Tia amesiwo ɖuɖɔ tsi la abe avu ene kple amesiwo dze klo kpe nu ɖe; me noe la, ɖe vovo! 6Eye amesiwo kui kple asi kplɔ la, le ame alafa etɔ̃, ke ame mamleawo katã dze klo kpe nu ɖe tsia me noe. 7Eye Yehowa gblɔ na Gideon bena: Ame alafa etɔ̃, siwo kui kplɔ la, tsɔ ge mala aɖe mi, eye matsɔ Midiantɔwo aɖe asi na wò; ke ame mamleawo katã negbugbɔ yi aƒe. 8Eye ameawo tsɔ mɔ dzi nuɖuɖu kple woƒe kpẽwo ɖe asi; ke eɖe asi le Israeltɔ bubuawo katã ŋu amesiame yi eƒe xɔ nu, eye wòtsɔ ame alafa etɔ̃awo kpe ɖe eɖokui ŋu. Eye Midiantɔwo ƒe aʋasaɖa le abu me le eŋku me.
9Eye Yehowa gblɔ nɛ le zã ma me bena: Tso, naɖi yi asaɖa la me, elabena metsɔe ɖe asi na wò! 10Ke ne èle yiyi vɔ̃m la, ekema mia kple wò dɔla Pura miyi asaɖa la me, 11eye nase nya, si gblɔ ge wòala. Emegbe dzi aɖo ƒowò, eye naho ɖe asaɖa la ŋu. Tete eya kple eƒe dɔla Pura wova asaɖa la me le aʋawɔlawo ƒe dodo nu. 12Eye Midiantɔwo kple Amalekitɔwo kpakple ɣedzeƒeviwo ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe bali la me kpaŋkpaŋ abe ʋetsuviwo ene, eye woƒe kposɔ naneawo sɔ gbɔ abe ƒutake ene. 13Esi Gideon va la, kpɔ ɖa, ŋutsua ɖe le drɔ̃e lim na nɔvia bena: Meku drɔ̃e kpɔ luboloa ɖe mli togotogo va Midiantɔwo ƒe asaɖa me, eye wòlɔ aʋafia ƒe agbadɔ wòmã dze anyi hetrɔ gbo, eye agbadɔla tsi nenema. 14Tete nɔvia ɖo ŋu ne bena: Menye nu bubua ɖekee o, ke boŋ Israeltɔ Gideon, Yoas vi la, ƒe yie. Mawu tsɔ Midiantɔwo kple woƒe asaɖa blibo la ɖe asi nɛ. 15Esi Gideon se drɔ̃e la kple egɔme la, edo gbe ɖa; emegbe wògbugbɔ va Israel ƒe asaɖa la me gblɔ bena: Mitso, elabena Yehowa tsɔ Midiantɔwo ƒe asaɖa la de asi na mí! 16Eye wòmã ame alafa etɔ̃awo ɖe aʋalɔgo etɔ̃ me, eye wòtsɔ kpẽwo kple ze ƒuƒlu, siwo me akakatiwo le la, ɖe asi na wo katã. 17Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Mikpɔ asinyenu, eye miawo hã miawɔ nenema! Ne meva asaɖa la ƒe mlɔenu, eye mewɔ nane la, ekema miawo hã miawɔe! 18Ne mía kple amesiwo katã le gbɔnye míeku kpẽawo la, ekema mi amesiwo katã ƒo xlã asaɖa blibo la godoo la, miaku kpẽawo ahagblɔ bena: Yehowa kple Gideon tɔe!
19Eye Gideon kple ame alafa ɖeka, siwo le eŋu la, va asaɖa la ƒe mlɔeanu le zãtiƒe, esime woɖe ŋudzɔnɔlawo ɖo anyi tetee; eye woku kpẽawo hegbà ze, siwo le wo si. 20Eye aʋalɔgo etɔ̃awo ku kpẽawo hegbã zeawo; wole akakatiawo ɖe mia, eye wòlé kpẽawo ɖe ɖusi le kukum hele ɣli dom bena: Yehowa kple Gideon tɔe nye yi la! 21Amesiame tɔ ɖe eteƒe le asaɖa la ŋu godoo, tete zi ƒo ɖe asaɖa blibo la me, eye wole ɣli dom hele sisim. 22Esime ame alafa etɔ̃awo le kpẽawo kum la, Yehowa na amesiame trɔ yi nu ɖe nɔvia ŋu le asaɖa blibo la me, eye aʋakɔ la si, vaseɖe Bet-Sita ɖo ta Zereda va ke ɖe Abel-Mexola ƒe liƒo ŋu hegbɔ Tabat ŋu yi. 23Eye woyɔ Israel-ŋutsuwo tso Naftali kple Aser kpakple Manase blibo la, eye wonyã Midiantɔwo ɖe nu. 24Eye! Gideon do ame ɖo ɖe Efrayim-to blibo la dzi gblɔ bena: Miyi ɖaxe towo kple Yordan nu na Midiantɔwo vaseɖe Bet-Bara! Tete woyɔ Efrayim-ŋutsuwo katã, eye woxe tɔawo kple Yordan nu vaseɖe Bet-Bara. 25Eye wòlé Midiantɔwo ƒe amegã eveawo, Oreb kple Zeeb; wowu Oreb ɖe Oreb-kpe la gbã, eye wowu Zeeb ɖe Zeeb ƒe weinfiãƒe. Emegbe woti Midiantɔwo yome, eye wotsɔ Oreb kple Zeeb ƒe ta vɛ na Gideon le Yordan ƒe go keme dzi.

Title: ƲƆNUDRƆ̃LAWO 8
Content:
Gideon ti futɔ la yome.
1Tete Efrayim-ŋutsuwo gblɔ nɛ bena: Nuka nye esi nèwɔ ɖe mía ŋu, eye esi neho aʋa ɖe Midiantɔwo ŋu la, negbe mia yɔyɔ? Eye wohe dzre kplii vevie. 2Ke eɖo ŋu na wo bena: Ɖe miawo miewɔ wum oa? Ɖe Efrayim ƒe weinxaxa mlɔetɔ menyo wu Abieser ƒe weinxaxa blibo la oa? 3Mawu tso Midian-amegãwo, Oreb kple Zeeb, de asi na mi, eye nuka mewo tso wu mi? Esi wògblɔ nya sia la, woƒe dziku la nu fa. 4Esi Gideon va Yordan nu, eye eya kple ame alafa etɔ̃, siwo le eŋu, tsoe, eye ɖeɖi te wo ŋu belibeli le wo yometiti me la, 5egblɔ na Sukottɔwo bena: Midi aboloa ɖewo na amesiwo le yonyeme la, elabena ɖeɖi te wo ŋu belibeli, eva mele Zebax kple Zalmuna, Midtan-fiawo, yome tim. 6Sukot-amegãwo ɖo ŋu bena: Ɖe wò asi tu Zebax kple Zalmuna, hafi miatso abolo na wò aʋakɔ la? 7Eye Gideon gblɔ bena: Enyo! Ne Yehowa tsɔ Zebax kple Zalmuna de asi nam la, ekema matsɔ gbedadaƒoŋɔka kple ŋuwo adze mia ŋutii. 8Eye woho tso afima yi Penuel, eye wògblɔ na woawo hã alea ke, ke Penueltɔwo ɖo ŋu nɛ abe Sukottɔwo ke ene. 9Tete wògblɔ na Penueltɔwo bena: Ne metrɔ gbɔ le ŋutifafa me la, magbã mɔ̃ sia aƒu anyi!
10Ke Zebax kple Zalmuna kpakple woƒe aʋakɔ la va Karkor, eye amesiwo katã kpɔtɔ le ɣedzeƒeviwo ƒe aʋakɔ me la, ana ame akpe wuiatɔ̃; ke amesiwo kpla yi, eye wotsi aʋa la, le ame akpe alafa ɖeka kple blave. 11Eye Gideon to asimɔ gã dzi le Nobax kple Yogbeha ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome, eye wòsi aʋakɔ la, le esime woli bɔkɔɔ. 12Tete Zebax kple Zalmuna wòsi, eye woti wo yome helé Midian-fia eveawo, Zebax kple Zalmuna, eye wòde zi asaɖa blibo la me.
13Esi Gideon, Yoas vi, trɔ tso aʋa la tso Xeres-to dzi mo nu la, 14ele Sukot-ɖekakpuia ɖe, eyewòbiae wòŋlɔ Sukot-amegãwo kple ame tsitsiwo ŋkɔ nɛ, wole ame blaadre va adre. 15Eye esi wòva Sukottɔwo gbɔ la, egblɔ bena: Zebax kple Zalmuna enye si, amesiwo mietsɔ ɖu fewu le ŋunye gblɔ bena: Ɖe wò asi tu Zebax kple Zalmuna, hafi miana abolo wò ame, siwo ŋu ɖeɖi te belibeli la mahã? 16Emegbe wòlé dua me tsitsiawo, eye wòna Sukottɔwo ʋẽ gbedadaƒoŋɔka kple ŋuwo se. 17Egbã Penuel mɔ̃ la ƒu anyi, eye wowu duametɔwo. 18Eye wògblɔ na Zebax kple Zalmuna bena: Ŋutsu ka ƒomeviwoe miewu le Tabor gbɔ? Woɖo ŋu bena: Wole abe wò ene, eye wo dome ɖesiaɖe ɖi fiavi. 19Tete wògblɔ bena: Nɔvinyeŋutsuwoe, danyeviwo wonye. Meta si Yehowa ƒe agbe! Ɖe wònye ɖe miena wotsi agbe la, anye ne nyemele mia wu ge o. 20Enumake wògblɔ na eƒe ŋgɔgbevi Yeter bena: Tso, nawu wo! Ke ele vɔvɔ̃m, eye meɖi eƒe yi o, elabena ɖevi wònye. 21Tete Zebax kple Zalmuna gblɔ bena: Wò ŋutɔ tso, nadza mí, elabena ŋutsu kple eƒe ŋusẽe sɔ! Tete Gideon tsi tre, eye wowu Zebax kple Zalmuna; eye wòɖe kogɛ, siwo le kɔ na woƒe kposɔwo.
Gideon ɖo trɔ̃subɔsubɔ anyi.
22Tete Israeltɔwo gblɔ na Gideon bena: Wò ŋutɔ kple viwòŋutsu kpakple viwòŋutsu ƒe vi miɖu fia ɖe mía dzi, elabena wòe ɖe mí tso Midiantɔwo si me! 23Gideon ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Nye ŋutɔ alo vinyeŋutsu míaɖu fia ɖe mia dzi o, ke boŋ Yehowa neɖu fía ɖe mia dzi! 24Gideon gblɔ na wo bena: Nu ɖeka biam mele tso mia si, mia dome amesiame netsɔ togɛ, siwo woha la nam. Ismaeltɔwo wonye, eyata woɖo sikatogɛ. 25Woɖo ŋu bena: Miana wò baa! Tete wokeke avɔ ɖe anyi, eye amesiame fɔ togɛ, si woha la, va ɖa ɖe eme. 26Eye sikatogɛ, siwo wòbia la, ƒe kpekpeme le sekel akpe ɖeka kple alafa adre, womebu kogɛ kple tomedzonu kpakple aɖabɛwu, siwo Midian-fiawo do, kple kɔsɔkɔsɔ, siwo le ka na woƒe kposɔwo la, ɖe me o. 27Eye Gideon tsɔ wo wɔ kɔmewu hetsɔ ɖa ɖe eƒe du Ofra me, eye Israel blibo la subɔe, eye wòtrɔ zu mɔ̃ na Gideon ƒe aƒe la.
Gideon viwo kpakple eƒe ku.
28Ale wobɔbɔ Midiantɔwo ɖe anyi le Israel-viwo ŋku me, eye womegafɔ ta dzi kpɔ o. Eye anyigba la dzi fa le Gideon ŋɔli ƒe blane sɔŋ. 29Eye Yerub-Baal, Yoas vi, yi ɖanɔ eƒe me. 30Ŋutsuvi blaadre le Gideon si, siwo nye eya ŋutɔ ƒe ali me viwo, elabena eɖe srɔ̃ geɖe. 31Eye eƒe ahiã, si le Sixem la, dzi ŋutsuvi nɛ, eye wòtsɔ ŋkɔ nɛ bena Abimelex. 32Gideon, Yoas vi la, tsi ŋutɔ hafi ku, eye woɖii ɖe fofoa Yoas ƒe yɔɖo me le Abiesritɔwo ƒe Ofra. 33Esi Gideon nya ku ko la, Israel-viwo trɔ hesubɔ Baalwo, eye wotsɔ Baal-Berit wɔ woƒe mawui. 34Eye Israel-viwo ƒe ŋku dzo le Yehowa, woƒe Mawu la dzi, amesi ɖe wo tso woƒe futɔwo katã, siwo ƒo xlã wo godoo la si me. 35Eye womeve Yerub-Baal, amesi nye Gideon la ƒe ƒomeawo nu o, evɔ wònye ewo nyui geɖe na Israel hafi.

Title: ƲƆNUDRƆ̃LAWO 9
Content:
Abimelex wu nɔviawo, eye woɖo fiae.
1Eye Abimelex, Yerub-Baal vi, yi dadaa nɔviwo gbɔ le Sixem, eye wòƒo nu kpli wo kpakple dadaa fofo ƒomeawo katã bena: 2Miƒo nu ɖe Sixemtɔwo ƒe to me bena: Kae nyo na mi wu; Yerub-Baal vi blaadreawo katã naɖu fia ɖe mia dzi loo, alo ame ɖeka naɖu fia ɖe mia dzia? Minyae bena, nyee nye mia ƒu kple mia ŋutilã! 3Tete dadaa nɔviwo gblɔ nya siawo katã ɖe Sixemtɔwo katã ƒe to me, eye woƒe dzi trɔ ɖe Abimelex ŋu, elabena wobui wo nɔvii. 4Woɖe klosalo blaadre nɛ tso Baal-Berit ƒe gbedoxɔ me, eye Abimelex tsɔe da yakamewo kple ame vlowo wodze eyome. 5Eye wòva fofoa ƒe me le Ofra, eye wowu nɔviawo, siwo nye Yerub-Baal vi blaadreawo, ɖe kpe ɖeka dzi; ke Yotam, si nye Yerub-Baal ƒe dɔmlɔea, tsi agbe, elabena eɣla eɖokui. 6Eye Sixemtɔwo katã kple Milo-nɔlawo katã va kpe ta, eye woɖo fia Abimelex le logoti, si nye ŋkuɖodziti le Sixem la gbɔ.
Yotam ƒe glinya la.
7Esi wogblɔ nya sia na Yotam la, eyi ɖatsi tre ɖe Gerizim-to la dzi, eye wòdo ɣli sesĩe gblɔ na wo bena: Mi Sixemtɔwo, miɖo tom, ne Mawu naɖo to mi! 8Gbe ɖeka atiwo be, yewoaɖo fia ɖe yewo ɖokui nu, eye wogblɔ na amiti bena: Ɖu fia ɖe mía dzi! 9Tete amiti gblɔ na wo bena: Magblẽ nye ami, si mawuwo kple amegbetɔwo kafuna nam la ɖi, ne mayi aɖanɔ agba sam ɖe atiwo dzia? 10Atiawo gblɔ na gboti bena: Wòava ɖu fia ɖe mía dzi! 11Tete gboti gblɔ na wo bena: Magblẽ nye tsi vivi kple nye kutsetse xɔasiwo ɖi, ne mayi aɖanɔ agba sam ɖe atiwo dzia? 12Atiawo gblɔ na weinka bena Wòa va naɖu fia ɖe mía dzi! 13Tete weinka ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Magblẽ nye tsetse me tsi, si doa dzidzɔ na mawuwo kple amegbetɔwo la ɖi, ne mayi aɖanɔ agba sam ɖe atiwo dzia? 14Eye atiawo katã gblɔ na ŋuve bena: Wòa va ɖu fia ɖe mía dzi! 15Tete ŋuve gblɔ na atiawo bena: Nenye nyateƒe to gblɔm miele be, miasi ami nam manye fia ɖe mia dzi la, ekema miva bè ɖe nye vɔvɔli te! Ne menye nenem o la, ekema dzo ado tso ŋuve la me, eye wòafiã Libanon ƒe sedertiwo! 16Azɔ nuteƒe kple nu dzɔdzɔe wònye miewɔ be, mieɖo fia Abimelex mahã? Eye nu nyui wònye miewɔ na Yerub-Baal kple eƒe aƒe ɖe nusiwo wòwɔ na mi nua? 17Fofonye wo aʋa na mi, eye wòtsɔ eƒe agbe ke ku heɖe mi tso Midiantɔwo si me vɔ tso, 18hafi miawo miedze aglã ɖe fofonye ƒe aƒe ŋu egbea, eye miewu via blaadreawo ɖe kpe ɖeka dzi hetsɔ eƒe ahiã ƒe vi Abimelex ɖo fia ɖe Sixemtɔwo nu, le esi wònye mia nɔvi ta. 19Nenye nuteƒe kple nu dzɔdzɔe wònye miewɔ na Yerub-Baal ƒe aƒe egbe la, ekema mikpɔ dzidzɔ le Abimelex ŋu, eye eya hã nakpɔ dzidzɔ le mia ŋu! 20Ne menye nenem o la, ekema dzo nedo tso Abimelex me, ne wòafiã Sixemtɔwo kple Milo-nɔlawo, eye dzo nedo tso Sixemtɔwo kple Milo-nɔlawo me, ne wòafiã Abimelex! 21Tete Yotam si le nɔvia Abimelex nu yi Beer, eye, wònɔ afima.
Abimelex ƒe nuwuwu.
22Esi Abimelex ɖu Israel dzi ƒe etɔ̃ la, 23Mawu de gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃ɖia ɖe Abimelex kple Sixemtɔwo me, ale bena Sixemtɔwo trɔ le Abimelex yome, 24bena ne nu vlo, si wowɔ ɖe Yerub-Baal vi blaadreawo ŋu, kple woƒe ʋu nava wo nɔvi Abimelex, si wu wo, kple Sixemtɔwo, amesiwo de dzi ƒo nɛ wòwu nɔviawo la dzi. 25Eye Sixemtɔwo ɖe amewo wode xa ɖe towo dzi ɖe eŋuti, eye woda adzo amesiwo to mɔ dzi yi. Tete wova gblɔe na Abimelex.
26Ekema me Gaal, Ebed vi, kple nɔviawo va Sixem. Eye esi! Sixemtɔwo ɖo ŋu ɖe eŋu la, 27woyi agble ɖaxa woƒe weintsetsewo hewɔ wein, eye woɖu akpedadaŋkekenyuie: woyi de woƒe mawu ƒe me ɖu nu no nu, eye woɖo ɖiŋu na Abimelex. 28Eye Gaal, Ebed vi, gblɔ bena: Ameka nye Abimelex, eye ameka nye Sixemtɔ ma ƒe vi, ne míasubɔe? Ɖe menye eyae nye Yerub-Baal ƒe vi, eye wòtsɔ Zebul ɖo dumegã oa? Misubɔ Sixem fofo Hemor ƒe viwo boŋ! Nuka la gɔ̃ miasubɔ eya ɖo? 29Ɖe wònye dukɔ sia asinye mee wòle la, ne manyã Abimelex, eye magblɔ na Abimelex bena: Dzi wò aʋakɔ ɖe dzi, eye naho aʋa!
30Esi dumegã Zebul se Gaal, Ebed vi ƒe nyawo la, eve dome nɛ, 31eye wòdɔ amewo dzaa ɖo ɖe Abimelex gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa, Gaal, Ebed vi, kple nɔviawo va Sixem, eye wode ʋunyaʋunya du la me ɖe ŋuwò! 32Eyata mia kple wò amewo mifɔ zã, ne miava de xa ɖe gbe me! 33Ne ŋu ke, eye ɣe dze la, nava dze ɖu la dzi; ekema eya kple eƒe amewo aho ɖe ŋuwò, eye nawɔe, abe alesi nakpɔ mɔnu le eŋu ene. 34Tete Abimelex kple aʋakɔ blibo, si le eŋu la, fɔ zã heva de xa ɖe Sixem ŋu le atidzedze ene me. 35Esi Gaal, Ebed vi, do yi ɖatsi tre ɖe dua ƒe agbo nu la, tete Abimelex kple aʋakɔ, si le eŋu la, do tso xa me. 36Eye esi Gaal kpɔ aʋakɔa la, egblɔ na Zebul bena: Kpɔ ɖa, aʋakɔa ɖe nye kem le ɖiɖim tso to la dzi! Ke Zebul ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Towo ƒe vɔvɔli kpɔm nèle be, amewoe. 37Ke Gaal gagblɔ ne bena: Kpɔ ɖa, amewo le ɖiɖim tso anyigba ƒe kɔkɔƒe, eye aʋalɔgo ɖeka to dzotɔwo ƒe logoti gbɔ mɔ! 38Tete Zebul gblɔ nɛ bena: Menye wòe le nu me ɖim le gbɔgblɔm bena: ameka nye Abimelex, ne míasubɔe oa? Esia nye aʋakɔ, si ŋu nèle alɔme ɖem le. Azɔ ho, nayi aɖawɔ aʋa kplii! 39Tete Gaal ho dze Sixemtɔwo ŋgɔ, eye wòwɔ aʋa kple Abimelex. 40Ke Abimelex nyãe, eye wòsi le enu vaseɖe agbo nu, eye ame geɖewo tsi aʋa. 41Abimelex tsi Aruma, ke Zebul nyã Gaal kple nɔviawo, ale be womekpɔ mɔ anɔ Sixem o. 42Esi ŋu ke, eye amewo yi agble la, wova gblɔe na Abimelex. 43Tete wòmã aʋakɔ la ɖe aʋalɔgo etɔ̃ me, eye wòyi ɖade xa ɖe gbe me. Eye esi wòkpɔ be, amewo do tso dua me gbɔna la, edo ɖewo ŋu, eye wòwu wo. 44Abimelex kple aʋalɔgo, si le eŋu la, va xe du la ƒe agbo nu, ke aʋalɔgo eve yi ɖadze amesiwo katã le agble la dzi, eye wowu wo. 45Emegbe Abimelex wɔ aʋa kple ɖu la ŋkeke blibo la katã, eye wòxɔ du la hewu eme nɔlawo, eye wògbã du la hewu dze ɖe edzi. 46Esi Sixem-mɔ̃metɔwo see la, woyi ɖe mɔ̃, si le mawu Berit ƒe me la me. 47Eye wova gblɔe na Abimelex bena, Sixem-mɔ̃metɔwo katã ƒo ƒu. 48Tete Abimelex kple aʋakɔ, siwo katã le eŋu la, yi Zalmon-to la dzi, eye Abimelex tsɔ fia lã atilɔ hetsɔ ɖe abɔta, eye wògblɔ na eƒe amewo bena: Netsɔ, miawɔ abe alesi mewɔ miekpɔ ene! 49Tete ana ka blibo la lã atilɔwo hedze Abimelex yome, eye wotsɔ wo va kɔ ɖe mɔ̃ la ŋu hetɔ dzo mɔ̃ la. Ale Sixem-mɔ̃metɔwo katã hã ku woanɔ ŋutsu akpe ɖeka hekpe ɖe nyɔnuwo ŋu.
50Emegbe Abimelex ho ɖe Tebez ŋu, eye wòɖe to ɖe Tebez hexɔe. 51Mɔ̃ sesẽa ɖe le dua titina, eye duametɔwo katã, ŋutsuwo kple nyɔnuwo, si yi ɖe afi ma hedo ʋɔ ɖe wo ɖokui nu, eye wode mɔ̃ la tame. 52Eye Abimelex te ɖe mɔ̃ la ŋu hewɔ aʋa kplii, eye wòva kekeke mɔ̃ la ƒe agbo nu, be yeatɔ dzoe. 53Tete nyɔnua ɖe tsɔ tevi xlã ɖe la na Abimelex, eye wògbã ta le enu. 54Enumake wòyɔ eƒe adekplɔvi gblɔ ne bena: Di wò yi, ne natrɔm ɖo, ne womagagblɔ ɖe ŋunye be, nyɔnue wui o! Tete eƒe adekplɔvi da nui wòku. 55Esi Israeltɔwo kpɔ bena, Abimelex ku la, amesiame gbugbɔ yi aƒe. 56Ale Mawu ɖo Abimelex ƒe nu vlo, si wòwɔ ɖe fofoa ŋu hewu nɔvia blaadreawo la, teƒe nɛ. 57Eye Mawu he nu vlo, siwo katã Sixemtɔwo wo la, va wo dzi. Ale Yotam, Yerub-Baal vi, ƒe fiƒode la ɖi wo ŋu.

Title: ƲƆNUDRƆ̃LAWO 10
Content:
Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo: Tola kple Yair ŋu nya.
1Le Abimelex megbe la Isaxartɔ Tola, si nye Pua, Dodo vi ƒe vi ɖo, be yeaxɔ na Israel, eye wònɔ Samir le Efrayim-to la dzi. 2Eye esi wòdrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na Israel ƒe blave vɔ etɔ̃ sɔŋ megbe la, eku, eye woɖii ɖe Samir.
3Eya megbe Gilead-tɔ Yair do, eye wòdrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na Israel ƒe blave vɔ eve sɔŋ. 4Ŋutsuvi blaetɔ̃ nɔ esi, siwo do tedzivi blaetɔ̃, eye du blaetɔ̃ nɔ wo si, esiwo woyɔna be Yair-kɔƒewo vaseɖe egbe, wole Gilead-nyigba dzi. 5Eye Yair ku woɖii ɖe Kamon.
Filistitɔwo kple Amon-viwo ɖe fu na Israel-viwo.
6Eye Israel-viwo yi dzi wɔ nusi medze Yehowa ŋu o, eye wosubɔ Baalwo kple Astarot, Aramtɔwo ƒe mawuwo, Zidontɔwo ƒe mawuwo, Moabtɔwo ƒe mawuwo, Amon-viwo ƒe mawuwo kple Filistitɔwo ƒe mawuwo, ke wogblẽ Yehowa ɖi, eye womesubɔe o. 7Eyata Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Israel ŋu, eye wotsɔ wo dzra na Filistitɔwo kple Amon-viwo. 8Eye wote Israel-vi, siwo katã nɔ Yordan ƒe go keme dzi le Amoritɔ, siwo nɔ Gilead ƒe anyigba dzi la, ɖe anyi, eye wosẽ ŋuta le wo ŋu tso ƒe ma dzi ƒe wuienyi sɔŋ. 9Eye Amon-viwo tso Yordan, be woawɔ ana kple Yuda kple Benyamin kpakple Efrayim-viwo, eye Israel ɖo xaxa me. 10Eyata Israel-viwo ɖo ɣli yɔ Yehowa bena: Miewɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe ŋuwò, elabena miegblẽ miaƒe Mawu ɖi hesubɔ Baalwo. 11Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Israel-viwo bena. Esi Egiptetɔwo, Amoritɔwo, Amon-viwo kple Filistitɔwo, 12Zidontɔwo, Amalekitɔwo kple Maontɔwo ɖe fu na mi, eye miedo ɣli yɔm la, nyemexɔ na mi oa? 13Ke miawo mìegblẽm ɖi hesubɔ mawu bubuwo, eyata nyemegale mia ɖe ge azɔ akpɔ o. 14Miyi ɖado ɣli yɔ mawu, siwo mieha, ne woaxɔ na mi le miaƒe xaxaɣiwo me! 15Ke Israel-viwo gblɔ na Yehowa bena: Miewɔ nuvɔ̃, eyata wɔ mí, alesi dze ŋuwò; ke ɖe mí fifia ko! 16Tete woɖe mawu bubuawo ɖa le wo ɖokui dome hesubɔ Yehowa; eyata Israel ƒe fukpekpe la mena wòɖe dzi ɖi o.
17Eye Amon-viwo kpe ta heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Gilead, eye Israel-viwo hã kpe ta va ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Mizpa. 18Tete Gileadtɔwo ƒe amegãwo gblɔ na wo bena: Amesi ayi aɖakpe aʋa kple Amon-viwo gbã la, eya anye natɔ ɖe Gileadtɔwo nu!

Title: ƲƆNUDRƆ̃LAWO 11
Content:
Yefta ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃dɔ.
1Yefta, Gileadtɔ la, enye ŋutsu kalẽtɔa ɖe, ke gbolovie wònye, eye Gilead ye dzi Yefta. 2Eye Gilead srɔ̃ dzi viwo nɛ, eye esi srɔ̃ ƒe viwo tsi la, wonyã Yefta gblɔ nɛ bena: Wòa mànyi dome le mía fofo ƒe me o, elabena nyɔnu bubu vi nènye! 3Tete Yefta si le nɔviawo nu yi ɖanɔ Tob-nyigba dzi, eye yakamewo va kpe ta ɖe Yefta ŋu, eye woɖea aʋa kplii. 4Esi eteƒe didi ʋee la, Amon-viwo va wo aʋa kple Israel. 5Eye esi Amon-viwo ho aʋa ɖe Israel ŋu la, Gilead-ame tsitsiwo yi, be woakplɔ Yefta tso Tob-nyigba dzi vɛ 6Wogblɔ na Yefta bena: Va nanye míaƒe aʋafia, ne miawo aʋa kple Amon-viwo! 7Tete Yefta ɖo ŋu na Gilead-ame tsitsiwo bena: Menye miawoe le fum, eye mienyãm tso fofonye ƒe me oa? Azã esi mieɖo xaxa me la, mieva gbɔnye! 8Gilead-ame tsitsiwo gblɔ na Yefta bena: Esia ta pɛ mieva gbɔwo ɖo, be nayi kpli mi, ne miawo aʋa kple Amon-viwo, eye natre zu nato ɖe Gileadtɔwo katã nu! 9Eye Yefta gblɔ na Gilead-ame tsitsiwo bena: Ne miekplɔm meyi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Amon-viwo, eye Yehowa tso wo ɖe asi nam la, ekema manye miaƒe tatɔ. 10Gilead-ame tsitsiwo gblɔ na Yefta bena: Yehowa enye ɖasefo le mía dome! Miawo, abe alesi nègblɔ ene kokoko. 11Tete Yefta yi kple Gilead-ame tsitsiawo, eye Yefta gblɔ nya siawo katã le Yehowa ŋku me le Mizpa.
12Eye Yefta do amewo ɖo ɖe Amon-viwo ƒe fia gbɔ gblɔ bena: Nya ka le mía dome, hafi nèho ɖe ŋunye, be nawɔ aʋa kple nye anyigba? 13Amon-viwo ƒe fia gblɔ na Yefta ƒe dolawo bena: Elabena Israel xɔ nye anyigba, esime wotso Egipte va, tso Arnon nu vaseɖe Yabok kple Yordan nu; eyata gagbugbɔe nam kpoo! 14Tete Yefta gadɔ amewo ɖo ɖe Amon-viwo ƒe fia eho, 15eye wògblɔ nɛ bena: Yefta ƒe gbe enye si: Israel mexɔ anyigbaa ɖeke le Moabtɔwo kple Amon-viwo si o. 16Elabena esi Israel tso Egipte, eye wòto gbedzi va Avaƒu la nu heva ɖo Kades la, 17edo ame ɖo ɖe Edom-fia be, woagblɔ nɛ bena: Na mato wò anyigba dzi ayi! Ke Edom-fia melɔ̃ edzi nɛ o. Eda ame ɖo ɖe Moab-fia gbã, ke eya hã gbe; eyata Israel tsi Kades. 18Eye wòto gbedzi hetrɔ Edom-nyigba kple Moab-nyigba ta, eye wova ɖo Moab-nyigba ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome heƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Arnon ƒe go keme dzi, ke womeva Moab-nyigba dzi o, elabena Arnon ye do liƒo na Moab. 19Tete Israel do amewo ɖo ɖe Amoritɔwo ƒe fia Sixon, si no Xesbon la gbo be, woagblɔ nɛ bena: Na mato wò anyigba dzi ayi, vaseɖe esime made denyeƒe! 20Ke Sixon meɖo ŋu ɖe Israel ŋu, ne wòana wòato eƒe anyigba dzi ayi o, eye Sixon ƒo eƒe dukɔ blibo la nu ƒu heva ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Yaza, eye wòwɔ ana kple Israel. 21Tete Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la, tso Sixon kple eƒe dukɔ blibo la de asi na Israel, eye wòsi wo. Ale Israel xɔ Amoritɔ, siwo nye anyigba dzi towo la, ƒe anyigba blibo la wòzu wo to. 22Eye woxɔ Amoritɔwo ƒe anyigba blibo la tso Arnon nu vaseɖe Yabok nu, tso gbedzi vaseɖe Yordan nu. 23Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la, nyã Amoritɔwo ɖa le eƒe dukɔ Israel ŋgɔ tso, hafi wòa nèbe, yeaxɔe wòanye tɔ wòa? 24Me wò mawu Kemos xɔ nane na wò la, eya nye tewò, ke amesiwo katã Yehowa, mía Mawu, nyã le mía ŋgɔ la ƒe anyigba enye mía tɔ. 25Wòe nye ame wu Moab-fia Balak, Zipor vi la? Ɖe wòwɔ dzre kple Israel alo wɔ aʋa kplii kpɔa? 26Esi Israel nɔ Xesbon kple eƒe duwo, Aroer kple eƒe duwo, kpakple du, siwo katã le Arnon nu me, ƒe alafa etɔ̃ sɔŋ enye si la, nukaŋuti mienyã wo le ɣeyiɣi siawo me kpɔ o? 27Nyemeda voa ɖeke ɖe ŋuwò, hafi wòa nèwɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi sia ɖe ŋunye hehe, yeawɔ aʋa kplim o. Yehowa, nye ʋɔnudrɔ̃la, nadrɔ̃e na Israel-viwo kple Amon-viwo egbea! 28Ke Amon-viwo ƒe fia meɖo to Yefta ƒe nya, siwo wògblɔ ɖo ɖee la o.
Yefta ɖu Amon-viwo dzi, eye wòɖe adzɔgbe.
29Tete Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ dze Yefta dzi, eye wòto Gilead kple Manase heva Mizpe-Gilead; eye woho tso Mizpe-Gilead ɖe Amon-viwo ŋu. 30Eye Yefta ɖe adzɔgbe na Yehowa gblɔ bena: Ne ètsɔ Amon-viwo ɖe asi nam vava, 31eye megbɔ tso Amon-viwo gbɔ le ŋutifafa me la, ekema nusianu, si ke ado tso aƒenye me ava kpena la, anye Yehowa tɔ, eye matsɔe asa numevɔe. 32Tete Yefta ho aʋa ɖe Amon-viwo ŋu, eye Yehowa tsɔ wo ɖe asi nɛ. 33Eye wòsi wo tso Aroer vaseɖe Minit heva ke ɖe Abel-Keramim, wole; du blave, eye wòɖu wo dzi vevie ŋutɔ. Ale wobɔbɔ Amon-viwo, ɖe anyi le Israel-viwo ŋku me.
34Eye esi Yefta gbɔ va aƒe le Mizpa la, kpɔ ɖa, vianyɔnu tsɔ axatsɛ le ɣe ɖum va kpee; ŋutsuvi alo nyɔnuvia ɖeke megale esi o, eyae nye eƒe tesi. 35Esi wòkpɔe la, edze eƒe awuwo gblɔ bena: Oo, vinye, èdo nublanuitɔm, eye nèhe dzɔgbevɔ̃e va dzinyea? Meke nu na Yehowa, eye nyemagate ŋu atrɔe o! 36Tete wòɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Fofonye, ne èke nu na Yehowa la, ekema wɔm, abe alesi do tso wò nu me ene, elabena Yehowa bia hlɔ̃ wò futɔ, siwo nye Amon-viwo, na wò! 37Eye wògblɔ na fofoa bena: Wɔ esia ko nam: Ɖe mɔ nam dzinu eve, ne mia kple xɔ̃nyewo míayi towo dzi aɖafa nye ɖetugbinyenye! 38Eɖo ŋu bena: Heyi! Ale wòɖe mɔ nɛ dzinu eve, eye eya kple xɔlɔ̃wo yi ɖafa eƒe ɖetugbinyenye le towo dzi. 39Esi dzinu evea nu yi la, egbugbɔ va fofoa gbɔ, eye wòwɔ nyɔnuvi la, abe alesi wòɖe adzɔgbee ene. Ke ŋutsua ɖeke mede asi eŋu kpɔ o. Eye wòtrɔ zu kɔnu le Israel ƒe sia ƒe 40be, Israel-nyɔnuviwo yina ɖafaa Gileadtɔ Yefta ƒe vinyɔnu ŋkeke ene le ƒe ɖeka me.

Title: ƲƆNUDRƆ̃LAWO 12
Content:
Wosi Efrayimtɔwo.
1Tete Efrayimtɔwo ƒo ƒu ho va anyiehe, eye wogblɔ na Yefta bena: Nukaŋuti nèho ana ɖe Amon-viwo ŋu, eye mèyɔ mí, be míayi kpli wò oa? Miatɔ dzo wò xɔ ɖe dziwò! 2Yefta ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Mía kple nye dukɔ míekpe aʋa vɔ kple Amon-viwo, eye meyɔ mi, gake mieva xɔm le wo si o. 3Esi mekpɔ be, miele xɔxɔm nam o la, metsɔ nye agbe ke ku, eye meho aʋa ɖe Amon-viwo ŋu, eye Yehowa tsɔ wo de asi nam. Nukaŋuti mieho ɖe ŋunye fifia, be miawɔ aʋa kplim? 4Tete Yefta ƒo Gileadtɔwo katã nu ƒu yi ɖawɔ aʋa kple Efrayim, eye Gileadtɔwo si Efrayim; elabena wogblɔ bena: Gileadtɔwo nye Efrayim ƒe ame dzegowo: Gilead le Efrayim kple Manase dome. 5Eye Gileadtɔwo xe Yordan-tsoƒewo na Efrayim. Eye ne Efrayimtɔ sisia ɖe va gblɔ be: mina matso tɔa la, Gileadtɔwo bianɛ bena: Efrayimtɔ nènyea? Eɖoa ŋu be: Kpao! 6Wogblɔna nɛ be: Gblɔ be Sibolet! Tete wogblɔna be Zibolet; elabena meɖo ŋu ɖo be, wòagblɔe nyuie o. Enumake wolénɛ, eye wowunɛ ɖe Yordan-tsoƒe la. Ale Efrayimtɔ ame akpe blane vɔ eve kũ ɣemaɣi. 7Eye Yefta drɔ̃ ʋɔnu na Israel ƒe ade, emegbe Yefta, Gileadtɔ la ku, eye woɖu ɖe Gilead-duwo dometɔ ɖeka me.
Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo Ibzan, Elon kple Abdon ŋu nya.
