Tete gbemelã, siwo le Libanon dzi, va nyã avuzi le ŋuvegoe la dzi. 10Esi Edomtɔwo, eyata dzi ɖo ƒowò. Wò bubu la nenɔ ŋuwò, ne natsi aƒe; nukaŋuti nèbe, yeade ɖokuiwò dzɔgbevɔ̃e me, eye mia kple Yuda siaa míatsi? 11Ke Amazya meɖo toe o. Tete Israel-fia Yoas ho va, eye eya kple Yuda-fia Amazya wokpe akɔ le Bet-Semes, si nye Yuda to la. 12Ke Israel si Yuda, eye wo dome amesiame si yi eƒe agbadɔ me. 13Israel-fia Yoas lé Yuda-fia Amazya, Axazya vi Yoas ƒe vi, le Bet-Semes, eye wòkplɔe va Yerusalem. Eye wògbã Yerusalem ƒe gli tso Efrayim-gbo la nu vaseɖe dzogoedzigbo la gbɔ, ele abɔklugui alafa ene. 14Eve wòlɔ sika kple klosalowo katã kple nusiwo katã le Yehowa ƒe aƒe kple fia ƒe aƒe ƒe nudzraɖoƒe hekpe ɖe awɔbamewo ŋu, eye wògbugbɔ yi Samaria. 15Yoas ŋutinya susɔea, nusiwo wòwɔ kple eƒe kalẽwɔwɔwo kpakple alesi wòwɔ aʋa kple Yuda-fia Amazya la, woŋlɔ woɖe Israel-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me. 16Eye Yoas mlɔ fofoawo gbɔ, eye woɖu ɖe Israel-fiawo gbɔ le Samaria, eye via Yerobeam zu Ha ɖe eteƒe.
17Eye Yuda-fia Amazya, Yoas vi, nɔ agbe ƒe wuiatɔ̃ le Israel-fia Yoas, Yoaxaz vi ƒe ku megbe. 18Amazya ŋutinya susɔea la, woŋlɔe ɖe Yuda-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me. 19Ke woɖo nugbe ɖe eŋu le Yerusalem; tete wòsi yi Laxis, gake wodɔ ame ɖe eyome ɖe Laxis woɖawui le afima. 20Eye wokɔe ɖo sɔ dzi va ɖi ɖe fofoawo gbɔ le Yerusalem ɖe Dawid ƒe du la me. 21Tete Yuda-dukɔ blibo la tsɔ Azarya, amesi nye ƒe wuiade vi la, ɖo fia ɖe fofoa Amazya teƒe. 22Eyae tso Elat, eye wògaxɔe na Yuda, le esi fia la mlɔ fofoawo gbɔ megbe.
Israel-fiaɖuƒe. Yerobeam fia evelia.
23Le Yuda-fia Amazya, Yoas vi ƒe ƒe wuiatɔ̃lia me la Yerobeam, Israel-fia Yoas ƒe vi, zu fia le Samaria ƒe blane vɔ ɖeke. 24Ewɔ nusi nye vɔ le Yehowa ŋku me, eye meɖe asi le Yerobeam, Nebat vi ƒe nuvɔ̃, siwo katã wòtsɔ ble Israel de nuvɔ̃ me la ŋu o. 25Egbugbɔ Israel ƒe liƒowo xɔ tso Xamat nutowo me vaseɖe tagbaƒu la nu, abe alesi Yehowa. Israel ƒe Mawu la gblɔ to eƒe dɔla, nyagblɔɖila Yona, Amitai vi, tso Gat-Xefer dzi la ene. 26Elabena Yehowa kpɔ Israel ƒe hiã be, enu sẽ ŋutɔ, eye be, ɖeviwo kple ame tsitsiwo siaa nu yi, eye xɔnametɔa ɖeke meli na Israel o. 27Elabena Yehowa megblɔ be, yeatutu Israel ƒe ŋkɔ ɖa le dziƒoa te o, eyata wòɖe wo to Yerobeam, Yoas vi la dzi. 28Yerobeam ŋutinya susɔea kple nusiwo katã wòwɔ, eƒe kalẽwɔwɔwo kple aʋa, si wòwɔ kpakple alesi wògbugbɔ Damasko kple Xamat, siwo nye Yuda tɔ tsã, na Israel la, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Israel-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me. 29Eye Yerobeam mlɔ fofoa, Israel-fiawo gbɔ, eye via Zaxarya zu fia ɖe eteƒe.

Title: FIAWO II 15
Content:
Yuda fiaɖuƒe. Azarya alo Uziya.
1Le Israel-fia Yerobeam ƒe ƒe blave vo adrelia me la Azarya, Yuda-fia Amazya ƒe vi, zu fia. 2Exɔ ƒe wuiade, esime wòzu fia, eye wòdu fia le Yerusalem ƒe blaatɔ̃ va eve. Dadaa ŋkɔ nye Yexalya tso Yerusalem. 3Ewɔ nusi dze Yehowa ŋu, abe alesi fofoa Amazya wɔ pɛpɛpɛ ene. 4Negbe nuxeƒewo ko womeɖe ɖa o, eye dukɔ la gasa vɔ hedo dzudzɔ le nuxeƒewo. 5Ke Yehowa ɖe fu na fia la, eye wòdze anyi vaseɖe eƒe kugbe, eye wònɔ xɔa ɖe me le aga. Eye fia ƒe vi Yotam no aƒe la nu hedrɔ̃ ʋɔnu dukɔ hahoo la. 6Azarya ŋutinya susɔea kple nusiwo katã wòwɔ la, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Yuda-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me. 7Eye Azarya mlɔ fofoawo gbɔ, eye woɖu ɖe fofoawo gbɔ le Dawid ƒe du la me, eve via Yotam zu fia ɖe eteƒe.
Israel fiaɖuƒe. Zaxarya.
8Le Yuda-fia Azarya ƒe ƒe blaetɔ̃ vɔ enyilia me la Zaxarya, Yerobeam vi, zu fia ɖe Israel dzi le Samaria dzinu ade. 9Ewɔ nusi nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋku me, abe alesi fofoawo wɔ ene; eye meɖe asi le Yerobeam, Nebat vi ƒe nuvɔ̃, siwo wòtsɔ ble Israel de nuvɔ̃ me la ŋu o. 10Tete Salum, Yabes vi, ɖo nugbe ɖe eŋu, eye wòwui le Yibleam hezu fia ɖe eteƒe. 11Zaxarya ŋutinya susɔea la, woŋlɔe ɖe Israel-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me. 12Esia nye nya, si Yehowa gblɔ na Yehu bena: Viwòwo anɔ Israel-fiazikpui la dzi vaseɖe dzidzime enelia dzi: eye nenema wòva mee.
Salum.
13Le Yuda-fia Uziya ƒe ƒe blaetɔ̃ vɔ asiekelia me la Salum, Yabes vi, zu fia, eye woɖu fia le Samaria dzinu ɖeka. 14Tete Menaxem, Gad vi, tso Tirza ho va Samaria, eye wowu Salum, Yabes vi la, hezu fia ɖe eteƒe. 15Salum ŋutinya susɔea kple alesi wòɖo nugbe la, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Israel-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me. 16Ɣemaɣi Menaxem tsrɔ̃ Tapuax kple nusiwo katã le eme kpakple eƒe nutowo me, elabena esi wotso Tirza va la, womeʋu agbo nɛ o, eyata wòsi wo, eye wòdze ƒo le woƒe funɔwo katã nu.
17Le Yuda-fia Azarya ƒe ƒe blaetɔ̃ vɔ asiekelia me la Menaxem, Gad vi, zu fia ɖe Israel dzi ƒe ewo le Samaria. 18Ewo nusi nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋku me, eye meɖe asi le Yerobeam, Nebat vi ƒe nuvɔ̃, siwo wòtsɔ ble Israel de nuvɔ̃ me la ŋu o. 19Eŋɔli Asur-fia Pul va dze anyigba la dzi, eye Menaxem tsa klosalo talento akpe ɖeka na Pul, be woakpe ɖe ye ŋu, ne fiaɖuɖu la nali ke ɖe ye si me. 20Eye Menaxem dzo ga le Israel tso aʋawolawo katã si, be ŋutsu sia ŋutsu natsɔ klosalo sekel blaatɔ̃ na Asur-fia. Ale Asur-fia gbugbɔ, eye metsi anyigba la dzi afima o. 21Menaxem ŋutinya susɔea kple nusiwo katã wòwɔ la, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Israel-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me. 22Eye Menaxem mlɔ fofoawo gbɔ, eye via Pekaxya zu fia ɖe eteƒe.
Pekaxya.
23Le Yuda-fia Azarya ƒe ƒe blaatɔ̃lia me la Pekaxya, Menaxem vi, zu fia ɖu Israel dzi ƒe eve le Samaria. 24Ewɔ nusi nye vɔ le Yehowa ŋku me, eye meɖe asi le Yerobeam, Nebat vi ƒe nuvɔ̃, siwo wòtsɔ ble Israel de nuvɔ̃ me la ŋu o. 25Tete eƒe fia ŋu me Pekax, Remalya vi, ɖo nugbe ɖe eŋu, eye wòwui le fia ƒe aƒe ƒe mɔ̃ me le Samaria: Arkob kple Arye kpakple ŋutsu blaatɔ̃, siwo nye Gilead-viwo, kpe ɖe eŋu, eye wòwui hezu fia ɖe eteƒe. 26Pekaxya ŋutinya susɔea kple nusiwo katã wòwɔ la, kpɔ ɖa, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Israel-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me.
Pekax. Asiria-boyo me nɔnɔ dze gɔme.
27Le Yuda-fia Azarya ƒe ƒe blaatɔ̃ vɔ evelia me la Pekax, Remalya vi, zu fia ɖe Israel dzi ƒe blave le Samaria. 28Ewɔ nusi nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋku me, eye meɖe asi le Yerobeam, Nebat vi ƒe nuvɔ̃, siwo wotso ble Israel de nuvɔ̃ me la ŋu o. 29Le Israel-fia Pekax ŋɔli la Asur-fia Tiglat-Pileser va, eye wòxɔ Yion, Abel-Bet-Maaxa, Yanoax, Kedes, Xazor, Gilead kple Galilea, si nye Naftali-nyigba blibo la, eye wòkplɔ wo yi Asur. 30Tete Xosea, Ela vi, ɖo nugbe ɖe Pekax, Remalya vi la ŋu, eye wòwui hezu fia ɖe eteƒe le Yotam, Uziya vi ƒe ƒe blavelia me. 31Pekax ŋutinya susɔea kple nusiwo katã wòwɔ la, kpɔ ɖa, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Israel-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me.
Yuda-fiaɖuƒe. Fia Yotam.
32Le Israel-fia Pekax, Remalya vi ƒe ƒe evelia me la Yotam, Yuda-fia Uziya ƒe vi, zu fia. 33Exɔ ƒe blave vo atɔ̃, esime wòzu fia, eye woɖu fia ƒe wuiade le Yerusalem. Dadaa ŋkɔ nye Yerusa, Zadok ƒe vinyɔnu. 34Ewo nusi dze Yehowa ŋu; alesi fofoa Uziya wɔ la, nenema pɛpɛpɛ wòwɔ. 35Negbe nuxeƒewo ko womeɖe ɖa o, eye dukɔ la gasa vɔ hedo dzudzɔ le nuxeƒewo. Eyae de dzigbegbo le Yehowa ƒe aƒe la nu. 36Yotam ŋutinya susɔea kple nusiwo katã wòwɔ la, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Yuda-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me.
37Ɣemaɣi Yehowa de asi Aram-fia Rezin kple Pekax, Remalya vi dɔdɔ me ɖe Yuda ŋu. 38Eye Yotam mlɔ fofoawo gbɔ, eye woɖu ɖe fofoawo gbɔ ɖe fofoa Dawid ƒe du la me, eye via Axaz zu fia ɖe eteƒe.

Title: FIAWO II 16
Content:
Fia Axaz.
1Le Pekax, Remalya vi ƒe ƒe wuiadrelia me la Axaz, Yuda-fia Yotam ƒe vi, zu fia. 2Axaz xɔ ƒe blave, esime wòzu fia, eye woɖu fia ƒe wuiade le Yerusalem. Mewu nusi dze Yehowa, eƒe Mawu la ŋu abe fofoa Dawid ene o, 3ke boŋ eto Israel-fiawo ƒe ʋe me; gɔglɔ̃gɔ la ena viawo to dzo me le dukɔ, siwo Yehowa nyã le Israel-viwo ŋgɔ la ƒe ŋunyɔnuwo nu. 4Esa vɔ, eye wòdo dzudzɔ le nuxeƒewo, togbɛwo dzi kple ati damawo katã te. 5Ɣemaɣi Aram-fia Rezin kple Israel-fia Pekax, Remalya vi, woho aʋa ɖe Yerusalem ŋu, eye woɖe to ɖe Axaz, ke womete ŋu wɔ aʋa kplii o. 6Ɣemaɣi Aram-fia Rezin gaxɔ Elat na Edomtɔwo, eye wonyã Yudatɔwo tso Elat, eye Edomtɔwo va Elat henɔ afima vaseɖe egbe. 7Tete Axaz dɔ ame ɖo ɖe Asur-fia Tiglat-Pileser, ne woagblɔ nɛ bena: Wò dɔla kple viwò menye, va, ne naɖem tso Aram-fia kple Israel-fia, amesiwo tso ɖe ŋunye la si me. 8Eye Axaz tso klosalo kple sika, si le Yehowa ƒe aƒe kple fia ƒe aƒe fe nudzraɖoƒe la, wo nunanae ɖo ɖe Asur-fia. 9Asur-fia ɖo toe, eye Asur-fia ho va Damasko hexɔe, eye wòkplɔ wo yi Kir, eve wowu Rezin.
10Tete fia Axaz yi, be yeakpe Asur-fia Tiglat-Pileser le Damasko. Esi fia Axaz kpo vɔsamlekpui, si le Damasko la, eɖo eƒe nɔnɔme ɖe nunɔla Uriya, eye wotae, abe alesi wowɔe pɛpɛpɛ ene. 11Eye nunɔla Uriya ɖi vɔsamlekpui la; alesi fia Axaz ɖoe ɖa tso Damasko la, nenema pɛpɛpɛ nunɔla Uriya wɔe, hafi fia Axaz gbɔ tso Damasko. 12Esi ha la gbɔ tso Damasko, eye wòkpɔ vɔsamlekpuia la, ede vɔsamlekpui la dzi, eye wòsa vɔ le edzi. 13Etɔ dzo eƒe numevɔsa kple nuɖuvɔsawo le edzi, eye wòkɔ eƒe nunovɔsawo ɖe edzi, eye wohlẽ eƒe akpedavɔsa ƒe ʋu ɖe vɔsamlekpui la dzi. 14Ke ete akɔblivɔsamlekpui, si le Yehowa ŋku me le xɔa ŋgɔdze la ɖa, be maganɔ vɔsamlekpui; la kple Yehowa ƒe xɔ la domee o, eye wòtsɔe ɖe vɔsamlekpui la ƒe axa dzi le anyiehe gome. 15Eye fia Axaz de se na nunɔla Uriya gblɔ bena: Sa ŋdinumevɔ kple fiẽnuɖuvɔ kple fia ƒe numevɔ kple eƒe nuɖuvɔ kpakple dukɔ hahoo la katã ƒe numevɔ kple nuɖuvɔ kpakple woƒe nunovɔwo le vɔsamlekpui gã la dzi, eye hlẽ woƒe numevɔsa kple akpedavɔsa ƒe nuwo katã ɖe edzi. Ke akɔblivɔsamlekpui la nena anyi, mana eŋuti bum kpɔ. 16Eye nunɔla Uriya wo pɛpɛpɛ, abe alesi fia la de se ene. 17Fia Axaz gbã anyinɔawo kɔgo, eye wòɖe zeawo ɖa le wo dzi, eɖe gazɔ, si le akɔblinyiawo dzi la, ɖe anyi hetsɔe ɖo kpewo dzi. 18Eye wòɖe dzudzɔgbekpata, si wotu ɖe xɔ la ŋu, kple fia ƒe toƒe, si le gota gome la ɖa le Yehowa ƒe xɔ la ŋu le Asur-fia ta. 19Axaz ŋutinya susɔea kple nusiwo wòwɔ la, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Yuda-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me. 20Eye Axaz mia fofoawo gbɔ, eye woɖii ɖe fofoawo gbɔ ɖe Dawid ƒe du la me, eye via Xizkiya zu fia ɖe eteƒe.

Title: FIAWO II 17
Content:
Israel-fiaɖuƒe. Hosea, si nye fia mamletɔ.
1Le Yuda-fia Axaz ƒe ƒe wuievelia me la Hosea, Ela vi, zu fia ɖu Israel dzi ƒe asieke le Samaria. 2Ewɔ nusi nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋku me, ke menye abe Israel-fia, siwo nɔ ŋgɔ nɛ la ene o. 3Eye Asur-fia Salmanaser ho ɖe eŋu, eye Hosea zu eƒe dɔla hedzo nu nɛ. 4Ke Asur-fia kpɔ be, Hosea ɖo nugbe ɖe eŋu, elabena edo ame ɖo ɖe Egipte-fia So, eye megatsɔ nunana vɛ na Asur-fia abe ƒe sia ƒe ene o; tete Asur-fia lée, eye wòblae tso de gaxɔ me. 5Eye Asur-fia ho va anyigba blibo la dzi, eye woho ɖe Samaria ŋu heɖe to ɖee ƒe etɔ̃. 6Le Hosea ƒe ƒe asiekelia me la Asur-fia xɔ Samaria, eye wòkplɔ Israel yi Asur hetsɔ wo ɖo Xalax kple Xabor le Gozan-tɔsisi la nu kpakple Media-duwo me.
Asiriatɔwo ɖe aboyo Israel le eƒe megbedede ta.
7Elabena Israel-viwo wɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe Yehowa, woƒe Mawu, si kplɔ wo tso Egipte-nyigba dzi tso Egipte-fia Farao ƒe ŋusẽ nu la ŋu, eye wovɔ̃ mawu bubuwo. 8Wozɔ de dukɔ, siwo Yehowa nyã le Israel-viwo ŋgɔ la ƒe ɖoɖowo kple Israel-fiawo ƒe ɖoɖowo nu. 9Israel-viwo wɔ nusi menyo Yehowa, woƒe Mawu ŋu o la, le adza me, eye wotu nuxeƒewo ɖe woƒe duwo katã me, ɖe dzɔlawo ƒe miwo kple du sesẽwo siaa gbɔ. 10Woli aƒeliwo kple Aserawo ɖe togbɛ kɔkɔwo katã dzi kple ati damawo katã te; 11eye wodo dzudzɔ le afima le nuxeƒewo katã abe dukɔ, siwo Yehowa nyã le wo ŋgɔ ene, eye wowɔ nu vɔ̃ɖiwo, be woatsɔ ado dziku na Yehowa. 12Wosubɔ legbawo, evɔ wònye Yehowa gblɔ na wo be, migawɔe o hafi! 13Eye Yehowa xlɔ̃ nu Israel kple Yuda to eƒe nyagblɔɖilawo katã, siwo nye nukpɔlawo la dzi gblɔ bena: Mitrɔ tso miaƒe mɔ vɔwo dzi, eye milé nye sewo kple nye dodowo me ɖe asi, abe alesi mede se na mia fofowo kple alesi mede nye dɔla nyagblɔɖilawo si ɖo ɖe mi la ene. 14Ke womeɖo to o, hafi boŋ wosẽ ta me abe wo fofo, siwo mexɔ Yehowa, woƒe Mawu dzi se o la ene 15Wodo vlo eƒe ɖoɖowo kple nu, si wobla kple wo fofowo kpakple eƒe se, si wòde na wo la, eye wowɔ yakanuwo hezu ame ɖigbɔwo, eye wodze dukɔ, siwo ƒo xlã wo la yome, eva wònye Yehowa de se na wo be, womegawɔ abe woawo ene o hafi. 16Woɖe asi le Yehowa, woƒe Mawu ƒe sewo katã ŋu, eye wokɔ legbawo, siwo nye nyivi eve, wowɔ Aserawo, eye wode ta agu na dziƒonuwo katã, eye wosubɔ Baal. 17Wona wo viŋutsuwo kple wo vinyɔnuwo to dzo me, woka afã hesa dzo, eye wotsɔ wo ɖokui ƒle na nu vɔ̃ɖi wowɔ le Yehowa ŋku me, ne woatsɔ aɖo dɔmedzoe nɛ. 18Eyata Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Israel ŋuti ŋutɔ, eye wòɖe wo ɖa le eƒe ŋku ta; wo dometɔa ɖeke mekpɔtɔ o, negbe Yuda-to la ko. 19Ke Yuda hã melé Yehowa, eƒe Mawu ƒe seawo me ɖe asi o, eye wozɔ le ɖoɖo, siwo Israel ɖo la nu. 20Eyata Yehowa gbe Israel ƒe dzidzimeviwo katã, eye wote wo de anyi, etso wo de asi na adzodalawo vaseɖe esime wòɖe wo ɖa le eƒe ŋku ta. 21Elabena Israel fe eɖokui da le Dawid ƒe aƒe la ŋu, eye wotsɔ Yerobeam, Nebat vi la, ɖo fiae, eye Yerobeam ɖe Israel ɖa tso Yehowa ŋu heble wo de nuvɔ̃ gã me. 22Ale Israel dze nuvɔ̃, siwo katã Yerobeam wɔ la yome, eye womede asi le wo ŋu o, 23vaseɖe esime Yehowa ɖe Israel ɖa le eƒe ŋku ta, abe alesi wògblɔ to eƒe dɔla, nyagblɔɖilawo katã dzi ene, eye wòkplɔ Israel tso eƒe anyigba dzi yi Asur vaseɖe egbe.
Samariatɔwo ƒe gɔmedze ŋu nyawo.
24Eye Asur-fia kplɔ amewo tso Babel, Kuta, Awa, Xamat kple Sefarwayim, eye wòna wonɔ Samaria-duwo me ɖe Israel-viwo teƒe, eye woxɔ Samaria henɔ eƒe duwo me. 25Ke esime wova afima tete la, womeyɔ Yehowa o, eyata Yehowa kplɔ dzatawo de wo, eye wowu amewo le wo dome. 26Eye wogblɔ na Asur-fia bena: Dukɔ, siwo nèkplɔ yii, be woadanɔ Samaria-duwo me la, menya anyigba dzi mawu la ƒe kɔnuwo o, eyata wòkplɔ dzatawo de wo wowu wo, elabena womenya anyigba dzi mawu la ƒe kɔnu wo o. 27Tete Asur-fia de se gblɔ bena: Miɖo nunɔla, siwo mieɖakplɔ tso afima la, dome ɖeka ɖa, ne wòayi aɖanɔ afima, eye wòafia anyigba dzi mawu la ƒe kɔnuwo wo. 28Ale nunɔla, siwo wokplɔ dzoe tso Samaria la, dometɔ ɖeka va nɔ Betel, eye wòfia, alesi woavɔ̃ Yehowae la wo. 29Ke dukɔ sia dukɔ wɔ mawuwo na eɖokui, eye wotsɔ wo ɖo nuxeƒexɔ, siwo Samariatɔwo wɔ la me; dukɔ sia dukɔ wɔe ɖe du, si me wòle la me. 30Babeltɔwo wɔ Sukot-Benot; Kuttɔwo wɔ Nergal, eye Xamattɔwo wɔ Asima; 31Awitɔwo wɔ Nibxaz kple Tartak, eye Sefarwayimtɔwo tɔ dzo wo viwo na Adramelex kple Anamelex, siwo nye Sefarwayimtɔwo ƒe mawuwo. 32Ke wovɔ̃ Yehowa hã, eye wotsɔ wo dome amesiame ƒomevi ɖo nuxeƒewo ƒe nunɔlawoe, amesiwo sa vɔ na wo le nuxeƒexɔwo me. 33Wova Yehowa, eye wogasubɔ woƒe mawuwo le dukɔ, siwo dome wokplɔ wo tsoe la ƒe kɔnuwo nu. 34Vaseɖe egbegbe wogale woƒe kɔnu xoxoawo dzi; womevɔ̃a Yehowa ɖeɖe o, eye womewɔna le woƒe dodowo kple woƒe kɔnuwo ɖeɖe nu loo, alo wona le nufiafia kple se, siwo Yehowa de na Yakob, amesi wotsɔ ŋkɔ na be Israel ƒe viwo la nu o. 35Elabena Yehowa bia nu kpli wo, eye wòde se na wo gblɔ bena: Migavɔ̃ mawu bubuwo o, migade ta agu na wo o, migasubɔ wo o, eye migasa vɔ na wo o! 36Ke boŋ mivɔ̃ Yehowa, amesi tsɔ ŋusẽ gã kple abɔ, si wodo de dzi, kplɔ mi tso Egipte-nyigba dzi la; eya miade ta agu na, eye eya miasa vɔ na! 37Eye milé ŋku de ɖoɖo kple kɔnu, nufiafia kple se, si woŋlɔ ɖi na mi la ŋu, ne miawɔ wo ŋkekeawo katã, eye migavɔ̃ mawu bubuwo o! 38Migayɔ nu, si mebia kpli mi la be o, eye migavɔ̃ mawu bubuwo o, 39ke boŋ mivɔ̃ Yehowa, mia Mawu la, ne wòaɖe miatso miaƒe futɔwo katã si me. 40Ke womeɖo to o, hafi boŋ wowɔ woƒe kɔnu xoxoawo. 41Ale dukɔ siawo vɔ̃ Yehowa, eye wosubɔ woƒe legbawo hã; wo viwo kple wo tɔgbuiyɔviwo le alea wɔm vaseɖe egbe abe wo fofowo ene.

Title: FIAWO II 18
Content:
Yuda-fiaɖuƒe. Fia Xizkiya.
1Le Israel-fia Hosea. Eta vi ƒe ƒe etɔ̃lia me la Xizkiya, Yuda-fia Axaz ƒe vi, zu fia 2Exɔ ƒe blave vɔ atɔ̃, esime wòzu fia, eye woɖu ba ƒe blave vɔ asieke le Yerusalem. Dadaa ŋkɔ nye Abi, Zaxarya ƒe vinyɔnu. 3Eye wòwɔ nusi dze Yehowa ŋu, abe alesi fofoa Dawid wɔ pɛpɛpɛ ene. 4Eɖe nuxeƒewo ɖa, eye wògbã aƒeliwo, elã Aserawo, eye wògbã akɔblida, si Mose wɔ la; elabena Israel-viwo do dzudzɔ nɛ vaseɖe ɣemaɣi, eve wòna ŋkɔe be Nexustan. 5Eɖo ŋu ɖe Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la ŋu, eye etɔgbea ɖeke mena Yuda-fia, siwo katã dze eyome alo do ŋgɔ nɛ la dome o. 6Eku ɖe Yehowa ŋu, eye mele ɖa le eŋu o, eye wòle Yehowa ƒe se, siwo wòde na Mose la me ɖe asi. 7Eye Yehowa nɔ kplu, afisiafi, si wòyi la, edzea edzi nɛ Eye wòdze aglã ɖe Asur-fia ŋu, eye megasubɔe o. 8Esi Filistitɔwo vaseɖe Gaza kple eƒe liƒowo gbɔ, tso dzɔlawo ƒe xɔ tsralawo gbɔ vaseɖe du sesẽwo gbɔ.
9Le fia Xizkiya ƒe ƒe enelia, si nye Israel-fia Hosea, Ela vi ƒe ƒe adrelia me la, Asur-fia Salmanaser ho ɖe Samaria ŋu, eye woɖe to ɖee. 10Exɔe le ƒe etɔ̃ megbe. Woxɔ Samaria le Xizkiya ƒe ƒe adelia me, eya nye Israel-fia Hosea ƒe ƒe asiekelia. 11Eye Asur-fia kplɔ Israel dzoe yi Asur hetso wo ɖo Xalax kple Xabor le Gozan-tɔsisi la nu kple Media-duwo me. 12Elabena womeɖo to Yehowa, woƒe Mawu ƒe gbe o, eye woda eƒe nubabla kple se, siwo katã Yehowa de na eƒe dɔla Mose la dzi, womeɖo to o, eye womewɔ edzi o.
Sanxerib ɖe to ɖe Yerusalem ŋuti.
13Le Xizkiya ƒe ƒe wuienelia me la Asur-fia Sanxerib ho ɖe Yuda-du sesẽwo katã ŋu, eye wòxɔ wo. 14Tete Yuda-fia Xizkiya da ame ɖo ɖe Asur-fia le Laxis, ne woagblɔ nɛ bena: Mewɔ nuvɔ̃! Ho dzo le gbɔnye, eye maxɔ nusi natsɔ aɖo dzinye la atso. Eye Asur-fia ɖo klosalo talento alafa etɔ̃ kple sika talento blaetɔ̃ na Yuda fia Xizkiya, be wòaxe. 15Eye Xizkiya tsa klosalo, siwo katã wòkpɔ le Yehowa ƒe aƒe me kple fia ƒe aƒe ƒe nudzraɖoƒe la hena. 16Ɣemaɣi Xizkiya flo sika, siwo Yuda-fia Xizkiya fa ɖe Yehowa ƒe xa ƒe ʋɔtruwo kple sɔtiwo ŋu la, eye wòtsɔ wo na Asur-fia.
17Ke Asur-fia do Tartan, Rabsaris kple Rabsake kpakple aʋakɔ gãa ɖe tso Laxis ɖo ɖe Yerusalem ɖe fia Xizkiya ŋu, eye woho heva Yerusalem. Esi woho va la, wotɔ ɖe dzigbeta, si le avɔnyãla ƒe agblenu dzi la, ƒe tɔʋu nu, 18eye woyɔ fia la ɖa. Tete Elyakim, Xilkiya vi, amesi le aƒe la nu kple Sebna, agbalẽŋlɔla kpakple Yoax, Asaf vi, ha ƒe tsiami la, wodo yi wo gbɔ. 19Eye Rabsake gblɔ na wo be: Migblɔ na Xizkiya bena: Ale fia gã, Asur-fia, gblɔ esi: Nuka ŋu gɔ̃ nele dzi ɖom ɖo? 20Ɖe nèle bubum be, numenya ƒuƒlu enye aɖaŋuɖoɖo kple ŋusẽ hena aʋawɔwɔa? Azɔ tso, ameka ŋu nèle dzi ɖom ɖo, be nedze aglã ɖe ŋunye? 21Azɔ èle dzi ɖom ɖe aƒla ŋeŋe ma, si nye Egipte la ŋu, esi ne amea ɖe ziɔ ɖe eŋu la, wòŋɔa asi nɛ flo la; alea Egipte-fia le na amesiwo katã le dzi ɖom ɖe eŋu. 22Ke ne miegblɔ nam be: Yehowa, mia Mawu la ŋu miele dzi ɖom ɖo la, ekema ɖe menye eya ƒe nuxeƒewo kple vɔsamlekpuiwo Xizkiya ɖe ɖa, eye wògblɔ na Yuda kple Yerusalem bena: Miɖe ta agu ɖe vɔsamlekpui sia ŋgɔ le Yerusalem oa? 23Eyata mia kple nye aƒetɔ, Asur-fia, mitso gbe kpɔ, eye matsɔ sɔ akpe eve na wò, be ate ŋu akpɔ sɔdolawo aɖo wo dzi mahã? 24Mate ŋu asi aʋafia ɖeka, si nye nye aƒetɔ ƒe dɔlawo dome suetɔ hã o, eye wòa nele dzi ɖom ɖe Egipte gu le sɔwo kple sɔdolawo taa? 25Azɔ ɖe Yehowa megbe meto ho ɖe teƒe sia ŋu, be magblẽea? Yehowae gblɔ nam be: Ho ɖe anyigba sia ŋu, eye nagblẽe! 26Tete Elyakim, Xilkiya vi, kple Sebna kpakple Yoax wogblɔ na Rabsake bena: Taflatse, ƒo nu kple wò dɔlawo ɖe Aram-gbe me, elabena míawo míesenɛ, eye megaƒo nu kpli mí ɖe Yuda-gbe me ɖe dukɔ, si le glia dzi la, ƒe to me o. 27Rabsake ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Ɖe wobe, mia kple wò aƒetɔ gbɔe nye aƒetɔ la dom ɖo, be magblɔ nya siawoa? Ɖe menye ŋutsu siawo, siwo na klotinu le glia dzi, be woaɖu woawo ŋutɔwo ƒe mi, eye woano woƒe aɖuɖɔ kple mi la, gbɔe oa? 28Tete Rabsake le va do ɣli sesĩe le Yuda-gbe me ƒo nu gblɔ bena: Mise fia gã, Asur-fia ƒe gbe! 29Ale fia la gblɔ esi: Migana Xizkiya naɖu mi o, elabena mate ŋu aɖe mi tso esi me o. 30Eye migana Xizkiya natsɔ Yehowa ade dzi ƒo na mi agblɔ be: Yehowa aɖe mi, eye womatsɔ du sia ade asi na Asur-fia o. 31Migado to Xizkiya o! Elabena ale Asur-fia gblɔ esi: Mibla nu kplim, eye mido va gbɔnye, ekema mia dome amesiame aɖu eƒe weintsetse, amesiame aɖu eƒe gbotitsetse, eye amesiame ano eƒe vudo me tsi, 32vaseɖe esime mava, eye makplɔ mi ayi anyigba, si le abe mía ta ene la dzi, anyigba, si dzi bli, wein kple abolo, weingblewo, amitiwo kple anyitsi le, ne miano agbe, eye miaku o. Migado to Xizkiya o! Mia blem wòle le gbɔgblɔm be: Yehowa aɖe mí! 33Ɖe dukɔwo ƒe mawuwo te ŋu ɖe woƒe anyigbawo tso Asur-fia si mea? 34Afika Xamat kple Arpad ƒe mawuwo le? Afika Sefarwayim, Hena kple Iwa ƒe mawuwo le? Ɖe wote ŋu ɖe Samaria tso asinye mea? 35Ɖe anyigbawo ƒe mawuwo katã dometɔa ɖe ɖe eƒe anyigba tso asinye me, ne Yehowa naɖe Yerusalem atso asinye mea? 36Ke dukɔ la zi kpi, eye meɖo nyaa ɖeke ŋu nɛ o, elabena fia la de se gblɔ bena: Migaɖo nyaa ɖeke ŋu nɛ o! 37Eye Elyakim, Xilkiya vi, amesi le aƒea nu, kple Sebna, agbalẽŋlɔla, kpakple Yoax, Asaf vi, fia ƒe tsiami, wole awu vuvuwo me va Xizkiya gbɔ, eye woto Rabsake ƒe nyawo nɛ.

Title: FIAWO II 19
Content:
Xilkiya do gbe ɖa. Yesaya gblɔ ɖeɖe tso futɔwo si me ɖi.
1Esime fia Xizkiya see la, edze eƒe awuwo, eye wòta akpanya heyi Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me. 2Eye wòdo Elyakim, amesi le aƒea nu, kple Sebna, agbalẽŋlɔla, kpakple nunɔlawo ƒe ame tsitsiwo, amesiwo ta akpanya la, ɖo ɖe nyagblɔɖila Yesaya, Amoz vi gbɔ, 3ne woagblɔ nɛ bena: Ale Xizkiya gblɔ esi: Egbe enye xaxa-, tohehe-kple vlodogbe; elabena viwo ɖo dzidzi me, gake ŋusẽ meli, ne wòadzi wo o. 4Ɖewohi Yehowa, wò Mawu, se Rabsake, amesi eƒe aƒetɔ Asur-fia dɔ ɖo ɖa, be wòaɖe alɔme le Mawu gbagbe la ŋu la ƒe nyawo katã, eye woahe to nɛ le nya, siwo Yehowa, wò Mawu, se la ta; eyata ɖo gbe ɖa ɖe ame susɔe, siwo li la ta! 5Eye Xizkiya ƒe dɔlawo va Yesaya gbɔ. 6Tete Yesaya gblɔ na wo bena: Ale miagblɔ na miaƒe aƒetɔ enye si: Yehowa ƒe gbe enye si: Megavɔ̃ nya, siwo Asur-fia ƒe ɖekakpuiwo tso ɖe alɔme le ŋunye nèse la o! 7Kpɔ ɖa, made gbɔgbɔa ɖe eme, eye wòase nyaa ɖe ahagbugbɔ avi eƒe anyigba dzi, eye mana woatsi yi nu le eƒe anyigba dzi.
8Esi Rabsake gbugbɔ yi la, ekpɔ Asur-fia wòle aʋa wɔm kple Libna, elabena ese be, eho tso Laxis. 9Ke esi wose le Kus-fia Tirhaka ŋu be: Kpɔ ɖa, eho, be yeawɔ aʋa kpli wò la, egadɔ amewo ɖo ɖe Xizkiya, ne woagblɔ nɛ bena: 10Ale miagblɔ na Xizkiya enye si: Megana wò Mawu, si ŋu nèle dzi ɖom ɖo la, naɖu wò nagblɔ be: womatsɔ Yerusalem ade asi na Asur-fia o. 11Kpɔ ɖa, wò ŋutɔ èse nusi Asur-fia wo anyigbawo katã, vaseɖe esime wotsrɔ̃ wo, eye woaɖe wò ya? 12Ɖe dukɔ, siwo fofonyewo tsrɔ̃: Gozan, Xaran, Rezef kple Eden-viwo, siwo le Telasar la ƒe mawuwo ɖe woa? 13Afika Xamat-fia, Arpad-fia kple du Sefarwayim, Hena kple Iwa ƒe fia le?
14Esi Xizkiya xa agbalẽa le dɔlawo si xlẽe la, eyi Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me, eye Xizkiya kekee ɖe Yehowa ŋku me. 15Eye Xizkiya do gbe ɖa le Yehowa ŋku me gblɔ bena: Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu, asi nɔa Kerubiwo dzi, wò ɖeka koe nye Mawu ɖe anyigba dzi fiaɖuƒewo katã dzi, wòe wo dziƒo kple anyigba. 16Yehowa, ƒu to anyi, ne nase nu! Yehowa, ʋu wò ŋkuwo, ne nakpɔ nu, eye se Sanxerib ƒe nya, siwo wòɖo ɖa, be yeatsɔ ɖe alɔme le Mawu gbagbe la ŋu! 17Yehowa, Asur-fiawo nya tsrɔ̃ dukɔwo kple woƒe anyigbawo vava. 18Wotsɔ woƒe mawuwo de dzo me, elabena menye mawuwo wonye o, ke boŋ amegbetɔwo ƒe asinu dɔwɔwɔwoe, ati kple kpewo wonye, eyata wo srɔ̃ wo. 19Eyata Yehowa, mia Mawu, ɖe mi tso esi me dzro, ne anyigba dzi tiaɖuƒewo katã nadze sii bena, wò ɖeka koe nye Yehowa Mawu!
20Tete Yesaya, Amoz vi, dɔ ame ɖo ɖe Xizkiya gblɔ bena: Ale Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la, gblɔ esi: Gbe, si nèdo ɖa nam le Asur-fia Sanxerib ŋuti la, mesee. 21Ale Yehowa gblɔ ɖe eŋu enye si: Ɖetugbi, Zion vinyɔnu, ɖe alɔme le ŋuwo, eye wòke wò, Yerusalem vinyɔnu ʋuʋu ta ɖe yowòme. 22Ameka nedo vloe, eye ameka ŋu neɖu fewu le, ameka ta nèɖo ɣli ɖo, eve ameka ŋu nèfɔ mo dzi ɖo? Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ lae loo! 23Edo vlo Aƒetɔ la to wò dɔlawo dzi gblɔ bena: Metsɔ nye tasiaɖam gbogboawo va toawo ta me kple Libanon ƒe tsutsuẽ aƒe, eye melã eƒe sederti kɔkɔwo kple eƒe sesewu nyuitɔwo, azɔ mege ɖe eƒe nɔƒe kɔkɔwo kple eƒe abɔmeti dodowo gbɔ; 24meɖe vudo, eye meno du bubu me tɔwo ƒe tsi, eye metsɔ nye afɔƒome na Egipte tɔsisiwo katã mie. 25Mesee kpɔ be, metre ewɔwɔ tso tititi ke, eye meɖoe tso gbaɖegbe ke oa? Azɔ mena wòva me, be wogblẽ du sesẽwo wòzu glikpo. 26Wo me nɔlawo ƒe lãme tu, dzi ɖe le wo ƒo, eye ŋu kpe wo; woɖi agblemenu kple gbe mumu, xɔtagbe kple bli, si tsi tonu hafi va ƒu. 27Menya wò anyinɔnɔ, wo dodo kple wò gbɔgbɔ kpakple wò agbodzedze ɖe ŋunye. 28Esi wò agbodzedze ɖe ŋunye kple wò dada va nye to me ŋuti la, eyata made nye ga wò ŋɔti, eye made nye numega nu na wò akplɔ wò agbugbɔ ato mɔ, si neto va la. 29Eye esia anye dzesi na wò. Le ƒe sia me la miaɖu nusiwo mie le wo ɖokui si, eye le ƒe evelia me la miaɖu flu me nuwo, eye le ƒe etɔ̃lia me la miaƒã nu aŋe nu, eye miade weingblewo aɖu wo me kutsetsewo. 30Yuda ƒe aƒe la ƒe amesiwo woɖe, eye wòkpɔtɔ la, aɖe ke aɖo ta to me, eye woatse ku ɖe dzi me. 31Elabena ame susɔeawo ado tso Yerusalem, eye amesiwo woɖe la, atso Zion-to la dzi; Yehowa Zebaot ƒe ŋuʋaʋã la le esia wo ge. 32Eyata ale Yehowa gblɔ ɖe Asur-fia ŋu enye si; Mava du sia me o, eye mada aŋutrɔ ɖe eme o, mate ɖe eŋu kple akpoxɔnu o, eye maƒu kpo ɖe eŋu o. 33Agbugbɔ ato mo, si dzi wòto va, eye mava du sia me o Yehowa ƒe gbee nye esia! 34Makpɔ du sia ta, eye maɖee, le nye ŋutɔ kple nye dɔla Dawid ta.
Asurtɔwo le toyiyi le nukumɔa ɖe dzi. Sanxerib ku.
35Eye wòva me le zã ma me be, Yehowa ƒe dɔla do ɖawu ame akpe alafa ɖeka kple blanyi vɔ atɔ̃ le Asurtɔwo ƒe asaɖa me. Esi wofɔ ŋdi kanya la, kpɔ ɖa, ame kukuwo sɔŋ koe li. 36Tete Asur-fia Sanxerib ho dzo gbugbɔ yi aƒe, eye woɖanɔ Niniwe. 37Eye wòva me, esime wòle gbe dom ɖa le eƒe mawu Nisrox ƒe me la, evia Adramelex kple Sarezer wowui kple yi, eye wòsi yi Ararat-nyigba dzi, eye via Esar-Xadon zu fia ɖe eteƒe.

Title: FIAWO II 20
Content:
Xizkiya ƒe dɔlele kple eƒe agbetsitsi.
1Ɣemaɣi la Xizkiya lé dɔ de kuku ge; eye nyagblɔɖila Yesaya, Amoz vi, va egbɔ gblɔ nɛ bena: Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ɖɔ wò aƒe ɖo, elabena èle kuku ge, eye mele agbe nɔ ge o. 2Tete wòtrɔ mo ɖe gli ŋu hedo gbe ɖa na Yehowa gblɔ bena: 3Oo Yehowa, ɖo ŋu, alesi mezɔ le ŋkuwò me le nyateƒe kple dzi blibo me, kple alesi mewo nusi nyo le ŋkuwò me la. Eye Xizkiya fa avi kple ɣli. 4Esi Yesaya mekpɔ do le dua titina o la, Yehowa ƒe gbe va egbɔ bena: 5Gbugbɔ yi ɖagblɔ na nye dukɔ ƒe amegã Xizkiya bena: Ale Yehowa, fofowò Dawid ƒe Mawu la, gblɔ esi: Mese wò gbedodoɖa, eye mekpɔ wò aɖatsiwo, kpɔ ɖa, mayɔ dɔ wò, eye le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe la ayi Yehowa ƒe me. 6Mada ƒe wuiatɔ̃ ɖe wò agbenɔŋkekewo dzi, eye maɖe mia kple du sia tso Asur-fia si me, eye makpɔ du sia ta le nye ŋuti kple nye dɔla Dawid ta. 7Eye Yesaya gblɔ bena: Mitso gbotsetsebolo vɛ! Eye wotsɔe va do ƒoƒoeawo dzi, tete wòhaya. 8Eye Xizkiya gblɔ na Yesaya bena: Nuka nye dzesi be, Yehowa ahayam, eye mayi Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe? 9Yesaya ɖo ŋu be: Esia nye dzesi tso Yehowa gbɔ be, Yehowa le nusi wògblɔ la wɔ ge. Ɖe vɔvɔli la nayi ŋgɔ ɖoƒe ewo loo, alo negbugbɔ ɖe megbe ɖoƒe ewoa? 10Xizkiya gblɔ bena: Mesesẽ be, vɔvɔli nayi ŋgɔ ɖoƒe ewo o, ke boŋ vɔvɔli la negbugbɔ ɖe megbe ɖoƒe ewo. 11Tete nyagblɔɖila Yesaya yɔ Yehowa, eye wòna vɔvɔli, si yi ŋgɔ la, gbugbɔ yi ɖoƒe la dzi; egbugbɔ ɖe megbe le Axaz ƒe ɣega la dzi ɖoƒe ewo.
Xizkiya wɔ bometsinu le Hebritɔwo ƒe ame dɔdɔwo ŋku me, eye woku.
12Ɣemaɣi Babel-fia Berodax-Baladan, Baladan vi, ɖo agbalẽ kple nunanawo ɖe Xizkiya, elabena ese be, Xizkiya lé dɔ. 13Eye Xizkiya ɖo to wo, eye wòfia eƒe kesinɔnuxɔwo katã, klosalo kple sika, atike ʋeʋẽe kple ami xɔasi kple aʋawɔnuxɔ kpakple nusiwo katã le eƒe kesinɔnuwo me la wo, naneke meli, si Xizkiya metsɔ fia wo le eƒe aƒe kple eƒe fiaɖuƒe blibo la me o. 14Tete nyagblɔɖila Yesaya va fia Xizkiya gbɔ gblɔ ne bena: Nya ka ŋutsu siawo gblɔ, eye afika wotso va gbɔwò? Xizkiya ɖo ŋu bena: Wotso kekeke Babel ke. 15Eye wògblɔ be: Nuka wokpɔ le aƒewò me? Xizkiya ɖo ŋu be: Wokpɔ nusiwo katã le aƒenye me la, naneke mele nye ke sinɔnuwo me, si nyemetsɔ fia wo o. 16Tete Yesaya gblɔ na Xizkiya bena: Se Yehowa ƒe gbe! 17Kpɔ ɖa, ŋkekewo gbɔna, esime wòala nusiwo katã le aƒewò me kple nusiwo fofowòwo tu ɖo vaseɖe egbe la, ayi Babel, naneke makpɔtɔ o; Yehowa gblɔe! 18Eye woakplɔ viwòŋutsu, siwo dzɔ tso mewò, amesiwo nèdzi la, dometɔa ɖewo woaɖanye aƒemenu dzikpɔlawo le Babel-fia ƒe me. 19Xizkiya ɖo ŋu na Yesaya bena: Yehowa ƒe gbe, si nègblɔ la, enyo. Eye wògagblɔ tomefafa kple nuteƒewɔwɔ nya le nye ŋkekewo me ko evɔ. 20Xizkiya ŋutinya susɔea kple eƒe kalẽwɔwɔwo katã, alesi wòɖe ta kple tɔʋui, eye wòhe tsi va dua mee la, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Yuda-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me. 21Eye Xizkiya mlɔ fofoawo gbɔ, eye via Manase zu fia ɖe eteƒe.

Title: FIAWO II 21
Content:
Fia Manase.
1Manase xɔ ƒe wuieve, esime wòzu fia, eye woɖu fia le Yerusalem ƒe blaatɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃. Dadaa ŋkɔ nye Xefziba. 2Eye wòwɔ nusi nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋku me, le dukɔ, siwo Yehowa nyã le Israel-viwo ŋgɔ la ƒe ŋunyɔnuwo nu. 3Egagbugbɔ nuxeƒe, siwo fofoa Xizkiya gbã la tu, eɖi vɔsamlekpuiwo na Baal, eye wòwɔ Asera, abe alesi Israel-fia Axab wɔ ene, eye wòde ta agu na dziƒonuwo katã hesubɔ wo. 4Eɖi vɔsamlekpuiwo ɖe Yehowa ƒe aƒe, si ŋu Yehowa gblɔ le be, yeatsɔ yeƒe ŋkɔ aɖo Yerusalem la me. 5Eye wòɖi vɔsamlekpuiwo na dziƒonuwo katã ɖe Yehowa ƒe aƒe la ƒe xɔxɔnuwo kple eve. 6Ena viawo to dzo me, eye wosa dzo, eka afã, eye wòɖo ŋɔliyɔlawo kple akunyawɔlawo, eye wòwɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi geɖe le Yehowa ŋku me, ne wòatsɔ do dziku nɛ. 7Eye wòtsɔ Asera ƒe legba, si wòwɔ la, ɖo aƒe la me, aƒe, si ŋu Yehowa gblɔ le na Dawid kple via Salomo be: Matsɔ nye ŋkɔ aɖo aƒe sia me kple Yerusalem, si metia le Israel-toawo katã me la tegbee. 8Eye nyemena Israel ƒe afɔ nage le anyigba, si metsɔ na wo fofowo la dzi o, nenye be, wòlé se, siwo katã mede na wo kple se, siwo katã nye dɔla Mose de na wo la me ɖe asi, eye wowɔ wo dzi ko 9Ke womeɖo to o, eye Manase ble wo wowɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi wu dukɔ, siwo Yehowa tsrɔ̃ ɖa le Israel-viwo ŋgɔ 10Eye Yehowa ƒo nu to eƒe dɔla, nyagblɔɖilawo dzi gblɔ bena: 11Esi Yuda-fia Manase wɔ ŋunyɔnu sia, eye wòwɔ nu gbegblẽ wu nusiwo katã Amoritɔwo wɔ le eŋgɔ, eye wòtsɔ eƒe legbawo ble Yuda hã de nuvɔ̃ me la, 12eyata ale Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la, gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, mahe dzɔgbevɔ̃e ava Yerusalem kple Yuda dzi, ale be amesiwo katã asee la, ƒe towo kple eve me laɖi yeŋ. 13Matsi Samaria ƒe ka kple Axab ƒe aƒe la ƒe kpe ɖe Yerusalem dzi, eye matutu Yerusalem, abe alesi wotutua agba me tsɔna tsyɔ anyi ene. 14Mate nye domenyinu ƒe susɔea ɖa, eye matsɔ wo ade asi na woƒe futɔwo woanye aboyonu kple nuxaxa na woƒe futɔwo katã. 15Elabena wowɔ nusi nye vɔ̃ le ŋkunye me, eye wodo dziku nam tso gbesigbe wo fofowo ʋu tso Egipte vaseɖe egbe. 16Manase kɔ ʋu maɖifɔ geɖe ŋutɔ hã ɖi, vaseɖe esime wona Yerusalem yɔ tso go ɖeka me vaseɖe go keme me hekpe ɖe eƒe nuvɔ̃, siwo wotsɔ ble Yuda wòwɔ nusi nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋku me la ŋuti.
17Manase ŋutinya susɔea kple nusiwo katã wòwɔ kpakple eƒe nuvɔ̃, siwo wòwɔ la, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Yuda-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me. 18Eye Manase mia fofoawo gbɔ, eye woɖii ɖe eƒe aƒe ƒe abɔ, si nye Uza ƒe abɔ la me, eye via Amon zu fia ɖe eteƒe.
Fia Amon.
19Amon xa ƒe blave vɔ eve, esime wòzu fia, eye woɖu fia ƒe eve le Yerusalem. Dadaa ŋkunye Mesulemet, Xaruz ƒe vinyɔnu tso Yotba. 20Eye wòwɔ nusi nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋku me, abe alesi fofoa Manase wo ene. 21Eto mɔ, si fofoa to la pɛpɛpɛ, eye wòsubɔ legba, siwo fofoa subɔ hede ta agu na wo. 22Egblẽ Yehowa, fofoawo ƒe Mawu la ɖi, eye meto Yehowa ƒe mɔwo o. 23Eye Amon ƒe dɔlawo ɖo nugbe ɖe eŋu, eye wowu fia la le eƒe xɔ me. 24Tete dukɔ hahoo la wu amesiwo katã ɖo nugbe ɖe fia Amon ŋu la, eye dukɔ hahoo la tso via Yosiya ɖo fia ɖe eteƒe. 25Amon ŋutinya susɔea kple nusiwo wòwɔ la, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Yuda-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me. 26Eye woɖii ɖe eƒe yɔdo me ɖe Uza abɔ me, eye via Yosiya zu fia ɖe eteƒe.

Title: FIAWO II 22
Content:
Fia Yosiya.
1Yosiya xɔ ƒe enyi, esime wòzu fia, eye woɖu fia le Yerusalem ƒe blaetɔ̃ vɔ ɖeke. Dadaa ŋkɔ nye Yedida, Adaya ƒe vinyɔnu tso Bozkat. 2Ewo nusi nyo le Yehowa ŋku me, eye wòto fofoa Dawid ƒe ʋe me pɛpɛpɛ, eye medze ɖe ɖusi alo mia me o.
3Eye wòva me le fia Yosiya ƒe ƒe wuienyilia me be, fia la ɖo Mesulam vi Azalya ƒe vi Safan, amesi nye agbalẽŋlɔla, ɖo ɖe Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me gblɔ bena: 4Yi nunɔlagã Xilkiya gbɔ, ne wòaxlẽ ga, siwo katã wotsɔ va Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me, siwo kpuinudzɔlawo dzɔ le dukɔ la si la. 5Eye woatsɔ wo na dɔnunɔla, siwo wotsɔ ɖo Yehowa ƒe aƒe la nu, eye woatsɔ wo na Yehowa ƒe aƒe la ŋu dɔwɔlawo, ne woaɖɔ xɔ la ƒe gbagbãƒewo ɖo. 6Woatsɔ wo na atikpalawo, xɔtulawo kple gliɖolawo, ne woaƒle atiwo kple kpe fufuwo aɖo xɔ la ɖo. 7Ke womebu akɔnta kpli wo le ga, si wotsɔ de wo si la ŋuti o, elabena wowɔe le anukware me.
Wofɔ segbalẽ la.
8Tete nunɔlagã Xilkiya gblɔ na agbalẽŋlɔla Safan bena: Mefɔ segbalẽa ɖe le Yehowa ƒe aƒe lãme. Eye Xilkiya tsa agbalẽ la na Safan wòxlẽ. 9Eye agbalẽŋlɔla Safan va fia la gbɔ, eye wòhe gbe vɛ na fia la gblɔ bena: Wò dɔlawo trɔ ga, si le aƒe la me, eye wotsɔe de asi na dɔnunɔla, siwo wotsɔ ɖo Yehowa ƒe aƒe la nu. 10Eye agbalẽŋlɔla Safan to na fia la bena: Nunɔla Xilkiya tso agbalẽa ɖe nam; eye Safan xlẽe na fia la. 11Esime fia la se segbalẽa me nyawo la, edze eƒe awuwo. 12Eye fia la de se na nunɔla Xilkiya kple Safan vi Axikam, Mixaya vi Axbor kple agbalẽŋlɔla Safan kpakple ha ƒe subɔla Asaya gblɔ bena: 13Miyi ɖabia nu Yehowa ɖe tanye kple ɖe dukɔ la kpakple Yuda blibo la ta le agbalẽ, si wòfɔ lãme nyawo ŋuti; elabena Yehowa ƒe dɔmedzoe, si wòdo de mía ŋuti la, nu sẽ, elabena mia fofowo meɖo to agbalẽ sia me nyawo, ne woawɔ nusiwo katã woŋlɔ ɖe eme la dzi o.
Nyɔnu nyagblɔɖila Xulda.
14Tete nunɔla Xilkiya, Axikam, Axbor kple Safan kpakple Asaya woyi nyɔnu nyagblɔɖila Xulda, amesi nye Xarxas vi Tikwa ƒe vi Salum, amesi nye awu dzikpɔla srɔ̃, eye wònɔ Yerusalem-du la ƒe to evelia la gbɔ, eye woƒo nu kplii. 15Eɖo ŋu na wo bena: Ale Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la, gblɔ esi: Miɖagblɔ na ŋutsu, si dɔ mi ɖe gbɔnye la bena: 16Yehowa ƒe gbe enye si; Kpɔ ɖa, mane dzɔgbevɔ̃e ava teƒe sia kple eme nɔlawo dzi le agbalẽ sia me nya, siwo katã Yuda-fia xlẽ la nu. 17Eye wogblẽm ɖi, eye wodo dzudzɔ na mawu bubuwo, ne woatsɔ woƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo katã ado dziku nam la, eyata nye dɔmedzoe abi ɖe teƒe sia ŋu, eye matsi o. 18Eye migblɔ na Yuda-fia, si dɔ mi da, be miaɖabia nu Yehowa la bena: Ale Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la, gblɔ esi: Esi nèse nya siawo, 19eye dzika tso ƒowò, eye nèbɔbɔ ɖokuiwò ɖe anyi le Yehowa ŋku me, le esi nèse nya, si megblɔ ɖe teƒe sia kple eme nɔlawo ŋu be, azu aƒedo kple ɖiŋudodo, eye nedze wò awuwo hefa avi le ŋkunye me la, nye hã mesee; Yehowa gblɔe! 20Eyata mana nayi fofowòwo gbɔ, eye woaɖi wò ɖe wò yɔdo me le ŋutifafa me, eye wò ŋkuwo makpɔ dzɔgbevɔ̃e, siwo katã mahe ava teƒe sia dzi la o. Eye wohe gbea vɛ na fia la.

Title: FIAWO II 23
Content:
Yosiya gadzra Mawusubɔsubɔ ɖo.
1Tete fia la dɔ be, woaɖaƒo Yuda kple Yerusalem-ame tsitsiwo katã nu ƒu va egbɔe. 2Eye fia la yi Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me, eye Yuda-ŋutsuwo katã kple Yerusalemtɔwo katã, nunɔlawo kple nyagblɔɖilawo kpakple dukɔ blibo la, ɖeviwo kple tsitsiawo siaa kpe ɖe eŋu, eye wòxlẽ nubabla ƒe agbalẽ, si wofɔ le Yehowa ƒe me la me nyawo katã ɖe woƒe towo me. 3Eye fia la tsi tre ɖe enɔƒe hebla nu le Yehowa ŋku me, be yeadze Yehowa yome, eye yealé eƒe sewo, ɖaseɖiɖiwo kple ɖoɖowo me ɖe asi tso dzi blibo kpakple luʋɔ blibo me, eye yeawɔ nubabla sia ƒe nya, siwo katã woŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽ sia me la dzi; eye dukɔ blibo la bia nu.
Yosiya ɖe trɔ̃subɔsubɔ ɖa.
4Tete fia la de se na nunɔlagã Xilkiya kple nunɔlagã yometɔwo kpakple kpuinudzɔlawo, be woafɔ nusiwo katã wowɔ na Baal kple Asera kpakple dziƒonuwo katã la, ado goe le Yehowa ƒe xɔ la me; eye woɖatɔ dzo wo ɖe Yerusalem godo le Kidron-bali la me, eye wolɔ woƒe afi yi Betel. 5Eɖe legba nunɔla, siwo Yuda-fiawo ɖo, be woasa vɔ le nuxeƒewo le Yuda-duwo kple Yerusalem-nutowo me la ɖa, hekpe ɖe amesiwo doa dzudzɔ na Baal kple ɣe, ɣleti kple ɣletiviwo kpakple dziƒonuwo katã la ŋuti. 6Eye wòɖe Asera do goe tso Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me tsɔ yi Kidron-tɔʋu la nu le Yerusalem godo; etɔ dzoe le Kidron-tɔʋu la nu, eye wòtui memee helɔ wu de ame tsɛwo ƒe yɔdowo dzi. 7Egbã matrewɔlawo ƒe xɔ, siwo le Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me, afisi nyɔnuwo nɔa agbadɔvɔ lɔ̃m na Asera le la. 8Ena nunɔlawo katã tso Yuda-duwo me va, eye wòdo gu nuxeƒe, siwo nunɔlawo doa dzudzɔ le tso Geba vaseɖe Beer-Seba; eye wògbã agbowo nu nuxeƒe, siwo le dumegã Yosua ƒe agbo nu le dugbo la ƒe mia me gome. 9Ke nuxeƒe nunɔlawo mekpɔ mɔ ade Yehowa ƒe vɔsamlekpui la dzi le Yerusalem o, ke boŋ woaɖu nu maʋamaʋã kple wo nɔviwo. 10Edo gu ŋunyɔƒe, si le Ben-Hinom-bali la me, be amea ɖeke magana viaŋutsu kple vianyɔnu nato dzo me na Molex o. 11Eye wòde sɔ, siwo Yuda-fiawo do na ɣe la ɖa le Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me yi aƒemenu dzikpɔla Netan-Melex ƒe xɔ, si le dua godo la me; ke etɔ dzo ɣe ƒe tasiaɖamwo. 12Eye fia la gbã vɔsamlekpui, siwo le Axaz ƒe xɔta, siwo Yuda-fiawo ɖi, kple vɔsamlekpui, siwo Manase ɖi ɖe Yehowa ƒe aƒe ƒe xɔxɔnuwo kple eve la, eye wòɖe wo ɖa tso afima hetsɔ woƒe anyi ɖakɔ ɖe Kidron-tɔʋu la me. 13Eye fia la do gu nuxeƒe, siwo le Yerusalem ƒe ɣedzeƒe le Amito la ƒe ɖusi gome, siwo Israel-fia Salomo tu na Zidontɔwo ƒe ŋunyɔnu Astartewo kple Moabitɔwo ƒe ŋunyɔnu Milkom. 14Egbã aƒeliwo, eye wòmũ Aserawo helɔ ame ƒuwo kɔ de wo teƒe. 15Egbã vɔsamlekpui, si le Betel hã, eya nye nuxeƒe, si Yerobeam, Nebat vi, amesi ble Israel de nuvɔ̃ me la ɖi; egbã vɔsamlekpui sia hã, eye wòtɔ dzo nuxeƒe la hetui memie, eye wòtɔ dzo Asera la. 16Eye Yosiya tsa ŋku, eye wòkpɔ yɔdo, siwo le toa dzi afima; tete wòdɔ woɖalɔ ƒuwo le yɔdoawo me ve, eye woto dzo wo le vɔsamlekpui la dzi hedo gui le Yehowa ƒe nya, si Mawu amesi va gblɔ nya siawo, ɖe gbe ƒãe la nu 17Eye wògblɔ be:, Ŋkuɖodzinu ka enye kem kpɔm mele? Duametɔwo ɖo ŋu nɛ bena: Mawu ƒe amesi tso Yuda va ɖe gbe ƒã nusiwo newɔ ɖe vɔsamlekpuia ŋu le Betel la ƒe yɔdoe. 18Tete wògblɔ be Miɖe asi le eŋu, eye amea ɖeke megaka asi eƒe ƒuwo ŋu o! Ale womeka asi eya kple nyagblɔɖila, si tso Samaria la ƒe ƒuwo ŋu o. 19Eye Yosiya ɖe nuxeƒexɔ, siwo katã le Samaria-duwo me, siwo Israel-fiawo tu tsɔ do dziku na Yehowa la ɖa, eye wòwɔ wo, abe alesi wòwɔ le Betel pɛpɛpɛ ene. 20Eye wowu nuxeƒe nunɔla, siwo katã le afima la ɖe vɔsamlekpuiwo dzi, eye wòlɔ dzo ameƒuwo le wo dzi; emegbe wògbugbɔ yi Yerusalem.
Yosiya na woɖu ŋutitotoŋkekenyuie la. Yosiya ku.
21Eye ba la de se na dukɔ blibo lã bena: Miɖu ŋutitotoŋkekenyuie la na Yehowa mia Mawu la, abe alesi woŋlɔ ɖe nubabla ƒe agbalẽ sia me ene. 22Elabena womeɖu ŋutitotoŋkekenyuie sia le ʋɔnudrɔ̃la, siwo drɔ̃ ʋɔnu Israel la ŋɔli kple Israel-fiawo kpakple Yuda-fiawo katã ŋɔli kpɔ o, 23negbe le fia Yosiya ƒe ƒe wuienyilia me ko woɖu ŋutitotoŋkekenyuie sia na Yehowa le Yerusalem. 24Eye Yosiya ɖe ŋɔliyɔlawo kple akunyawɔlawo, aklama kpakpɛwo kple legbawo kpakple ŋunyɔnuwo, siwo katã wòkpɔ le Yuda-nyigba dzi kple Yerusalem la hã ɖa, ne wòawɔ se la ƒe nya, siwo woŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽ, si nunɔla Xilkiya fɔ le Yehowa ƒe aƒe me la dzi. 25Fiaa ɖeke menɔ eŋgɔ de enu, amesi trɔ ɖe Yehowa ŋu kple eƒe dzi blibo kple eƒe luʋɔ blibo kpakple eƒe ŋusẽ blibo le Mose ƒe seawo katã nu o; eye etɔgbea ɖeke hã menɔ eyome o. 26Ke Yehowa meɖe asi le eƒe dɔmedzoe gã, si wòdo ɖe Yuda ŋu la ŋuti o, le dziku, siwo katã Manase do nɛ la ta. 27Eye Yehowa gblɔ be: Maɖe Yuda hã ɖa le nye ŋku ta, abe alesi meɖe Israel ɖa ene; eye mate Yerusalem-du sia, si metia, kple xɔ, si ŋu megblɔ le be, nye ŋkɔ anɔ afima la ɖa. 28Yosiya ŋutinya susɔea kple nusiwo katã wòwɔ la, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Yuda-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me.
29Eŋɔli Egipte-fia Farao Nexo ho ɖe Asur-fia ŋu le Frat-tɔsisi la nu, eye ba Yosiya ho ɖakpee; ke esime wòkpɔe la, ewui le Megido. 30Esime woku la, eƒe dɔlawo tsɔe tso Megido va Yerusalem, eye woɖii ɖe eƒe yɔdo me. Eye dukɔ hahoo la si ami na via Yoaxaz heɖo fia ɖe fofoa teƒe.
Yoaxaz
31Yoaxaz xɔ ƒe blave vɔ etɔ, esime wòzu fia, eye woɖu fia dzinu elɔ̃ le Yerusalem. Dadaa ŋkɔ nye Xamutal, Yeremya ƒe vinyɔnu, tso Libna. 32Ewɔ nusi nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋku me, abe alesi fofoawo wɔ pɛpɛpɛ ene. 33Eye Farao Nexo dee gaxɔ ɖe Ribla le Xamat-nyigba dzi, be maganye fia le Yerusalem o; eye wòtsɔ klosalo talento alafa ɖeka kple sika talento ɖeka he to na dukɔ la.
Yoyakim.
34Eye Farao Nexo tsɔ Elyakim, Yosiya vi, ɖo fia ɖe fofoa Yosiya teƒe hetrɔ ŋkɔ nɛ be Yoyakim; ke èkplɔ Yoaxaz yi Egipte, afisi woku ɖo. 35Eye Yoyakim tsɔ klosalo kple sika na Farao; ke ɖe wòbia fe na dukɔ la, be wòakpɔ ga ana, abe alesi Farao de se ene. Exɔ klosalo kple sika le dukɔ hahoo la si, abe alesi wòbia fe na wo dome amesiame ene, ne wòatsɔ na Farao Nexo. 36Yoyakim xɔ ƒe blave vɔ alɔ, esime wòzu fia, eye wòɖu fia ƒe wuiɖekɛ le Yerusalem. Dadaa ŋkɔ nye Zebuda, Pedaya vinyɔnu, tso Ruma. 37Ewɔ nusi nye vɔ le Yehowa ŋku me, abe alesi fofoawo wɔ pɛpɛpɛ ene.

Title: FIAWO II 24
Content:
Yoyakim.
1Eŋɔli Babel-fia Nebukadnezar ho va, eye Yoyakim zu etevi ƒe etɔ̃; tete wòdze aglã de eŋu. 2Eye Yehowa kplɔ Kaldeatɔwo ƒe adzohawo, Moabitɔwo ƒe adzohawo kple Amon-viwo ƒe adzohawo dee; èkplɔ wo de Yuda, ne woatsrɔ̃e, le Yehowa ƒe nya, si wògblɔ to eƒe dɔla, siwo nye nyagblɔɖilawo dzi la nu. 3Le Yehowa ƒe nya la nu ko esia va Yuda dzi ɖo, ne wòatee ɖa le eƒe ŋku ta le Manase ƒe nuvɔ̃wo kple nusiwo katã wòwɔ la ŋuti; 4hekpe ɖe ʋu maɖifɔ, si wòkɔ ɖe anyi, eye wotsɔ ʋu maɖifɔ yɔ Yerusalem taŋ la ŋuti; eyata Yehowa meba, yeatsɔe ake o. 5Yoyakim ŋutinya susɔea kple nusiwo katã wòwɔ la, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Yuda-fiawo ƒe ŋutinyagbalẽ me. 6Eye Yoyakim mlɔ fofoawo gbɔ, eye via Yoyaxin zu fia ɖe eteƒe. 7Ke Egipte-fia megaho tso eƒe anyigba dzi azɔ o, elabena Babel-fia xɔ anyigba, siwo katã nye Egipte-fia tɔ tso Egipte-toʋu la nu vaseɖe Frat-tɔsisi la nu.
Yoyaxin. Nebukadnezar ɖe to ɖe Yerusalem ŋuti. Babel-fia ɖe aboyo Yerusalemtɔwo.
8Yoyaxin xɔ ƒe wuienyi, esime wòzu fia, eye woɖu fia dzinu etɔ̃ le Yerusalem. Dadaa ŋkɔ nye Nexusta, Elnatan ƒe vinyɔnu, tso Yerusalem. 9Ewo nusi nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋku me, abe alesi fofoa wɔ pɛpɛpɛ ene. 10Ɣemaɣi Babel-fia Nebukadnezar ƒe dɔlawo ho ɖe Yerusalem ŋu, eye woɖe to ɖe du la. 11Eye esime eƒe dɔlawo ɖe to ɖee la, Babel-fia Nebukadnezar va dze du la dzi. 12Tete Yuda-fia Yoyaxin do yi Babel-fia gbɔ, eya kple dadaa kple eƒe dɔlawo, eƒe amegãwo kple eƒe aƒemenu dzikpɔlawo, eye Babel-fia ɖe aboyoe le eƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe enyilia me. 13Eye wòlɔ Yehowa ƒe me kesinɔnuwo katã kple fia ƒe me kesinɔnuwo katã tso afima, eye wògbã sikanu, siwo katã Israel-fia Salomo wɔ ɖe Yehowa ƒe xɔ la me, abe alesi Yehowa gblɔ ene. 14Eɖe aboyo Yerusalem blibo la kple amegãwo katã kpakple aʋawɔlawo katã, atikpalawo katã kple nutulawo. Aboyomeawo le ame akpe ewo, amea ɖeke mekpɔtɔ o, negbe dukɔ hahoo la ƒe ame dahewo ko. 15Èkplɔ Yoyaxin yi Babel, eye wòkplɔ fia dada, fia srɔ̃wo kple eƒe aƒemenu dzikpɔlawo kpakple anyigba dzi bubumewo tso Yerusalem yi aboyo me le Babel. 16Ŋutsu aʋawɔlawo katã le ame akpe adre, eye atikpalawo kple nutulawo le ame akpe ɖeka; wo katã nye aʋawɔla veviwo, eye Babel-fia ɖe aboyo wo yi Babel. 17Eye Babel-fia tsɔ etɔɖia Matanya ɖo fia ɖe eteƒe hetrɔ ŋkɔ nɛ bena Zedekiya.
Zedekiya.
18Zedekiya xɔ ƒe blave vɔ ɖeka, esime wòzu fia, eye woɖu fia ƒe wuiɖekɛ le Yerusalem. Dadaa ŋkɔ nye Xamutal, Yeremya ƒe vinyɔnu, tso Libna. 19Eye wòwɔ nusi nye vɔ le Yehowa ŋku me, abe alesi Yoyakim wɔ pɛpɛpɛ ene. 20Elabena le Yehowa ƒe dɔmedzoe la ta wòva me na Yerusalem kple Yuda alea, vaseɖe esime wòte wo da le eƒe ŋku la. Eye Zedekiya dze aglã ɖe Babel-fia ŋu.

Title: FIAWO II 25
Content:
Yerusalem gbegblẽ.
1Eye wòva me le eƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe asiekelia me, le dzinu ewolia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi be, Babel-fia Nebukadnezar kple eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la ho ɖe Yerusalem ŋu, woɖe to ɖee, eye woƒu kpo ɖe eŋu godoo va kpe. 2Eye woɖe to ɖe du la vaseɖe fia Zedekiya ƒe ƒe wuiɖekɛlia me. 3Le dzinu enelia ƒe ŋkeke asiekelia dzi, esime dɔwuame nu sẽ le dua me, eye aboloa ɖeke meli na dukɔ hahoo la o la, 4woɖe mɔ ɖe du la ŋu, eye aʋawɔlawo katã si le zã me to fia ƒe abɔ ƒe agbo, si le gli eve dome la ƒe mɔ dzi, esime Kaldeatɔwo ƒo xlã dua, eye woto tagbamɔ. 5Ke Kaldeatɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ ti fia la yome va tui le Yerixo-tagba, eye eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la ka le eŋu. 6Eye wòlé fia la hekplɔe va Babel-fia gbɔ le Ribla, eye wodrɔ̃ ʋɔnui. 7Wowu Zedekiya viwo le eŋku me, eye wogbã ŋku na Zedekiya hede gãe kplɔ yi Babel.
8Le dzinu atɔ̃lia ƒe ŋkeke adrelia dzi, si nye fia Nebukadnezar Babel-fia ƒe ƒe wuiasiekelia me la, Nebuzaradan, fia ŋu asrafowo ƒe amegã, si nye Babel-fia ƒe dɔla la, va Yerusalem, 9eye wòtɔ dzo Yehowa ƒe aƒe kple fia ƒe aƒe kple Yerusalem-xɔwo katã kpakple bubumewo ƒe xɔwo katã. 10Kaldeatɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ, si le fia ŋu asrafowo ƒe amegã ŋu la, gbã Yerusalem-gliwo katã hã va kpe. 11Eye Nebuzaradan, fia ŋu asrafowo ƒe amegã, ɖe aboyo dukɔ la ƒe susɔea, si kpɔtɔ ɖe dua me kple amesiwo si yi Babel-fia gbɔ kpakple ameha la ƒe susɔea. 12Ke fia ŋu asrafowo ƒe amegã la gblẽ anyigba dzi ame dahewo ɖi, ne woanye weingbledelawo kple agbledelawo. 13Eye Kaldeatɔwo gbã akɔblisɔti, siwo le Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me kple anyinɔawo kpakple akɔbligazɔ, si le Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me, eye wolɔ akɔbliawo yi Babel. 14Wotsɔ zeawo, sofiawo, hɛawo kple treawo kpakple akɔblinuawo katã, siwo ŋu dɔ wòwɔna la, hã dzoe. 15Eye fia ŋu asrafowo ƒe amegã la tsɔ sonuawo kple ʋutreawo, sikatɔwo kple klosalotɔwo siaa dzoe, 16sɔti eve kple gazɔ ɖeka kpakple anyinɔawo, siwo fia Salomo wɔ bena Yehowa ƒe aƒe la; nusiawo katã ƒe akɔbli mele dada me o. 17Sɔti ɖeka kɔ abɔklugui wuienyi, eye wotsɔ akɔbli wɔ ta do eta me; ta la ƒe kɔkɔme le abɔklugui etɔ̃, wowɔ gaɖɔ kple yevuboɖawo ɖe ta la ŋu godoo va kpe, wo katã nye akɔbli; alea wowɔe ɖe sɔti evelia ƒe ta hã ŋui.
18Eye fia ŋu asrafowo ƒe amegã lé nunɔlagã Seraya kple nunɔlagã yometɔ Zefanya kpakple kpuinudzɔla etɔ̃; 19eye le dua me la elé aƒemenu dzikpɔla ɖeka, amesi le aʋawɔlawo nu, kple ŋutsu, siwo tsia tre ɖe fia la ŋku me dome ame atɔ̃ siwo wokpɔ le dua me kple aʋafia ƒe agbalẽŋlɔla, amesi da dukɔ hahoo la dea aʋakɔ me kpakple dukɔ hahoo la dome ŋutsu, blaade, siwo wokpɔ le dua me. 20Eye Nebuzaradan, fia ŋu asrafowo ƒe amegã la, le wo hekplɔ wo, ve na Babel-fia le Ribla. 21Eye Babel-fia wu wo le Ribla le Xamat-nyigba dzi. Ale woɖe aboyo Yuda tso eƒe anyigba dzi enye si.
Ismael wu fiateƒenɔla Gedalya.
22Eye Babel-fia Nebukadnezar tso Gedalya, Safan vi Axikam ƒe vi, ɖo dukɔ, si wogblẽ de Yuda-nyigba dzi la dzikpɔlae. 23Esi aʋakɔ la ƒe amegãwo katã kple woƒe amewo se be, Babel-fia tso Gedalya do dzikpɔlae la, wova Gedalya gbɔ le Mizpa; eye Ismael, Netanya vi, Yoxanan, Kareax vi, kple Seraya, Tanxumet vi, tso Netofat kpakple Yaazanya, Maaxati vi, kple woƒe amewo hã le eme. 24Tete Gedalya ka atam na woawo kple woƒe amewo gblɔ na wo bena: Migavɔ̃ Kaldeatɔwo ƒe dɔlawo o! Mina anyigba la dzi, eye misubɔ Babel-fia, ekema anyo na mi. 25Eye wòva me le dzinu adrelia me be, Ismael, Elisama vi Netanya ƒe vi, amesi tso fiaƒome la me kple ŋutsu ewo, siwo kpe de eŋu la, wova wu Gedalya kple Yudatɔ kpakple Kaldeatɔ, siwo le eŋu le Mizpa. 26Eye dukɔ blibo la, ɖeviwo kple tsitsiawo siaa, kple aʋakɔ la ƒe amegãwo dzo yi Egipte, elabena wole Kaldeatɔwo vɔ̃m.
Babel-fia ve Yoyaxin nu.
27Esime wode aboyo Yuda-fia Yoyaxin ƒe blaetɔ̃ vɔ adre megbe, le dzinu wuievelia ƒe ŋkeke blave vo adrelia dzi la, Babel-fia. Ewil Merodax de Yuda-fia Yoyaxin tso gaxɔ me le ƒe, si me wòzu fia. 28Eƒo nu kplii fafɛ, eye wòtsɔ eƒe zikpui ɖo fia, siwo le eŋu le Babel la ƒe zikpuiwo ŋgɔ. 29Ena wodo li eƒe gaxɔ me awuwo, eye wòdu nu le egbɔ ɣesiaɣi le eƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã me. 30Eye wòxɔ eƒe gbesiagbe nuɖuɖu, si wòhiã gbesiagbe la, tso Babel-fia gbɔ le eƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã me.

Title: KRONIKA I 1
Content:
Tɔgbuigãwo ƒe dzidzimagbalẽ tso Adam dzi vaseɖe Isak dzi.
1Adam, Set, Enos, 2Kenan, Mahalaleel, Yered, 3Henox, Metusala, Lamex, 4Noa, Sem, Xam kple Yafet.
5Yafet viwo nye: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Yawan, Tubal, Mesex kple Tiras. 6Gomer viwo nye Askenaz, Rifat kple Togarma. 7Yawan viwo nye: Elisa, Tarsisa, Kititɔwo kple Rodantɔwo.
8Xam viwo nye: Kus, Mizrayim, Put kple Kanaan. 9Kus viwo nye: Seba, Xawila, Sabta, Raama kple Sablexa. Eye Raama viwo nye Seba kple Dedan. 10Kus dzi Nimrod; eya de asi kalẽwɔwɔ me le anyigba dzi. 11Mizrayim dzi Luditɔwo, Anamitɔwo, Lehabitɔwo, Naftuxitɔwo, 12Patrusitɔwo kple Kasluxitɔwo, amesiwo me Filistitɔwo dzɔ tso kpakple Kaftoritɔwo. 13Kanaan dzi Zidon, amesi nye ŋgɔgbea kple Xet, 14Yebusitɔwo, Amoritɔwo, Girgastiɔwo, 15Xiwitɔwo, Arkitɔwo, Sinitɔwo, 16Arwaditɔwo, Zemaritɔwo kple Xamatitɔwo.
17Sem viwo nye: Elam, Asur, Arpaxsad, Lud, Aram, Uz, Xul, Geter kple Mesex. 18Arpaxsad dzi Selax, eye Selax dzi Eber. 19Wodzi ŋutsuvi eve na Eber; ɖeka ŋkɔ nye Peleg, le esi wòmã anyigba lé eŋɔli la, eye nɔvia ŋkɔ nye Yoktan. 20Yoktan dzi Almodad, Sale, Xazarmawe, Yarax, 21Xadoram, Uzal, Dikla, 22Ebal, Abimael, Seba, 23Ofir, Xawila kple Yobab; amesiawo katã nye Yoktan viwo. 24Sem, Arpaxsad, Selax, 25Eber, Peleg, Regu, 26Serug, Naxor, Tarax, 27Abram, eya nye Abraham. 28Abraham viwo nye Isak kple Ismael. 29Woƒe ƒome enye si: Ismael ƒe ŋgɔgbevi enye Nebayo, Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam, 30Misma, Duma, Masa, Xadad, Tema, 31Yetur, Nafis kple Kedma; amesiawo nye Ismael viwo. 32Abraham ƒe ahiã Ketura ƒe viwo nye esi: eya dzi Zimran, Yoksan, Medan, Midian, Yisbak kple Suax. Yoksan viwo nye: Seba kple Dedan. 33Midian viwo nye: Eta, Efer, Xanox, Abida kple Eldaa. Amesiawo katã nye Ketura ƒe viwo. 34Eye Abraham dzi Isak. Isak viwo nye: Esau kple Israel.
Esau viwo kpakple Edom-fiawo.
35Esau viwo nye: Elifaz, Reguel, Yehus, Yaelam kple Korax. 36Elifaz viwo nye: Teman, Omar, Zeti, Gaetam, Kenaz, Timna kple Amalek. 37Reguel viwo nye: Naxat, Zerax, Sama kple Miza. 38Seir viwo nye: Lotan, Sobal, Zibeon, Ana, Dison, Ezer kple Disan. 39Lotan viwo nye: Xori kple Homam, eye Lotan nɔvinyɔnu nye Timna. 40Sobal viwo nye: Alyan, Manaxat, Ebal, Sefi kple Onam. Zibeon viwo nye: Aya kple Ana. 41Ana vi nye: Dison. Dison viwo nye: Xamran, Esban, Yitran kple Xeran. 42Ezer viwo nye: Bilhan, Zaawan kple Yaakan. Disan viwo nye: Uz kple Aran.
43Amesiwo ɖu fia le Edom-nyigba dzi, hafi fia va nɔ Israel nu la, wonye: Bela, Beor vi; eƒe du enye Dinhaba. 44Esi Bela ku la, Yobab, Zerax vi tso Bozra, zu fia ɖe eteƒe. 45Esi Yobab ku la, Xusam tso Temanitɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi zu fia ɖe eteƒe 46Esi Xusam ku la, Hadad, Bedad vi, zu fia ɖe eteƒe; eya si Midiantɔwo le Moab-tagba; eƒe du enye Awit. 47Esi Hadad ku la, Samla tso Masreka zu fia ɖe eteƒe. 48Esi Samla ku la, Saul tso Rexobot le tɔsisi la nu zu fia ɖe eteƒe. 49Esi Saul ku la, Baal-Xanan, Axbor vi, zu fia ɖe eteƒe. 50Esi Baal-Xanan ku la, Hadad zu fia ɖe eteƒe; eƒe du enye Pagi, eye srɔ̃a Mehetabeel enye Matred, si nye Mesaxab ƒe vinyɔnu la ƒe vi. 51Esi Hadad ku la, Edom-amegãwo nye: Amegã Timna, amegã Alwa, amegã Yetet, 52amegã Oholibama, amegã Ela, amegã Pinon, 53amegã Kenaz, amegã Teman, amegã Mibzar, 54amegã Magdiel, amegã Iram. Amesia wo nye Edom-amegãwo.

Title: KRONIKA I 2
Content:
Yakob kple Yuda-viwo.
1Israel viwo nye si: Ruben, Simeon, Lewi kple Yuda, Isaxar kple Zebulon, 2Dan, Yosef kple Benyamin, Naftali, Gad kple Aser.
3Yuda viwo nye: Ger, Onan kple Sela; wo ame etɔ la Sua vinyɔnu, Kanaan-nyɔnu la, dzi nɛ. Ke esi Yuda ƒe ŋgɔgbevi Ger ƒe nu medze Yehowa ŋu o la, ewui. 4Eye lɔ̃xoa Tamar dzi Perez kple Zerax nɛ. Yuda viwo katã le wo ame atɔ̃. 5Perez viwo nye: Xezron kple Xamul. 6Zerax viwo nye: Zimri, Etan, Heman, Xalkol kple Dara; wole ame atɔ̃. 7Karmi vi nye: Axan, amesi he dzɔgbevɔ̃e va Israel dzi, le esi wòtsɔ busunuawo ƒe ɖe ta. 8Etan vi nye: Azarya. 9Xezron ƒe vi, siwo wodzi nɛ, wonye: Yeraxmeel, Ram kple Kelubai.
10Ram dzi Aminadab, eye Aminadab dzi Naxeson, amesi nye Yuda-viwo ƒe amegã 11Naxeson dzi Salma, Salma dzi Boas, 12Boas dzi Obed, Obed dzi Isai. 13Isai dzi Eliab, amesi nye eƒe ŋgɔgbea, evelia nye Abinadab, etɔ̃lia nye Simea, 14enelia nye Netaneel, atɔ̃lia nye Radai, 15adelia nye Ozem, adrelia nye Dawid. 16Wo nɔvinyɔnuwo nye Zeruya kple Abigail, eye Zeruya viwo nye Abisai, Yoab kple Asahel; wole wo ame etɔ̃. 17Abigail dzi Amasa, eye Amasa fofo enye Ismaeltɔ Yeter.
18Kaleb, Xezron vi, kple srɔ̃a Azuba kple Yeriot wodzi viwo: wo viawo nye esi: Yeser, Sobab kple Ardon. 19Esi Azuba ku la, Kaleb ɖe Efrat, eya dzi Xur nɛ. 20Xur dzi Uri, eye Uri dzi Bezaleel. 21Emegbe Xezron de asi Maxir, amesi nye Gilead fofo la ƒe vinyɔnu ŋu, eye woxɔe ɖe, esime wòxɔ ƒe blaade, eya dzi Segub nɛ. 22Segub dzi Yair, amesi si du blave vɔ etɔ̃ no le Gilead-nyigba dzi. 23Ke Gesuritɔwo kple Aramtɔwo xɔ Yair-kɔƒeawo le wo si hekpe ɖe Kenat kple eŋu kɔƒewo ŋuti, wole du blaade. Amesiawo katã nye Maxir, si nye Gilead fofo la ƒe viwo. 24Le Xezron ƒe ku megbe la Kaleb va Efrat. Xezron srɔ̃ ŋkɔ nye Abiya, eya dzi Asxur nɛ, amesi nye Tekoa fofo.
25Eye Xezron ƒe ŋgɔgbevi Yeraxmeel viwo nye: Ram, eƒe ŋgɔgbevi, Buna, Oren, Ozem kple Axiya. 26Eye srɔ̃ bubu ganɔ Yeraxmeel si, si ŋkɔ nye Atara; eya nye Onam dada. 27Yeraxmeel ŋgɔgbevi Ram ƒe viwo nye: Maaz, Yamin kple Eker. 28Onam viwo nye Samai kple Yada. Samai viwo nye: Nadab kple Abisur. 29Abisur srɔ̃ ŋkɔ nye Abixail, eya dzi Axban kple Molid nɛ. 30Nadab viwo nye: Seled kple Apayim; ke Seled medzi via ɖeke hafi ku o. 31Apayim viwo nye: Yisi, eye Yisi vi nye Sesan, Sesan vi nye: Axelai. 32Semai nɔvi, Yada ƒe viwo nye Yeter kple Yonatan; ke Yeter medzi via ɖeke hafi ku o. 33Yonatan viwo nye Pelet kple Zaza. Amesiawo nye Yeraxmeel ƒe viwo. 34Sesan medzi ŋutsuvia ɖeke o, negbe nyonuviwo ko. Ke kluvia ɖe nɔ Sesan si, amesi tso Egipte, eŋkɔ nye Yarxa. 35Eye Sesan tso vianyɔnu na eƒe kluvi Yarxa wòɖe; eya dzi Atai nɛ. 36Atai dzi Natan, eye Natan dzi Zabad 37Zabad dzi Eflal, eye Eflal dzi Obed. 38Obed dzi Yehu, eye Yehu dzi Azarya; 39Azarya dzi Xelez, eye Xelez dzi Eleasa. 40Eleasa dzi Sisemai, eye Sisemai dzi Salum. 41Salum dzi Yekamya, eye Yekamya dzi Elisama.
42Yeraxmeel nɔvi Kaleb ƒe viwo nye: eƒe ŋgɔgbea nye Mesa, eya nye Zif toto, kple Maresa, si nye Xebron lolo ƒe viwo. 43Xebron viwo nye Korax, Tapuax, Rekem kple Sema. 44Sema dzi Raxam, si nye Yorkeam fofo, eye Rekem dzi Samai. 45Samai ƒe viŋutsu enye Maon, eye Maon enye Bet-Zur fofo. 46Eye Kaleb ƒe ahiã Efa dzi Xaran, Moza kple Gazez; ke Xaran ye dzi Gazez. 47Yadai viwo nye: Regem, Yotam, Gesan, Pelet, Efa kple Saaf. 48Kaleb ƒe ahiã Maaxa dzi Seber kple Tirxana. 49Eya kee dzi Saaf hã, amesi nye Madmana fofo, Sewa, si nye Maxbena kple Gibea fofo; eye Kaleb ƒe vinyɔnu enye Axsa.
50Kaleb ƒe viwo nye esi: Efrata ƒe ŋgɔgbea Xur ƒe viwo nye: Sobal, si nye Kiryat-Yearim fofo; 51Salma, si nye Betlexem fofo; Xaref, si nye Bet-Gader fofo. 52Eye Kiryat-Yearim fofo Sobal ƒe viwo nye: Haroe kple Menuxottɔwo ƒe afã. 53Kiryat-Yearim ƒe ƒomewo nye: Yitritɔwo, Putitɔwo, Sumatitɔwo kple Misraitɔwo. Woawo me Zoreatitɔwo kple Estaolitɔwo dzo tso. 54Salma viwo nye: Betlexem, Netofatitɔwo, Atarot, Bet-Yoab kple Manatitɔwo ƒe afã, eya nye Zoreatitɔwo, 55agbalẽŋlɔlawo ƒe ƒome, si le Yabez, Tiratitɔwo, Simatitɔwo kple Suxatitɔwo, amesiawo nye Kinitɔwo, amesiwo dzɔ tso Xamat, amesi nye Rexab ƒe aƒekɔ ƒe fofo la me.

Title: KRONIKA I 3
Content:
Dawid viwo kple Yuda-fiawo ƒe dzidzimegbalẽ.
1Dawid vi, siwo wodzi nɛ le Xebron la wonye: eƒe ŋgɔgbea Amnon, si nye Axinoam, Yesreel-nyɔnu la lɔ; evelia nye Daniel, si nye Abigail, Karmel-nyɔnu la to, 2etɔ̃lia nye Absalom, si nye Gesur-fia Talmai ƒe vinyɔnu Maaxa ƒe vi; enelia nye Adoniya, Xagit ƒe vi; 3atɔ̃lia nye Sefatya, si nye Abital ta; adelia nye Yitream, si nye srɔ̃a Egla tɔ. 4Wo ame ade wodzi nɛ le Xebron; eɖu fia le afima ƒe adre kple dzinu ade, eye ƒe blaetɔ̃ vo etɔ̃ woɖu fia le Yerusalem. 5Vi, siwo wodzi nɛ le Yerusalem, wonye: Simea, Sobab, Natan kple Salomo; wole wo ame ene, siwo nye Amiel ƒe vinyɔnu Bat-Sua tɔ; 6hekpe ɖe Yibxar, Elisama, Elifelet, 7Noga, Nefeg, Yafia, 8Elisama, Elyada kple Elifelet ŋu wole wo ame asieke. 9Amesiawo nye Dawid ƒe viŋutsuwo, ke eƒe ahiãwo ƒe viŋutsuwo mele eme o. Wo nɔvinyɔnu enye Tamar.
10Salomo vi nye Rexabeam; eya ƒe vi nye Abiya, eya ƒe vi nye Asa, eya ƒe vi nye Yosafat, 11eya ƒe vi nye Yoram, eya ƒe vi nye Axazya, eya ƒe vi nye Yoas, 12eya ƒe vi nye Amazya, eya ƒe vi nye Azarya, eya ƒe vi nye Yotam, 13eya ƒe vi nye Axaz, eya ƒe vi nye Xizkiya, eya ƒe vi nye Manase, 14eya ƒe vi nye Amon, eya ƒe vi nye Yosiya. 15Yosiya viwo nye: ŋgɔgbea nye Yoxanan, evelia nye Yoyakim, etɔ̃lia nye Zedekiya, enelia nye Salum. 16Yoyakim viwo nye: Yexonya, eya ƒe vi nye Zedekiya. 17Yexonya, amesi nye aboyome la ƒe viwo nye: Sealtiel, 18Malxiram, Pedaya, Senazar, Yekamya, Hosama kple Nedabya. 19Pedaya ƒe viwo nye: Zerubabel kple Simei. Zerubabel ƒe viwo nye: Mesulam kple Xananya; wo nɔvinyɔnu enye Selomit; 20emegbe Xasuba, Ohel, Berexya, Xasadya kple Yusab-Xesed, wole wo ame atɔ̃. 21Xananya viwo nye: Pelatya kple Yesaya, Refaya viwo, Arnan viwo, Obadya viwo, Sexanya viwo. 22Sexanya vi nye: Semaya, eye Semaya viwo nye: Xatus, Yigeal, Bariax, Nearya, Safat; wote wo ame ade. 23Nearya viwo nye: Elyoenai, Xizkiya, Azrikam; wole wo ame elɔ̃. 24Elyoenai viwo nye: Hodaya, Elyasib, Pelaya, Akub, Yoxanan, Delaya kple Anani; wole wo ame adre.

Title: KRONIKA I 4
Content:
Yuda ƒe dzidzimeviwo.
1Yuda viwo nye: Perez, Xezron, Kelubai, Xur kple Sobal. 2Sobal vi Reaya dzi Yaxat, eye Yaxat dzi Axumai kple Lahad. Esia nye Zoreatitɔwo ƒe ƒomeawo. 3Etam viwo nye: Yezreel, Yisma, Yidbas; wo nɔvinyɔnu ŋkɔ nye Hazlelponi; 4emegbe Gedor fofo Penuel kple Xusa fofo Ezer. Amesiawo nye Betlexem fofo Xur, amesi nye Efrata ƒe ŋgɔgbea ƒe viwo. 5Tekoa fofo Asxur ɖe srɔ̃ eve, siwo nye: Xelea kple Naara. 6Naara dzi Axuzam, Xefer, Temni kple Axastaritɔwo nɛ. Amesiawo nye Naara viwo. 7Eye Xelea viwo nye; Zeret, Yizxar, Etnan kple Koz. 8Koz dzi Anub, Hazobeba kple Harum vi Axarxel ƒe ƒomeawo. 9Bubu nɔ Yabez ŋu wu nɔviawo, eye dadaa na ŋkɔe be Yabez, le esi wose veve hafi dzii ta. 10Eye Yabez yɔ Israel ƒe Mawu la gblɔ bena: Ne èyram, eye nèkeke nye anyigba ɖe enu, wò asi nɔ kplim, eye neɖe dzɔgbevɔ̃ewo ɖa, ale be vevea ɖeke medzɔ ɖe dzinye o la, — tete Mawu na nusi wòbia la, va me. 11Suxa nɔvi Kelub dzi Mexir, eya nye Eston fofo. 12Eston dzi Bet-Rafa, Paseax kple Texina, si nye Naxas-du la fofo; amesiawo nye Rexa ƒe ŋutsuwo. 13Kenaz viwo nye: Otniel kple Seraya; eye Otniel vi nye Xatat. 14Meonotai dzi Ofra, eye Seraya dzi Yoab, si nye atikpala, bali me nɔlawo fofo, elabena atikpalawo wonye. 15Yefune vi Kaleb ƒe viwo nye: Iru, Ela kple Naam, hekpe ɖe Ela kple Kenaz ƒe viwo ŋu. 16Yehalelel viwo nye: Zif, Zifa, Tirya kple Asareel. 17Ezra viwo nye: Yeter, Mered, Efer kple Yalon. Farao vinyɔnu Bitya, si Mered ɖe la ƒe viwo nye esi: Eya dzi Miryam, Samai kple Yisbax, si nye Estemoa fofo. 18Eye srɔ̃a, Yuda-nyɔnu la, dzi Yered, si nye Gedor fofo kple Xeber, si nye Soxo fofo, kpakple Yekutiel, si nye Zanoax fofo. 19Hodiya srɔ̃, si nye Naxam nɔvinyɔnu ƒe viwo nye: Garmitɔ, Kegila fofo, kple Maaxatitɔ Estemoa. 20Simon viwo nye Amnon, Rina, Ben-Xanan kple Tilon. Yisei viwo nye: Zoxet kple Ben-Zoxet. 21Yuda vi Sela ƒe viwo nye: Ger, si nye Lexa fofo, Laeda, si nye Maresa fofo, kpakple Asbea ƒe aƒe me aklalalɔ̃lawo ƒe ƒome; 22emegbe Yokim, Kozeba-ŋutsuwo kple Yoas kpakple Saraf, amesiwo ɖu amegã le Moab kple Yasubi-Lexem. Ke blemanyawo nye esiawo. 23Wonye zermlawo, eye wono Netaim kple Gedera, fia ƒe do me wono le afima.
Simeon ƒe dzidzimeviwo.
24Simeon viwo nye: Nemuel, Yamin, Yarib, Serax kple Saul; 25eya ƒe vi nye Salum, eya ƒe vi nye Mibsam, eya ƒe vi nye Misma. 26Misma viwo nye: Xamuel, eya ƒe vi nye Zakur, eya ƒe vi nye Simei. 27Ŋutsuvi wuiade kple nyɔnuvi ade nɔ Simei si, ke vi geɖe menɔ nɔviawo ya si o, eye woƒe ƒome mekeke ta de Yuda viwo to nu o. 28Wono Beer-Seba, Molada, Xazar-Sual, 29Bilha, Ezem, Tolad, 30Betuel, Xorma, Ziklag, 31Bet-Markabot, Xazar-Susim, Bet-Birei kple Saarayim. Esiawo nye woƒe duwo, vaseɖe esime Dawid ɖu fia. 32Woƒe kɔƒe, siwo kpe ɖe eŋu, wonye: Etam, Ayin, Rimon, Toxen kple Asan, wole du atɔ̃, 33kpakple woƒe kɔƒe, siwo katã ƒo xlã du siawo vaseɖe Baal. Esiawo nye woƒe nɔƒewo, eye ƒomegbalẽ tɔxɛ le wo si.
34Mesobab, Yamlex, Yosa, Amazya vi, 35Yoel, Yehu, si nye Asiel vi Seraya ƒe vi Yosibya vi; 36Elyoenai, Yaakoba, Yesoxaya, Asaya, Adiel, Yesimiel, Benaya kple 37Ziza, Sifei vi, amesi nye Alon vi, amesi nye Yadaya vi, amesi nye Simri vi, amesi nye Semaya vi. 38Amesiwo ŋkɔ woxlẽ la, wonye amegãwo le woƒe ƒomeawo me, eye woƒe aƒekɔwo keke ta ŋutɔ. 39Eye woho ɖo ta Gedor vaseɖe bali la ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome, be woadi lãnyiƒe na woƒe lãhawo. 40Eye wokpɔ lãnyiƒe dama nyuia ɖe; anyigba la keke le goawo katã me, eye eŋu fa bɔkɔɔ; elabena Xam-viwo nɔ afima tsã. 41Tete amesiwo ŋkɔ woŋlɔ ɖi la, va gbã woƒe agbadɔwo, eye wowu Meunitɔ, siwo nɔ afima le Yuda-fia Xizkiya ŋɔli: wotsrɔ̃ wo gbidigbidi vaseɖe egbe henɔ wo teƒe, elabena lãnyiƒe le afima na woƒe lãwo. 42Eye Simeon-viwo dome ame alafa atɔ̃ ho yi Seir-to dzi; woƒe tatɔwo nye Yisei viwo: Pelatya, Nearya, Refaya kple Uziel. 43Eye wowu Amalekitɔ, siwo tsi anyi la ƒe susɔeawo henɔ afima vaseɖe egbe.

Title: KRONIKA I 5
Content:
Ruben ƒe dzidzimeviwo.
1Israel ŋgɔgbevi Ruben ƒe viwo; elabena eya nye ŋgɔgbea, ke esi wògblẽ kɔ ɖo na fofoa ƒe aba la, wotsɔ eƒe ŋgɔgbevinyenye na Israel vi Yosef ƒe viwo, ke ɖeko womeŋlɔ woƒe ŋkɔ ɖi abe ŋgɔgbeawo ene o. 2Elabena Yuda sẽ ŋu le nɔviawo dome, eye amegã dzɔ tso eme; ke ŋgɔgbevinyenye la enye Yosef tɔ. 3Israel ŋgɔgbevi Ruben ƒe viwo nye: Henox. Palu, Xezron kple Karmi. 4Yoel viwo nye Semaya, eya ƒe vi nye Gog, eya ƒe vi nye Simei, 5eya ƒe vi nye Mixa, eya ƒe vi nye Reaya, eya ƒe vi nye Baal, 6eya ƒe vi nye Beera, amesi Asur-fia Tiglat-Pileser de aboyoe; eya nye Ruben-viwo ƒe amegã. 7Ale woŋlɔ nɔvia, siwo tso eƒe ƒomea me la, ɖe dzidzimegbalẽ la me le woƒe dzidzime nu enye si: Yeiel, si nye tatɔ, Zaxarya, 8Bela, Azaz vi, amesi nye Sema vi, amesi nye Yoel vi; eya nɔ Aroer vaseɖe Nebo kple Baal-Meon; 9enɔ ɣedzeƒe gome ɖo ta gbe dzi tso Frat-tɔsisi la nu, elabena woƒe lãwo dzi ɖe dzi le Gilead-nyigba dzi. 10Le Saul ŋɔli la wowɔ aʋa kple Hagritɔwo; eye esi wotsi wo si me la, woxɔ woƒe agbadɔwo no me le Gilead ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome katã.
Gad ƒe dzidzimeviwo. Aʋawɔwɔ kple Hagritɔwo.
11Eye Gad-viwo nɔ wo kasa le Basan-nyigba dzi vaseɖe Salxa. 12Yoel, si nye tatɔ, Safam, si nye evelia, Yanai kple Safat le Basan. 13Wo nɔviwò nye esi le woƒe aƒekɔwo nu: Mixael, Mesulam, Seba, Yorai, Yakan, Zia kple Eber; wole adadre. 14Amesiawo nye Abixail ƒe viwo, amesi nye Xuri vi, amesi nye Yaroax vi, amesi nye Gilead vi, amesi nye Mixael vi, amesi nye Yesisai vi, amesi nye Yaxdo vi, amesi nye Buz vi. 15Guni vi Abdiel ƒe vi Axi enye woƒe aƒekɔ la ƒe tatɔ. 16Wonɔ Gilead, Basan kple wo ŋu duwo me kpakple Saron ƒe nutowo katã me vaseɖe eƒe mlɔenu. 17Woŋlɔ amesiawo katã ɖi le Yuda-fia Yotam kple Israel-fia Yerobeam ŋɔli.
18Ruben-viwo, Gad-viwo kple Manase ƒe to afã ƒe ŋutsu kalẽtɔ, siwo tsoa akpoxɔnu kple yi, wodaa da, eye wonya aʋaɖaŋu la, le ame akpe blane vɔ ene alafa adre kple blaade, eye woho yi aʋagbe dzi 19hewɔ aʋa kple Hagritɔwo, Yetur, Nafis kple Nodab. 20Mawu kpe ɖe wo ŋu, ale be Hagritɔwo kple amesiwo katã kpe ɖe wo ŋu la, ge ɖewo si me; elabena wodo ɣli yɔ Mawu le aʋa la me, eye wòɖo to wo, le esi woɖo ŋu ɖe eŋu ta. 21Woha woƒe lãwo: kposɔ akpe blaatɔ̃, alẽ akpe alafa eve kple blaatɔ̃ kple tedzi akpe eve, hekpe ɖe amegbetɔ akpe alafa ɖeka ŋu. 22Elabena woda nu ame geɖewo woku, elabena aʋa la tso Mawu gbɔ̃; eye wono wo, teƒe vaseɖe aboyoɖeŋɔli.
Manase to afã.
23Eye Manase-to afã la ƒe viwo nɔ Basan-nyigba dzi vaseɖe Baal-Xermon kple Senir kpakple Xermon-to la ŋu; wosɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ. 24Woƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo nye esi: Efer, Yisei, Eliel, Azriel, Yirmeya, Hodaya kple Yaxdiel; wonye ŋutsuwɔlawo, ame ŋkɔŋuwo kple woƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo. 25Ke womeɖi anukware na wo fofowo ƒe Mawu la o, eye wodze anyigba dzi dukɔ, siwo Mawu tsrɔ̃ le wo ŋgɔ la ƒe mawuwo yome. 26Tete Israel ƒe Mawu la nyɔ Asur-fia Pul ƒe gbɔgbɔ kple Asur-fia Tiglat-Pileser ƒe gbɔgbɔ de wo, eye wokplɔ Ruben-viwo, Gad-viwo kple Manase ƒe to afã la dzo yi Xalax, Xabor kple Hara kpakple Gozan-tɔsisi la nu vaseɖe egbe.
Lewi ƒe dzidzimeviwo.
27Lewi viwo nye: Gerson, Kehat kple Merari. 28Kehat viwo nye: Amram, Yizxar. Xebron kple Uziel. 29Amram viwo nye: Aron, Mose kple Miryam; eye Aron viwo nye: Nadab, Abihu, Eleazar kple Itamar. 30Eleazar dzi Pinexas, eye Pinexas dzi Abisua; 31Abisua dzi Buki, eye Buki dzi Uzi: 32Uzi dzi Zeraxya, eye Zeraxya dzi Merayot; 33Merayot dzi Amarya, eye Amarya dzi Axitub; 34Axitub dzi Zadok, eye Zadok dzi Aximaaz; 35Aximaaz dzi Azarya, eye Azarya dzi Yoxanan; 36Yoxanan dzi Azarya; eya nye amesi wo nunɔladɔ le gbedoxɔ, si Salomo tu ɖe Yerusalem la me. 37Azarya dzi Amarya, eye Amarya dzi Axitub; 38Axitub dzi Zadok, eye Zadok dzi Salum; 39Salum dzi Xilkiya, eye Xilkiya dzi Azarya; 40Azarya dzi Seraya, eye Seraya dzi Yozadak. 41Ke Yozadak ʋu dzo le afima, esime Yehowa na Nebukadnezar ɖe aboyo Yuda kple Yerusalem.

Title: KRONIKA I 6
Content:
Lewi- kple Aron-viwo nɔƒe kple woƒe ŋkɔwo.
1Lewi viwo nye: Gerson, Kehat kple Merari. 2Gerson viwo ƒe ŋkɔwo nye esi: Libni kple Simei. 3Kehat viwo nye: Amram, Yizxar, Xebron kple Uziel. 4Merari viwo nye: Maxeli kple Musi. Esiawo nye Lewi viwo ƒe ƒomeawo le wo fofowo nu. 5Gerson vi enye Libni, eya ƒe vi nye Yaxat, eya ƒe vi nye Zima, 6eya ƒe vi nye Zoax, eya ƒe vi nye Ido, eya ƒe vi nye Zerax, eya ƒe vi nye Yeatrai. 7Kehat viwo nye: Aminadab, eya ƒe vi nye Korax, eya ƒe vi nye Asir, 8eya ƒe vi nye Elkana, eya ƒe vi nye Ebyasaf, eya ƒe vi nye Asir, 9eya ƒe vi nye Taxal, eya ƒe vi nye Uriel, eya ƒe vi nye Uzya, eya ƒe vi nye Saul. 10Elkana viwo nye Amasai kple Aximot; 11eya ƒe vi nye Elkana, eya ƒe vi nye Zofai, eya ƒe vi nye Naxat, 12eya ƒe vi nye Eliab, eya ƒe vi nye Yeroxam, eya ƒe vi nye Elkana, eya ƒe vi nye Samuel. 13Samuel viwo nye: Yoel, si nye ŋgɔgbea, eye evelia nye Abiya. 14Merari viwo nye: Maxeli, eya ƒe vi nye Libni, eya ƒe vi nye Simei, eya ƒe vi nye Uza, 15eya ƒe vi nye Simea, eya ƒe vi nye Xagiya, eya ƒe vi nye Asaya.
16Amesiwo Dawid ɖo be, wòadzi ha le Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me, tso esime aɖaka la kpɔ gbɔɖemeƒe, wonye esi. 17Wotsɔ hadzidzi subɔ le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la ŋgɔ, vaseɖe esime Salomo tu Yehowa ƒe xɔ ɖe Yerusalem, eye wonɔ woƒe dɔ me le ɖoɖo nu. 18Amesiwo wɔ dɔ la kple wo viwo nye esi: Amesi tso Kehat viwo dome enye Heman, si nye hena, amesi nye Yoel vi, amesi nye Samuel vi, 19amesi nye Elkana vi, amesi nye Yeroxam vi, amesi nye Eliel vi, amesi nye Toax vi, 20amesi nye Zuf vi, amesi nye Elkana vi, amesi nye Maxat vi, amesi nye Amasai vi, 21amesi nye Elkana vi, amesi nye Yoel vi, amesi nye Azarya vi, amesi nye Zefanya vi, 22amesi nye Taxat vi, amesi nye Asir vi, amesi nye Ebyasaf vi, amesi nye Korax vi, 23amesi nye Yizxar vi, amesi nye Kehat vi, amesi nye Lewi vi, amesi nye Israel ƒe vi.
24Nɔvia Asat tsi tre ɖe eƒe ɖusi me Asaf enye Berexya vi, amesi nye Simea vi, 25amesi nye Mixael vi, amesi nye Baaseya vi, amesi nye Malkiya vi, 26amesi nye Etni vi, amesi nye Zerax vi, amesi nye Adaya vi, 27amesi nye Etan vi, amesi nye Zima vi, amesi nye Simei vi, 28amesi nye Yaxat vi, amesi nye. Gerson vi, amesi nye Lewi vi.
29Eye wo nɔvi, Merari viwo, no miame Etan enye Kisi vi, amesi nye Abdi vi, amesi nye Malux vi, 30amesi nye Xasabya vi, amesi nye Amazya vi, amesi nye Xilkiya vi, 31amesi nye Amzi vi, amesi nye Bani vi, amesi nye Semer vi, 32amesi nye Maxeli vi, amesi nye Musi vi, amesi nye Merari vi, amesi nye Lewi vi. 33Eye woɖo wo nɔvi Lewi-viwo, ne woawɔ dɔ sia dɔ le Mawu ƒe aƒe la me. 34Eye Aron kple viaŋutsuwo doa dzo ɖe numevɔsamlekpui kple dzudzɔdovɔsamlekpui la dzi, woɖo wo hena kɔkɔefewo ƒe kɔkɔeƒe ƒe dɔwo katã, eye wòlé avu Israel le se, siwo katã Mawu ƒe dɔla Mose de la nu.
35Aron viwo nye esi: Eleazar, eya ƒe vi nye Pinexas eya ƒe vi nye Abisua, 36eya ƒe vi nye Buki, eya ƒe vi nye Uzi, eya ƒe vi nye Zeraxya, 37eya ƒe vi nye Merayot, eya ƒe vi nye Amarya, eya ƒe vi nye Axitub, 38eya ƒe vi nye Zadok, eya ƒe vi nye Aximaaz.
39Woƒe nɔƒewo le woƒe anyigba dzi enye si le woƒe aƒetsotsowo nu. Aron vi, siwo tso Kehat viwo ƒe ƒome la me tɔ enye si: elabena woawo dzi dzidze la dze gbã. 40Eye wotsɔ Xebron na wo ɖe Yuda-nyigba dzi kple lãnyiƒe, si le eŋu godoo, 41ke wotsɔ du la ƒe agble kple eƒe kɔƒewo na Yefune vi Kaleb. 42Esiwo wotso na Aron viwo, wonye: Sitsoƒedu Xebron, Libna kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Yatir kple Estemoa kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒewo. 43Xilen kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Debir kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 44Asan kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Bet-Semes kple eŋu lãnyiƒe. 45Esiwo le Benyamin-to la me la, wonye: Geba kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Alemet kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Anatot kple eŋu lãnyiƒe: woƒe du, siwo katã le woƒe ƒomea me la, le du wuietɔ̃.
46Eye wodzidze nu tso du ewo na Kehat viwo, siwo nye to la ƒe ƒome susɔeawo la, ɖe Efrayim-to, Dan-to kple Manase ƒe to afã la me. 47Wona du wuietɔ̃ Gerson viwo le woƒe ƒomeawo nu ɖe Isaxar-to, Aser-to, Naftali-to kple Manase-to me le Basan. 48Eye wodzidze nu tso du wuieve na Merari viwo le woƒe ƒomeawo nu ɖe Ruben-to, Gad-to kple Zebulon-to la me. 49Eye Israel ƒe viwo tsɔ duawo kple wo ŋu lãnyiƒeawo na Lewi viwo; 50eye wodzidze nu tsɔ du, siwo ŋkɔ woxlẽ la, na wo le Yuda viwo ƒe to, Simeon viwo ƒe to kple Benyamin ƒe to la me. 51Eye wotsɔ du na Kehat viwo ƒe ƒome susɔeawo de Efrayim-to la me. 52Wotsɔ sitsoƒeduwo na wo: Sixem kple eŋu lãnyiƒe le Efrayim-to dzi, Gezer kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 53Yokmeam kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Bet-Xoron kple eŋu lãnyiƒe; 54Ayalon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Gat-Rimon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe. 55Eye wotsɔ Aner kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Bileam kple eŋu lãnyiƒe na Kehat viwo ƒe ƒome susɔeawo ɖe Manase ƒe to afã la me.
56Wotsɔ Golan le Basan kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Astarot kple eŋu lãnyiƒe na Gerson viwo ɖe Manase ƒome ƒe to afã la me. 57Esiwo le Isaxar-to la me, wonye: Kedes kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Dobrat kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 58Ramot kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Anem kple eŋu lãnyiƒe. 59Esiwo le Aser-to la me, wonye: Masal kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Abdon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 60Xukok kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Rexob kple eŋu lãnyiƒe. 61Eye esiwo le Naftali-to lãme, wonye: Kedes le Galilea kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Xamon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Kiryatayim kple eŋu lãnyiƒe.
62Esiwo wotso na Merari vi susɔeawo ɖe Zebulon-to la me, wonye: Rimono kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Tabor kple eŋu lãnyiƒe. 63Esiwo le Ruben-to la me le Yordan ƒe go keme le Yerixo gbɔ le Yordan ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome, wonye: Bezer le gbe dzi kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Yaza kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, 64Kedemot kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Mefaat kple eŋu lãnyiƒe. 65Esiwo le Gad-to la me, wonye: Ramot le Gilead kple eŋu lãnyiƒe, Maxanayim kple eŋu lãnyiƒe. 66Xesbon kple eŋu lãnyiƒe kpakple Yazer kple eŋu lãnyiƒe.

Title: KRONIKA I 7
Content:
Yakob vi ade mlɔeawo ƒe dzidzimegbalẽ.
1Isaxar viwo nye: Tola, Pua, Yasub kple Simron, wole wo ame ene. 2Tola viwo nye: Uzi, Refaya, Yeriel, Yaxmai, Yibsam kple Samuel; woawo nye Tola ƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo, eye wonye ŋutsu kalẽtɔwo le woƒe ƒomeawo me. Woƒe xexlẽme de akpe blave vo eve kple alafa ade le Dawid ŋɔli. 3Uzi vi nye Yizraxya, eye Yizraxya viwo nye: Mixael, Obadya, Yoel kple Yisiya; wole wo ame atɔ̃; wo katã wonye tatɔwo. 4Eye aʋawɔla akpe blaetɔ̃ vɔ ade kpe ɖe wo ŋu le woƒe ƒomeawo kple woƒe aʋakɔwo nu, elabena srɔ̃ geɖe kple viŋutsuwo le wo si. 5Wo nɔvi, siwo tso Isaxar ƒe ƒomeawo katã me la, nye ŋutsu kalẽtɔwo; ame akpe blanyi va adre le woƒe dzidzimegbalẽ la me. 6Benyamin viwo nye: Bela, Bexer kple Yediael, wole wo ame etɔ̃. 7Bela viwo nye: Ezbon, Uzi, Uziel, Yerimot kple Iri; woawo nye aʋakɔwo ƒe tatɔ atɔ̃awo kple ŋutsu kalẽtɔwo; eye ame akpe blave vɔ eve kple blaetɔ̃ vɔ ene le woƒe dzidzimegbalẽ la me. 8Bexer viwo nye: Zemira, Yoas, Eliezer, Elyoenai. Omri, Yeremot, Abiya, Anatot kple Alemet; wo katã nye Bexer viwo. 9Woƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo, siwo nye ŋutsu kalẽtɔwo, le ame akpe blave kple alafa eve le woƒe ƒomeawo nu le woƒe dzidzimegbalẽ la me. 10Yediael vi nye: Bilhan, eye Bilhan viwo nye: Yeus, Benyamin, Ehud, Kenaana, Zetan, Tarsis kple Axisaxar. 11Amesiawo katã nye Yediael viwo le woƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo, siwo nye ŋutsu kalẽtɔwo la nu; wole ame akpe wuiadre kple alafa eve, amesiwo hona yia aʋa. 12Supim kple Xupim wonye Ir viwo; eye Xusim enye Axer vi.
13Naftali viwo nye: Yaxziel. Guni, Yezer kple Salum, amesiwo nye Bilha ƒe viwo.
14Manase viwo nye: Asriel, si eƒe ahiã, Aram-nyɔnu la dzi, eyae dzi Maxir, si nye Gilead fofo. 15Eye Maxir ɖe srɔ̃, si nye Xupim kple Supim nɔvinyɔnu, amesi ŋkɔ nye Maaxa. Evelia ŋkɔ nye Zelofxad, eye Zelofxad dzi nyɔnuviwo 16Eye Maxir srɔ̃ Maaxa dzi ŋutsuvi hena ŋkɔe be Peres, eye nɔvia ŋkɔ nye Seres; eya ƒe viwo nye Ulam kple Rekem. 17Ulam vi nye Bedan. Amesiawo nye Manase vi Maxir ƒe vi Gilead ƒe viwo. 18Nɔvianyɔnu Hamolexet dzi Ishod, Abiezer kple Maxla. 19Semiada viwo nye: Axyan, Sexem, Likxi kple Aniam.
20Efrayim vi nye: Sutelax; eya ƒe vi nye Bered eya ƒe vi nye Taxat, eya ƒe vi nye Eleada, eya ƒe vi nye Taxat, 21eya ƒe vi nye Zabad, eya ƒe vi nye Sutelax hekpe ɖe Ezer kple Elead ŋuti. Ke Gat-ŋutsuwo, siwo nye anyigbadzitɔwo, wu wo, elabena wova, be woalé woƒe lãwo. 22Tete wo fofo Efrayim fa na wo eteƒe didi, eye nɔviawo va, be woafa akɔ nɛ. 23Eye wòdɔ srɔ̃ gbɔ wòfɔ fu hedzi ŋutsuvi, eye wòna ŋkɔe be Beria, elabena dzɔgbevɔ̃e va eƒe aƒe dzi. 24Vianyɔnu enye Seera, eyae tso Anyigbe-Bet-Xoron kple Dzigbe-Bel-Xoron kpakple Uzen-Seera. 25Viaŋutsu nye Refax, eya ƒe viwo nye Resef kple Telax, eya ƒe vi nye Taxan, 26eya ƒe vi nye Laedan, eya ƒe vi nye Amihud, eya ƒe vi nye Elisama, 27eya ƒe vi nye Nun, eya ƒe vi nye Yosua. 28Woƒe anyigba kple wo nɔƒewo nye: Betel kple eŋu duwo ɖo ta Naaran le ɣedzeƒe kple Gezer le ɣetoɖoƒe kple wo ŋu duwo, Sexem kple eŋu duwo vaseɖe Aya kple eŋu duwo gbɔ. 29Manase viwo tɔ, si le akpa sia dzi, wonye Bet-Sean kple eŋu duwo; du siawo me Israel vi Yosef ƒe viwo nɔ.
30Aser viwo nye: Yimna, Yiswa, Yiswi, Bena kple wo nɔvinyɔnu Serax. 31Bena viwo nye: Xeber kple Malxiel, eya nye Birzayit fofo. 32Xeber dzi Yaflet, Somer, Xotam kple wo nɔvinyɔnu Sua. 33Yaflet viwo nye: Pasax, Bimhal kple Aswat; amesiawo nye Yaflet viwo. 34Somer viwo nye: Axi, Roga, Xuba kple Aram. 35Nɔvia Helem viwo nye: Zofax, Yimna, Seles kple Amal. 36Zofax viwo nye: Suax, Xarnefer, Sual, Beri kple Yimra, 37Bezer, Hod, Sama, Silsa, Yitran kple Beera. 38Yeter viwo nye: Yefune, Pispa kple Ara. 39Ula viwo nye: Arax, Xaniel kple Rizya. 40Amesiawo katã nye Aser viwo, aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo, ŋutsu kalẽtɔ tiatia, siwo nye amegãwo ƒe tatɔwo, eye woŋlɔ woƒe ŋkɔwo ɖi hena aʋawɔwɔ, woƒe xexlẽme le ame akpe blave vɔ ade.

Title: KRONIKA I 8
Content:
Benyamin kple Saul ƒe aƒe.
1Eye Benyamin dzi Bela, si nye eƒe ŋgɔgbea, evelia nye Asbel, etɔ̃lia nye Axrax, 2enelia nye Noxa, eye atɔ̃lia nye Rafa. 3Bela viwo nye: Adar, Gera, Abihud, 4Abisua, Naaman, Axoax, 5Gera, Sefufan kple Xuram. 6Exud viwo nye esi: — woawo nye Gebatɔwo ƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo, eye woɖe aboyo wo yi Manaxat; 7Naaman, Axiya kple Gera, eya nye amesi ɖe aboyowo — eye wòdzi Uza kple Axixud. 8Eye Saxarayim dzi viwo le Moab-nyigba dzi, esime wòɖe asi le srɔ̃a Xusim kple Baara ŋuti megbe. 9Srɔ̃a Xodes dzi Yobab, Zibya, Mesa, Malkam, 10Yeuz, Sobya kple Mirma nɛ; woawo nye via, siwo nye aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo. 11Xusim dzi Abilub kple Elpaal nɛ. 12Elpaal viwo nye Eber, Misam kple Semer; eya tso Ono kple Lod kpakple wo ŋu duwo. 13Beria kple Sema wonye Ayalontɔwo ƒe aƒedowo ƒe tatɔwo; woawo nyã Gattɔwo wòsi; 14Axyo, Sasak, Yeremot, 15Zebadya, Arad, Eder, 16Mixael, Yispa kple Yoxa; amesiawo nye Beria viwo. 17Zebadya, Mesulam, Xiski, Xeber, 18Yismerai, Yizia kple Yobab; amesiawo nye Elpaal viwo. 19Yakim, Zixri, Zabdi, 20Elienai, Ziltai, Eliel, 21Adaya, Beraya kple Simrat; woawo nye Simei viwo. 22Yispan, Eber, Eliel, 23Abdon, Zixri, Xanan, 24Xananya, Elam, Antotiya, 25Yifdeya kple Penuel; woawo nye Sasak viwo. 26Samserai, Sexarya, Atalya, 27Yaaresya, Eliya kple Zixri; woawo nye Yeroxam viwo. 28Amesiawo nye woƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo le woƒe ƒomeawo nu, eye wonɔ Yerusalem. 29Gibeon fofo nɔ Gibeon, eye srɔ̃a ŋkɔ nye Maaxa. 30Eƒe ŋgɔgbevi nye Abdon, Zur, Kis, Baal, Nadab, 31Gedor, Axyo kple Zexer. 32Miklot dzi Simea; woawo kple wo nɔviwo hã nɔ wo nɔviwo kasa le Yerusalem.
33Ner dzi Kis, eye Kis dzi Saul. Saul dzi Yonatan, Malxisua, Abinadab kple Esbaal. 34Yonatan vi enye Merib-Baal, eye Merib-Baal dzi Mixa. 35Mixa viwo nye: Piton, Melex, Taxrea kple Axaz. 36Axaz dzi Yoada, eye Yoada dzi Alemet, Azmawet kple Zimri. Zimri dzi Moza, 37eye Moza dzi Binea; eya ƒe vi nye Rafa, eya ƒe vi nye Eleasa, eya ƒe vi nye Azel. 38Eye Azel dzi vi aɖe, woƒe ŋkɔwo nye: Azrikam, Boxru, Ismael, Searya, Obadya kple Xanan; amesiawo katã nye Azel viwo. 39Nɔvia Esek ƒe viwo nye: Ulam, si nye eƒe ŋgɔgbea, evelia nye Yeus, etɔ̃lia nye Elifelet. 40Ulam viwo nye ŋutsu kalẽtɔwo kple aŋutrɔdalawo, eye ŋutsuvi geɖe kple tɔgbuiyɔviwo nɔ wo si; wole ame alafa ɖeka kple blaatɔ̃. Amesiawo katã tso Benyamin viwo dome.

Title: KRONIKA I 9
Content:
Yerusalem nɔlawo.
1Israel blibo la na woŋlɔ woƒe ŋkɔwo ɖi; kpɔ ɖa, woŋlɔ wo ɖe Israel-fiawo ƒe agbalẽ me. Ke wokplɔ Yuda yi Babel le woƒe nuteƒe mawɔmawɔ ta. 2Amesiwo no woƒe anyigba dzi le woƒe duwo me gbã, wonye: Israel nunɔlawo, Lewi viwo kple gbedoxɔ me dɔwɔlawo. 3Eye amewo tso Yuda-viwo, Benyamin-viwo, Efrayim-viwo kple Manase-viwo dome no Yerusalem. 4Utai, Amihud vi, amesi nye Omri vi, amesi nye Imri vi, amesi nye Bani vi tso Yuda vi Perez ƒe viwo dome. 5Amesiwo tso Silontɔwo dome, wonye: Asaya, amesi nye ŋgɔgbevi, kple viawo. 6Amesiwo tso Serax viwo dome, wonye Yeuel kple nɔviawo, wole ame alafa ade kple blaasieke. 7Amesiwo tso Benyamin-viwo dome, wonye: Salu, Mesulam vi, amesi nye Hodaya vi, amesi nye Hasenua vi; 8Yibneya, Yeroxam vi, kple Ela, Uzi vi, amesi nye Mixri vi; Mesulam, Sefatya vi, amesi nye Reguel vi, amesi nye Yibneya vi, 9kpakple nɔviawo le woƒe ƒomewo nu; wole ame alafa asieke kple blaatɔ̃ vɔ ade. Amesiawo katã nye woƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe ƒomeawo ƒe tatɔwo.
10Amesiwo tso nunɔlawo dome, wonye: Yedaya, Yoyarib, Yaxin, 11Azarya, Xilkiya vi, amesi nye Mesulam vi, amesi nye Zadok vi, amesi nye Merayot vi, amesi nye Axitub vi; eya nye amegã le Mawu ƒe aƒe la nu; 12Adaya, Yeroxam vi, amesi nye Pasxur vi, amesi nye Malxiya vi; Maesai, Adiel vi, amesi nye Yaxzera vi, amesi nye Mesulam vi, amesi nye Mesilemit vi, amesi nye Imer vi, 13hekpe ɖe wo noviwò ŋu. Woawo nye woƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe amegãwo; wole ame akpe ɖeka alafa adre kple blaade, amesiwo nye ame zãzɛwo le Mawu ƒe aƒe la ƒe dɔwo wɔwɔ me.
14Amesiwo tso Lewi-viwo dome, wonye: Semaya, Xasub vi, amesi nye Azrikam vi, amesi nye Xasabya vi tso Merari viwo dome; 15Bakbakar, Xeres, Galal kple Matanya, Mixa vi, amesi nye Zixri vi, amesi nye Asaf vi; 16Obadya, Semaya vi, amesi nye Galal vi, amesi nye Yedutun vi, kple Berexiya, Asa vi, amesi nye Elkana vi, amesi nɔ Netofatitɔwo ƒe kɔƒewo me.
Kɔkɔeƒe me dɔwɔlawo.
17Agbonudzɔlawo nye: Salum, Akub, Talmon, Aximan kple wo nɔviwò. Salum enye tatɔ. 18Ele fia ƒe agbo nu le ɣedzeƒe gome vaseɖe fifi. Amesiawo nye Lewi-viwo ƒe asaɖa ƒe agbonudzɔlawo. 19Salum, Kore vi, amesi nye Ebyasaf vi, amesi nye Korax vi, kple nɔvia, siwo tso eƒe aƒekɔ la me; wotsɔ do la de asi na Korax viwo, be woadzo agbadɔ la ƒe kpui nu, abe alesi wo fofowo nye mɔnudzɔlawo le Yehowa ƒe asaɖa la me ene. 20Tsã la Pinexas, Eleazar vi, nye amegã ɖe wo nu, eye Yehowa na kplii? 21Zaxarya, Meselemya vi, enye agbonudzɔla le Mawu ƒe agbadɔ la nu. 22Amesiawo katã, siwo wolia hena kpuinudzɔdzɔ la, le ame alafa eve kple wuieve; woŋlɔ woƒe ŋkɔwo le woƒe kɔƒewo me, eye Dawid kple nukpɔla Samuel wonye amesiwo tso wo de woƒe do la me. 23Woawo kple wo viwo dzɔ Yehowa ƒe aƒe ƒe agbo kple agbadɔ la ƒe xɔa nu. 24Agbonudzɔlawo le akpa eneawo dzi, le ɣedzeƒe, ɣetoɖoƒe, anyiehe kple dziehe. 25Eye wo nɔviwo tsoa woƒe kɔƒewo me vana ŋkeke adreadre, ne woakpe asi ɖe eŋu na wo ti; 26elabena agbonudzɔlawo ƒe amegã eneawo ɖo dɔ la me ɖikaa; wonye Lewi-viwo, eye wokpɔa Mawu ƒe aƒe la ƒe xɔwo kple nudzraɖoƒeawo dzi. 27Wotsia Mawu ƒe aƒe la nu dona, elabena woawoe nye dzɔlawo, eye woƒe dɔ enye agboawo ʋuʋu ŋdi sia ŋdi. 28Wotsɔ dɔwɔnuawo de wo dometɔa ɖewo si, be woatsɔ wo ava emee dedie, eye woatsɔ wo ado goe dedie. 29Wotsɔ nuawo katã, siwo nye nu kɔkɔeawo, wo memee, wein, ami, dzudzɔʋeʋẽedonu kple atike ʋeʋẽeawo de asi na wo dometɔa ɖewo. 30Eye nunɔlawo ƒe viwo dometɔa ɖewo tsɔa atike ʋeʋẽe ɖaa ami sisi la. 31Wotsɔ nusiwo wotɔna le agba me la, de Matitya si ɖikaa, etso Lewi-viwo dome, eye wònye Korax vi Salum ƒe ŋgɔgbevi. 32Eye wotsɔ Kehat viwo, siwo tso wo nɔviwo dome la, ɖo ŋkumeɖobolo la nu, ne woadzrae ɖo le dzudzɔgbe sia dzudzɔgbe dzi. 33Amesiawo nye hadzilawo, siwo nye Lewi-viwo ƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo, amesiwo mewɔa da bubua ɖeke le woƒe aƒewo me o, elabena do le wo si ŋkeke kple zã. 34Amesiawo nye Lewi-viwo ƒe aƒekɔwo ƒe tatɔwo le woƒe ƒomewo nu; woawo nye amesiwo nɔ Yerusalem.
Gibeon nɔlawo kple Saul ƒe aƒe.
35Amesiwo nɔ Gibeon, wonye: Gibeon fofo Yeuel; srɔ̃a ŋkɔ nye Maaxa; 36eƒe vi ŋgɔgbea nye Abdon, Zur, Kis, Baal, Ner, Nadab, 37Gedor, Axyo, Zaxarya kple Miklot. 38Miklot dzi Simeam, eye eya kple nɔviawo hã nɔ wo nɔviwò kasa le Yerusalem. 39Ner dzi Kis, eye Kis dzi Saul.
