Title: PSALMOWO 20
Content:
Dukɔ la do gbe ɖa ɖe eƒe fia ta le aʋaŋɔlia ɖe me.
1Dawid ƒe ha na henɔ la.
2Yehowa aɖo to wò le xaxagbe, Yakob ƒe Mawu la akpɔ tawò. 3Aɖo xɔname ɖe wò tso kɔkɔeƒe la, eye wòado alɔ na wò tso Zion. 4Aɖo ŋku wò nuɖuvɔsawo katã dzi, eye wò numevɔsa ada ami le eŋku me. Sela. 5Awɔ na wò le wò dzimedidi nu, eye wòawɔ wò tameɖoɖowo katã dzi na wò. 6Míatso aseye ɖe wò xɔname ŋu, eye míado aflaga ɖe dzi le mía Mawu ƒe ŋkɔ me. Yehowa nawɔ wò biabiawo katã dzi na wò.
7Azɔ menyae be, Yehowa xɔna na eƒe amesiamina la, eye wòtsɔa eƒe nuɖusi ƒe nutsuwɔwɔ, siwo xɔna na ame la, tɔna nɛ tso eƒe dziƒo kɔkɔe la. 8Ame meawo ɖoa ŋu ɖe tasiaɖam kple sɔwo ŋu, ke míawo míeyɔa Yehowa, mía Mawu la, ƒe ŋkɔ. 9Ame meawo bɔbɔna dea la agu, ke míawo míetsia tre dzena kã. 10Yehowa, xó na fia la; eye neɖo to mí le gbesigbe míeyɔe la!

Title: PSALMOWO 21
Content:
Akpedaha dzidzi le Mawu ƒe kpekpeɖe fia ŋu ŋuti.
1Dawid ƒe ha na henɔ la.
2Yehowa, fia la kpɔ dzidzɔ le wò ŋusẽ ŋu, eye aleke gbegbe mehele aseye tsom ɖe wò xɔname ŋui o! 3Ewɔ eƒe dzimedidiwo dzi nɛ, eye mète nusi eƒe dzi di lae o. Sela. 4Etsɔ yayra, siwo nye nu nyuiwo, va kpee, eye néɖɔ sikafiakuku ɖe la nɛ. 5Ebia agbe tso asiwò, eye néna agbe didii ɖaa tegbee. 6Wò xɔname na eƒe ŋkɔxɔxɔ ɖe dzi; bubu kple atsyɔ̃ nètsɔ ɖe eŋu. 7Elabena éɖoe wonye yayra tegbee, eye nètsɔ dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ na eƒe dzeme kɔ la ŋkuwò me. 8Elabena fia la ɖo ŋu ɖe Yehowa ŋu, eye ŋusẽkatãtɔ ƒe amenuveve ana be, ke maɖe le ete o.
9Wò asi axe wò futɔwo katã, eye wò nuɖusi atu wò ketɔwo. 10Ne èdo la, àwɔ wo abe kpodzo ene; Yehowa ami wo le eƒe dɔmedzoe me, eye dzo afiã wo. 11Àtsrɔ̃ wo viwo da le anyigba dzi kple woƒè dzidzimeviwo le amegbetɔviwo dome. 12Elabena wobe, yewoahe gbegblẽ ava dziwò; woɖo tame vɔ̃, gake womete ŋu wɔe o. 13Elabena ana woatrɔ ʋume; àtsɔ wò da adzidze woƒe ŋku mee. 14Yehowa, tso kple wò kamesesẽ, ekema míadzi ha, eye míakafu wò ŋusẽ!

Title: PSALMOWO 22
Content:
Ame dzɔdzɔe fukpela la.
1Dawid ƒe ha na henɔ la, ne woadzi ɖe „Agudzedzezinɔ“ ƒe gbe ŋu.
2Nye Mawu, nye Mawu, nukaŋuti nègblẽm ɖi? Nye hũɖeɖe ƒe nyawo metsɔ ɖe nye xɔname gbɔ o. 3Nye Mawu, meyɔ wò le ŋkeke me, ke mètɔ nam o, eye le zã me, ke nyemekpɔ gbɔdzɔe o. 4Ke wò la, ele kɔkɔe, eye nèbɔbɔ nɔ Israel ƒe kafukafuwo dome gli. 5Ŋuwò mía fofowo ɖo ŋu ɖo, ŋuwò woɖo ŋu ɖo, eye nèxɔ na wo. 6Wòe wodo ɣli na, eye woɖe wo; ŋuwò woɖo ŋu ɖo, eye ŋu mekpe wo o. 7Ke nye la ŋɔ menye, menye amegbetɔ o; amewo ƒe alɔmeɖenu menye, eye dukɔ la ɖo vlom. 8Amesiwo katã kpɔm la, ɖu fewu le ŋunye, woke woƒe nuyiwo, eye woʋuʋu ta gblɔ be: 9Nefae na Yehowa, axɔ nɛ, eye wòaɖee, elabena eƒe nu nyo eŋu. 10Elabena wòe hem tso dɔ me, eye nèna menɔ ɖanye ƒe no nu bɔkɔɔ. 11Wotsɔm gblẽ ɖe dziwò tso dɔ me ke, eye nye Mawu nenye tso danye ƒe dɔ me. 12Meganɔ adzɔge tso gbɔnye o, elabena xaxa tu aƒe; elabena xɔnametɔa ɖeke mele afi o.
13Nyitsu geɖewo de to ɖem, Basan ƒe nyitsuwo ƒo xlãm. 14Woke woƒe nu ɖe ŋunye abe dzata, si le xɔxlɔ̃m hele nu vuvum ene. 15Woƒom ɖe anyi abe tsi ene, nye ƒuwo katã dudu; nye dzi zu abe anyigba ene helólo ɖe dɔ me nam. 16Ami ƒu le ƒuto me nam abe sonugaglɛ ene, nye aɖe le ɖe nye veme, eye nètsɔm ɖo ku ƒe ʋuʋudedi me. 17Elabena avũwo ƒo xlãm, ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe ha ɖe to ɖem, eye woku nye asiwo kple afɔwo. 18Mate ŋu axlẽ nye ƒuwo katã. Ke woawo kpɔe, eye wofɔ ŋku ɖe dzinye. 19Womã nye avɔwo ɖe wo nɔewo dome, eye wodzidze nu ɖe nye awu dzi. 20Ke wò, Yehowa, meganɔ adzɔge o; nye ŋusẽ, afɔ netsɔ naxɔ nam! 21De nye luʋɔ tso yi nu, nye tenu ɖeka la tso avũwo si me. 22Xɔm tso dzata ƒe nu me, eye naɖem tso tò ƒe dzowo nu.
23Matsɔ wò ŋkɔ ade gbe ƒae na nɔvinyewo, eye makafu wò le amehawo dome be: 24Mi amesiwo vɔ̃a Yehowa la, mikafui! Mi Yakob-ƒomeawo katã, mibui! Mi Israel-ƒomeawo katã, misi eƒe ŋku me! 25Elabena medo vlo, eye menya ŋu hiãtɔ ƒe hiã o, meɣla ŋku me ɖee o, eye esi wodo ɣli nɛ la, eɖo to. 26Gbɔwòe nye kafukafuha tso le ameha gãwo dome. Maxe nye adzɔgbeɖefe le amesiwo vɔ̃nɛ la ŋku me. 27Hiãtɔwo aɖu nu aɖi ƒo; amesiwo biaa Yehowa ta sena la, nekafui! Agbe neɖo miaƒe dzi ŋu tegbee! 28Anyigba ƒe mlɔenuwo katã aɖo ŋku edzi atró ɖe Yehowa ŋu, eye dukɔwo ƒe ƒomeawo katã ade ta agu ɖe ŋkuwò me. 29Elabena Yehowa tɔ enye fiaɖuƒe la, eye wòle fia ɖum ɖe dukɔwo dzi. 30Amesiwo katã da ami le anyigba dzi la, ade ta agu ɖe eŋku me, eye amesiwo katã aɖo agu ɖe ke me la, adze klo nɛ. Ke nye luʋɔ ya le agbe nɛ. 31Dzidzimeviwo asubɔe, eye megbeviwo axlẽ nya afia le Yehowa ŋu. 32Woava atsɔ eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye aɖe gbe ƒãe na dukɔ, si dzi ge woala la, be nyae wɔe de goe.

Title: PSALMOWO 23
Content:
Alẽkplɔla nyui la.
1Dawid ƒe ha.
Yehowa enye kplɔlanye, naneke mehlãam o. 2Lãnyiƒe damawo wona metsyɔ akɔ ɖo; gbɔɖemeƒe tɔwo nu wòkplɔm yii. 3Ena nye luʋɔ gbɔ de eme, ekplɔm to toƒe dzɔdzɔewo le eƒe ŋkɔ la ta. 4Ne mezɔ bali doblukɔ tsiɖitsiɖi me hã, nyemavɔ̃ dzɔgbevɔ̃ea ɖeke o, elabena wòe le gbɔnye; wò atikplɔ kple wò atizɔti faa akɔ nam. 5Eɖo kplɔ̃ ɖe akɔnye me le nye ketɔwo ŋku me; èsi ami ɖe ta nam, nye kplu yɔ gba go. 6E, dzɔgbenyuie kple amenuveve adze yonyeme le nye agbe me ŋkekewo katã me, eye mana Yehowa ƒe me ɖaa.

Title: PSALMOWO 24
Content:
Yehowa ge ɖe kɔkɔeƒe la me.
1Dawid ƒe ha.
Yehowa tɔe nye anyigba kple nusiwo yɔ edzi, xexeame kple eme nɔlawo. 2Elabena eɖo egɔme anyi ɖe atsiaƒu dzi, eye wòlii anyi ɖe tɔsisiwo dzi zã.
3Ameka alia Yehowa ƒe to, eye ameka atsi tre ɖe eƒe teƒe kɔkɔe la? 4Amesi ƒe asi me dza, eye eƒe dzi me kɔ, amesi ƒe luʋɔ media aʋatso yome mɔ o, eye meda alakpa heka atam o ta, 5eya axɔ yayra tso Yehowa gbɔ kple dzɔdzɔenyenye tso eƒe xɔname ƒe Mawu la gbɔ. 6Esia nye amesiwo biaa eta sena la ƒe ƒome, amesiwo dia wò, Yakob ƒe Mawu la, ƒe ŋku me. Sela.
7Mi agbowo, mikɔ ta dzi, mi blemaʋɔtruwo, mitɔ dzi, ne bubufia la nage ɖe eme! 8Amekae henye bubufia la ma? Yehowa ŋusẽtɔ kple kalẽtɔ lae, Yehowa aʋakalẽtɔ lae! 9Mi agbowo, mikɔ ta dzi, mi blemaʋɔtruwo, mifɔ dzi, ne bubufia la nage ɖe eme! 10Ameka goe henye bubufia la? Yehowa Zebaot ye, eyae nye bubufia la! Sela.

Title: PSALMOWO 25
Content:
Kukuɖeɖe ɖe Mawu ƒe ame takpɔkpɔ, kpɔkplɔ kple nuvɔ̃ tsɔtsɔke ta.
1Dawid tɔ.
Yehowa, wòe mewu nye luʋɔ ɖe dzi na. 2Nye Mawu, wò ŋu mele ŋu dom ɖo; megana ŋu nakpem, ne nye futɔwo natso aseye ɖe ŋunye o! 3Amesiwo katã kpɔa mɔ na wò hã, ŋu makpe wo o; ke ŋu akpe amesiwo trɔ le yowòme yakatsyɔ. 4Yehowa, ɖe wò mɔwo fiam, eye nafia wò toƒewom! 5Na mazɔ le wò nyateƒe me, eye nafia num; elabena wòe nye nye xɔname Mawu, wòe mele mɔ kpɔm na ɣesiaɣi. 6Yehowa, ɖo ŋu wò nublanuikpɔkpɔ kple wò amenuveve, elabena woli tso tititi ke! 7Megaɖo ŋu nye ɖevimenuvɔ̃wo kple nye dzidadawo o, ke boŋ ɖo ŋku dzinye le wò amenuveve kple wò dɔmenyo ta, Yehowa!
8Yehowa ƒe dɔme nyo, eye wòwɔa nuteƒe, elabena afiaa mɔ nuvɔ̃wɔlawo. 9Enaa hiãtɔwo zɔa dzɔdzɔenyenye me, eye wòfiaa eƒe mɔ hiãtɔwo. 10Yehowa ƒe toƒewo katã nye amenuveve kple nyateƒe na amesiame léa eƒe nubabla kple seawo me de asi. 11Le wò ŋkɔ la ta, Yehowa, tsa nye vodada kam, elabena esa gbɔ!
12Ŋutsu kae vaa Yehowa? Eya wòafia mɔ, si wòatsɔ lae. 13Eƒe luʋɔ anɔ dzɔgbenyuie me, eye anyigba la anɔ viawo si me. 14Yehowa bɔa ha kple amesiwo vɔ̃nɛ la, eye wònana wonyaa eƒe nubabla. 15Nye ŋkuwo li de Yehowa dzi daa, elabena eya aɖe nye afɔ le ɖɔ me.
16Trɔ kɔ ɖe ŋunye, eye nave nunye, elabena metsi akogo, eye mele hiã ɖim. 17Nye dzimexãxàwo do gã de dzi, dem tso nye hiãwo me! 18Kpɔ nye nuxaxa kple nye hiã ɖa, eye natsɔ nye nuvɔ̃wo katã kem! 19Kpɔ nye futɔwo ɖa, elabena wode ha, eye wolé fum ŋutasẽtɔe. 20Dzra nye luʋɔ ɖo, eye naɖem, ŋu makpem o, elabena wòe mesi tso. 21Fɔmaɖimaɖi kple dzadzɛnyenye nakpɔ tanye, elabena mele mɔ kpɔm na wò. 22Mawu, ɖe Israel tso eƒe xaxawo katã me!

Title: PSALMOWO 26
Content:
Kukuɖeɖe ɖe fɔmaɖimaɖi ta.
1Dawid tɔ.
Tso afia nam, Yehowa, elabena fɔɖiɖi mele nye zɔzɔme ŋu o, eye meɖo ŋu ɖe Yehowa ŋu, nyemeʋã o! 2Yehowa, dom kpɔ, eye nadzro menye kpɔ, lólo nye ayikuwo kple nye dzi! 3Elabena wò amenuveve le ŋkunye me, eye mezɔ le wò nyateƒe me. 4Nyemebɔbɔ nɔ ame tovowo gbɔ o, eye nyemede afɔ gbedegblemimewo ƒe ha me o. 5Melé fu ame vlowo ƒe takpekpe, eye mía kple ame vɔ̃ɖiwo míebɔbɔ nɔa ɖu o. 6Meklɔ nye asi fɔmaɖitɔe, eye maƒo xlã wò vɔsamlekpui, Yehowa, 7ahana kafukafuha naɖi, eye maxlẽ wò nukunuwo katã afia. 8Yehowa, melɔ̃ wò aƒe nɔƒe kple teƒe, si wò bubu le.
9Megade nye luʋɔ ɖa kpe ɖe nuvɔ̃wɔlawo ŋu o, kple nye agbe ɖa kpeɖe hlɔ̃mewo ŋu o; 10amesiwo ŋukpenanuwo le asi ŋu na, eye zãnunana yɔ ɖusi na. 11Ke nyea mazɔ fɔmaɖitɔe; ɖem, eye nave nunye! 12Nye afɔ tsi tre ɖe teƒe gbadzaa. Makafu Yehowa le takpekpewo me.

Title: PSALMOWO 27
Content:
Le aʋaŋɔliwo me hã Dawid ɖo dzi ɖe Yehowa ŋu.
1Dawid tɔ.
Yehowa enye nye kekeli kple nye xɔname, ameka mavɔ̃? Yehowa enye mɔ̃ na nye agbe, ameka adzi ŋɔ nam? 2Ne ame vlowo, nye ketɔwo kple nye futɔwo lũ ɖe dzinye, be yewoaɖu nye lã la, woakli nu adze anyi. 3Ne aʋakɔ ƒu asaɖa ɖe ŋunye ha la, dzika matso ƒonye o. Ne aʋa ho ɖe ŋunye ale keke hã, nyea maɖe dzi ɖi.
4Nu ɖeka mebia Yehowa, esi le dzroyem, be manɔ Yehowa ƒe me le nye agbe me ŋkekewo katã me, eye makpa Yehowa ƒe vivisesewo katã kple ŋku, eye mayi tame le eƒe gbeɖoxɔ me. 5Elabena etsyɔ nu dzinye ɖe eƒe agbadɔ me le dzɔgbevɔ̃egbe, eye wòɣlam ɖe eƒe agbadɔ ƒe bebeƒe; ekɔm ɖo agakpe dzi. 6Azɔ nye ta kɔ dzi ɖe nye futɔ, siwo ƒo xlãm godoo la ŋuti mase aseyetsovɔ le eƒe agbadɔ me, madzi ha, eye maƒo saŋku na Yehowa. 7Yehowa, mele yɔwòm kple ɣli, see, ve nunye, eye natɔ nam! 8Nye dzi tsa wò nya gaɖo ŋkuwò me be: „Midi ŋkunye me!“ Yehowa, ŋkuwò me madi. 9Megaɣla wò ŋku me ɖem o! Megatutu wò dɔla ɖa le dɔmedzoe me o! Wòe nye nye xɔname, megatsɔm ƒu gbe o, eye megagblẽm ɖi o, nye xɔname ƒe Mawu! 10Elabena fofonye kple danye wogblẽm ɖi, ke Yehowa xɔm.
11Yehowa, fia wò mɔm, eye nakplɔm to toƒe sɔsɔe le nye futɔwo ta! 12Megatsɔm de asi na nye ketɔwo ƒe nyanyrã o, elabena aʋatsoɖasefowo kple amesiwo le ŋutasesẽ gbɔm fuxefuxe la, tso ɖe ŋunye. 13Ne nyemehexɔe se be, mãkpɔ Yehowa ƒe nu nyuiwo le agbagbeawo ƒe anyigba dzi o fi! 14Kpɔ mɔ na Yehowa, se ŋu, eye nalé dzi ɖe ƒo! E, kpo mɔ na Yehowa!

Title: PSALMOWO 28
Content:
Kukuɖeɖe le ɖeɖe tso Mawu mavɔ̃lawo si me ŋuti.
1Dawid tɔ.
Yehowa, wò yɔm mele. Nye aga, megado tokum o, be ne èdo tokum la, ne manɔ abe amesiwo yi aʋli me la ene o! 2Se nye kokoƒogbe, ne meɖo ɣli na wò, eye mewu nye asiwo dzi ɖo ɖe wò kɔkɔeƒewo ƒe kɔkɔeƒe la! 3Megakplɔm kpe ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖi kple nu vlo wɔlawo ŋu o, amesiwo ƒoa nu kple wo xɔlɔ̃viwo fafɛ, ke vɔ̃ɖivɔ̃ɖi le woƒe dzi me la o! 4Wɔ na wo le woƒe nuwɔnawo kple nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔwo nu; wɔ na wo le woƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo nu, eye nam woƒe fe na wo! 5Elabena womelé ŋku ɖe Yehowa ƒe nuwɔwɔwo kple eƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo ŋu o. Agbã wo, eye womagatu wo o.
6Woakafu Yehowa, elabena esa nye kokoƒogbe! 7Yehowa enye nye ŋusẽ kple nye akpoxɔnu, eya ŋu nye dzi le ŋu ɖom ɖo, eye wòxɔ nam; eyata nye dzi le aseye tsom, eye matsɔ nye ha akafui. 8Yehowa enye ŋusẽ na eƒe dukɔ; eya nye mɔ̃ kple xɔname na eƒe amesiamina. 9Xɔ na wò dukɔ, eye nayra wò domenyinu la, nyi wo, eye na tsa wo kpa ɖaseɖe mavɔ me!

Title: PSALMOWO 29
Content:
Dziɖegbe adreawo.
1Dawid ƒe ha.
Mi mawuviwo, mitsɔbubu kple ŋusẽ na Yehowa, Yehowa ye míatsɔe na! 2Mitsɔ Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ ŋu bubu nɛ; mide ta agu na Yehowa le atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo kɔkɔe me 3Yehowa ƒe gbe di ɖe tsiwo dzi; bubu ƒe Mawu la ɖe gbe, Yehowa ɖe gbe ɖe tsi gãwo dzi. 4Yehowa ƒe gbe ɖi kple ŋusẽ, Yehowa ƒe gbe ɖi le ŋutikɔkɔe me. 5Yehowa ƒe gbe ŋe seɖertiwo, ẽ, Yehowa ŋe Libanon ƒe sedertiwo. 6Ena woti kpo abe nyivi ene, Libanon kple Sirion abe tòvi ene. 7Yehowa ƒe gbe ke dzo mia. 8Yehowa ƒe gbe na gbedzi ʋuʋu, Yehowa na Kades-gbedzi ʋuʋu. 9Yehowa ƒe gbe na fu ɖu zinɔwo, eye wòkɔ avemetiwo ta; eye nusianu le gbɔgblɔm le eƒe gbeɖoxɔ me be: Bubu!
10Yehowa bɔbɔ nɔ anyi gli ɖe tɔɖɔɖɔ dzi; Yehowa bɔbɔ nɔ anyi gli abe fia ene tegbee. 11Yehowa atsɔ ŋusẽ na eƒe dukɔ; Yehowa atsɔ ŋutifafa ayra eƒe dukɔ!

Title: PSALMOWO 30
Content:
Dawid ɖa akpe na Mawu bena, eɖe yeƒe agbe.
1Dawid ƒe ha; xɔ ŋu kɔha.
2Mado wò ɖe dzi, Yehowa, elabena wòe hem ɖo goe, eye mèna be, nye futɔwo kpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe ŋunye o. 3Yehowa, nye Mawu, wòe medo ɣli na, eye neda gbe le ŋu nye. 4Yehowa, wòe he nye luʋɔ tso tsiẽƒe, eye nègbɔ agbem tso amesiwo yi aʋli me la dome.
5Midzi kafukafuha na Yehowa, mi eƒe ame kɔkɔewo, eye mikafu eƒe ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la! 6Elabena eƒe dziku nu mesena yina o, ke eƒe amenuveve nɔa anyi agbenɔɣi katã; fiẽ la avi dzɔna, ke ŋdi la aseyetsotso vaa aƒe. 7Nyea megblɔ le nye dziɖeɖi me bena: Ke maɖe le tenye akpɔ gbeɖe o!
8Yehowa, ètsɔ wò amenuveve li ke nye to zã. Esi nẽɣla wò ŋku me la, dzidzi ƒom.
9Yehowa, wò yɔm mele; Yehowa, wòe mele koko ƒom na be: 10Viɖe ka le nye ʋu ŋu, ne meyi aʋli me? Ɖe ʋuʋudedi akafu wò, eye wòaɖe gbe ƒã wò nuteƒewɔwɔa? 11Yehowa, see, eye nave nanye; Yehowa, nanye nye xɔnametɔ!
12Ena nye nuxaxa zu ɣeɖuɖu nam; èɖe akpanya le ŋunye hetsɔ dzidzɔ bla ali dzi nam, 13ne nye bubu nadzi kafukafuha na wò, eye mazi ɖoɖoe o. Yehowa, nye Mawu, makafu wò tegbee!

Title: PSALMOWO 31
Content:
Mɔkpɔkpɔ mena ŋu kpea ame o.
1Dawid ƒe ha na henɔ la.
2Yehowa, wòe mesi tso, megana ŋu nakpem akpɔ gbeɖe o! Tsɔ wò dzɔdzɔenyenye la ɖem! 3Ƒu to anyi ɖe ŋunye, ɖem asi tsɔtsɔe; zu agakpe, si nye sitsoƒe nam, kple mɔ̃ sesẽ, ne naxɔ nam! 4Elabena wòe nye nye agakpe kple nye mɔ̃ sesẽ, eye alé nye alɔnu akplɔm le wò ŋkɔ la ta, 5Àɖem le ɖɔ, si woɖo nam la me, elabena wòe nye nye sitsoƒe! 6Metsɔ nye gbɔgbɔ le asiwò me dem; Yehowa, eɖem, wò Mawu nuteƒetɔ. 7Melé fu amesiwo ku ɖe nu maɖinuwo ŋu la; ke nyea meɖo ŋu ɖe Yehowa ŋu. 8Matso aseye, eye dzi adzɔm le wò amenuveve ŋuti, le esi nèkpɔ nye hiã, eye nèlé ŋku ɖe nye luʋɔ ƒe xaxa ŋu ta; 9mètsɔm ɖe asi na futɔ la o, eye nèɖo nye afɔ teƒe keke.
10Ve nunye, Yehowa, elabena meɖo xaxa me, nuxaxa na nye ŋku, luʋɔ kple ŋutilã lé ayi. 11Elabena nye agbe nu yi le konyifafa me kple nye ƒewo le hũɖeɖe me; nye vodada na nye ŋusẽ nu tsi, eye nye ƒuwo nyunyɔ. 12Mezu alɔmeɖenu na nye ketɔwo katã kple nye aƒelikawo vevie ŋutɔ; mezu bibi na nye ame nyanyɛwo, eye amesiwo kpɔam le kpɔdomee la, sina le nunye. 13Woŋlɔm be le dzi me abe ame kuku ene, eye medi ze gbagbã. 14Elabena mese ame geɖewo ƒe dalidodo be: „Ŋɔdzi nede to ɖee!“ Wode adaŋu kple wo nɔewo de ŋunye be, yewoaɖe nye agbe ɖa. 15Ke nye la, ŋuwò meɖo ŋu ɖo, Yehowa; megblɔ be, nye Mawu nènye. 16Asiwò me nye agbe me nyawo le, ɖem tso nye futɔwo kple yonyemetilawo si me! 17Na wò ŋku me naklẽ ɖe wò dɔla dzi, eye natsɔ wò amenuveve axɔ nam! 18Yehowa, megana ŋu nakpem o, elabena mele yɔwòm; ŋu nekpe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo, eye woƒe nu netɔ kpe le tsiẽƒe! 19Woade ga nu na aʋatsoka-nuyiwo, amesiwo gblɔa nya vlo ɖe ame dzɔdzɔe la ŋu le ɖaɖa kple vloɖoɖo me.
20Wò dɔmenyo, si nètu ɖo na amesiwo vɔ̃a wo la, esi nèɖe fia amesiwo si wò tso le amegbetɔviwo ŋku me la, sɔ gbɔ loo! 21Eɣla wo ɖe wò ŋku me ƒe ɣaɣlɛƒe tso amewo ƒe aglãdzedzewo nu, eye nèɣla wo ɖe agbadɔ me tso aɖeʋawɔwɔ nu. 22Woakafu Yehowa, elabena eɖe eƒe amenuveve fiam nukutɔe le ɖu sesẽ me. 23Esi dzi ɖe le ƒonye la, nyea megblɔ be: Woɖem ɖa le wò ŋku ta: ke èse nye kokoƒogbe, esi medo ɣli na wò. 24Milɔ̃ Yehowa, mi eƒe ame kɔkɔewo katã; Yehowa kpɔa anukwaretɔwo ta, ke eɖoa teƒe na dadalawo wòsɔa gbɔ. 25Misẽ ŋu, eye milé dzi ɖe ƒo, mi amesiwo katã kpɔa mɔ na Yehowa la!

Title: PSALMOWO 32
Content:
Nuvɔ̃wo tsɔtsɔke.
1Dawid ƒe nufiameha.
Woayra amesi wotsɔ eƒe dzidadawo kee, amesi ƒe nuvɔ̃wo dzi wotsyó nui. 2Woayra amesi Yehowa mehe vodada na o, eye eƒe gbɔgbɔ me la alakpaa ɖeke meli o.
3Elabena esi mezi ɖoɖoe la, nye ŋeŋe atraɖi na nye ƒuwo nyonyo. 4Elabena wò asi sẽ ɖe dzinye keli kple zã, ŋdɔ heliheli na nye ƒuto me mi no. Sela. 5Mede nye nuvɔ̃wo fia wò, eye nyemetso nu tsyɔ nye vodadawo dzi o; megblɔ be, maʋu nye dzidadawo me na Yehowa; tete nètsɔ nye nuvɔ̃ ƒe vodadawo kem. Sela.
6Eyata mawumemewo ado gbe ɖa na wò le kpɔwòɣi, ẽ, ne tɔ gawo ɖɔ hã la, womade wo gbɔ o. 7Bebeƒe nenye nam; èkpɔ tanye le xaxa me, eye nètsɔ ɖeɖe ƒe aseyetsotso ƒo xlãm. Sela. 8Mafia nu wò, eye mafia mɔ, si nam la wò; made aɖaŋu na wò, eye nye ŋku anɔ ŋuwò. 9Miganɔ abe sɔ kple tedzisɔ, siwo nunya mele tagbɔ na o la ene o; woƒe atsyɔ̃ɖonu enye ka kple numega, si wotsɔna mlã woe, hafi woate ɖe ŋuwò. 10Ame vɔ̃ɖi kpɔa vevesese geɖe; ke amesi ɖoa ŋu ɖe Yehowa ŋu la, atsɔ amenuveve aƒo xlãe. 11Míkpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe Yehowa ŋu, eye mitso aseye, mi ame dzɔdzɔewo! Migli kple dzidzɔ, mi amesiwo katã ƒe dzi to mɔ ɖeka!

Title: PSALMOWO 33
Content:
Mawu ƒe dɔmenyo kafukafu.
1Migli kple dzidzɔ, mi ame dzɔdzɔewo, de Yehowa ŋu; kafukafuha dze nuteƒewɔlawo! 2Mikafu Yehowa kple kasaŋkuwo, eye miƒo saŋku ka ewo tɔ nɛ! 3Midzi ne yeye na; mitɔ asi kaawo nu kple ŋusẽ! 4Elabena Yehowa ƒe nya toa mɔ ɖeka, eye eƒe nuwɔwɔwo katã le eteƒe. 5Elɔ̃a dzɔdzɔenyenye kple ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃; Yehowa ƒe amenuveve yɔ anyigba dzi taŋ. 6Yehowa ƒe nye wotsɔ wɔ dziƒowoe, eye eƒe nu me gbɔgbɔ wotsɔ wɔ wo ŋu nuwo katàe. 7Eƒoa atsiaƒutsiwo nu ƒu abe ɖe goe me ene, eye wòdzraa tɔɖɔɖɔ ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe. 8Anyigba blibo le nevɔ̃ Yehowa; xexemetɔwo katã nesi eƒe ŋku me! 9Elabena eƒo nu, eye wòva me; ede se, eye wòɖo di. 10Yehowa tɔtɔ dukɔwo ƒe adaŋudede me, eye wògblẽ anyigba dzi dukɔwo ƒe tameɖoɖo me. 11Yehowa ƒe adaŋudede li tegbee, eye eƒe dzimesusuwo tso dzidzime yi dzidzime.
12Woɔyra dukɔ, si ƒe Mawu Yehowa nye; dukɔ, si wòtia wɔ domenyinu na eɖokui. 13Yehowa kpɔa nu tso dziƒo ke, ekpɔa amegbetɔviwo katã. 14Ele enɔƒe ɖe ŋku ɖe anyigba dzi tɔwo katã, 15eya, amesi wɔ woƒe dziwo katã tim, eye wòlé ŋku ɖe woƒe dɔwɔwɔwo katã ŋu. 16Fia ƒe dziɖuɖu mele aʋakɔ kpaŋkpaŋ me o, eye ŋusẽ geɖe meɖea kalẽtɔ o. 17Ne eɖó dziɖuɖu teƒe la, sɔ mele ɖeke me o, eye eƒe ŋusẽ la hã meɖea ame o. 18Ke boŋ Yehowa ƒe ŋku le amesiwo vɔ̃nɛ ŋu, amesiwo le eƒe amenuveve sinu kpɔm, 19be wòaɖe woƒe luʋɔ tso ku me, eye wòalé woƒe agbe ɖe te le dɔŋɔli. 20Míaƒe luʋɔ le mɔ kpɔm na Yehowa, míaƒe xɔname kple akpoxɔnu wònye. 21Elabena míaƒe dzi le dzidzɔ kpɔm le eŋu, eye míele ŋu ɖom ɖe eƒe ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la ŋu. 22Yehowa, wò amenuveve nenɔ mía dzi, abe alesi míele mɔ kpɔm na wòe ene!

Title: PSALMOWO 34
Content:
Dawid de dzi ƒo na eɖokui le Mawu kafukafu kple Mawu vɔvɔ̃ ŋuti.
1Dawid tɔ, esime wòdo aɖaoatɔ eɖokui le Abimelex ŋku me, eye wònyãe wòdzo.
2Makafu Yehowa ɣeawokatãɣi, eye eƒe kafukafu ano nunya me ɖaa. 3Nye luʋɔ atsɔ Yehowa aƒo aɖegbee, hiãtɔwo asee, eye woakpɔ dzidzɔ. 4Mido kɔkɔ Yehowa ɖem ti, eye mina miaƒo kpli ado eƒe ŋkɔ ɖe dzi! 5Medi Yehowa, etɔ nam, eye wòdem tso nye ŋɔdziwo katã me. 6Amesiwo tsɔ ŋku ɖo eŋu la, dzidzɔ ɖo mo na wo, eye woƒe mo metsi ɖã o. 7Esi hiãtɔ sia yɔe la, Yehowa ɖo toe, eye wòɖee tso eƒe hiãwo katã me. 8Yehowa ƒe ɖɔla ƒua asaɖa anyi ɖe amesiwo vɔ̃nɛ la ŋu, eye wòhea wo doa goe. 9Miɖɔe kpɔ, eye miakpɔ be, Yehowa ƒe dɔme nyo; woayra ŋutsu, si sii tso. 10Mivɔ̃ Yehowa, mi eƒe ame kɔkɔewo, elabena amesiwo vɔ̃nɛ la, hiã metua wo o. 11Hiã tua dzataviwo, eye dɔ wua wo, ke amesiwo dia Yehowa la, kesinɔnua ɖeke mehiãa wo o.
12Viwo, miva, milé to ɖe ŋunye, ne mafia Yehowa-vɔvɔ̃ mi! 13Amekae le agbe dim, amesi lɔ̃a ŋkeke geɖe, be yeakpɔ dzɔ gbenyuie? 14Kpɔ wò aɖe dzi ɖe vɔ̃ ŋu kple wò nuyiwo dzi, ne womagagblɔ alakpanya o! 15Te ɖa le vɔ̃ ŋu, eye nawɔ nu nyui: di ŋutifafa, eye nati eyome. 16Yehowa ƒe ŋkuwo le ame dzɔdzɔewo ŋu, eye eƒe towo le woƒe ɣlidodo ŋu. 17Yehowa klẽ ŋku ɖe amesiwo le vɔ̃ wɔm la, ne yeatsrɔ̃ woƒe ŋkɔ ɖa le anyigba dzi. 18Wodo ɣli, Yehowa see, eye wòɖe wo tso woƒe xaxawo katã me. 19Yehowa tsɔ ɖe amesiwo ƒe dzi gbã gudugudu le gbɔ, eye wòxɔna na amesiwo ƒe gbɔgbɔ woƒo ƒu anyi. 20Ame dzɔdzɔe ƒe fukpekpewo sɔ gbɔ, ke Yehowa ɖenɛ tsoa wo katã me. 21Ekpɔa eƒe ƒuwo katã ta, womaŋe wo dometɔa ɖeke o. 22Dzɔgbevɔ̃e wua eme vɔ̃ɖi le eye amesiwo lé fu ame dzɔdzɔe la la, woakpɔ woƒe dzidada tɔ nua. 23Yehowa neɖe eƒe dɔlawo ƒe luʋɔ, eye amesiwo katã sii tso la, womakpɔ woƒe dzidada tɔ nua o.

Title: PSALMOWO 35
Content:
Gbedodoɖa le ɖeɖe tso futɔ vɔ̃ɖiawo si me ŋuti.
1Dawid tɔ.
Yehowa, wɔ avu kple amesiwo le avu wɔm kplim, wɔ aʋa kple amesiwo le aʋa wɔm kplim! 2Tsɔ wò akpoxɔnu ɖagbitɔ kple lolotɔ, eye tso, naxɔ nam! 3Di wò akplɔ̃, naxe mɔ na yonyemetilawo; gblɔ na nye luʋɔ be: Xɔname menye na wò! 4Ŋukpe kple vlododo ava amesiwo le nye luʋɔ dim la dzi, eye amesiwo le nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e bum ɖe tame la, agbugbɔ ɖe megbe, eye woƒe mo atsi dã. 5Woana abe tsro le ya nu ene, eye Yehowa ƒe dɔla atutu wo ɖa. 6Woƒe mɔ dzi nedo viviti, edzi neɖiɖi, eye Yehowa ƒe dɔla neti wo yome! 7Elabena yakatsyɔ woɖo dɔ de ŋunye, eye yakatsyɔ woɖe ʋe na nya luʋɔ. 8Gbegblẽ nedo ɖe edzi kpoyi; eƒe ɖɔ, si wòɖo la, neɖe eye ŋutɔ, eye nege dze gbegblẽ la me! 9Ke nye luʋɔ atso aseye ɖe Yehowa ŋu, eye wòakpɔ dzidzɔ le eƒe xɔname ŋu. 10Nye ƒuwo katã agblɔ bena: Yehowa, amekae ɖe nuwò? Wò amesi ɖe hiãtɔ tso amesi tri akɔ wui la si me, kpakple hiãtɔ kple ame dahe tso amesi ɖa adzoe la si me.
11Ɖasefo ŋutasẽlawo tsi tre, eye wole nusi nyemenya o la biamem. 12Wotsɔ vɔ̃ ɖo nyui teƒe nam, eye wodo tsyɔ̃evim. 13Ke ne wole dɔ lém la, nyea metaa akpanya, metsɔa nutsitsidɔ wɔa funyafunya nye luʋɔ, eye nye gbedodoɖa ɖoa ta nye akɔme, 14abe xɔ̃nye kple nɔvinyeŋutsu wonye ene; meƒo ɖi ɖo dɔgɔ̃e le yiyim, abe amesi le fu nyim na dada ene. 15Ke esi memu dze enyi la, wokpɔ dzidzɔ, eye woƒo takpli, ame ɖigbɔ, siwo nyemenya o la, kpe ta ɖe ŋunye, eye wole alɔme ɖem numaɖemee. 16Apayɔlawo le alɔme ɖem, eye wole aɖukli ɖum ɖe ŋunye. 17Aƒetɔ, ɣekaɣi nanɔ ekpɔm kple ŋku ava se ɖo? Ɖe nye luʋɔ tso woƒe gbegblẽ me, kple nye tenu la tso dzatavi si me! 18Ekema manyɔ wò ŋkɔ le ameha gãwo me, eye makafu wò le eme geɖewo dome.
19Megana nye ketɔ aʋatsotɔwo nakpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe ŋunye o, eye amesiwo lé fum yakatsyɔ la, nate ŋku ɖem o! 20Elabena womegblɔa ŋutifafanya o, eye woɖo alakpadanya ɖe anyigba dzi ame fafawo ŋu. 21Woke woƒe nu baa ɖe ŋunye le gbɔgblɔm be: Ehɛ̃, ehɛ̃, míaƒe ŋkuwo kpɔe! 22Yehowa, èkpɔe, megazi kpi o; Aƒetɔ, meganɔ adzɔge tso gbɔnye o! 23Mawunye kple Aƒetɔnye, nyɔ, eye nana ŋute ɖe nye ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ kple nye nya ŋu! 24Yehowa, nye Mawu, ɖrɔ̃ ʋɔnum ɖe wò dzɔdzɔenyenye la nu, ne womagakpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe ŋunye o! 25Megana woegblɔ le woƒe dzi me be: Ehɛ̃, alea dim míele o! Megana woagblɔ be: Míemii o! 26Ŋu nekpe amesiwo le dzidzɔ kpɔm le nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e ŋu la, eye woƒe mo netsi dã: vlododo kple ŋukpe nenyẽ tsyɔ amesiwo le asi ƒum akɔ ɖe ŋunye la! 27Amesiwo ŋu nye dzɔdzɔenyenye dze la, atso aseye, eye woakpɔ dzidzɔ ahanɔ gbɔgblɔm ɖaa be: Yehowa, amesi ŋu eƒe dɔla ƒe ŋutifafa dze la, lolo! 28Nye aɖe aƒo nu le wò dzɔdzɔenyenye ŋu, eye wòakafu wò gbesiagbe.

Title: PSALMOWO 36
Content:
Konyifafa le mawumavɔ̃lawo ŋuti. Mawu ƒe dɔmenyo wɔwɔ nɔ mawuvɔ̃lawo.
1Yehowa ƒe dɔla Dawid tɔ na henɔ la.
2Ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe dzidada ƒe gbe le nye dzi me be: Mawu ƒe vɔ vɔ̃a ɖeke metso ga ɖe ŋku me na o. 3Elabena evivi nume nɛ le eŋku me, ne wòakpɔ mɔnu le eƒe dzidada ŋu, eye wòalé fui. 4Eƒe nu me nya enye vovlo kple alakpa: edzudzɔ nuwɔwɔ ɖe nunya me kple nu nyui wɔwɔ. 5Enɔa nu vlo ŋu bum le eƒe aba dzi, etsɔa eɖokui ɖoa mɔ, si menyo o la dzi, eye metsria nu vɔ̃ɖi o.
6Yehowa, wò amenuveve ɖatɔ dziƒo ke, eye wò nuteƒewɔwɔ ɖaseɖe alilikpowo ŋu. 7Wò dzɔdzɔenyenye le abe Mawu ƒe towo ene, wò ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ enye tɔ goglo; èxɔna na amegbelɔwo kple lãwo, wò Yehowa. 8Mawu, wò amenuveve xɔ asi loo! Amegbetɔviwo be ɖe wò aʋala ƒe vɔvɔli te. 9Woɖi ƒo kple aƒewò me nu gbogboawo, eye nèkpe wò vivisese ƒe tɔsisi na wo wono ɖi kɔ. 10Elabena gbɔwò agbedzɔƒe le, eye wò kekeli me míele kekeli kpɔm le.
11Gblẽ wò amenuveve ɖe amesiwo nya wò la dzi kple wò dzɔdzɔenyenye ɖe amesiwo ƒe dzi to mɔ ɖeka la dzi! 12Dadalawo megate afɔ ɖe dzinye o, eye ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe asi meganyãm de gbe o! 13Kpɔ ɖa, nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔlawo dze anyi ɖe afima, wotutu wo ƒu anyi, eye womagate ŋu afɔ o.

Title: PSALMOWO 37
Content:
Mawumavɔ̃lawo ƒe dzɔgbenyuie nagaɖia nu na wò o.
1Dawid tɔ.
Ɖzi megaku wò le nu vlo wɔlawo ŋu o, eye megaʋã ŋu ɖe amesiwo wɔ nu tovo la ŋu o! 2Elabena woasi wo xoxoxo abe gbe ene, eye woayrɔ abe aŋgba ene. 3Ɖo ŋu ɖe Yehowa ŋu, eye nawɔ nyuie! Nɔ anyigba dzi, eye naɖi anukware! 4Yehowa ƒe nu nenyo ŋuwò, eye wòana nusi wò dzi di la wò. 5Tsɔ wò mɔwo gblẽ ɖe Yehowa dzi, eye naɖo ŋu ɖe eŋu, ekema awɔe ade goe. 6Ahe wò dzɔdzɔenyenye ɖe go abe kekeli ene, kple wò nya dzɔdzɔe ɖe go abe ŋɖɔkutsu ene. 7Zi kpi na Yehowa kpoo, eye nakpɔ esinu! Dzi megaku wò ɖe amesi ƒe mɔwo dzea dzi nɛ, kple ŋutsu, si nye ayetɔ la ŋu o! 8Wò dɔmedzoe nu nefa, eye nadzudzɔ dzikudodo; dzi megaku wò o, elabena nu vɔ̃ɖi ko nayi wɔwɔ ge! 9Elabena woatsrɔ̃ ame vlowo, ke amesiwo kpɔa mɔ na Yehowa la, woanyi anyigba la dome. 10Ekpɔtɔ vie ko ame vɔ̃ɖi la maganɔ anyi o, eye ne èɖe ŋku ɖe eleƒe la, màgakpɔe o. 11Ke eme ɖihiãwo enyi anyigba la dome, eye dzi adzɔ wo ɖe ŋutifafa gbogbo la ŋuti. 12Ame vɔ̃ɖi ɖoa vɔ̃ ɖe ame dzɔdzɔe la ŋu, eye wòɖua aɖukli ɖe eŋu. 13Aƒetɔ la le ekom, elabena ekpɔ be, eƒe ŋkeke li gbɔna. 14Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo di yi, eye wova woƒe da me, ne woaxlã hiãtɔwo kple ame dahewo ɖe anyi, eye woawu amesiwo ƒe zɔzɔme to mɔ ɖeka la. 15Ke woƒe yi aƒo ɖe woawo ŋutɔ ƒe dzi, eye woƒe da aŋe. 16Nu ʋee, si le ame dzɔdzɔewo si la, nyo wu ame vɔ̃ɖi geɖewo ƒe nu gbogboawo. 17Elabena ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe alɔ aŋe, ke Yehowa léa ame dzɔdzɔewo ɖe le. 18Elabena Yehowa nya ame maɖifɔwo ƒe ŋkeke, eye woƒe domenyinu anɔ anyi tegbee. 19Ŋu makpa wo le ŋkeke vɔ̃wo dzi o, eye woaɖi ƒo le dɔŋɔli. 20Elabena ame vɔ̃ɖiwo atsrɔ̃, eye Yehowa ƒe ketɔwo nu ayi abe lãnyiƒe ƒe atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo ene; wo nu ayi abe dzudzɔ ene. 21Ame vɔ̃ɖi la doa nugbana, eye mexenɛ o; ke ame dzɔdzɔe la vea ame nu, eye wonae nu ame. 22Elabena amesiwo wòyra la, woanyi anyigba la dome, ke woatsrɔ̃ amesiwo wòƒo fi de la.
23Yehowa lia ke ŋutsu ƒe afɔɖeɖe, nenye be, eƒe mɔwo dze eŋu. 24Ne edze anyi la, made baba ɖe anyi o, elabena Yehowa léa eƒe asi ɖe te. 25Meno ɖevime tsã, eye azɔ metsi, ke nyemekpɔ be, wogblẽ eme dzɔdzɔe ɖi, eye viawo ɖo abologbe kpɔ o. 26Evea ame nu ɣesiaɣi, eye wòdoa nugbana, eye viawo zua yayra. 27Tsri vɔ̃, eye nawɔ nyui, ekema ànɔ anyi tegbee. 28Elabena Yehowa laa nya dzɔdzɔe, eye megblẽa eƒe mawumemewo ɖi o; akpɔ wo ta tegbee, ke woatsrɔ̃ ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe viwo. 29Ame dzɔdzɔewo anyi anyigba la dome, eye woanɔ edzi tegbee. 30Nunya le ame dzɔdzɔe la nu, eye eƒe aɖe gblɔa nya dzɔdzɔe. 31Eƒe Mawu ƒe se la le eƒe dzi me, eye eƒe afɔɖeɖe meʋãna o. 32Ame vɔ̃ɖi la ɖe xa di na ame dzɔdzɔe la, eye wòdi be, yeawui. 33Ke Yehowa megblẽe ɖe esi me o, eye ne wodrɔ̃ ʋɔnui la, mebua fɔe o.
34Kpɔ mɔ na Yehowa, eye nalé ŋku ɖe eƒe mɔwo ŋu, ekema ado wò ɖe dzi, ne nanyi anyigba la dome, eye ne woatsrɔ̃ ame vɔ̃ɖiwo la, àkpɔ eteƒe. 35Mekpɔ ame vɔ̃ɖia ɖe le ɖadzra ɖam, eye wòvu eɖokui ɖranyi abe ati dodo, si vu ke la ene. 36Mete eŋu yi, eye kpɔ ɖa, megali o; medii, eye nyemekpɔe o. 37Lé ŋku ɖe eme maɖifɔ la ŋu, eye nakpɔ ame dzɔdzɔe la ɖa, elabena dzidzimeviwo le ŋutifafame la si. 38Woatsrɔ̃ dzidalawo katã, eye woatsrɔ̃ ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe dzidzimeviwo. 39Ke dzɔdzɔewo ƒe xɔname tso Yehowa gbɔ, eya nye sitsoƒe na wo le hiãɣi me. 40Yehowa dea wo dzi, eye wòɖea wo, eɖea wo tso ame vɔ̃ɖiwo si me, eye wòxɔna na wo, elabena wosinɛ tsona.

Title: PSALMOWO 38
Content:
Dawid la konyi le fukpekpe gãa ɖe te, eye wobia Mawu ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu.
1Dawid ƒe ha na ŋkuɖodzi.
2Yehowa, megaka mo nam le wò dɔmedzoe me o, eye megahe to nam le wò dziku me o! 3Elabena wò aŋutrɔwo ɖo agu ɖe menye, eye wò asi te ɖe dzinye. 4Agbagbeƒea ɖeke mele nye lãme o le wò dɔmedzoe la ta; ŋutilafaa ɖeke mele nye ƒuwo me o le nye nuvɔ̃ ta. 5Elabena nye vodadawo gbɔ tanye, eye wole kpeyem ŋutɔ abe agba kpekpe ene. 6Nye abiwo le ʋeʋẽm le tsi kplɔm yoo le nye bometsitsi ta. 7Mexa gobaa, eye mebi ŋutɔ, meƒo ɖi le yiyim ŋkekeawo katã. 8Elabena nye alime ʋu dzo hẽ, eye agbagbeƒea ɖeke mele nye lãme o. 9Megbɔdzɔ, eye nye lãme gbã gudugudu, mele ɣli dom wu alesi dzata ɖea gbee.
10Aƒetɔ, ŋkuwò me nye didiwo katã le, eye nye hũɖeɖewo meɣla ɖe wò o. 11Nye dzi le totrom, nye ŋusẽ gblẽm ɖi, eye nye ŋkuwo ƒe kekeli hã megale gbɔnye o. 12Nye ame lɔlɔ̃wo kple xɔ̃nyewo ƒo asa nam le nye fuwɔame la ta, eye nye ƒometɔwo tsi tre ɖe adzɔge. 13Amesiwo le nye agbe yome dim la, tre mɔ̃ nam, amesiwo le nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e dim la, le nu ƒom le gbegblẽ ŋu, eye wole alakpadada ŋu bum ŋkekeawo katã. 14Mele abe tokunɔ ene, nyemesea nu o, eye mele abe aɖetututɔ, si mekea eƒe nu o la ene. 15Mele abe ŋutsu, si mesea nu o, eye nyakpenyaa ɖeke mele eƒe nu me o la ene. 16Elabena wò Yehowa, sinu kpɔm mele, àtɔ nam, Aƒetɔ, nye Mawu!
17Elabena mele gbɔgblɔm be, womegakpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe ŋunye o; eye esi ke ɖe le nye afɔ te la, wole adegbe ƒom ɖe ŋunye. 18Nye anyidzedze gbɔ megɔdidi o, eye nye vevesesewo le ŋkunye me ɖaa. 19Elabena meɖe nye vodadawo fia, eye metsi dzi le nye nuvɔ̃wo ta. 20Ke nye futɔwo le agbe, eye ŋusẽ le wo ŋu; amesiwo lé fum yakatsyɔ la, sɔ gbɔ. 21Amesiwo tsɔ vɔ̃ ɖo nyuie teƒe nam la, lém ɖe ke me, le esi meti nyuie yome ta. 22Yehowa, megagblẽm ɖi o, nye Mawu, meganɔ adzɔge tso gbɔnye o! 23Aƒetɔ, nye xɔname, netsɔ nakpe ɖe ŋunye!

Title: PSALMOWO 39
Content:
Dawid bia Mawu ƒe akɔfafa.
1Dawid ƒe ha na henɔ Yedutun.
2Mebe: Malé ŋku ɖe nye zɔzɔme ŋu, ne nyemagawɔ nuvɔ̃ kple nye aɖe o; made ga nye nu, ŋkeke alesi ame vɔ̃ɖi la gale ŋkunye me ko. 3Doɖoe zi le ŋunye klenee, eye mezi ɖoɖoe le dzɔgbenyuiewo ŋu, ke nye vevesesewo do gã ɖe dzi. 4Nye dzi xɔ dzo ɖe dɔme nam; ne mele tame susum la, dzo la flana. Metsɔ nye aɖe le nu ƒom be: 5Yehowa, na manya nye nuwuwu kple alesi nye ŋkekewo ƒe dzidzeme le; na madze si ɣesiɣi nunye ava yi! 6Kpɔ ɖa, èwɔ nye ŋkekewo wonye asi ƒe kekeme, eye nye agbenɔɣi menye naneke le ŋkuwò me o. Nyateƒe, ne amegbetɔ li ke ʋuu hã la, ƒuƒu ko wònye. Sela. 7Vavã, amegbetɔ le yiyim abe vɔvɔli ene, eye ƒuƒu ŋu ko wòle zi dom ɖo; eli kɔ nu gleglegle, ke menya ameka si me wole yiyi ge ɖe o.
8Azɔ, Aƒetɔ, nuka sinu makpɔ? Wò ɖeɖe koe mele mɔ kpɔm na. 9Ɖem tso nye dzidadawo katã me; megatsɔm wɔ alɔmeɖenu na bometsilawo o! 10Ɖoɖoe zi le ŋunye, nyemeke nye nu o, elabena wòe wɔe. 11Ɖe wò hiãkame ɖa le ŋunye, wò asi ƒe avuwɔwɔ kplim na metsrɔ̃. 12Ne ètsɔ tohehe ka mo na amegbetɔa ɖe le eƒe vodada ta la, ekema eƒe nyonyo dome agblẽ, abe agbagblaʋui ye ɖui ene. Vavãe, ƒuƒu ko amegbetɔwo katã nye! Sela. 13Yehowa, se nye gbedodoɖa, nye ɣlidodo nede to me na wò, eye megazi kpi kpɔ nye aɖatsiwo o, elabena amedzro menye le gbɔwò, eye amegbɔme menye abe fofonyewo katã ene. 14Ɖe kɔ ɖa le ŋunye, ne magbɔ ɖe me, hafi mayi, eye nyemaganɔ anyi o!

Title: PSALMOWO 40
Content:
Akpedanumeme nyuitɔ na Mawu. Kukuɖeɖe de kpekpeɖeŋu ta.
1Dawid ƒe ha na henɔ la.
2Mele mɔ kpɔm na Yehowa kakaka, eziɔ to ɖe ŋunye, eye wòsa nye ɣlidodo. 3Ehem tso gbegblẽ ƒe do la me, eye wòɖem le ba finyafinya me, etsɔ nye afɔ ɖo agakpe dzi, eye wòli ke nye afɔɖeɖewo, 4ede ha yeye nunye kple kafukafuha na mía Mawu la. Ame geɖewo akpɔe, eye vɔvɔ̃ aɖo wo, eye woaɖo dzi ɖe Yehowa ŋu. 5Woayra ŋutsu, si tsɔ eƒe ŋuɖoɖo ɖo Yehowa dzi, eye metrɔ eɖokui ɖe ɖadzraɖalawo kple amesiwo ku ɖe aʋatsokaka ŋu la, ŋuti o. 6Yehowa, nye Mawu, wò nukunu kple wò tamesusu, siwo nèɖe fia ɖe mía ŋu la, sɔ gbɔ. Naneke mede nuwò o! Mebe, matsɔ wo aɖe gbe ƒãe, eye maƒo nu le wo ŋu, ke womele xexlẽ me o.
7Akpedavɔsa kple numevɔsa medzea ŋuwò o; eʋu to nam; mèdia numevɔsa kple nuvɔ̃vɔsa o. 8Tete megblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa, megbɔna, agbalẽ me woŋlɔ nya ɖo le ŋunye. 9Nye Mawu, wò lɔlɔ̃nu wɔwɔ enye nye dzidzɔ, eye wò se la le nye dzi me. 10Meɖe gbe ƒã wò dzɔdzɔenyenye le ameha gãwo me; kpɔ ɖa, nyememia nu o, Yehowa, ènyae. 11Nyemeɣla wò dzɔdzɔenyenye ɖe nye dzi me o; mekɔ nu le wò nuteƒewɔwɔ kple wò xɔname dzi, eye nyemeɣla wò amenuveve kple wò nyateƒe de ameha gãwo o.
12Ke wò, Yehowa, mate wo nublanuikpɔkpɔ da le gbɔnye o; wò amenuveve kple wò nyateƒe akpɔ tanye ɖaa. 13Elabena fukpekpewo ɖe to ɖem taŋtaŋ, nye vodadawo lém, womele kpɔkpɔ me nam o; wosa gbɔ wu nye taɖa; eye nye dzi gblẽm ɖi. 14Yehowa, nedze ŋuwò naɖem; Yehowa, netsɔ naxɔ nam! 15Ŋu nekpe amesiwo le nye agbe dim, be yewoaɖe ɖa la, eye wo katã ƒe mo netsi dã, amesiwo le nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e dim la, nete gbugbɔ ɖe megbe, eye ŋukpe nelé wo! 16Dzidzi neƒo amesiwo le gbɔgblɔm ɖe ŋunye be: Ehɛ̃, ehɛ̃! la, le woƒe ŋukpe la ta! 17Amesiwo katã dia wò la, ƒe dzeme nekɔ, eye woakpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe ŋuwò! Amesiwo dia wò xɔname la, nenɔ gbɔgblɔm ɖaa be: Yehowa lolo! 18Ke nyea, nenye be, hiã tum, eye meɖo ko hã, Aƒetɔ la alé be nam. Nye kpeɖeŋutɔ kple xɔnamele nẽnye; nye Mawu, megahe ɖe megbe o!

Title: PSALMOWO 41
Content:
Konyifafa le futɔ vɔ̃ɖi kple xɔlɔ̃ anukwaremaɖila ŋuti.
1Dawid ƒe ha na henɔ la.
2Woayra amesi léa fɔ ɖe hiãtɔ ŋu! Yehowa aɖee le dzɔgbevɔ̃eɣi. 3Yehowa akpɔ eta, eye wòaxɔe ɖe agbe, ne woanyo nɛ le anyigba dzi; matsɔe ade asi na eƒe futɔwo ƒe adãwɔwɔ o! 4Yehowa akpe ɖe eŋu le dɔba dzi; ne ele dɔ lém la, atrɔ eƒe aha dzi nɔnɔ bubui.
5Nyea mele gbɔgblɔm be: Yehowa, ve nunye, da gbe le nye luʋɔ ŋu, elabena mewɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe ŋuwò! 6Nye futɔwo le nu vɔ̃ ƒom ɖe ŋunye be: Ɣekaɣi ga wòaku, eye eƒe ŋkɔ nabu? 7Eye ne amea ɖe va kpɔ ye ge ɖa la, edaa alakpa; eƒe dzi ƒoa nu vɔ̃ɖi nu ƒu, eye wòdona ɖagblɔnɛ. 8Nye futɔwo katã le nu dem tenye, eye wole nusi nye nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e la susum ɖe ŋunye be: 9Wolɔ gbegblẽ trɔ ɖe edzi, emlɔ anyi, eye magafɔ akpɔ o! 10Xɔ̃nye kekeake, amesi ŋu meɖoa ŋu ɖo, eye wòɖua nye abolo la, kɔ afɔkpodzi dzi ɖe ŋunye.
11Ke wò Yehowa, ve nunye, eye nafɔm ɖe te, ekema maɖo eteƒe na wò! 12Esia me menyae le be, nye nu nyea ŋuwò, ne nye futɔ magatso aseye ɖe ŋunye o. 13Ke èlé nyea ɖe asi le nye fɔmaɖimaɖi ta, eye nètsɔm ɖo ŋkuwò me tegbee.
14Woakafu Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la, tso mavɔ me yi mavɔ me! Nenɔ alea, ẽ, nenɔ alea!

Title: PSALMOWO 42
Content:
AGBALẼ EVELIA.
Mawu ta biabiase le dzroawo de.
1Korax-viwo ƒe nufiameha na henɔ la.
2Alesi zinɔ ƒe veme ƒuna ɖe tɔʋu ŋu la, nenema nye luʋɔ ƒe veme ƒu ɖe ŋuwò, Mawu! 3Tsikɔ le nye luʋɔ wum ɖe Mawu ŋu, ɖe Mawu gbagbe la ŋu; gbekagbe made ahado ɖe Mawu ŋku me? 4Nye aɖatsiwo zu nuɖuɖu nam zã kple keli, esi wole gbɔgblɔm nam edziedzi be: Afika gɔ̃ wò Mawu la le? 5Ne meɖo ŋu, alesi menɔa amehawo dome, eye mía kpli wo míeyia Mawu ƒe aƒe la me kple aseyetsotso kple kafukafuhadzidzi le ŋkekenyuieɖulawo ƒe ha me la, nye dzi lólona gbanaa. 6Nye luʋɔ, nukaŋuti nèle nu xam, eye nètsi dzodzodzoe le menye? Kpɔ mɔ na Mawu, elabena magakafui, eya, amesi nye nye xɔnametɔ kple nye Mawu la!
7Mawunye! Nye luʋɔ le nu xam le menye, eyata mele ŋku ɖom dziwò le Yordan-nyigba, Hermon-to kple to sue la dzi. 8Le wò tsiwo ƒe kɔkɔɖanyi bababa me la tɔɖɔɖɔ yɔ tɔɖɔɖɔ; wò tsi kpakawo kple tsitsotsoewo ŋe ɖe dzinye. 9Ŋkeke me la Yehowa ɖɔ eƒe amenuveve ɖa, le zã me la eƒe ha le nunye, eye medo gbe ɖa na nye agbe ƒe Mawu la. 10Magblɔ na Mawu, nye agakpe, be: Nukaŋuti nèŋlɔm be, eye nukaŋuti maƒo ɖi anɔ yiyim le nye futɔ ƒe teteɖanyi te?
11Ne nye ketɔwo le alɔme ɖem le gbɔgblɔm nam edziedzi be: Afika gɔ̃ wò Mawu le hã la, enɔna abe ŋɔ ɖunue le nye ƒuwo me ene. 12Nye luʋɔ, nukaŋuti nèle nu xam, eye nètsi dzodzodzoe le menye? Kpɔ mɔ na Mawu, elabena magakafui, eya, amesi nye nye xɔnametɔ kple nye Mawu la!

Title: PSALMOWO 43
Content:
Dziyiyi Mawu ta biabiase le dzroawo de.
1Tso afia nam, Mawu, eye nawɔ nye dzre kple dukɔ malɔ̃ame la nam; ɖem tso alakpatɔ kple ame vlo la si me! 2Elabena wòe nye nye Mawu, amesi nye nye sitsoƒe; nukaŋuti nètu asim ɖa, eye nukaŋuti maƒo ɖi anɔ yiyim le futɔ la ƒe teteɖanyi te? 3Ɖo wò kekeli kple wò nyateƒe ɖa, ne woakplɔm ayi wò to kɔkɔe la kple wò nɔƒe la gbɔe, 4ne maɖe Mawu ƒe vɔsamlekpui la kple nye dzidzɔseye ƒe Mawu la gbɔ, eye matsɔ saŋku akafu wò, Mawu, nye Mawu la! 5Nye luʋɔ, nukaŋuti nèle nu xam, eye nètsi dzodzodzoe le menye? Kpɔ mɔ na Mawu, elabena magakafui eya, amesi nye nye xɔnametɔ kple nye Mawu la!

Title: PSALMOWO 44
Content:
Konyifafa le alesi Mawu nyã eƒe dukɔ la ɖa ta.
1Korax-viwo ƒe nufiameha na henɔ la.
2Mawu, míesee kple míaƒe to, mía fofowo ɖa xo na mí, le nusiwo nèwɔ le wo ŋɔli le blema la ŋuti. 3Etsɔ wò asi nyã dukɔwo, ke woawo la èƒo woƒe aganu ɖe to; ègblẽ anyigbadzitɔwo, ke èna woawo keke la. 4Elabena menye woawo ŋutɔ ƒe yi wotsɔ xɔ anyigba lae o, eye menye woawo ŋutɔ ƒe alɔe xɔ na wo o; ke boŋ wò nuɖusi kple wò alɔ kpakple wò ŋku me ƒe kekelie, elabena woƒe nu nyo ŋuwò.
5Mawu, nye fia nènye, ɖo xɔnume ɖe Yakob! 6Wòe míatsɔ aƒu míaƒe futɔwo anyii, eye wò ŋkɔ míatsɔ anyã avuzi le míaƒe ketɔwo dzii. 7Elabena nyemele ŋu ɖom ɖe nye dati ŋu o, eye menye yie axɔ num o; 8ke boŋ wòe xɔ mí tso míaƒe futɔwo si me, eye nèna ŋukpe lé míaƒe ketɔwo. 9Míetsɔ Mawu le adegbe ƒomi ɖaa, eye míekafu wò ŋkɔ tegbee. Sela.
10Ke ètsɔ mí ƒu gbe, ède ŋukpe mo na mí, eye mèho yi kple míaƒe aʋakɔwo o. 11Ena míede megbe le míaƒe futɔwo nu, eye míaƒe ketɔwo ha nu. 12Etsɔ mí na, ne woaɖu abe alẽwo ene, eye nèkaka mí ɖe dukɔwo dome. 13Etsɔ wò dukɔ dzra ho kpɔtsɔe, eye medo asi loloe ɖe wo ŋu o. 14Etsɔ mí wɔ vlodonu na míaƒe aƒelikawo kple alɔmeɖenu kpakple nu ɖikokoea na amesiwo ƒo xlã mi. 15Etsɔ mí wɔ hameloe le dukɔwo dome kple ame, ne woɔʋuʋu ta ɖe eŋua le anyigbɔdzitɔwo dome. 16Nye vlododo le ŋkunye me ŋkekeawo katã, eye ŋukpe, si le ŋunye le, nyẽ tsyɔm, 17be manɔ vlodoamela kple fewuɖula ŋkɔ sem, eye manɔ futɔ kple hlɔ̃biala kpɔm kple ŋku.
18Nusiawo katã va mía dzi, ke míeŋlɔ wò be o, eye míezu alakpatɔwo le wò nubabla la me o. 19Míaƒe dzi mefe ɖa o, eye míaƒe afɔɖede mete ɖa le wò mɔ dzi o. 20Elabena èto mí nyanyanya le amegãxiwo nɔƒe, eye nètsɔ blukɔ tsiɖitsiɖi tsyɔ mía dzi. 21Ɖe wònye ɖe míeŋlɔ mía Mawu ƒe ŋkɔ be, eye míeke míaƒe asiwo na mawu tutɔwo la, 22enye ne mía Mawu madi egɔme oa? Elabena enya dzi me gogloeaƒe ke. 23Elabena tawò wole mía wum atraɖi ɖaa, eye wobua mí abe alẽ, siwo wu ge woala la ene.
24Nyɔ, Aƒetɔ! Nukaŋuti nèle alɔ̃ dɔm? Fɔ, eye megatsɔ mí ƒu gbe ɖika o! 25Nukaŋuti nèɣla wò ŋku me, eye nèŋlɔ míaƒe hiã kple míaƒe xaxa be? 26Elabena míaƒe luʋɔ bɔbɔ vaseɖe ke me ke, eye míaƒe ƒodo lé ɖe anyigba ŋu. 27Tso, naxɔ na mi, eye naɖe mí le wò amenuveve la ta!

Title: PSALMOWO 45
Content:
Kafukafuha dzidzi le fia la kple eƒe ŋugbetɔ la ŋuti.
1Korax-viwo ƒe nufiameha, si nye lɔlɔ̃ha na henɔ la, ne woatsɔ „Dzogbenya“ ƒe gbeɖiɖi adzii.
2Nya nyuiwo le fiefiẽm le nye dzi me wlɔwlɔwlɔ. Mebe: Nye hawo nye fia la tɔ; nye aɖe enye amesi bi ɖe nuŋɔŋlɔ me la, ƒe nuŋlɔti. 3Edze ɖeka wu amegbetɔviwo, wotrɔ amenuveve kɔ ɖe nuyi dzi na wò, eyata Mawu yra wò tegbee! 4Ta wò yi, wò bubu kple wò atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo ɖe ali, wò kalẽtɔ! 5Nɔ wò atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo me, naho, eye yi le nyateƒenya la kple nya dzɔdzɔe, si wote ɖe to la ta, eye wò nuɖusi afia nu dziŋɔwo wɔwɔ wò! 6Wò aŋutrɔ ɖaɖɛwo ƒo ɖe fia ƒe futɔwo ƒe dzi me, dukɔwo dze anyi ɖe tewò.
7Mawu, wò fiazikpui li ɖaa tegbee; wò fiaɖuƒe ƒe fiatikplɔ enye fiatikplɔ dzɔdzɔe. 8Elɔ̃a dzɔdzɔenyenye, eye nèléa fu nu vɔ̃ɖi, eyata Mawu, wò Mawu le si dzidzɔmi na wò ƒo hawòviwo ta. 9Wò avɔwo katã nye lifi, sikɔni kple kotoklobo; saŋkuƒoƒo le dzidzɔ dom na wò le nyiɖufiasã me. 10Fianyɔnuwo le wò ame veviwo dome; fiasrɔ̃ le Ofir-sikanuwo me tsi tre ɖe wò nuɖusi me.
11Nyɔnuvi, see, kpɔ nu, eye naƒu to anyi, wò ŋku nedzo le wò dukɔ kple fofowò ƒe aƒe dzi, 12eye na fia la nadi wò tugbedzedze yome, elabena wò aƒetɔ wònye, eye nade ta agu nɛ! 13Tiro-vinyɔnu atsɔ nunana vɛ, eye dukɔwo ƒe kesinɔtɔwo aɖo mo ŋanɛ na wò. 14Fiavinyɔnu, si le eme la, enye atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo ɖeɖe sɔŋ; sika wotsɔ lɔ̃ eƒe avɔe. 15Ele avɔ ŋɔŋɔe me wokplɔ yi na fia la, detugbi, siwo nye exɔlɔ̃wo le eyome, wokplɔ vɛ na wò. 16Wotsɔ dzidzɔ kple aseyetsotso kplɔ wo yii, eye woge ɖe fia ƒe aƒe la me. 17Viwòŋutsuwo anɔ fofowòwo teƒe, eye atsɔ wo aɖo amegãwoe ɖe anyigba blibo la dzi. 18Mana woaɖo ŋku wò ŋkɔ dzi le dzidzimewo katã me; eyata dukɔwo akafu wò ɖaa tegbee.

Title: PSALMOWO 46
Content:
Mawu enye mɔ̃ sesẽ.
1Korax-viwo ƒe ha na henɔ la, ne woadzi ɖe ɖetugbiwo ƒe gbe nu.
2Yehowa enye sitsoƒe kple ŋusẽ na mí, xɔnametɔ ŋutɔ wònye le xaxawo me. 3Eyata míavɔ̃ o, nenye be, anyigba gli le enu, eye towo ʋã le atsiaƒu titina, 4ne eƒe tɔwo dze agbo, eye wotso futukpɔ, eye towo ʋuʋu le eƒe nyanyrã me hã. Sela.
5Tɔsisi la ƒe alɔdzewo doa dzidzɔ na Mawu ƒe du, si nye dziƒoʋitɔ ƒe nɔƒe kɔkɔe la. 6Mawu le eme, maʋã o, Mawu xɔna nɛ, ne agu dze. 7Dukɔwo dze agbo, ke de le fiaɖuƒewo te; enu eƒe gbe di, tete anyigba lólo. 8Yehowa Zebaot li kpli mi Yakob ƒe Mawu la nye mɔ̃ sesẽ na mi! Sela.
9Miva kpa Yehowa ƒe nuwɔwɔwo, amesi doa aƒedo anyigba, 10amesi tsia aʋawɔwɔwo nu vaseɖe anyigba ƒe mlɔenu ke, eflia dati, eŋea akplɔ, eye wòtɔa dzo tasiaɖamwo! 11Midzudzɔ, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Mawu; meɖo kpo ɖe dukɔwo dzi, meɖo kpo ɖe anyigba dzi! 12Yehowa Zebaot li kpli mí, Yakob ƒe Mawu la nye mɔ̃ sesẽ na mí! Sela.

Title: PSALMOWO 47
Content:
Mawu enye fia.
1Korax viwo ƒe ha na henɔ la.
2Mi dukɔwo katã, miƒu akpe, eye mitsɔ aƒadodo tso aseye ɖe Mawu ŋu! 3Elabena ŋɔdzi le Yehowa dziƒoʋitɔ la ŋu, fia gã wonye ɖe anyigba blibo la dzi. 4Etsɔ dukɔwo ɖe mía te kple sesẽ, eye wòɖe anyigbadzitɔwo míaƒe afɔ te. 5Etia míaƒe domenyinu na mí, si nye Yakob, amesi wòlɔ̃na la, ƒe adegbeƒonu. Sela.
6Mawu yi dzi kple aseyetsotso, Yehowa kple kpẽ ƒe ɖiɖi. 7Midzi kafukafuha na Mawu, midzi kafukafuha hee! Midzi kafukafuha na mía fia la, midzi kafukafuha! 8Elabena Mawue nye fia ɖe anyigba blibo la dzi, midzi nufiameha! 9Mawu ɖu fia ɖe dukɔwo dzi, Mawu bɔbɔ nɔ eƒe fiazikpui kɔkɔe la dzi. 10Dukɔwo ƒe ame ŋkutawo ƒo ƒu, wonye Abraham ƒe Mawu la ƒe dukɔ; elabena Mawu tɔ enye anyigba ƒe akpoxɔnuwo. Eɖo kpo ŋutɔ.

Title: PSALMOWO 48
Content:
Fia gã la ƒe du.
1Korax-viwo ƒe ha.
2Yehowa lolo, eye wòdze kafukafu le mía Mawu ƒe du la me kple eƒe to kɔkɔe la dzi. 3Zion-to, si nye fia gã la ƒe nu, kɔ eɖokui ɖe dzi nyuie le anyiehe kekeake, eye wònye dzidzɔdonu na anyigba blibo la. 4Mawu fia eɖokui le eƒe fiasãwo me abe sitsoƒe ene.
5Elabena kpɔ ɖa, fiawo ƒo ƒu, eye wa katã wova ɖe eŋuti. 6Esi wokpɔe la, woƒe nu ku, dzidzi ƒo wo, eye wosi. 7Wodzo nyanyanya le afima, eye ŋɔdzi lé wo abe nyɔnu, si le ku lém ene. 8Etsɔ ɣedzeƒeya gbã Tarsis-ʋuwo. 9Míekpɔe le Yehowa Zebaot ƒe ɖu kple mía Mawu ƒe du la me, abe alesi míesee ene. Mawu ali kee tegbee. Sela.
10Mawu, míele ŋku dom wò amenuveve dzi le wò gbedoxɔ titina. 11Mawu, wò kafukafu de anyigba ƒe mlɔenu abe wò ŋkɔ ke ene. Wò nuɖusi yɔ fũ kple dzɔdzɔenyenye. 12Zion-to nekpɔ dzidzɔ, eye Yuda-nyɔnuviwo netso aseye le wò ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ ta!
13Mizɔ Zion ŋu godoo, miƒo xlãe va kpe, eye mixlẽ eƒe xɔ tsralawo! 14Milé ŋku de eƒe agbogbowo ŋu, eye mito eƒe fiasãwo me, ne miaxlẽe afia megbeviwo! 15Elabena Mawu siae nye mía Mawu ɖaa tegbee, eye akplɔ mí vaseɖe ku me.

Title: PSALMOWO 49
Content:
Mawumavɔ̃lawo ƒe dzɔgbenyuie nuwuwu enye ku.
1Korax-viwo ƒe ha na henɔ la.
2Mi dukɔwo katã, mise esia, mi xexeametɔwo katã, miƒu to anyi, 3mi hahooawo kple amegãviwo, mi kesinɔtɔwo kple ame dahewo siaa! 4Nye nu agblɔ nunya, eye gɔmesese enye nye dzimesusuwo. 5Maƒu to anyi ɖe abebubu ŋu, eye mato nye adzo ɖe saŋkuƒoƒo ŋu.
6Nukaŋuti mavɔ̃ le dzɔgbevɔ̃eɣiwo me, ne nye adikãtɔwo ƒe vodada ɖe to ɖem? 7Amesiwo le dzi ɖom ɖe woƒe nuwo ŋu, eye wotsɔ woƒe kesinɔnu gbogboawo le adegbe ƒomi. 8Amea ɖeke mate ŋu axɔ nɔvia akpɔ o, eye mate ŋu axe etafe na Mawu, 9— elabena woƒe agbe ƒeƒle xɔ asi ŋutɔ, eye aɖo kpoe tegbee, — 10be wòanɔ agbe ayi dzi, eye makpɔ yɔdo o. 11Kpao, ke boŋ akpɔe be, nunyalawo kuna, bometsilawo kple abunetɔwo nu yina, eye wogblẽa woƒe nuwo ɖi na ame bubuwo. 12Wole tame enye be, yewoƒe xɔwo anɔ anyi tegbetegbe, yewoƒe nɔƒewo anɔ anyi na dzidzimewo katã, eye woyɔa woƒe ŋkɔwo ɖe anyigbawo ŋu. 13Ke amegbetɔ, si le agbe le atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo me la, mali ke o; esɔ kple lã, eye nuƒoƒo abu ɖee.
14Esia nye amesiwo ɖoa ŋu ɖe wo ɖokui ŋu la, ƒe zɔzɔme, eye woƒe nya dzea wo yometɔwo ŋu. Sela. 15Woyi tsiẽƒe abe alẽwo ene, eye ku nye wo kplɔla; ame dzɔdzɔewo nyã avuzi le wo dzi le ŋdi, eye woƒe nɔnɔme nyunyɔ, elabena tsiẽƒe zu woƒe nɔƒe. 16Ke Mawu ade nye luʋɔ atso tsiẽƒe si me, elabena axɔm de eɖokui gbɔ. Sela.
17Ne amea ɖe zu kesinɔtɔ, eye eƒe aƒe ƒe bubu dzi ɖe dzi la, megava o! 18Elabena ne eku la, matsɔ nusiawo katã dometɔa ɖeke aɖo asi o, eye eƒe bubu makplɔe ɖo o. 19Nenye be, eyra eɖokui le eƒe agbenɔɣi, eye wokafui be, ewɔ nyuie na eɖokui hã la, 20ayi fofoawo ƒe ƒome, si megakpɔ kekeli kpɔ o la gbɔ. 21Amegbetɔ, si le agbe le atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo me, eye tagbɔ mele esi o la, esɔ kple lã, eye nuƒoƒo abu ɖee!

Title: PSALMOWO 50
Content:
Akpedanumeme vavãtɔ.
1Asaf ƒe ha.
Mawu, Yehowa, ŋusẽkatãtɔ la le nu ƒom, eye wòle xexeame yɔm tso ɣe ƒe dzedze me vaseɖe eƒe loɖoɖo me. 2Zion, si nye nyonyowo ƒe ta la, Mawu klẽ tso. 3Mía Mawu gbɔna, ɖoɖoe mazi le eŋu o, dzo le nu bim le eŋgɔ, eye ahom sesẽ ɖe to ɖee. 4Ele dzi me yɔ dziƒo kple anyigba ɖa, ne wòadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu eƒe dukɔ. 5Miƒo nye mawumeme, siwo bla nu kplim ɖe akpedavɔsa dzi la, nu ƒu nam! 6Dziƒowo ɖe gbe ƒã eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye, elabena Mawu enye ʋɔnudrɔ̃la.
7Nye dukɔ, see, mele nu ƒo ge; Israel, maɖi ɖase na wò be: Mawu, wò Mawu, menye! 8Menye wò akpedavɔsa ta mele nya hem ɖe ŋuwò ɖo o, eye wò numevɔsa le ŋkunye me ɖaa. 9Nyemalé nyitsu le aƒewò me alo gbɔ̃tsu le wò lãkpɔ me o. 10Elabena tɔnyee nye avemelãwo katã kple lã akpe nane, siwo le towo dzi. 11Menya xevi, siwo katã le towo dzi, eye nusiwo katã ʋãa wo ɖokui le gbe me la, mele manyamanya ɖem o. 12Ɖe nye dɔe le wuyem la, ne nyematoe na wò o, elabena tɔnyee nye xexeame godoo kple eme nu gbogboawo. 13Alo ɖe meɖua nyitsuwo ƒe lã, eye menoa gbɔ̃tsuwo ƒe ʋua? 14Tsɔ akpedada sa vɔ na Mawu, eye naxe wò adzɔgbeɖefe na dziƒoʋitɔ la! 15Yɔm le xaxagbe la, ekema maɖe wò, eye nade bubu ŋunye!
16Ke Mawu gblɔ na ame vɔ̃ɖi be: Nye ɖoɖowo xexlẽfia kae tsa gbɔwò? Eye nukaŋuti nèlé nye nubabla ɖe nu? 17Wòa èlé tu hehe, eye nètsɔ nye nyawo ƒu gbe ɖe megbewò tso! 18Ne èkpɔ hafi la, ekema èkplɔe ɖo, eye nèɖea ha kple ahasitɔwo. 19Eɖe ga wò nu ɖe nu vɔ̃ɖi ŋu, eye wò aɖe ɖa alakpa. 20Ebɔbɔ nɔ anyi le nu ƒom le nɔviwò ŋu, eye nèle aɖeɖi ƒom dawòvi. 21Nusiawo wɔm nèle, eye mezi kpi; eyata nèle bubum be, ɖe mele abe wò ene. Maka mo na wò, eye matsɔe aɖo ŋkuwò me!
22Mi, amesiwo ŋlɔ Mawu be, midze si esia dzro, ne nyemagavuvu nu, eye ɖelaa ɖeke manɔ anyi o! 23Amesi tso akpedada sa vɔe la, ede bubu ŋunye; eye amesi lé ŋku ɖe eƒe zɔzɔme ŋu la, mana wòakpɔ Mawu ƒe xɔname!

Title: PSALMOWO 51
Content:
Dawid fe dzimetɔtrɔ gbedodoɖa.
1Dawid ƒe ha na henɔ la, 2esime wode Batseba gbɔ, eye nyagblɔɖila Natan va egbɔ.
3Mawu, ve nunye le wò dɔmenyo la nu, eye le wò nublanui-kpɔkpɔ sɔgbɔ la nu tutu nye dzidadawo ɖa! 4Le tsi nam keŋkeŋ tso nye vodada me, eye naklɔ ŋunye tso nye nuvɔ̃ me! 5Elabena nye dzidadawo la, medze si wo, eye nye nuvɔ̃ le ŋkunye me daa? 6Wò ɖeka ɖeɖe ko ŋuti mewɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖo, eye nusi nye vɔ̃ le ŋkuwò me la, mewɔ, ne tɔwò nadzɔ le wò nuƒoƒo me, eye ŋuwò nadza le wò ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ me. 7Kpɔ ɖa, voɖaɖa me wodzim ɖo, eye nuvɔ̃ me danye fɔ nye fu ɖo! 8Kpɔ ɖa, nyateƒe, si le dzi me la, nèdina, eyata ɖe nunya fiam le adzame!
9Tsɔ akutsa klɔ nye nuvɔ̃ ɖa, ne ŋunye naɖi; le tsi nam, ne matu tititi wu ɖetifu! 10Na mase dzidzɔ kple aseyetsotso, ne nye ƒu, siwo nèŋe la, nagli kple dzidzɔ! 11Ɣla wò mo ɖe nuvɔ̃nyewo, eye tutu nye vodadawo katã ɖa! 12Mawu, wɔ dzi dzadzɛa ɖe nam, eye nade gbɔgbɔ yeye, si li ke la, menye! 13Megatsɔm ƒu gbe le ŋkuwò me o, eye megaxɔ wò gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe la le asinye o! 14Gatsɔ wò xɔname do dzidzɔ nam, eye natsɔ gbɔgbɔ, si me lɔlɔ̃nu le le, lém ɖe asi!
15Mafia wò mɔ dzidalawo, eye nuvɔwɔlawo atrɔ tame ɖe ŋuwò. 16Mawu, nye xɔname ƒe Mawu, ɖem tso hlɔ̃fe me, ekema nye aɖe atso aseye le wò dzɔdzɔenyenye ŋuti! 17Aƒetɔ, ke nye nuyiwo, eye nye nu aɖe gbe ƒa wò kafukafu! 18Elabena mèdia akpedavɔsa o, anye ne mana wò; numevɔsa hã medzea ŋuwò o! 19Vɔsewo na Mawu wonye gbɔgbɔ, si wote de anyi; Mawu, màdo vlo dzi gbagbã, si tugu la o.
20Le wò amenuveve la nu wɔ nyui na Zion; ɖo Yerusalem ƒe gliwo! 21Ekema dzɔdzɔenyenye-vɔsawo, numevɔsa kple vɔsa blibo adze ŋuwò; ekema woatsɔ nyitsuwo asa vɔe le wò vɔsamlekpui la dzi.

Title: PSALMOWO 52
Content:
Mawu ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ ahɔhlɔbɔlaa ɖe.
1Dawid ƒe nufiameha na henɔ la, 2le esime Edomtɔ Doeg va to na Saul bena, Dawid le Abimelex ƒe me.
3Kalẽtɔ, nukaŋuti nètsɔ vɔ̃ɖivɔ̃ɖi le adegbe ƒomi? Mawu ƒe amenuveve li tegbee. 4Wò aɖe le gbegblẽ ŋu susum abe talũhɛ ɖaɖɛ ene, wò alakpadala. 5Elɔ̃ vɔ̃ wu nyui, eye nèlɔ̃ aʋatso wu nya dzɔdzɔe gbɔgblɔ. Sela. 6Wò alakpaɖe, nu gbegblẽ nyawo sɔŋ nyoa ŋuwò.
7Eyata Mawu hã agbã wò aƒu anyi ɖikaa, alé wò, eye wòahe wò aƒu gbe tso agbadɔ me, eye wòaho wò kple ke tso agbagbeawo ƒe anyigba dzi. Sela. 8Ame dzɔdzɔewo lakpɔe, eye dzika atso wo ƒo, eye woakoe be: 9Kpɔ ɖa, ŋutsu, si metsɔ Mawu wɔ eƒe mɔ̃ sesẽe o, ke boŋ wòɖo dzi ɖe eƒe kesinɔnu sɔgbɔawo ŋu, eye wòtɔ asi kɔ ɖe eƒe nuwo ŋu la enye si!
10Ke nye la mele abe amiti dama ene le Mawu ƒe me; eye mele ŋu ɖom ɖe Mawu ƒe amenuveve ŋu ɖaa tegbee. 11Mada akpe na wò tegbee, elabena èwɔe ɖe goe, eye makpɔ mɔ na wò ŋkɔ, elabena enye le wò mawumemewo ŋku me.

Title: PSALMOWO 53
Content:
Gbedodoɖa le amegbetɔwo ƒe ɖeɖe tso gbegblẽ me ŋu.
1Dawid ƒe nufiameha na henɔ la, ne woadzi ɖe nublanuigbe me.
2Ahunetɔwo gblɔna le woƒe dzi me bena: Mawua ɖeke meli o! Wowɔa nu gbegblẽwo kple nu nyɔŋuwo le nu tovo wɔwɔwo me. Amea ɖeke meli, si wɔa nu nyui o. 3Mawu ɖe ŋku ɖe amegbetɔviwo tso dziƒo, ne yeakpɔ be, amea ɖe dze nunya, eye wòbiaa Mawu ta sena hã? 4Wo keŋ wote ɖe aga, wo katã tim wogblẽ. Ame ɖeka hã meli, si wɔa nu nyui o, ɖeka hɔ̃ hã meli o!
5Ɖe nu vlo wɔlawo, amesiwo le nye dukɔ ɖum, abe alesi woɖua aboloe ene, eye womeyɔa Mawu o la, medze si esia oa? 6Tete vɔvɔ̃ ɖo dzikatsoƒoe na wo le afisi ŋɔdzia ɖeke mele o; elabena Mawu kaka amesi ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe ŋuwò la, ƒe ƒuwo. Ena ŋukpe lé wo, elabena Mawu gbe wo.
7Oo, ɖe xɔname atso Zion eya na Israel! Ne Mawu gaɖo eƒe dukɔ te la, Yakob atso aseye, dzi adzo Israel!

Title: PSALMOWO 54
Content:
Yehowa enye nye kpeɖeŋutɔ.
1Dawid ƒe nufiameha na kasaŋkuwo ƒe henɔ, 2le esime Ziftɔwo va gblɔ na Saul bena: Menye Dawid ye nye esi ɣla ɖe mia gbɔ oa?
3Mawu, tsɔ wò ŋkɔ xɔ nam, eye natsɔ wò ŋusẽ tso afia nam! 4Mawu, se nye gbedodoɖa, eye nalé to ɖe nye nu me nyawo ŋu! 5Elabena ame tovowo tso ɖe ŋunye, eye ŋutasẽlawo le nye ku dim. Wometsɔ Mawu ɖo ŋku me o. Sela.
6Kpɔ ɖa. Mawua nye xɔnametɔ, Aƒetɔ la lé nye luʋɔ ɖe asi. 7Vɔ̃ la agbugbɔ ayi nye ketɔwo dzi; tsrɔ̃ wo ɖa le wò nyateƒe la nu! 8Lɔlɔ̃nu faa matsɔ asa vɔ na wòe, Yehowa, makafu wò ŋkɔ, elabena enyo. 9Elabena èɖem tso xaxawo katã me, eye nye ŋku atsa le nye ketɔwo dzi.

Title: PSALMOWO 55
Content:
Gbedodoɖa le xɔlɔ̃ vɔ̃ɖi ta. Mawu me akɔfafa.
1Dawid ƒe nufiameha na kasaŋkuwo ƒe henɔ.
2Mawu, se nye gbedodoɖa, eye megaɣla dokuiwò ɖe nye kokoƒoƒo o! 3Lé to ɖe ŋunye, eye natɔ nam; mele tsa glalã tsam le konyifafa me, eye mele hũ ɖem 4le futɔ la ƒe gbe kple ame vɔ̃ɖi la ƒe ametete ɖe anyi ŋuti; elabena wolɔ gbegblẽ trɔ ɖe dzinye, eye wolé tum le dziku me. 5Nye dzi le dablihɛ ƒom le nye dɔ me, eye ku ƒe ŋɔdzidonamewo dze dzinye. 6Vɔvɔ̃ kple dzodzo nyanyanya lém, eye nye lãme ble tu. 7Mebe: Ao, ɖe wonye aʋalae le asinye abe ahɔ̃ne ene la, anye ne madzo aɖatsi afia ɖe! 8Kpɔ da, didiƒe ʋi mebe, masi ayi, eye matsi gbedzi adɔ. Sela. 9Mawɔ kaba asi le ya ʋuduʋudu kple ahom nu.
10Tsrɔ̃ wo, Aƒetɔ, eye nate woƒe aɖe me ɖe eve, elabena mekpɔ ŋutasesẽ kple dzrewɔwɔ le dua me. 11Woɖe to ɖee te woƒe gliwo dzi zã kple keli, eye gbegblẽ kple hiãkame le eme. 12Gbegblẽ le eme, eye ŋutasesẽ kple amebaba mete ɖa le eƒe abla me o. 13Ɖe wonye nye futɔe le vlo domem la, anye ne mado dzi atsɔe; ɖe wònye nye ketɔe le asi tɔm akɔ ɖe ŋunye la, anye ne mesi abe le enu. 14Ke boŋ amegbetɔ, si mía kplii míele tasɔsɔ ɖeka me lae, xɔ̃nye kple nye ame nyanyɛ, 15mí amesiwo dome nya viviwo le, eye míenɔa amehawo dome yia mawuƒe me lae. 16Saɖagatsi nedze wodzi, woayi tsiẽ agbagbe, elabena vɔɖinyenye le wo nɔƒe, le woƒe dzi me.
17Ke nyea meyɔ Mawu, eye Yehowa xɔ nam. 18Mefa konyi, eye meɖe hũ le fiẽ, ŋdi kple ŋdɔ, eye wòɖo to nye gbe. 19Eɖe nye luʋɔ tso amesiwo le tetem ɖe ŋunye la si me, eye wòna ŋunye fe; elabena amesiwo tso ɖe ŋunye la, sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ. 20Mawu asee, eye wòabɔbɔ wo ɖe anyi, eya, amesi te fiazikpui dzi tso blema ke, Sela, wo, amesiwo tametɔtrɔa ɖeke meli na wo o, eye womevɔ̃a Mawu o. 21Edo asi ɖa ɖe amesiwo le ŋutifafa me kplii la ŋuti, eye wògblẽ kɔ ɖo na eƒe nubabla. 22Eƒe nu me nya zrɔ̃ drẽdrẽdrẽ abe notsi kpekẽ ene; aʋawɔwɔ le eƒe dzi me, eƒe nuƒoƒowo le bɔlɔbɔlɔ abe ami ene, ke yi, si wodi, wonye.
23Tsɔ wò nyawo dro ɖe Yehowa dzi, eyae akpɔtawò; emana ke naɖe le ame dzɔdzɔe te akpɔ gbeɖe o. 24Ke wò, Mawu, ãtsɔ wo aƒu gbegblẽ fe ɖo la me, ŋutsu hlɔ̃mewo kple alakpatɔwo manɔ woƒe agbe ƒe afã o; ke nyea mele ŋu ɖom ɖe ŋuwò!

Title: PSALMOWO 56
Content:
Kukudeɖe de akɔfafa le yometiti me ta.
1Dawid ƒe ha ɖe futamee na henɔ la, ne woadzi ɖe „Ahɔ̃ne tsi nu maƒo le didiƒe“ ƒe gbe nu, nu le esime Filistitɔwo lée le Gat.
2Mawu, ve nunye, elabena amegbetɔwo lɔ gbɔgbɔtsixe ɖe ƒo ɖe ŋunye, eye woxaxam ɖo le aʋa wɔm kplim ɣeawokatãɣi! 3Nye ketɔwo lɔ gbɔgbɔtsixe ɖe ƒo ɖaa; eye amesiwo tsɔ dada le aʋa wóm kplim la, sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ. 4Ne vɔvɔ̃ ɖom la, meɖoa ŋu ɖe ŋuwò. 5Mawu ana be, makafu yeƒe nyia la; Mawu ŋu maɖo ŋu ɖo, nyemavɔ̃ o, nuka ŋutilã awɔm ma?
6Wole nya trɔm nam gbesiagbe; eye woƒe susuwo katã nye be, woawo vɔ̃ ɖe ŋunye. 7Wokpe ta, wode xa, eye wole ŋku ɖem ɖe nye afɔkpodzi, abe alesi wole nye luʋɔ yome dimee ene. 8Ɖe woasi le woƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ la ta? Mawu, xlã dukɔwo ɖe anyi le dɔmedzoe me! 9Wòe xlẽ nye sisiƒewo, eɖe nye aɖatsiwo wò goe me! Ɖe mèŋlɔ wo ɖe wò agbalẽ me oa? 10Ekema nye futɔwo agbugbɔ ɖe megbe le gbesigbe mayɔ wo. Menya esia be, Mawu le dzinye. 11Mawu ana be, makafu nya la, Yehowa ana be, makafu nya la. 12Mawu ŋu mele ŋu ɖom ɖo, nyemavɔ̃ o; nuka amegbetɔ awɔm ma?
13Mawu, menyi adzɔgbeɖefe le asiwo, matsɔ akpeɖavɔsa axee na wò. 14Elabena èɖe nye luʋɔ tso ku me, eye nèxɔ na nye afɔwo tso nukikli me, ne mazɔ le Mawu ŋku me le agbagbeawo ƒe kekeli me.

Title: PSALMOWO 57
Content:
Kpekpeɖeŋu blabla Mawu le futɔwo titina.
1Megagblẽ nu o! Dawid ƒe ha ɖe futamee na henɔ la, le esime wòsi le Saul nu yi agado la me.
2Ve nunye, Mawu, ve nunye; elabena gbɔwò meɣla ɖo, eye wò aʋala ƒe vɔvɔli te mehe ɖo, vaseɖe esime gbegblẽ la nu nayi! 3Mele Mawu dziƒoʋitɔ la yɔm, Mawu, amesi awɔe ade goe nom. 4Adɔ ɖa tso dziƒo, ne wòaxɔ nam; ne amesi lɔ gbɔgbɔtsixe ɖe ƒo ɖe ŋunye la, le vlo ɖom hã, Sela; Mawu aɖo eƒe amenuveve kple nyateƒe ɖa. 5Nye luʋɔ le dzatawo dome, memlɔ amegbetɔvi, siwo nye adzowɔlawo la dome, amesiwo ƒe aɖuwo nye akplɔ kple aŋutrɔ, eye woƒe aɖe nye yi ɖaɖɛ. 6Oo, Mawu, kɔ ɖokuiwò ɖe dzi gbɔ dziƒo ŋu, eye wò ŋutikɔkɔe nagbɔ anyigba blibo la ta!
7Woɖo ɖɔ ɖi na nye afɔwo, eye wote nye luʋɔ ɖe anyi; woɖe ʋe ɖe ŋkunye me; woawo ŋutɔ kee adze eme. Sela. 8Nye dzi dze eme, Mawu, nye dzi dze eme; madzi ha, eye maƒo saŋku. 9Fɔ, nye kafukafu; saŋku kple gakasaŋku, mifɔ! Manyɔ agudzedze! 10Aƒetɔ, makafu wò le dukɔwo dome, madzi ha na wò, eye maƒo saŋku na wò le anyigbadzitɔwo dome. 11Elabena wò amenuveve kɔ ɖatɔ dziƒo, eye wò nyateƒe de alilikpowo gbɔ. 12Oo, Mawu, kɔ ɖokuiwò ɖe dzi gbɔ dziƒo ŋu, eye wò ŋutikɔkɔe nagbɔ anyigba blibo la ta!

Title: PSALMOWO 58
Content:
Mawu ganye ʋɔnudrɔ̃la le anyigba dzi.
1Megagblẽ nu o! Dawid ƒe ha ɖe futamee na henɔ la.
2Mi ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo, ɖe mietsoa afia ɖe nyateƒe mea? Ɖe míedrɔ̃a ʋɔnu amegbetɔwo, alesi dzea? 3Nu tovo boŋ miewɔna le miaƒe dziwo me, eye miedaa miaƒe asiwo ƒe ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ le anyigba dzi. 4Ame vɔ̃ɖiwo te ɖe aga tso ƒoɖo me ke eye amesiwo koa aʋatso la, tra mɔ tso ɖɔ me ke. 5Aɖi te wo si abe ɖa ƒe aɖi ene, abe ƒli toku, si xe nu tome, 6eye mesea dzom kple gbesala, si bi ɖe gbesasa me le ƒe gbe o la ene.
7Mawu, ŋe aɖu le nu me na wo, Yehowa, ho tsyo na dzataviwo! 8Wo nu ayi abe tsi sisi ene; eye ne eda eƒe aŋutrɔwo la, woanɔ abe ɖe wo nu tsi kpo ene. 9Wole abe abɔbɔ, si le azɔli dzi le nyinyim ene, eye wodi nyɔnu ƒe fu gege, si mekpɔ ɣe kpɔ o. 10Hafi aŋɔkadzo nabi ɖe miaƒe zewo ŋu la, aɖe wo ɖa le dɔmedzoe me, esime wogale mumu. 11Ame dzɔdzɔe akpɔ dzidzɔ, elabena ele hlɔ̃biabia kpɔm, eye aklɔ eƒe afɔwo ɖe eme vɔ̃ɖi ƒe ʋu me. 12Eye amewo agblɔ bena: E, kutsetse li na ame dzɔdzɔe; ẽ, Mawua ɖe li, amesi drɔ̃a ʋɔnu le anyigba dzi!

Title: PSALMOWO 59
Content:
Konyifafa kple kukuɖeɖe le kpekpeɖeŋu ŋuti.
1Megagblẽ nu o! Dawid ƒe ɖe futamee na henɔ la, le esime Saul dɔ be, woadze aƒea ŋu, ne woawui.
2Nye Mawu, ɖem tso nye futɔwo nu, eye nakpɔ tanye tso amesiwo tso ɖe ŋunye ta si me! 3Ɖem tso nu vlo wɔlawo si me, eye naxɔm tso hlɔmewo si me! 4Elabena wode xa de nye luʋɔ ŋu; ame sesẽwo kpe ta ɖe ŋunye, menye le nye dzidada kple nye nuvɔ̃wo ta o. Yehowa! 5Menye vodada ŋuti wole du dzi, eye wodzra ɖo ɖi ɖo o. Nyɔ, nava kpem, eye kpɔ nya la me! 6Wò, Yehowa, Mawu Zebaot, Israel ƒe Mawu la nyɔ, eye natu fe na dukɔwo katã, megava nu vlo wɔla, siwo katã meɖia anukware o la, dome tɔa ɖeke nu o!
7Wogbɔ le fiẽ le gbe tem abe avũwo ene, eye wole tsa glãla tsam le ɖua me. 8Kpɔ ɖa, nya le dodom le wo nu blobloblo be: Amea ɖeke mehele esem o ɖe? Yi le woƒe nuyiwo dzi. 9Ke wò, Yehowa, èle wo kom, eye nele alɔme ɖem le dukɔwo katã ŋu. 10Nye ŋusẽ, asiwò nu kpɔm mele, elabena Mawu enye nye sitsoƒe.
11Nye Mawu ava kpem kple eƒe amenuveve, Mawu ana nye ŋku atsa le nye ketɔwo dzi. 12Megawu wo o, ne nye dukɔ ƒe ŋku nanɔ edzi! Tsɔ wò ŋusẽ nyã wo de gbe, eye natsɔ wo aƒu anyi, wò Aƒetɔ, mía akpexɔnu! 13Woƒe nu me nuvɔ̃ enye woƒe nuyiwo ƒe i ya, eyata woalé wo le woƒe dada la me le fiƒode kple alakpa, si dona tsoa wo nu la ta. 14Tsrɔ̃ wo le dɔmedzoe me, tsrɔ̃ wo, ne womaganɔ anyi o, eye ne woanyae be, Mawue nye dziɖula le Yakob vaseɖe anyigba ƒe mlɔenuwo! Sela.
15Wotrɔna gbɔna le fiẽ nɔa gbe tem abe avũwo ene, henɔa tsatsam le dua me. 16Wonɔa tsa glãla tsam le nuɖuɖu ta; eye ne womeɖi ƒo o la, wotsina dɔna. 17Ke nye la madzi ha le wò ŋusẽ ŋu, eye le ŋdi la matso aseye ɖe wò amenuveve ŋu, elabena wòe nye nye mɔ̃ sesẽ kple sitsoƒe le nye xaxaɣi. 18Nye ŋusẽ, wòe madzi ha na, elabena Mawu, nye amenuveve ƒe Mawu lae nye nye sitsoƒe.

Title: PSALMOWO 60
Content:
Le aʋaŋɔtiwo me.
1Dawid ƒe ha ɖe futamee na henɔ la, ne woafia, eye woadzi ɖe „Dzogbenya ƒe ɖaseɖiɖi“ ƒe gbe nu; 2le esime wòwɔ aʋa kple Aramtɔwo le Mesopotamia kple Aramtɔwo le Zoba, eye Yoab trɔ hewu Edomtɔ akpe wuieve le dzeʋe la me.
3Mawu, ègbe mí, èkaka mí hlẽ èdo dɔmedzoe; gatrɔ mí gbɔe! 4Eʋuʋu anyigba, eye nèfee; gatre eƒe fefeƒeawo, elabena ele ʋaʋãm! 5Ena nu sesẽ kpe wò dukɔ la, eye néna wein mí míeno mu. 6Ena aflaga amesiwo vɔ̃a wò, ne woafɔ wo ɖokui de tsitre le nyateƒe la ta. Sela. 7Ne woaxɔ na wò ame lɔlɔ̃wo, tsɔ wò nuɖusi ɖe mi, eye naɖo to mi!
8Mawu ƒo nu le eƒe kɔkɔeƒe la be: Makpɔ dzidzɔ, mamã Sixem, eye madzidze Sukot-hali me la. 9Gilead enya tɔnye, eye tɔnyee nye Manase; Efrayim enye nye taxenu, eye Yuda enye nye fiatikplɔ; 10nye tsileze enye Moab, mada nye atokota ɖe Edom dzi, eye matso aseye ɖe Filistitɔwo ŋu!
11Amekae akplɔm ayi du sesẽ la mee, eye amekae akplɔm vaseɖe Edom? 12Mawu, ɖe menye wòe gbe mi oa, Mawu, eye mèho kple míaƒe aʋakɔwo oa? 13Kpe ɖe mía ŋu ɖe míaƒe ketɔwo ŋuti, elabena amegbetɔ ƒe xɔname mele ɖeke me o. 14Mawue míatsɔ awɔ kalẽe, eye eya anyã avuzi le míaƒe ketɔwo dzi.

Title: PSALMOWO 61
Content:
Fia, si wole fu ɖem na ƒe gbedodoɖa.
1Dawid tɔ na kasaŋkuwo ƒe henɔ.
2Mawu, se nye ɣli, eye nalé to ɖe nye gbedodoɖa ŋu! 3Anyigba ƒe mlɔenu ke mele yɔwòm tsoe, esime nu te nye dzi ŋu; tsɔm ɖo agakpe, si kɔ nam akpa la dzi! 4Elabena ènye sitsoƒe nam kple xɔ tsrala sesẽ le futɔ la ŋku me. 5Medi be, mana wò agbadɔ me tegbee, eye mabe ɖe wò aʋala te. Sela. 6Elabena wò Mawu èɖo to nye adzɔgbeɖeɖewo, eye nẽtsɔ domenyinu na amesiwo vɔ̃ wò ŋkɔ la.
7Tsɔ ŋkekewo kpe fia la ƒe ŋkekewo, eye eƒe ƒewo netso dzidzime yi dzidzime! 8Neɖu fia le Mawu ŋku me tegbee; ɖo amenuveve kple nyateƒe, ne woakpɔ eta! 9Ekema madzi kafukafuha na wò ŋkɔ tegbee, eye maxe nye adzɔgbeɖefe gbesiagbe.

Title: PSALMOWO 62
Content:
Mɔkpɔkpɔ na Mawu. Amegbetɔ menye naneke o.
1Dawid ƒe ha na henɔ Yedutun.
2Nyateƒee, doɖoe zi le nye luʋɔ ŋu kpoo na Mawu, eya gbɔ nye xɔname tso. 3Eya koe nye nye aga, nye xɔname kple nye mɔ̃ sesẽ, eyata nyemaʋã akpe o. 4Zi nenie mi katã mialũ ɖe ame ɖeka dzi, be yewoaƒui anyi abe gli treazã kple gli gbagbã ene? 5Vavã, woɖo ɖe tame be, yewoatutui tso eƒe kɔkɔƒe la; alakpadada sɔe na wo pɛ, woyra ame kple woƒe nu, ke fiƒoɖe le woƒe dzi me. Sela.
6Nye luʋɔ, zi ɖoɖoe na Mawu kpoo ko, elabena eya gbɔ nye mɔkpɔkpɔ tso. 7Eya koe nye nye aga, nye xɔname kple nye mɔ̃ sesẽ, eyata nyemaʋã o! 8Nya xɔname, nye bubu kple nye ŋusẽ ƒe aga le Mawu gbɔ, eye Mawu me nye sitsoƒe le. 9Mi dukɔ la, miɖo ŋu ɖe eŋu ɣeawokatãɣi, mitrɔ miaƒe dzi ƒo le eŋku me; Mawu enye míaƒe sitsoƒe! Sela.
10Vavã, tofloko enye amegbetɔviwo, eye alakpa enye ameviwo; wole wodzoo le nudanu me, elabena wo katã la tofloko wonye. 11Migaɖo ŋu ɖe sesẽnuwɔwɔ ŋu o, eye nuhaha megaflu mo na mi o! Ne kesinɔnu le dzidzim ɖe edzi la, miaƒe dzi megaku ɖe eŋu o! 12Mawu ƒo nu zi ɖeka, eye nu eve mese le eme; Mawu tɔe nye ŋusẽ, 13eye tɔwò, Aƒetɔ, enye amenuveve; elabena eɖoa eteƒe na amesiame le eƒe nuwɔwɔwo nu.

Title: PSALMOWO 63
Content:
Mawu yome didi ie eƒe kɔkɔeƒe.
1Dawid ƒe ha, le esime wòle Yuda-gbedzi.
2Mawu, Mawunye nènye, eye mele diwòm; tsikɔ le nye luʋɔ wum ɖe ŋuwò, eye nu te nye ŋutilã ŋu ɖe ŋuwò le kuɖiɖinyigba, si dzi ƒu kplakplakpla, eye tsia ɖeke meli o la dzi. 3Ale metsa ŋu na wò le kɔkɔeƒe la, be makpɔ wò ŋusẽ kple wò ŋutikɔkɔe. 4Elabena wò amenuveve nyo wu agbe; nye nuyiwo akafu wò. 5Ekema makafu wò le nye agbe me katã, eye mawu nye asiwo dzi le wò ŋkɔ me. 6Nye luʋɔ aɖi ƒo, abe alesi woɖua ami kple lãmi ene, eye nye nu atsɔ aseyetsonuyiwo akafu wò.
7Ne medo ŋku dziwo le nye aba dzi, ne menya le zã, eye mebu ŋuwò le, 8— elabena wòe nye nye kpeɖeŋutɔ, eye wò aʋala ƒe vɔvɔli te mele aseye tsom le — 9ekema nye luʋɔ kuna ɖe ŋuwò; wò nuɖusi vaam goŋgoŋ. 10Ke woawo, amesiwo le nye luʋɔ dim, be yewoɔgblẽe la, woayi keke anyigba te ʋi ke. 11Woatsɔ wo ade yi nu, eye woazu aboyonu na amegãxiwo. 12Ke fia la akpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe Mawu ŋu, eye amesiame, si ka atam le egbɔ la, aƒo adegbe; elabena woate nu ɖe nu me na aʋatsokalawo.

Title: PSALMOWO 64
Content:
Dawid do gbe ɖa bena, Mawu nakpɔ ye ta le futɔ la ŋuti.
1Dawid ƒe ha na henɔ la.
2Mawu, se nye gbe le nye konyifafa me, eye nakpɔ nye agbe ta tso futɔ la ƒe ŋɔdzidodo me! 3Ɣlam tso eme vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe takpekpe kple ame vlowo ƒe howɔwɔ me! 4Amesiwo nyre woƒe aɖe abe yi ene, eye wovu woƒe aŋutrɔ, si nye woƒe nya veve heliheli la me, 5ne woaɖa ame maɖitɔ la le vivi me; zi ɖeka kasia wodae, eye dzika metso wo ƒo o. 6Woɖe dzi ƒo na wo ɖokui ɖe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ŋu, eye woɖo be, yewoatre mɔ̃ ɖe vivime hele gbɔgblɔm be: Amekae le ekpɔ ge? 7Woɖo nu vɔ̃ɖi ɖe ta me gblɔ be: Míewu tame nyui ɖoɖo ia nu vɔ! Ŋutsu ƒe dɔme kple eƒe dzime goglo.
8Tete Mawu te wo kple da, eye woxɔ abi enumake. 9Woawo ŋutɔ ƒe aɖe atsɔ wa aƒu anyi, eye amesiwo katã kpɔ wo la, woaʋuʋu ta. 10Tete vɔvɔ̃ aɖo amewo katã, woaɖe gbe ƒã Mɔwu ƒe nuwɔwɔ, eye woadze si eƒe nuwɔwɔ. 11Ame dzɔdzɔe ekpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe Mawu Yehowa ŋu, eye woasii atso; emesiwo katã ƒe dzi to mɔ ɖeka la, woaƒo adegbe.

Title: PSALMOWO 65
Content:
Akpedahadzidzi le Mawu ƒe dɔmenyo ta.
1Dawid ƒe ha. Ha na henɔ la.
2Mawu, kafukafuha edze wò le Zion, eye wòe woaxe adzɔgbeɖefe na. 3Eɖoa to gbedodoɖa, gbɔwòe ŋutilãwo katã woayi. 4Míaƒe vodadawo ɖo kpo ɖe mía dzi: ke ètsɔ míaƒe dzidadawo ke. 5Woayra amesi nètia, eye nèna be, wòava nɔ wò xɔxɔnuwo! Míaɖu wò ate me nu nyuiwo aɖi ƒo le wò gbedoxɔ kɔkɔe la me.
6Etsɔ nu dziŋɔwo ɖo to mí le wò dzɔdzɔenyenye la nu, míaƒe xɔname ƒe Mawu; wò amesi nye sitsoƒe na anyigba ƒe mlɔenuwo kple didiƒe ƒe atsiaƒuwo, 7amesi li kè towo zã le wò ŋusẽ me, eye nètsɔ ŋusẽ bla ali dzi, 8amesi tsi ƒu me gbeɖeɖe, ƒutsotsoewo ƒe howɔwɔ kple dukɔwo ƒe dzidodo nu, 9ne anyigba ƒe mlɔenulɔwo navɔ̃ wò dzesiwo; èna ŋdi kple fiẽ ƒe tsoƒe tso aseye.
10Eɖo ŋku anyigba dzi, eye nède tsu wòwu ko nɛ, tsi yɔ Mawu ƒe tɔʋu taŋ. Ena blii, eye ale nèwɔ anyigba lae enye si. 11Ede tsi woƒe boliƒoivo, ègbã woƒe agble me nylglãwo hetsɔ tsidzadza bɔbɔwoe; èyra woƒe numiemiewo. 12Etsɔ nu nyuiwo do atsyɔ̃ na ƒe la, eye wò afɔtoƒewo le ami dzim. 13Lãnyiƒewo le gbegbe hã le ami tsyɔm, eye togbɛwo tsɔ aseyetsotso bla ali dzii. 14Alẽwo yɔ lãnyiƒewo kpaŋ, eye bli do kpekpekpe ɖe baliwo me; wole aseye tsom le ha dzim.

Title: PSALMOWO 66
Content:
Akpedada na Mawu le dukɔ la takpɔkpɔ ŋuti.
1Ha na henɔ la.
Mí anyigbawo katã, mitso aseye na Mawu! 2Midzi ha na eƒe ŋkɔ ƒe bubu, eye mido kɔkɔe eƒe kafukafu la! 3Migblɔ na Mawu be: Ŋɔdzi le wò dɔwɔwɔ ŋu loo! Le wò ŋusẽ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ ta wò futɔwo avivi nu me na wò. 4Anyigbawo katã ade ta agu na wò, eye woadzi kafukafuha na wò, woadzi kafukafuha na wò ŋkɔ. Sela.
5Miva, ne miakpɔ Mawu ƒe dɔwɔwɔ; eya, amesi wɔ nu dziŋɔwo ɖe amegbetɔviwo ŋu! 6Etrɔ atsiaƒu wòzu ƒuƒuiƒe; afɔ wotsɔ tso tɔsisi lae; gama míekpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe eŋu le! 7Ele fia ɖum le eƒe ŋusẽ me tegbee, eƒe ŋku le tsatsam le dukɔwo dzi. Tosẽlawo megafɔ wo ɖokui ɖe dzi o! Sela.
8Mi dukɔwo, mikafu mía Mawu la, eye mina eƒe kafukafu naɖi woase! 9Eya, amesi le míaƒe luʋɔ de agbe, eye meɖe ke le míaƒe afɔ te o. 10Oo, Mawu, elabena èdo mí kpɔ, eye nèlòlo mí, abe alesi wolóloa klosalo ene. 11Etsɔ mí de ɖɔ me, eye nèdro agba ɖe ali dzi na mí. 12Ena amegbetɔwo nɔ míaƒe ta me; míedze dzo kple tɔ me, ke nèɖe mí do go heyi ablɔɖe mee.
13Matsɔ numevɔsa ava aƒewò mee, ne maxe nye adzɔgbeɖefe, 14siwo do tso nye nuyiwo me, eye nye nu gblɔ le nye hiã me la, na wò. 15Matsɔ alẽ damiwo asa numevɔ na wò akpe ɖe agbowo ƒe dzudzɔ lilili ŋu, matsɔ nyiwo kple gbɔ̃tsuwo asa vɔ na wò. Sela.
16Mi mawuvɔ̃lawo katã, miva, ne maxlẽ nusi wòwɔ na nye luʋɔ la, afia miase! 17Eya metsɔ nye nu do ɣli na, eye kafukafu le nye aɖe te na. 18Ɖe wònye ɖe meɖo nu vɔ̃ɖi ɖe nye dzi me la, anye ne Aƒetɔ la gbe toɖoɖom. 19Ke Mawu see, eye wòɖo to nye gbedodoɖa ƒe gbe. 20Woakafu Mawu, amesi megbe nye gbedodoɖa o, eye mete eƒe amenuvevem o!

Title: PSALMOWO 67
Content:
Mawu kafukafu le dukɔwo katã yayra ŋuti.
1Ha na kasaŋkuwo ƒe henɔ.
2Mawu, ve mía nu, eye nayra mí, na wò mo naklẽ na mí, Sela, 3ne woadze si wò mɔ le anyigba dzi kple wò xɔname le dukɔwo katã dome!
4Mawu, dukɔwo akafu wò, wòe dukɔwo katã woakafu. 5Anyigbadzitɔwo akpɔ dzidzɔ, eye woatso aseye, elabena wòe drɔ̃a ʋɔnu dukɔwo ɖe eteƒe, eye wòe kplɔa anyigbadzitɔwo. Sela. 6Mawu, dukɔwo akafu wò, wòe dukɔwo katã akafu. 7Anyigba mie eƒe nukuwo. Mawu, mía Mawu la, ayra mí. 8Mawu ayra mí, eye anyigba ƒe mlɔenutɔwo katã avɔ̃e.

Title: PSALMOWO 68
Content:
Dziɖuɖuha.
1Ha na henɔ la, Dawid tɔ.
2Mawu tso, eƒe futɔwo ka hlẽ, eye eƒe ketɔwo si le eŋku me. 3Abe alesi wogbɔa dzudzɔ ɖae ene la, nenema nanyã woe; alesi anyigba lólona le dzo nui la, nenema ame vɔ̃ɖiwo nu ayi le Mawu ŋku mee. 4Ke ame dzɔdzɔewo le dzidzɔ kpɔm, wole aseye tsom le Mawu ŋku me, eye wogli kple dzidzɔ. 5Midzi ha na Mawu, midzi kafukafuha na eƒe ŋkɔ! Mita mɔ na amesi tso gbedzi gbɔna; Yehowae nye eŋkɔ, eye mitso aseye le eŋku me! 6Tsyuẽviwo fofo kple ʋɔnudrɔ̃la na ahosiwo nye Mawu le eƒe nɔƒe kɔkɔe la. 7Mawu, amesi kplɔa ame tsigbewo va aƒee, eye wòkplɔa gatɔwo yia dzɔgbenyuie mee; ke tosẽlawo atsi kuɖinyigba dzi.
8Mawu, esi nèho dze wò dukɔ ŋgɔ, eye nètsa le gbegbe la, Sela, 9anyigba ʋuʋu, Sinai sia hã, le Mawu ŋku me, eye dziŋgɔ ge la le Mawu, Israel ƒe Mawu la, ŋku me. 10Mawu, èna tsi geɖe wu de wò domenyinu la dzi, èdo ŋusẽe, esime ɖeɖi te eŋu belibeli. 11Wò amehawo nɔ edzi afima, Mawu, wò dɔmenyo nètsɔ wɔe na hiãtɔwo.
12Aƒetɔ la ƒo nu, eye wòna nyɔnu du nyui xɔlawo de ha kpaŋ. 13Aʋakɔwo ƒe fiawo si, wosi, eye aƒeanɔ mã aboyonu. 14Ne míeƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe lãkpɔwo domee la, enɔna abe ahɔ̃ne ƒe aʋala, si ŋu wofa klosalo ɖo, kple eƒe fu, si ŋu sika le hẽ la ene. 15Esi ŋusẽkatãtɔ la kaka fiawo me le afima la, sno dza ɖe Zalmon dzi.
16Mawu ƒe to enye Basan-towo, to tame tsutsuẽwo nye Basan-towo. 17Mi to tame tsutsuẽwo, nukaŋuti miele to, si Mawu di be, yeatsɔ awɔ ye nɔƒee la, kpɔm ɖe ƒomevii? E, Yehowa anɔ afima tegbee! 18Mawu ƒe tasiaɖamwo le akpe nane teƒe akpe. Aƒetɔ la le wo dome. Sinai ye le kɔkɔeƒe la. 19Edzo yi dzi me ʋi, èɖe amewo aboyoe, eye nèxɔ nunana le amegbetɔwo dome. Tosẽlawo hã anɔ Mawu Yehowa gbɔ.
20Woakafu Aƒetɔ la gbeawotsyogbe! Eya, míaƒe xɔname ƒe Mawu la, le mía tsam. Sela. 21Mawu enye míaƒe xɔname ƒe Mawu, eye Yehowa, Aƒetɔ la, nya mɔnu le bu ŋu. 22Vavãe, Mawu agbã la na eƒe tutɔwo kple dzodome na amesiwo le yiyim le woƒe fɔɖiɖi me. 23Aƒetɔ la gblɔ be: Makplɔ wo atso Basan, eye makplɔ wo atso atsiaƒu gɔme, 24ne woaklɔ woƒe afɔ ɖe ʋu me, eye woƒe avũwo ƒe aɖewo nakpɔ wo tɔ gome te woƒe futɔwo ŋu.
25Mawu, wole wò azɔlime kpɔm, nye Mawu, nye fia, wole wò azɔlime kpɔm la kɔkɔeƒe la. 26Hadzilawo do ŋgɔ, saŋkuƒolawo xe megbe, eye ɖetugbi gakogoeƒolawo tsɔ wo ɖe dome. 27Mikafu Mawu. Aƒetɔ la, le takpekpewo me, mi Israel ƒe agunuviwo! 28Benyamin, si nye dɔmlɔea, nye woƒe dziɖula, Yuda-amegãwo kple woƒe ame gbogboawo, Zebulon-amegãwo kple Naftali-amegãwo.
29Mawu, ɖo wò ŋusẽ te! Oo, Mawu, li ke nusi nèwɔ na mí la! 30Le wò gbedoxɔ, si kɔ gbɔ Yerusalem ta, ŋuti fiawo atsɔ nunana va na wò. 31Blu ɖe aƒla me la kple nyitsuwo ƒe ha, siwo le dukɔwo ƒe nyiviwo dome la ta; woawo, amesiwo na wonyã avuzi le wo dzi le klosalo ta. Kaka dukɔ, siwo lɔ̃a aʋawɔwɔ la hlẽ! 32Amegãwo atso Egipte ava, eye Kus aɖe abla aɖo asi ɖe dzi na Mawu.
33Mi anyigba dzi fiaɖuƒewo, midzi ha na Mawu, midzi katukafuha na Aƒetɔ la! Sela. 34Eya, amesi le yiyim le blemadziƒowo ƒe dziƒowo; kpɔ ɖa, ana eƒe gbe, si nye gbe sesẽ la, naɖi woase, 35Mitsɔ ŋusẽ na Mawu, eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe le Israel dzi, eye eƒe ŋusẽ le alilikpowo me. 36Ŋɔdzi le Mawu ŋu le eƒe kɔkɔeƒe la; Israel ƒe Mawu la nena ŋusẽ kple kamesesẽ eƒe dukɔ la! Woakafu Mawu!

Title: PSALMOWO 69
Content:
Mawu ƒe dɔla le fukpekpe gã me.
1Dawid tɔ na henɔ la, ne woadzi ɖe „Dzogbenya“ ƒe gbe nu.
2Mawu, xa nam, elabena tsi de nye luʋɔ gbɔ! 3De ƒe agbi mim, afɔɖoƒe meli o, mege ɖe tɔ ƒe gogloƒe, eye tsi ɖɔ va to dzinye. 4Meɖo ɣli nu ti kɔ nam, eye nye gbe me xe, mele mɔ kpɔm na nye Mawu ʋuu wòti nye ŋkuwo. 5Amesiwo lém ɖe ke me yakatsyɔ la, sɔ gbɔ wu nye taɖa, eye nye futɔ alakpadala, siwo be, yewoagblẽm la, ɖe ha ŋutɔ, nusi nyemeda adzoe o la, teƒe wobe, maɖo. 6Mawu, enya nye bometsitsi, eye nye fɔɖiɖiwo meɣla ɖe wò o. 7Aƒetɔ. Yehowa Zebaot, ŋu megakpe amesiwo le mɔ kpɔm na wò la, le tanye o! Israel ƒe Mawu, amesiwo dia wò la, ƒe mo megatsi dã o! 8Elabena tawò mele vlododo tsom, eye ŋukpe tsyo nye mo ɖo. 9Mezu amedzro na nɔvinyeŋutsuwo, kple ame manyamanya na danyeviwo. 10Elabena ŋuʋaʋã ɖe wò aƒe ŋu mim, eye amesiwo le vlo dom wò la, ƒe vlodoame va dzinye. 11Mefa avi, eye metsi nu dɔ, ke ŋukpe ko wozu nam. 12Metsɔ akpanya wɔ nye avɔe, eye mezu hamelo na wo. 13Amesiwo bɔbɔ nɔ agbo nu la, le nu ƒom le ŋunye, eye ahamulawo le ha dzim deyem.
14Ke nyea medo gbe ɖa na wò, Yehowa, le amenuveɣi la; Mawu, tsɔ wò xɔname nyateƒetɔ la ɖo tom le wò amenuveve sɔgbɔ la nu! 15Ɖem tso agbi me, ne nyemagayi to o, ne mado tso nye ketɔwo si me kple tɔ goglowo me; 16ne tsi magaɖɔ ato tanye o, ne gogloƒe magamim o, eye vudo magaxe eƒe nu ɖe nunye o! 17Ɖo tom, Yehowa, elabena wò amenuveve la nyo; le wò nublanuikpɔkpɔ sɔgbɔ la nu trɔ ɖe ŋunye! 18Megaɣla wò mo ɖe wò dɔla o, elabena ŋɔdzi lém, netsɔ naɖo tom! 19Te ɖe nye luʋɔ ŋu, eye naxɔe; le nye futɔwo ta dem! 20Enya nye vlododo, ŋukpe kple dzo; ŋkuwò me nye ketɔwo katã le. 21Vlododo gba nye dzi, eye wode dɔlã me nam; mekpɔ mɔ na babadoname, ke dzodzroa, eye na akɔfalawo, gake nyemekpɔ ɖeke o. 22Wotsɔ veve nam be, maɖu, eye esi tsikɔ wum la, wokpe aha tsitsi nam.
23Woƒe kplɔ̃ netrɔ zu ɖɔ na wo, eye wòanye mɔ̃ na amesiwo ɖe dzi ɖi! 24Woƒe mo netsyɔ zi, ne womagakpɔ nu o, eye na woƒe ali nanɔ ʋaʋãm tegbee! 25Trɔ wò dɔmedzoe kɔ ɖe wo dzi, eye wò dziku heliheli nelé wo! 26Woƒe agbletawo nezu aƒedo, eye amea ɖeke meganɔ woƒe agbadɔwo me o! 27Elabena wole amesi nèƒo la, yome tim, eye amesi ŋu nède abi la, ƒe vevesesewo ŋu wole nu ƒom le. 28Tsɔ fɔɖiɖi ƒu fɔɖiɖi dzi na wo, eye megana woade wò dzɔdzɔenyenye la gbɔ o. 29Woatutu wo ɖa le agbalẽ la me, eye womegaŋlɔ wo kpe de ame dzɔdzɔewo ŋu o!
30Ke nyea mele nublanui me, eye veve ɖi tsi de ŋunye, gake Mawu, wò xɔname akɔm ɖe dzi. 31Matsɔ hadzidzi akafu Mawu ƒe ŋkɔ, eye matsɔ akpedada ado bubui. 32Eya adze Yehowa ŋu wu nyitsu, si dzo le eta, eye eƒe afɔkli me fe. 33Hiãtɔwo akpɔe, eye woɔkpɔ dzidzɔ. Mi amesiwo le Mawu dim la, miaƒe dzi negbɔ agbe! 34Elabena Yehowa ɖoa to ame dahewo, eye medoa vlo eƒe gatɔwo o. 35Dziƒo kple anyigba, atsiaƒu kpakple nusiwo katã ʋãna le eme, mikafui! 36Elabena Mawu axɔ na Zion, eye wòatso Yuda-duwo, ne woana afima, eye woanye wo tɔ. 37Eƒe dɔla ƒe viwo atsɔe anyi domee, eye amesiwo laa eƒe ŋkɔ la, woana eme.

Title: PSALMOWO 70
Content:
Kukuɖeɖe le kpekpeɖeŋu ŋuti.
1Dawid lɔ na henɔ la hena ŋkuɖoɖodzi.
2Mawu, ɖem; Yehowa, netsɔ naxɔ nam! 3Ŋu nekpe amesiwo le nye agbe yome tim la, eye woƒe mo netsi dã; amesiwo le nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e dim la, nete gbugbɔ ɖe megbe, eye ŋukpe nelé wo! 4Amesiwo le gbɔgblɔm be: Ehɛ̃, ehɛ̃! la, woatrɔ le woƒe ŋukpe la ta. 5Amesiwo katã dia wò la, ƒe dzeme nekɔ, eye woakpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe ŋuwò; eye amesiwo lɔ̃a wò xɔname le, nenɔ gbɔgblɔm ɖaa be: Mawu lolo! 6Ke nyea, nenye be, hiã tum, eye meɖo ko hã, Mawu, wò afɔ netsɔ ɖe ŋunye! Nye xɔnametɔ kple ɖenyela nenye, Yehowa, megahe ɖe megbe o!

Title: PSALMOWO 71
Content:
Mawu ƒe amenuveve biabia le amegãkuku me.
1Yehowa, wòe mesi tso, megana ŋu nakpem akpɔ gbeɖe o! 2Tsɔ wò dzɔdzɔenyenye ɖem, eye na mado le eme; ƒu to anyi ɖe ŋunye, eye naxɔ nam! 3Na woanye agakpeto nam, afisi masi ayi ɖaa; wò, amesi ɖo be, yeaxɔ nam; elabena nye agakpe kple nyee mɔ sesẽ nènye. 4Nye Mawu, ɖem tso ame vɔ̃ɖi la si me, eye naɖem tso ame vlo la kple ŋutasẽla ƒe fego me! 5Elabena wòe nye nye mɔkpɔkpɔ, Aƒetɔ Yehowa, nye nusi ŋu meɖoa ŋu ɖo tso nye ɖevime ke! 6Ŋuwò meziɔ ɖo tso danye ƒe dɔ me ke, eye danye ƒe dɔ me nèɖem tsoe, nye kafukafu enye tɔwò ɖaa. 7Nuku menye na ame geɖewo, ke wòe nye nye sitsoƒe sesẽ. 8Nye nu me yɔ fũ kple wò kafukafu, nye ŋkekewo kple wò dodoɖedzi.
9Megagbem le amegãkuɣi o, eye ne nye ŋusẽ nu yi la, megagblẽm ɖi o! 10Elabena nye futɔwo le nu ƒom le ŋunye, eye amesiwo de xa ɖe nye agbe ŋu la, le adaŋu dem kple wo nɔewo 11le gbɔgblɔm be: Mawu gblẽe ɖi, miti eyome, eye milée, elabena xɔnametɔa ɖeke meli o! 12Mawu, meganɔ adzɔge tso gbɔnye o, nye Mawu, netsɔ naxɔ nam! 13Ŋu nekpe amesiwo lé fu nye luʋɔ la, eye wo nu neyi; vlododo kple ŋukpe nenyẽ tsyɔ amesiwo le nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e dim la! 14Ke nyea manɔ mɔkpɔkpɔ dzi daa, eye madzi wò kafukafu ɖe dzi. 15Nye nu axlẽ wò dzɔdzɔenyenye afia, kple wò xɔname hã ɣesiaɣi; elabena womele xexlẽ me nam o. 16Mado kple Aƒetɔ Yehowa ƒe nutsuwɔwɔwo, eye eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ɖeɖeko mekafu.
17Mawu, èfia num tso nye ɖevime ke, eye meɖe gbe ƒã wò nukunuwo vaseɖe fifi. 18Eyata, Mawu, megagblẽm ɖi o vaseɖe nye amegãkuku kple nye wɔƒoƒo me, vaseɖe esime meɖe gbe ƒã wò alɔ na dzidzimeviwo kple wò ŋusẽ na megbeviwo katã! 19Mawu, wò dzɔdzɔenyenye kɔ de dziƒo ke; wò amesi wɔ nu gãwo, Mawu, amekae ɖe nuwò ma? 20Wò amesi na míekpɔ hiã kple dzɔgbevɔ̃e geɖe la, wò kee agbɔ agbe mí, eye nahe mí tso anyigbatu me ke ava dzii. 21Adzi nye gãnyenye ɖe dzi, eye agafa akɔ nam.
22Ekema nye hã matsɔ saŋku akafu wò le wò nyateƒe la ta, nye Mawu; maƒo gakasaŋku na wò, wò Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ. 23Nye nuyiwo kple nye luʋɔ, si nèɖe la, atso aseye, ne mele saŋku ƒom na wò. 24Nye aɖe hã aƒo nu le wò dzɔdzɔenyenye ŋu daa; elabena ŋukpe le amesiwo di nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e la, eye woƒe mo tsi dã.

Title: PSALMOWO 72
Content:
Wò fiaɖuƒe nava.
1Salomo tɔ.
Mawu, tsɔ wò ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ na fia la kple wò dzɔdzɔenyenye na flavi la! 2Adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò dukɔ ɖe eteƒe kple wò hiãtɔwo alesi dze. 3Towo kple togbɛwo netsɔ dzɔdzɔenyenye he ŋutifafa vɛ na dukɔ la!
4Atso afia na dukɔ la ƒe hiãtɔwo, axɔ na ame daheviwo, eye wòato ŋutasẽla nyanyanya. 5Ekema woavɔ̃ wò, ŋkeke alesi ɣe kple ɣleti li, tso dzidzime yi dzidzime. 6Aɖi ɖe anyi ahe tsidzadza ɖe gbe talãlàe dzi ene, abe tsi gãe ƒo anyigba ene. 7Ekema ame dzɔdzɔe la amie le eƒe ŋkekewo me, eye ŋutifafa axɔ aƒe, vaseɖe esime dzinu maganɔ anyi o.
8Aɖu fia tso atsiaƒu nu yi atsiaƒu nu, tso tɔsisi la nu ɖaseɖe anyigba ƒe mlɔenuwo ke. 9Gbegbe nɔlawo adze klo ɖe eŋku me, eye eƒe futɔwo atu mo ke me. 10Tarsis-fiawo kple ƒukpowo dzi fiawo atsa nunanawo vɛ, Saba-fiawo kple Seba-fiawo axe nudzɔdzɔ. 11Fiawo katã aɖe ta agu nɛ, eye dukɔwo katã asubɔe.
12Elabena aɖe ame dahe, si le ɣli dom, kple hiãtɔ, si xɔnametɔa ɖeke meli na o la. 13Ave hiãtɔwo kple ame dahewo nu, eye woade ame dahewo ƒe luʋɔ. 14Aɖe woƒe luʋɔ tso teteɖeanyi kple ŋutasesẽ me, eye woƒe ʋu axɔ asi le eŋku me. 15Anɔ agbe, eye woana Seba-sikae, woado gbe ɖa ɖe eta ɖaa, eye woakafui ɣesiaɣi. 16Bli aɖo kpekpekpe le anyigba dzi kple towo tame, eƒe agblemenuwo ado zi abe Libanon ene, eye woaƒo se le duwo me abe gbe le anyigba dzi ene. 17Eƒe ŋkɔ anɔ anyi tegbetegbe; ŋkeke alesi ɣe li la, eƒe ŋkɔ amie, eye amewo atsɔe ayra wo nɔewoe; dukɔwo katã akafui.
18Woakafu Yehowa Mawu, Israel ƒe Mawu la, amesi ɖeɖe ko wɔ nukunuwo! 19Woakafu eƒe ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la tegbee! Eƒe bubu ayɔ anyigba blibo la dzi fũ! Nenɔ alea, ẽ, nenɔ alea!
20Dawid, Isai vi la, ƒe gbedodoɖa wu nu.

Title: PSALMOWO 73
Content:
AGBALẼ ETƆ̃LIA.
Mawuvɔ̃la kpɔa akɔfafa le xexeame ƒe dzɔgbenyuie me.
1Asaf ƒe ha.
Nyateƒee, Mawu ƒe dɔme nyo ɖe Israel ŋu, de amesiwo ƒe dzi dza la ŋu. 2Ke nye la ekpɔtɔ ʋee nye afɔ da kloe, esusɔ vie nye afɔ ɖiɖi kloe. 3Elabena meʋã ŋu adegbeƒola, esi mekpɔ be, enyona na ame vɔ̃ɖi la. 4Womesea vevea ɖeke vaseɖe ku me o, eye woƒe ƒodo da ami. 5Amegbetɔwo ƒe hiãkpekpe mele wo ŋu o, eye womeɖea fu na wo abe amegbetɔ bubuwo ene o. 6Eyata dada enye woƒe kɔdzonu, eye wotsyɔ ŋutasesẽ abe avɔ ene. 7Woƒe ŋku do le ami me hɔ̃, eye woƒe dzimesusuwo do lululu. 8Wole alɔme ɖem le nu ƒom le nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ŋuti, wole kɔkɔƒe le nu ƒom le tetedeanyi ŋuti do ɖa. 9Wodoa woƒe nu de dziƒo, eye woƒe aɖe le tsatsam le anyigba dzi. 10Eyata amewo kplɔa wo ɖo bibibi, eye wokplɔa tsi geɖe hlohlohlo. 11Eye wole gbɔgblɔm be: Ɖe Mawu nyae, eye ɖe nunya le dziƒoʋitɔ la sia? 12Kpɔ ɖa, alea ame vɔ̃ɖiwo le, eye wolia kɔ kesinɔnuwo ɖi daa fuɖeɖea ɖeke makpɔmakpɔe.
13Nyateƒe, yakatsyɔe mene nye dzi ŋn dza, eye meklɔ nye asi ɖe fɔmaɖimaɖi me. 14E, mekpea tu gbesiagbe, eye nye tohehe li ŋdi sia ŋdi. 15Ɖe nye hã megblɔ be, maƒo nu abe woawo ke ene la, anye ne meto vo ɖe viwòwo ƒe dzidzime ŋu. 16Mebu tame, be madze si esia, hiãkame wònye le ŋkunye me, 17vaseɖe esime mege de Mawu ƒe kɔkɔeƒe la, eye melé ŋku ɖe woƒe nuwuwu ŋu. 18Nyateƒee, ètsɔ wo ɖo ɖiɖiƒe, eye nèxlã wo ɖe anyi wozu anyiglãgo. 19Ale ŋɔdzi na wotsrɔ̃ le aɖabaƒoƒo ɖeka me, wobu, eye wo nu yi! 20Aƒetɔ, ne ènyɔ la, àdo vlo woƒe nɔnɔme abe drɔ̃ekuku le nyɔnyɔ megbe ene. 21Esi dzi kum, eye nye ayikuwo ɖum la, 22mele abe bometsila ene, nunya mele tagbɔ nam o, eye meɖi lã le ŋkuwò me. 23Ke mele gbɔwò ɖaa, eye nèlé nye nuɖusi ɖe asi.
24Akplɔm le wò adaŋudede la nu, eye emegbe àxɔm ɖe gbɔwò kple bubu. 25Amekae le dziƒo nam? Nyemele naneke dim le anyigba dzi kpe ɖe ŋuwò o. 26Ne nye ŋutilã kple nye dzi nu yi hã, Mawue nye nye dzi ƒe sitsoƒe kple nye gome tegbee. 27Elabena amesiwo te ɖe aga le ŋuwò la, woegblẽ; àtsrɔ̃ amesiwo katã trɔ ʋu le yowòme la. 28Ke nye la, Mawu ƒe gbɔnyenɔnɔ enye nye dzidzɔ; meɖo ŋu ke Aƒetɔ Yehowa ŋu, ne maxlẽ eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo katã afia.

Title: PSALMOWO 74
Content:
Nuxaxa le kɔkɔeƒe la gbegbe ŋuti.
1Asaf ƒe nufiameha.
Mawu, nukaŋuti nègbe mí ɖikaa, eye wò dɔmedzoe le adzudzɔ tum ɖe wò lãnyiƒe ƒe lãhɔwo ŋu? 2Ɖo ŋku wò ameha, si nèxɔ ƒle le blema, eye nèɖe, be natsɔ awɔ domenyinu na ɖokuiwò, kple Zion-to, si dzi nèle la dzi! 3De wò afɔ yi gli gbagbã ɖikaɖikawo gbɔ! Futɔ la gblẽ nuwo katã le kɔkɔeƒe la. 4Wò ketɔwo le xɔxlɔ̃m le wò takpeƒewo titina, eye woɖo woƒe dzesiwo, ne woanye dzesiwo. 5Ele abe amea ɖe, si kɔ fia dzi le ave dodo me, 6eye wòtsɔ fia kple zu gbã eƒe ati, siwo katã ŋu wowɔ aɖaŋu do la ene. 7Wotɔ dzo wò kɔkɔeƒe la, wogblẽ kɔ ɖo na wò ŋkɔ ƒe nɔƒe la vaseɖe anyigba ke, 8hele gbɔgblɔm le woƒe dzi me be: Mina míate wo katã ɖe anyi! Wotɔ dzo takpeƒe kɔkɔewo katã. 9Míele míaƒe dzesiwo kpɔm o; nyagblɔɖilaa ɖeke megali o, eye amea ɖeke mele mía dome anya ɣesiɣi wòava ase ɖo o.
10Mawu, ɣekaɣi ketɔ la anɔ vlo dom, eye futɔ la anɔ alɔme ɖem le wò ŋkɔ ŋu ɖikaa ase do? 11Nukaŋuti nèhe wò asi kple wò nuɖusi de megbe? Doe ɖa tso wò akɔnu nagblẽ nu!
12Ke Mawue nye fianye tso blema ke, amesi wɔ xɔnamedɔwo le anyigba dzi. 13Etsɔ wò ŋusẽ mã atsiaƒu me ɖe eve, eye nègbã bosowo ƒe ta le tɔwo dzi. 14Egbã lo ƒe ta, eye nètsɔe wɔ nuɖuɖu na gbegbenɔlawo ƒe amehawo. 15Wòe na tsidzɔƒewo kple lɔʋuwo si, eye nèna tɔsisi gãwo mie. 16Tɔwòe nye ŋkeke, eye tɔwòe nye zã, wòe ɖo kekeli kple ɣe. 17Wòe de anyigba ƒe liƒowo katã, eye wòe wɔ dzomeŋɔli kple vuvɔŋɔli.
