Ame dzi dede le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ me menyo o. 24Amesi gblɔna na fɔɖila be: „Tɔwò dzɔ“ la, dukɔwo aƒo fi adee, eye anyigbadzitɔwo ado ɖiŋu nɛ. 25Ke amesiwo hea to la, yayra ava wo dzi fu. 26Amesi doa nya ŋu tututu la ƒe nuyi wiogbugbɔna. 27Wɔ wò dɔwo le xexe, eye nade wò agble, emegbe hafi natu xɔ. 28Meganye ɖasefo de nɔviwò ŋu dzodzro o, eye megatsɔ wò nuyiwo da alakpae o. 29Megagblɔ be; „Alesi wòwɔm la, nenema mawɔe, eye made eteƒe na ame le eƒe nuwɔwɔ nu“ o! 30Mele kuviatɔ ƒe agble kple ame manyanu ƒe weingble ŋu yi. 31Eye kpɔ ɖa aŋɔka yɔ eme taŋ, gbe to ɖe eme, eye eƒe kpegliwo mũ. 32Tete meɖe ŋku ɖee, eye wòde dzi gbɔ nam, mekpɔe, eye wòzu nuxaxlɔ̃ nam: 33„Madɔ alɔ̃ vie, madɔ akɔlɔ̃e vie, made asi asitɛ me, ne magbɔ ɖe eme“ la, 34ahedada ɖe wòƒona ɖe ame dzi abe mɔzɔla ene, eye hiã abe ŋutsu, si bla akpa ene.

Title: LODODOWO 25
Content:
Bubu vavãtɔ enye nunya ƒe fetu.
1Lododo siawo hã nye Salomo tɔ, eye Yuda-fia Xiskiya ƒe ŋutsuwoe ƒo wo nu ƒu.
2Mawu ƒe bubue wònye be, wòaɣla nya, eye fiawo ƒe bubu wònye be, woadzro nye me. 3Alesi dziƒo kɔ, eye anyigba gogloe la, nenema fiawo ƒe dzimedzodzro meli o. 4Ne woɖe aŋuka ɖa le klosalo ŋu le ekema edzana keŋkeŋ. 5Ne woɖe ame vɔ̃ɖi ɖa le fia ŋku me la, ekema dzɔdzɔenyenye ali ke eƒe fiazikpui. 6Megadi bubu na ɖokuiwò le fia ŋku me o, eye megatsi tre ɖe ame ŋkutawo nɔƒe o; 7elabena ne wogblɔ na wò be: „Te va dzi gome!“ enye wu esi woabɔbɔ wò de anyi le bubume, si nékpɔ hafi la ŋku me.
8Megatsi klokloklo dzi de dzrewɔwɔ ŋu o, elabena nuka nawɔ emegbe, ne hawòvi do ŋukpe wòa? 9Wɔ wò ŋutɔ wò dzre kple hawòvi; ke megaʋu go ame tutɔ ƒe enya ɣaɣla, 10ne amesi see la, nana dzuwòm, eye ŋkɔ vɔ̃e natsi ŋuwò o. 11Nya, si wogblɔ de egblɔɣi la, sikatɔtɔŋuti wònye le klosalogba me. 12Nuxlɔ̃la nyanu enye sikasigɛ kple kɔgɛ, si wotsɔ sika nyuitɔ tui la, na to senu. 13Alesi sno fa le nuŋeɣi la, nenema dɔla nuteƒewɔla le na amesi dɔe, eye wòfaa dzi na eƒe aƒetɔ. 14Amesi doa nunana ŋugbe ƒuƒlu la, le abe tsie ɖo ya le ƒoƒom, gake tsi gbe dzadza ene. 15Dzigbɔɖie xɔa nu le fia si, eye aɖe tafɛ gbãa ƒuwo. 16Nu èkpɔ anyitsi la, noe ɖe wò dɔ nu, ne megati wò, eye wòado le nuwò emegbe o. 17Meganɔ afɔ ƒom hawòvi ƒe me, ne wò nu nagati kɔ nɛ, eye wòalé fu wò o. 18Amesi ɖia aʋatsoɖase le ehavi ŋu la, zũ kple yi kpakple aŋutrɔ ɖaɖɛ wònye. 19Dziɖoɖo ɖe ame mawɔnuteƒe ŋu le hiãɣi le abe aɖu nyonyo kple afɔ, si te ke mele o ene. 20Amesi le ha dzim na dzi xanu la, le abe amesi ɖe avɔ ɖi le vuvɔŋɔli, eye abe ahaƒãe wokɔ ɖe adzalẽɖaɖi dzi ene. 21Ne dɔ le wò ketɔ wum la, na aboloe wòaɖu, eye ne tsikɔ le ewum la, na tsii wòano; 22elabena dzoka ƒom nèle ƒu ɖe eƒe ta me, eye Yehowa aɖo eteƒe na wò. 23Anyieheya hea tsidzadza vɛ, nenemae ame ŋu liɖe nana mo vena heliheli. 24Enyo, ne woana dzogoe dzi le xɔta, wu ne nyɔnu nyawɔla nanɔ aƒe me kple ame. 25Nya nyui xɔxɔ tso duta le abe tsi fafɛ na amesi ƒe ve me ƒu la ene. 26Ame dzɔdzɔe, si ke ɖe le ete le ame vɔ̃ɖi ŋku me la, le abe tsidzidzi bublu kple vuɖo kpɔtɔ̃ ene. 27Anyitsi geɖe nono menyo o; ke nya sesẽwo me dzodzro enye bubu. 28Amesi mate ŋu aɖu eƒe gbɔgbɔ dzi o la, le abe du, si wogbã gli le eŋu, wòtsi nuvo ene.

Title: LODODOWO 26
Content:
Bometsilawo, kuviatɔwo kple ame wɔnutovowo madze na bubu o.
1Bubu medze bometsila o, abe sno le dzomeŋɔli kple tsidzadza le nuŋeɣi ene. 2Alesi atsutsure dzena, eye sagbadre saa agbae la, nenema nye tiƒoƒo de ame naneke mawɔmawɔ. 3Sɔƒoka li na sɔ, numega li na tedzi, bometsila ƒe medome tae nye ati. 4Megado nya ŋu na bometsila ɖe eƒe bometsitsi nu, ne wò hã nasɔ kplii o. 5Ɖo eŋu na bometsila ɖe eƒe bometsitsi nu, ne magabu eɖokui nunyalae o. 6Amesi dea du asi na bometsila la, lãa eya ŋutɔ ƒe afɔ, eye wògblẽa eɖokui ɖome. 7Alesi ata tu ɖe xɔɖrɔ̃ ŋu ɣleɖee la, nenema nunyagbe nɔa nu me na bometsilae. 8Ne woɖe bubu bometsila ŋu la, ele abe kpe wobla ɖe akafo me ene. 9Alesi ŋu nɔa ahamula si mee la, nenema nunyagbe nɔa nu me na bometsila. 10Nu geɖe wotsɔna kpɔa nui fũ, ke bometsila ƒe fetu kple fetuanala ŋutɔ woatsrɔ̃. 11Alesi avũ trɔna ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe xeɖeɖe ŋui la, nenema bometsila gbugbɔa eƒe bometsinu wɔnae. 12Ele ŋutsu, si le eɖokui bum nunyalae la kpɔma? Mɔkpɔkpɔ le bometsila ŋu wu eyama.
13Kuviatɔ be: Gbeɖela le xexe, dzata le kpɔdome. 14Alesi ʋɔtru trona le eƒe megbega me la, nenema nye kuvlatɔ le aba dzi. 15Ne kuviatɔ de asi agba me la, edede nu me nyea dɔ nɛ. 16Kuviatɔ bua eɖokui nunyalae wu ame adre, siwo ɖoa nya ŋu ɖe nunya me. 17Amesi dzre metsɔ egbɔ nya o, hafi wòku dzi nɛ la, ele to na avũ, si tso me yina. 18Alesi ŋɔdzo me nuwɔla daa akakati bibi kple aŋutrɔ hewua nui la, 19nenema nye ŋutsu, si blea ehavi, eye wògblɔna be: Fefem nye mele!
20Ne nake vɔ la, dzo tsina; eye ne sakplitɔ meli o la, ɖoɖoe zina le dzrewɔwɔ nu. 21Aka nyia dzo, eye nake doa dzo, nenema ŋutsu dzretɔ traa dzre ɖoe. 22Sakplitɔ ƒe nyawo le abe nuɖuɖu vivi ene, eye wodea keke dɔ me ke. 23Nugbugbɔ xɔdzo, si ŋu dzi vɔ̃ɖi kpe ɖo la, le abe senu gaglɛ, si ŋu wofa klosaloŋuka ɖo ene. 24Ketɔ la tsɔ eƒe nuyiwo trɔa eɖokui bubui, ke alakpa le eƒe dzi me. 25Ne eƒe gbe vivina ha la, megaɖo dzi ɖe eŋu o, elabena ŋunyɔnu adre le eƒe dzi me. 26Ne fuléle ɣla ɖe beble me ha la, aɖi go le dutoƒo. 27Amesi ɖe ʋe la, eya ŋutɔ adze eme, eye kpe age adze emlila dzi. 28Alakpaɖe léa fu amesiwo dome wògblẽ keŋkeŋ la, eye nu zɔzrɔ̃e hea gbegblẽ vɛ.

Title: LODODOWO 27
Content:
Nuxɔxlɔ̃ le ɖokuikafukafu kple dzidzi dze ŋuti.
1Megaƒo adegbe ɖe etsɔ, si gbɔna ŋu o, elabena mènya nuka dzi ge etsɔ ala o. 2Ame bubu nekafu wò, eye menye wò ŋutɔ wò nu o, ame tutɔ, eye menye wò nuyiwo o. 3Kpe la, nu kpekpee, eye ke la, agbae; ke bometsila ƒe dziku kpena wu wo ame eve la. 4Dziku la, nu nyayrãe, eye dɔmedzoe dzea agbo; ke ameka ale ŋu anɔ te ɖe ŋuʋaʋã nu? 5Mokaka ɖe mo na ame kaŋ enyo wu amelɔlɔ̃ le adza me. 6Xɔlɔ̃ ƒe abidede ame ŋu medze vɔ̃ o; ke ketɔwo ƒe nugbugbɔ sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ! 7Ƒoɖilae zɔa anyitsi me, ke dɔwuitɔ la nu vevewo katã vivia enu. 8Ŋutsu, si si tso wo de la, le abe xevi, si si tso eƒe atɔ me ene. 9Ami kple dzudzɔ ʋeʋẽe donu doa dzidzɔ na dzi; xɔlɔ̃ ƒe nya vivi nyo wu ame ŋutɔ ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖo. 10Megagblẽ xɔ̃wò kple fofowò xɔlɔ̃ ɖi o; gbesigbe hiã tu wò la, megade nɔviwò ƒe me o; aƒelika, si te ɖe ame ŋu, nyo wu ame nɔvi le adzɔge. 11Vinye, dze nunya, be nado dzidzɔ na nye dzi, ne mate ŋu aɖo nya ŋu na amesiwo le alɔme ɖem le ŋunye. 12Ne nunyala kpɔ dzɔgbevɔ̃e la, eɣlaa eɖokui; ke ame bebewuwo dea ta eme, eye wòle na wo be, woakpɔ wo tɔnua. 13Ɖe avɔ le eŋu, elabena eƒu asi akɔ ɖe ame bubu nu, eye natsɔe aɖo awɔba le ame tutɔ ta. 14Amesi yra ehavi ŋdi kanya asi madetsimee kple ɣli la, woabui fiƒoɖe nɛ. 15Betrɔ, si nɔa ɖuɖu dzi ɖaa, ne tsi ga le dzadzam la, kple nyɔnu nyawɔla wosɔ; 16amesi be, yeatsi enu la, ya nu wòbe, yeatsi, eye ɖe wòbe, yeatsɔ yeƒe nuɖusi aku amii. 17Alesi wotsɔa ga nyrea gae la, nenema ame nyrea nɔviae. 18Amesi kpɔa eƒe gboti dzi la, aɖu eƒe kutsetse; nenema ke amesi dzɔa eƒe aƒetɔ ŋu la, woade bubu eŋu. 19Alesi ŋku me ɖla ŋku me le tsi mee la, nenema amegbetɔ ƒe dzi sɔna ɖe amegbetɔ tɔ ŋui. 20Tsieƒe kple aʋli me maɖi ƒo akpɔ o; nenema amegbetɔ ƒe ŋku hã maɖi ƒoe o. 21Sonu ɖe klosalo ŋu, eye kpo ɖe sika ŋu, nenema ŋutsu le ɖe eƒe ŋkɔxɔxɔ ŋui. 22Ne èɖe bometsila kple bli to me hetsɔ tati toe la, eƒe bometsitsi mado le eŋu akpɔ o ɖe!
23Wò alẽwo ƒe nɔnɔme nenɔ nyanya na wò, eye lé ŋku ɖe wò lãhawo ŋu; 24elabena kesinɔnu menɔa anyi ɖaa o, alo ɖe fiakuku noa anyi na dzidzimeawo katãa? 25Ne gbe megali o, eye gbe fewo to, eye woƒo gbe nu ƒu le towo dzi la, 26ekema alẽviwo nye avɔ na wò, eye gbɔ̃tsuwo nye ho natsɔ aƒle agblee; 27gbɔ̃notsi sɔ gbɔ na wò nuɖuɖu kple aƒewòmetɔwo ƒe nuɖuɖu kpakple wo dɔlanyɔnuwo ƒe nunyiame.

Title: LODODOWO 28
Content:
Mawuvɔvɔ̃ kple nu nyui wɔwɔ yayra, mawumavɔ̃mavɔ̃ mayramaɣra.
1Amea ɖeke menyãa ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ɖe nu, hafi wosina o; ke ame dzɔdzɔewo ɖea dzi ɖi abe dzatavi ene. 2Anyigbadzitɔwo ƒe vodadawo nana emegãwo sɔ gbɔna, eye to nugɔmesela nyanu ɖeka dzi nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ nɔa anyi dedie. 3Amegã, si te ame dahewo de anyi la, le ahe tsidzadza, si de anyigba, eye mehe nuɖuɖu vɛ o ene. 4Amesiwo ɖe asi le se la ŋu la, kafua ame vɔ̃ɖiwo, ke amesiwo dzraa se ɖo la, dzea agbo ɖe wo ŋu. 5Nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔlawo mesea nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ gɔme o, ke amesiwo dia Yehowa la, sea nuwo katã gɔme. 6Ame dahe, si fɔɖiɖi mele eƒe zɔzɔme ŋu o la, nyo wu kesinɔtɔ, si zɔa mɔ gɔglɔ̃ dzi. 7Amesi dzraa se ɖo la, vi nyanue; ke amesi tsoa nutsuɖuɖu ɖoa dɔe la, dea ŋukpe fofoa ŋu. 8Amesi lsɔa demexɔxɔ kple kasaɖiɖi dzia eƒe kesinɔnuwo ɖe edzii la, ele nu tum ɖo na amesi vea eme dahewo nu. 9Amesi ɖe to ɖa, be yemase se o la, eƒe gbedodoɖa ke hã nye ŋunyɔ. 10Amesi ble nuteƒewɔlawo yi mɔ vɔ̃ɖi dzi la, eya ŋutɔ age adze eƒe ɖo me; ke fɔmaɖilawo anyi nu nyui ƒe dome. 11Kesinɔtɔ bua eɖokui nunyalae; ke ame dahe nugɔmesela le egɔme kpɔm. 12Ne ame dzɔdzɔewo le aseye tsom la, atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo teƒe mekɔna o; ke ne ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe alɔ de dzi la, amewo kpɔkpɔ nyea dɔ. 13Amesi tsɔ nu tsyɔ eƒe vodada dzi la, madze edzi nɛ o; ke amesi ʋu eme, eye wòdzudzɔe la, woave enu. 14Woayra ŋutsu, si le vɔvɔ̃ dzi daa, ke amesi sẽ eƒe dzi me goŋgoŋ la, adze dzɔgbevɔ̃e me. 15Ame vɔ̃ɖi si le dukɔ dahe dzi ɖum la, le abe dzata ɖegbe kple sisiblisi dɔwui ene. 16Amegã, si ɖo ko le gɔmesese me la, ameteteɖeanyi bɔ ɖe esi; amesi lé fu amebaba la, anɔ agbe didie.
17Amesi dzi hlɔ̃fe le, ne esi vaseɖe aʋli me ke hã, amea ɖeke megalée o! 18Amesi fɔɖiɖi mele eƒe zɔzɔme ŋu o la, woakpe ɖe eŋu; ke amesi toa mɔ gɔglɔ̃ dzi la, adze anyi zi ɖeka 19Amesi ɖe eƒe agble la, nuɖuɖu abɔ ɖe esi; ke amesi ti yakanuwo yome la, ahedada ado gã ɖe edzi. 20Woayra nuteƒewɔla geɖe; ke amesi tsi klokloklo ɖe hokpɔkpɔ ŋu la, womagbe tohehe nɛ o.
21Amedzidede menyo o, abolo kakɛ pɛ hã ana ame dada vo. 22Ŋubiala le yɔyɔm ɖe kesinɔnu ŋu; ke menyae be, hiã le ye dzi va ge o. 23Amesi ka mo na ame la, axɔ akpe emegbe wu amesi ɖe ami ɖe eƒe aɖe. 24Amesi da adzo fofoa kple ɖaɖaa hegblɔ be: Menye nuvɔ̃a ɖeke o la! nugblẽlawo ƒe hati wònye. 25Ŋubiala ɖɔa dzre, ke amesi ɖoa dzi ɖe Yehowa ŋu la, woaɖi ƒo nɛ taŋ. 26Amesi ɖoa dzi ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe gɔmesese ŋu la, bometsilae; ke amesi zɔna le nunya me la, woaɖee. 27Amesi naa nu ame dahe la, hiã matui akpɔ o, ke amesi trɔa mo ɖe aga la, woaɖo ɖiŋu geɖe nɛ. 28Ne ame vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe alɔ ɖe dzi la, amewo ɣlaa wo ɖokui; ke ne wotsrɔ̃ la, ame dzɔdzɔewo dzina ɖe dzi.

Title: LODODOWO 29
Content:
Nunya hea vayra vanɛ, ke bometsitsi kple nuvɔ̃ wɔa gbegblẽ.
1-2Amesi woka mo na zi geɖe, ke wòsẽ la me la, agbã zi ɖeka gudugudu, eye gbedada manɔ eŋu o. Ne ame dzɔdzɔewo dzi de dzi la, dukɔ kpɔa dzidzɔ; ke ne ame vɔ̃ɖi le fia ɖum la, dukɔ dua tse. 3Amesi lɔ̃a nyateƒe la, doa dzidzɔ na fofoa, ke amesi doa ka kple gbolowo la, gblẽa kesinɔnuwo dome. 4Dza dzɔenyenye fia tsɔna lia ke anyigba; ke adzɔxɔla gblẽnɛ. 5Amesi vivia nu me na ehavi la, eɖoa ɖɔ na eƒe afɔ. 6Mɔ̃tetre le vodada me na nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔlawo; ke ame dzɔdzɔe atso aseye, eye wòakpɔ dzidzɔ. 7Ame dzɔdzɔe nyaa ame dahèwo ƒe nya me na wo, ke ame vɔ̃ɖi masea sidzedze gome o. 8Fewuɖulawo ƒlɔa dzo ɖe ɖu ŋu, ke nunyala faa dɔmedzoe nu. 9Ne bometsila kple nunyala woɖo nya me la, eɖoa dɔmedzoe nɔa nu kom, eye mekpɔa gbɔdzɔe o. 10Hlɔ̃dola léa fu ame maɖifɔwo, eye wòdia nuteƒewɔlawo ƒe agbe yome. 11Bometsila dudua eƒe dɔmedzoe katã kɔna ɖi; ke nunyala la enu emegbe. 12Dziɖula, si ɖoa to alakpanya la, ame vɔ̃ɖiwo nye eƒe dɔlawo katã. 13Ame dahe kple ameteɖeanyila wodoa go wo nɔewo; amesi nana woa kple eve la ƒe ŋku dzi kɔna la, enye Yehowa. 14Fia, si drɔ̃a ʋɔnu na ame dahewo le nyateƒe me la, eƒe fiazikpui ali ka tegbee. 15Ati kple mokaname dzea nunya ame, ke ɖevi tsibodome dea ŋukpe mo na dadaa. 16Ne ame vɔ̃ɖiwo dzi ɖe dzi la, vodada dzina ɖe edzi; ke ame dzɔdzɔewo akpɔ woƒe anyidzedze ɖa. 17He to na viwò, ekema ana gbɔɖeme wò, eye wòado vivi na wò luʋɔ. 18Ne nyagblɔɖi meli o la, dukɔ tsia bodome; ke ne edzra sea ɖo la, woayrae. 19Wometsɔa nya hea to na kluvi o, elabena esenɛ hafi gbea toɖoɖo. 20Ele ŋutsu, si tsi klokloklo dzi le nuƒoƒo me la, kpɔma? Mɔkpɔkpɔ le bometsila ŋu wu eyama. 21Ne amea ɖe wɔ vinugbee ne eƒe kluvi tso ɖevime ta, ava ɖu aƒetɔ emegbe. 22Dɔmedzoetɔ dea dzre aƒe, eye dzikutɔ ɖaa vo geɖe. 23Amegbetɔ ƒe dãda abɔbɔe ɖe anyi, ke amesi bɔbɔ eɖokui ɖe anyi la ƒe asi asu bubu dzi. 24Amesi woa kple fiafitɔ womã nu, eye wòse ɖiŋudodo, gake metoe o la, ele fu eya ŋutɔ ƒe agbe. 25Amegbetɔvɔvɔ̃ mɔ̃e wònye ɖea eme; ke amesi doa dzi de Yehowa ŋu la, woakpɔ eta. 26Ame geɖewo wɔa nu, be woadze amegã ŋu; ke Yehowa gbɔe ame ƒe afiatsotso tsona. 27Nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔla enye ŋunyɔ na ame dzɔdzɔewo, eye amesi ƒe zɔzɔme to mɔ ɖeka la, enye ŋunyɔ na ame vɔ̃ɖi.

Title: LODODOWO 30
Content:
Agur ƒe emenunu.
1Agur, Yake vi ƒe nyawo. Ŋutsu la ƒe gbe enye si. Meku kutri, Mawu, meku kutri, eye nunye yi. 2Elabena medzɔ la wu amesiame, eye amegbetɔ ƒe gɔmesese mele asinye o, 3eye nyemesrɔ̃ nunya, be madze si kɔkɔetɔ la o. 4Ameka lia yi dziƒo gaɖi va anyi? Ameka lɔ ya ɖe asiʋlo me? Ameka bla tsi ɖe avɔ me? Ameka ɖo anyigba ƒe mlɔenuwo katã tsitrenu? Eŋkɔ ɖe, eye aleke woyɔna na via? Enyaea? 5Mawu ƒe nuƒoƒowo katã me dza; akpoxɔnu wònye na amesiwo sii tso la. 6Megatsɔ nyaa ɖeke kpe eƒe nyawo, ne wòade ga nu na wò, eye nanye aʋatsotɔ atsi anyi ɖi o.
Agur le kukeɖeɖe.
7Nu eve biam mele wò, megatem, hafi maka o. 8Alakpa kple aʋatsokaka neƒo asa nam! Megana ahedada kple hotsuim o; na maɖu nye nusi nyee tɔnye, 9ne nyemagaɖi ƒo akpa ahasẽ nu agblɔ bena: „Amekae nye Yehowa hã“ o; eye ne nyemagaɖo ko ayi fi fi ge ahaɖa aƒu ɖe nye Mawu ƒe ŋkɔ ŋu o.
10Megali dɔla ŋu le eƒe aƒetɔ gbɔ, ne woado ɖiŋu na wò, eye fɔɖiɖi nanɔ dziwò o.
11Dzidzime, si doa ɖiŋu na fofoa, eye meyraa dadaa o la, 12nenema nye dzidzime, si buna be, yedza, gake mele eƒe ɖiƒoƒo kpɔm o; 13nenema nye dzidzime, si ta ŋku kɔkɔ le, eye eƒe aɖahawo ɖe dzi; 14nenema nye dzidzime, si ƒe aɖuwo nye yi, eye eƒe tsyowo nye hɛ, ne woaɖu hiãtɔwo ɖa le anyigba dzi kple ame dahewo ɖa le amegbetɔwo dome.
15Nyɔnuvi eve le axɔ̃ si: Tsɔe vɛ, tsɔe vɛ! Nu etɔ̃e meɖia ƒo gbeɖe o, eye enelia megblɔna be, esɔ gbɔ o: 16Tsiẽƒe, nyɔnu ƒe dɔ tsiko, kple anyigba, si tsi meɖia kɔ na o, kpakple dzo, si megblɔna be: esɔ gbɔ gbɔ o.
17Ŋku, si ɖea alɔme le fofoa ŋu, eye mebua dada ɖe naneke me o la, akpaviãwo ahoe le to me le tɔʋu to, eye hɔ̃viwo aɖui.
18Nu etɔ̃e nye nuku nam, eye enelia la nyemenya ta le enu o: 19Hɔ̃ toƒe le dziƒo, ɖa toƒe le agakpe dzi, ʋu loƒe le atsiaƒu titina kpakple ŋutsu toƒe le nyɔnuvi ŋu.
20Alea nye gbolɔ toƒe hã; eɖua nu tutua nu xalixali gblɔna be: Nyemewɔ nu baɖaa ɖeke o. 21Nu etɔ̃e nana anyigba dzona kpekpekpe, eye enelia mele tsɔtsɔ me nɛ o. 22Ne kluvi zu fia, ne nuɖuɖu bɔ ɖe bometsila si, 23ne nyɔnu tsi tre heva ɖe srɔ̃ emegbe kple ne dɔlanyɔnu ɖo alɔgo eƒe aƒenɔ do ɖa.
24Nu enee nye suetɔwo le anyigba dzi, ke wodze nunya eteƒe mekɔ o: 25Anyidiwo menye dukɔ sesẽa ɖeke o hafi, gake wodia woƒe nuɖuɖu le dzomeŋɔli; 26hotoklolowo menye dukɔ sẽŋua ɖeke o, gake wowɔa woƒe nɔƒe ɖe agakpewo me; 27fiaa ɖeke mele ʋetsuviwo nu o, ke woƒe ha blibo la yina le ɖoɖo me, 28woate ŋu alé xɔ ŋu nyatri kple asi, gake enaa fiasãwo me.
29Nu etɔ̃e zɔa atsyɔ̃zɔli, eye enelia zɔa fiazɔli: 30dzata, si nye kalẽtɔ le lãwo dome, eye metrɔa megbe dea naneke o, 31aʋawɔsɔ kple gbɔ̃tsu kpakple fia, si nu womate ŋu anɔ te ɖo o.
32Ne ètsi bome le ɖokuiɖoɖoɖedzi me la, ekema ɖo asi nu, nenye be, nèdze nunya. 33Elabena, ne woƒo notsi le eye ami dona, ne wofiã ŋɔti sesie la, eye ʋu dona, eye ne wofiã dɔmedzoe sesie la, eye dzre dzɔna.

Title: LODODOWO 31
Content:
Dadaa ɖe ƒe mɔnufiafia fiaa ɖe.
1Fia Lemuel ƒe nyawo nye esi, nya, siwo dadaa ku ɖe to me nɛ: 2Oo vinye, oo nye dɔmevi, oo nye adzɔgbeɖeɖe ƒe vi! 3Megatsɔ wò ŋusẽ na nyɔnuwo o kple wò zɔzɔme na nyɔnu fiagblèlawo o! 4Lemuel, menye fiawo ƒe dɔ o, wein nono menye fiawo ƒe dɔ o, eye aha muame menye amegãwo ƒe dɔ o! 5Ne magano aha aŋlɔ se la be, eye wòatrɔ gbo nya na hiãtɔwo katã o! 6Ke boŋ mitsɔ aha muame na amesiwo do tsɔtsrɔ̃ ƒe etua nu kple wein na nuxala, 7ne wòanoe, eye wòaŋlɔ eƒe ahedada be, eye eƒe ŋku nadzo le hiãkame dzi!
8Ke wò nu de aɖetututɔwo nu kple ɖe dzɔgbevɔ̃etɔwo katã ƒe nye nu! 9Ke wò nu natso efia ɖe eteƒe, eye nadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na hiãtɔwo kple ame dahewo!
Nyɔnu nu dzeame wɔla ƒe kafukafu.
10Amekae akpɔ nyɔnu zazɛ̃? Eƒe asime sẽ wu adzagba tɔ. 11Srɔ̃a ɖoa dzi ɖe eŋu, eye nuwo kpɔkpɔ mavee o. 12Ewɔa nyuie nɛ, eye menye vɔ̃ o, le eƒe agbe me ŋkekewo katã me. 13Edia ɖetifu kple anazi, eye eƒe asiwo wɔa ɖɔ kple dzidzɔ. 14Ele abe esiʋu ene, eye wòhea nuɖuɖu tso didiƒe vɛ. 15Ne ŋu mekpɔ ke haɖe o la, efɔna, eye wònaa nuɖuɖu eƒemetɔwo kple eƒe dɔlanyɔnuwo tɔ gome wo. 16Ebua la me le agble ŋu, eye wòƒlenɛ ka; eƒe asi ƒe kutsetse wòtsɔna ɖea weingblee. 17Etsɔa ŋusẽ blaa ali dzii, eye wòdoa ŋusẽ eƒe alɔwo. 18Edzea sii be, yeƒe asitsatsa nyo; eƒe akaɖi metsina le zã mee. 19Edoa asi ɖa léa afi, si ŋu wodoa ɖetifu ɖo, eye eƒe asibiɖewo léa keke. 20Edoa eƒe asi ɖe hiãtɔwo, eye wòkea eƒe abɔ me na ame dahewo. 21Mevɔna ɖe eƒe aƒe nu le vuvɔ ta o, elabena wotsyɔ kuntru dzi na eƒe aƒemetɔwo. 22Elɔ̃a kuntruwo na eɖokui, aklala kple aɖahɛ nye eƒe avɔtata. 23Wonyaa srɔ̃a, ne eya kple anyigba dzi ame tsitsiwo wole ʋɔnuɖrɔ̃ƒe. 24Etɔa awutewui hedzrana, eye asitsalawo xɔa alidziblanuwo tsoa egbɔe. 25Ŋusẽ kple atsyɔ̃ nye eƒe ava, eye ŋkeke ɖia kokoe nɛ. 26Ekea eƒe nu kple nunya, eye nufiame fafɛwo le eƒe aɖe dzi. 27Eléa ŋku de nuwɔwɔwo ŋu le eƒe me, eye meɖua kuviabolo o. 28Viaŋutsuwo tsona heyranɛ; srɔ̃a kafunɛ be: 29„Nyɔnu zazɛ̃ geɖewo li; ke wòa èƒo wo katã ta!“ 30Nyonyo le alakpae, eye tugbedzedze la, yae; nyɔnu, si vɔ̃a Yehowa le, ele be, woakafui. 31Mitsɔ eƒe esi ƒe kutsetse nɛ, eye eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo akafui le dua me!

Title: NYAGBLƆLA 1
Content:
Anyigba dzi nuwo katã ƒe dzodzronyenye.
1Nyagblɔla, amesi nye Dawid vi, fia le Yerusalem la ƒe nyawo nye esi:
2Nyagblɔla be: Toflokowo ƒe tofloko, toflokowo ƒe toflokoe; nusianu enye tofloko! 3Viɖe ka emegbelɔ kpɔna tsoe eƒe agbagba, siwo katã wòdzena le ɣea te la mea? 4Dzidzime nu yina, eye bubu vana; ke anyigba ya li tegbee. 5Ɣe dzena, eya ɣe ɖoa to, eye wòɖea abla yia enɔƒe, afisi wòdzena tsona. 6Ya ɖoa ta: dziehe, etrɔna yia anyiehe, eye wògatrɔna vaa afisi wotso. 7Towo katã sina yia atsiaƒu me, ke etsiaƒu meyɔna gbeɖe o; afisi towo sina yina la, afima woyina ɖaa. 8Nuwo kalã le agbagbadzedze dzi, emegbelɔ mele ŋu aƒo nu le wo ŋu avɔe o; nukpɔkpɔ meɖia ƒo na ŋku o, eye nusese meyɔa to o. 9Nusi nɔ anyi va yi la, eya kae gbɔna anyi nɔ ge, eye nusi dzɔ va yi la, eya kae gbɔba dzɔdzɔ ge; ale nu ye yea ɖeke mele ɣea te o. 10Ne nane to, eye amewo be: „Mikpɔ ɖa, nu yeyea ɖe to“ la, edzɔ do ŋgɔ na mi gbaɖegbe ke. 11Ŋku dzo le blematɔwo dzi, nenema ke amesi gbɔna dzadza ge hã, wo yometɔwo maɖo ŋku wo dzi o.
12Nye, nyagblɔla, meɖu fia ɖe Israel dzi le Yerusalem. 13Meɖo nye ta me anyi, be matsɔ nunya adzro nusiwo kalã dzɔna le dziƒoa te la me akpa, eye makpɔ wo ta ɖa. Agbagbadzedze vɔ̃e wònye Mawu tsa na amegbetɔviwo, ne woatsɔ ana kutri kumi. 14Mele ŋku ɖe nusiwo katã wowɔna le ɣea te la ŋu, eye kpa ɖa, wo katã tofloko kple dagbadagba ɖe ya me wonye. 15Womete ŋu adzɔ nu gɔglɔ̃ o, eye nusi kpɔtɔ la, womate ŋu axlẽe akpe ɖe nu ŋu o. 16Megblɔ le nye dzi me be: Vavãe, nye asi tu nunya ga geɖewo wu amesiwo katã bɔ Yerusalem nu ɖo ŋgɔ num la, eye nye dzi kpɔ nunya kple gɔmesese fũ. 17Eye esi meɖo ta me enyi, be medze si nunya, eye medze si aɖaʋadzedze kple bometsitsi la, medze sii be, esia hã dagbadagba de ya me wònye. 18Elabena dziku geɖe kpe ɖe nunya geɖe ŋu, eye amesi li kɔ sidzedze la, eli kɔ vevesese.

Title: NYAGBLƆLA 2
Content:
Anyigba dzi dzidzɔkpɔkpɔwo katã hã nye dzodzro.
1Megblɔ le nye dzi me be: Mãtsɔ dzidzɔ mee akpɔ, eye maɖu agbe! Ke esia hã toflokoe. 2Megblɔ na nukoko be: adaʋae! eye na dzidzɔ be: nuka esia ya awɔ? 3Mehe le nye dzi me be: Matsɔ wein anyro nye ŋutilã, ke nye dzi natsɔ nunya akplɔm, ne meva bometsitsi goŋgoŋ, eye makpa nusi nyo na amegbefɔviwo be, woawɔ le dziƒoa te le woƒe agbenɔɣi me la. 4Mewɔ dɔ klitsuwo: metu xɔwo, mede weingblewo, 5melɔ ahɔwo, eye mewɔ tsaɖiƒevewo hedo afi tseku ɖuɖua vovovowo ɖi; 6medo tsitawo, ne matsɔ ade tsi avemeti damawo. 7Meƒle kluvliwo kple kosiviwo, eye esiwo wodzi le aƒe me hã nɔ asinye. Nyihawo kple alẽhawo nɔ asinye taŋ wu amesiwo katã nɔ Yerusalem do ŋgɔ nam. 8Meƒo klosalo kple sika, fiawo kple anyigbawo ƒe kesinɔnuwo nu ƒu; medo ŋutsu hadzilawo kple nyɔnu hadzilawo ne ɖokuinye; mese amegbetɔviwo ƒe vivisese, eye nyɔnu hɔ ɖe asinye kpaŋ. 9Ade meɖo kpo gaɖo kpo ɖe dzi wu amesiwo katã nɔ Yerusalem ɖo ŋgɔ nam; eye nye nunya hã tsi ŋunye. 10Nusianu, si nye ŋkuwo di la, nyemete wo o; nyemetsri dzidzɔa ɖeke na nye dzi o, ke boŋ nye dzi kpa dzidzɔ ɖe nye agbagbadzedzewo katã ŋu, eye esia nye tanye gome tso nye agbagbadzedzewo katã me. 11Ke esi metrɔ kɔ ɖe ɖɔ, siwo katã nye asi wɔ, kple agbagba, siwo medze ɖe wo ŋu ŋutl la, kpɔ ɖa, tofloko kple dagbadagba ɖe ya me wonye, eye viɖea ɖeke mele ɣe la te o.
12Eye metrɔ, be makpɔ nunya, aɖaʋadzedze kple bometsitsi ɖa, elabena nuka amesi ava dze fia yome la awɔ? Nusi wowɔ xoxo va yi la koe! 13Tete mekpɔ be, nunya ƒo bometsitsi ta, ahe alesi kekeli ƒo viviti tae ene. 14Nu nyala to ŋku ɖe ta, ke bometsila zɔa viviti me. Ke medze sii be, nye ɖeka tɔgbe koe dzɔna ɖe wo katã dzi. 15Tete megblɔ le nye dzi me be: Nya, si adzɔ ɖe bometsila dzi la kee le dzɔdzɔ ge ɖe nye hã dzinye tso, nukata gɔ̃e nyea medze nunya alea gbegbe ɖo? Eye megblɔ le nye dzi me be: Esia hã toflokoe. 16Womeɖoa ŋku nunyala kple bometsila dzi tegbee o, elabena ŋku adzo le wo dzi le ŋkeke, siwo gbɔna la me xoxo; alesi nunyala kunae la, nenema ke bometsila hã kunae. 17Tete melé fu agbenɔnɔ, elabena nusiwo wowɔna le ɣea te la, medze ŋunye o, elabena wo katã tofloko kple dagbadagba ɖe ya me wonye. 18Eye melé fu agbagba, siwo katã medze le ɣea le la, le esi mele wo gblẽ ge ɖi na yonyemedzela ta. 19Eye amekae nyae be, nunyala loo, alo bometsila nye ge wògbɔna? Hafi eyae le ŋusẽ kpɔ ge ɖe nye agbagba, siwo katã metso kutrikuku kple nunya dze le ɣea te la dzi. Esia hã toflokoe!
20Tete metrɔ, eye ɖikeke do nye dzi me ɖe agbagba, siwo katã medze le ɣea te la ŋu. 21Elabena ne amea ɖe tsa nunya, gɔmesese kple aɖaŋu wɔ eƒe ɖɔe la, ele na be, wòagblẽe ɖi na ame bubu, si medze agbagba le eŋu o la, woa zu etɔ. Esia hã tofloko kple vɔ gã wònye. 22Elabena nuka amegbefɔ kpɔna tsoa eƒe dɔwo kalã kple agbagba, siwoeƒe dzi dzena le ɣea te la mea? 23Elabena eƒe ŋkekewo katã nye vevesese, eye nuxaxa nye eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo, le zã me gɔ̃ hã eƒe dzi mekpɔa gbɔdzɔe o. Esia hã toflokoe!
24Ɖe menyo na amegbetɔ wu be, wòaɖu nu ana nu, eye eƒe luʋɔ naɖu agbe akpe ɖe eƒe agbagbadzedzewo ŋu oa? Ke esia la, Mawu si me ko wòtsona, abe alesi mekpɔe ene. 25Elabena ameka ato exa aɖu nu, eye wòase vivi? 26Elabena etsɔ nunya, sidzedze kple dzidzɔ na amesi ƒe nu dze eŋu la; ke nuvɔ̃wɔla la, etsɔ dɔwɔwɔ nɛ, be wòaƒo nu nu ƒu, eye wòali kɔ nu, ne Mawu natsɔ na amesi ƒe nu dze eŋu la. Esia hã tofloko kple dagbadagba ɖe ya me wònye.

Title: NYAGBLƆLA 3
Content:
Nuwuwu li na amegbetɔ ƒe nuwɔwɔwo, gake Mawu tɔ noa anyi.
1Ɣeyiɣi li na nusianu, eye azã li na lameɖoɖowo katã le dzi ƒoa te. 2Amedziɣi li, eye kuɣi li; nuɖoɣi li, eye nu dodoawo hoɣi li; 3amewuɣi li, eye gbeɖaɣi li; xɔgbãɣi li, eye etuɣi li; 4avifaɣi li, eye nukoɣi li; konyifaɣi li, eye ɣeɖuɣi li; 5kpekakaɣi li, eyekpeƒoƒoƒuɣi li; asikplakɔɣi li, eye adzɔgenɔnɔ na asikplakɔɣi li; 6nuɖiɣi li, eye nubuɣi li; nudzraɖoɣi li, eye nuƒugbeɣi li; 7nuvuvuɣi li, nye nutɔɣi li; ɖoɖoeziɣi li, eye nuƒoɣi li; 8lɔlɔ̃ɣi li, eye fuléɣi li; aʋawɔɣi li, eye ŋutifafaɣi li.
9Viɖe ka ame kpɔna tsoa dɔ, si ŋu wòdzea agbagba lena la me? 10Mekpe dɔ, siwo Mawu tsɔ de asi na amegbetɔviwo, ne woatsɔ aku kutrii la ɖa. 11Ewɔ nuwo katã nyuie ɖe wo wɔɣi, eye wòde: mavɔmavɔ dzi me na wo, negbe ɖeko amegbetɔ menya mɔnu le nusiwo Mawu wɔ la ƒe agɔmegbɔ, kple tagbɔ ŋu ne 12Medze sii bena, nu nyuia ɖeke meli na wo wu be, woakpɔ dzidzɔ, eye woaɖu agbe le woƒe agbenɔɣi o. 13Ke be amea ɖe naɖu nu ano nu, eye wòanyo nɛ le eƒe agbagbadzedzewo katã me la, Mawu ƒe nunanae. 14Medze sii be, nusiwo kam Mawu wɔ la, anɔ anyi ɖaa, womatsɔ naneke akpee o, eye womaɖe naneke le eme o. Mawu ɖe wòwɔe, alea, be woavɔ̃ ye. 15Nusi li la, nɔ anyi tsã va yi, eye nusi gbɔna anyi nɔ ge la, nɔ anyi gbaɖegbe ke; eye Mawu gaɖia nusi nu va yi la.
Vɔ̃ Mawu, eye na wɔ gome nadze ŋuwo.
16Eye megakpɔ le ɣea te be, nu madzɔmadzɔ le ʋɔnuɖrɔ̃ƒe, eye nu madzɔmadzɔ le dzɔdzɔenyenye nɔƒe. 17Tete megblɔ le nye dzi: me be: Mawu le ʋɔnu drɔ̃ ge ame dzɔdzɔewo kple ame vɔ̃diwo, elabena eɖo azã na tameɖoɖowo katã kple nuwɔwɔwo katã. 18Megblɔ le nye dzi me bena. Amegbetɔviwo ta esia va me do, ne Mawu naɖo wo akpa, eye ne woadze sii be, lãwo yewonye. 19Elabena nya ɖeka tɔgbe dzɔna de amegbetɔviwo kple lãwo siaa dzi; alesi esiawo kunae la, nenema ke ekemeawo hã kunae, gbɔgbɔ ɖekae le wo katã si, eye amegbetɔ mexɔ asi wu lã o; elabena wo katã tofloko wonye. 20Wo katã woyina teƒe ɖeka; anyi me wo katã wotso, eye anyi wo katã woagazu. 21De amea de nyae be, amegbetɔviwo ƒe gbɔgbɔ yia dzi, eye lãwo ƒe gbɔgbɔ yia anyi me loo? 22Eyata mekpɔ be, enye wu na amegbetɔ be, wòakpɔ dzidzɔ le eƒe dɔwɔwɔwo ŋu, elabena esia nye eƒe gome. Elabena amekae akplɔe ayi afisi wòakpɔ nusiadzɔ le emegbe la le?

Title: NYAGBLƆLA 4
Content:
Akɔfafa meli na ame dahe kpli veviedola siaa o, fia gã hã mele dedie o.
1Eye megade ŋku de ameteteɖeanyi, siwo katã dzɔna le ɣea te la, eye kpa da, amesiwo woto de anyi la ƒe aɖatsiwo le tsyɔtsyɔm, ke akɔfalaa ɖeke meli na wo o; amesiwo te wo de anyi la, se ŋuta le wo ŋu, ke akɔfalaa ɖeke meli na wo o. 2Tete mekafu amesiwo ku gbaɖegbe ke la, wu agbagbeawo, siwo gale agbe; 3eye amesi medzɔ gɔ̃, ne wòayi nuwɔwɔ vɔ̃di, siwo dzɔna le ɣea te, kpɔ ge o la tɔ me nyo wu wo ame eve la tɔ.
4Eye mekpɔ agbagbadzedzewo katã kple aɖaŋudzedzewo katã de dɔwɔwɔ ŋu be, ŋuʋaʋã wonye de amehavi ŋu. Esia hã tofloko kple dagbadagba de ya me wonye. 5Bometsila ɖe asi asitɛ me hele eya ŋutɔ ƒe ŋutilã ɖum. 6Gbɔɖeme asiʋlo ɖeka nyo wu agbagbadzedze kple dagbadagba ɖe ya me asiʋlo eve taŋ.
7Eye megakpɔ tofloko le ɣea te; 8Amea de eya ɖeka kolia li, eye evelia mekpe de eŋu o, ŋutsuvi alo nɔviŋutsu hã mele esi o, gake eƒe agbagbadzedzewo mewua enu o, eye kesinɔnuwo meɖia ƒo na eƒe ŋkuwo o. Ke ameka la gɔ̃e mehele agbagba dzem, eye mele nu nyui tsrim na ɖokuinye do? Esia hã tofloko kple agbagbadzedze vɔ̃di wònye! 9Ne ame le eve la, enye wu ame ɖeka, elabena woakpɔ fam nyui de woƒe agbagbadzedzewo la. 10Elabena ne wo ɖometɔ ɖka dze anyi la, nana ame de tsitre; ke haha na amesi tsi akogo, elabena ne edze anyi la, evelia meli afɔe de tsitre o. 11Nenema ke ne ame eve womlɔ wo nɔewo gbɔ la, woléa dzo de wo nɔewo ŋu; aleke ame ɖeka alé dzo de eɖokui ŋui? 12Eye ne ame ɖeka kpɔ ŋusẽ de amesi tsi akogo dzi hã la, ame eveawo ya anɔ te ɖe enu, eye ka ŋukplaba eta mateŋu alã bɔbɔeo.
13Ɖekakpui dahe nyanu nyo wu fia tsitsi tsibome, si menana woxlɔ̃a nui o. 14Eya la gaxɔ mee wotso, ne woava ɖu fia, eye ahedada me wodzii ɖo ɖe fiaɖuƒe la me. 15Mekpe be, agbagbeawo katã, siwo le zɔzɔm le ɣea te la, xa ɖe ɖekakpui, si ana ame kemea teƒe la dzi. 16Dukɔ, siwo katã nu wole la seƒeɖo meli na wo o; ke wo megbeviwo meva kpɔ dzidzɔ de eŋu o. Esia hã tofloko kple dagbadagba ɖe ya me wònye.
17Ne èyina de wò Mawu ƒe me la, kpɔ wò afɔ dzi; elabena vava, ne woase nya, nyo wu bometsilawo ƒe akpedavɔsa; elabena numanyamanyae na wole nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔm.

Title: NYAGBLƆLA 5
Content:
Nuxɔxlɔ̃ le ŋuɖeɖi le nuƒoƒo me ŋu.
1Wò nu megatsɔ blablabla o, eye wò dzi megatsɔ, ne wòaƒo nu le Mawu ŋku me o; elabena Mawu le dziƒo, eye wòa nèle anyigba, eyata wò nyawo nenɔ ʋee. 2Afisi kutrikuku geɖe le la, drɔ̃ekuku noa anyi, eye nu kpoloe ƒoƒo ɖea ha bometsilawo. 3Ne èɖe adzagba na Mawu la, megahe edziwɔwɔ ɖe megbe o, elabena bometsilawo ƒe nu medzea eŋuo; alesi nèɖe adzɔgbe la, wɔe. 4Ne méɖe adzɔgbe kura o la, enye wu esi naɖe adzɔgbe, eye mãwɔ edzi o. 5Megaɖe mɔ da wò nu, ne wòahe wò ŋutilã aɖe nuvɔ̃ me o, eye megagblɔ le Mawu ƒe tame ɖɔɖɔ ŋku me be, ɖe woge le ye nu o. Nukaŋuti Mawu aɖo dɔmedzoe ɖe wò nuƒoƒo ŋu, eye wòagblẽ wò asinudɔwɔwɔa? 6Elabena tofloko geɖe le ɖrɔ̃ekuku kple nu kpoloe ƒoƒo geɖe me. Ke wò la vɔ̃ Mawu boŋ!
Kesinɔnuwo ƒe dzodzronyenye.
7Ne èle ame dahewo teteɖeanyi kple nya dzɔdzɔe tsitsri kpakple dzɔdzɔanyenyetsitsri kpɔm le anyigba dzi la, nya la megawɔ nuku na wò o; elabena ame kɔkɔ le ame kɔkɔ ŋuti dzɔm, ke kɔkɔtɔ le wo katã nu. 8Le afiawo katã la anyigba ƒe viɖe wònye, ne fia tsa agbledede ɖo ɖɔe. 9Amesi lɔ̃a ga la, ga maɖi ƒo na o, eye amesi lɔ̃a kesinɔnu la, viɖea ɖeke metso eme nɛ o. Esia hã toflokoe. 10Ne kesinɔnu dzi ɖe dzi la, eɖulawo hã dzinu ɖe edzi, eye nuãtɔ mekpɔa viɖeã ɖeke tsoe eme o, negbe ekpɔkpɔ kple ŋku ko. 11Dɔwɔla ɖaɖu nu ʋee o, eɖaɖu nu geɖe o, alɔ̃ vivina nɛ; ke kesinɔtɔƒe nu gbogboawo menana wòɖɔa alɔ̃ o. 12Vɔ̃ gã, si mekpe le ɣen le la, enye be, kesinɔtɔ le eƒe nuwo ŋu dzɔm hena eya ŋutɔ ƒe dzɔgbevɔ̃e. 13Ne nya vɔ̃a ɖe na kesinɔnu siawo bu, eye wòdzi ŋutsuvi le ekema naneke metsia esi me o. 14Alesi wòle tso dadaa ƒe mi me la, nenema ke wòaganɔ amama ayii, abe alesi wole va ene, eye matsɔ naneke aɖo asi tso eƒe agbagbadzedzewo me o. 15Esia hã vɔ̃ gã wònye be, alesi wònɔ va la, nenema ke wòaganɔ ayi, eye viɖe kawòkpɔ, be wòdze agbagba ɖe ya me? 16Eɖu eƒe ŋkekewo kalã le viviti, dzibibi geɖe, fukpekpe kple dziku me.
Ɖokuinudede.
17Kpɔ ɖa, nusi nyea mekpe be, enye, eye wòdze ani la, enye be, ame naɖu nu ano nu, eye wòaɖu agbe ɖe eƒe agbagba, siwo katã wodze le ɣea te la ŋuti le eƒe agbe me ŋkeke, siwo katã Mawu tso nɛ la me; elabena esia nye eƒe gome. 18Eye ne Mawu na kesinɔnu kple nu xɔesiwo amea de, eye wòna misee be, wòaɖui, wòaxɔ elɔ gome, eye wòakpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe eƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋu la, Mawu ƒe nunana nye esia. 19Elabena mebua ta me le eƒe agbe me ŋkekewo ŋu boo o, le esi Mawu do dzidzɔ na eƒe dzi ta.

Title: NYAGBLƆLA 6
Content:
Kesinɔnu kple bubu hã wonye nu dzodzro.
1Dzɔgbevɔ̃ea ɖe li mekpe le ɣea te, eye wòɖo agbe ɖe amegbetɔwo dzi fu; 2Ne Mawu na kesinɔnu, nu xɔasiwo kple bubu amea ɖe, ale be nusiwo katã wòdina la, mehiãnɛ o, gake Mawu mene ŋusẽe, be wòaɖui o, ke boŋ ame tutɔ naɖul la, tofloko kple vɔ̃ gã wònye. 3Ne amea ɖe dzi vi alafa, enɔ agbe ƒe geɖe, eƒe agbe me ŋkekewo sɔgbɔ, gake meɖi ƒo ɖe nu nyuiawo ŋu o, eye ameɖiƒea ɖeke mesu esi o la, mele gbɔgblɔm be, fu gege nyo wu eyama. 4Elabena edzɔ de gbahlaya me, eye wòyi viviti me, eye viviti nye tsyɔ eƒe ŋkɔ 5Mekpɔ ɣe loo, alo dze sii hã o; etɔ me nyo ne wu ame keme tɔ. 6Eye nenye ƒe akpe eve wona agbe, ke meɖu agbe o la, ɖe menye teƒe ɖeka wo kam woyi oa?
7Amegbetɔ ƒe dɔwɔwɔwb katã la, nue wòwɔnɛ, ke womefaa nudzodzro nu gbeɖe o. 8Elabena nuka nunyala tsɔ wu bometsila, eye viɖe ka ame dahe, si nya zɔzɔ le agbagbeawo ŋku me la, kpɔna? 9Nukpɔkpɔ kple ŋku nyo wu nudzodzro ƒe tsa glalã tsatsa. Esia hã tofloko kple dagbadagba ɖe ya me wonye.
10Nusi dza la, woyɔ eƒe ŋkɔ ɖi tsa, eye nusi ame ava zu la, woɖoeɖa ɖi, eye mate ŋu ahe nya kple amesi sẽ wui o. 11Elabena nya geɖe li, si dzia toflokonyenye ɖe edzi, ke viɖe ka amegbelɔ kpɔna tsoe eme? 12Elabena ameka nya nusi nyo na amegbelɔ le agbe me, le eƒe agbe ƒuƒlu, si wònɔ abe vɔvɔli ene la ƒe ŋkekewo katã me? Elabena ameka agblɔ nusi adzɔ le amegbetɔ megbe le ɣea te la nɛ?

Title: NYAGBLƆLA 7
Content:
Nunya, ŋudzedze kpɔkpɔ kple madzramadzra kafukafu.
1Ŋkɔ nyui nyo wu ami xɔasi, eye kugbe nyo wu dzigbe. 2Kuteƒeyiyi nyo wu agloluƒeyiyi; elabena afi kemea nye emegbetɔwo katã ƒe nuwuƒe, eye wòdea dzigbɔ na agbagbeawo. 3Nuxaxa nyo wu nukoko, elabena ne mo ɖo adã la, esɔnɛ na dzi. 4Nunyalawo ƒe dzi le kuleƒe, ke bometsilawo ƒe dzi le dzidzɔleƒe. 5Nunyalawo ƒe dzusese nyo wu, ne woase bometsilawo ƒe ha. 6Elabena alesi aŋɔka wona kpotokpoto le ze gome la, nenema nye bometsilawo ƒe nukoko. Esia ha toflokoe.
7Elabena sesẽnuɖuɖu doa bometsila nunyalawo, eye zãnunana gblẽa dzi. 8Nu ƒe nuwuwu nyo wu eƒe gɔmedzedze; dzigbɔɖitɔ nyo wu ɖaɖala. 9Wò gbɔgbɔ megayɔ ɖe dzikudodo ŋu o, elabena bometsilawo ƒe akɔtae dziku nana. 10Megagblɔ be, nukata tsa ŋkekewo nyo wu fifitɔwo hã o, elabena mèle biabiam ɖe nunya me o. 11Nunya nyo kpe ɖe domenyinu ŋu, eye wònye viɖe na amesiwo le ɣe kpɔm. 12Elabena nunya doa vɔvɔli, eye ga hã doa vɔvɔli; eye sidzedze ƒe viɖe enye; Nunya léa amesi si wole la ƒe agbe ɖe te. 13Ɖe ŋku ɖe Mawu ƒe ɖɔwo; elabena ameka hadzɔ nusi wòglɔ̃ la? 14Kpɔ dzidzɔ le gbe nyui gbe, eye le dzɔgbevɔ̃egbe la ɖo ŋui be, Mawu ye wɔe abe ekeme ke ene, ne amegbelɔ maganya nusi adzɔ le emegbe o.
15Nusiwo katã mekpɔ le nye agbe me ŋkeke ƒuƒluawo me la, enye esi: Ame dzɔdzɔea ɖewo tsrɔ̃na ɖe woƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye me, eye ame vɔɖia ɖewo nɔa agbe ɖiɖie ɖe woƒe vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ me. 16Megawɔ nu dzɔdzɔe vivivo o, eye meganya nu tso eme akpa o; nukaŋuti nébe, yeaɖe ye ɖokui tsɔtsrɔ̃ me ɖo? 17Megawu nu vɔ̃ɖi wòagbɔ eme o, eye meganye bometsila o; nukaŋuti nẽbe, yeaku, hafi azã nava de? 18Enyo, ne ele esia ɖe asi sesie, eye ekemea hã niege le asiwò o; elabena amesi vɔ̃a Mawu la, ƒoa asa na wo katã.
19Nunya naa ŋusẽ nunyalawo wu ŋusẽtɔ ewo, siwo le du me. 20Elabena ame dzɔdzɔea ɖeke mele anyigba dzi, si wɔa nu nyui sɔŋ, eye mewɔa nuyɔ o. 21Megalé to hã ɖe amewo ƒe nusiwo katã woƒona la ŋu o, ne mãgasee, ne wò dɔla le ɖiŋu dom na wò ti. 22Elabena ele ŋku dzi na wò be, wò hã edo ɖiŋu na ame bubuwo zi geɖewo.
23Nusiwo katã metso nunya te kpɔ la, wonye si: Mebu be, madze nunya; ke etsi adzɔgedzɔgee nam. 24Nusi li la, adzɔge wòle; ele to me, ẽ, to me wòle; ameka ƒe asi atui? 25Eye metrɔ hetsɔ tame ɖo anyi, be madze si nunya kple tamebubu, madzro eme, eye madii, ne manyae be, nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ la bometsitsi wònye, eye lãnyenye la aɖaʋadzedze wònye. 26Eye mekpɔ be, nusi vena wu ku, enye nyɔnu, si nye ɖɔ vena kaɖikaɖi wu ku ɖeɖe sɔŋ, ete dzi nye mɔ̃ka, eye eƒe asiwo nye kunyowu. Amesi ƒe nu nyo Mawu ŋu la, sina le enu, ke eɖea nuvɔ̃wɔlawo. 27Kpɔ ɖa, nyagblɔla be: Esiawoe nye asi tu ɖekaɖeka, ne makpɔ sidzedze. 28Nusi dim mele atraɖi nyemekpɔe o la, enye si Mekpe ŋutsu ɖeka le wo ame akpe ɖome, ke nyemekpɔ nyɔnu le esiawo katã ɖome o. 29Negbe esia ko mekpɔ be, Mawu wɔ amegbetɔwo woto mɔ ɖeka, ke woawo dia ayedzedze geɖe.

Title: NYAGBLƆLA 8
Content:
Toɖoɖo dziɖuɖu. Enyona na amesiwo vɔ̃a Mawu.
1Amekae le ahe nunyala ene? Eye ameka se nuwo gɔmeɖeɖe me? Nunya nana amegbetɔ ƒe mo kɔna, eye eƒe mo kplala la trɔna. 2Mebe: Dzra fia ƒe sedede ɖo le Mawu ƒe atam la te. 3Wò afa megatsɔ nadzo le esia gbɔ o; megaɖo nya vɔ̃ me o; elabena nusianu, si dze eŋu la, awɔe. 4Esi wònye ŋusẽ le fia ƒe nya ŋu ta la, ameka agblɔ nɛ be: Nuka wɔm nele? 5Amesi dzra sedede ɖo la, vɔa ɖeke mava edzi o, eye nunyala ƒe dzi nyaa azãgbe kple ʋɔnudɔdrɔ. 6Elabena azãgbe kple ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ li na nuwɔwɔ ɖesiaɖe, elabena amegbetɔ ƒe vɔ̃wɔwɔ do agba ɖe edzi. 7Elabena menya nusi gbɔna dzɔdzɔ ge o; eye ameka ate ŋu agblɔ nusi le dzɔdzɔ ge la nɛ? 8Amegbetɔa ɖeke mekpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe ya dzi be, wòaxe ma na ya o; amea ɖeke mekpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe kugbe dzi o, eye asiɖeɖe le ame ŋu meli le aba me o; nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ mexɔna na ewɔla o. 9Nusiawo katã mekpɔ, eye melsɔ nye tame ɖo nuwɔwɔ, siwo katã dzɔna le ɣea te, le ɣeyiɣi, si me amegbetɔ ɖua fia ɖe ame bubuwo dzi bena woƒe dzɔgbevɔ̃e la ŋuti.
10Emegbe mekpɔ woɖe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo yɔ me, eye woyi gbɔɖemeƒe; ke ele na amesiwo wɔa nu dzɔdzɔe la be, woaʋu adzo le teƒe kɔkɔe la, eye woŋlɔ wo be le dua me. Esia hã tofloko wònye. 11Esi afia menye tsona le nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ŋu kaba o ŋuti la, eyata dzi doa amegbetɔviwo ƒo ŋutɔ de nu vɔɖi wɔwɔ ŋu. 12Ne nuvɔwɔla wɔa vɔ̃ zi alafa, gake nɔa agbe didie hã la, nyee menyae be, eme anye na mawuvɔ̃la, siwo sia eƒe ŋku me. 13Ke eme menye na ame vɔ̃ɖiwo o, eye abe vɔvɔli ene womanɔ agbe didie o, elabena womevɔ̃a Mawu o. 14Nu dzodzroa wònye dzɔna le anyigba dzi be: Ame dzɔdzɔea ɖewo li nya dzɔna ɖe wo dzi le eme vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe nuwɔwɔ nu, eye ame vɔ̃ɖia ɖewo li nya dzɔna ɖe wo dzi le ame dzɔdzɔewo ƒe nuwɔwɔ nu. Mebe: Esia hã toflokoe! 15Eyata mekafu dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ be: Nu nyuia ɖeke mele ɣea te na amegbetɔ wu esia be, wòaɖu nu ana nu akpɔ dzidzɔ o. Eye esia akplɔe alo eƒe agbe me ŋkeke, siwo Mawu nae le ɣea le la ƒe agbagbadzedzewo me.
16Esi meɖo nye tame anyi, be madze si nunya, eye makpɔ nuwɔwɔ, siwo dzɔna le anyigba dzi ɖa la, — elabena ŋkeke kple zã amegbetɔ ƒe ŋku mekpɔa alɔ o — 17mekpɔ Mawu ƒe dɔwo katã be, amegbetɔ menya ta le nusiwo le ɣea te la nu o, eye ne amegbetɔ le kutri kum le edim hã, menya ta le enu o, eye ne nunyala be, yedze sii hã la, manya ta le enu akpɔ o.

Title: NYAGBLƆLA 9
Content:
Megana mawuvɔ̃lawo kple vɔ̃ɖitɔwo ƒe sɔsɔ le gota naflu wo o.
1Nusiawo katã ŋu metsɔ nye tame ɖo, eye medzro wokɔtã me kpɔ be: Ame dzɔdzɔewo kple nunyalawo kpakple woƒe nuwɔwɔwo le Mawu si me; amegbetɔ medze si lɔlɔ̃ kple fuléle tsã o; wo katã wodo ŋgɔ na wo. 2Nu ɖeka ƒomevie kpea amewo katã: Nya ɖeka tɔgbe dzɔna ɖe ame dzɔdzɔe kple ame vɔ̃ɖi, ame nyui, eme dzadzɛ kple eme madzamadza, vɔsala kple eme masavɔ, ame nyui kple nuvɔwɔlm atamkala kple amesi atam dzia ŋɔ na la dzi. 3Esia nye vɔ̃ gã le nusiwo katã dzɔna le ɣea te la dome be, nye ɖeka tɔgbe dzɔna ɖe amewo katã dzi; eyata vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ yɔa amegbetɔviwoƒe dzi me, eye aɖaʋadzedze le woƒe dzi me le woƒe agbenɔɣi katã; ke emegbe la woayi kukuawo gbɔ. 4Elabena amesi gale ha dem kple agbagbeawo ko le mɔkpɔkpɔ le esi; elabena avu gbagbe nyo wu dzata kuku. 5Elabena agbagbeawo nyae be, yewogbɔna kuku ge, ke kukuawo menye naneke o, fetua ɖeke megali na wo o, eye woŋlɔ woƒe ŋkɔ be. 6Woƒe emelɔlɔ kple fuléle kpakple ŋuʋaʋã nu yi gbaɖegbe ke, eye womagakpɔ gome le nusiwo katã dzɔna le ɣea te la me akpɔ o.
Ɖu Mawu ƒe nunanawo kple dzidzɔ, eye nawɔ nusi ƒe se wode na wo.
7Eyata yi naɖu wò abolo kple dzidzɔ, eye nano wò wein le dzidzeme me, elabena gbaɖegbe ke Mawu tso na wò nuwɔwɔ sia. 8Wò avɔwo nefu ɣeawokatãɣi, eye ami megagbe wò tamenɔnɔ o. 9Mia kple nyɔnu, si nèlɔ̃na la, miɖu agbe le wò agbenɔnɔ ƒuƒlu ƒe ŋkekewo katã, si wotsɔ na wò le ɣea le la me, ŋkeke ƒuƒlu, siwo katã nele agbe; elabena esia nye wò agbe kple wò agbagba, si nèdze le ɣea te la ƒe gome. 10Nusianu, si wò asi ate ŋu awɔ la, wɔe kple wò ŋusẽ; elabena nuwɔwɔ alo tamebubu, sidzedze alo nunya mele tsieƒe, afisi yi ge nala o.
11Eye megakpɔ le ɣea te be, duƒuƒu mele alo ɖablae me o, aʋawɔwɔ mele kalẽ me o, nuɖudukpɔkpɔ mele nunya me o, kesinɔnu mele ayedzedze me o, eye ŋudzedzekpɔbpɔ mele nugɔmesese me o, ke boŋ azãgbe kple nudiɖeame li na wo katã. 12Amegbetɔ menya eƒe azãgbe o, ke boŋ abe alesi wotsɔa dɔ vɔ̃ɖi ɖea tɔmelãwo, eye wotsɔa mɔ̃ ɖea xewoe la, nenema woɖea amegbetɔviwo abe woawo ene le dzɔgbevɔ̃eɣi, ne eƒo ɖe wo dzi kpoyi.
Nunya tsoa aseye.
13Mekpɔ nunya sia hã le ɣea te, eye wòdze gã nam: 14Du suea ɖe li, ŋutsu ʋeea ɖewo koe le eme; tete fia gãa ɖe ho ɖe eŋu, eɖe to ɖee, eye wòƒo kpo gãwo ɖe eŋu. 15Ŋutsu ɖahe nyanua ɖe le eme; eyae tsɔ eƒe nunya xɔ du lae; ke amea ɖeke medo ŋku ŋutsu dahe ma dzi o. 16Tete megblɔ be: Nunya nyo wu ŋusẽ, ke wodoe vlo ame dahe ƒe nunya, eye womeléa to de eƒe nyawo ŋu o. 17Wosea nunyala ƒe nyawo le dziɖeɖi me wu dziɖula ƒe ɣli le bometsilawo dome. 18Nunya nyo wu aʋawɔnuwo; ke nuvɔ̃wɔla ɖe ka gblẽa nu nyui geɖe dome.

Title: NYAGBLƆLA 10
Content:
Nunya kple bometsitsi le bubumewo kple ame gblɔewo gbɔ.
1Nudzodzoe wuamewo nana amiɖala ƒe ami mina ku heƒaƒãna; bometsitsi ʋeea ɖe kpena wua nunya kple bubu. 2Gomesese le ɖusi me na nunyala, ke bometsila ƒe gɔmesese le mia me nɛ. 3Ne bometsila le mɔa ɖe dzi le nunya menɔa tagbɔ nɛ o, eye sii wo baa amewo katã bometsilawoe.
4Ne dziɖula ƒe ɖɔmedzoe bi ɖe ŋuwò la, megaɖe afa le tewòƒe o, elabena tufafa tsia nuvɔ gãwo nu. 5Mekpɔ nu vɔ̃ɖia ɖe le ɣea te, esɔ kple dziɖula ƒe ɖaɖaƒu 6Wotsɔ bometsitsi ɖo kɔkɔƒe ʋi ke, eye kesinɔtɔwo bɔbɔ nɔ anyi me. 7Mekpɔ kluviwo le sɔ dzi, eye amegãwo le afa zɔm ahe kluviwo ene.
8Amesi le ne ɖem la, eyae gena dzea eme, eye amesi la gli gbãm la, eyae da ɖuna. 9Amesi le kpe ɖem la, eyae wɔa nu vevi eɖokui, eye amesi le nake dzem la, eyae xɔa abi. 10Ne lãnu tsi kpo, eye womenyire enu o la, ele be, woahe alɔkame; ke nuwɔwɔ, ne wòadze edzi, enye nunya ƒe viɖe. 11Ne da ɖu ame, hafi wosa gbe ɖoe la, ekema gbesala mekpɔ viɖea ɖeke tso eme o.
12Nyia, si tso nunyala nu la, nyo; ke bometsila ƒe nuyi gblẽa eya ŋutɔ ɖokui dome. 13Eƒe nu me nyia ƒe gɔmedzedze enye bometsitsi, eye eƒe nuƒoƒo ƒe nuwuwu enye aɖaʋadzedze vɔ̃ɖi. 14Bometsila ƒoa nu kpoloe; amegbetɔ menya nusi gbɔna dzɔdzɔ ge o, eye ameka agblɔ nusi ava dzɔ le emegbe la nɛ? 15Bometsilawo ƒe agbagbadzedze nana ɖeɖi tea amesi menye du me mɔ o la ŋu.
16Anyigba, si ƒe fia nye ɖevi, eye eƒe amegãwo ma ŋdi ɖe nuɖuɖu ŋu la, baba nɛ! 17Woayra anyigba, siƒe fia nyee bubume, eye ete amegãwo ɖua nu ɖe eɖuɣi hena ŋusẽɖoɖo, eye menye hena nutsuɖuɖu o! 18Kuviawɔwɔ nana ɖaɖedziwo nyẽna ɖe eme, alɔ gblɔlɔ wɔwɔ nana xɔ ɖuɖuna. 19Ɖe woɖaa nuɖuɖu hena dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ, wein doa dzidzɔ na agbe, eye gae wotsɔna kpɔa nuwo katãe. 20Megado ɖiŋu na fia le wò tamesusuwo me o, eye megado ɖiŋu na kesinɔtɔ le wò xɔgã me o, elabena dziƒoxeviwo atso gbeɖiɖi la ayii, eye xewo aɖato nya la.

Title: NYAGBLƆLA 11
Content:
Ƒã wo nukuwo le ŋdi me.
1Na wò abolo nato tɔ dzi yii, elabena àgakpɔe le ŋkeke geɖewo megbe. 2Ma nu ɖe akpa adre, ɖe akpa enyi, elabena menya dzɔgbevɔ̃e ka le anyigba dzi va ge o. 3Ne tsi ya alilikpowo la, wobunɛ kɔna ɖe anyigba dzi; ne ati mu le dziehe alo anyiehe la, afisi atia mũ ɖo la, afima wòtsina. 4Amesi le to lém ɖe ya ŋu la, maƒã nuku o, eye amesi le ŋku lém ɖe alilikpo ŋu la, maŋe nu o. 5Alesi menya ya toƒe kple alesi ƒuwo va wona ɖe dɔ me na funɔ o la, nenema mèdze si Mawu, amesi wɔ nuwo katã la ƒe dɔwɔwɔwo o. 6Ƒã wò nukuwo le ŋdi, eye megadzudzɔ le ɣetrɔ me o; elabena mènya kae le wɔwɔ ge o, eɖanye asi alo ekeme alo woa kple eve lae le nyonyo ge o. 7Kekeli nyo, eye ɣe kpɔkpɔ vivia ŋku nu. 8Elabena ne amegbetɔ nɔ agbe ƒe geɖe la, nekpɔ dzidzɔ le wo katã me, eye wòanɔ ŋku ɖom vivitidogbe dzi be, wole agbɔ sɔ ge; nusiwo katã le vavam la, toflokowoe.
9Ɖekakpui, kpɔ dzidzɔ le wò ɖekakpuime, na wò dzi naɖu agbe le wò ɖekakpui ŋkekewo me, eye nazɔ ɖe wò dzi ƒe toƒewo kple nusi wò ŋku kpɔ la nu; ke nyae be, Mawu le kplɔwò ge ava ʋɔnui le nusiawo katã ta. 10Ɖe dziku da le wò dzi ŋu, eye vɔ̃ neƒo asa na wò ŋutilã; elabena ɖekakpui me nɔnɔ kple ŋutsu me nónɔ toflokowoe.

Title: NYAGBLƆLA 12
Content:
Ɖo ŋku Mawu dzi le wo ɖekakpuime, ekema akpɔ akɔfafa le amegãkuku me.
1Ɖo ŋku wɔwòla dzi le wò ɖekakpuiŋkekewo me, hafi ne ŋkeke vɔ̃wo nava, eye ƒe, siwo ŋu nele gbɔgblɔ ge le be, womedze ye ŋu o la, nagogo; 2hafi ne ɣe, ɣleti kple ɣletiviwo naɖo viviti, eye alilikpo nagatrɔ ava le tsidzadza megbe; 3esime aƒe ŋu dzalawo dzona nyanyanya, eye ŋutsu kakowo xana gobaa, nyɔnu wɔtulawo dzudzɔa dɔwɔwɔ, elabena womegasɔ gbɔ o; esime fesrenukpɔlawo ƒe mo ɖoa viviti, 4eye wodoa ʋɔtru, siwo lrɔ ɖe abla me, elabena wɔtutu megale ɖiɖim sesĩe o, eye wofɔna, ne xevi ƒe gbe tete ɖi, eye nyɔnu hadzilawo ƒe gbeme xena; 5togbɛwo hã dzia ŋɔ na ame, eye ŋɔdzi nɔa mawo dzi; wotsria azi, eye ʋetsuviwo tea texlolo, eye nuɖuɖu medzroa ame o; elabena amegbetɔ yia eƒe aƒe mavɔ me, eye konyifalawo nɔa yiyim le kpɔɖome; 6hafi ne klosaloka natso, eye sikagba nagbã, trekpezi nafli le vudo to, eye tsidumɔ̃ nakaka; 7hafi ne ekewɔ nagatrɔ yi anyigba, si wònye tsã la gbɔ, eye gbɔgbɔ la nagbugbɔ ayi Mawu, amesi tsɔe na la gbɔ.
Mawuvɔvɔ̃ enye nufiafiawo katã ƒe blibotɔ.
8Toflokowo ƒe tofloko! Nyagblɔla be: Nuwo kalã toflokowoe!
9Nyagblɔla sia la menye nunyala ko o, ke boŋ eda sidzedze dukɔ la, edo nu kpɔ, edi nu gɔme, eye wòdo lo geɖewo. 10Nyagblɔla la di nya viviwo be, yeakpɔ, eye nyateƒenya, siwo woŋlɔ ɖi la, wole eteƒe. 11Nunyalawo ƒe nyawo le abe ŋu kple gatagbadza, si woƒo ɖe nu ene. Kplɔla ɖekae ɖo amewo woƒo wo nu ƒu.
12Hekpe ɖe esia ŋu la, vinye, na woaxlɔ̃ nu wò! Agbalẽ geɖe wɔwɔ mekpɔa seƒeɖo o, eye nusɔsrɔ̃ geɖe ɖe wòtea ɖeɖi ŋufilã ŋu. 13Mina míase nyaawo kalã ƒe taƒonya be: Vɔ̃ Mawu, eye nalé eƒe seawo me ɖe asi; elabena esia nye amegbetɔtvo katã tɔ! 14Elabena Mawu le nuwɔwɔwo katã, siwo ɣla la, he ge ava ʋɔnui, eɖanye nyui alo vɔ̃ o.

Title: HAWO ƑE HA 1
Content:
Xɔlɔ̃wo le lɔlɔ̃ na wo nɔewo.
1Salomo hawo ƒe ha.
2Etsɔ wo nu gbugbɔ nu nam, elabena wo lɔlɔ̃ nyo wu wein. 3Wò ami le ya ɖem nyuie; wo ŋkɔ le abe ami, si wowu ene, eyata ɖetugbiwo lɔ̃a wo nya ɖo. 4Kplɔm yii, na míaɖe abla! Fia la kplɔm yi eƒe xɔ me. Míatso aseye, eye míakpɔ dzidzɔ, eye míakafu wò lɔlɔ̃ wu wein; amewo lɔ̃a wò ɖe eteƒe.
5Yerusalem-nyɔnuviwo, menye ame yi, gake menye abe Kedar ƒe agbadɔwo kple Salomo ƒe kuntruwo ene. 6Migamɔ kpɔyem be, menya alea o, elabena ɣee ɖum. Danye viŋutsuwo ɖo dɔmedzoe ɖe ŋunye; wotsɔm ɖo weingbledzɔlae, ke nyemedzɔ nye ŋutɔ nye weingble ŋu o.
7Wò, amesi nye lunɔ lɔ̃na, gblɔe nam dzro: Afikanènyia lãwo le, eye afika wotsyɔa akɔ ɖo le ŋɖɔ me? Nukaŋuti manɔ tsa glãla tsam le hawòviwo ƒe lãhawo gbɔ? 8Wò tugbedzɛ le nyɔnuwo dome, ne mènyae o la, ekema do go, eye naɖo lãhawo ƒe afɔ, eye nanyi wò gbɔ̃viwo le lãkplɔlawo ƒe agbadɔwo gbɔ!
9Xɔ̃nye, èle abe nye sɔnɔ le Farao ƒe tasiaɖam ŋu ene. 10Dzonu le tonu na wò nyuie, eye adzagba le kɔ na wò. 11Míatu sikakɔsɔkɔsɔ kple klosalokpeviwo na wò. 12Esime fia la bɔbɔ nɔ eƒe ablegɔ me la, nye gbe ʋeʋẽewo ɖe ya. 13Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ le ahe miregoe le akɔnu nam ene. 14Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ nye koferseƒoƒo nam le Engedi-weingblewo me. 15Edze tugbe, xɔ̃nye, èdze tugbe loo! Wò ŋkuwo le abe ahɔne ƒe ŋkuwo ene. 16Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ, èdze ɖeka, eye nènyo; mía dɔƒe ɖe ama. 17Míaƒe xɔ ƒe daɖedziwo nye sedertiwo, eye míaƒe xɔmeɖoʋuƒowo nye fɔfɔlĩ.

Title: HAWO ƑE HA 2
Content:
Lɔlɔ̃tɔwo ɖi wò nɔewo yome vevie.
1Nyee nye seƒoƒo le Saron kple dzogbenya le baliwo me. 2Alesi dzogbenya noa aŋɔka mea le nenema xɔ̃nye le nyɔnuviwo domee. 3Alesi atɔlɔŋutiti le avemetiwo domee la, nenema nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ le ɖekakpuiwo domee. Melɔ̃a eƒe vɔvɔli te nɔnɔ, eye eƒe kutsetsewo vivina le nye nu me. 4Ekplɔm yi weinxɔ me, eye lɔlɔ̃ enye eƒe aflaga le dzinye. 5Mi tso weintsetsebolo de agbe ŋunye, eye mitsɔ atɔtɔŋuti fa dzi nam, ale bena lɔlɔ̃ de dɔ la me nam. 6Etsɔ eƒe mía de nye ta te, eye wòtsɔ eƒe nuɖusi kple kɔ nam. 7Yerusalem-nyɔnuviwo, meta sãde alo zinɔ le gbe me ne mi: Miganyɔ lɔlɔ̃ o, migaʋuʋui o, vaseɖe esime wòadze eya ŋutɔ ŋu hafi!
8Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ ŋkɔ le ɖiɖim! Kpɔ ɖa, eya nye ekem gbɔna; ele kpo dzom flɔ towo, eye wòle kpo tim flɔ togbɛwo. 9Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ le abe sãde alo zivi ene, ele tsitre ɖe míaƒe gli te xoxo. Ele nu kpɔm to fesre nu, eye wòɖo ŋku ɖe adzrala nu. 10Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ xɔ edzi gblɔ nam bena: Xɔ̃nye, tso; nye tugbedzɛ, va! 11Elabena vuvɔŋɔli yi aƒe, tsidzadza ke, eye enu yi. 12Seƒoƒowo ɖo ɖe anyigba dzi, weinkawo ŋu ɖeɣi ɖo, eye wole akpakpa ƒe xɔxlɔ sem le míaƒe anyigba dzi. 13Gboti ƒe tsetsewo ɖe asi ɖiɖi me, eye weinka ƒe seƒoƒowo le ya ɖem nyuie. Tso, xɔnye, nye tugbedzɛ, va! 14Nye ahɔne le kpetowo me, le agawo ƒe globoeaƒe; na makpɔ ŋkuwò me, na mase wò gbe! Elabena wò gbe vivina, eye ŋkuwò me nyo. 15Milé abeiwo na mi, abeiviwo, siwo gblẽa weingblewo; elabena míaƒe weingblewo ƒo se.
16Tɔnyee nye nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ la, eye nye hã menye etɔ, eya amesi nyia lãwo le dzogbenyawo me. 17Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ, trɔ gbɔ, hafi anyinu nafa, eye vɔvɔli nu nayi, eye nanɔ abe sãde alo zivi le atike ʋeʋẽe towo dzi ene!

Title: HAWO ƑE HA 3
Content:
Lɔlɔ̃tɔwo ƒe anukwareɖiɖi.
1Meɖi amesi nye luʋɔ lɔna la, le nye aha dzi le zã me, medii nyemekpɔe o. 2Eyata mafa aɖatsa le dua me le ablɔ me kple kpɔdomewo, ne madi amesi nye luʋɔ lɔ̃na la! Medii, ke nyemekpɔe o. 3Dzɔla, siwo le tsatsam le dua me la, do gom. „Míekpɔ amesi nye luʋɔ lɔ̃na la oa?“ 4Nyemekpɔ to wo ŋu yi o, tete mekpɔ amesi nye luʋɔ lɔ̃na la. Melée, eye megbe asiɖeɖe le eŋu, vaseɖe esime mekplɔe va danye ƒe me, va nɔnye ƒe xɔ mee. 5Yerusalem-nyɔnuviwo, meta sàde alo zinɔ le gbe me na mi: Miganyɔ lɔlɔ̃ o, mígaʋuʋui o, vaseɖe esime wòadze eya ŋutɔ ŋu hafi!
Xɔlɔ̃ ƒe atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo.
6Amekae nye ekem tso gbe me gbɔna abe dzudzɔ babla ene, eye atike ʋeʋẽe, dzudzɔ ʋeʋée donu kple nudzralawo ƒe atike vovovowo le ya ɖem le eŋu? 7Kpo da, Salomo ƒe apakae! Kalẽtɔ blaade tso Israel ƒe kalẽtɔwo dome ƒo xlãe. 8Wo katã wobi de aʋawɔwɔ me, eye woƒe asi le yi dzi; amesiame ta yi de aklito le zã me ŋɔdzi la. 9Fia Salomo na wotso Libanon-ti kpa atiklãe. 10Ele alɔwo nye klosalo, eye medeƒe nye sika, anyinɔƒe nye aɖabɛ, eye Yerusalem nyɔnuviwo ƒe lɔlɔ̃ do atsiã ne ɖe eme gome. 11Mi Zion-nyɔnuviwo, mido va, ne míakpɔ fia Salomo le fiakuku, si dadaa ɖɔ nɛ la me le eƒe srɔ̃ɖegbe, le eƒe dzi ƒe dzidzɔkpɔgbe!

Title: HAWO ƑE HA 4
Content:
Lɔlɔ̃ na xɔlɔ̃.
1Èdze tugbe, xɔ̃nye, èdze tugbe ŋutɔ. Wò ŋkuwo nye ahɔne ƒe ŋkuwo le moxevɔ la me. Wò ɖa le abe gbɔ̃hawoe tsyɔ akɔ anyi de Gilead-to kɔgo ene. 2Wò aɖuwo le abe alẽha, si woke tu na tete, eye wodo tso tsileƒe la ene; wo katã wonye venɔwo, eye wo dometɔa ɖeke metsi ko o. 3Wò nuyiwo le abe ka dzẽ ene, eye wò nu dze ani; wò tonuƒuiwo le dzedzem le moxevɔ me abe yevuboɖa, si me wole ene. 4Wò ka le abe Dawid ƒe xɔ tsrala, si wotu bena gbetakpɔkpɔ ene Woku akpoxɔnu gagã akpe de eŋu, siwo katã nye kalẽtɔwo ƒe akpoxɔnuwo. 5Wò nowo le abe sãdevi eve, zi venɔvi, siwo le gbe ɖum le dzogbenyawo me ene. 6Mayi atike ʋeʋẽe towo kple dzudzɔ ʋeʋẽe donu togbɛwo dzi, hafi anyinu nafa, eye vɔvɔli nu nayi. 7Xɔ̃nye, nusianu nyo le ŋuwò, dzuƒea ɖeke mele ŋuwò o.
8Ɖi kplim tso Libanon dzi, ŋugbetɔ, ɖi kplim tso Libanon dzi! Zɔ tso Amana ta me, tso Senir kple Xermon ta me, tso dzatawo nɔƒe kple lãkletowo dzi. 9Nɔvinyenyɔnu, nye ŋugbetɔ, ègblẽ tame nam, ètsɔ wò nukpɔkpɔ kple kɔsɔkɔsɔ, si le wò kɔdzonuwo me, gblẽ tame nam. 10Nɔyinyenyɔnu, nye ŋugbetɔ, wò lɔlɔ̃ vivina loo! Wò lɔlɔ̃ nyo wu wein, eye wo ami ƒe ʋeʋẽ ƒo atike ʋeʋẽewo la. 11Ŋugbetɔ, anyitsi le tsyɔtsyɔm le nuyi ŋu na wò; anyitsi kple notsi le wò aɖe te; wò avɔwo me ƒe ʋeʋẽ le abe Libanon ƒe ʋeʋẽ ene. 12Nɔvinyenyɔnu, nye ŋugbetɔ enye abɔ, si ƒe ʋɔ wodo, vudo, si nu wotu nu do, kple tsidzɔƒe, si nu wotre. 13Wò numiemiewo nye yevuboɖabɔ, si me kutsetse nyuiwo, koferseƒoƒo kple gbe ʋeʋẽewo, 14gbe ʋeʋẽewo kple agumetaku, gbekee, botsyo kple dzudzɔ ʋeʋẽe dogbewo katã, mire kple aloe kpakple atike veviwo katã te. 15Abɔ me tsidzidzi, tsi gbagbe vudo kple tɔʋu, si si tso Libanon dzi la nènye. 16Anyieheya, tso, eye dzieheya, va, naƒo ato nye abɔ me, ne eƒe ʋeʋẽ nagbagba di. 17Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ va eƒe abɔ me, eye wòɖu eƒe kutsetse nyuiawo.

Title: HAWO ƑE HA 5
Content:
Lɔlɔ̃tɔ se xɔlɔ̃a ƒe gbe, fa konyi le mamã ŋuti, eye wokafu eƒe nyonyo.
1Nɔvinyenyɔnu, nye ŋugbetɔ, meva nye abɔ me, meke nye mire kple atike ʋeʋẽewo, menyi nye anyixe kple anyitsi, meno nye wein kple nye notsi. Xɔ̃nyewo, miɖu nu, miano nu, nye lɔlɔ̃tɔwo, mino aha mu!
2Mele alɔ̃ dɔm, ke nye dzi le ŋute. Mido to, nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ le ʋɔ ƒom! Nɔvinyenyɔnu, xɔnye, nye ahɔne, nye ame dzadzɛ, ʋu ʋɔ nam! Elabena zãmu ƒo tame nam ƒũ, eye nye ɖa me yɔ fu kple dzadza. 3Meɖe nye avɔwo ɖi, ɖe magatsɔ wo ataa? Meklɔ nye afɔwo, ɖe magaƒo ɖi woa? 4Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ do asi ɖe fesre nu, tete nye lãme gbagba yi ɖe eŋu. 5Mefa, be maʋu ʋɔa na nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ, eye ami ʋeʋẽe le tsyɔtsyɔm le asi ŋu nam, ami nenẽe tsrolo le ɖuɖum le nye asibide ŋu ɖe gameti ƒe asiléƒe ŋu. 6Meʋu ʋɔa na nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ, ke nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ trɔ dzo, ebu. Luʋɔ dzo le tanye, esime wòƒo nu. Medii, nyemekpɔe o; meyɔe, gake metɔ nam o. 7Dzɔla, siwo le tsatsam le dua me la do gom, woƒom de abi ŋunye; gli ŋu dzɔlawo ɖe taɖedzi le ŋunye. 8Yerusalem-nyɔnuviwo, mele mi: Ne miekpɔ nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ la, mito nɛ be, lɔlɔ̃ de dɔ lã me nam!
9Nyɔnuwo ƒe tughedzɛ, nuka wo lɔlɔ̃tɔ tso ƒo lɔlɔ̃tɔ bubuwo tae? Nuka wo lɔlɔ̃tɔ tsa ƒo lɔlɔ̃tɔ bubuwo tae, hafi nèta nu na mí alea? 10Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ fu, eye wòbiã, eye wòƒo ame akpe nanewo la; 11eƒe ta enye sika nyuitɔ, eƒe ɖa le abe ɖeʋala, siwo dza ɖe anyi me ene, eye wònyɔ abe akpaviã ene; 12eƒe ŋkuwo le abe ahɔne le tɔʋu to ene, wole notsi, eye wosɔ ɖe ŋku to me; 13eƒe alɔgo enye atike ʋeʋẽe kpo, si dzi atike ʋeʋẽe mie ɖo; eƒe nuyiwo nye dzogbenya, siwo le mire tsrolo tsyɔm; 14eƒe alɔwo nye sikati mlimɔwo, siwo ŋu woɖo Tarsis-kpewoe; eƒe ƒoɖo enye aɖaŋudɔ, si wotsɔ nyiɖu wɔe, eye wotsɔ safir ɖo atsyɔ̃ ɖe eŋu; 15eƒe atawo nye kpe ɣi sɔti, siwo woɖo sikafɔ dzi; eƒe dzedzeme le abe Libanon ene, eye wonye nu vevi abe sederti ene; 16vivi le eƒe nu me, eye eyama ɖze ani. Yerusalem-nyɔnuviwo, nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ lae nye esia: amesiae nye xɔ̃nye la!

Title: HAWO ƑE HA 6
Content:
Dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ le ɖekawɔwɔ ŋuti.
1Nyɔnuwo ƒe tugbedzɛ, afika wò lɔlɔ̃tɔ la yi? Gakae wo lɔlɔ̃tɔ la trɔ ɖo, ne míadii na wo ti. 2Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ yi eƒe abɔ me, yi atike ʋeʋẽe kpowo gbɔ, ne wòanyi lã le abɔ me, eye wòaké dzogbenya. 3Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ la enye tɔnye, eye nye hã menye etɔ, eya, amesi nyia lãwo le dzogbenyawo me.
4Xɔ̃nye, èdze tugbe abe Tirza ene, ènye abe Yerusalem ene, eye nèdzia ŋɔ abe aʋakɔ ene. 5Ɖe ŋku ɖa le ŋunye, elabena wole ŋɔ dzim nam! Wo ɖa le abe gbɔ̃hawoe tsyɔ akɔ anyi de Gilead kɔgo ene. 6Wo aɖuwo le abe alẽha, siwo do tso tsileƒe ene, wo katã wonye venɔwo, eye wo dometɔa ɖeke metsi ko o. 7Wo tonuƒui le dzedzem le moxevɔ me abe yevuboɖa, si me wole ene. 8Fiasrɔ̃wo le blaade, ahiãwo le blanyi, hekpe ɖe ɖetugbiwo ŋu kpaŋkpaŋ. 9Ke ɖeka koe nye nye; ahɔne, nye ame dzadzɛ, eya nye dadaa ƒe tenu, nɔa ƒe nu vevi. Nyɔnuviwo kpɔe, eye woyrae, fiasrɔ̃wo kple ahiãwo kafui.
10Amekae le anyi me kpɔmahe agudzedze ene, nyo ahe ɣleti ene, dza abe ɣe ene, eye wòdzia ŋɔ ahe aoakɔwo ene? 11Meyi ɖe azibɔ me, ne makpɔ gbe fewo le bali me ɖa, eye maɖakpɔ be, weinkawo dze, eye yevuboɖatiwo ƒo se hã? 12Nye didi kplɔm le manyamanya me yi ɖe nyee dukɔ ŋku la ƒe tasiaɖam gbɔe.

Title: HAWO ƑE HA 7
Content:
Lɔlɔ̃tɔwo ƒe dzeɖoɖo.
1Trɔ, trɔ, Sulamit, trɔ, trɔ, ne míaɖe ŋku ɖe ŋuwò! Nuka míebe, yiewoakpɔ le Sulamit ŋu? Aʋaɣeɖuɖue loo? 2Wo bubume vinyɔnu, aleke wò azɔlime nyo le atokota me ale? Wò kpenyenyẽ le ahe kɔdzonu, si nye aɖaŋua ƒe asinudɔwɔwɔ ene; 3wò akɔnu enye ze tegblẽ, si me aha tɔtɔ mevɔna le o, wò ƒoɖo enye bli, si woli kɔe, eye dzogbenya ɖe to ɖee; 4wò nowo le abe sãdevi eve, zi venɔvi ene; 5wò kɔ enye nyiɖuxɔ tsrala; wò ŋkuwo le abe ta, si le Xesbon le Batrabim-gbo nu ene; wò ŋɔti le ahe Libanon ƒe xɔ tsrala, si ɖo ta Damasko ene. 6Wò ta, si le nuwò, ɖi Karmel; wò taɖa le abe aɖabɛ ene; wò ɖa ɖe ga fia. 7Edze tugbe, eye nenyo loo, wò lɔlɔ̃, si nye vivisesego! 8Ele tsralɛ abe deti ene, eye wò nowo nye detawe. 9Mebe, made deti la dzi, eye malé eƒe alɔwo. Wò nowo nenye weinkpo le weinka ŋu, eye wò ŋɔli ƒe ʋeʋẽ neɖi atɔtɔŋuti tɔ! 10Wò nu me nenye wen nyuitɔ, si ato nuyi kple aɖu dzi na nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ wɔli.
11Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ tɔ menye, eye yonyeme mɔ dim wòle. 12Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ, va míado ayi gbe me, eye míanɔ koferseƒoƒowo me. 13Míafɔ ŋdi kanya ayi weingblewo me, ne míakpɔ be, weinkaawo dze, seƒoƒoawo ke, eye yevuboɖatiawo ƒo se hã? Afima matsɔ nye lɔlɔ̃ na wò le. 14Agbitsawo ƒe ʋeʋẽ gbagba ɖi, eye kutsetse nyui vovovowo le míaƒe ʋɔtru nu; nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ, medzra yeyeawo kple xoxoawo ɖo na wo.

Title: HAWO ƑE HA 8
Content:
Anukwareɖiɖi, si anɔ anyi ɖaa.
1Oo, esi nahanɔ nam abe nɔvinyeŋutsu, si no danye ƒe no ene ɖe! Anye ne mekpɔ wo le kpɔdome la, magbugbɔ nu na wò, eye amea ɖeke maɖo vlom o; 2anye ne makplɔ wò ayi danye ƒe me, ayi nɔnye ƒe xɔ mee. Mana atike ʋeʋẽe ƒe wein kple yevuboɖaha wò nano. 3Etsɔ eƒe mía de nye ta te, eye wòtsɔ eƒe nuɖusi kple kɔ nam. 4Yerusalem-nyɔnuviwo, meta mi: Miganyɔ lɔlɔ̃ o, migaʋuʋui o, vaseɖe esime wòadze eya ŋutɔ ŋu hafi!
5Ameka nye ekem tso gbe me gbɔna heziɔ ɖe eƒe lɔlɔ̃tɔ ŋu? Atɔtɔŋutiti le menyɔ wò le; afima dawò se veve dzi wò ɖo, afima nɔwò lé ku dzi wò ɖo. 6Tsɔm wɔ ŋkɔslgɛ ɖe wò dzi ŋu kple ŋkɔsigɛ de wò asi! Elabena lɔlɔ̃ tri akɔ wu ku, eye ŋuʋaʋã se wu tsleƒe, eƒe bibi le abe dzo ƒe bibi ene, Yehowa ƒe dzoƒade wònye! 7Tsi geɖe mate ŋu atsi lɔlɔ̃ o, eye tɔsisi gãwo mate ŋu akplɔe adzoe o. Ne amea ɖe be, yeatsɔ eƒe aƒe me kesinɔnuwo katã ana ɖe lɔlɔ̃ ta la, ɖeko woade alɔme te eŋu.
8Nɔvinyɔnu suea ɖe le mia si, mekpɔ te no haɖe o. Aleke míawɔ na mía nɔvmyɔnu la, le gbesigbe woabia eta? 9Nenye gbe wonye la, míatsɔ klosalo atɔ kpɔ ɖe edzi, eye nenye agboe wònye la, míatsɔ sederʋuƒowo aklãe. 10Gli menye, eye nye nowo le ahe xɔ tsralawo ene; eye mekpɔ ŋutifafa le eŋku me.
11Weingble le Salomo si le Baal-Hamon; etsɔ weingble la ɖe asi na dzikpɔlawo be, wo dome amesiame nana klosalo sekel akpe ɖeka ɖe kutsetseawo ta. 12Nye weingble le nye ŋutɔ asinye me, Salomo, tɔwòe nye sekel akpe ɖeka, eye alafa eve enye kutsetse dzikpɔlawo tɔ!
13Wò nyɔnu, si nɔa abɔ me, xɔlɔwo ƒu to anyi ɖe wò gbe ŋu; na masee! 14Nye lɔlɔ̃tɔ, ɖe afɔ mi me, eye nanɔ abe sãde alo zivi, si le atike ʋeʋẽe towo dzi ene!

Title: YESAYA 1
Content:
Israel le nuvɔ̃ kple tohehe.
1Esia nye ŋutega, si Yesaya, Amoz vi la, kpo le Yuda kple Yerusalem ŋu le Yuda-fiawo Uziya, Yotam, Axaz kple Xizkiya ŋɔli.
2Mi dziƒowo, misee, eye anyigba, ƒu to anyi; elabena Yehowa le nu ƒom bena: Menyi viwo wotsi, eye medo wo ɖe dzi, ke wodze aglã ɖe ŋunye. 3Nyitsu nyaa etoa, eye tedzi nyaa eƒe aƒetɔ ƒe lãto; ke Israel menyae o, eye nye dukɔ melé ŋku ɖe eŋu o. 4Baba na mi anyigba dzi nɔlawo, dukɔ, si dzi fɔɖiɖi li kɔ ɖo, vodalawo ƒe viwo, vi gbegblẽ wo! Wogblẽ Yehowa ɖi, wodo ɖiŋu na Israel ƒe kɔkɔeto la, eye wogbugbɔ ɖe megbe. 5Nukaŋuti woanɔ mia ƒoƒo dzi, esi miele godzedze dzi ɖaa? Ta blibo la xɔ abi, eye nu te dzi blibo la ŋu belibeli. 6Teƒe nyuia ɖeke mele eŋu o, tso afɔƒo me vaseɖe dzodome: abi kple dodro kpakple ƒoƒo yeye; womeyɔ tsi le eme o, womeblae o, eye womeɖe ami ɖee wobɔbɔ o. 7Miaƒe anyigba zu gbegbe; dzo fiã miaƒe duwo, eye du bubu me tɔwo ɖu miaƒe agble le mia ŋku me, eye wòzu gbegbe, abe alesi wogblẽ Sodom ene. 8Eye Zion-nyɔnuvi tsi anyi abe agbadɔ le weingble me, abe miaƒe le adzamatregble me kple du, si woɖe to ɖo la ene. 9Ɖe menye Yehowa Zebaot ye kpɔtɔ ame ʋeea ɖewo ɖi na mí o la, anye ne esuso vie ko miele abe Sodom ene, eye míeɖi Gomora!
Biabia tso Israel bena, wòatrɔ dzi me, eye megasubɔ Mawu le gota ɖeɖeko o.
10Mi Sodom-amegãwo, mise Yehowa ƒe nya, mi Gomora-dukɔ, miƒu to anyi ɖe mía Mawu ƒe nufiame ŋu! 11Yehowa be, Nuka miaƒe akpedavɔsa gbogboawo awɔ nam? Agbowo ƒe numevɔsa kple nyivi damiwo ƒe ami ti kɔ nam, eye nyiwo, alẽviwo kple gbɔ̃tsuwo ƒe ʋu medzea ŋunye o. 12Ne mieva, be yewoado ɖe ŋkunye me la, amekae bia esia tso mia si be, mianɔ afɔ ƒom nye xɔxɔnuwo? 13Migasa nuɖuvɔ alakpatɔ azɔ o, dzudzɔdonu nyɔŋu wònye nam. Dzinu yeyewo, dzudzɔgbewo kple gbeƒẽɖeɖe takpegbewo la, nyemate ŋu ado dzi atsɔ alakpa kple takpekpewo o! 14Melé fu miaƒe dzinu yeyewo kple miaƒe ŋkekenyuiewo, wòzu agba nam, eye wo tsɔtsɔ glom. 15Ne mieke miaƒe abɔwo la, matsyɔ nu ŋku me ɖe mi, eye ne mieli kɔ gbedodoɖa gleglegle hã la, nyemasee o, elabena ʋu yɔ asi me na mi! 16Mile tsi, miklɔ mia ɖokui ŋu! Miɖe miaƒe nuwɔwɔ vɔ̃ɖiwo ɖa le ŋkunye me, eye midzudzɔ vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ! 17Misrɔ̃ nu nyui wɔwɔ, miti nya dzɔdzɔe yome, mixɔ na amesi wote ɖe anyi, midrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na tsyɔ̃eviwo, eye mihe nya na ahosiwo!
Ŋugbedodo kple ŋɔdzidodo.
18Yehowa be: Miva mídrɔ̃ nɔ nu! Ne miaƒe nuvɔ̃wo le abe nyagadzĩ ene la, woafu abe sno ene, eye ne wòbiã abe aɖabɛ ene la, woazu abe alẽfu ene. 19Ne mielɔ̃, eye mieɖo to la, ekema miaɖu anyigba ƒe nu nyuitɔ. 20Ke ne miegbe, eye miesẽ to la, yi aɖu mi, elabena Yehowa ƒe nue gblɔe.
21Aleke du wɔnuteƒe, si me nya dzɔdzɔe no tu la, zu gbolo? Afisi dzɔdzɔenyenye na tsã la, hlɔ̃dolawo li fifia! 22Wò klosalo zu aŋuka, eye wotso tsi dzro wò wein! 23Wò amegãwo zu aglãdzelawo kple fiafiwo xɔlɔ̃; wo dome amesiame lɔ̃a zãnunana, eye wotia fetu yome; womedrɔ̃a ʋɔnu na tsyɔ̃eviwo o, eye ahosiwo ƒe nya medea wo gbe o. 24Eyata Aƒetɔ, Yehowa Zebaot, Israel ƒe ŋusẽtɔ la ƒe gbe enye si: Alele, mele akɔ fa ge na ɖokuinye ɖe nye ketɔwo ŋu, eye mele hlɔ̃ bia ge ɖe nye futɔwo ŋu. 25Matrɔ nye asi ɖe ŋuwò, eye malólo wò aŋukawo abe adzalẽɖaɖi wotso wòe ene, eye maɖe wò tsumiwo katã ɖa. 26Magaɖo ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo na wò abe tsã ene, kple adaŋudelawo na wò abe le gɔmedzedzea me ene. Esia megbe woayɔ wò be dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe du, du wɔnuteƒe. 27Woatso ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ aɖe Zion, eye woatsɔ dzɔdzɔenyenye aɖe eƒe amesiwo trɔ ta me la. 28Woagbã godzelawo kple nuvɔ̃wɔlawo siaa nyanyanya, eye amesiwo trɔ le Yehowa yome la nu ayi. 29Elabena ŋu akpe mi le logoti, siwo ŋu miekpɔa dzidzɔ le la ŋu, eye miaƒe mo atsi dã le aba, siwo mielɔ̃na la ŋu. 30Elabena mia ŋutɔwo mianɔ abe logoti, siwo ƒe aŋgba yrɔ, kple abɔ, si tsia ɖeke meli na o la ene. 31Ame sesẽ la azu ɖetifu, eye eƒe dɔwɔwɔ azu dzoxi; wo kple eve la siaa woabi, eye amea ɖeke mate ŋu atsi wo o.

Title: YESAYA 2
Content:
Xɔxɔ kple ŋutifafa atso Zion ava na dukɔwo katã; gake la ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ ava Israel dzi gbã le eƒe trɔ̃subɔsubɔ ta.
1Nya, si Yesaya, Amoz vi la, kpo le Yuda kple Yerusalem ŋu la enye si: 2Ava me le ŋkeke mlɔeawo me be, Yehowa ƒe aƒe ƒe to la akɔ ta agbɔ towo ŋu, eye wòaƒo togbɛwo ta, eye anyigba dzi dukɔwo katã aƒo zi ɖe eŋu. 3Eye dukɔ geɖewo atso agblɔ bena: Mina míayi Yehowa ƒe to la, Yakob ƒe Mawu ƒe aƒe la gbɔ, ne wòafia nu mí le eƒe mawo ŋu, eye míazɔ eƒe toƒewo. Elabena nufiame atso Zion, eye Yehowa ƒe nya atso Yerusalem. 4Adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na anyigba dzi dukɔwo, eye woatso nya me na dukɔ geɖewo; woatso woƒe yiwo atu kodziwoe, eye woatso woƒe akplɔwo atu hɛ gobɛwoe; dukɔ magatso yi ɖe dukɔ ŋu azɔ o, eye womagasrɔ̃ aʋa wowu hã azɔ o. 5Yakob ƒe aƒe, mitso, ne míazɔ le Yehowa ƒe kekeli me!
6Etso wò dukɔ, Yakob ƒe aƒe la, ƒu gbe, elabena ɣedzeƒetɔwo ƒe afakaka yɔ wo fũ, wosa dzo abe Filistitowo ene, eye wona asi du bubu me viwo. 7Klosalo kple sika yɔ eƒe anyigba dzi fũ, eye eƒe kesinɔnuwo teƒe mekɔ o; sɔwo yɔ eƒe anyigba dzi fũ, eye eƒe tasiaɖamwo teƒe mekɔ o. 8Legbawo yɔ eƒe anyigba dzi fũ; wode ta agu na woawo ŋutɔwo ƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo, nusiwo woawo ŋutɔwo ƒe asibide wɔ. 9Ale amegbetɔ de ta agu, eye ŋutsu bɔbɔ eɖokui; màtsɔe ake wo o! 10Yi ɖe agato me, eye naɣla ɖokuiwò ɖe ke me tso Yehowa ƒe ŋɔdzi kple eƒe gãnyenye ƒe atsyɔ̃ la nu! 11Woabɔbɔ amegbetɔwo ƒe ŋku kɔkɔwo ɖe anyi, eye woate ŋutsuwo ƒe dàda ɖe to, ale be Yehowa ɖeɖeko lanye gã le ŋkeke ma dzi. 12Elabena ŋkeke li na Yehowa Zebaot ɖe dadalawo katã kple ame kɔkɔwo, ɖe nusiwo katã kɔa ta dzi la ŋu, ne woabɔbɔ ɖe anyi; 13ɖe Libanon ƒe sedertiwo katã, siwo ko, eye woƒo ta la ŋu, ɖe Basan ƒe logotiwo katã ŋu; 14ɖe to kɔkɔwo katã kple togbɛ kɔkɔwo katã ŋu; 15ɖe xɔ tsrala kɔkɔwo katã kple gli sesẽwo katã ŋu; 16ɖe Tarsis-ʋuwo katã kple nukpɔkpɔ veviwo katã ŋu. 17Woabɔbɔ amegbetɔwo ƒe adegbeƒoƒo ɖe anyi, eye woate ŋutsuwo ƒe dàda ɖe to, ne Yehowa ɖeɖeko nanye gã le ŋkeke ma dzi. 18Eye legbawo nu ayi keŋkeŋ. 19Eye wòayi kpetowo kple anyigba dzi dowo me tso Yehowa ƒe ŋɔdzi kple eƒe gãnyenye ƒe atsyɔ̃ nu, ne etso, be yeado ŋɔdzi na anyigba. 20Gbemagbe la amegbetɔ atsɔ eƒe klosalolegba kple eƒe sikalegba, siwo wòwɔ, be yeade ta agu na la, aƒu gbe na alegeliwo kple agutɔwo, 21ne wòayi agadowo kple kpetowo me tso Yehowa ƒe ŋɔdzi kple eƒe gãnyenye ƒe atsyɔ̃ la nu, ne etso, be yeado ŋɔdzi na anyigba. 22Eyata miɖe asi le amegbetɔ, si ƒe ŋɔti me gbɔgbɔ le la ƒe nya me, elabena nukata gɔ̃ woabui ɖo?

Title: YESAYA 3
Content:
Ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ ava dukɔ la dzi le eƒe nuvɔ̃, vevitɔ nyɔnuwo ƒe yakanuwɔwɔ ta.
1Elabena kpɔ ɖa, Aƒetɔ, Yehowa Zebaot, aɖe atizɔti kple ziɔɖeŋu ɖa le Yerusalem kple Yuda, abolo ƒe xɔnamewo katã kple tsi ƒe xɔnamewo katã, 2kalẽtɔwo kple aʋawɔlawo, ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo kple nyagblɔɖilawo, afakalawo kple ame tsitsiwo, 3ame blaatɔ̃wo ƒe amegãwo, ame ŋkutawo, adaŋudelavvo, aɖaŋuawo ƒe amegãwo kple dzotɔwo. 4Matso ɖeviwo aɖo woƒe amegãwoe, eye ɖevinuwɔlawo aɖu fia ɖe wo dzi; 5amewo asẽ ŋuta le wo nɔewo ŋu, eye amesiame le ehavi ŋu, ɖeviwo adze agbo ɖe amegã ɖeɖiwo ŋu, eye yakamewo ɖe bubumewo ŋu. 6Ne amea ɖe alé nɔvia le fofoa ƒe me bena: „Avɔ le asiwò, eyata nanye míaƒe amegã, eye aƒe gbagbã sia nanɔ asiwò me“ la, 7axɔ edzi agblɔ gbemagbe bena: „Nyemele abiwɔlaa ɖeke nye ge o, elabena abolo kple avɔa ɖeke mele aƒenye me o; migatsɔm ɖo dukɔ ƒe amegãe o!“ 8Elabena Yerusalem amũ, eye Yuda adze anyi, le esi woƒe aɖewo kple woƒe nuwɔwɔwo tso ɖe Yehowa ŋu, ne woaɖo dziku na eƒe kɔkɔenyenye ƒe ŋkuwo ta. 9Woƒe moɖoɖo le ɖase ɖim le wo ŋu, eye woɖe woƒe nuvɔ̃wo fia faa abe Sodom ene, womeɣlae o; baba na wo, elabena woawo ŋutɔ ɖokui ŋu wole vɔ̃ wɔm ɖo. 10Woayra ame dzɔdzɔewo, wo tɔ me nyo na wo, elabena woaɖu woƒe nuwɔwɔwo ƒe kutsetse. 11Baba na ame vɔ̃ɖi, etɔ me vɔ̃e nɛ, elabena nusi eƒe asi wɔ la, eya woatsɔ awɔe. 12Nye dukɔ ƒe ŋutasẽlawo nye ɖeviwo, eye nyɔnuwo ɖu fia ɖe wo dzi. Nye dukɔ, kplɔwòlawo nye ameflula wo, eye wobaɖa wò toƒe ƒe mɔwo. 13Yehowa tso, be yeahe nya, etsi tre ɖi va, be yeadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu dukɔwo. 14Yehowa kple eƒe dukɔ ƒe ame tsitsiwo kpakple eƒe amegãwo ɖi ʋɔnu be: Miawo miegblẽ nye weingble, eye mieha ame dahewo ƒe nuwo ɖe miaƒe xɔwo me. 15Aƒetɔ, Yehowa Zebaot ƒe gbe enye si be: Nukaŋuti mienyã avuzi le nye dukɔ dzi, eye mieto hiãtɔwo ƒe mo nyanyanya?
16Yehowa be: Esi Zion-nyɔnuviwo dana, eye wolia kɔ ganɛ nɔa yiyim, woɖoa mo ŋanɛ, wonɔa ble nyẽm xatsɛxatsɛ nɔa yiyim, eye woƒe afɔgawo nɔa ɖiɖim gleŋgleŋ la, 17eyata Aƒetɔ la abebe ta na Zion-nyɔnuviwo, eye Yehowa aɖe ama wo. 18Gbemagbe Aƒetɔ la aɖe afɔgɛwo ƒe atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo ɖa, ŋgoblanuwo, gaviwo, 19togɛwo, abɔkpowo kple moxevɔwo, 20takuwo, afɔwo dome kɔsɔkɔsɔwo, alidziblanuwo, anuwɔtregoewo kple kadodowo, 21asigɛwo kple ŋɔtigɛwo, 22atsyɔ̃vɔwo, awu ʋlayawo, taɖedziwo kple akplowo, 23ahuhɔ̃ewo, awutewuiwo, tabablawo kple moxevɔ gãwo. 24Ʋeʋẽ kũ axɔ ɖe ʋeʋẽ lilili teƒe, ka axɔ ɖe alidziblanu teƒe, tabebe axɔ ɖe ɖaƒoƒo teƒe, akpanyatata axɔ ɖe awu ʋlaya nyui teƒe, eye dzobi axɔ ɖe nyonyo teƒe. 25Wò ŋutsuwo atsi yi nu, eye wò kalẽtɔwo atsi aʋa me. 26Woƒe agbowo axa nu, woata konyi, eye woaɖi ƒuƒlu abɔbɔ nɔ anyigba.

Title: YESAYA 4
Content:
Le Mesia ƒe ameɖeɖe ŋuti.
1Nyɔnu adre alé ŋutsu ɖeka gbemagbe agblɔ bena: Míaɖu mía ŋutɔwo ƒe abolo, eye míata mía ŋutɔwo ƒe avɔ; na woayɔ wò ŋkɔ de mía ŋu ko; ɖe míaƒe ŋukpe ɖa le mía ŋu.
2Gbemagbe la Yehowa ƒe atidzedze anye atsyɔ̃ kple bubu, eye anyigba ƒe kutsetse anye adegbeƒoƒo, ɖekadzenu na Israel ƒe ame susɔeawo. 3Eye ava me be, woayɔ amesiwo kpɔtɔ ɖe Zion kple amesiwo tsi Yerusalem, amesiame, si ŋko woŋlɔ ɖe agbagbeawo dome le Yerusalem la be kɔkɔewo, 4nenye be, Aƒetɔ la tsɔ ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ ƒe ya kple dzo ƒe ya klɔ Zion-nyɔnuwo ƒe ɖiƒoƒo, eye wòkpala Yerusalem ƒe ʋu ɖa le wo dome. 5Eye Yehowa aɖo alilikpo kple dzudzɔ ɖe Zion-to ƒe nɔƒewo katã kple eƒe takpeƒewo le ŋkeke me kpakple dzo keklẽ le zã me; elabena wòa tsyɔ nu atsyɔɖoɖowo katã dzi, 6eye agbadɔ anɔ anyi anye vɔvɔli dodo le ŋkeke me le dzoxɔxɔ ta, eye wòanye sitsoƒe kple bebeƒe le dziya kple tsidzadza ta.

Title: YESAYA 5
Content:
Lododa le Aƒetɔ ƒo weinbɔ mawɔnu la ŋuti.
1Mele ha dzi ge le xɔ̃nye ŋu, mele xɔ̃nye ƒe ha dzi ge le eƒe weingble ŋu. Weingblea ɖe le xɔ̃nye si le totame wɔnua ɖe. 2Edzobo eme, eɖe kpewo le eme, eye wòdo weinka nyuitɔwo ɖe eme, etu xɔ tsrala ɖe etitina, ekpa weinfiãnu hã da ɖe eme hele mɔ kpɔm be, atse weintsetsewo; ke etse ʋukatsetsewo. 3Eyata mi Yerusalemtɔwo kple mi Yuda-ŋutsuwo, midrɔ̃ nya le mía kple nye weingble la dome! 4Nukae woawɔ na nye weingble la, eye nyemewɔe nɛ o? Nukaŋuti mele mɔ kpɔm be, atse weintsetsewo, eye wòtse ʋukatsetsewo? 5Azɔ mana mianya nusi wɔ ge mala nye weingble la: Makaka kpo le eŋu, ne lãwo naɖui, magbã gli le eŋu, ne woazɔ edzi. 6Mawɔe woazu afutime; womaɖe eŋu o, eye womaga eme o, ke boŋ aŋɔkawo kple ŋuwò amie ɖe eme; eye made se na alilikpowo be, womagadza tsi ɖe edzi azɔ o. 7Elabena Israel ƒe aƒe lae nye Yehowa Zebaot ƒe weingble, eye Yuda ŋutsuwo nye eƒe dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ ƒe nudodowo: ekpɔ mɔ na afiatsotso, ke ʋukɔkɔɖie li; ekpɔ mɔ na nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ, ke konyifafae li.
Wotsɔ Mawu ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ alo futɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi dzedze do ŋɔdzi na dukɔ la.
8Baba na amesiwo le xɔ tsiãm ɖe xɔ nu, eye wole agble didim ɖe agble nu, vaseɖe esime teƒea ɖeke maganɔ anyi o, ne woawo ɖeɖe nanɔ anyigba dzi! 9Yehowa Zebaot gblɔ ɖe to me nam bena: Ne xɔ gbogboawo matrɔ zu gbegbe, eye xɔ gã nyuiawo mazu xɔdowo o fĩ! 10Elabena Weingble, si nyi eveve teƒe ewo aŋlɔ gbe ɖeka la, anye bat ɖeka, eye nuku gomer ɖeka anye eta ɖeka.
11Baba na amesiwo tɔa fɔŋli hetia aha muame yome, eye wotsia anyi vaseɖe zãtiƒe, ne wein nade dzo lã me na wo! 12Kasaŋkuwo, saŋkuwo, asiʋuiwo kple dzewo kpakple wein kpena ɖe woƒe aglotutu la ŋu; ke womeɖea ŋku ɖe Yehowa ƒe dɔwɔwɔ o, eye womekpɔa eƒe asinudɔwɔwɔ o. 13Eyata woaɖe aboyo nye dukɔ le manyamanya me, woƒe ame ŋkutawo azu dɔwuitɔwo, eye tsikɔ awu woƒe amehawo ate wo ŋu. 14Eyata tsieƒe ke eƒe ve me, eye wòke eƒe nu baa, eye Yerusalem ƒe atsyɔ̃, eƒe amehawo, eƒe howɔwɔ kple amesiwo kpɔa dzidzɔ le eme la, age ɖe eme. 15Ekema amegbetɔ atsyɔ akɔ anyi, woabɔbɔ ŋutsu ɖe anyi, eye woate dàda ŋkuwò ɖe to; 16Yehowa Zebaot anye gã le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ me, eye Mawu kɔkɔe la akɔ eɖokui ŋu le dzɔdzɔenyenye me. 17Alẽviwo aɖu gbe le afima, abe woawo ŋutɔ ƒe gbeɖuƒee wònye ene, eye lã tutɔwo aɖu nu le amidalawo ƒe aƒedowo me. 18Baba na amesiwo tsɔa alakpaka dea vodada nɔa hehem, eye wotsɔa tasiaɖamka hea nuvɔ̃e! 19Amesiwo noa gbɔgblɔm bena: Newɔ kabakaba, neƒo du ɖe eƒe dɔ nu, ne míakpɔe; eye Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ la ƒe adaŋudede nete va, ne miadze sii.
20Baba na amesiwo yɔa vɔ̃ be nyui kple nyui be vɔ̃, amesiwo tsɔa viviti wɔa kekelii, eye wotso kekeli wo vivitii, amesiwo tsoa veve wɔa vivii, eye wotsɔa vivi wo vevee!
21Baba na amesiwo bua wo ɖokui nunyalawoe, eye wonye nugɔmeselawo le woawo ŋutɔwo ŋku me.
22Baba na amesiwo nye kalẽawo le weinnono me kple ŋutsuwɔlawo le aha muame toto me. 23Amesiwo xɔa zãnu hetsona na ame vɔ̃ɖiwo, eye wodaa adzo nya dzɔdzɔe le ame dzɔdzɔewo si.
24Eyata woƒe ke azu nu nyunyɔ abe ahɔ̃liti takpoe, si dzo ƒe aɖe fiã, kple gbe ƒuƒu, si nye afi ɖe dzo me la ene, eye woƒe seƒoƒo ami ya abe ʋuʋudedi ene, elabena wogbe Yehowa Zebaot ƒe nufiame, eye woɖe alɔme le Israel ƒe kɔkɔeto la ƒe nyawo ŋu. 25Eyata Yehowa ƒe dɔmedzoe bi ɖe eƒe dukɔ ŋu, eye wòdo eƒe alo ɖe dzi heƒo wo, ale be towo dzo kpekpekpe, eye woƒe kukuawo tsi kpɔdome abe gbeɖuɖɔ ene. Ke to esiawo katã gbɔ hã la eƒe dɔmedzoe nu mefa o, eye eƒe alɔ gale dzi ko.
26Akɔ aflaga dzi na dukɔa ɖe le didiƒe, eye wòala aku ayɔe tso anyigba ƒe mlɔenu, eye kpɔ ɖa, anɔ du dzi ava kaba. 27Ɖeɖi mate amea ɖeke ŋu o, eye ame kudɔea ɖeke manɔ wo dome o; womada alɔ̃ o, eye womada akɔlɔ̃e o, alidziblanu matu le woƒe ali o, eye woƒe atokotaka matso o; 28wonyre woƒe aŋutrɔwo, eye wovu woƒe dawo katã me; woƒe so wo ƒe afɔwo le abe kpe ene, eye woƒe tasiaɖamfɔwo ɖi ahom. 29Wole gbe ɖem abe dzatanɔ ene, eye wole xaxlɔ̃m abe dzataviwo ene; wole gbe tem helé nu tso dzoe, eye amea ɖeke mate ŋu axɔe o. 30Eye wòaɖe gbe ɖe eɖzi gbemagbe abe atsiaƒu ƒe gbeɖeɖe ene, eye ne woɖe ŋku ɖe anyigba dzi la, hiã ƒe blukɔ koe li, eye woƒe alilikpo na kekeli do viviti.

Title: YESAYA 6
Content:
Yesaya kpɔ ŋutega, woɖoe nyagblɔla.
1Le ƒe, si me fia Uziya ku la, mekpɔ Aƒetɔ la bɔbɔ nɔ fiazikpui kɔkɔ gãa ɖe dzi, eye eƒe awutoga yɔ gbedoxɔ la taŋ. 2Serafiwo le eta me, wo dome ɖesiaɖe to aʋala adeade, wotsɔ wo ame eve tsyɔ ŋku me, wotsɔ eve tsyɔ afɔ, eye wotsɔ wo ame eve le dzodzomee. 3Eye wodo ɣli ɖo ɖe wo nɔewo gblɔ bena: Kɔkɔe, kɔkɔe, kɔkɔe enye Yehowa Zebaot! Eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe yɔ anyigba blibo la dzi! 4Ɣlidola la ƒe gbe na kpuiawo ƒe agunu ʋuʋu, eye dzudzɔ yɔ xɔ la taŋ. 5Tete megblɔ be: Alele, evɔ nam! Elabena ame miyi makɔmakɔtɔ menye, eye mele dukɔ, si ƒe nuyi mekɔ o la dome, elabena nye ŋkuwo kpɔ fia Yehowa Zebaot. 6Tete Serafiwo dometɔ ɖeka dzo va gbɔnye, eye wòlé kpe xɔdzo hẽ, si wotsɔ abe ɖe le vɔsamlekpuia me la, ɖe asi; 7eye wòtsɔe lili nu nam gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa, esia ka nuyi ŋu na wo, wò vodadawo ɖe ɖa, eye wòlé avu wò nuvɔ̃wo.
8Tete mese Aƒetɔ la ƒe gbe wògblɔ bena: Ameka madɔ, eye ameka ayi na mí? Tete megblɔ bena: Nyee nye esi, dɔm! 9Eye wògblɔ bena: Yi naɖagblɔ na dukɔ sia bena: Minɔ nusese dzi ko, ke mígase nu gɔme o; minɔ nukpɔkpɔ dzi, ke migadze si nu o. 10Na dukɔ sia ƒe dzi naku atri, tsi to nɛ, eye natre eƒe ŋkuwo, ne magakpɔ nu kple eƒe ŋkuwo, wòase nu kple eƒe towo, eye wòase nu gɔme kple eƒe dzi, ne wòatrɔ la me, eye eƒe lãme nahaya o. 11Tete megblɔ bena: Aƒetɔ, vaseɖe ɣekaɣie? Eɖo ŋu bena: Vaseɖe esime duwo nagbã, eye woazu aƒedo, xɔwo nazu xɔdo, eye anyigba nazu gbegbe, 12vaseɖe esime Yehowa nakplɔ amewo adzoe, eye gbegbewo nasɔ gbɔ ɖe anyigba la dzi. 13Eye ne akpa ewolia susɔ la, woagatsrɔ̃ eya hã ɖa; ke abe alesi ne wolã sesewu kple logoti, eye takpoea kpɔtɔna la, nenema ƒome kɔkɔe la anye takpoea.

Title: YESAYA 7
Content:
Xaxa va Yerusalem dzi to Asiriatɔwo kple Israel-viwo dzi.
1Le Yuda-fia Axaz, Uziya vi Yotam ƒe vi ŋɔli la Aram-fia Rezin kple Israel-fia Remalya ƒe vi Pekax woho aʋa va Yerusalem ɖe wo ŋu, ke womete ŋu wɔ aʋa kpli wo o. 2Eye wova gblɔ na Dawid ƒe aƒe la bena: Aram ƒu asaɖa anyi ɖe Efrayim. Tete eya kple eƒe dukɔ ƒe dzi ʋuʋu nyanyanya, abe alesi avemetiwo ʋuʋuna le ya nu ene. 3Tete Yehowa gblɔ na Yesaya bena: Mia kple viwò Sear-Yasub mido yi ɖakpe Axaz le dzigbeta la ƒe tɔʋu ƒe mlɔenu le avɔnyãla ƒe agblemɔ to, 4eye nagblɔ nɛ bena: Kpɔ ɖokui wò dzi, eye nanɔ anyi kpoo! Megavɔ̃ o, eye dzi megaɖe le ƒowò le dzoti takpoe eve, siwo le dzudzɔ tum, le Rezin kple Aram kpakple Remalya vi ƒe dɔmedzoe la ta o. 5Esi Aram, Efrayim kple Remalya vi woɖo vɔ̃ ɖe ŋuwò gblɔ bena, 6mina míaho ɖe Yuda ŋu, míado ŋɔdzi nɛ, eye míaxɔe na mía ɖokui atsɔ Tabeal vi aɖo fiae ɖe eɖzi la, 7ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Maɖze edzi o, eye mava me o! 8Elabena Aram ƒe ta enye Damasko, eye Damasko ƒe ta enye Rezin, eye le ƒe blaade vɔ atɔ̃ me la woagbã Efrayim gudugudu, eye maganye dukɔ azɔ o. 9Efrayim ƒe ta enye Samaria, eye Samaria ƒe ta enye Remalya vi. Ne miexɔe se o la, ekema mianɔ te hã o!
Imanuel ŋugbedodo
10Eye Yehowa gaƒo nu kple Axaz gblɔ bena: 11Bia dzesi tso Yehowa, wò Mawu la si, eɖanye tso tsieƒe ke alo tso dziƒo ʋĩ o. 12Tete Axaz gblɔ bena: Nyema-biae o, ne nyemahayi Yehowa te ge akpɔ o. 13Eye wògblɔ bena: Dawid ƒe aƒe la, misee: Nu tsɛ wònye na mi be, miana nu nati ko na amegbetɔ, hafi miehe, yewoana nu nati ko na nye Mawua ke hã? 14Eyata Aƒetɔ la ŋuta ana dzesi mi: Kpɔ ɖa, ɖetugbi afɔ fu, eye wòadzi ŋutsuvi ana ŋkɔe be „Mawu li kpli mí“. 15Notsi kpekẽ kple anyitsi wòano, vaseɖe esime wòanya vɔ̃tsitsri kple nyuitiatia. 16Elabena hafi ɖevi la nava nya vɔ̃tsitsri kple nyuitiatia la, anyigba, si ƒe fia wo kple eve le ŋɔ dzim na wò la, lazu gbegbe!
Tohehe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ to Asiriatɔwo dzi.
17Eye Yehowa akplɔ Asur-fia aƒu mia kple wò dukɔ kpakple fofowò ƒe aƒe, ŋkeke, siwo meva kpo tso esime Efrayim klã ɖa le Yuda ŋu o! 18Eye woava me le ŋkeke ma dzi be, Yehowa ala aku ayɔ togbato, siwo le Egipte-tsiwo ƒe mlɔenu, kple anyi, siwo le Asur-nyigba dzi, 19eye wo katã woava aƒo ɖe bali globowo kple kpetowo kple ŋuvegoewo katã kpakple lãnyiƒewo katã. 20Gbemagbe la Aƒetɔ la aɣe talũhɛ, si nye Asur-fia tso tɔsisi la ƒe go keme, alũ ta kple aŋɔ me fu nɛ, eye wòaƒlɔ ge nɛ. 21Eye woava me le ɣemaɣi be, ame ɖeka anyi nyinɔvi ɖeka kple alẽvi eve. 22Eye le esi notsi bɔ ta la, woano notsi kpekẽ, elabena amesiwo kpɔtɔ ɖe anyigba dzi la dometɔ ɖesiaɖe ano notsi kpekẽ kple anyitsi. 23Eye wòava me le ɣemaɣi be, afisi weinka akpe le, eye woxɔa klosalo sekel akpe la, lazu aŋɔka kple ŋuwò. 24Aŋutrɔ kple da woatso yi afimae, elabena aŋɔka kple ŋuwò axɔ anyigba blibo la dzi. 25Eye womagate ŋu aɖe to, siwo katã wotso agblenu ŋlɔ tsã la dzi o le aŋɔka kple ŋuwò vovɔ̃ ta, eye woazu nyikplɔƒe kple alẽwo toƒe.

Title: YESAYA 8
Content:
Akɔfafa na xɔsetɔwo le ɣeyiɣi vɔ̃ me.
1Eye Yehowa gblɔ nam bena: Tso nuŋlɔkpe gãa ɖe, eye naŋlɔ nuŋɔŋlɔ hahootɔ ɖe edzi bena: Aboyonu, afɔ netsɔ, nuhaha, va kaba! 2De ɖasefo wɔnuteƒe wo nam: nunɔla Uriya kple Zaxarya, Yeberexya vi. 3Eye mete de nyɔnu nyagblɔɖila ŋu wòto fu, eye wòdzi ŋutsuvi. Tete Yehowa gblɔ nam be: Yɔ eƒe ŋkɔ be „Aboyonu, afɔ netsɔ, nuhaha, va kaba!“ 4Elabena hafi ɖevi la nade asi fofo kple dada yɔyɔ me la, woatso Damasko ƒe kesinɔnuwo kple Samaria ƒe aboyonuwo adze Asur-fia ŋgɔe.
5Eye Yehowa gaƒo nu kplim gblɔ bena: 6Esi dukɔ sia do vlo Siloa-tsi, si sina blewu la, eye wòkpɔ dzidzɔ kple Rezin kpakple Remalya vi la, 7eyata Aƒetɔ la akplɔ tɔsisi la ƒe tsi gã sẽŋuwo ava ƒo ɖe wo dzi, si nye Asur-fia kple eƒe ŋusẽ blibo; ayɔ eƒe baliwo katã me, eye wòagbagba eƒe tɔgowo katã, 8asi ato Yuda, eye aɖo agbagba vaseɖe ve ke, eye eƒe aʋala, siwo ke la, asa wò anyigba ƒe kekeme. Mawu ti kpli mí! 9Mi dukɔwo, midze agbo, eye dzi neɖe le mia ƒo; mi amesiwo katã le didiƒe le anyigba dzi la, miƒu to anyi! Mibla ali dzi, eye dzi neɖe le mia ƒo, ẽ, mibla ali dzi, eye dzi neɖe le mia ƒo! 10Ne miede adaŋu la, woagblẽ eme, ne mieɖo gbe ɖi la, mava me o; elabena Mawu li kpli mí!
Nuxɔxlɔ̃ bena, woaxɔ Mawu gbagbe la dzi ase.
11Elabena ale Yehowa ƒo nu kplim, eye eƒe asi nu sẽ ɖe dzinye wogbe nya nam be, nyemagazɔ dukɔ sia ƒe mo dzi o hegblɔ bena: 12Migayɔ nusiwo katã dukɔ sia yɔna be nugbeɖoɖo la, be nugbeɖoɖo o, migavɔ̃ nusi wovɔ̃na la o, eye megadzi ŋɔ na mi o. 13Mibu Yehowa Zebaot kokoe, eye eya nenye vovɔ̃ kple ŋɔdzi na nu. 14Azu kɔkɔeƒe, ke anye nuɖiaɖia ƒe kpe kple agakpe kikli na Israel ƒe aƒe eveawo, eye anye mɔ̃ kple adoboli na Yerusalemtɔwo; 15eye ame geɖewo aklii adze anyi ahaŋe keŋkeŋ, eye mɔ̃ aɖe wo alé wo.
16Bia ɖaseɖiɖi la, eye natre nufiame la nu ɖe nye nusrɔ̃viwo me. 17Eyata mele Yehowa, amesi tsyo nu eƒe ŋku me ɖe Yakob ƒe aƒea la sinu dzɔm, eye mele mɔ kpɔm nɛ. 18Kpɔ ɖa, mía kple vi, siwo Yehowa tsɔ nam la, míenye dzesi kple kpɔɖeŋu le Israel tso Yehowa Zebaot, amesi le Zionto dzi la gbɔ. 19Ne wogblɔ na mi be, mibia nu ŋɔliyɔlawo kple afakalawo se, amesiwo nɔa ŋɔti me gbee dom, eye wonɔa gbe tem la, ɖe dukɔ mabia nu eƒe Mawu ase oa? De woabia nu kukuawo na agbagbeawoa? 20Mitrɔ ɖe nufiame kple ɖaseɖiɖi la ŋu! Ne womegblɔ alea o la, ekema agu medze na wo o. 21Woanɔ tsa glãla tsam, woate wo ɖe anyi, eye do awu wo, eye ne do le wo wum la, wòado dziku ahaƒo fi ade woƒe fia kple woƒe Mawu. Eye ne wofa ko dzi 22alo wode ko to la, kpo ɖa, xaxa kple viviti li; xaxa ƒe tsizi kple blukɔ me woatutu wo ade. 23Elabena afisi xaxa le la, matsi viviti me o. Tsã la eɖi gbɔ Zebulon-nyigba kple Naftali-nyigba, emegbe la ade bubu ƒutamɔ, si le Yordan ƒe go keme la ŋu, si nye dukɔwo ƒe anyigba.

Title: YESAYA 9
Content:
Mesia dzidzi, eŋkɔ kple eƒe fiaɖuƒe.
1Dukɔ, si le viviti me zɔm la, kpɔ kekeli gãa ɖe, amesiwo le blukɔ tsiɖitsiɖi ƒe anyigba dzi la, kekeli klẽ ɖe wo dzi. 2Edzi dukɔ la ɖe edzi, eye nena dzidzɔ do gã; wokpɔ dzidzɔ le ŋkuwò me, abe alesi wokpɔa dzidzɔ le nuŋeɣi ene, abe alesi wotsoa aseye, ne wòmã aboyonu ene. 3Elabena èŋe woƒe agba ƒe kɔkuti, ati, si le woƒe kɔʋu me, kple wo kplɔlawo ƒe ati, abe Midian ŋɔli ene. 4Elabena wòtɔ dzo amesiwo ƒo aʋazi la ƒe afɔkpawo katã kple awu, siwo wobliba ɖe ʋu me la, eye dzo afiã wo. 5Elabena wodzi vi na mí, eye wona ŋutsuvi mí, dziɖuɖu le abɔta nɛ, eye wotso ŋkɔ nɛ be; Nukunu, adaŋudela, Mawu kalẽtɔ, fofo mava, ŋutifafafia, 6ne eƒe dziɖuɖu nakeke ta, eye seƒeɖo manɔe na ŋutifafa le Dawid ƒe fiazikpui dzi kple eƒe fiaɖuƒe la me o, ne wòafɔe ɖe te, eye wòatsɔ ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ dzɔdzɔe ali kee tso fifia ɖaseɖe mavɔ me. Yehowa Zebaot ƒe ŋuʋaʋã awɔ esia ade goe.
Ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ Israel.
7Aƒetɔ la gblɔ nya ɖo ɖe Yakob, eye wòva ƒo ɖe Israel dzi, 8ne dukɔ blibo la nadze sii hekpe ɖe Efrayim kple Samaria-tɔwo ŋu, amesiwo nɔa gbɔgblɔm le adegbeƒoƒo kple dàda me be: 9„Anyikpewoe mũ dze anyi, ke miatsɔ gãwo atui, gbotiwoe wolã, ke míado sedertiwo ɖe wo teƒe.“ 10Eye Yehowa do Rezin ƒe ketɔwo ɖe dzi ɖe eŋu, eye wòde akiti lã me na eƒe futɔwo: 11Aram tso ɣedzeƒe, eye Filistitowo tso ɣetoɖoƒe, eye woɖu Israel wòyɔ nu me na wo. Ke to esiawo katã gbɔ hã eƒe dɔmedzoe nu mefa o, eye eƒe alo gale dzi ko. 12Eye dukɔ la metrɔ ɖe amesi ƒoe la ŋu o, eye womedi Yehowa Zebaot yome mí o. 13Eye Yehowa tsrɔ̃ la kple asike, deʋaya kple keti ɖa tso Israel le ŋkeke ɖeka dzi. 14Ame tsitsiwo kple ame ŋkutawo nye ta la, eye nyagblɔɖila, siwo baa atakpadada la, wonye asike la. 15Dukɔ sia kplɔlawo nye ameblelawo, eye amesiwo woble la, wobu. 16Eyata Aƒetɔ la makpɔ dzidzɔ le woƒe ɖekakpuiwo ŋu o, eye mave woƒe tsyɔ̃eviwo kple ahosiwo nu o, elabena wo katã wonye ame vɔ̃ɖiwo kple nu tovo wɔlawo, eye nusianu gblɔa nya gbegblẽ. Ke to esiawo katã gbɔ hã eƒe dɔmedzoe nu mefa o, eye eƒe alɔ gale dzi ko. 17Elabena vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ le bibim abe dzo ene, efiã aŋɔkawo kple ŋuwò, eye wòtɔ dzo ave dodowo, ale be dzudzɔ de dzi kɔtɔɔ. 18Yehowa Zebaot ƒe dziku na dzo ƒo anyigba, eye dukɔ la le abe dzo ƒe nuɖuɖu ene; amea ɖeke mekpɔ nɔvia ta o. 19Wole tsyo dam nu le ɖusi me, ke dɔwuame nu mefa o, wole nu ɖum le mia me, ke womeɖi ƒo o, amesiame ɖu eya ŋutɔ ƒe abɔ ƒe lã; 20Manase ɖu Efrayim, eye Efrayim ɖu Manase; woa kple eve la siaa wotso ɖe Yuda ŋu. Ke to esiawo katã gbɔ ha eƒe dɔmedzoe nu mefa o, eye eƒe alɔ gale dzi ko.

Title: YESAYA 10
Content:
