Nusiawo wo ge mala, eye nyemadzudzɔe o. 17Amesiwo ɖoa dzi ɖe aklama kpakpɛwo ŋu, eye wogblɔna na legbawo be: Miawoe nye míaƒe mawuwo la, woate gbugbɔ ɖe megbee, eye ŋu akpe wo vevie.
18Mi tokunɔwo, mise nu, mi ŋkuagbãtɔwo, mifɔ ko dzi miakpɔ nu! 19Amekae nye ŋkunɔ, ɖe menye nye dɔlae oa? Amekae nye tokunɔ abe nye amesi medɔ la enea? Amekae nye ŋkunɔ abe Mawu ƒe xɔlɔ̃ ene, eye amekae nye ŋkunɔ abe Yehowa ƒe dɔla ene? 20Ekpɔ nu geɖe, ke mèlé wo ɖe ta me o; èke to, ke mèse nu o. 21Edze Yehowa ŋu be, wòaɖe gãnyenye kple ŋutikɔkɔe se la ŋu lé eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ta; 22ke dukɔ, si woha, eye woda adzoe la wonye, mɔ̃ ɖe wo katã le do me, eye woɣla ɖe gaxɔ me; woɖe aboyo wo, ke amea ɖeke mexɔ wo o, woha wo, ke amea ɖeke megblɔ be: Migbugbɔ wo vɛ o. 23Mia dometɔ kae ase nusiawo, alé ŋku ɖe nusiwo gbɔna la ŋu, eye woaƒu to anyi ɖe wo ŋu? 24Amekae de Yakob asi, be woaha, eye wòde Israel asi na adzodalawo? Ɖe menye Yehowa, amesi ŋu míewɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖo, miegbe eƒe mɔwo dzi zɔzɔ, eye míese eƒe nufiame o lae oa? 25Etrɔ eƒe dziku ƒe dɔmedzoe kple aʋa ƒe ŋusẽ kɔ ɖe wo dzi, eye wòlé dzo bi ƒo xlã wo, ke womedze sii o, efiã wo, ke mede dzi gbɔ na wo o.

Title: YESAYA 43
Content:
Mawu aɖo eƒe dukɔ la, abe alesi wodo ŋugbe ene, eye woatsɔ eƒe dzidadawo akee to amenuveve me.
1Azɔ ale Yehowa, amesi wo wò Yakob, eye wòme wò Israel la, gblɔ esi: Megavɔ̃ o, elabena meɖe wò, metsɔ wò ŋkɔ yɔ wò be: Tɔnye nènye. 2Ne èto to me la, meli kpli wò, eye ne èto tɔsisiwo me la, womalé wò o. Ne èto dzo me, mamè wò o, eye dzo ƒe adewo mafiã wò o. 3Elabena nye Yehowa enye wò Mawu, nye Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ la enye wò xɔnametɔ. Matso Egipte aƒle tawo, eye Kus kple Seba axɔ de tewòƒe. 4Esi nèxɔ asi le ŋkunye me, bubu le ŋuwò, eye melɔ̃ wò ta la, matso amegbetɔwo ana ɖe tewòƒe kple dukɔwo de wò agbe ta, 5Megavɔ̃ o, elabena meli kpli wò; makplɔ viwòwo tso ɣedzeƒe vɛ, eye maƒo nuwo ƒu tso ɣetoɖoƒe! 6Magblɔ na anyiehe be; Tsɔe ve! eye na dziehe be: Megasika ame di o! Kplɔ vinyeŋutsuwo tso didiƒe vɛ kple vinyenyɔnuwo tso anyigba ƒe mlɔenu, 7amesiwo katã ŋu woyɔ nye ŋkɔ do, amesiwo mewɔ hena nye bubu, memè wo, eye mewo wo.
8Kplɔ dukɔ, si ta ŋku le, hafi wònye ŋkunɔ, to le eta, hafi wònye tokunɔ la doe! 9Dukɔwo katã neƒo ƒu, anyigba dzi dukɔwo katã neƒo ta kpli: Ameka le wo dome agblɔ esia, alo ana míase nya, siwo dzɔ va yi? Woƒe ɖasefowo neva, ne woatso na wo, eye woasee ahagblɔ bena: Ele eme. 10Yehowa be: Miawoe nye nye ɖasetɔwo kple nye dɔla, si metia, ne mianyae, miaxɔ dzinye ase, eye miadze sii be, nyee. Womewɔ mawua ɖeke do ŋgɔ nam o, eye ɖeke mado megbe nam o. 11Nyee nye Yehowa, eye xɔnametɔa ɖeke meli kpe ɖe ŋunye o. 12Medo ŋugbe, eye mexɔ na ame; mena miesee, eye mawu tutɔa ɖeke mena mia dome o; Yehowa be, míawoe nye nye ɖasefowo, eye nyee nye Mawu. 13Nyee li tso tititi ke, eye amea ɖeke maxɔ ame le asinye o; ne mewo nu la, ameka atrɔe?
14Ale Yehowa, miaƒe xɔnametɔ, Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ la, gblɔ esi: Le mia tae medɔ ame ɖo ɖe Babel, eye mena wonyã amewo ɖe nu, eye wonyã Kaldeatɔwo ɖo ɖe woƒe ʋu, siwo me wokpɔ dzidzɔ le tsã la me. 15Nye Yehowa enye miaƒe kɔkɔetɔ, nye Israel ƒe wɔla enye miaƒe fia. 16Ale Yehowa, amesi ta mo ɖe atsiaƒu me, eye wòɖe toƒe ɖe to sesẽwo me la, gblɔ esi: 17eya, amesi na tasiaɖamwo, sɔwo, aʋakɔwo kple kalẽtɔwo siaa ho; woɖo baba ɖe anyigba, eye womegafɔ o, wo nu tsi, abe alesi akaɖi me ɖovu tsina ene: 18Migaɖu ŋu gbaɖegbe nuwo o, eye migalé ŋku ɖe nusiwo dza va yi la ŋu o. 19Kpɔ ɖa, mele nu yeye wo ge; ele nu dom ɖa xoxo, miedze sii oa? Mana mo tata naɖo gbe dzi, eye tɔsisiwo nado gbegbe. 20Gbemelãwo, amegãxiwo kple golowo akafum, elabena mena tsi ɖo gbe dzi, eye tɔsisiwo ɖo gbegbe, ne mana tsi nye dukɔ, nye ame tiatiawo, ne woano. 21Dukɔ, si mewɔ na ɖokuinye la, axlẽ nya afia le nye kafukafu ŋu.
22Yakob, menye wòe yɔm o, eye Israel, mèdze agbagba le ŋunye o. 23Mètsɔ wò alẽviwo sa numevɔ nam o, eye mètsɔ wò akpedavɔsawo de bubu ŋunye o. Nyemetsɔ wò nuɖuvɔsawo do agba na wò o, alo tsa dzudzɔ ʋeʋẽe dodo ɖe fu na wò o. 24Mètsɔ ga ƒle gbekee nam o, eye metsɔ wò akpedavɔsawo ƒe ami ɖi ƒoe nam o; ke boŋ etso wò nuvɔ̃wo ɖo agba nam, eye nèɖe fu nam kple wò vodadawo. 25Nyee, nyee atutu wò dzidadawo ɖa le nye ŋutɔ ɖokuinye ta, eye nyemaɖo ŋu wò nuvɔ̃wo o. 26Do ŋku edzi nam, na míahe nya kple mia nɔewo; to wò nyawo, ne towo nadzɔ. 27Fofowò gbãtɔ wɔ nuvɔ̃, eye amesiwo nɔ nuwò la, to vo ɖe ŋunye. 28Eyata medo gu amegã kɔkɔeawo, metsɔ Yakob de asi na tsɔtsrɔ̃ gbidigbidi, eye Israel na fewuɖuɖu.

Title: YESAYA 44
Content:
Amenuveve gbɔgbɔ la kɔkɔɖanyi.
1Azɔ nye dɔla Yakob kple nye ame tiatia Israel, see! 2Ale Yehowa, wɔwòla kple mèwòla tso dɔ me ke, amesi li kpli wò la, gblɔ esi: Nye dɔla Yakob kple nye ame tiatia Yesurun, megavɔ̃ o! 3Elabena maƒo tsi ɖe kuɖinyigba dzi kple tɔʋu wo ɖe anyigba ƒuƒu dzi. Matrɔ nye gbɔgbɔ akɔ ɖe viwòwo dzi kple nye yayra ɖe wò dzidzimeviwo dzi, 4ne woamie abe gbe ene, abe amuti le tɔ to ene. 5Amesi agblɔ be, Yehowa tɔ ye nye, ame keme atsɔ Yakob ƒe ŋkɔ na eɖokui, eye ame bubu aŋlɔ Yehowa ɖe eƒe asi ŋu, eye wòaƒo Israel ŋkɔ ɖo na eɖokui.
Trɔ̃subɔsubɔ ƒe bometsinuwo.
6Ale Yehowa, Israel ƒe fia kple eƒe xɔnametɔ, Yehowa Zebaot,: gblɔ esi: Nyee nye gbãtɔ, eye nyee nye mlɔetɔ; mawua ɖeke mekpe ɖe ŋunye o. 7Ameka agblɔ nya abe nye, amesi ɖo dukɔwo gɔme anyi tso blema ke la ene, ne wòaɖee afia, eye wòatoe nam? Woagblɔ nusi le eme va ge kple nusi le dzɔdzɔ ge la na wo! 8Ŋɔ megadzi mi o, eye migadzo nyanyanya o! Ɖe nyemena miesee tso gbaɖegbe ke, eye nyemetoe na mi oa? Miawoe nye nye ɖasefowo. Ɖe mawua ɖe li kpe ɖe ŋunyea? Agakpea ɖeke meli o, nyemenya ɖeke o.
9Legba mèlawo katã la toflokowo wonye, eye woƒe nu lɔlɔ̃awo mele ɖeke me o; woawo ŋutɔwoe nye woƒe ɖasefowo be, womele nu kpɔm o, eye womedzea si nu o, eyata ŋukpe alé wo. 10Amekae wɔ mawua ɖe, eye amekae kɔ legbaa ɖe, si mele ɖeke me o? 11Kpɔ ɖa, ŋu akpe wo hatiwo katã; aɖaŋuawo la, amegbetɔwo wonye, wo katã naƒo ta kpli, eye woado: ke woadzo nyanyanya, eye ŋukpe alé wo katã. 12Gbeɖe tsɔa gayibɔ tua fiae, ewɔa eŋu ɖɔ le dzoka xɔxɔ me, etsɔa zu tunɛ, eye wòtsɔa eƒe alɔkpa sesẽ wɔa ɖɔ le eŋu; ne dɔ va wui la, ekema ŋusẽ vɔna le eŋu, ne meno tsi o la, ekema eƒe lãme tuna. 13Atikpala daa dzidzeka, etsɔa ɣe tanɛ, eye wòtsɔa fi kpanɛ, etsɔa nudzidzega tanɛ, eye wòwɔnɛ ɖe ŋutsu ƒe nɔnɔme me, ɖe amegbetɔ ƒe ɖekadzedze me, ne wòanɔ xɔ me. 14Amea ɖe lã sedertiwo, etsɔ fɔfɔli kple logoti, eye wotia avemetiwo na eɖokui. Eɖo sesewu wo, eye tsidzadza na wotsi. 15Wonye dzodonu na amegbetɔ; etsɔ ɖe do dzoe heƒu, eye wòtsɔe do dzo ƒo aboloe; etsɔ ɖe wɔ mawui hede ta agu nɛ, eye wòtsɔ ɖe wɔ aklama kpakpɛe heɖo gbe ɖa nɛ. 16Etsɔa eƒe afã ɖoa dzoe, eye eƒe afã dzi woɖua lã le; etɔa lã ɖuna ɖia ƒo, eƒua dzo hegblɔna be: Ehɛ̃, dzo ɖo lã me nam, dzoa le nunye vivim! 17Etsɔ mamlea wɔ mawui, etsɔe wɔ eƒe legbae, eye wòdze klo ɖe ta agu nɛ hedo gbe ɖa nɛ gblɔ bena: Ɖem, elabena wòe nye nye mawu! 18Womenyaa nu o, eye womedzea si nu o, elabena woƒe ŋku nye tre mele nu kpɔm o, eye woƒe dzi mele nu gɔme sem o. 19Amea ɖeke mebua ta me, eye wòkpɔ sidzedze kple gɔmesese o, ne wòagblɔ be: Metsɔ afã do dzoe, meƒo abolo ɖe eƒe akawo dzi, eye metɔ lã ɖu tso; ɖe matsɔ mamlea awɔ ŋunyɔnui, eye ɖe maɖo gbe na atikpoa? 20Amesi le dzofi yome la, dzi bleamee flui, maɖe eƒe agbe o, eye magblɔ na eɖokui o be: Ɖe menye aʋatsoe melé ɖe nuɖusi oa?
Israel nuveve kple eɖeɖe.
21Yakob kple Israel, ɖo ŋui, elabena nye dɔla nènye; nyee wɔ wò nènye nye dɔla; Israel, megaŋlɔm be o! 22Mena wò dzidadawo bu abe atu ene kple wò nuvɔ̃wo abe alilikpo ene; trɔ va gbɔnye, elabena meɖe wò. 23Mi dziƒowo, mitso aseye, elabena Yehowa wɔe wòde go! Mi anyigba ƒe agunuwo, mido aƒa! Mi towo, avewo kple wo me nuwo katã, mitso aseye hoo, elabena Yehowa ɖe Yakob, eye wòdo kɔkɔe eɖokui ɖe Israel ŋu.
24Ale Yehowa, ɖewòla, amesi mè wò tso dɔ me ke la, gblɔ esi: Nyee nye Yehowa, amesi wɔ nusiawo katã, nye ɖeka koliae he dziƒo me, eye mekeke anyigba me, amea ɖeke mekpe ɖe ŋunye o. 25Eya, amesi gblẽa nu kpoloe ƒolawo ƒe dzesi me, eye wòdoa bometsila afakalawo; eya, amesi nana nunyalawo gbugbɔna, eye wòdoa lã woƒe nunya; 26eya, amesi nana eƒe dolawo ƒe nya vaa me, eye wòwɔa eƒe ame dɔdɔ ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖo dzi; eya, amesi gblɔ na Yerusalem be, woaganɔ eme, eye wogblɔ na Yuda-duwo be, woatso wo, eye yeafɔ eƒe glikpowo ɖe tsitrenu; 27eya, amesi gblɔ na to gome be, mie, eye mana wò tɔsisiwo naƒu kplakplakpla; 28eya, amesi gblɔ na Kores be: Nye lãkplɔvi nenye! Eyae awɔ nye ɖiɖiwo katã ade goe, eye wòagblɔ na Yerusalem be, woatsoe, eye na gbedoxɔ be, woaɖo egɔme anyi!

Title: YESAYA 45
Content:
Ŋusẽkatãtɔ la di bena, veagblẽ trɔ̃subɔsubɔ, eye yeaɖe Israel to Kores dzi.
1Ale Yehowa gblɔ na Kores, eƒe amesiamina la, amesi ƒe nuɖusi melé, ne mafanya dukɔwo le eŋgɔ, eye matu ali dzi na fiawo, maʋu ʋɔwo le eŋku me, eye agbowo matsi dodo o la, ènye si: 2Madze ŋgɔwò, eye mana kpoƒewo nasɔ, magbã akɔbligbowo, eye maŋe gametiwo, 3eye matsɔ kesinɔnu, si le blukɔ me, kple nu xɔasi, siwo woɣla la, ana wò, ne nadze sii be, nye Yehowa, Israel ƒe Mawu la, enye amesi tsɔ ŋkɔ yɔ wòe, 4le nye dɔla Yakob kple nye ame tiatia Israel ta; metsɔ wò ŋkɔ yɔ wò, eye metsɔ bubuŋkɔ na wò, esi mèkpɔ dze sim haɖe o. 5Nyee nye Yehowa, ɖeke megali o; mawua ɖeke mekpe ɖe ŋunye o; mebia ali dzi na wò, esi mekpɔ dze sim haɖe o, 6ne wòadze sii tso ɣedzeƒe kple ɣetoɖoƒe be, amea ɖeke mekpe ɖe ŋunye o. Nyee nye Yehowa, ɖeke megali o, 7nye amesi ɖo kekeli, eye mewɔ viviti, nye amesi wɔ dzɔgbenyuie, eye mehe dzɔgbevɔ̃e vɛ. Nye Yehowa ye wɔ nusiawo katã! 8Mi dziƒowo, nuɖuɖu tso dzi me, eye alilikpowo nadza dzɔdzɔenyenye; anyigba neke nu, ne xɔname nado, eye dzɔdzɔenyenye hã namie Nye Yehowa ye wɔe.
9Baba na amesi le dzre hem kple emèla, sonu gaglɛ wònye le anyisonu gaglɛwo dome! Ɖe tsu agblɔ na emela be: Nuka wɔm nèle? alo eƒe dɔwɔwɔ nagblɔ be: Mèto asi oa? 10Baba na amesi gblɔna fofoa be: Nuka la nedzim? eye na nyɔnu be: Nuka ta nèle ku ɖo? 11Ale Yehowa, Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ kple emèla, gblɔ esi: Mibia nusiwo gbɔna dzɔdzɔ ge la ta se, ke mina makpɔ vinyewo kple nye asinudɔwɔwɔwo ƒe nya gbɔ. 12Nyee wo anyigba, eye mewo ame ɖe edzi. Nye asie he dziƒo me, eye meɖo eŋu nuwo katã. 13Menyae le dzɔdzɔenyenye me, eye mala eƒe mɔwo katã. Eyae atso nye du la, eye wòaɖe asi le nye aboyomewo ŋu, menye le ga alo nunana ta o; Yehowa Zebaot ye gblɔe! 14Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Egipte ƒe adzɔnuwo, Kus kple Sebatɔ ƒlalaawo ƒe viɖe age ɖe asiwò me ahazu tɔwò; woano ga me adze yowòme, eye woade ta agu na wò ahaƒo koko na wò be: Wò ɖeɖe ko gbɔe Mawu le, ɖeke megali o, mawu bubua ɖeke megali o. 15Vavãe, wò Israel ƒe Mawu, xɔnametɔ la, Mawu ɣaɣla nenye! 16Ŋukpe lé wo katã, eye woƒe mo tsi dã; legbamèlawo katã le yiyim le vlododo me. 17Yehowa atso xɔname mavɔ aɖe Israel; ŋukpe kple vlododo malé mi tegbetegbe akpɔ o.
18Elabena ale Yehowa, dziƒowɔla, eya amesi nye Mawu, eya amesi mè anyigba, eye wòwɔe; eya amesi ɖoe anyi, menye ɖe wòwɔe, be woatsi ƒuƒlu o, ke boŋ ɖe wòmee, be woanɔ edzi la, gblɔ esi: Nyee nye Mawu, ɖeke mekpe ɖe ŋunye o. 19Nyemeƒo nu le vivi me le anyigba ƒe teƒe, si do blukɔ o; nyemegblɔ na Yakob ƒe ƒome la be: „Midim yakatsyɔ“ o. Nye Yehowa megblɔ nusi le eme, eye meto nyateƒe. 20Mi dukɔwo ƒe ame sisiwo, miƒo ta kpli, eye miva, mi katã milé va! Ame manyanuwo wonye, amesiwo lé woƒe aklama kpakpɛ tikpowo ɖe la, eye wole gbe dom ɖa na mawu, siwo meɖea ame o. 21Migblɔe, eye mihee vɛ, woade adaŋu kple wo nɔewo. Ameka na wose nusiawo gbaɖegbe ke, eye wògblɔe tso blema ke? Nye Yehowa ye, eye mawua ɖeke mekpe ɖe ŋunye o! 22Mi anyigba ƒe mlɔenuwo katã, mitrɔ ɖe ŋunye, eye mina woaxɔ na mi; elabena nyee nye Mawu, ɖeke megali o. 23Meta ɖokuinye, nya vava do tso nye nu me, eye matrɔ o be: Klowo katã ata anyi nam, eye aɖewo katã aka atam nam 24ahagblɔ bena: Míaƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye kple ŋusẽ le Yehowa gbɔ; amesiwo katã do dziku ɖe eŋu la, ava egbɔ, eye ŋu akpe wo. 25Yehowa ye woatsɔ atso afia na Israel ƒe ƒomeawo katã, eye woaƒo adegbe.

Title: YESAYA 46
Content:
Babilonia legbawo gbegblẽ. Xɔxɔ li na Israel le Mawu anukwaretɔ la gbɔ.
1Bel mũ, eye Nebo do dɔgɔe; wotsɔ miaƒe legba, siwo mieléna ɖe ta la, de asi na agbatsɔlãwo, wotsɔ wo do agbae ɖe lã, si ŋu ɖeɖi te la dzi. 2Wo katã wodo dɔgɔe, eye womũ, womate ŋu axɔ agba la o, eye woawo ŋutɔ wozɔ yi aboyo me.
3Yakob ƒe aƒe la kple Israel ƒe aƒe me ame mamleawo, miɖo tom, mi amesiwo metsɔ do agba ɖe ɖokuinye dzi tso dɔ me ke, eye metsɔ mi tso vidzidɔ me ke. 4Ame ma ke manye, vaseɖe esime miaku amegã; matsɔ mi ado agbae ɖe ɖokuinye dzi, eye maɖe mi. 5Ameka ŋu miehe, yewoatsɔm aɖoe, ne míasɔ kple mía nɔewo? eye ameka miebe, yewoatsɔ aɖo ŋunye, ne míaɖi mía nɔewo? 6Wo, amesiwo dudua sika tsoa kotoku me ɖe anyi, eye wodaa klosalo le nudanu me, woɖatsɔa gbeɖe, ne woatsɔe awɔ mawu, si woadze klo ade ta agu na. 7Wokɔe ɖo abɔta, eye wode ta ete ɖadro ɖe enɔƒe; etsia tre ɖi meʋãna tsoa eteƒe o. Ne amea ɖe do ɣli nɛ hã, mesenɛ o, eye meɖenɛ tsoa eƒe hiã la me o. 8Miɖo ŋu esia, eye mili ɖe nu ɖeka dzi; mi godzelawo, mina wòade dzi gbɔ na mi. 9Mido ŋu nusiwo dzɔ va yi tso blema la be, nyee nye Mawu, ɖeke megali o, nyee nye Mawu, amea ɖeke mesɔ kplim o; 10nye amesi ɖe nuwuwu fia le gɔmedzedzea me ke kple nusi gbɔna dzɔdzɔ ge la fia le blema ke gblɔ bena: Nye tame-ɖoɖo ava me, eye mawɔ nye didiwo katã dzi; 11nye amesi yɔ hɔ̃ tso ɣedzeƒe kple ŋutsu, si nye nye tameɖoɖotsɔla la, tso anyigba matsɔmatsɔ dzi; megblɔ nya, eye mana woava eme hã, meɖo nu, eye mawɔe hã. 12Miɖo tom, mi tamesẽlawo, mi amesiwo le adzɔge na dzɔdzɔenyenye. 13Mehe nye dzɔdzɔenyenye va kpuiƒee, mele adzɔge o, eye nye xɔname mahe de megbe o; mana xɔname Zion kple nye atsyɔ̃ Israel.

Title: YESAYA 47
Content:
Babel ƒe gbegblẽ.
1Wò ɖetugbi, Babel nyɔnuvi, ɖi ɖe anyi, eye nabɔbɔ nɔ ke me! Bɔbɔ nɔ anyigba fiazikpui makpɔmakpɔe, wò Kaldea-nyɔnuvi! Elabena womagayɔ wò azɔ be fewunuwɔla kple atsyɔ̃nuwɔla vivivo o. 2Ɖo teƒo natu wɔ, ɖe moxevɔ ɖa, ɖe taɖedzi ɖa, ɖe ata ƒuƒlu, ne natso tɔ! 3Wò ama adze go, eye woakpɔ wò ŋukpeƒe. Mabia hlɔ̃, eye amea ɖeke matso mía dome o. 4Míaƒe xɔnametɔ la ŋkɔ enye Yehowa Zebaot, Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ! 5Kaldea-nyɔnuvi, zi ɖoɖoe klenee nabɔbɔ nɔ anyi, eye nayi ɖe blukɔ me! Elabena womagayɔ wò azɔ be fiaɖuƒewo ƒe aƒenɔ o. 6Medo dɔmedzoe ɖe nye dukɔ ŋu, medo gu nye domenyinu, eye metsɔ wo de asi na wò; ke mèkpɔ nublanui na wo o, eye nètsɔ wò kɔkuti kpekpe do amegã ɖeɖiwo dzi. 7Egblɔ be, yeanye aƒenɔ daa tegbee; esia mede dzigbɔ na wò o, eye meɖo ŋu alesi woava nɔ emegbe o.
8Azɔ see, wò agbe vivi ɖula, si li bɔkɔɔ, eye nèle gbɔgblɔm le wò dzi me be; Nye koe, ɖeke megali o, nyemazu ahosi o, eye womaɖe vi le ŋunye o. 9Eyata nusiawo kple eve adzɔ ɖe dziwò gbe ɖeka kpoyi, woaɖe vi le ŋuwò, eye nazu ahosi; to wò dzosasa geɖeawo kple wò gbesa gbogboawo gbɔ hã woaƒo ɖe dziwò bibibi. 10Eɖo ŋu ɖe wò vɔ̃ɖivɔ̃ɖi ŋu gblɔ bena: Amea ɖeke mele kpɔyem o. Wò nunya kple wò ayedzedze flu wò, nègblɔ le wò dzi me bena: Nye koe, ɖeke megali o! 11Eyata dzɔgbevɔ̃e adzɔ ɖe dziwò, eye màte ŋu asa gbe adoe o; gbegblẽ ava dziwò, màte ŋu atsi enu o, eye tsɔtsrɔ̃ aƒo ɖe dziwò kpoyi, hafi nava nyae. 12Do kple wò gbesawo kpakple wò dzo gbogbo, siwo ŋu nèku kutri le tso wò ɖevime ke; ɖewohĩ ate ŋu awɔ nane, ɖewohĩ ate ŋu ado ŋɔdzi na amea ɖe. 13Ede aɖaŋu geɖe wòti ko na wò; na dziŋgɔli me nyalawo, amesiwo ɖea ŋku ɖe dzinuviwo, eye wodzea si nusi gbɔna dzɔdzɔ ge ɖe dziwò le dzinu me la, natso axɔ na wò. 14Kpɔ ɖa, gbe ƒuƒu wonye, dzo afiã wo, womaɖe woƒe agbe tso dzoƒaɖe ƒe ŋusẽ nu o, elabena menye dzoka xɔxɔ wònye, ne wòa ƒu o, eye menye mlekpui me dzo wònye, ne woabɔbɔ nɔ enu o. 15Alea amesiwo ŋu nèku kutri ɖo, eye mia kpli wo mietsa asi tso wò ɖevime ke la, woazu na wò, amesiame lé eƒe mɔ, eye ɖeke mexɔ na wò o.

Title: YESAYA 48
Content:
Mawu bia tso eƒe dukɔ kɔlialiatɔ le si bena, wòaxɔ eƒe amenuveve ɖeɖe la dzi ase, eye wòaɖo to ye.
1Misee, Yakob ƒe aƒe, mi amesiwo tso Israel ƒe ŋkɔ, eye miedzɔ tso Yuda ƒe tsidzɔƒewo, mi amesiwo taa Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ, eye miekafua Israel ƒe Mawu la, ke menye le nya teƒe kple dzɔdzɔenyenye me o. 2Elabena woyɔa du kɔkɔe la ɖe wo ɖokui ŋu, eye woɖoa dzi ɖe Israel ƒe Mawu, si ŋkɔ nye Yehowa Zebaot la ŋu. 3Meɖe blemanyawo fia gbaɖegbe ke; nye nu me wodo tso, eye mena wosee, mewɔe zi ɖeka kpoyi, eye wova dzɔ. 4Esi menyae be, wò tame sẽ, wò ʋume nye gakpɔti, eye wò ŋgonu nye akɔbli la, 5eyata meɖee fia wò gbaɖegbe ke, eye mena nèsee, hafi woava dza, ne màgagblɔ be: Nye legbawoe wɔe, nye aklama kpakpɛwo kple nye legba kɔkɔwoe ɖoe o. 6Esee, eye nèɖe ŋku ɖe wo katã; ke miawo, ɖe miagbe boblododoea? Maɖe nu yeyewo afia wò tso azɔ kple nu ɣaɣla siwo menya o. 7Fifia wowɔe, eye menye tso blema o, eye mèse eŋu nya kpɔ vaseɖe fifi o, ne nagagblɔ be, yenyae tsã o. 8Mèsee kpo alo nyae o, eye wò to meke ɖe eŋu tsã o, elabena menyae be, ame mawɔnuteƒe nènye, eye godzela woyɔna na wò tso dɔ me ke. 9Metsi nye dɔmedzoe nu le nye ŋkɔ ta, eye le tawò meɖo asi ɖokuinye dzi le nye kafukafu ŋuti, be magatsrɔ̃ wò o; 10kpo ɖa, melólo wò, ke menye abe klosalo ene o, eye medo wò kpo le hiã ƒe aŋoɖakpo me. 11Le tanye, le tanye mawɔe, elabena aleke womehegblẽ kɔ ɖo na nye ŋkɔe o! Nyematsɔ nye bubu na ame tutɔa ɖeke o.
12Yakob kple wò Israel, si meyɔ, miɖo tom! Nyee, nyee nye gbãtɔ, eye nyee nye mlɔetɔ hã. 13Nye asie ɖo anyigba gome anyi, eye nye nuɖusie he dziƒo me; esi meyɔ wo la, wo katã wova tsi tre ɖi. 14Mi katã mikpe ta, ne miasee! Wo dometɔ kae gblɔ esia? Amesi Yehowa lɔ̃na la, aɖe eƒe lɔlɔ̃nu afia ɖe Babel kple eƒe alɔkpa afia ɖe Kaldea-tɔwo ŋu. 15Nyee, nyee ƒo nu, meyɔe, eye mena wòva, eye eƒe mo adze edzi nɛ. 16Mite ɖe ŋunye, ne miasee; tso gɔmedzedzea me ke nyemeƒo nu le adza me o; mele eteƒe tso gbaɖegbe ke, esime wòva me. Azɔ Aƒetɔ Yehowa kple eƒe gbogbo la ɖom ɖa. 17Ale Yehowa, wò xɔnametɔ, Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ la, gblɔ esi: Nye Yehowa, wò Mawu, enye amesi fia nusi nyo na wò la wò, nyee akplɔ wò to ma, si dzi nato la. 18Ɖe wònye ɖe neɖo to nye seawo la, anye ne wò ŋutifafa ana abe tɔsisi ene, eye wò dzɔdzɔenyenye anɔ abe ƒutsotsoewo ene; 19anye ne wò ƒome ano abe ke ene, eye wò dɔmeviwo abe kekui ene; eye womatsrɔ̃ wò ŋkɔ alo atutui ɖa le ŋkunye me o. 20Mitso aseyetsotso ʋu tso Babel, eye nusi tso Kaldea-nyigba dzi! Migblɔ nusia, eye miɖe gbe ƒãe, mihee yi anyigba ƒe mlɔenu ke, migblɔ be: Yehowa ɖe eƒe dɔla Yakob! 21Tsikɔ mewu wo, esi wòkplɔ wo to gbegbe o; ena tsi do tso agakpe me na wo, eye wòle agakpe wòɖudu tsi. 22Yehowa be: Ŋutifafaa ɖeke meli na ame vɔ̃ɖiwo o.

Title: YESAYA 49
Content:
Mawu ƒe dɔla trɔ̃subɔlawo ƒe kekeli kple Israel ƒe xɔxɔ.
1Mi ƒukpowo, miɖo tom, mi adzɔge dukɔwo, miƒu to anyi! Yehowa yɔm tso dɔ me ke, eye wòyɔ ŋkɔnye tso danye ƒe do me ke. 2Ewo nye nu abe yi ɖaɖɛ ene, eɣlam ɖe eƒe asi ƒe vɔvɔli te, eye wòtsɔm wo aŋutrɔ biɖoe hetsɔm ƒo ɖe eƒe daku me. 3Eye wògblɔ nam be: Israel, nye dɔla nènye, amesi ŋu mawo ɖokuinye kɔkɔe ɖo. 4Ke megblɔ be: Medze agbagba yakatsyɔ, eye megblẽ nye ŋusẽ ɖe ya me dzodzro; ke Yehowa si me nye nya le, eye nye fetu le nye Mawu gbɔ. 5Azɔ ale Yehowa, amesi mèm tso dɔ me ke hewɔ eƒe dɔlae, ne wòakplɔ Yakob agbɔe, eye wòaƒo Israel nu ƒu la gblɔ nam esi; elabena bubu le ŋunye le Yehowa ŋku me, eye nye Mawu enye nye ŋusẽ. 6Egblɔ bena: Nu tsɛ wònye be, nènye nye dɔla, ne nafɔ Yakob ƒe toawo ɖe tsitrenu, eye nakplɔ Israel ƒe amesiwo woɖe la agbɔe; metsɔ wò ɖo kekeli na dukɔwo hã, ne nanye nye xɔname vaseɖe anyigba ƒe mlɔenu ke. 7Ale Yehowa, Israel ƒe xɔnametɔ kple eƒe kɔkɔetɔ la gblɔ na amesi wodo vloe, amesi dukɔ la nyɔ ŋui, amesi nye dziɖulawo ƒe kluvi la, enye si; Fiawo akpɔe ahatso ɖe tsitrenu, eye amegãwo aɖe ta agu le Yehowa, amesi metrɔa ta me o la ta, le Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ, amesi tia wò la ta. 8Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mase wò gbe le amenuveɣi, eye maxɔ na wò te xɔnamegbe, makpɔ tawo, eye matsɔ wò aɖo nubabla na dukɔ la, ne naɖo anyigba la te, eye namã domenyinu, si zu gbegbe la; 9ne nagblɔ na gatɔwo be: Mido! eye na amesiwo le viviti me la be: Miva kekeli nu! Woaɖu gbe le mɔ to, eye woƒe gbeɖuƒe anɔ togbɛ ƒeƒlewo katã ta me. 10Dɔ kple tsikɔ mawu wo o, eye ŋdɔ kple ɣe maɖu wo o, elabena wo nuvela le wo kplɔm, eye woakplɔ wo ato tsidzidziwo ŋu. 11Matsɔ nye towo katã awɔ mɔe, eye wòado nye mɔ tatawo. 12Kpɔ ɖa, amesiwo atso adzɔge ava, ame kemewo atso anyiehe kple ɣetoɖoƒe, eye ame bubuwo atso Sinitɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi. 13Mi dziƒowo, mitso aseye, anyigba, kpo dzidzɔ, eye mi towo, mido aƒa; elabena Yehowa fa akɔ na eƒe dukɔ, eye wòkpɔ nublanui na eƒe hiãtɔwo.
Zion ƒe akɔ nata le dɔmetɔtrɔ de eŋu ta.
14Ke Zion be: Yehowa gblẽm ɖi, Aƒetɔ la ŋlɔm be. 15Ɖe nyɔnu aŋlɔ eƒe vidzie be, eye eƒe dɔme agbe tɔtrɔ ɖe eƒe dɔmevi ŋua? Ne woawo ŋlɔe be hã, nyea nyemaŋlɔ wò be o! 16Kpɔ ɖa, meŋlɔ wò ɖe nye asi ŋu, wò gliwo le ŋkunye me ɖaa. 17Viwòwo gbɔna afa tsɔtsɔe, tsrɔ̃wòlawo kple gblẽwòlawo atu le mewo adzo. 18Fɔ ka dzi nakpɔ nu godoo: Wo katã woƒo takpli gbɔna va gbɔwò! Yehowa be: Meta ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Ado wo katã abe lekewɔnu ene, eye atso wo abla ali dzi abe ŋugbetɔ ene. 19Azɔ wò aƒedo, wò gbegbe kple wò anyigba, si wogblẽ la, axaxa ŋuta na edzinɔlawo, eye gblẽwòlawo anɔ adzɔgedzɔgee na wò. 20Azɔ vi, siwo woɖe le ŋuwò la, agblɔ ɖe to me na wò be: Nɔƒe la xaxa nam, te ɖa tso gbɔnye, ne manɔ anyi! 21Eye àgblɔ le wò dzi me be: Woɖe vi le ŋunye, eye metsi ko, wode aboyom, eye wonyãm de gbe tso, ameka dzi esiawo nam? Ameka nyi wo wotsi? Kpɔ ɖa, nye ɖeka ko wogblẽ ɖi, afika woawo ya no? 22Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpo ɖa, mamiã asi dukɔwo, eye mado aflaga ɖe dzi na anyigba dzi dukɔwo, ne woatsɔ wò ŋutsuviwo ɖe akɔnu vɛ, eye woakɔ wò nyɔnuviwo ɖe abɔta ve. 23Fiawo anye vinyilawo na wò, eye wo srɔ̃wo anye nonala na wò; woade ta agu atsyɔ mo anyi ɖe ŋkuwò me, eye wòaɖuɖɔ wò afɔ ŋu ke, eye adze si be, nyee nye Yehowa, eye nyemenana ŋu kpea amesiwo ɖoa ŋu ɖe ŋunye la o. 24Ɖe woaxɔ nuhaha le kalẽtɔ sia? eye ɖe aboyomewo age le ŋutasẽla sia? 25Yehowa be: Woxɔa aboyomewo le kalẽtɔ si, eye nuhaha gena le ŋutasẽla si; mawo avu kple amesiwo le avu wɔm kpli wò, eye maɖe viwòwo; 26mana amesiwo te wò ɖe anyi la, naɖu woawo ŋuta ƒe lã, eye woamu woƒe ʋu abe wein ene. Eye ŋutilãwo katã nadze sii be, nye Yehowa enye wò xɔnametɔ, eye Yakob ƒe ŋusẽtɔ enye wò ɖela.

Title: YESAYA 50
Content:
Wonyã Israel ɖa le eya ŋutɔ ƒe nuvɔ̃ ta, Mawu ƒe dɔla he xɔxɔ vɛ.
1Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Afika mía dada ƒe asigbegbalẽ, si metsɔ gbee la le? alo ameka nye nye fetɔ, si metsɔ mi dzra na? Kpɔ ɖa, mia vodadawo ta wotsɔ mi dzra, eye le mia dzidadawo ta wogbe mia dada ɖo. 2Nukaŋuti meva, eye amea ɖeke meli o, meyɔ ame, eye amea ɖeke metɔ o? Ɖe nye alɔ le kpuie, be wòagbe xɔxɔ na amea? eye ɖe ŋusẽ mele ŋunye, be maɖe ame oa? Kpɔ ɖa, matsɔ nye nyanyrã ana atsiaƒu namie, eye mana tɔsisiwo nazu tagba, wo me lãwo aƒaƒã, elabena tsi megale wo ŋu o, eye tsikɔ awu wo woaku. 3Mata ahovɔ na dziƒo, eye matsyɔ akpanya nɛ.
4Aƒetɔ Yehowa tsɔ nusrɔ̃viwo ƒe aɖe nam, ne manya alesi matsɔ nuƒoƒo akpe ɖe amesiwo ŋu ɖeɖi te la ŋui. Enyɔam ŋdi sia ŋdi, eʋua to nam, ne mase nu abe nusrɔ̃vi ene. 5Aƒetɔ Yehowa ʋu to nam, nyemesẽ to o, eye nyemede megbe o. 6Mesia nye mẽdome ɖi na ameƒolawo, eye meɖo nye tome anyi na amesiwo nyɔa ɖa; nyemetsyɔ nu ŋku me le vlododo kple taɖeɖe ŋuti o. 7Ke Aƒetɔ Yehowa kpe ɖe ŋunye, eyata ŋukpe malém o; eyata nye mo sẽ abe ahliha ene, eye menyae be, ŋu mele kpe ye ge o. 8Amesi le afia tso ge nam la, tsɔ gbɔnye; ameka be, yeahe nya kplim? Mina míava kpe ta! Amesi si nya le ɖe ŋunye la, nete ɖe ŋunye! 9Kpɔ ɖa. Aƒetɔ Yehowa axɔ nam; amekae abu fɔm ma? Kpɔ ɖa, wo katã anyunyɔ abe avɔ ene, eye agbagblaʋui aɖu wo. 10Mia dometɔ, si vɔ̃a Yehowa la, neɖo to eƒe dɔla ƒe gbe; amesi le viviti me zɔm, eye kekelia ɖeke meklẽna nɛ o lã, neɖo dzi ɖe Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ ŋu, eye wòaziɔ ɖe eƒe Mawu ŋu. 11Kpɔ ɖa, mi amesiwo katã tɔa dzo nu, eye mietsɔa dzoƒaɖe bia akpae la, mige ɖe miaƒe dzobibi la kple dzoti, si miekpe la me. Asinye me esia tso na mi, eye miamlɔ vevesese me.

Title: YESAYA 51
Content:
Ame dzɔdzɔewo trɔ tso fukpekpe me, eye wodzɔ dzi le Zion.
1Mi amesiwo tia dzɔdzɔenyenye yome, mi amesiwo dia Yehowa la, miɖo tom! Miɖe ŋku ɖe agakpe, si wotsɔ wɔ mi, kple vudoʋe, si me woɖe mi tsoe. 2Miɖe ŋku ɖe mia fofo Abraham kple Sara, si dzi mi; elabena eya ɖeka meyɔ, eye meyrae wòdzi ɖe dzi. 3Elabena Yehowa afa akɔ na Zion, afa akɔ na woƒe aƒedowo katã, awɔ woƒe gbegbe abe Eden ene kple woƒe tagba abe Yehowa ƒe aba ene; vivisese kple dzidzɔ, kafukafuha kple saŋkuƒoƒo anɔ anyi.
4Nye dukɔ, miƒu to anyi ɖe ŋunye, nye ameha, milé to ɖe ŋunye! Elabena nufiame ado tso asinye me, eye maɖo nye ɖoɖo anyi, wòanye kekeli na dukɔwo. 5Nye dzɔdzɔenyenye tu aƒe, nye xɔname ado, eye nye alɔwo adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu dukɔwo; ƒukpowo le mɔ kpɔm nam, eye wole nye alɔ si nu dzɔm. 6Mifɔ mo dzi ɖe dziƒo eye mide mo to ɖe anyigba; elabena dziƒo abu abe dzudzɔ ene, anyigba anyunyɔ abe avɔ ene, eye edzinɔlawo aku abe tagbatsuwo ene; ke nye xɔname anɔ anyi tegbee, eye nye dzɔdzɔenyenye nu matsi o. 7Mi amesiwo nyaa dzɔdzɔenyenye, dukɔ, si ƒe dzi me nye se la le, miɖo tom! Migavɔ̃ amegbetɔwo ƒe fewuɖuɖu o, eye woƒe vlodoame megaɖe dzi le mia ƒo o! 8Elabena agbagblaʋui aɖu wo abe avɔ ene, eye tsiƒomee aɖu wo abe kuntru ene; ke nye dzɔdzɔenyenye anɔ anyi tegbee, eye nye xɔname anɔ dzidzimewo katã me.
9Nyɔ, Yehowa ƒe alɔ, nyɔ, eye nata ŋusẽ! Nyɔ abe le tsã ŋkekewo me ene, abe le blema ƒomeawo ŋɔli ene. Ɖe menye wòe fũ Raxab, eye nèƒo nu ɖe boso la oa? 10Ɖe menye wòe na atsiaƒu, tɔgo glo la me tsiwo mie, eye nèta mɔ ɖe atsiaƒu gɔme, be amesiwo woɖe la, to edzi yi oa? 11Yehowa ƒe amesiwo wòxɔ ƒle la, atrɔ gbɔ, woava Zion kple aseyetsotso, eye dzidzɔ mavɔ anɔ woƒe ta me; vivisese kple dzidzɔ asu wo si, eye nuxaxa kple hũɖeɖe abu ɖe wo. 12Nyee, nyee nye amesi afa akɔ na mi. Ameka nènye, be nèle amegbetɔ, si nye nu kukua, kple amegbetɔvi, si wowɔna abe gbe ene la vɔ̃m? 13eye nèŋlɔ Yehowa, wɔwòla, amesi he dziƒo me, eye wòɖo anyigba gɔme anyi la be, eye nèle dzodzom nyanyanya gbawotsyogbe ɖaa le ameteɖeanyigba ƒe dziku ta, ne eɖo be, yeagblẽ wo? Afika ameteɖeanyila ƒe dziku le azɔ? 14Woaɖe ga amesi do dɔgɔ̃e ɖi la kaba, maku ɖe gaxɔ me o, eye abolokoe mawɔe o. 15Nyee nye Yehowa, wò Mawu, amesi de adã ta me na atsiaƒu, ale be eƒe tsotsoewo dze agbo; eƒe ŋkɔ nye Yehowa Zebaot. 16Metsɔ nye nya ɖe nuwo, eye meɣla wò ɖe nye asi ƒe vɔvɔli te, ne magbugbɔ dziƒo me ahe, maɖo anyigba gome anyi, eye magblɔ na Zion be: Nye dukɔ nènye.
17Fɔ, fɔ, Yerusalem, tso, wò, si no dɔmedzoekplu tso Yehowa si me, èno kplu muame la kpɔ egɔme ƒiaƒiaƒia. 18Vi, siwo katã wòdzi la dometɔa ɖeke mekpɔe o, eye vi, siwo katã wònyi wotsi la dometɔa ɖeke melé eƒe alɔnu o. 19Nu evee dzɔ ɖe dziwò, amekae afa na wò? Gbegblẽ kple, tsɔtsrɔ̃, dɔwuame kple yi, amekae afa akɔ na wò? 20Nu te viwòwo ŋu, wòmlɔ kpɔdomewo katã ƒe dzogoewo dzi abe sẽ, si mɔ̃ ɖe ene, eye Yehowa ƒe dziku kple wò Mawu ƒe nyanyrã ɖi ƒo na wò. 21Eyata, wò hiãtɔ, yamula, si meno wein hafi o la, se esia! 22Ale wò Aƒetɔ Yehowa kple wò Mawu, amesi wòa avu ɖe eƒe dukɔ nu la, gblɔ esi: Maxɔ kplu muame, nye dɔmedzoekplu la, le asiwò me, eye màganoe azɔ o; 23matsɔe ade asi na amesiwo wo funyafunya wò, amesiwo gblɔ na wò be: Bɔbɔ, ne míato dziwò ayi, wo wò mẽdome wòasɔ kple anyigba, eye wòanɔ, abe alesi mo le na edzitolawo ene.

Title: YESAYA 52
Content:
Ŋutifafa gbeƒãɖelawo ɖe gbe ƒã xɔxɔ le Zion.
1Nyɔ, Zion, nyɔ nata wò ŋusẽ! Yerusalem, wò du kɔkɔe la, ta wò atsyɔ̃vɔwo! Elabena bolotɔwo kple ame makɔmakɔwo magava mewò azɔ o. 2Ʋuʋu ke le ŋuwò, Yerusalem, tso nabɔbɔ nɔ anyi! Zion-nyɔnuvi, si woɖe aboyoe, ɖe ga le wò kɔ! 3Elabena ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Wotso mi dzra yaka, eye menye ga tsɔ ge woala axɔ mi o. 4Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Tsã la nye dukɔ yi Egipte, be wòanɔ afima, eye Asur tee ɖe anyi yakatsyɔ. 5Yehowa be: Azɔ dɔ ka le ŋunye le afi, esi wokplɔ nye dukɔ dzoe yakatsyɔ? Yehowa be, wo dziɖulawo le aseye tsom, eye wole alɔme ɖem le nye ŋkɔ ŋu gbeawotsyogbe ɖaa. 6Eyata nye dukɔ adze si nye ŋkɔ gbemagbe be, nyee nye amesi le gbɔgblɔm be: Nyee nye si!
7Du nyui xɔla ƒe afɔwo nyo le towo dzi loo! Eya, amesi ɖea gbe ƒã ŋutifafa, eye wòtoa gbe nyui, eɖea gbe ƒã xoname, eye wòle gbɔgblɔm na Zion be: Wò Mawu enye fia! 8Lé to ɖe wò dzɔlawo ŋu! Wo katã ƒe gbe de dzi, eye wotso aseye; elabena woƒe ŋkuwò kpɔ eteƒe, esime Yehowa trɔ gbɔ va Zion. 9Mi Yerusalem ƒe aƒedowo, mido aƒa, mitso aseye yoo; elabena Yehowa fa akɔ na eƒe dukɔ, eye wòɖe Yerusalem! 10Yehowa klo nu le eƒe alɔ kɔkɔe la ŋu le dukɔwo katã ŋku me, eye anyigba ƒe mlɔenuwo katã akpɔ mía Mawu ƒe xɔname. 11Midzo, midzo, miʋu tso afima! Migaka asi nu makɔmakɔa ɖeke ŋu o! Miʋu tso wo dome; mi Yehowa ƒe nutsɔlawo, mikɔ mia ɖokui ŋu! 12Elabena menye kplakplakpla dzi miano aʋu o, eye miasi adzo o; elabena Yehowa adze ŋgɔ na mi, eye Israel ƒe Mawu la axe megbe na mi.
13Kpɔ ɖa, nye dɔla awɔ nu ɖe nunya me, woadoe ɖe dzi, axɔ ŋkɔ, eye wòaɖo kpo ŋutɔ. 14Alesi ame geɖewo ƒe nu ku ɖe ŋuwò, alesi eƒe nɔnɔme vlo wu amegbetɔwo tɔ, eye eƒe kpɔkpɔme vlo wu amegbetɔviwo tɔ la, 15nenema wòana dukɔ geɖewo ƒe nu naku, eye fiawo ƒe nu ade ga le eta, elabena nusi womegblɔ na wo kpɔ o la, wokpɔ, eye nusi womese kpɔ o la, wodze sii.

Title: YESAYA 53
Content:
Fukpekpe ɖe ame teƒe kple Mawu ƒe dɔla ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe.
1Amekae xɔ nya, siwo wogblɔ na mí la dzi se, eye ameka ŋue Yehowa ƒe alɔ ɖe eɖokui fia ɖo? 2Edze abe atilɔ fẽ ene le eŋku me, eye abe ke ƒe dzedzè tso anyigba ƒuƒu me ene. Nɔnɔme kple ɖekadzedze mele eŋu, ne míaɖe ŋku ɖee o, eye kpɔkpɔme mele eŋu, ne eƒe nu nadzro mí o. 3Amegbetɔwo do vloe, eye wogbee, ŋutsu kpehiã kple amesi dzi dɔléle le la wònye, wodo vloe abe amesi ta wotsyɔ nu ŋku me ɖo la ene, eye míebui ɖe naneke me o.
4Ke eyae tsɔ míaƒe dɔlélewo, eye wòɖe ta miaƒe vevesesewo te; evɔ wònye míawo míebui abe amesi wohe to na, amesi Mawu ƒo, eye wòwɔ funyafunyae ene hafi. 5Ke wode abi eŋu le míaƒe dzidadawo ta, eye wogbãe gudugudu le míaƒe vodadawo ta. Miaƒe ŋutifafa ƒe tohehe le edzi, eye eƒe kabiwo wotsɔ yɔ dɔ mí. 6Mí katã míetra mɔ abe alẽwo ene, eye amesiame lé eƒe mɔ tsɔ; ke Yehowa na míaƒe vodadawo katã va eyama dzi.
7Wowɔ fui, ke ebɔbɔ eɖokui eye meke nu o; abe alẽ, si wokplɔ yina wuwu ge, kple alẽvi, si li kpoo le eƒe fukolawo ŋku me ene la, nenema eya hã meke nui o. 8Woɖee le xaxa kple ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ me, eye eŋɔlimeviwo dometɔ kae bu eŋuti kpɔ be, woɖee ɖa le agbagbeawo ƒe anyigba dzi, eye wowɔ fui le nye dukɔ ƒe dzidadawo ta? 9Woɖe yɔdo nɛ ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖiwo dome, eye esi wòku la, enɔ vodalawo dome, evɔ wònye mesẽ ŋuta o, eye alakpa menɔ eƒe nu me kpɔ o hafi.
10Ke Yehowa ɖi be, yeatsɔ dɔléle agbãe gudugudu; ne etso eɖokui wo fɔɖivɔsae la, akpɔ dzidzimeviwo, anɔ agbe didie, eye Yehowa ƒe tameɖoɖo adze edzi to eƒe asi dzi. 11Akpa nu kple ŋku, wòaɖi ƒo nɛ le eƒe luʋɔ ƒe agbagbadzedze ta. Nye dɔla dzɔdzɔe la atsa nunya atso afia na ame geɖewo, eye wòade ta woƒe vodadawo te. 12Eyata mana gomee ɖe ame geɖewo dome, eye eya kple kalẽtɔwo amã aboyonu, elabena etso eƒe agbe de ku me, eye wòna wobui kpe ɖe vodalawo ŋu, evɔ wònye ede ta ame geɖewo ƒe nuvɔ̃wo te, eye wòɖe kuku ɖe vodalawo ta hafi.

Title: YESAYA 54
Content:
Mawu do kaka ɖe xexea me kple amenuveve ma vɔ ŋugbe na eƒe dukɔ la.
1Wò konɔ, si medzi vi o, tso aseye; kpɔ dzidzɔ, eye nado aƒa, wò amesi melé ku kpɔ o! Yehowa be: Amesi tsi akogo la ƒe viwo sɔ gbɔ wu srɔ̃tɔ ƒe viwo. 2Keke wò agbadɔ ƒe nɔƒe de nu, eye nahe wò agbadɔvɔ me, megahe asi de megbe o! Didi wò kawo ɖe nu, eye naƒo wò tsyotiwo ɖe to! 3Elabena àkeke ɖe ɖusi kple mia me, viwòwo axɔ dukɔwo ƒe anyigba, eye woanɔ ɖu zu aƒedowo me. 4Megavɔ̃ o, elabena ŋu makpe wò o; wò mo megatsi da o, elabena ŋukpe malé wò o. Elabena àŋlɔ wò ɖetugbime ŋukpe be, eye màɖo ŋu wò ahosinyenye me vlododo o. 5Elabena wɔwòla enye srɔ̃wò, eŋkɔ nye Yehowa Zebaot, eye wò ɖela enye Israel ƒe kɔkɔeto la, eŋkɔ nye xexeame blibo ƒe Mawu. 6Elabena Yehowa ya wò abe nyɔnu, si wogblẽ ɖi wòle nu xam ene, eye abe ɖekakpuime srɔ̃, si wogbe ene, Yehowa ye gblɔe. 7Megblẽ wò di vie ko, ke matsɔ nublanuikpɔkpɔ gã aƒo wò ƒu. 8Le dɔmedzoedodo ƒe nyanyrã me meɣla nye ŋku me de wò ʋee: ke matsɔ amenuveve mavɔ akpɔ nublanui na wò, Yehowa, wò ɖelae gblɔe! 9Elabena esia le nam abe Noa ƒe tsiɖɔɖɔ ene; alesi mekɔ atam be, Noa ƒe tsiɖɔɖɔ magaɖe anyigba akpɔ o la, nenema ke meka atam be, nyemagado dɔmedzoe ɖe ŋuwò, eye nyemagaka mo na wò azɔ o. 10Elabena ne towo te ɖa, eye togbɛwo ʋã hã la, nye amenuveve mate ɖa le ŋuwò o, eye nye ŋutifafa nubabla maʋã o, Yehowa, wò nublanuikpɔlae gblɔe!
11Wò hiãtɔ, si ahom lɔ ɖe nu, eye womefa akɔ na wò o, kpɔ ɖa, matsɔ kpe ŋɔŋɔewo aɖo gɔwòme anyi, eye matsɔ adzagba aɖo wò agunu anyi. 12Mana wò xɔta tsutsuẽwo nanye gbloti, wò agbowo nanye soe, eye wò kpɔtɔtɔ blibo la nanye kpe xɔasiwo. 13Viwòwo katã anye Yehowa ƒe nusrɔ̃viwo, eye viwòwo ƒe ŋutifafa asa gbɔ. 14Dzɔdzɔenyenye woatsɔ ali ke wò; anɔ adzɔge na ŋutasesẽ, elabena mavɔ̃ o, eye anɔ adzɔge na ŋɔdzi, elabena mate ɖe ŋuwò o. 15Kpɔ ɖa, ne amea ɖe wɔ avu la, menye nyee dɔe o; amesi wɔ avu kpli wò la, atsi asiwò me. 16Kpɔ ɖa, nyee wɔ gbede, amesi ƒlɔa dzo ɖo, eye wòtua lãnu le eƒe dɔwɔwɔ nu; eye nyee wɔ nugblẽla hã, be wòagblẽ nu. 17Lãnu sia lãnu, si wotu ɖe ŋuwò la, madze edzi o, eye abu tɔ aɖe, siwo katã tso ɖe ŋuwò le ʋɔnu. Esia nye Yehowa ƒe dɔlawo ƒe domenyinu, eye woƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye tso gbɔnye, Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: YESAYA 55
Content:
Amewo katã kpekpe hena Mawu ƒe amenuveve nubabla.
1Kuwui! Mi ame tsikɔwuwo katã, miva tsi gbɔ! Mi amesiwo si ga mele o, miva ƒle nu, ne miaɖu! Miva, ne miadze wein kple notsi, menye kple ga alo le asixɔxɔ nu o! 2Nuka ta miebe, yewoaxlẽ ga ɖe nusi menye abolo o la ta, eye miawɔ dɔ ɖe nusi meɖia ƒo o la ta? Miɖo tom ko, ekema miaɖu nu nyui, eye miaƒe luʋɔ ƒe dzeme akɔ ɖe ami ŋu. 3Miƒu to anyi, eye miva gbɔnye! Mise nu, ekema miaƒe luʋɔ anɔ agbe! Mabia nu mavɔ kpli mi, mana Dawid ƒe amenuveve, si li ke la mi. 4Kpɔ ɖa, metsɔe ɖo ɖasefo na dukɔwo, eye metsɔe ɖo dukɔwo ƒe amegã kple dziɖula. 5Kpɔ ɖa, ayɔ dukɔ, si menya o la vɛ, eye dukɔ, si menya wò o la, aƒu du ava gbɔwò le Yehowa, wò Mawu, kple Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ la ta, elabena ede bubu ŋuwò. 6Midi Yehowa, ŋkeke alesi wòle gaglãgbe, miyɔe, esime wotsɔ kpui ƒe. 7Ame vɔ̃ɖi neɖe asi le eƒe mɔ ŋu, eye nu vlo wɔla neɖe asi le eƒe susuwo ŋu, ne wòatrɔ ɖe Yehowa ŋu, ekema akpɔ nublanui nɛ, eye wòatrɔ ɖe mía Mawu ŋu, elabena etsɔa nuvɔ̃ kena geɖe.
Mawu ƒe nya ƒe dɔwɔwɔ vodada manɔŋui.
8Elabena Yehowa be: Nye susuwo menye miaƒe susuwo o, eye miaƒe mɔwo menye nye mɔwo o; 9ke boŋ alesi dziƒo kɔ boo wu anyigbae la, nenema nye mɔwo kɔ wu miaƒe mawo kple nye susuwo wu miaƒe susuwòe. 10Elabena alesi tsidzadza kple sno dzana tso dziƒo, eye megagbugbɔna yina o, ke boŋ wòdea tsi anyigba wònana wòmiea nu heʋãa nu, eye wònaa nuku nuƒãla kple abolo, ne woaɖu la, 11nenema ke nye nya, si do tso nye nu me la anɔ: Magbugbɔ va gbɔnye ƒuƒlu o, negbe ɖeko wòawɔ nye lɔlɔ̃nu, eye wòawɔ nusi gbe meɖoe ɖo la hafi.
12Elabena miaʋu adzo kple dzidzɔ, eye woaɖo mi ɖa le ŋutifafa me. Towo kple togbɛwo atso aseye le mia ŋgɔ, eye gbemetiwo katã aƒu akpe. 13Sesewuwo amie ɖe ŋuvewo teƒe, eye gbe ʋeʋẽewo amie ɖe dzawo teƒe, eye wòazu kafukafu na Yehowa kple ŋkuɖodzinu mavɔ, si nu mayi o.

Title: YESAYA 56
Content:
Nuxɔxlɔ̃ hena mawusubɔsubɔ. Trɔ̃subɔlawo tɔtrɔ.
1Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi. Midzra ɖoɖo la ɖo, eye miwɔ nu dzɔdzɔe. Elabena nye xɔname tu aƒe, ne wòava, kple nye dzɔdzɔenyenye, ne wòaɖe eɖokui afia. 2Woayra amegbetɔ, si wɔa alea, kple amegbetɔvi, si kuna ɖe nusia ŋu, amesi dzraa dzudzɔgbe la ɖo, be wòagagblẽ kɔ ɖo nɛ o, eye wòkpɔa eƒe asi dzi, be magawɔ vɔ̃a ɖeke o! 3Amedzrovi, si ku ɖe Yehowa ŋu la, megagblɔ be, Yehowa le ye ɖe ge ɖa atso eƒe dukɔ ŋu o; eye ame tata megagblɔ be, kpɔ ɖa, ye la, ati ƒuƒu ko ye nye o. 4Elabena ale Yehowa gblɔ na ame tata, siwo dzraa nye dzudzɔgbewo ɖo, wotiaa nusi dzea ŋunye, eye wokuna ɖe nye nubabla ŋu tsehee la, enye si: 5Mana ŋkuɖodzinu kple ŋkɔ, siwo nyo wu ŋutsuviwo kple nyɔnuviwo la wo ɖe aƒenye me kple nye gliwo me; ŋkɔ mava, si metsrɔ̃na o la, mana amesiawo tɔgbe. 6Eye amedzrovi, siwo ku ɖe Yehowa ŋu, be yewoasubɔe, yewoalɔ̃ Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ, eye yewoanye dɔlawo ne, wo amesiwo katã dzraa dzudzɔgbe la ɖo, be yewomagagblẽ kɔ ɖo nɛ o, eye wokuna ɖe nye nubabla ŋu la, 7mana woade nye to kɔkɔe la gbɔ, eye mado dzidzɔ na wo le nye gbedoxɔ me. Woƒe numevɔsawo kple woƒe akpedavɔsawo adze ŋunye le nye vɔsamlekpui dzi; elabena woayɔ nye aƒe be: Dukɔwo katã ƒe gbedoxɔ. 8Aƒetɔ Yehowa, amesi ƒo Israel ƒe ame kahlẽwo nu ƒu la be: Magaƒo amewo nu ƒu akpe ɖe ame ƒoƒuawo ŋu.
Tohehe na dukɔ la kplɔla vɔ̃ɖiawo.
9Mi gbemelãwo katã, miva ɖu nu, mi avemelãwo katã! 10Woƒe dzɔlawo katã nye ŋkuagbãtɔwo, womele si dzem naneke o; avũ aɖetututɔ, siwo mate ŋu aɖe gbe o la, wo katã wonye, womlɔ anyi le drɔ̃e kum, eye alɔ̃ le wo nu vivim. 11Do le avũawo wum vevie, eye womenya ƒoɖiɖi o, lãkplɔvi, siwo mele ɖeke nyam o la, wonye; wo katã wòlé woƒe mɔ, eye wo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe le eƒe viɖe yome dim le goawo katã me. 12Miva, ne maɖaku wein ve, eye míano aha muame; etso hã nanɔ abe egbe ene, eye eteƒe makɔ o.

Title: YESAYA 57
Content:
Le ku me ko hã ame dzɔdzɔewo akpɔ ŋutifafa, eye mawumavɔ̃lawo akpɔ ŋutimafamafa.
1Ame dzɔdzɔe kuna, eye medea dzigbɔ na amea ɖeke o, woɖea mawumemewo ɖa, ke amea ɖeke medzea sii be, vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ nu woɖea ame dzɔdzɔe ɖa le o. 2Amesiwo ƒe zɔzɔme to mo ɖeka la, wòayi ɖe ŋutifafa me, eye woagbɔ ɖe eme le wo mlɔƒewo.
3Mi nyɔnu dzosala ƒe viwo, mi ŋutsu ahasitɔ kple gbolo ƒe dzidzimeviwo, mite va! 4Ameka ŋu miele fefem le, ameka ŋu mieke nu ɖo baa, eye miedo aɖe ɖe go biɖaa ɖo? Ɖe menye godzelawo ƒe dzidzimeviwo kple alakpaviwo mienye, 5amesiwo ƒe lãme le fiefiẽm ɖe legbawo ŋu le ati damawo katã te, mi amesiwo wu mia viwo ɖe balimewo le agakpetowo te la oa? 6Etia bali me kpe zɔzrɔ̃ewo na ɖokuiwo, woawoe nye wò gome; èƒo tsi ɖe anyi na wo, eye nèɖe dza na wo, ɖe mazi kpi akpa nusiawoa? 7Etu mlowòƒe ɖe to, si ko bobobo la dzi, eye nèyi edzi, be nawu vɔsalã. 8Etso wò ŋkuɖodzinu ɖo wò ʋɔtruwo kple ʋɔtrutiwo godo, elabena ètrɔ ʋu le yonyeme, èklɔ nu le wò aba ŋu, ede edzi, eye nèkekee de nu, eye mia kple wo miebla asi; wo mlɔƒe dze ŋuwò, eye nèɖe ŋku ɖe ama. 9Etsɔ ami yi fia gbɔe, eye nèɖo atike ʋeʋẽe asi fũ; èɖo wò amewo ɖe didiƒe ke, eye nèbɔbɔ ta wòɖatɔ tsieƒe ke. 10Ne wò ma didi la te ɖeɖi ŋuwò hã la, mègblɔna be, yeadzudzɔ o; agbe gale ŋuwò, eyata nu mete ŋuwò o. 11Amekae le ŋɔ dzim na wò, eye ameka vɔ̃m nèle, be nèzu alakpatɔ, meɖo ŋku dzinye o, eye nya mede dzigbɔ na wò o? Esi mezi kpi eteƒe didi la, menye eyatae negbem vɔvɔ̃ ɖo oa? 12Maɖe wò dzɔdzɔenyenye afia; ke wò dɔwɔwɔwo maxɔ na wo o. 13Eɖo ɣli be, wò legba gbogboawo naxɔ na wò, ke ya lɔ wo katã ɖe nu, eye ƒuƒu kplɔ wo dzoe. Ke amesi sim tso la, anyi anyigba ƒe dome, eye wòaxɔ nye to kɔkɔe la wòanye etɔ.
14Eye wògblɔ be: Mita mɔ, mita mɔ, mikplɔ mɔwo dzi; miɖe nukikliwo katã ɖa le mɔ me na nye dukɔ! 15Elabena ale ame gã, si ɖo kpo, eli tegbee, eye eƒe ŋkɔ nye kɔkɔe la, gblɔ esi: Mele dzi kple kɔkɔeƒe la, mele amesi wogbã gudugudu, kple amesi ƒe gbɔgbɔ wobɔbɔ de anyi la gbɔ, ne magbɔ agbe amesiwo wobɔbɔ ɖe anyi la ƒe gbɔgbɔ, eye magbɔ agbe amesiwo wogbã gudugudu la ƒe dzi. 16Elabena nyemanɔ dzre hem godogodo o, eye nyemanɔ dɔmedzoe dom ɖaa o; elabena nu ava te gbɔgbɔ ŋu le ŋkunye me kple luʋɔ, siwo mewɔ la ŋu. 17Le eƒe ŋubiabia ƒe vodada ta medo dɔmedzoe, eye meƒoe ɖo, medo dɔmedzoe, eye meɣla ɖokuinye, tete wòdze go helé eƒe tamesusu ƒe mɔ tso. 18Mekpɔ eƒe mɔwo, mayɔ dɔe, makplɔe, eye mafa akɔ na eya kple eƒe nuxalawo. 19Yehowa, amesi wo nuyiwo ƒe kutsetse la, gblɔ be: Ŋutifafa, ŋutifafa mana didiƒe nɔlawo kple kpuiƒe nɔlawo, eve mayɔ do wo. 20Ke ame vɔ̃ɖiwo fe abe atsiaƒu dzeagbo ene, elabena mate ŋu anɔ anyi kpoo o, eye eƒe tsiwo le bà kple gbeɖuɖɔ ɖem ɖe go. 21Nye Mawu be; Ŋutifafaa ɖeke meli na ame vɔ̃ɖiwo o.

Title: YESAYA 58
Content:
Nutsitsidɔ nyuitɔ kple vɔ̃ɖitɔ.
1He vekati nado ɣli, megadzudzɔ o! Wò gbe nede dzi abe kpẽ ene, eye nagblɔ nye dukɔ ƒe vodada nɛ kple Yakob ƒe aƒe ƒe nuvɔ̃wo nɛ! 2Wole diyem gbeawotsyogbe, eye wole didim be, yewoanya nye mɔwo; wole ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ dzɔdzɔe dim tso gbɔnye abe dukɔ, si wɔa nu dzɔdzɔe, eye megblẽa eƒe Mawu ƒe ɖoɖowo ɖi o la ene; wole didim be, Mawu natsɔ ɖe yewo gbɔ! 3„Nukaŋuti míetsi nu dɔ, eye mèlé ŋku ɖe eŋu o, míeka hiã mía ɖokui, eye mèdze sii o?“ Kpɔ ɖa, miewɔ ɖɔ le miaƒe nutsidɔgbe, eye mieƒo du ɖe miaƒe dɔwɔlawo nu. 4Kpɔ ɖa, dzrewɔwɔ kple avuwɔwɔ ta mietsi nu le dɔdɔm ɖo, eye be miada kɔ madzɔmadzɔ. Menye ɖe mietsi nu dɔ le ŋkeke mawo me, be woase miaƒe gbe le dzi o. 5De nutsitsiɖɔ, si melɔ̃na, kple ŋkeke, si dzi amegbetɔ naka hiã eɖokui la, enye esia? Ne wobi ta ɖe anyi abe keti ene, eye womlɔ akpanya kple afi dzi la, eya yɔm nèle be nutsitsidɔ kple ŋkeke, si adze Yehowa ŋua?
Mawusubɔsubɔ vavãtɔ yayra.
6Ɖe menye esia nye nutsitsidɔ, si melɔ̃na la oa be, woaɖe ga madzɔmadzɔwo, woatu kɔkuti ƒe kawo, woana ablɔɖe amesiwo wote ɖe anyi, eye míaŋe kɔkutiwo katã, 7naka wò abolo na dɔwuitɔ, eye nakplɔ ame dahe, siwo le tsaglãla tsam la, ayi aƒewò mee, ne èkpɔ amea ɖe amama la, nata avɔ ne, eye màgaɣla ɖokuiwò ɖe wò ŋutɔ wò ŋutilã o. 8Ekema wò kekeli adze abe agudzedze ene, eye wò hayahaya ado kaba, wò dzɔdzɔenyenye adze ŋgɔwò, eye Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ahe megbe na wò. 9Ekema àyɔ Yehowa, eye woatɔ na wò; àdo ɣli, eye wòagblɔ be: Nyee nye si! Ne èɖe ameteteɖeanyi, asifiafia me kple nu vɔ̃ɖi ƒoƒo le dowòme, 10ne ètsɔ wò abolo na dɔwuitɔ, eye nèɖi ƒo na amesi wole ɖe anyi la, ekema wò kekeli aklẽ le viviti me, eye wò tsizi anɔ abe ŋdɔkutsu dzatsɛ ene, 11ekema Yehowa akplɔ wò ɖaa, eye wòaɖi ƒo na wò le kuɖiɖinyigba dzi, aɖe agbe wò ƒuwo me, eye ànɔ abe abɔ, si wode tsii, kple tsidzɔƒe, si ƒe tsiwo memiena o la ene. 12Viwòwo atso blemaƒedowo, eye afɔ gbaɖegbetɔwo ƒe glikpowo ɖe tsitrenu, eye woayɔ wò be „gli gbagbãwo ɖɔɖola, mɔwo dzradola, ne woatso aƒe ɖi.“ 13Ne ète wò afɔ ɖe megbe tso dzudzɔgbe la ŋu, be mèwɔ wò dɔwo le nye ŋkeke kɔkɔe la dzi o, ne èyɔ dzudzɔgbe la be: „dzidzɔ“ kple Yehowa ƒe nu kɔkɔe la be „bubu“, eye nède bubu eyama ŋu, ale be mèlé wò mɔ tsɔ o, mèwɔ wò dɔwo o, eye mèƒo nu kpoloe o la, 14ekema akpɔ dzidzɔ le Yehowa ŋu, mana naɖe anyigba ƒe kɔkɔƒewo, eye mana naɖu fofowò Yakob ƒe domenyinu; elabena Yehowa ƒe nue gblɔe!

Title: YESAYA 59
Content:
Dukɔ mavɔ̃mawu la ƒe gbegblẽ.
1Kpɔ ɖa, Yehowa ƒe alɔ meto ɖe eme, be maxɔ na ame o, eye eƒe to metsi, be mase nu o; 2ke boŋ miaƒe vodadawoe klã mia kple miaƒe Mawu dome, eye miaƒe nuvɔ̃woe na be, wòɣla ŋku me ɖe mi, be magaɖo to mi o. 3Elabena ʋu ƒo asi na mi, eye vodada le míaƒe asibidewo ŋu, miaƒe nuyiwo daa alakpa, eye miaƒe aɖewo gblɔa nya tovo. 4Amea ɖeke meli, si biaa dzɔdzɔenyenye ta sena o, eye ame ɖeke medrɔ̃a ʋɔnu ɖe eteƒe o, woɖoa ŋu ɖe nu dzodzroa ŋu, eye wodaa alakpa, wofɔa hiãkame ƒe fu hetsɔa dzɔgbevɔ̃e dzina. 5Woƒoa dakpui ƒe azi, eye wolɔ̃a yiyiɖɔ; amesi ɖua woƒe azi la, aku, eye ne wogbãe kple afɔ la, ƒli ado atso me. 6Woƒe kawo mazu avɔ akpɔ o, eye womatsyɔ woƒe dɔwɔwɔwo o; woƒe dɔwɔwɔwo nye dɔ vɔ̃ɖiwo, eye ŋutasesẽ le woƒe asiwò me. 7Woƒe afɔwo le du dzi ɖe vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ ŋu, eye wole abla ɖem, be wòakɔ ʋu maɖifɔ ɖi. Woƒe susuwo nye susu vɔ̃ɖiwo, gbegblẽ kple tsɔtsrɔ̃ le wo toƒewo. 8Womenyaa ŋutifafa mɔ la o, eye nu dzɔdzɔea ɖeke menɔa wo toƒe o, woglɔ̃a woƒe mɔ, eye amesi toa eɖzi la, menyaa ŋutifafaa ɖeke o.
9Eyata ɖoɖo la le adzɔge na mí, eye dzɔdzɔenyenye gbe mía gbɔ vava; míele mɔ kpɔm na kekeli, kpɔ ɖa, viviti li, míele mɔ kpɔm na xexeme ƒe kɔkɔ, ke míele zɔzɔm le blukɔ me. 10Miele asi tsam le gli ŋu abe ŋkuagbãtɔwo ene, eye míele asi tsam abe ŋkunɔwo ene. Míekli nu le ŋdɔkutsu dzatsɛ abe le zã me ene, eye miele ame damiwo dome abe ame kukuwo ene! 11Mi katã miele gbe tem abe sisiblisiwo ene, eye miele xɔxlɔ̃m abe ahɔnewo ene; miele mɔ kpɔm na ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃, ke meva o, miele mɔ kpɔm na xɔname, ke etsi adzɔge na mi. 12Elabena míaƒe dzidadawo sɔ gbɔ le ŋkuwò me, eye míaƒe nuvɔwo le ɖase ɖim le mía ŋu. Elabena míedze si miaƒe dzidadawo, eye miaƒe vodadawo la, míenya wo. 13Míeda vo, eye miegbe Yehowa, miede megbe tso mia Mawu la gbɔ, eye míeƒo ŋutasesẽ kple godzedze ƒe nu, míefa alakpanya ƒe tu, eye míedzii tso dzi me. 14Ɖoɖo la gbugbɔ ɖe megbe, eye dzɔdzɔenyenye tsi adzɔge. Elabena nyateƒe le nu klim le kpɔdome, eye nuteƒewɔwɔ mate ŋu age ɖe eme o. 15Ale nyateƒe bu ɖe ame, eye amesi ƒo asa na vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ la, wohae. Eye Yehowa kpɔ be, nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔa ɖeke meli o, eye medze eŋu o.
Ɖelaa ɖe ŋugbedodo.
16Eye wòkpɔ be, amea ɖeke meli o, eye wòwɔ mo yaa nɛ be, avulélaa ɖeke meli o. Tete wotso eƒe alo xɔ na eɖokui, eye eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye kpe ɖe eŋu. 17Edo dzɔdzɔenyenye abe ga wu ene, eye wòɖɔ xɔname ƒe gakuku ɖe la; eta hlɔ̃biabia abe ava ene, eye wòda ŋuʋaʋã ɖe abɔ abe taɖedzi ene. 18Aɖo eteƒe ɖe nuwɔwɔwo nu: eƒe ketɔwo to enye dziku, teƒeɖoɖo enye eƒe futɔwo tɔ, eye wòaɖo ƒukpowo ƒe nuwɔwɔwo teƒe na wo. 19Ɣetoɖoƒetɔwo avɔ̃ Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ, eye ɣedzeƒetɔwo avɔ̃ eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe, elabena ele vava ge abe tɔsisi, si xaxa, eye Yehowa ƒe ahom lɔ ɖe nu la ene. 20Anye ɖela ava na Zion, eye na amesiwo trɔ tso woƒe dzidadawo me le Yakob; Yehowa ye gblɔe. 21Yehowa be: Nusi mebia kpli wò la, enye si: Nye gbɔgbɔ, si le dziwò, kple nye nya, si metsɔ de nuwo la, mate ɖa le nuwo me alo le viwòwo kple viwo wo ƒe viwo nu me o, tso fifia ɖaseɖe mava me, Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: YESAYA 60
Content:
Zion ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe. Trɔ̃subɔlawo tɔtrɔ.
1Tso naklẽ, elabena wò kekeli gbɔna, eye Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe adze ɖe dziwò! 2Elabena viviti xɔ anyigba dzi, eye blukɔ tsyo dukɔwo, ke wò la, Yehowa adze ɖe dziwò, eye eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ado ɖe dziwò. 3Anyigba dzi dukɔwo azɔ le wò kekeli nu kple fiawo le wò keklẽ ƒe dzedze nu. 4Fɔ kɔ dzi nakpɔ nu godoo va kpe, wo katã woƒo ta kpli gbɔna gbɔwò! Wo ŋutsuviwo atso didiƒe ava, eye woakpa wo nyɔnuviwo ɖe axada me. 5Ekema akpɔe, eye àko atsemenu, wò dzi adzo kpo, eye wòavu eɖokui; elabena atsiaƒu me nu xɔasiwo do agbogbo ɖe dziwò, eye dukɔwo ƒe kesinɔnuwo va na wò. 6Kposɔwo anyẽ atsyɔ wò bibibi kple kposɔviwo tso Midian kple Efa; wo katã woatso sika kple dzudzɔ ʋeʋẽedonu atso Seba vɛ, eye woaɖe gbe ƒã Yehowa ƒe kafukafu. 7Kedar ƒe lãhawo katã aƒo ƒu ɖe ŋuwò, eye Nebayot ƒe agbowo asubɔ wò; woava nye vɔsamlekpui dzi, ne woadze ŋunye, eye mawɔ leke na nye atsyɔ̃xɔ la. 8Amekawoe nye esiawo, siwo le ya ʋum abe alilikpo ene, eye abe ahɔnee yina ɖe eƒe xɔ gbɔ ene? 9Nyee ƒukpowo le mɔ kpɔm na, eye Tarsis-ƒukpowo ɖo ŋgɔ, be woakplɔ viwòwo tso didiƒe vɛ; wohe woƒe klosalo kple sika ɖe asi hena Yehowa, wò Mawu ƒe ŋkɔ, hena Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ la, elabena eɖo atsyɔ̃ na wò. 10Amedzroviwo aɖo wò gliwo, eye woƒe fiawo asubɔ wò; elabena le nye dɔmedzoe me meƒo wò, eye makpɔ nublanui na wò le nye amenuveve me. 11Wo agbowo anɔ nuvo ɖaa, eye womado wo o zã Kple keli, ne woahe dukɔwo ƒe kesinɔnuwo ve na wò, eye woƒe fiawo nanɔ wo nu. 12Dukɔ kple fiaɖuƒe, siwo be, yewomade ta tewò o la nu ayi, eye woatsrɔ̃ anyigba dzi dukɔ mawo gbidigbidi. 13Woahe Libanon ƒe atsyɔ̃, sesewu, fɔfɔli kple kpomi siaa vɛ na wò, ne natsɔ aɖo atsyɔ̃ na nye kɔkɔeƒe ƒe nɔƒe, eye nade bubu nye afɔ nɔƒe ŋu. 14Eye amesiwo se ŋuta le ŋuwò la ƒe viwo ado dɔgɔ̃e ava gbɔwò, amesiwo katã ɖe alɔme le ŋuwò la, ade ta agu ɖe wò afɔ nu ahayɔ wò be: „Yehowa ƒe ɖu.“ „Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ ƒe Zion“. 15Esi wogblɔ wò ɖi, wogbe wò nya, eye amea ɖeke meto ŋuwò yi o ta la, matsɔ wò awɔ atsyɔ̃e tegbee kple dzidzɔ na ƒomeawo katã. 16Àno dukɔwo ƒe notsi, eye àno fiawo ƒe no, ne nadze sii be, nye Yehowa enye wò xɔnametɔ, Yakob ƒe ŋusẽtɔ enye wò ɖela. 17Mahe sika vɛ ɖe akɔbli teƒe kple klosalo ɖe gayibɔ teƒe, akɔbli ɖe ati teƒe, eye gayibɔ ɖe kpewo teƒe, matso ŋutifafa aɖo tatɔe na wò kple dzɔdzɔenyenye aɖo wò dɔnunɔlae. 18Womase ŋutasesẽ ŋkɔ le wò anyigba dzi azɔ o kple tsɔtsrɔ̃ kpakple gbegblẽ ŋkɔ le wò liƒowo dzi o, eye àyɔ wò gliwo be „xɔname“ kple wò agbowo be „kafukafu“.
Mawu si nye kekeli na eƒe dukɔ la.
19Ɣe maganye kekeli na wò le ŋkeke me azɔ o, eye dzinu magaɖi na wò, be xexeme nakɔ o; ke boŋ Yehowa anye wò kekeli tegbee, eye wò Mawu anye wò atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo. 20Wò ɣe magaɖo to azɔ o, eye wò dzinu magaɖo xɔ o, elabena Yehowa lanye wò kekeli tegbee, eye wò nuxaɣi nu va yi. 21Wò dukɔ anye ame dzɔdzɔewo sɔŋ, eye anyigba anye wo tɔ tegbee, nye atibɔmeti fẽ kple nye asinudɔwɔwɔ, si ade bubu ŋunye la, wonye. 22Ame suewo azu akpe, eye ame ʋeewo azu dukɔ sesẽ. Nye Yehowa, nye asi matsɔ awɔe le ewɔɣi.

Title: YESAYA 61
Content:
Nyanyuie le Mesia ƒe vava ŋuti.
1Aƒetɔ Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ le dzinye, elabena Yehowa si ami nam, be mahe du nyui la ayi na amesiwo wole ɖe anyi; eɖom ɖa, be mada gbe le amesiwo ƒe dzi gbã la ŋu, maɖe gbe ƒã ablɔɖe na gatɔwo, ne woaɖe ga amesiwo wode gãe; 2maɖe gbe ƒã Yehowa ƒe amenuveƒe kple mía Mawu ƒe hlɔ̃biaŋkeke la, ne mafa akɔ na konyifalawo katã; 3ne mata avɔ na Zion ƒe konyifalawo, mana atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo wo ɖe dzowɔ teƒe, dzidzɔmi ɖe konyifafa teƒe, atsyɔ̃vɔ ɖe gbɔgbɔ, si nu ti kɔ na teƒe, eye woayɔ wo be „dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe logotiwo“, „Yehowa ƒe atibɔ“, si wòbe, yeatsɔ ade bubu eɖokui ŋu. 4Woatso blemaƒedowo, woafɔ gbaɖegbe glikpowo ɖe tsitrenu, eye woagbugbɔ du gbagbãwo kple tsãtɔwo ƒe glikpowo atso. 5Du bubu me tɔwo atsi tre ɖi anyi miaƒe lãhawo, eye amedzro viwo anye miaƒe agbledelawo kple miaƒe weingbledelawo. 6Ke miawo la, woatsɔ ŋkɔ na mi be: „Yehowa ƒe nunɔlawo“, eye woayɔ mi be „mía Mawu ƒe subɔlawo“; miaɖu dukɔwo ƒe kesinɔnuwo, eye woƒe atsyɔ̃ atu mia nu. 7Le woƒe ŋukpe eve ƒokpli kple woƒe vlododo, si nye woƒe gome ta la woaxɔ teƒeɖoɖo eve nu le woƒe anyigba dzi, eye woakpɔ dzidzɔ tegbee. 8Elabena nye Yehowa melɔ̃a nya dzɔdzɔe, eye meléa tu nuhaha vɔ̃ɖi; matu woƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋu fe na wo pɛpɛpɛ, eye mabia mũ mava kpli wo. 9Woanya wo viwo le dukɔwo dome kple woƒe dzidzimeviwo le anyigba dzi dukɔwo dome. Amesiwo katã kpɔ wo la, adze si wo be, ƒome, si Yehowa yra la wonye.
10Mele dzidzɔ kpɔm ɖe Yehowa ŋu, nye luʋɔ le aseye tsom ɖe nye Mawu ŋu; elabena eta xɔname ƒe avɔ nam, eye wòdo dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe awu ʋlaya nam, abe alesi ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ blaa atsyɔ̃tae kple alesi ŋugbetɔ doa nui la ene. 11Elabena alesi anyigba nana nuwo miena, eye abɔ nana nukuwo dzenae la, nenema Aƒetɔ Yehowa ana dzɔdzɔenyenye kple kafukafu namie le dukɔwo katã ŋku mee.

Title: YESAYA 62
Content:
Zion ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe, si ava nɛ.
1Nyemazi ɖoɖoe o le Zion ta, eye le Yerusalem ta nyemagbɔ ɖe eme o, vaseɖe esime eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye nado abe kekeli ene, eye eƒe xɔname nabi abe akakati ene. 2Dukɔwo akpɔ wò dzɔdzɔenyenye, fiawo katã akpɔ wò ŋutikɔkɔe, eye woayɔ ŋkɔ yeye, si Yehowa ƒe nu agblɔ la, na wò. 3Anye atsyɔ̃ fiakuku le Yehowa si me kple fiaƒe tablanu le wò Mawu si me. 4Womagayɔ wò azɔ be: „amesi wogbe“ o, eye womagayɔ wò anyigba be: „aƒedo“ o; ke boŋ woayɔ wò be: „mekpɔ dzidzɔ le eŋu“, eye woayɔ wò anyigba be „srɔ̃nyɔnu“; elabena Yehowa akpɔ dzidzɔ le ŋuwò, eye wòaɖe wò anyigba woazu srɔ̃a. 5Alesi ɖekakpui ɖea ɖetugbii la, nenema dziwòviwo aɖe wòe; alesi ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ kpɔa dzidzɔ le ŋugbetɔ ŋui la, nenema wò Mawu akpɔ dzidzɔ le ŋuwòe.
6Yerusalem, meɖo dzɔlawo wò gliwo dzi, amesiwo mazi ɖoɖoe ŋkeke blibo kple zã blibo o. Mi amesiwo ɖoa ŋku nu dzi na Yehowa, migagbɔ ɖe eme o! 7Miɖee toe, vaseɖe esime wòaɖo Yerusalem te, eye wòatsɔe awɔ kafukafu le anyigba dzi. 8Yehowa ta eƒe nuɖusi kple eƒe alɔ sesẽ. Nyemagatsɔ wò bli na wò futɔwo woaɖu azɔ o, eye du bubu me tɔwo magano wò wein, si ŋu neku kutri ɖo la, azɔ o, 9ke boŋ amesiwo xa nuku la, woawoe aɖui, eye woakafu Yehowa, eye amesiwo; xa nu la, woawoe anoe le nye xɔxɔnu kɔkɔewo.
10Mito agboawo me yi, mito wo me yi! Midzra mɔ dzi ɖo na dukɔ la; mido mɔ, miɖo mɔ, miɖe kpewo ɖa, mikɔ aflaga dzi na dukɔwo! 11Kpɔ ɖa, Yehowa na wosee le anyigba ƒe mlɔenu ke: Migblɔ na Zion-nyɔnuvi be: Kpɔ ɖa, wò xɔname gbɔna, kpɔ ɖa, eƒe fetu kpe ɖe eŋu, eye eƒe dɔ dze eŋgɔ. 12Woayɔ wo be: „dukɔ kɔkɔe“, „Yehowa ƒe amesiwo woɖe“, ke wò la, woayɔ wò be „du, si ƒe nya wodina“, „du, si womagblẽ ɖi o.“

Title: YESAYA 63
Content:
Aƒetɔ la tu afɔ eƒe futɔwo dzi.
1Amekae nye esi tso Edom gbɔna, eye wole awu dziwo me tso Bozra, amesi tsɔ eƒe awuwo ɖo atsyɔ̃e, eye wòle yiyim le eƒe ŋusẽ geɖe la me? Nyee nye amesi ƒoa nu ɖe eteƒe, eye xɔname bɔ ɖe asinye. 2Nukaŋuti wò awuwo biã, eye wò avɔwo le abe weinfiãla tɔ ene? 3Nye ɖeɖee fanya wein kple afɔ, eye dukɔwo dometɔa ɖeke mekpe ɖe ŋunye o. Ale menyã avuzi le wo dzi le nye dɔmedzoe me, eye mefanya wo le nye dziku me, eye woƒe ʋu hlẽ ɖe nye awuwo ŋu, eye nye avɔwo katã me gblẽ. 4Elabena meɖo nye hlɔ̃biagbe ɖe ta me, eye nye xɔname ƒe ƒe la ɖo? 5Eye metsa ŋku, ke amea ɖeke mexɔ nam o, eye nye mo wɔ yaa be, xɔnametɔa ɖeke meli o; tete nye abɔ xɔ nam, eye nye dziku kpe ɖe ŋunye. 6Mefanya dukɔwo le nye dɔmedzoe me, meto wo nyanyanya le nye dziku me, eye mena woƒe ʋu ɖuɖu de anyigba.
7Makafu Yehowa ƒe amenuveve kple Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔxɔxɔ le nusiwo katã Yehowa wɔ na mí la nu kpakple eƒe dɔmenyo gbogbo, siwo wòwɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe la le eƒe nublanuikpɔkpɔ kple eƒe amenuveve geɖe la nu. 8Egblɔ be: Vavã, nye dukɔ wonye, vi, siwo madaa alakpa o la wonye, eye wòzu xɔnametɔ na wo. 9Esi woxaxa woɖo hã la, hiãa ɖeke menɔ anyi o, elabena dɔla, si me woɖea eɖokui fiana lena la, xɔ na wo; eɖe wo le eƒe lɔlɔ̃ kple eƒe tufafa ta, eye wòkɔ wo hetsɔ wo le blema ŋkekewo katã me. 10Ke woawo dze aglã ɖe eŋu, eye wodo dziku na eƒe gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe la, tete wòtrɔ zu futɔ na wo, eye eya ŋutɔ wɔ avu kpli wo. 11Tete eƒe dukɔ la ɖo ŋku Mose dzi le blema ŋkekewo me be: Afika amesi kplɔ wo tso atsiaƒu hekpe ɖe eƒe lãha ƒe kplɔla ŋu la le? Afika amesi na eƒe gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe nɔ wo dome la le? 12Amesi na eƒe atsyɔ̃dabɔ to Mose ƒe nuɖusi dzi, eye wòmã tsi la me ɖe eve le wo ŋgɔ, be wòaɖe ŋkɔ mava eɖokui ŋu? 13Eya amesi na wòto tɔ gɔme womekli nu o, abe alesi sɔa toa gbegbee ene? 14Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ kplɔ wo yi gbɔɖemeƒe, abe alesi lã yia bali me ene. Ale nèkplɔ wò dukɔ la, be nade ŋkɔ gã ɖokuiwò ŋu.
Gbedodoɖa hena ɖeɖe.
15Do ŋku ɖa tso dziƒo, eye nakpɔ nu tso wò nɔƒe kɔkɔe nyo la me! Afika wò ŋuʋaʋã kple wò nutsuwɔwɔwo le? Wò dɔmetɔtrɔ kple nublanuikpɔkpɔ de megbe le ŋunye. 16Wòe nye mía fofo, elabena Abraham menya mí o, eye Israel medze si mí o. Wò Yehowa enye mía fofo, eye ŋkɔwòe nye „mía ɖela“ tso gbaɖegbe ke. 17Yehowa, nukaŋuti nena míele tatram tso wò mowo dzi, eye nèse miaƒe ta me, be mievɔ̃ wò o? Gatrɔ va le wò dɔla kple wò domenyinyi ƒe toawo ta! 18Ɣeyiɣi ʋeea ɖe ko wò to kɔkɔe la nɔ si me, tete miaƒe futɔwo nyã avuzi le wò kɔkɔeƒe la dzi. 19Míezu abe amesiwo dzi mèɖu fia ɖo kpɔ o, kple amesiwo ŋu womeyɔ wò ŋkɔ ɖo kpɔ o la ene. Oo, esi nahadze dziŋgɔli aɖi ɖe anyi, eye towo nadzo kpekpekpe le ŋkuwò me.

Title: YESAYA 64
Content:
Gbedoɖoɖa hena ɖeɖe dziyiyi.
1Abe alesi dzo fiãa nakeyɛ, eye dzo nana tsi fiẽna wlɔwlɔwlɔ enee ɖe, ne naɖe wò ŋkɔ afia dukɔwo, eye dukɔwo katã nadzo nyanyanya le ŋkuwò me, 2esime ne wo nu dziŋɔ, siwo míekpɔ mo na o, èɖi ɖe anyi, eye towo dzo kpekpekpe le ŋkuwò me! 3Womesee tso blema ke o, eye mede to me na amea ɖeke o, ŋkua ɖeke mekpɔ Mawu bubua ɖeke kpe ɖe ŋuwò, si wɔ alea na amesi le mɔ kpɔm ne o. 4Edo go amesi wòa nu dzɔdzɔe kple dzidzɔ, kpakple amesiwo ɖoa ŋku dziwò le wò mɔwo dzi. Kpɔ ɖa, eɖo dɔmedzoe, eye míezu nuvɔ̃wɔlawo; miele eme eteƒe didi, ɖe woagaɖe mía?
5Mí katã miele abe ame makɔmakɔwo ene, eye miaƒe dzɔdzɔenyenyewo katã le abe avɔ, si ƒo ʋu ene; mí katã míeyrɔ abe aŋgba ene, eye míaƒe vodadawo lɔ mí ɖe nu abe ya ene. 6Amea ɖeke meli, si yɔa wò ŋkɔ, eye wòtsona be, yeaku ɖe ŋuwò o; elabena èɣla wò ŋku me ɖe mí, eye nèna nu ti kɔ na mí ɖe miaƒe vodadawo me. 7Azɔ Yehowa, mía fofo nènye: mía wo la, tsu míenye, eye wòe nye mía mèla, wò asinudɔwɔwɔ mí katã míenye. 8Yehowa, megado dɔmedzoe akpa o, eye megaɖo ŋu vodada ɖaa o! Kpɔ ɖa, trɔ kɔ ɖe afi, wò dukɔ mí katã míenye! 9Wò du kɔkɔewo zu gbegbe, Zion zu gbegbe, eye Yerusalem tsi anyi aƒeɖoe. 10Dzo fiã míaƒe aƒe kɔkɔe nyo, si me mia fofowo kafu wò le, eye míaƒe nu veviwo katã gblẽ. 11Yehowa, ɖe àlé ɖokuiwò le nusiawo katã me, àzi kpi, eye nate mí ɖe anyi woatso mea?

Title: YESAYA 65
Content:
Aƒetɔ ƒe ŋuɖoɖo: Trɔ̃subɔlawo kple Israel susɔea xɔxɔ.
1Mele nyanya na amesiwo wu media nye mɔ o, eye mele kpɔkpɔ na amesiwo mediam o; megblɔ na dukɔ, si meyɔa nye ŋkɔ o la be: Nyee nye esi, nyee nye esi! 2Meke nye abɔ me ŋkeke blibo la ɖo ɖe dukɔ sẽto, si le mɔ baɖa dzi hedze eya ŋutɔ ƒe susuwo yome la. 3Amesiwo le dziku dom nam le ŋkunye me ɖaa, wosaa vɔ le abɔwo me, eye wodoa dzudzɔ le anyikpewo dzi 4amesiwo bɔbɔ nɔa yɔdowo me eye wotsia teƒe ɣaɣlɛwo dɔna, amesiwo ɖua halã, eye detsi nyɔ ŋu le woƒe ku lu wo me; 5ame siwo le gbɔgblɔm be: Nɔ adzɔge, megaka asi ŋunye o, mava wɔ wò kɔkɔe la, amesiawoe nye dzudzɔ le nye ŋɔti me kple dzo, si abi nu ŋkeke blibo la. 6Kpɔ ɖa, meŋlɔe ɖi ɖe ŋkunye me, nyemazi kpi o, negbe ɖeko maɖo eteƒe hafi, maɖo eteƒe ɖe woƒe akɔ me; 7Yehowa be: Madzidze miaƒe nuvɔ̃wo ɖe akɔ me na mi gbã, miaƒe vodadawo kple mia fofowo ƒe vodadawo siaa, amesiwo do dzudzɔ le towo dzi, eye woɖe alɔme le ŋunye le togbɛwo dzi.
8Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Alesi ne wokpɔ tsi le weintsetse me wogblɔna be: Migagblẽe o, elabena yayra le eme la, nenemae mawɔ, eye nyemagblẽ wo katã o, le nye dɔlawo ta; 9eye mana ƒome nado tso Yakob me, eye nye towo ƒe domenyila natso Yuda me; nye ame tiatiawo anyi edome, eye nye dɔlawo anɔ afima. 10Saron azu alẽwo ƒe gbeɖuƒe, eye Axorbalime la azu nyiwo ƒe akɔtsyɔƒe hena nye dukɔ, si biaa tanye sena la.
Tohehe na dukɔ dzeanyi la.
11Ke miawo, esi miegblẽ Yehowa ɖi, eye mieŋlɔ nye to kɔkɔe la be, mieɖo kplɔ̃ na aklama, eye mieku aha tre banaa na dzɔgbe la, 12eyata maɖo yi ɖa ɖe mia ŋu, eye mi katã miado dɔgɔ̃e woawu, elabena meyɔ mi, mieta o, meƒo nu, miesee o, miewɔ nusi nye vɔ̃ le ŋkunye me, eye mietia nusi medze ŋunye o la.
13Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, nye dɔlawo aɖu nu, ke miawo la, dɔ awu mi; kpɔ ɖa, nye dɔlawo ano nu, ke miawo la, tsikɔ awu mi; kpɔ ɖa, nye dɔlawo akpɔ dzidzɔ, ke miawo la, ŋu akpe mi. 14Kpɔ ɖa, nye dɔlawo atso aseye le dzi ƒe dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ ta, ke miawo la, miado ɣli le dzi ƒe vevesese ta, eye miafa avi le gbɔgbɔ ƒe teteɖeanyi ta. 15Eye miagblẽ miaƒe ŋkɔ ɖi na nye ame tiatiawo woatsɔ ado ɖiŋui be: „Alea Yehowa nawu wòe!“ Ke ayɔ ŋkɔ yeye na eƒe dɔlawo ya, 16ale be amesi ayra eɖokui le anyigba dzi la, atsɔ Mawu nyateƒetɔ la ayra eɖokui, eye amesi ata nu le anyigba dzi la, ata Mawu nyateƒetɔ la, elabena ŋku dzo le gbaɖegbe xaxawo dzi, elabena woɣla ɖe nye ŋkuwò.
Dziƒo kple anyigba yeye.
17Elabena kpo ɖa, mawo dziƒo yeye kple anyigba yeye, eye womagaɖo ŋku tsãtɔwo dzi, alo woava ame ƒe ta me o; 18ke boŋ miakpɔ dzidzɔ, eye miatso aseye ɖaa le nusi mawo la ŋuti, elabena kpo ɖa, mawo Yerusalem hena aseyetsotso, eye eƒe dukɔ la hena dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ. 19Matso aseye ɖe Yerusalem ŋu, eye makpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe nye dukɔ ŋu, eye womagase avifagbe kple konyifagbe le eme azɔ o. 20Ɖevi, si xa ŋkeke ʋee alo amegã ɖeɖi, si ƒe ŋkekewo mede keŋ o la, magano afima o; elabena amesi xɔ ƒe alafa hafi ku la, ɖevie, eye nuvɔ̃wɔla, si xa ƒe alafa la, fiƒode ava edzi. 21Woatu xɔ anɔ eme, eye woaɖe weingble aɖu eme kutsetse. 22Womãtu xɔ ame bubu nanɔ eme o, eye womaƒã nu ame bubu naɖu o; elabena nye dukɔ atsi, abe alesi ati tsinae ene, eye nye ame tiatiawo aɖu woawo ŋutɔ ƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo. 23Womadze agbagba dzodzro o, eye womadzi dzikudziku o; elabena Yehowa ƒe ame yayrawo ƒe ƒome wonye, eye wo viwo le wo ŋu. 24Eye woava me be, matɔ, hafi woava yɔm, eye ne wogale nuƒoƒo dzi la, masee. 25Amegãxi kple alẽvi woaɖu gbe le wo nɔewo gbɔ, dzata aɖu gbe abe nyi ene, eye da ƒe nuɖuɖu anye kewɔ. Womawɔ vɔ̃a ɖeke o, eye womahe gbegblẽ ava nye to kɔkɔe blibo la dzi o, Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: YESAYA 66
Content:
Didriwɔla ƒe tohehe.
1Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Dziƒo enye nye fiazikpui, eye anyigba enye nye afɔɖodzinu. Xɔ ka ƒomevie miehe, yewoatu nam, eye teƒe ka anye nye gbɔɖemeƒe? 2Yehowa be: Nye asie wɔ nusiawo katã, ale be nusiawo katã li. Ke melé ŋku ɖe amesiwo ŋu: ɖe hiãtɔwo kple amesiwo ƒe gbɔgbɔ wote ɖe anyi, eye wovɔ̃a nye nyawo la ŋu. 3Amesi wu nyitsu la, sɔ kple amesi wu ame, amesi tsɔ alẽvi sa vɔe la, sɔ kple amesi tro kɔ le avũ nu, amesi sa nuɖuvɔ la, sɔ kple amesi tsɔ haʋu sa vɔe, amesi do dzudzɔ ʋeʋẽe la, sɔ kple amesi kafua trɔwo. Alesi amesiawo ɖaa woawo ŋutɔ ƒe mɔ, eye woƒe luʋɔ kpɔa dzidzɔ le woƒe ŋunyɔnuwo ŋu la, 4nenema nye hã makpɔ dzidzɔ le ŋutasesẽ le wo ŋu ŋuti, eye mahe nusi dzia ŋɔ na wo la, ava wo dzi, elabena meyɔ ame, ke amea ɖeke metɔ o, meƒo nu, ke womesee o, wowɔ nusi nye vɔ̃ le ŋkunye me, eye wotia nusi medze ŋunye o.
Yerusalem yeye ƒe xɔxɔ kple alesi wòakaka ɖe trɔ̃subɔlawo katã dome.
5Mi amesiwo vɔ̃a Yehowa ƒe nya la, mise eƒe nya la! Mia nɔvi, siwo lé fu mi, eye wonyã mi ɖa le nye ŋkɔ ta hele gbɔgblɔm be: „Yehowa nede bubu eɖokui ŋu, ne míakpɔ miaƒe dzidzɔ“ la, ŋukpe alé wo. 6Howɔwɔ ƒe ɖiɖi tso dua me, gbe tso gbedoxɔ me, Yehowa, amesi aɖo eteƒe na eƒe futɔwo la ƒe gbe ye! 7Woadzi vi, hafi woava lé ku, woadzi ŋutsuvi, hafi fu nava ɖu wo. 8Ameka se esia tɔgbe kpɔ, eye ameka kpɔ esia tɔgbe kpɔ? Ɖe anyigbae ɖe adzɔ gbe ɖeka, eye ɖe woadzi dukɔa ɖe zi ɖeka? Hafi Zion ya lé ku, eye wodzi viawo zi ɖeka. 9Yehowa be: Nye amesi ʋua vidzidɔ nu, ɖe mana be, womadzi vi oa? Wò Mawu be: Nye amesi na wodzia vi, ɖe maxe mɔa?“
10Mikpɔ dzidzɔ kple Yerusalem, eye mitso aseye ɖe eŋu, mi amesiwo katã lɔ̃a eƒe nya! Mitso aseye kplii le dzidzɔ me, mi amesiwo katã xaa nu le eŋu! 11Ne miano eƒe akɔfafa ƒe no, woadi kɔ na mi, eye míakplɔ eƒe atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo ƒe nu gbogboawo hlohlohlo, miaƒe; dzi nagbɔ ɖe eme. 12Elabena ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, matrɔ ŋutifafa ɖe eŋu abe tɔsisi ene kple dukɔwo ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ɖe eŋu abe tɔʋu, si gba go ene, be miano no, woatsɔ mi ɖe axada me, eye woalé mi ɖe akɔ dzaa. 13Alesi ŋutsua ɖe dada fa akɔ ne la, nenema mafa akɔ na mii, eye miaƒe akɔ afa le Yerusalem ŋu. 14Miakpɔe, miaƒe dzi akpɔ dzidzɔ, eye miaƒe ƒuwo amie abe gbe ene, Yehowa ƒe asi aɖe eɖokui afia ɖe eƒe dɔlawo ŋu, eye wòado dziku ɖe eƒe futɔwo ŋu.
15Elabena kpɔ ɖa, Yehowa gbɔna le dzo me, eye eƒe tasiaɖamwo le abe ahom ene, ne woaɖo eteƒe le eƒe dɔmedzoe ƒe dziku me, eye wòablu le dzoƒaɖe me. 16Elabena dzo kple yi Yehowa atsɔ adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu ŋutilãwo katãe, eye Yehowa ƒe ame wuwuwo asɔ gbɔ. 17Yehowa be. Amesiwo wɔa wo ɖokui kɔkɔe, eye wokɔa wo ɖokui ŋu hena trɔ̃kpɔwo, eye wokplɔa ame ɖeka ɖo le dome, amesiwo ɖua halã, nu nyɔŋuwo kple afiwo la, wo katã nu ayi.
18Ke nye la, menya woƒe nuwɔwɔwo kple tameɖoɖowo. Azã su, be woaƒo dukɔwo katã kple aɖe wo nu ƒu, eye woava akpɔ nye ŋutikɔkɔe la. 19Mawɔ dzesi ɖe wo ŋu, eye maɖo ame sisiwo ɖa tso wo dome ɖe dukɔwo, ɖe Tarsis, Pul kple Lud, amesiwo nye aŋutrɔdalawo, ɖe Tubal kple Yawan kpakple ɖe didiƒe ƒukpowo, amesiwo mese ŋkɔnye o, eye womekpɔ nye ŋutikɔkɔe o la gbɔ, eye woaɖe gbe ƒã nye ŋutikɔkɔe le dukɔwo dome; 20ne woakplɔ mia nɔviwo katã tso dukɔwo katã dome aɖo sɔwo dzi kple tasiaɖam kple apakawo me kple tedzisɔwo kple kposɔwo dzi abe nuɖuvɔsa ene na Yehowa ahava Yerusalem le nye to kɔkɔe la dzi, abe alesi Israel-viwo tsɔa nuɖuvɔsa dea nu dzadzɛwo me vaa Yehowa ƒe mee ene, Yehowa ye gblɔe! 21Yehowa be: Matsɔ wo dometɔa ɖewo hã awɔ nunɔlawo kple Lewi-viwoe! 22Yehowa be: Alesi dziƒo yeye kple anyigba yeye, si wɔ ge mala la, anɔ anyi le ŋkunye mee la, nenema ke miaƒe ƒome kple miaƒe ŋkɔ anɔ anyi tegbee. 23Eye woava me, ne dzinu yeye sia dzinu yeye kple dzudzɔgbe sia dzudzɔgbe ɖo la, ŋutilãwo katã ava ado gbe ɖa le ŋkunye me, Yehowa ye gblɔe! 24Eye woaɖo ayi, be woakpɔ amesiwo dze go ɖem la ƒe kukuwo; elabena woƒe nyẽwo maku o, woƒe dzo ma tsi o, eye woanye ŋunyɔ na ŋutilãwo katã.

Title: YEREMYA 1
Content:
Woɖo Yeremya nyagblɔlae.
1Xilkiya, amesi tso nunɔlawo dome le Anatot le Benyamin-nyigba dzi la ƒe vi Yeremya ƒe nyawo enye si; 2eya gbɔ Yehowa ƒe gbe va le Yuda-fia Yosiya, Amon vi ŋɔli le eƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe wuietɔ̃lia me; 3emegbe le Yuda-fia Yoyakim, Yosiya vi ŋɔli ɖaseɖe Yuda-fia Zedekiya, Yosiya vi ƒe ƒe wuiɖekɛlia ƒe nuwuwu, vaseɖe esime woɖe aboyo Yerusalem le dzinu atɔ̃lia me.
4Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va gbɔnye be: 5Hafi mava mè wò ɖe ɖɔ me la, menya wò, mekɔ ŋuwò, hafi nèdo tso dɔ me, eye metsɔ wò ɖo nyagblɔɖilae na dukɔwo. 6Eye megblɔ bena: Oo, Aƒetɔ Yehowa, kpɔ ɖa, nyemate ŋu aƒo nu o, elabena nyemetsi o. 7Yehowa gblɔ nam bena: Meganɔ gbɔgblɔm be, yemetsi o, ke boŋ afisiafi, si maɖo wò ɖo la, nayi, eye gbe, siwo katã made asiwò la, nagblɔe. 8Megavɔ̃ wo o, elabena meli kpli wò, be maɖe wò, Yehowa ye gblɔe! 9Eye Yehowa do eƒe asi ɖa hetɔ nu nam, eye Yehowa gblɔ nam bena: Kpɔ ɖa, metsɔ nye nyawo le nuwo ɖem. 10Kpɔ ɖa, metsɔ wò ɖo dukɔwo kple fiaɖuƒewo nu, nalã nu, eye nagbã nu, natsrɔ̃ nu, eye nagblẽ nu, natso aƒe, eye naƒã nu!
11Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va gbɔnye bena Yeremya, nuka kpɔm nèle? Meɖo ŋu bena: Aɖatsigoti kpɔm mele 12Yehowa gblɔ nam bena: Ekpɔe ɖe eteƒe; elabena manɔ ŋute ɖe nye nya ŋu, ne mawɔe ade goe. 13Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va gbɔnye zi evelia bena: Nuka kpɔm nele? Meɖo ŋu bena: Mele ze, si le fiefiẽm la kpɔm, wòtrɔ ŋgɔ dze anyiehe. 14Eye Yehowa gblɔ nam bena: Dzɔgbevɔ̃e atso anyiehe gome aƒo ɖe anyigba la dzinɔlawo katã dzi. 15Yehowa be: Kpɔ ɖa, mayɔ fiaɖuƒewo ƒe ƒomeawo katã tso anyiehe, ne wo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe nava ali zikpui anyi ɖe Yerusalem-gbowo nu, ɖe eƒe gliwo katã ŋu kple ɖe Yuda-duwo katã ŋu. 16Eye madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu kpli wo le woƒe vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔwo katã ta, le esi wogblẽna ɖi eye wodo dzudzɔ na mawu tutɔwo, eye wode ta agu na woƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo ŋuti. 17Ke wò la, bia ali dzi, eye tso naɖagblɔ nya, siwo katã made asiwò la, na wo. Womegadzi ŋɔ na wo o, ne màgana ŋɔ nadzi wò le wo ŋku me o. 18Kpɔ ɖa, nyea matsɔ wò awɔ ɖu sesẽ, gasɔti kple akɔbligli egbea ɖe anyigba blibo la nu, ɖe Yuda-fiawo, eƒe amegãwo, eƒe nunɔlawo kple dukɔ hahoo la ŋuti. 19Woawɔ avu kpli wò, ke woaɖo kpoe, elabena meli kpli wò, be maɖe wò, Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: YEREMYA 2
Content:
Israel ƒe akpemadamada kple tohehe nɛ.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va gbɔnye bena: 2Yi ɖaɖe gbe ƒã ɖe Yerusalem ƒe to me bena: Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Meɖo ŋu wò ɖetugbime dɔmenyo kple wò ŋugbetɔnyenye ƒe lɔlɔ̃ na wò, esime nekplɔm ɖo to gbedadaƒo, to anyigba, si dzi womeƒãa nu ɖo o. 3Yehowa be: Israel le kɔkɔe na Yehowa, eƒe agblemenu gbãtɔwo wonye; amesiwo katã ɖui la, kpɔe ɖe enu; dzɔgbevɔ̃e va wo dzi!
4Mi Yakob ƒe aƒe kple Israel ƒe aƒe ƒe ƒomeawo katã, mise Yehowa ƒe nya! 5Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Nu manyo ka mia fofowo kpɔ le ŋunye, be wode megbe le ŋunye, eye wodze ya nuwo yome hezu tofloko? 6Eye womegblɔ be: Afika Yehowa, amesi kplɔ mí tso Egipte-nyigba dzi la le hã o; eya amesi kplɔ mí to gbe dzi, to kuɖiɖinyigba kple blukɔ tsiɖitsiɖi ƒe anyigba dzi, to anyigba, si dzi amea ɖeke metona o, afisi amegbetɔa ɖeke mele o la dzi. 7Eye mekplɔ mi va anyigba wɔnu dzi, be miaɖu eƒe kutsetsewo kple eƒe nu nyuiwo; ke miawo mieva hedo gu nye anyigba la, eye mietsɔ nye domenyinu la wɔ ŋunyɔnui. 8Nunɔlawo megblɔ be. Afika Yehowa le hã o. Amesiwo si me se la le la, menyam o, eye lãkplɔviwo dze aglã ɖe ŋunye, nyagblɔɖilawo gblɔ nya ɖi le Baal ƒe ŋkɔ me, eye wodze nusiwo mele ɖeke me o la yome. 9Yehowa be: Eyata magawɔ dzre kpli mi, eye mawɔ dzre kple mia viwo ƒe viwo. 10Miyi Kititɔwo ƒe ƒukpowo dzi, eye mikpɔ nu; miɖo ame ɖe Kedar, eye mido ŋku anyi nyuie, ne miakpɔ be, esia tɔgbe dzɔ kpɔ mahã? 11Ɖe dukɔa ɖe ɖɔ ti eƒe mawuwoa? Evɔ wònye menye Mawu wonye o hafi. Ke nye dukɔ ya tsɔ eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ɖɔ li nusi mele ɖeke me o lae. 12Yehowa be: Dziƒowo, miaƒe nu neku le esia la, miaƒe lãme neble fu, eye miaƒe mo newɔ yaa. 13Elabena nye dukɔ wɔ vɔ̃ ƒomevi eve: wogblẽ nye, amesi nye tsi gbagbe vudo la ɖi, be woaɖe tsido na woawo ŋutɔ ɖokui, tsido, siwo gɔme ŋɔ, tsi mate ŋu anɔ wo me o.
14Kluvie nye Israel loo alo aƒeviea? Nukaŋuti wòtrɔ zu aboyome? 15Dzatawo xlɔ̃ ɖe eŋu, eye woɖe gbe; wowɔ eƒe anyigba wòzu gbegbe, wogbã eƒe du wòzu aƒedo. 16Nof-viwo kple Taxpanes-viwo hã woaɖu gbe le wò dzodome. 17Ɖe esia medza de dziwò, le esi nègblẽ Yehowa, wò Mawu ɖi le ɣeyiɣi, si me wònye kplɔwòla le mɔta la ŋuti oa? 18Azɔ nya ka le mia kple Egipte-mɔ dome, be naɖano Nil me tsi? Eye nya ka le mia kple Asur-mɔ dome, be naɖano Frat me tsi? 19Wò vɔɖinyenye aka mo na wo, eye wò godzedze ahe to na wò, ne nadze sii, eye nakpɔ, alesi wòvɔ̃ɖii, eye wòvenae be, nègblẽ Yehowa, wò Mawu la ɖi, eye vɔvɔ̃a ɖeke mele ŋunye na wò o, Aƒetɔ Yehowa Zebaot ye gblɔe!
20Elabena tso gbaɖegbe ke nèŋe wò kɔkuti, eye nètso wò kawo gblɔ bena, yemasubɔ o. Elabena ènye ahasitɔ mlɔ togbɛ kɔkɔwo katã dzi kple ati damawo katã gɔme. 21Weinka nyuitɔ tso ka vavãtɔwo dome nenye metsɔ do, ke aleke wɔ nètrɔ zu nuka ƒe abɔwo nam? 22Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Ne èle aɖitsi lem, eye nèle adzalẽ geɖe ŋu dɔ wɔm hã, wò vodadawo nye ɖiƒoƒo le ŋkunye me 23Aleke nagblɔ be, yemegblẽ ye ɖokui ŋu o, yemedze Baal yome o? Lé ŋku ɖe wò azɔlime ŋu le bali la me, eye nadze si nusi nèwɔ la, kposɔnɔ ɖidu, si le tsa glãla tsam le eƒe mɔ dzi la, nènye. 24Gbetedzinɔ, si gbegbe ma, eye wòle gbɔgbɔm fuxefuxe ɖe eƒe luʋɔ ƒe nudzodzro ŋuti la, ameka ate ŋu axe mɔ na eƒe asiyɔyɔ? Amesiwo katã be, yewoadii la, womadze agbagbaa ɖeke o, ne eƒe dzinu nya ɖo dzi ko la, woakpɔe. 25Kpɔ wò afɔ dzi, be magatsi ƒeƒle o, kple wò ve me dzi, be tsikɔ magawui o! Ke wò la, ele gbɔgblɔm be: Dzodzroe, kpao! Elabena melɔ̃ amedzrowo, eye woawo yome madze. 26Alesi ne asi lu fiafi ŋu kpenɛ la, nenema ŋu akpe Israel ƒe aƒe la hekpe ɖe woƒe fiawo, amegãwo, nunɔlawo kple nyagblɔɖilawo ŋu, 27amesiwo le gbɔgblɔm na ati be: Wòe nye mía fofo, eye na kpe be: Wòe dzi mí. Elabena wòtrɔ ʋume dem, eye menye ŋku me o; ke wole gbɔgblɔm le woƒe hiãɣi be: Tso naɖe mí! 28Ke afika wò mawu, siwo nèwɔna ɖokuiwò la le? Woawo nètso kpɔ, be woate ŋu aɖe wò le wò hiãɣi la hã? Yuda, elabena alesi wò duwo sɔ gbɔe la, nenema wò mawuwo sɔ gbɔe!
29Yehowa be: Nukaŋuti miele dzre wɔm kplim? Mi katã mieto vo ɖe ŋunye. 30Yakatsyɔ meƒo mia viwo, wodo toku tohehe la. Miaƒe yi ɖu miaƒe nyagblɔɖilawo abe dzata vuvunu ene. 31Oo, dzidzime ka miehenye! Milé ŋku ɖe Yehowa ƒe nya ŋu. Gbegbe menye na Israel loo, alo anyigba doblukɔ tsiɖitsiɖia? Nukaŋuti nye dukɔ le gbɔgblɔm be: Miele tsa glãla tsam, eye míagava gbɔwò o? 32Ɖe ɖetugbi aŋlɔ eƒe atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo be, eye ŋugbetɔ aŋlɔ eƒe alidziblanu bea? Ke nye dukɔ ŋlɔm be, ŋkekeawo mele xexlẽ me o. 33Aleke nèle ami ɖem ɖe wò zɔzɔme ŋu, be nati ahasiwɔwɔ yome? Eyata wò zɔzɔme ma wò ɖe vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ ŋu. 34Ame maɖifɔ dahewo ƒe ʋu hã le wò avɔ toga. Menye fifiƒe mekpɔ wò le o, ke boŋ le teƒe siawo katã. 35Ke wò la egblɔ be, yemeɖi tɔ o, eƒe dɔmedzoe fa ɖe ye ŋu vava! Kpɔ ɖa, mía kpli wò miaɖi ʋɔnu, le esi negblɔ be, yemewɔ nuvɔ̃ o la ta. 36Nukaŋuti nèwɔ kaba, be natrɔ wò azɔlime? Ŋu akpe wò ɖe Egipte hã ŋu, abe alesi ŋu kpe wò ɖe Asur ŋui ene. 37Adzo tso alima, eye nakpla asi ta. Elabena Yehowa gbe amesiwo ŋu nele dzi ɖom ɖo la, eye madze edzi na mia kpli wo o.

Title: YEREMYA 3
Content:
Dzimetɔtrɔ didi tso dukɔ la gbɔ.
1Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Ne ŋutsua ɖe gbe srɔ̃a, eye wòyi ɖaɖe ŋutsu bubu la, ɖe wòagagbugbɔ ayi nyɔnu la gbɔa? Ɖe magblẽ kɔ ɖo na anyigba ma oa? Yehowa be: Ke wò la èwɔ amatre kple ahasitɔwo tso, hafi nèbe, yeatrɔ ɖe ŋunyea? 2Fɔ kɔ dzi ɖe to ƒeƒlewo ŋu, eye nakpɔ nu! Afikae womehede asi ŋuwò le o? Ede xa ɖe mɔ to na wo abe Arabiatɔwo le gbe dzi ene, eye nètsɔ wò ahasiwɔwɔ kple vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ do gu anyigba la. 3Woklo tsidzadza, eye keletsi hã medza o. Ke wò la, gbolo ƒe mo li na wò, eye ŋu gbe wò kpekpe. 4Azɔ ɖe mède asim yɔyɔ me be, ye fofo kple yeƒe ɖekakpuime xɔlɔ̃e menye oa? 5De wòado dziku ɖaa, eye wòalé ame ɖe dɔ me tegbeea? Kpɔ ɖa, alea nègblɔ, ke medo kpo vɔ̃wɔwɔ o.
6Eye Yehowa gblɔ nam le fia Yosiya ŋɔli bena: Ekpɔ nusi Israel dzeaglã la wɔa? Eyi to kɔkɔwo katã dzi kple ati damawo gɔme, eye wòwɔ ahasi le afima. 7Eye nyea mebu be, esi wòwɔ nusiawo katã megbe la, atrɔ ɖe ŋunye, gake metrɔ ɖe ŋunye o, eye nɔvianyɔnu Yuda dzego la kpɔe. 8Eye esi wòkpɔ be, megbe Israel dzeaglã la le eƒe ahasiwɔwɔ ta, eye mena srɔgbegbalẽe hã la, nɔvianyɔnu Yuda dzego la mevɔ̃ o, ke boŋ eya hã yi ɖawɔ ahasi. 9Eye wòva me be, wotsɔ woƒe ahasiwɔwɔ ƒe howɔwɔ gblẽ kɔ ɖo na anyigba la, eye wowɔ ahasi kple kpe kpakple ati. 10Ke to esiawo katã gbɔ hã nɔvianyɔnu Yuda dzego la metrɔ ɖe ŋunye kple eƒe dzi blibo o, ke boŋ ewɔ alakpanu, Yehowa ye gblɔe!
Mawu ƒe amenuveve ŋugbedodo.
11Tete Yehowa gblɔ nam bena: Israel dzeaglã la tɔ dzɔ wu Yuda dzego la tɔ. 12Yi naɖaɖe gbe ƒã nya siawo do ɖe anyiehe gome bena: Israel dzeaglã, ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Gatrɔ, nyemaɖo adã ɖe mia ŋu o, elabena amelɔ̃la menye, eye nyemalè nya ɖe dɔ me tegbee o, Yehowa ye gblɔe. 13Yehowa be: Dze si wò vodada, elabena èto vo ɖe Yehowa, wò Mawu ŋu, eye netsa tsa glãla yi mawu tutɔwo gbɔ le ati damawo katã gɔme, eye miegbe nye gbe sese. 14Yehowa be: Mi vi dzeaglãwo, migatrɔ va, elabena nyee nye mia srɔ̃, eye maɖe ame ɖeka tso du me kple ame eve tso ƒome me ahakplɔ mi ava Zion; 15eye mana kplɔlawo mi ɖe nye dzi nu, ne woatsɔ nunya kple gɔmesese akplɔ mi. 16Yehowa be: Ava me be, ne miekeke ta, eye miedzi ɖe amũ gbã dzi le ŋkeke mawo me la, womagagblɔ azɔ be: „Yehowa ƒe nubablaɖaka“ o, magava ame ƒe ta me o, eye womagaɖo ŋui o, womagabia eta ase o, eye womagakpɔe o. 17Le ɣemaɣi la woayɔ Yerusalem be: „Yehowa ƒe fiazikpui“, eye dukɔwo katã aƒo takpli ɖe afima te Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ, si le Yerusalem la ta, eye womagazɔ le woƒe dzi vɔ̃ɖiwo ƒe tamesesẽ nu o.
18Le ɣemaɣi la Yuda ƒe aƒe ayi Israel ƒe aƒe gbã, eye woaƒo takpli tso anyiehe-nyigba dzi ayi anyigba, si metsɔ na mia fofowo, ne wòanye domenyinu la dzi. 19Megblɔ be: Matso wò aɖo viŋutsu teƒe, eye mana anyigba nyo la wò, si nye domenyinu vevietɔ le dukɔwo dome! Mehe. Yɔm be ye fofo, eye megatrɔ le yonyeme o. 20Israel ƒe aƒe, Yehowa be: Alesi nyɔnu dzea go tsoa srɔ̃a gbɔ la, nenema miedze go tso gbɔnyee! 21Wose ɣli le to ƒeƒle wo ta me, Israel-viwo ƒe avifafa kple kokoƒoƒo, elabena woto mɔ gɔglɔ̃ dzi, eye woŋlɔ Yehowa, woƒe Mawu la be. 22Mi vi dzeaglãwo, migatrɔ va, eye mahaya mi tso miaƒe tatrawo me! Kpɔ ɖa, míeva gbɔwò, elabena wòenye Yehowa, mía Mawu! 23Vava, alakpae nye togbɛwo kple howɔwɔ le towo dzi; vava, Israel ƒe xɔname le Yehowa, mía Mawu la gbɔ. 24Ŋukpenamawuwo ɖu mía fofowo ƒe kesinɔnuwo tso míaƒe ɖevime ke: woƒe alẽwo kple nyiwo, woƒe ŋutsuviwo kple nyonuviwo. 25Míamlɔ míaƒe ŋukpe me, eye míaƒe vlododo netsyɔ mía dzi; elabena mia kple mía fofowo míewɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe Yehowa, mía Mawu la ŋu tso míaƒe ɖevime vaseɖe egbe, eye míeɖo to Yehowa, mía Mawu la ƒe gbe o.

Title: YEREMYA 4
Content:
Dzimetɔtrɔ nyagbɔgblɔ
1Israel, Yehowa be: Ne èbe, yeatrɔ la, ekema trɔ ɖe ŋunye, eye ne èɖe wò ŋunyɔnuwo ɖa le ŋkunye me la, ekema màgatsa tsa glãla o! 2Eye ne èta Yehowa ƒe agbe le nyateƒe kple dzɔdzɔenyenye me, eye ɖe eteƒe la, ekema dukɔwo atso wò ayra wo ɖokui, eye woatso wò aƒo adegbee! 3Elabena ale Yehowa gblɔ na Yuda-ŋutsuwo kple Yerusalem enye si: Mide agble yeye, eye migaƒã nu ɖe aŋɔkawo me o. 4Mi Yuda-ŋutsuwo kple Yerusalem-tɔwo, mina woatso aʋa na mi na Yehowa, eye miɖe miaƒe dzi ƒe boloyiwo ɖa, ne nye dziku magalé dzo ge abe dzo ene, ahabi le miaƒe nuwɔwɔ vɔ̃ɖiawo ta, eye amea ɖeke mate ŋu atsii o.
Nyagblɔɖi le Yuda-nyigba gbegblẽ ŋuti.
5Migblɔe fia le Yuda, eye miɖe gbe ƒãe le Yerusalem be: „Miku kpẽ le anyigba la dzi!“ Mihe vekati míado ɣli be: „Miƒo takpli, eye mina míayi du sesẽwo me!“ 6Mikɔ aflaga dzi do ɖe Zion! Misi, migatɔ o! Elabena mahe dzɔgbevɔ̃e kple tsɔtsrɔ gã tso anyiehe vɛ. 7Dzata do tso avegoe me, dukɔwo gblẽla tso, eye woho tso enɔƒe, be woatso wò anyigba awɔ gbegbee, eye wòagblẽ wò duwo woazu aƒedo. 8Le esia ta mita akpanya, mifa konyi, eye mifa avi, elabena Yehowa ƒe dɔmedzoe heliheli la nu mefa ɖe mía ŋu o. 9Yehowa be: Ava me le ɣemaɣi be, dzi aɖe le fia kple amegãwo ƒo, nunɔlawo alulu, eye nyagblɔɖilawo ƒe mo awɔ yaa. 10Tete megblɔ be: Alele, Aƒetɔ Yehowa, vavãe nèflu dukɔ sia kple Yerusalem, esime negblɔ be: „Míakpɔ ŋutifafa“, evɔ wònye yi de keke luʋɔ gbɔ hafi!
11Ɣemaɣi woagblɔ na nye dukɔ kple Yerusalem bena: Ya xɔdzo tso to ɖiƒeƒle ta me le gbe dzi gbɔna nye dukɔ ƒe nyɔnuvi gbɔ, menye be, woatsɔ agbo lui, alo woatsɔ ana nu me nadzae o. 12Ya sesẽ wu esia ƒom; azu madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò hã. 13Kpɔ ɖa, eho gbɔna abe alilikpo ene, eƒe tasiaɖamwo le abe ahom ene, eye eƒe sɔwo ɖia ɖu wu hɔ̃; baba na mí, elabena míetsrɔ̃. 14Yerusalem, klɔ vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ ɖa le wò dzi ŋu, ne woaxɔ na wò. Ɣekaɣi tamesusu vɔ̃ɖiwo nanɔ wò dzi me ase ɖo? 15Elabena wole gbe ƒã ɖemee tso Dan, eye wona wose dzɔgbevɔ̃e nya tso Efrayim-towo dzi. 16Mitoe na dukɔwo! Kpɔ ɖa, miɖe gbe ƒãe na Yerusalem be: Amesiwo ɖea to ɖe du la, tso didiƒenyigba dzi gbɔna, eye woana woƒe ɣli nade dzi ɖe Yuda-duwo ŋu. 17Woaƒo xlãe godoo abe agbledzɔviwo ene, le esi wodze aglã ɖe ŋunye la ta, Yehowa ye gblɔe. 18Wò zɔzɔme kple wò nuwɔnawoe wɔ esia wò, wò vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔe wɔ esia, eve kaɖikaɖi, eye ade dzigbɔ ke na wò.
Nyagblɔɖila ƒe konyifafa.
19Nye dɔkaviwo, nye dɔkaviwo! Mele togotogoe ƒom le vevesese ta, nye dzixɔ, nye dzi dze agbo le menye, nyemate ŋu azi ɖoɖoe o, elabena nye luʋɔ le kpẽwo ƒe ɖiɖi kple aʋaɣli sem! 20Gligbagbã tsia ɖe wo nɔewo nu, elabena wogblẽ anyigba blibo la; woagblẽ nye xɔwo enumake kple nye agbadɔwo le aɖabaƒoƒo ɖeka me. 21Ɣekaɣi manɔ aflaga kpɔm, eye manɔ kpẽwo ƒe ɖiɖi sem ase ɖo? 22Elabena nye dukɔ dzɔ lã, womedze sim o; vi tsibomewo wonye, eye Womenya nu o; nunyalawo wonye le vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ me, ke nyuiwɔwɔ la, womedzea si eya o. 23Meɖe ŋku ɖe anyigba, nɔnɔme meli nɛ o, ele ƒuƒlu; meɖe ŋku ɖe dziƒo, kekelía ɖeke meli o. 24Meɖe ŋku ɖe towo, kpɔ ɖa, wole dzodzom kpekpekpe, kple ɖe togbɛwo katã, kpɔ ɖa, wole ʋaʋãm. 25Meɖo ŋku anyi, kpɔ ɖa, amegbetɔa ɖeke megali o, eye dziƒoxewo katã dzo yi. 26Meɖo ŋku anyi, kpɔ ɖa, anyigba wɔnu zu gbegbe, wogbã eƒe duwo katã le Yehowa ŋgɔ le eƒe dɔmedzoe ƒe bibi ta.
27Elabena ale Yehowa gblɔ esi; Anyigba blibo la azu gbegbe, ke nyemagblẽe gbidigbidi o. 28Eyata anyigba nefa konyi, eye dziƒo nenɔ ahovɔ me, elabena meƒo nu, eye mavem o, meɖo ta me, eye nyematrɔe o. 29Du blibo la si le sɔdolawo kple aŋutrɔdalawo ƒe howɔwɔ nu, woyi ave dodowo me, eye wolia agakpewo; wogblẽ du blibo la ɖi amea ɖeke megale eme o. 30Ke wò, amesi wotsrɔ̃, nuka nahawɔ ma? Ne eta aɖabɛ, nedo sikanuwo, eye neɖo tu ɖe ŋku hã la, dzodzroe nèwɔ leke; wò lɔlɔ̃tɔwo ado vlo wò, eye woadi wò ku. 31Elabena mese ɣli abe nyɔnu, si le ku lém la tɔ ene, abe nyɔnu, si le vi ŋgɔgbea dzim la ƒe ŋɔdziɣli ene, mese Zion-nyɔnuvi, si le ŋeŋem hewu asi dzi la ƒe gbe be; Baba nam, elabena nye luʋɔ tsi amewulawo si!

Title: YEREMYA 5
Content:
Yudatɔwo gawɔ nuvɔ̃wo tsyo ƒomevi, eye wogatsɔ tohehe do ŋɔdzi na wo.
1Miyi ɖatsa le Yerusalem ƒe kpɔdomeewo, mikpɔ nu, eye midze si nu, midi nu gɔme se le eƒe ablɔwo me, be míakpɔ amea ɖe loo, alo amea ɖe li, si wɔa nu dzɔdzɔe, eye wòbiaa nyateƒe ta sena hã, ekema màtsɔe akee. 2Esi wole gbɔgblɔm be, yewota Yehowa ƒe agbe hã la, alakpa dzie wole nu tam ɖo. 3Yehowa, ɖe wò ŋkuwo mele nyateƒe ŋu oa? Eƒo wo, gake meɖe lã me na wo o; ètsrɔ̃ wo ɖa, ke wogbe toɖoɖo tohehe, wosẽ woƒe ŋku me wu agakpe, eye wogbe tametɔtrɔ. 4Nyea mebu be: Amesiawo, ame dahewoe, wodzɔ lã, elabena Womenya Yehowa ƒe mɔ kple woƒe Mawu ƒe se la o. 5Eyata mayi ame ŋkutawo gbɔ, eye maƒo nu kpli wo; elabena woawoe nya Yehowa ƒe mɔ kple woƒe Mawu ƒe se la me. Ke wo katã wòŋe kɔkuti la, eye wotso kaawo! 6Eyata dzata ado tso ave me agbã wo, amegãxi, si le gbegbe, atsrɔ̃ wo, lãkle ade xa ɖe woƒe duwo ŋu, eye wòavuvu amesiame, si do tso wo me. Elabena woƒe vodadawo sɔ gbɔ, eye woƒe godzedzewo do agbogbo. 7Aleke màtsɔe ake wò? Viwòwo gblẽm ɖi, woɖakpe ta ɖe gboloxɔ me. 8Wole asi yɔm le yiyimee abe sɔtsu ɖami ene, eye amesiame le gbe tem ɖe ehavi srɔ̃ ŋu. 9Yehowa be: Ɖe nyemahe to le esia ta, eye ɖe nye luʋɔ mabia hlɔ̃ dukɔ sia tɔgbe oa?
10Miɖe woƒe gliwo dzi, ne miagblẽ nu; ke menye gbidigbidi o!
