Migakpɔ woƒe ɖekakpuiwo ta o, eye mitsrɔ̃ woƒe aʋakɔ blibo la; 4ne ame tsiaʋawo nanɔ Kaldea-nyigba dzi, eye amesiwo woda nui lã, nanɔ woƒe ablɔwo me. 5Ke woƒe Mawu, Yehowa Zebaot, megblẽ Israel kple Yuda ɖi wonye ahosi o; elabena anyigba ma ɖi to geɖe ɖe Israel ƒe kɔkɔetɔ la ŋu. 6Misi dzo le Babel, eye amesiame neɖe eƒe agbe, ne míagatsrɔ̃ ɖe woƒe vodadawo me o, elabena Yehowa ƒe hlɔ̃biaɣi enye esia; nusi wòwɔ la, eya teƒe woaɖo nɛ. 7Sikakplu enye Babel le Yehowa si me, si na anyigba blibo la mũ aha; dukɔwo no eƒe wein, eyata dukɔwo le ya mum sagãsagã ɖo. 8Zi ɖeka kasia Babel ge dze anyi hegbã. Mifa avi ɖe eŋu, miɖatsɔ atike vɛ hena eƒe veveseseawo, ɖewohĩ eƒe lãme ahaya. 9Miehe, míada gbe le Babel ŋu, ke hayahaya mele eŋu o; eyata migblẽè ɖi, eye mia dome amesiame neyi eƒe anyigba dzi, elabena eƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ de dziƒo ke, eye wòɖatɔ alilikpowo. 10Yehowa he míaƒe nya dzɔdzɔe ɖe go, miva, ne míaɖaxlẽ nusi Yehowa, mia Mawu, wo la afia le Zion. 11Minyre aŋutrɔwo, mikpla akpoxɔnuwo! Yehowa nyɔ Media-fiawo ƒe gbɔgbɔ, eye wode adaŋu ɖe Babel ŋu, be woagblẽe; elabena Yehowa ƒe hlɔ̃biabiae, hlɔ̃biabia ɖe eƒe gbedoxɔ nue. 12Mitu aflaga ɖe Babel-gliwo dzi, mina dzɔlawo nasɔ gbã ɖe edzi, miɖo gbetakpɔlawo, eye miɖe amewo ɖo xa me; elabena Yehowa ɖo ta me, eye awɔ nusi wògblɔ ɖe Babeltɔwo ŋu la hã ade goe. 13Wò amesi le lɔ gãwo to, eye kesinɔnu ɖo agbogbo ɖe asiwò, wò nuwuwu ɖo, eye dzidze, si nu woalã wò ɖo la ɖe! 14Yehowa Zebaot la eƒe agbe be: Ne metsɔ amewo yɔ wò taŋ abe ʋetsuviwo ene hã la, woatso ayiboopɛɛ ɖe ŋuwò!
15Eya amesi tsɔ eƒe ŋusẽ wɔ anyigba, tsɔ eƒe nunya ɖo xexeame anyi, eye wòtsɔ eƒe gɔmesese keke dziƒo mee. 16Eƒe gbeɖeɖe nana tsiwo ɖina hoo le dziƒo, eye wònana atu hona yia dzi tso anyigba ƒe mlɔenu; ewɔa dzikedzo kpena ɖe tsidzadza ŋu, eye wòɖea ya donae tsoa eƒe nudzraɖoƒe. 17Amegbetɔwo katã dzɔa lã le woƒe nunya me, eye ŋukpe léa legbakɔlawo katã, elabena alakpa enye nusi wokɔna, eye gbɔgbɔa ɖeke menɔa eme o. 18Nu dzodzroawo wonye, dɔwɔwɔ, si ŋu woaɖe alɔme le la wonye; woatsrɔ̃ le gbesigbe woahe to na wo. 19Ke Yakob ƒe gome mele abe woamawo ene o, elabena eyama nye nuwo katã wɔla, eye Israel enye eya ŋutɔ ƒe ƒome; Yehowa Zebaot enye eƒe ŋkɔ.
20Zũ kple aʋawɔnu nènye nam, wòe matsɔ agbã dukɔwoe gudugudu, eye wòe matsɔ atsrɔ̃ fiaɖuƒewoe. 21Wòe matsɔ agba sɔ kple edola, eye wòe matsɔ agba tasiaɖam kple emenɔla; 22wòe matsɔ agba ŋutsu kple nyɔnu, wòe matsɔ agba amegã ɖeɖi kple ɖevi, eye wòe matsɔ agba ɖekakpui kple ɖetugbi; 23wòe matso agba lãkplɔvi kple lãha, wòe matsɔ agbã agbledela kple eƒe lãwo, eye wòe matsɔ agba anyigbanunɔla kple amegãwo. 24Ke mahe to na Babel kple Kaldeatɔwo katã le mia ŋku me le woƒe vɔ̃, siwo katã wowɔ ɖe Zion ŋu la ta, Yehowa ye gblɔe. 25Yehowa be: Kpɔ ɖa, maƒo ɖe dziwò, wò togblẽnu, si tsrɔ̃ anyigba blibo la, maɖo nye asi ɖa ɖe ŋuwò ahamli wò tso agakpe dzi aƒu anyi, eye matsɔ wò awɔ to fiafiãe, 26ale be womagatsɔ wò kpea ɖeke awɔ dzogoekpe alo gɔmeɖokpee o, elabena azu gbegbe tegbee, Yehowa ye gblɔe.
27Mitu aflaga ɖe anyigba dzi, miku kpẽ le dukɔwo dome, mikɔ dukɔwo ŋu ɖe eŋuti, miyɔ fiaɖuƒewo ɖe eŋuti tso Ararat, Mini kple Askenas, miɖo aʋafiawo ɖe eŋuti, eye mikplɔ sɔwo vɛ abe ʋetsuvi tofuwo ene! 28Mikɔ dukɔwo ŋu ɖe eŋuti, Media-fiawo, woƒe anyigbanunɔlawo kple woƒe amegãwo katã kpakple woƒe fiaɖuƒe ƒe anyigba blibo la! 29Tete anyigba ʋuʋu, eye dzidzi ƒoe, elabena Yehowa wo eƒe tame, si wòɖo ɖe Babel ŋu, be yeana Babel-nyigba nazu gbegbe, eye ame navɔ le edzi la dzi. 30Babel-kalẽtɔwo dzudzɔ aʋawɔwɔ, wobɔbɔ no woƒe mɔ̃wo me, eye ŋusẽ vɔ le wo ŋu wozu nyɔnugbɔmewo; wotɔ dzo woƒe nɔƒewo, eye wòŋe woƒe gametiwo. 31Duƒula yi ɖakpe duƒula, eye duxɔla yi ɖakpe duxɔla, ne woagblɔ na Babel-fia be, wòxɔ eƒe du la le goawo katã me, 32wòxɔ tɔtsoƒewo, wòtɔ dzo tɔʋuwo, eye dzi ɖe le aʋawɔlawo ƒo. 33Elabena ale Yehowa Zebaot, Israel ƒe Mawu la, gblɔ esi: Babel-nyɔnuvi le abe lugbɔƒe le ɣeyiɣi, si me woƒoa eme dana ɖi la ene; esusɔ vie ko, ne nuŋeɣi naɖo nɛ. 34Babel-fia Nebukadnezar ɖu mí, etsrɔ̃ mi, eye wòtsɔ mí wɔ goe ƒuƒlui, emi mi abe ʋɔ ene, etsɔ míaƒe nu viviwo yɔ eƒe ƒodoe, eye wònyã mí de gbe. 35Zion-nyɔnu negblɔ be: Ŋuta, si wosẽ le ŋunye, kple nye ŋutilã neva Babel dzi! Yerusalem negblɔ be: Nye ʋu neva Kaldeatɔwo dzi! 36Eyata ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Madrɔ̃ wò nya, eye mabia hlɔ̃ na wò, mana woƒe atsiaƒu naƒu kplakplakpla, eye woƒe vudo namie. 37Babel azu anyiglãgo kple amegãxiwo nɔƒe, azu gbegbe kple tsiãdonu, eye ame avɔ le eme. 38Wo katã le xɔxlɔ̃m abe dzatawo ene, eye wole gbe tem abe dzataviwo ene. 39Yehowa be: Ne woƒe lãme tɔ dzo la, matu aglo na wo, eye mana woamu aha, ne woada alɔ̃ tegbetegbe, eye womaganyɔ akpɔ o. 40Mana woakplɔ wo ayi wuƒe abe alẽviwo, agbowo kple gbɔ̃tsuwo ene. 41Aleke asi su Sesax dzi, eye woxɔ anyigba blibo la ƒe adegbeƒonu, aleke Babel zu ŋɔdzidonu le dukɔwo dome ale? 42Atsiaƒu ƒo ɖe Babel dzi, eye eƒe tsotsoewo ƒe nyanyrã nyẽ tsyɔ edzi. 43Eƒe duwo zu gbegbe, kuɖiɖinyigba kple tagba, anyigba, si dzi amea ɖeke mele o, eye amegbetɔvia ɖeke metona yina o. 44Mahe to na Babel ƒe Bel, maɖe nusi wòmi la le nu me ne, eye dukɔwo magaƒo zi ɖe eŋu azɔ o; Babel ƒe gliwo hã amũ. 45Nye dukɔ, midzo le egbɔ, eye amesiame neɖe eƒe agbe tso Yehowa ƒe dɔmedzoe heliheli la nu! 46Ne nyaa ɖe ɖi le ƒe si me, eye nya bubu ɖi le ƒe keme me, ŋutasesẽ le anyigba dzi, eye dziɖula tso ɖe dziɖula ŋu la, dzi megaɖe le mia ƒo o, eye vɔvɔ̃ megaɖo mi le nya, si miese le anyigba dzi la la o. 47Eyata kpɔ ɖa, ŋkeke li gbɔna, eye mahe to na Babel ƒe legbawo, ŋukpe alé eƒe anyigba blibo la, eye eƒe ame tsiaʋawo katã atsi eme. 48Dziƒo kple anyigba kple edzi nuwo katã atso aseye ɖe Babel ŋu; elabena nugblẽla atso anyiehe ava ƒo ɖe edzi, Yehowa ye gblɔe. 49Israel ƒe ame tsiaʋawo, ele na Babel hã be, woatsi aʋa, abe alesi anyigba blibo la ƒe amewo tsi aʋa le Babel ta ene.
50Mi amesiwo si le yi nu, midzo, eye migatɔ ɖi o! Miɖo ŋu Yehowa le adzɔge, eye Yerusalem nenɔ ta me na mi! 51Ŋukpe lé mí, elabena ele na mí be, míase vlodoame kple to; ŋukpe tsyɔ mo na mí, elabena ame tutɔwo va ƒo ɖe Yehowa ƒe aƒemenu kɔkɔeawo dzi. 52Yehowa be: Kpɔ ɖa, ŋkeke li gbɔna, eye mahe to na woƒe legbawo, eye ame tsiaʋawo anɔ ŋeŋem le anyigba blibo la dzi. 53Ne Babel lia dziŋgɔli me, eye eƒe mɔ̃ sesẽwo mele lialia o hã la, nugblẽla atso gbɔnye ava ƒo ɖe edzi, Yehowa ye gblɔe. 54Miƒu to anyi, ɣli ɖi tso Babel, eye mumũ gãa ɖe tso Kaldea-nyigba dzi! 55Elabena Yehowa atsrɔ̃ Babel, eye wòatsi eƒe hoowɔwɔ nu, eƒe tsitsotsoewo adze agbo abe lɔ gãwo tɔ ene, eye woƒe gbeɖeɖe nu asẽ. 56Elabena nugblẽla aƒo ɖe Babel dzi, eye wòaɖe aboyo eƒe kalẽtɔwo, eye woƒe dawo aŋe, elabena Mawu nuteƒeɖola enye Yehowa, eye ahe to kokoko. 57Eye mana aha woƒe tatɔwo kple woƒe nunyalawo, woƒe anyigbanunɔlawo kple woƒe amegãwo kpakple woƒe kalẽtɔwo woano amu, eye woadɔ alɔ̃ tegbetegbe, womaganyɔ o; fia, si ŋkɔ nye Yehowa Zebaot lae gblɔe. 58Ale Yehowa Zebaot gblɔ esi: Woagbã Babel ƒe gli kekeawo vaseɖe agunu ke, eye woatɔ dzo eƒe agbo kɔkɔwo, ale be wòanye ɖeko dukɔwo wɔ dɔ ɖe ya me, eye anyigbadzitɔwo ku kutri hena dze.
59Nyagblɔɖila Yeremya ƒe nya, si wòtsɔ de se na Seraya, Maxseya vi, Neriya ƒe vi, esime woa kple Yuda-fia Zedekiya woyina Babel le eƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe enelia me, eye Seraya nye mɔzɔmegã la, enye si. 60Tete Yeremya ŋlɔ dzɔgbevɔ̃e, siwo katã le Babel dzi va ge la, ɖe agbalẽ me; eya nye nya, siwo katã woŋlɔ ɖe Babel ŋu. 61Eye Yeremya gblɔ na Seraya bena; Ne èva Babel la, ekema ɖo ŋu anyi, eye naxlẽ nya siawo katã 62gblɔ bena: Yehowa, wòe gblɔ ɖe teƒe sia ŋu be, yeatsrɔ̃e, ne amea ɖeke maganɔ anyi o, amegbetɔwo kple lãwo siaa, eye wòanye gbegbe tegbee. 63Eye ne èxlẽ agbalẽ sia vɔ la, ekema bia kpe ɖe eŋu, natsɔe aƒu gbe ɖe Frat me 64agblɔ bena: Ale dzɔgbevɔ̃e, si mahe va wo dzi la, anyrɔ Babel ɖe toe, magaɖo ɖe dzi akpɔ o, eye enu ayi. Yeremya ƒe nyawo seƒe enye si.

Title: YEREMYA 52
Content:
Kpekpeɖeŋunya: Yerusalem gbegblẽ xexlẽ fia kpuie.
1Zedekiya xɔ ƒe blave vo ɖekɛ, esime wòzu fia, eye woɖu fia ƒe wuiɖekɛ le Yerusalem. Dada ŋkɔ enye Xamital, Libnato Yeremya ƒe vinyɔnu. 2Ewɔ nusi nye vɔ̃ le Yehowa ŋku me, abe alesi Yoyakim wɔ pɛpɛpɛ ene. 3Elabena Yehowa do dɔmedzoe ɖe Yerusalem kple Yuda ŋu, vaseɖe esime wòtsɔ wo ƒu gbe le eƒe ŋku ta. Eye esi Zedekiya dze aglã ɖe Babel-fia ŋu la, 4Babel-fia Nebukadnezar kple eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la ho ɖe Yerusalem ŋu le eƒe fiaɖuɖu ƒe ƒe asiekelia me le dzinu ewolia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi; woɖe to ɖee, eye woƒu kpo ɖe eŋu godoo va kpe. 5Woɖe to ɖe dua, vaseɖe Zedekiya ƒe ƒe wuiɖekɛlia me. 6Le dzinu enelia ƒe ŋkeke asiekelia dzi la dɔwuame nu sẽ le dua me, ale be aboloa ɖeke megali na dukɔ hahoo la o. 7Woŋɔ mɔ ɖe dua ŋu, eye aʋawɔlawo ka tã si to fia ƒe abɔ me mɔ, to agbo, si le gli ŋukplaba eve dome la nu hegblẽ du la ɖi le zã me, eye wòto gbegbemɔ; ke Kaldeatɔwo le glia ŋu godoo. 8Tete Kaldeatɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ yɔ fia la ɖe nu heva tu Zedekiya le Yerixo-tagba, eye eƒe aʋawɔlawo katã kaka le eŋu. 9Tete wòlé fia la hekplɔe yina Babel-fia le Ribla le Xamat-nyigba dzi, eye wòbu fɔe. 10Eye Babel-fia wu Zedekiya viwo le eya ŋutɔ ŋku me, eye wowu Yuda-amegãwo katã hã le Ribla. 11Egbã ŋku na Zedekiya, eye wòde kɔsɔkɔsɔe, eye Babel-fia kplɔe yi Babel hetsɔe ɖe gaxɔ me vaseɖe eƒe kugbe.
12Le dzinu atɔ̃lia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi, si nye fia Nebukadnezar, Babel-fia ƒe ƒe wuiasiekelia dzi la, fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã Nebuzaradan, amesi nɔa tsitre ɖe Babel-fia ŋku me la, va Yerusalem, 13eye wòtɔ dzo Yehowa ƒe aƒe kple fia ƒe aƒe, Yerusalem-xɔwo katã kple bubumewo ƒe xɔwo katã. 14Eye Kaldeatɔwo ƒe aʋakɔ blibo, si le fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã ŋu la, gbã Yerusalem ƒe gliwo katã ƒu anyi. 15Fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã Nebuzaradan ɖe aboyo dukɔ la ƒe ame dahewo dometɔa ɖewo, dukɔ la ƒe ame mamlea, siwo kpɔtɔ ɖe dua me, kple amesiwo yi ɖe Babel-fia dzi, kpakple aɖaŋudɔwɔlawo ƒe susɔeawo dzoe. 16Eye fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã Nebuzaradan gblẽ anyigba dzi ame dahea ɖewo ɖi, be woanye weingbledelawo kple agbledelawo. 17Kaldeatɔwo gbã akɔblisɔti, siwo le Yehowa ƒe xɔ ŋu, kple anyinɔwo kpakple akɔbligazɔ, si le Yehowa ƒe me la, eye wotsɔ woƒe akɔbliwo katã yi Babel. 18Eye wotsɔ zeawo, sofiawo, hɛawo, treawo, gatsiawo kple akɔblinuawo katã, siwo wotsɔna subɔnae la dzoe. 19Eye fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã tsɔ nusiwo nye sika kple klosalo sɔŋ la dzoe. Kpluwo, sonuwo, trewo, zewo, akaɖitiwo, gatsiwo kple agbawo. 20Sɔti eveawo, gazɔ la kple akɔblinyi wuieveawo, siwo le ete, kpakple anyinɔawo, nusiwo fia Salomo wɔ hena Yehowa ƒe aƒe la; nusiawo katã ƒe akɔbli mele dada me o. 21Sɔti ɖeka kɔ abɔklugui wuienyi, eye ka abɔklugui wuieve atui akpe ɖo, to le eme, eye wòtri asibide ene ƒe kekeme. 22Wotsɔ akɔbli wɔ kɔ ɖe eta me, eye kɔ la kɔ abɔklugui alɔ̃, ɖɔ lɔlɔ̃ kple yevuboɖawo ƒo xlã kɔ la godoo va kpe, akɔbli sɔŋ wonye. Nusiawo tɔgbe kple yevuboɖawo le sɔti evelia hã ŋu. 23Yevuboɖa blaasieke vɔ ade le goawo katã me; yevuboɖa, siwo katã le ɖɔ la ŋu godoo va kpe la, le wo ame alafa ɖeka. 24Eye fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã kplɔ nunɔlagã Seraya kple nunɔlagã yometɔ Zefanya kpakple kpuinudzɔla etɔ̃ 25kple aƒedzikpɔla ɖeka, si le aʋawɔlawo nu, fiaŋume adre, siwo wokpɔ le dua me, aʋafia ƒe agbalẽŋlɔla, amesi yɔa dukɔ hahoo la hena aʋawɔwɔ kpakple dukɔ hahoo la dome ŋutsu blaade, siwo wokpɔ le dua me; 26amesiawo fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã Nebuzaradan kplɔ yi na Babel-fia le Ribla. 27Eye Babel-fia da nu wo hewu wo le Ribla le Xamat-nyigba dzi. Ale woɖe aboyo Yuda tso edenyigba dzi. 28Amesiwo Nebukadnezar ɖe aboyoe la, wonye si: Le ƒe adrelia me la woɖe aboyo Yudatɔ akpe etɔ kple blave vɔ etɔ̃; 29woɖe aboyo ame alafa enyi kple blaetɔ̃ vɔ eve tso Yerusalem le Nebukadnezar ƒe ƒe wuienyilia me; 30eye fia ŋu srafowo ƒe amegã Nebuzaradan ɖe aboyo ame alafa adre kple blane vɔ atɔ̃ dzoe le Nebukadnezar ƒe ƒe blave vɔ etɔ̃lia me; wo katã le ame akpe ene alafa ade.
Fia Yoyaxin nu veve.
31Esime woɖe aboyo Yuda-fia Yoyaxin le ƒe blaetɔ̃ vɔ adre megbe le dzinu wuievelia ƒe ŋkeke blave vɔ atɔ̃lia dzi la, Babel-fia Evil-Merodax ɖe ga Yuda-fia Yoyaxin le ƒe, si me wòzu fia, eye woɖee tso gaxɔ me; 32eƒo nu fafɛ kplii, eye wòtsɔ eƒe zikpui ɖo fia, siwo kpe ɖe eŋu le Babel la ƒe zikpui ŋgɔ. 33Eɖɔ li eƒe gaxɔmewuwo, eye woɖu nu le egbɔ ɖaa le eƒe agbenɔɣi katã. 34Eye Babel-fia na eƒe nuɖuɖui ɖaa, alesi nu wòbiã gbesiagbe le eƒe agbenɔɣi katã, vaseɖe esime woku.

Title: KONYIFAHAWO 1
Content:
Yerusalem gbã, ele konyi fam, eye wòle ɖeɖe dim
1Ao, du, si ame yɔ, tsi akogo! Du ga le dukɔwo dome zu ahosi; duwo ƒe fia zu yakadɔwɔla. 2Ele avi fam le zã me hehehe, eye aɖatsi tsi alɔgo dzi nɛ. Eƒe ahiãvlwo dometɔa ɖeke mefa akɔ nɛ o. Xɔlɔ̃wo katã trɔ ʋu le eye me hezu eƒe fulɔwo. 3Yuda ʋu dzo le teteɖeanyi kple dɔ sesẽ ta; ele dukɔwo dome, ke mekpɔ gbɔdzɔe o. Eyometilawo katã ɖatui le xaxɛƒe. 4Zion-mɔwo to gbe, elabena amea ɖeke megava ŋkekenyuieɖuƒe o. Eƒe agbowo kam esi ƒuƒlu, eye eƒe nunɔlawo le hũ ɖem. Eƒe ɖetugbiwo le ŋeŋem, eye eya ŋutɔ le veve sem. 5Eƒe ketɔwo ƒe alɔ ɖe dzi, eye eme nyo na eƒe futɔwo, elabena Yehowa ye ɖo hiã nɛ le eƒe vodada sɔgbɔawo ta. Viawo dze ketɔwo ŋgɔ yi aboyo me. 6Zion-nyɔnuvi ƒe atsyɔ̃wo katã dzo le eŋu. Eƒe amegãwo le abe agbo, siwo mekpɔ gbeɖuƒea ɖeke o la ene, eye wole te klolo tem le wo yometilawo ŋgɔ. 7Yerusalem le ŋu ɖom eƒe atsyɔ, siwo katã nɔ eŋu le blema ŋkekewo me la, le eƒe hiãɣi kple anyidzeɣi, elabena eƒe amewo tsi futɔ la si me, eye xɔnametɔ meli o. Ketɔ la kpɔe, eye woke eƒe toyiyi. 8Nuvɔ̃e Yerusalem wɔ, eyata wòzu ŋunyɔnu. Amesiwo katã bui tsa la, la vlo domi, le esi wokpɔ eƒe ama ta. Ke eya ŋutɔ le hũ ɖem eye wòɖe eɖokui ɖe aga. 9Ɖiƒoƒo le eƒe avɔ toga, meɖo ŋu eƒe nuwuwu o. Tete wòyi to vevie, eye akɔfalaa ɖeke meli o. Yehowa, lé ŋku ɖe nye hiã ŋu, elabena futɔ la le asi tɔm akɔ! 10Futɔ la do asi ɖe eƒe nu veviwo katã ŋu; elabena ekpɔ ɖukɔ, siwo nèɖe se na be, womegava wò amehawo ɖome o la, woge ɖe eƒe kɔkɔeƒe la.
11Eƒe amewo katã le hũ ɖem hele abolo dim. Wotsɔ woƒe nu veviwo na ɖe nuɖuɖu la, ne woalé agbe ɖe te. Yehowa, ɖo ŋku anyi nakpɔ alesi woɖo vlom ɖa! 12Eyata mi amesiwo katã va to mɔ dzi yina, miɖo ŋku anyi, ne miakpɔ nu be, vevea ɖe ɖe vevesese, si va dzinye, kple nuxaxa, si Yehowa ɖo nam le eƒe dɔmedzɔe heliheli ɖogbe la nu mahã? 13Eɖo dzo ɖa tso dzi me ɖe nye ƒuwo me, eye wòɖi hã ɖe dzinye. Eɖo ɖɔ na nye afɔwo, wògbugbɔm ɖe megbe, ana mezu gbegbe, eye mele nuxaxa dzi ɖaa. 14Eƒe asi na nye vodadawo ƒe kɔkuti nu sẽ, eblae ɖe nye kɔʋume, eye wona ŋusẽ va le ŋunye. Aƒelɔ la tsɔm ɖe asi na amesiwo nu nyemate ŋu ana te ɖo o. 15Aƒetɔ la tsa nye kalẽtɔwo katã ƒu gbe le donyeme, eɖe gbe ƒã ŋkekenyuie ɖe ŋunye, ne woagbã nye ɖekakpuiwo nyanyanya. Aƒetɔ la fiã wein na Yuɖa-ɖetugbi. 16Esia ta mele avi fam, eye nye ŋkuwo le aɖatsi kplɔm yoyoyo ɖo; akɔfala, si afa dzi nam la, le adzɔge nam. Wotsrɔ̃ vinyewo, elabena futɔ la ƒe alo ɖe dzi. 17Zion ke eƒe abɔwo me, ke akɔfalaa ɖeke meli nɛ o. Yehowa ɖɔ ketɔwo ɖe Yakob ŋu goɖoo va kpe, eye Yerusalem zu ŋunyɔnu le wo dome. 18Yehowa ta dzɔ, elabena mesẽ to ɖe eƒe nyawo ŋu. Mi dukɔwo katã, misee, eye milé ŋku ɖe nye vevesese ŋu! Nye ɖetugbiwo kple nye ɖekãkpuiwo yi aboyo me. 19Meyɔ nye ahiãviwo, ke woblem. Nu te nye nunɔlawo kple ame tsitsiwo ŋu le dua me, elabena wole nuɖuɖu dim, ne woatsɔ lé woƒe agbe ɖe te.
20Yehowa, kpo alesi vɔvɔ̃ ɖom ɖa! Nye dɔkaviwo ʋu dzo hẽ, eye nye dzi le togotogoe ƒom le menye, le esi mese to ta. Yi le nu gblẽm le xexe abe ku le aƒe me ene. 21Wose alesi mele hũ ɖemee, ke xɔnametɔa ɖeke meli o. Nye futɔwo katã se nye dzɔgbevɔ̃e ŋkɔ, eye wole dzidzɔ kpɔm, elabena wòe wɔe. Ne éhe ŋkeke, si ŋu nèɖe gbe ƒã le vɛ la, ekema woawo hã woanɔ abe nye ene. 22Woƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔwo katã neva ŋkuwò me, eye nawɔ na wo, abe alesi nèwɔm le nye vodadawo katã ta ene; elabena nye hũɖeɖewo sɔ gbɔ, eye nye dzi le nu xam.

Title: KONYIFAHAWO 2
Content:
Konyifaha dzidzi le Yuda kple Yerusalem ƒe aƒedozuzu ŋuti.
1Aleke Aƒetɔ la na Zion-nyɔnuvi ɖo tsizi le eƒe dɔmedzoe me! Exlã Israel ƒe atsyɔ̃ ɖe anyi tso dziƒo, eye meɖo ŋu eƒe afɔɖodzinu le dɔmedzoedogbe o. 2Aƒetɔ la gblẽ Yakob ƒe lãnyiƒewo katã, mekpɔ wo ta o, eghã Yuɖa-nyɔnuvi ƒe mɔ̃ sesẽwo wosɔ kple anyigba le eƒe dziku me, eye wogblẽ ka ɖo na fiaɖuƒe la kple eƒe amegãwo. 3Eŋe dzowo katã na Israel le eƒe dɔmedzoe heliheli me; ehe eƒe nuɖusi ɖe megbe le futɔ nu, eye wodo dzo ɖe Yakob wòbi nu goɖoo va kpe. 4Ehe eƒe ɖa me abe futɔ ene, eye wòtsi tre ɖi kple eƒe nuɖusi abe ketɔ ene hetsrɔ̃ nusiwo katã dze na kpɔkpɔ; etrɔ eƒe dziku ƒo ɖe Zion-nyɔnuvi ƒe agbadɔ me abe dzo ene. 5Aƒetɔ la trɔ zu futɔ, etsrɔ̃ Israel, eye wòtsrɔ̃ eƒe fiasãwo katã, egblẽ eƒe mɔ̃ sesẽwo, eye wòli kɔ nuxaxa ɖe nuxaxa dzi na Yuda-nyɔnuvi. 6Eka kpɔ le eŋu abe le abɔ ŋu ene, eye wògblẽ eƒe takpeƒe. Yehowa na woŋlɔ ŋkekenyuie kple dzudzɔgbe be le Zion, eye wòdo vlo fia kple nunɔla le eƒe dɔmedzoe heliheli me. 7Yehowa gbe eƒe vɔsamlekpui, eɖi gbɔ eƒe kɔkɔeƒe la, eye wòtsɔ eƒe fiasãwo ƒe gliwo ɖe asi na futɔ la; woƒe ɣli le ɖiɖim le Yehowa ƒe me abe le ŋkekenyuieɖugbe ene. 8Yehowa ɖo be, yeatsrɔ̃ Zion-nyɔnuvi ƒe gli; eda ka, mehe eƒe asi ɖe megbe tso nugbegblẽ me o, eye wona kpoƒuƒu kple gli le nu xam; nu le woa kple eve la siaa ŋu. 9Eƒe agbowo ɖo agu, eye wogblẽ eƒe gametiwo heŋe wo; eƒe fia kple eƒe amegãwo le dukɔwo dome, se mele wo si o, woƒe nyagblɔɖilawo hã mekpɔa ŋutega tso Yehowa gbɔ o. 10Zion-nyɔnuvi ƒe amegã ɖeɖiwo bɔbɔ nɔ anyigba, eye woƒe nu ɖe ga, wolɔ afi kɔ ɖe ta me, eye wota akpanya; Yerusalem-ɖetugbi de kɔ to.
11Nye ŋkuwo la aɖatsi wòti kɔ na wo, nye dɔkaviwo ʋu dzo hẽ, eye nye aklã wó ɖe dɔ me nam le nye dukɔ ƒe nyɔnu ƒe anyidzedze la, esime nu te ɖeviwo kple vidziewo ŋu le ɖua ƒe kpɔdomeewo. 12Wogblɔ na wo ɖadawo be: Bli kple wein ɖe? Eye nu le wo ŋu le ɖua ƒe kpɔɖonieewo abe ame xɔabi ene, eye woƒe gbɔgbɔ do le wo me le wo dadawo ƒe akɔ nu. 13Yerusalem-nyɔnuvi, ameka matsɔ asa kpli wò, ne wòaɖi wò? Zion-ɖetugbi ameka matsɔ aɖo ŋuwò, ne mafa akɔ na wò? Elabena wò abi lolo abe atsiaƒu ene, amekae ada gbe le ŋuwò ma? 14Wò nyagblɔdilawo gblɔ alakpanya kple nya mastatsa ɖi na wò, eye womeklo nu le wò vodadawo dzi, ne woagaɖo wò te o, ke boŋ wogblɔ alakpanya kple ameflunya ɖi na wò. 15Amesiwo katã va tso eme yi la, si akpe ɖe ŋuwò, woɖe tsiã heʋuʋu ta ɖe Yerusalem-nyɔnuvi ŋu be: Du, si ŋu wogblɔ le be, enye nyonyowo seƒe kple anyigba blibo la ƒe dzidzɔ la, enye esia? 16Wò fulɔwo katã ke nu ɖe ŋuwò baa, wodo tsia heɖu aɖukli gblɔ bena: Míetsrɔ̃e! Ehɛ̃, ŋkeke, si míele mɔ kpɔm na la, enye esia, míaƒe asi su edzi, míekpɔ eteƒe kple ŋku!
17Yehowa wɔ eƒe tame, si wòɖo la, de goe, eye wòwɔ eƒe nya, si ŋugbe wòdo tso blema ka la dzi; egbã nu ƒu anyi, mekpɔ eta o, ena wò futɔwo kpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe ŋuwò, eye wòdo wò ketɔwo ƒe dzo ɖe dzi. 18Eƒe dzi do ɣli na Aƒetɔ la. Zion-nyɔnuvi ƒe gli, na wò aɖatsi nasi abe tɔʋu ene zã kple keli; megagbɔ ɖe eme o, eye megana wò ŋkuvi nakpɔ gbɔdzɔe o. 19Fɔ nado ɣli le zã le ŋudzɔɣi ƒe gɔmedzedze! Trɔ wò dzi ƒo ɖe Aƒetɔ la ŋku me abe esi ene! Wu wò asiwo dzi nɛ le viwò, siwo dɔwuame na no te wo ŋu ɖe kpɔdomeewo ƒe dzogoewo katã dzi la ƒe agbe ta! 20Yehowa ɖo ŋku anyi, ne nakpɔ nu, ameka newɔ esiae? Ɖe nyɔnuwo aɖu woƒe dɔmevi, ɖevi, siwo dzi wokpɔa? Ɖe woawu nunɔla kple nyagblɔɖila ɖe Aƒetɔ la ƒe kɔkɔeƒe laa? 21Ɖeviwo kple amegã ɖeɖiwo ɖo baba ɖe anyigba le kpɔdomeewo, eye nye ɖetugbiwo kple nye ɖekakpuiwo tsi yi nu. Eda nu eme le wò dɔmedzoedogbe, eye nèwu ame, mèkpɔ eta o. 22Eyɔ ŋɔdzi ɖe ŋunye godoo abe le ŋkekenyuieɖugbe ene, eye amea ɖeke mesi alo susɔ le Yehowa ƒe dɔmedzoedogbe o. Amesiwo dzi mekpɔ, eye menyi wotsi la, nye futɔ tsrɔ̃ wo.

Title: KONYIFAHAWO 3
Content:
Yeremya ƒe konyifafa kple akɔfafa.
1Nyee nye ŋutsu, si kpɔ hiã teƒe le eƒe ameƒoti le. 2Ekplɔm, eye wòna mezɔ viviti me, menye kekeli me o. 3Ŋunyee wòle eƒe asi trɔm ɖo ɖaa atraɖi le ŋkeke blibo la me.
4Edze lã kple agbalẽ le ŋunye yaʋayaʋa, eye wògbã nye ƒuwo. 5Etsɔ aɖi kple fukpekpe tɔ kpɔ ɖe ŋunye godoo va kpe. 6Ena menɔ blukɔ me abe emesiwo ku gbaɖegbe ke ene.
7Eɖo gli ɖe ŋunye, toƒe meli o, eye wòna nye kɔsɔkɔsɔwo nu sẽ ɖe dzi. 8Ne mele ɣli dom le eyɔm hã le, etua nu ɖe nye gbedodoɖa nu. 9Etsɔ kpe gãwo ɖo amli ɖe nye mɔ dzi, eye wògɔdɔ̃ nye toƒe.
10Sisiblisi, si ɖe xa ɖi, kple dzata, si le xa me, wònye nam. 11Ekplɔm trae, eye wòvuvum hetsɔ wɔ nu dziŋɔe. 12Ehe eƒe ɖa me, eye wòtsɔm ɖo nudzidzea ne eƒe aŋutrɔwo.
13Eɖo eƒe dakumeviwo ɖe nye ayikuwo me. 14Metrɔ zu nu ɖikokoea na nye dukɔ kple woƒe hamelo ŋkeke blibo la. 15Etsɔ ama veve ɖi ƒo nam, eye wòkpe atsa nam meno.
16Ena ahliha ŋe aɖu nam, eye wòtigim ɖe dzowɔ me. 17Woxɔ ŋutifafa le nye luʋɔ si, eye meŋlɔ dzɔgbenyuie be. 18Mebe, nye ŋusẽ nu yi, eye mebu mɔkpɔkpɔ na Yehowa.
19Ɖo ŋu nye hiã kple nye fukpekpe, atsa kple aɖi. 20Ɖo ŋui, nagaɖo ŋui ɖe dzi be, nye luʋɔ xa gobaa le menye. 21Mene esia nade dzigbɔ nam, eyata mele mɔ kpɔm be:
22Yehowa ƒe amenuveve nu metso o, eye eƒe nubianuikpɔkpɔ mese ɖo o; 23ke boŋ ete yeye ŋɖi sia ŋɖi, eye wò amenuveve tri akɔ! 24Nye luʋɔ be: Nye gome enye Yehowa, eyata mele esinu kpɔm ɖo.
25Yehowa ƒe ɖɔme nyo ɖe amesi le dzi ɖom ɖe eŋu, kple luʋɔ si le edim la ŋu. 26Enyo be, woanɔ anyi kpoo anɔ Yehowa ƒe xɔname sinu kpɔm. 27Enye na ŋutsu be, wòatsɔ kɔkuti le eƒe ɖevime.
28Nebɔbɔ nɔ aga, eye wòazi ɖoɖoe, elabena eyamae tsoe ɖo edzi; 29netsɔ eƒe nu ƒo ɖe ke me, ɖewohi mɔkpɔkpɔ gali; 30neɖo to me anyi na amesi le eƒom, eye netsɔ ŋukpe ɖi ƒoe.
31Elabena Aƒetɔ la megbea ame ɖikaa o; 32ke boŋ ne edo nuxaxa na ame la, egakpɔa nublanui le eƒe amenuveve geɖe la nu. 33Elabena mewɔa fu ame, eye medoa nuxaxa na amegbetɔviwo le dzidzɔ teƒe o.
34Ne wofanya anyigba dza gatɔwo katã kple afɔ, 35ne wote ame ƒe nya de to le dziƒoʋitɔ la ŋku me, 36eye wotrɔ gbo ame ƒe dzrenya la, ɖe Aƒetɔ la makpɔe oa?
37Amekae gblɔ nya wòva me, ne Aƒetɔ la meɖe se hafi o? 38Ɖe vɔ̃ kple nyui metsoa dziƒoʋitɔ la nu me oa? 39Nuka ta amegbetɔ le nu xam le eƒe agbe me? Amesiame nexa nu le eƒe nuvɔ̃ ŋu boŋ.
40Mina míaɖo míaƒe zɔzɔme a pɔ, míadzro eme akpɔ, eye míatrɔ ɖe Yehowa ŋu! 41Mina míakɔ míaƒe dzi kple míaƒe asiwo dzi ɖo ɖe Mawu le dziƒo. 42Míawo míedze aglã, eye míesẽ to, eye wo la mètsɔe ke o.
43Eɣla ɖokuiwò le dziku me, eye neti mía yome hewu mí, mèkpɔ mía ta o. 44Eɣla ɖokuiwò ɖe alilikpo me, ale be gbedodoɖaa ɖeke meɖi go ɖe egoɖo o. 45Etsɔ mi wɔ gbeɖuɖɔ kple ŋunyɔnui le dukɔwo dome.
46Miaƒe futɔwo katã ke nu ɖe mía ŋu baa. 47Mía tɔ gome enye ŋɔdzi kple ʋe, tsɔtsrɔ̃ kple gbegblẽ. 48Nye ŋku le esi kplɔm yoyoyo le nye dukɔ ƒe nyɔnuvi ƒe gbegblẽ ta.
49Nye ŋku le tsyɔtsyɔ dzi ɖaa, enu gbe tsotso, 50vaseɖe esime Yehowa naɖo ŋku anyi akpɔe tso dziƒo. 51Nye ŋku le veyem ɖe luʋɔ me ke nam le nye ɖu ƒe nyɔnuviwo katã ta.
52Nye futɔwo yɔm ɖe nu yakatsyɔ abe xevi ene. 53Wotigi nye agbe ɖe do me, eye wofɔ kpe ɖo dzinye. 54Tsi fiẽ tanye, eye mebe: Evɔ nam!
55Yehowa, wò ŋkɔe meva le do me ʋi ke. 56Ese nya ɣli, megaɖe wò to da te nye kokoƒoƒo ŋu nagbe akɔfata nam o. 57Etsɔ kpuie le gbesigbe meyɔ wo, eye nẽgblɔ be: Megavɔ̃ o!
58Aƒetɔ, asiwò me nye nya le, eye nèɖe nye agbe 59Yehowa, èkpɔ nye tetedeanyi, drɔ̃ nye nya nam. 60Ekpɔ woƒe hlɔ̃biabiawo katã kple tame, si wodo ɖe ŋunye la.
61Yehowa èse woƒe alɔmeɖeɖe kple tame, si woɖo ɖe ŋunye, 62nye futɔwo ƒe nuƒoƒo kple woƒe susuwo ɖe ŋunye gbesiagbe. 63De ŋku ɖe woƒe anyinɔnɔ kple tsitrenɔnɔ ŋu, hamelo menye na wo.
64Yehowa, ɖo eteƒe na wo le woƒe asinudɔwɔwɔwo nu. 65Tso tamesesẽ na wo, wo fiƒoɖe neva wo dzi! 66Ti wo yome le dziku me, eye natsrɔ̃ wo ɖa le Yehowa ƒe dziƒoa te!

Title: KONYIFAHAWO 4
Content:
Yuda ƒe nublanui kple vlododo.
1Aleke sika nya tsiɖitsiɖi, eye sika nyui ƒe nɔnɔme trɔ? Aleke wolɔ kpe kókɔewo kɔ ɖe kpɔɖomee ƒe dzogoewo katã dzi? 2Aleke Zion ƒe vi vevi, siwo wobuna abe sika ene la, sɔ kple sonugaglɛ, si nye zemela ƒe asinudɔwɔwɔ? 3Keke amegãxi ke hã nua no viawo wonona, ke nye dukɔ ƒe nyɔnuvi le ŋlɔmie wɔm abe golo le gbe dzi ene. 4Tsikɔ na vidzĩewo ƒe aɖe lé de aŋɔƒome na wo, ɖeviwo bia abolo, ke amea ɖeke mekae na wo o. 5Amesiwo du nu vivivo tsã la, nu te wo ŋu le kpɔdomeewo, amesiwo ta aɖabɛ tsã la, le gbeɖuɖɔ me. 6Nye dukɔ ƒe nyɔnuvi ƒe vodadawo só gbɔ wu Sodom, si wotrɔ bu anyi le aɖabaƒoƒo ɖeka me, eye amea ɖeke mekpe asi ɖe eŋu o la ƒe nuvɔ̃wo. 7Woƒe amegãwo da dzo wu sno, eye wotu wu notsi, woƒe mo blã wu soe, eye woƒe nɔnɔme nɔ abe gbloti ene. 8Ke azɔ la woƒe dzedzeme nya wu zemabi, eye amea ɖeke medzea si wo le kpɔdomee o. Woƒe agbalẽ lé ɖe woƒe ƒuwo ŋu kpaɖii, eye wòƒu abe nake ene. 9Amesiwo tsi yi nu tɔ nyo wu amesiwo esi dɔwuame si me tɔ, nu li kɔ na wo, eye woku, le esi agblemenu le hiahiãm ta. 10Nyɔnu, siwo ame ƒe nu wɔa nublanui na la ƒe asi ɖa woawu ŋutɔ ƒe viwo, eye wonye nuɖuɖu na wo le nye dukɔ ƒe nyɔnuvi la gblẽɣi. 11Yehowa wu eƒe dziku nu, eye wòtrɔ eƒe dɔmedzoe ƒo ɖe anyi, eɖo dzo ɖe Zion, eye wòfiã eƒe agunusɔtiwo.
12Anyigba dzi fiawo kple xexeametɔwo katã mexɔe se be, ketɔ kple futɔ la age ɖe Yerusalem ƒe agbowo me hafi o. 13Eva me le woƒe nyagblɔɖilawo ƒe nuvɔ̃wo kple woƒe nunɔlawo ƒe vodadawo la, amesiwo kɔ ame dzɔdzɔewo ƒe ʋu ɖe anyi le eme. 14Wole tsa glãla tsam le kpɔɖotnee abe ŋkunuwo ene, eye woƒo ʋu, ale be amea ɖeke mete ŋu ɖe asi woƒe avɔwo ŋu o. 15Wole ɣli dom ɖe wo ŋu be: Midzo, mi ame makɔmakɔwo, midzo, midzo, migaka asi naneke ŋu o! Eye esi wosi hele tsa glãla tsam la, wogblɔ le dukɔwo dome be: Womele anyi nɔ ge ɖiɖie o! 16Yehowa ƒe adãmo kako wo hlẽ, magaɖe ŋku ɖe wo ŋu azɔ o. Womebu nunɔiawo o, eye womeve amegã ɖeɖiwo nu o. 17Míaƒe ŋkuwo le xɔname dzodzroa ŋu, wòti kɔ na wo; eye esi míele mɔ kpɔm la, míetsa ŋku ɖo dukɔ, si mate ŋu axɔ na ame o la ŋu. 18Wole ŋku ɖem ɖe míaƒe afɔɖeɖe ŋu hã, ale be míaƒe mawo dzi toto zu dɔ; míaƒe nuwuwu tu aƒe, miaƒe ŋkekewo de, elabena míaƒe nuwuwu ɖo. 19Mía yometilawo ɖi du wu hɔ̃ le dziƒo ŋu; woyɔ mi ɖe nu le towo dzi, eye woɖe xa ɖe gbe dzi na mi. 20Míaƒe agbegbɔgbɔ, si nye Yehowa ƒe amesiamina la, ge ɖe woƒe ʋe me; eya amesi ŋu míegblɔ le be: Míanɔ agbe le eƒe vɔvɔli te le dukɔwo dome la. 21Eɖom-nyɔnuvi, wò Uz-nyigba dzi nyɔnu, tso aseye, nakpɔ dzidzɔ; kplu la le vava ge na wò hã, eye namu aha aɖe ama. 22Zion-nyɔnuvi, wò vodada se ɖo, eye maganyã wò ade gbe azɔ o. Edom-nyɔnuvi, ahe to na wò vodada, eye aklo nu le wò nuvɔ̃wo dzi.

Title: KONYIFAHAWO 5
Content:
Dukɔ la ƒe amenuveve yome didi.
1Yehowa, do ŋu nusi dzo ɖe mía dzi la; ɖo ŋku anyi nakpɔ míaƒe ŋukpe ɖa! 2Míaƒe domenyinu ge ɖe amedzrowo si me, eye míaƒe aƒewo ge ɖe ɖu bubu me tɔwo si me. 3Tsyɔ̃eviwo míenye, tɔ mele mía si o, eye mía nɔwo zu ahosiwo. 4Gae míetsɔna hafi noa míaƒe tsi, eye ɖe míeƒlea míaƒe nakewo. 5Woti mía yome kplikplikpli, ɖeɖi te mía ŋu, ke womena míegbɔ ɖe eme o. 6Míena ta Egipte kple Asur, ne míakpɔ abolo aɖu aɖi ƒo. 7Mia fofowo wɔ nuvɔ̃, eye womegali o, ke míawo míele woƒe vodadawo tsɔm. 8Kluviwo le amegã ɖum ɖe mía nu, ke amea ɖeke mele mía ɖem le wo si me o. 9Míaƒe agbe míetsɔ ɖaɖi aboloe, le yi, si le gbe dzi ta. 10Dɔwuame heliheli na míaƒe ŋutigbalẽ ʋu dzo hẽ abe kpo ene. 11Wogblẽ nyɔnuwo le Zion kple ɖetugbiwo le Yuda-duwo me. 12Wode ke ve na amegãwo, eye womesi amegã ɖeɖiwo ŋku me o. 13Ɖekakpuiwo le te ɖe te, eye ɖeviwo dze anyi ɖe nake te. 14Ame tsitsiwo vɔ le ʋɔnu, eye ɖekakpuiwo megale saŋku ƒom o. 15Míaƒe dzidzɔ nu tso, míaƒe ɣeɖuɖu zu nuxaxa. 16Míaƒe fiakuku ge le mía ta. Baba na mí be, míewɔ nuvɔ̃! 17Eyata míaƒe dzi le nu xam, eye míaƒe ŋkuwo zu vi 18ɖe Zion-to la ŋu, elabena ezu gbegbe, eye abeiwo le edzi tom. 19Ke wò Yehowa, èlí tegbee, eye wò fiazikpui nɔa dzidzimewo katã me. 20Nukaŋuti nèŋlɔ mí be ɖikaa, eye negblẽ mí ɖi eteƒe didi ale? 21Yehowa, trɔ mí ɖe ŋuwò, ne míatrɔ; wɔ míaƒe ŋkekewo yeye abe tsa ene. 22Alo ɖe negbe nu keŋ, eye nèɖo dɔmedzoe ɖe mia ŋu vevie ŋutɔŋutɔa?

Title: XEZEKIEL 1
Content:
Aƒetɔ la ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe klẽ ɖe Kerubiwo dzi.
1Le ƒe blaatɔ̃lia me le dzinu enelia ƒe ŋkeke atɔ̃lia dzi, esime mele aboyomewo dome le Kebar-tɔsisi to la, eva me be, dziƒo nu ʋu, eye mekpɔ Mawu ƒe ŋutega. 2Le dzinu la ƒe ŋkeke atɔ̃lia dzi la, — eya nye aboyoɖeɖe fia Yoyaxin ƒe atɔ̃ megbe — 3Yehowa ƒe gbe va na Xezekiel, nunɔla Buzi vi, le Kebar-tɔsisi la nu le Kaldea-nyigba dzi, eye Yehowa ƒe asi va edzi le afima.
4Meɖo ŋku anyi, eye kpɔ ɖa, ahom tu tso anyiehe, alilikpo gãa ɖe bia kɔtɔɔ, keklẽ ƒo xlã alilikpo gãa ɖe, eye dzobabla kɔtɔɔ le eme; nane le dzedzem le dzo la titina abe sika, si me kɔ keŋkeŋ ene; 5nu gbagbe ene do tso eme, eye woƒe nɔnɔme enye si: Woɖi amegbetɔ, 6ɖesiaɖe to mo ene, eye aʋala ene li na wo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe, 7woƒe atatiwo dze ti, woƒe afɔƒome le abe nyivi tɔ ene, eye wole dzo dam kaŋkaŋ abe ayawa ene. 8Amegbetɔ ƒe asi li na wo le woƒe aʋalawo te le go eneawo dzi; mowo kple aʋalawo li na wo ame eneawo; 9woƒe aʋalawo kpe wo nɔewo, eye ne wole azɔli dzi la, wometrɔa kɔ o; wo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe léa eƒe mɔ te. 10Woƒe mo ɖi amegbetɔ ƒe mo le ŋgɔ, wo ame enea to dzata ƒe mo ɖe ɖusi me, wo ame enea to nyitsu ƒe mo ɖe mia me, eye wo ame enea to hɔ̃ ƒe mo ɖe megbe, 11esia nye woƒe mowo. Woklẽ woƒe aʋala wo ɖo ta dzi me, ɖesiaɖe tsɔ eve ƒo go nɔvia, eye wotsɔ eve tsyɔ ŋuti. 12Ne wole yiyim la, wo dome ɖesiaɖe kpɔa eŋgɔ tẽ; afisi gbɔgbɔ la ɖo wo ɖo la, afima woyina, eye ne wole azɔli dzi la, wometrɔa kɔ o. 13Eye nane le nu gbagbeawo domee le abe dzoka ene hele bibim abe akakati ene, dzo la le faflam le nu gbagbeawo domee, eye eme kɔ keŋkeŋ, eye dzikedzo do tso dzoa me. 14Eye nu gbagbeawo le du dzi tso afi yi afi abe dzikedzo ene.
15Esi meɖe ŋku ɖe nu gbagbeawo la, kpɔ ɖa, tasiaɖamfɔ le nu gbagbeawo xa le anyigba le woƒe ŋgɔdze eneawo katã. 16Tasiaɖamfɔawo ƒe dzedzeme le abe adzagba wotsɔ wɔ wòe ene, eye wo ame eneawo katã ɖi wo nɔewo, woƒe dzedzeme kple woƒe wɔwɔme sɔ abe ɖe tasiaɖamfɔ ɖeka le nɔvia me ene. 17Wozɔna ɖe woƒe go eneawo me, eye ne wole yiyim la, wometrɔna o. 18Wo meɖotiwo la, gãnyenye kple ŋɔdzi wonye, eye ŋku le wo ame eneawo katã meɖotiwo ŋu godoo. 19Ne nu gbagbeawo le azɔli dzi la, tasiaɖamfɔawo nɔa yiyim le wo xa, eye ne nu gbagbeawo kɔ wo ɖokui dzi tso anyigba la, tasiaɖamfɔawo hã kɔa dzi. 20Afisi gbɔgbɔ la ɖo wo ɖo la, afima woyina, eye tasiaɖamfɔawo kɔa wo ɖokui dzi kpena ɖe wo ŋu; elabena nu gbagbeawo ƒe gbɔgbɔ le tasiaɖamfɔwo me. 21Ne woɖe zɔ la, tasiaɖamfɔawo hã ɖea zɔ, ne wòtɔ la, wotɔna, eye ne wokɔ wo ɖokui tso anyigba la, woawo hã kɔa wo ɖokui dzi; elabena nu gbagbeawo ƒe gbɔgbɔ le tasiaɖamfɔawo me.
22Eye nane le nu gbagbeawo ta me abe dziŋgɔli ene hele dzo sim abe kpe ɣi ene, eye wòkeke ɖe wo ta me le dziƒo gome. 23Woklẽ aʋala eveve ɖatɔ wo nɔewo le dziŋgɔli la te, eye ɖesiaɖe tsɔ eve tsyɔ ŋuti. 24Eye esi wole yiyim la, mese woƒe aʋalawo me le ɖiɖim abe tɔ gãwo ƒe hoowɔwɔ, abe ŋusẽkatãtɔ ƒe gbeɖeɖe kple aʋakɔwo ƒe ɣlidodo ene, eye ne wòtɔ la, woɖiɖia woƒe aʋalawo ɖe anyi. 25Eye gbea ɖe ɖi le dziŋgɔli, si le wo ta me la dzi; ne wòtɔ la, woɖiɖia woƒe aʋalawo ɖe anyi. 26Nane ɖi fiazikpui le dziŋgɔli, si le wo ta me la dzi le abe gbloti ene, eye nɔnɔmea ɖe, si ɖi amegbetɔ lã, bɔbɔ nɔ nusi ɖi fiazikpuia la dzi. 27Meɖe ŋku ɖe eƒe ali ŋu ɖo ta dziƒo gome, wòle abe sika, si me kɔ keŋkeŋ la ene, eye nane le dzedzem le eme godoo abe dzo ene; eye meɖe ŋku ɖe eƒe ali ŋu ɖo ta anyi me gome, wòle abe dzo ene, eye keklẽ ɖe to ɖee. 28Keklẽ, si ɖe to ɖee la, le abe alesi anyieʋɔ ɖina ɖe alilikpo ŋu le tsidzadza megbe ene. Esia nye Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe nɔnɔme. Eye esi mekpɔe la, metsyɔ mo anyi, eye amea ɖe le nu ƒom mese.

Title: XEZEKIEL 2
Content:
Xezekiel ɖoɖo nyagblɔɖilae.
1Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Amevi, tsi tre ɖe wò afɔ dzi, ne maƒo nu kpli wò. 2Esi wòƒo nu kplim la, gbɔgbɔ la ɖo menye, eye wòfɔm ɖe te ɖe nye afɔwo dzi, eye melé to ɖe amesi le nu ƒom kplim la ŋu. 3Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Amevi, madɔ wò ɖe Israel-viwo, dukɔ dzeaglã, si dze aglã ɖe ŋunye la gbɔ, woawo kple wo fofowo trɔ ʋu le yonyeme va do egbenɔwo tsɛ. 4Vi, siwo gbɔ mele dɔwòm ɖo la, mo kplala li na wo, eye woƒe tame sẽ goŋgoŋ. Gblɔ na wo bena: „Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi!“ 5Ke wosee o, womeɖasee o, woanyae be, nyagblɔɖila ɖe nɔ yewo dome kpɔ; elabena ƒome sẽto wonye. 6Ke wò amevi, nenye be, nèle dza kple aŋɔkawo gbɔ, eye nètso aƒe ɖe dziɖegbewo gbɔ hã la, megavɔ̃ wo o, eye megavɔ̃ woƒe nyawo o! Megavɔ̃ woƒe nyawo o, eye woƒe mo megatso dzika ƒo na wò o, elabena ƒome sẽto wonye; 7ke boŋ gblɔ nye nyawo na wo, wosee o, womeɖasee o; elabena ƒome sẽto wonye.
8Ke wò amevi, se nya, si gblɔ ge mala na wò, eye megasẽ to abe ƒome sẽto la ene o! Ke wò nu naɖu nusi tso ge mala na wò la! 9Tete mekpɔ wodo asia ɖe ɖe gbɔnye, si me agbalẽ le. 10Eye wòkekee ɖe ŋkunye me, woŋlɔ nu ɖe eme kple ekɔgo, eye woŋlɔ konyifahawo, hũɖeɖewo kple vevesesewo ɖe eme.

Title: XEZEKIEL 3
Content:
Mawu tsɔ agbalẽ na nyagblɔɖila la, bena woaɖu.
1Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Amevi, ɖu nusi kpam nèle la! Ɖu agbalẽ sia, eye yi naɖaƒo nu kple Israel ƒe aƒe la. 2Tete meke nu, eye wotso agbalẽ la nam, be maɖu, 3hegblɔ nam bena: Amevi, tso agbalẽ, si metsɔ na wò la, ɖi ƒoe, eye natsɔe ayɔ wò dɔgboe! Eye meɖui, wòviví le nu me nam abe anyitsi ene. 4Tete wògblɔ nam bena: Amevi, yi Israel ƒe aƒe la gbɔ nagblɔ nye nyawo na wo. 5Elabena menye dukɔ fiafialawo kple kɔkɔlawo gbɔ wole dɔwòm ɖo o, ke boŋ Israel ƒe aƒe la gbɔe; 6eye menye dukɔ geɖe, siwo nye fiafialawo kple kɔkɔlawo, amesiwo ƒe gbe mèsena o la gbɔe mele dɔwòm ɖo o; eye ɖe wònye woawo gbɔe medɔ wò ɖo la, anye ne woaɖo to wò. 7Ke Israel ƒe aƒe la mele to ɖo ge wò o, le esi wogbe toɖoɖom ta; elabena ŋgonu kplala kple dzi kuatri li na Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la. 8Kpɔ ɖa, mana wò ŋku me nasẽ abe woƒe ŋku me ene, eye wò ŋgonu nanɔ kplala abe woƒe ŋgonu ene! 9Mawɔ wò ŋku me wòase abe lotamekpe ene, eye wòalia wu ahliha; megavɔ̃ wo o, eye womegatso dzika ƒo na wò o, elabena ƒome sẽto wonye. 10Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Amevi, lé nya, siwo katã gblɔ ge mala na wò la, ɖe wò dzi me, eye nase wo kple wò to. 11Yi aboyome, siwo nye mia ɖeviwo la gbɔ, eye naƒo nu kpli wo agblɔ na wo bena: „Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi“; wosee o, womeɖasee o!
Gbɔgbɔ la ko Xezekiel dzoe.
12Tete gbɔgbɔ la kɔnu eye mese hoowɔwɔ abe anyigbaʋuʋu gãa ɖe ene le megbenye, esime Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ho le eteƒe, 13kple nu gbagbeawo ƒe aʋala, siwo le wo nɔewo kam ƒe ɖiɖi hekpe ɖe tasiaɖamfɔawo ƒe ɖiɖi kpakple anyigbaʋuʋu gãa ɖe ŋu. 14Tete gbɔgbɔ la kɔm dzoe, eye melé nye mɔ tsɔ, dzi kum vevie, eye Yehowa ƒe asi nu sẽ ɖe dzinye. 15Eye meva Tel-Abib le aboyome, siwo le Kebar-tɔsisi nu la gbɔ, eye menɔ wo dome le afima ŋkeke adre nu maƒomaƒoe.
Woɖo Xezekiel Israel ƒe aƒe ŋudzɔlae.
16Eye le ŋkeke adre megbe la Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 17Amevi, metsɔ wò ɖo dzɔla na Israel ƒe aƒe la be, ne èse nyaa ɖe tso nunye me la, naxlɔ̃ nu wo nam. 18Ne megblɔ na ame vɔ̃ɖi be: „Ele kuku ge,“ eye mexlɔ̃ nui heƒo nu kplii be, ame vɔ̃ɖi la nakpɔ eɖokui dzi ɖe eƒe mo vɔ̃ɖiwo ŋu, ne woatsi agbe o la, ekema ame vɔ̃ɖi la aku le eƒe vodadawo ta; ke asiwò me mabia eƒe ʋu le. 19Ke ne èxlɔ̃ nu ame vɔ̃ɖi, la, eye wogbe asiɖeɖe le eƒe vɔ̃ɖinyenye kple eƒe mɔ vɔwo ŋu la, ekema aku le eƒe vodadawo ta; ke wò la eɖe wò agbe. 20Ne ame dzɔdzɔe ɖe asi le eƒe nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ ŋu hewɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi la, ekema maɖo nu nɛ, wòakli aku. Elabena esi mèxlɔ̃ nui o la, eyata woku le eƒe nuvɔ̃wo ta ɖo, eye womagaɖo ŋu eƒe nu dzɔdzɔe, siwo wòwɔ la o; ke asiwò me mabia eƒe ʋu le. 21Ke ne èxlɔ̃ nu ame dzɔdzɔe la be, megawɔ nuvɔ̃ o, eye ame dzɔdzɔe la mewo nuvɔ̃ o, ke boŋ wòna woxlɔ̃ nui la, ekema atsi agbe; eye wò la eɖe wò agbe.
Nyagblɔɖila la gakpɔ Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe.
22Eye Yehowa ƒe asi va dzinye le afima wògblɔ nam bena: Tso nayi bali la me, ne maƒo nu kpli wò le afima! 23Tete metso heyi bali la me, eye kpɔ ɖa, Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe le tsitre ɖe afima abe ŋutikɔkɔe, si mekpɔ le Kebar-tɔsisi la nu ene, eye metsyɔ mo anyi. 24Eye gbagba la ɖo menye hefɔm ɖe te ɖe nye afɔwo dzi, eye wòƒo nu kplim gblɔ nam bena: Yi naɖatu ʋɔ ɖe ɖokuiwò nu le aƒewò me. 25Wò amevi, kpo ɖa, wole ka tsa ge aɖo ŋuwò ahabla wò, be magaɖo ayi wo dome o. 26Eye mana wò aɖe nalé ɖe aŋɔ me na wò kaɖii, ne wò aɖe natu, be magagblɔ tohenya na wo o; elabena ƒome sẽto wonye. 27Ke ne maƒo nu kpli wò la, maʋu nu na wò, eye nagblɔ na wo bena: „Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi.“ Amesi see la, nesee; amesi gbe la, negbe; elabena ƒome sẽto wonye.

Title: XEZEKIEL 4
Content:
Toɖeɖe ɖe Yerusalem ŋu ƒe kpɔɖeŋu.
1Wò amevi, tsɔ anyikpe ɖo ŋkuwò me, eye nata Yerusalem-du la ɖe edzi; 2ɖo toɖelawo eŋu, eye natu dzɔlawo ƒe xɔ tsrala ɖe, eŋu, ƒu kpo ɖe eŋu, ɖe aʋakɔwo ɖo eŋu, eye natsɔ gligbãnuwo ƒo xlãe godoo. 3Ke wò la tsa gagba nawɔ gagli atso mia kple ɖu la dome, trɔ mo de du la, woaɖe to ɖee, eye naxaxae ɖo; dzesi enye esia na Israel ƒe aƒe la. 4Mlɔ wò miamekpa dzi, eye natsɔ Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe vodada aɖo ɖokuiwò dzi; ŋkeke alesi nèmlɔ anyi alea la, nenema nue natsɔ woƒe vodadawo ɖo. 5Eye maɖo woƒe vodadawo ƒe ƒe na wò ɖe ŋkeke alafa etɔ̃ kple blaasieke, siwo netsɔ Israel ƒe aƒe fe vodada la ƒe xexlẽme nu. 6Eye ne èwu esia nu va la, ekema mlɔ wò ɖusikpa dzi, eye natsɔ Yuda ƒe aƒe la ƒe vodada ŋkeke blane; mebu ŋkeke ɖeka na wò ƒe ɖekae. 7Trɔ ŋku me de Yerusalem, si woɖe to ɖo la, eye naɖe abɔ ƒuƒlu agblɔ nya ɖe anyi ɖe eŋuti. 8Kpɔ ɖa, mede ka wò, be magatrɔ ɖe axa bubu dzi, hafi ne wò toɖeɖe ƒe ŋkekeawo nava de o.
9Ke wò la tso bli, lu, gbagbayi, ayi, ƒo kple meli de ze me, eye natsɔ wo aƒo aboloe na ɖokuiwò, ne naɖu le ŋkeke alafa etɔ̃ kple blaasieke, siwo nemlɔ wò axa dzi la me. 10Wò gbe sia gbe nuɖuɖu ƒe dadame nanye sekel blave, eya naɖu tso ɣeyiɣi dzi ɖaseɖe bubu dzi. 11Eye nano tsi ɖe dzidze nu, hin ƒe adeliawo ɖeka nano tso ɣeyiɣi dzi ɖaseɖe bubu dzi. 12Ƒoe abe lubolo ene naɖu, eye namèe le amemĩ dzi le wo ŋku me. 13Eye Yehowa gblɔ bena: Alea Israel-viwo aɖu abolo makɔmakɔ le dukɔwo domee, afisi menya wo aɖo ɖo. 14Tete megblɔ bena: Ao, Aƒetɔ Yehowa, kpɔ ɖa, nyemegblẽ ko ɖo na ɖokuinye kpɔ o, nyemeɖu lã kuku alo lã, si nu vuvu la, tso nye ɖevime vaseɖe egbe o, eye lã ƒaƒã mede nye nu me kpo o! 15Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Kpɔ ɖa, meɖe gbe na wò bena, namè wò abolo la le nyimĩ dzi ɖe amemĩ teƒe. 16Eye wògblɔ nam be: Amevi, kpo ɖa, maŋe abolo ƒe ziɔɖeŋu le Yerusalem, eye woatso vovɔ̃ aɖu abolo ɖe dada nu, eye woatsɔ ŋɔdzi ano tsi ɖe dzidze nu; 17ne abolo kple tsi nahiã wo, eye ame ƒe nu naku ɖe nɔvia ŋu, eye woatsrɔ̃ ɖe woƒe vodada me.

Title: XEZEKIEL 5
Content:
Mawu ƒe tohehe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ Yerusalem.
1Wò amegbetɔvi, tso yi ɖaɖɛ wo talũhɛ, ne natsɔ alũ wò ta kple wò ge, eye natsɔ nudanu amã ɖawo mee. 2Tɔ dzo akpa etɔ̃liawo ɖeka ɖe dua me, nenye be, toɖeɖe ƒe ŋkekeawo wu enu; tsɔ yi fũ akpa etɔ̃liawo ɖeka ƒo xlãe godoo, eye natsɔ akpa etɔ̃liawo ɖeka ahlẽ ɖe ya nu, eye maɖi yi anɔ wo yome. 3Ɖe suea ɖe le eŋu nasa ɖe wò avɔ nu, 4eye gaɖe ʋeea ɖe le esia ŋu de dzo me, ne wòafiã ɖe dzo me; esia me dzo atso ɖe Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la ŋu.
5Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Nyee tsɔ Yerusalem sia ɖo dukɔwo dome, eye anyigbawo ɖe to ɖee godoo. 6Wosẽ to ɖe nye sewo ŋu vloe wu dukɔwo, eye ɖe nye ɖoɖowo ŋu wu anyigba, siwo ɖe to ɖe wo godoo; elabena wogbe nye seawo, eye womezɔ ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu o. 7Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi miesẽ to wu dukɔ, siwo ƒo xlã mi godoo, miezɔ ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu o, eye miewɔ nu ɖe nye sewo nu, ʋuu kekeke miahayi nu wɔ ge ɖe dukɔ, siwo ƒo xlã mi godoo ƒe sewo nu o la, 8eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, nye hã maƒo ɖe dziwò, eye madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu le mewò le dukɔwo ŋku me, 9eye mawɔ nu mawɔkpɔa ɖe ŋuwò le wò ŋunyɔnuwo katã ta, nusi tɔgbe nyemegale wɔwɔ ge o. 10Eyata fofowo aɖu wo viwo le mewo, eye viwo aɖu wo fofowo; madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò, eye makaka wò ame mamleawo katã ahlẽ ɖe yawo nu. 11Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe, esi netsɔ wò legbawo katã kple wò ŋunyɔnuwo katã gblẽ kɔ ɖo na nye kɔkɔeƒe ta la, ne magbe wò gbagbã gudugudu, nye ŋku akpɔ nublanui na wò, eye makpɔ tawo fi! 12Wò akpa etɔ̃liawo ɖeka aku ɖe dɔvɔ̃ nu, eye dɔwuame atsrɔ̃ wo ɖe mewò; akpa etɔ̃liawo ɖeka atsi yi nu aƒo xlã wò godoo ava kpe, eye makaka akpa etɔ̃liawo ɖeka ahlẽ ɖe yawo katã nu, eye maɖi yi anɔ wo yome. 13Eye nye dɔmedzoe abi ade eseƒe ke, nye dziku nu afa ɖe wo ŋu, eye mafa dzi na ɖokuinye, ne wòadze sii be, nye Yehowa ye ƒo nu le nye ŋuʋaʋã me, nenye be, metrɔ nye dziku blibo la ƒo ɖe wo dzi. 14Matsɔ wò awɔ gbegbe kple alɔmeɖenu le dukɔ, siwo ƒo xlã wò godoo la dome kple amesiwo katã toa ŋuwò yina la ŋku me. 15Eye azu alɔmeɖenu kple vlodonu, nuxlɔ̃amenu kple ŋɔdzinu na dukɔ, siwo ƒo xlã wò godoo, nenye be, medrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò le dɔmedzoe kple dziku me, eye mehe to na wò kple dziku; nye Yehowa ye gblɔe; 16ne meda dɔwuame ƒe aŋutrɔ vɔ̃ɖiwo ɖe wo dome, ne woazu amewula, eye meda wo, be woagblẽ mi, eye meli kɔ dɔwuame ɖi na mi gleglegle, eye meŋe abolo ƒe ziɔɖeŋu na mi. 17Mahe dɔwuame kple lã wɔadãwo ava mia dzi, ne woaɖe vi le ŋuwò, dɔvɔ̃ kple ʋukɔkɔɖeanyi ava ƒo ɖe dziwò, eye mana yi nava dziwò; nye Yehowa ye gblɔe.

Title: XEZEKIEL 6
Content:
Wogblẽ Israel-nyigba le eƒo trɔ̃subɔsubɔ ta.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, trɔ mo de Israel-towo, eye nagblɔ nya ɖi ɖe wo ŋu 3gblɔ bena: Mi Israel-towo, mise Aƒetɔ Yehowa ƒe nya! Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ ɖe towo kple togbɛwo, agatowo kple balimewo ŋu enye si: Kpɔ ɖa, mahe yi ava mia dzi, eye magblẽ miaƒe nuxeƒewo. 4Miaƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo agblẽ, miaƒe ɣelegbawo agba, eye matsɔ miaƒe ame tsiaʋawo aƒu gbe ɖe miaƒe legbawo ŋku me; 5matsɔ Israel-viwo ƒe kukuawo aɖo woƒe legbawo ŋku me, eye makaka miaƒe ƒuwo aƒo xlã miaƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo. 6Míaƒe duwo azu aƒedo le mia nɔƒewo katã, eye miaƒe nuxeƒewo agblẽ: elabena woagbã miaƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo, eye woatsrɔ̃ wo; woagbã miaƒe legbawo, eye woaɖe wo ɖa, woa mũ miaƒe ɣelegbawo, eye woatsrɔ̃ miaƒe dɔwɔwɔwo. 7Eye ame tsiaʋawo atsi mia dome, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. 8Ke ne miekaka ɖe anyigbawo dzi la, mana amesiwo si le yi nu la, nakpɔtɔ na mi ɖe dukɔwo dome! 9Miaƒe ame sisiwo aɖo ŋku dzinye le dukɔwo dome, afisi woɖe aboyo wo yii, nenye be, megbã woƒe ahasiwɔdzi, si trɔ le yonyeme, kple woƒe ŋku, siwo dze legbawo yome la; eye woanyɔ ŋu na woawo ŋutɔwo ɖokui le woƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi, siwo wotso woƒe ŋunyɔnuwo katã wo la ta; 10eye wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa; menye dzodzroe megblɔ be, mele vɔ̃ sia wɔ ge wo o.
11Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ƒu akpe, tu afa anyi, eye nado aléle ɖe Israel ƒe aƒe ƒe ŋunyɔnu vɔ̃ɖiawo katã ŋu, elabena wole yi, dɔwuame kple dɔvɔ̃ si me tsi ge. 12Amesi le didiƒe la, dɔvɔ̃ awui, amesi le kpuiƒe la, atsi yi nu, eye amesi kpɔtɔ ɖi woɖe lã, aku ɖe dɔwuame si me, eye matrɔ nye dziku aƒo ɖe wo dzi. 13Eye miadze sii bena, nyee nye Yehowa, ne miaƒe ame tsiaʋawo tsi miaƒe legbawo dome ƒo xlã miaƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo le togbɛ kɔkɔwo katã dzi, le towo katã ta me, le ati damawo katã kple logoti dodowo katã gome, teƒe, siwo wodo dzudzɔ ʋeʋẽe na woƒe legbawo katã le. 14Mado nye asi ɖa ɖe wo ŋu, eye mado gbegbe kple aƒedo anyigba la tso gbe dzi vaseɖe Ribla le wo nɔƒewo katã, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.

Title: XEZEKIEL 7
Content:
Mawu ƒe tohehe no Israel ŋɔdzitɔe.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ ɖe Israel-nyigba ŋu enye si: Nuwuwu gbɔna, nuwuwu gbɔna na anyigba la ƒe go eneawo! 3Azɔ nuwuwu gbɔna na wò, eye mada nye dɔmedzoe ɖe ŋuwò, madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò ɖe wò zɔzɔme nu, eye mahe wò ŋunyɔnuwo katã ava dziwò; 4nye ŋku makpɔ nublanui na wò o, eye nyemakpɔ tawò o; ke boŋ mahe wò zɔzɔme ava dziwò, eye wò ŋunyɔnuwo anɔ dowòme, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.
5Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, dzɔgbevɔ̃e kplɔ dzɔgbevɔ̃e ɖo gbɔna! 6Nuwuwu gbɔna, nuwuwu gbɔna, efɔ ɖe ŋuwò, kpo ɖa, egbɔna! 7Anyigbadzinɔla, nuwɔame gbɔna ɖe dziwò! Ɣeyiɣi la gbɔna, nuxagbe tu aƒe, eye menye aseyetsotso le towo dzi o! 8Azɔ ekpɔtɔ vie matrɔ nye dziku aƒo ɖe dziwò, eye nye dɔmedzoe katã nu nafa ɖe ŋuwò, madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò ɖe wò zɔzɔme nu, eye mahe wò ŋunyɔnuwo katã ava dziwò: 9Nye ŋku makpɔ nublanui na wò o, eye nyemakpɔ tawò o, mahe wò zɔzɔmewo ava dziwò, eye wò ŋunyɔnuwo anɔ dowòme, ne miadze sii be, nye Yehowa ye ƒo ame.
10Kpɔ ɖa, egbɔna, ŋkeke la gbɔna! Nuwɔame do, ameƒoti ƒo se, eye dada de ama! 11Ŋutasesẽ tsi zu vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ ƒe ameƒoti; wo dometɔa ɖeke megali o, woƒe ame gbogboawo dometɔa ɖeke megali o, woƒe nu gbogboawo dometɔa ɖeke megali o, eye woƒe atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo nu yi! 12Azã la ɖo, ŋkeke la ɖe, nuƒlela makpɔ dzidzɔ o, eye nudzrala maxa nu o; elabena dɔmedzoe va woƒe amehawo katã dzi 13Ne nudzrala tsi agbe hã la, matrɔ yi eƒe nudzadzrawo gbɔ o, elabena wokpɔ ŋutega ɖe woƒe amehawo katã ŋu, eye dzi aɖe le amesiame ƒo le eƒe vodadawo ta. 14Woku kpẽ, eye wo katã wobla akpa, ke amea ɖeke meho yi aʋa o, elabena nye dɔmedzoe va woƒe amehawo katã dzi. 15Yi le xexe, dɔvɔ̃ kple dɔwuame le aƒe me; amesi le gbe me la, yi awui, eye amesi le du me la, dɔwuame kple dɔvɔ̃ aɖui. 16Miaƒe sisilawo asi, eye woano towo dzi abe akpakpawo le agato me ene, eye wo katã woanɔ xɔxlɔ̃m le woƒe vodadawo la. 17Alɔwo katã ado agblɔ, eye klowo katã alólo azu tsi; 18woata akpanya, eye woalulu, ŋukpe alé ŋkumewo katã, eye tawo katã anye ta kokoe. 19Woatsɔ woƒe klosalo aƒu gbe ɖe kpɔdomee, eye wòabu woƒe sika ŋunyɔnui; woƒe klosalo kple sika maɖe wo le Yehowa ƒe dzikudogbe o; womate atsi woƒe dɔwuame nu o, eye womatsɔe aɖi ƒoe o; elabena eyae ble wo de vodada me. 20Wotsɔ woƒe atsyɔ̃nu, siwo nye woƒe adegbeƒonuwo, wɔ legba, siwo nye woƒe ŋunyɔnuwoe, eyata mena wozu ŋunyɔnu na wo do; 21matsɔe ade asi na ame tutɔwo, ne woaha, eye matsɔe ade asi na anyigba dzi ame vɔ̃ɖiwo, ne woaɖe aboyoe, eye woagblẽ kɔ ɖo nɛ. 22Maɖe ko ɖa le wo ŋu, ne woagblẽ ko ɖo na nye nu vevi la, eye mana adzoblasuwo nage ɖe eme ahagblẽ ko ɖo ne.
23Mitu kɔsɔkɔsɔ, elabena hlɔ̃ɖoɖo yɔ anyigba dzi, eye ŋutasesẽ ya dua me. 24Mana dukɔwo ƒe vɔ̃ɖitɔwo nava xɔ woƒe aƒewo, matsi ŋusẽtɔwo ƒe dàda nu, eye woagblẽ ko ɖo na woƒe kɔkɔeƒewo. 25Ŋɔdzinu gbɔna, eye woaɖi ŋutifafa, ke mana anyi o. 26Dzɔgbevɔ̃e akplɔ dzɔgbevɔ̃e ɖo, eye ŋɔdzinya ava ɖe ŋɔdzinya yome; woadi ŋutega tso nyagblɔɖilawo si, nufiame abu ɖe nunɔlawo, eye adaŋudede de ame tsitsiwo. 27Fia axa nu, dzidzi aƒo amegã, eye dukɔ hahoo la ƒe asi adzo nyanyanya, mawo wo ɖe woƒe zɔzɔme nu, eye madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wo de woƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ nu, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.

Title: XEZEKIEL 8
Content:
Wokplɔ Xezekiel yi Yerusalem, eye wòkpɔ trɔ̃subɔsubɔ ƒe ŋunyɔnu le gbedoxɔ me.
1Eye wòva me, esime mebɔbɔ nɔ aƒenye me le ƒe adelia me, le dzinu adelia ƒe ŋkeke atɔ̃lia dzi, eye Yuda ame tsitsiwo bɔbɔ nɔ ŋkunye me la, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ƒe asi va dzinye le afima. 2Eye medo ŋku anyi, kpɔ ɖa, nane le abe ame ene; eƒe ali ƒe anyi me gome le abe dzo ene, eye eƒe ali ƒe dzi me gome ɖi kekeli hele abe sika, si me kɔ keŋkeŋ la ene. 3Tete wòdo nane da abe asi ene helé nye taɖa, eye gbagba la kɔm ɖe anyigba kple dziƒo domee hekplɔm le Mawu ƒe ŋutega me va ɖo Yerusalem le agbo metɔ, si ɖo ta anyiehe gome la nu, afisi legbaa ɖe, si dea ŋuʋaʋã Yehowa me la le. 4Eye Israel ƒe Mawu la ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe le afima abe nɔnɔme, si mekpɔ le bali la me ene. 5Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Amevi, fa ko dzi ɖe anyiehe gome! Tete mefɔ kɔ dzi, eye kpɔ ɖa, ŋuʋaʋã ƒe legba sia le vɔsamlekpui la ƒe agbo la nu le anyiehe gome. 6Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Amevi, èle nusi wɔm wole la kpɔma? Ŋunyɔnu gã Israel ƒe aƒe la le wɔwɔm le afisia, ne wòatsɔ anyãm ɖa le nye kɔkɔeƒe la ŋu; ke ègale ŋunyɔnu gãwo kpɔ ge.
7Eye wòkplɔm yi xɔxɔnu la ƒe mo nu, eye meɖo ŋku anyi, kpɔ ɖa, do le glia me. 8Tete wògblɔ nam bena: Amevi, ŋɔ gli la! Eye esi meŋɔ glia la, kpo ɖa, ʋotrua ɖe li. 9Eye wògblɔ nam bena. Yi ɖe eme, ne nakpe ŋunyɔnu vɔ̃ɖi, siwo wɔm wole le afisia la ɖa! 10Esi mege ɖe eme la, kpɔ ɖa, wota nutatawo kple lãfɔnewo, siwo nye ŋunyɔnuwo la ƒe nɔnɔme vovovowo, kple Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe legbawo katã ɖe glia ŋu godoo va kpe. 11Eye Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe ame tsitsiwo dometɔ blaadre, amesiwo nu Yaazanya, Safan vi, le la tsi tre de wo ŋgɔ, amesiame lé sonu ɖe asi, eye dzudzɔ ʋeʋẽe de dzi kɔtɔɔ. 12Tete wògblɔ nam be: Amevi, ele nusi Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe ame tsitsiwo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe le wɔwɔm le vivi me le eƒe xɔvi, si me nɔnɔmetatawo le me la kpɔma? Wole gbɔgblɔm be: Yehowa mele mía kpɔm o, Yehowa gblẽ anyigba la ɖi! 13Emegbe wògblɔ nam bena: Egale ŋunyɔnu gã, siwo wɔm wole la, kpɔ ge.
14Eye wòkplɔm va Yehowa ƒe aƒe ƒe agbo, si le anyiehe gome la nu, kpɔ ɖa, nyɔnuwo bɔbɔ nɔ afima le fafam na Tamus. 15Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Amevi, èkpɔea? Egale ŋunyɔnu gãwo kpɔ ge wu esia.
16Eye wòkplɔm va Yehowa ƒe aƒe ƒe xɔxɔnu metɔ, kpɔ ɖa, ano ŋutsu blave vo atɔ̃ le Yehowa ƒe gbedoxɔ ƒe mo nu le akpata la kple vɔsamlekpui la dome, wòtrɔ megbe ɖe Yehowa ƒe gbedoxɔ la, eye wotrɔ ŋgɔ dze ɣedzeƒe hele gbe dom ɖa na ɣe do de ɣedzeƒe gome. 17Eye wògblɔ nam be: Amevi, èkpɔea? Ɖe Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe ŋunyɔnu, siwo wɔm wòle le afisia, mesɔ gbɔ nɛ o, hafi wotsɔ ŋutasesẽ le anyigba dzi yɔm, eye wole dziku dom nam de edzia? Kpɔ ɖa, wotso hahlayɛ le dodom ɖe woƒe ŋɔti nu. 18Eyata nye hã mawo nu le dziku me, nye ŋku makpɔ nublanui o, eye nyemakpɔ wo ta o; eye me wodo ɣli ɖe to me nam sesĩe hã la, nyemasee na wo o.

Title: XEZEKIEL 9
Content:
Aʋasisi le Yerusalem, wokpɔ mawuvɔ̃lawo ta.
1Emegbe wòdo ɣli ɖe to me nam sesĩe gblɔ bena: Mihe du la ƒe tohehe vɛ, eye amesiame nele eƒe amewunu de asi! 2Tete ŋutsu ade to dzigbegbo, si ɖo ta anyiehe la ƒe mɔ va, wo dome amesiame lé ametsrɔ̃nu ɖe asi, eye ŋutsua ɖe le dome na wo, amesi ta aklala, eye agbalẽŋlɔnu le aklito nɛ. Eye wova he tsi tre ɖe akɔblivɔsamlekpui la xa. 3Eye Israel ƒe Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe la ho tso Kerubiawo ta me, afisi wònɔ tsã la, heyi ɖe xɔ la ƒe kpui nu. Tete wòyɔ ŋutsu, si ta aklala, eye agbalẽŋlɔnu le aklito nɛ la. 4Eye Yehowa gblɔ ne bena: Yi naɖatsa le Yerusalem dua me, eye made dzesi ŋgonu na amesiwo le hũ ɖem, eye wole nu xam ɖe ŋunyɔnu, siwo katã wole wɔwɔm le eme ŋuti la. 5Ke egblɔ na ame kemeawo mese bena: Minɔ eyome miatsa le dua me, eye mida nu ame! Miaƒe ŋku megakpɔ nublanui o, eye migakpɔ ame ta o. 6Miwu amegã ɖeɖiwo, ɖekakpuiwo kple ɖetugbiwo, ɖeviwo kple nyɔnuwo, ne miatsrɔ̃ wo; ke migade asi amesiwo katã ŋu dzesi le la ŋuti o, eye midze egɔme tso nye kɔkɔeƒe la gbɔ! Tete wodze egɔme ɖe ame tsitsi, siwo le aƒea ŋgɔ la ŋu 7Eye wògblɔ na wo bena: Migblẽ kɔ ɖo na aƒe la, eye mitso ame kukuwo yɔ xɔxɔnu la taŋ! Miho yi! Tete woyi ɖawu amewo le dua me. 8Eye wòva me, esime wowu wo, eye nye ɖeka mekpɔtɔ la, metsyɔ mo anyi hedo ɣli gblɔ bena: Ao, Aƒetɔ Yehowa, Israel ƒe ame susɔeawo katãe nèbe, yeatsrɔ̃, esi nètrɔ̃ wò dziku ƒo ɖe Yerusalem dzia? 9Tete wòɖo ŋu nam bena: Israel ƒe aƒe kple Yuda ƒe vodada sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ, hlɔ̃dodo yɔ anyigba dzi, eye nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔwɔ le dua me fũ; elabena wole gbɔgblɔm be: Yehowa gblẽ anyigba la ɖi, Yehowa mele mía kpɔm o. 10Eyata nye hã nye ŋku makpɔ nublanui o, eye nyemakpɔ wo la o, ke boŋ mahe woƒe zɔzɔme ava woƒe ta dzi. 11Eye kpɔ ɖa, ŋutsu, si ta aklala, eye agbalẽŋlɔnu le aklito nɛ la, trɔ gbɔ gblɔ bena: Mewo, abe alesi nède se nam ene.

Title: XEZEKIEL 10
Content:
Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe le Kerubiwo dzi.
1Eye meɖo ŋku anyi, kpɔ ɖa, nane ɖi fiazikpui do ɖe dziŋgɔli, si le Kerubiawo ta me la dzi le dzedzem abe gbloti ene. 2Eye wògblɔ na ŋutsu, si ta aklala bena: Yi ɖe tasiaɖam, siwo le Kerubiawo gome la domee, eye naku dzo asiʋlo ɖeka le Kerubiawo domee akɔ ɖe dua dzi! Eye wòyi mekpɔ. 3Kerubiawo le tsitre ɖe xɔ la ƒe ɖusi me gome, esime ŋutsu la yi, eye alilikpo yɔ xɔxɔnu metɔ fũ. 4Tete Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ho dzo le Kerubiawo dzi yi xɔ la ƒe kpui nu, eye alilikpo yɔ xɔ la taŋ, eye Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe ƒe keklẽ yɔ xɔxɔnu la fũ. 5Eye wose Kerubiawo ƒe aʋala ƒe ɖiɖi le xɔxɔnu kɔtoetɔ ke abe Mawu ŋusẽkatãtɔ la ƒe gbe, ne ele nu ƒom ene. 6Eye esi wòde se na ŋutsu, si ta aklala, gblɔ bena: yi nade dzo le tasiaɖamfɔawo me le Kerubiawo domee la, eyi ɖatsi tre ɖe tasiaɖamfɔ ɖeka xa. 7Tete Kerubia ɖo asi ɖe Kerubiawo domee heɖe dzo, si le Kerubiawo dome la, de asi na ŋutsu, si ta aklala la, eye wòxɔe hedzo. 8Nane dze le Kerubiawo ŋu abe amegbetɔ ƒe asi ene le woƒe aʋalawo te. 9Eye meɖo ŋku anyi, kpo ɖa, tasiaɖamfɔ ene le Kerubiawo xa, tasiaɖamfɔ ɖeka le Kerubi ɖeka xa, eye tasiaɖamfɔ ɖeka le Kerubi bubu xa; tasiaɖamfɔawo le dzedzem abe adzagba ene. 10Nɔnɔme ɖeka li na wo ame eneawo katã, eye wòle abe ɖe tasiaɖamfɔ ɖeka le bubu me ene. 11Ne wole yiyim la, wozɔna ɖe woƒe axa eneawo dzi, eye wometrɔna, ne wole azɔli dzi o, elabena afisi ŋgɔgbetɔ ɖo tae la, afima wokplɔnɛ ɖo yina, eye wometrɔna, ne wole azɔli dzi o. 12Ŋkuwo yɔ woƒe ƒodo blibo la kple woƒe megbe, woƒe asiwo kple woƒe aʋalawo kpakple woƒe tasiaɖamfɔ eneawo katã ŋu godoo va kpe. 13Woyɔ tasiaɖamfɔawo be „yali“ mese. 14Mo ene li na wo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe; mo gbãtɔ nye Kerubi ƒe mo, mo evelia nye amegbetɔ ƒe mo, etɔ̃lia nye dzata ƒe mo, eye enelia nye hɔ̃ ƒe mo. 15Eye Kerubiawo ka wo ɖokui dzi; woawoe nye nu gbagbe, siwo mekpe le Kebar-tɔsisi la nu. 16Ne Kerubiawo le yiyim la, tasiaɖamfɔawo nɔa zɔzɔm le wo xa, eye ne Kerubiawo ƒo aʋala, be wòakɔ wo ɖokui dzi tso anyigba la, tasiaɖamfɔawo metena ɖa le wo xa o; 17ne wotɔ la, woawo hã tɔna, eye ne wokɔ wo ɖokui dzi la, woawo hã kɔa wo ɖokui dzi, elabena nu gbagbeawo ƒe gbɔgbɔ le wo me. 18Eye Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe dzo le xɔ la ƒe kpui nu yi ɖanɔ Kerubiawo ta me. 19Tete Kerubiawo ƒo aʋala hekɔ wo ɖokui dzi tso anyigba le ŋkunye me; esi woho la, tasiaɖamfɔawo hã kpe ɖe wo ŋu, eye wova tɔ ɖe Yehowa ƒe aƒe ƒe agbo nu le ɣedzeƒe gome, eye Israel ƒe Mawu ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe la le wo ta me. 20Woawo nye nu gbagbe, siwo mekpɔ le Israel ƒe Mawu la gɔme le Kebar-tɔsisi la nu; azɔ medze sii be, Kerubiwo wonye. 21Ɖesiaɖe to mo ene, aʋala ene li na ɖesiaɖe, eye nane ɖi amegbetɔ ƒe asi le woƒe aʋalawo te. 22Woƒe mowo ƒe nɔnɔme enye mo, siwo mekpɔ le Kebar-tɔsisi la nu; wo dome ɖesiaɖe ɖoa ta eŋgɔ tẽ.

Title: XEZEKIEL 11
Content:
Wohe to na Yuda ƒo amegãwo, eye wofa akɔ na aboyo me nɔlawo.
1Tete gbɔgbɔ la kɔm yi Yehowa ƒe aƒe ƒe ɣedzeƒe-gbo, si ɖo ta ɣedzeƒe gome la nu; kpɔ ɖa, ŋutsu blave vɔ atɔ̃ le agbo la nu, eye mekpɔ Yaazanya, Azur vi, kple Pelatya, Benaya vi, amesiwo nye dukɔ la ƒe amegãwo le wo dome. 2Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Amevi, ŋutsu siawo nye amesiwo le tame gbegblẽ ɖom, eye wole adaŋu vɔ̃ɖi ɖem le du sia me, 3woawoe le gbɔgblɔm be: Xɔtutu gbɔ metsɔ o; du la nye kutu, eye míawoe nye lã. 4Eyata gblɔ nya ɖi ɖe wo ŋu, amevi, gblɔ nya ɖi! 5Tete Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ va dzinye, eye wògblɔ nam bena: Gblɔ be: Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Israel ƒe aƒe, ale mieƒo nu enye si, eye nusi do tso dzi me na mi la, menyae. 6Miedzi miaƒe ame kukuwo ɖe dzi le du sia me, eye mietsɔ ame kukuwo yɔ eƒe kpɔdomee taŋ. 7Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Miaƒe ame kuku, siwo mietsɔ da ɖe dua me la, woawoe nye lã, eye eyamae nye kutu; ke miawo la, woakplɔ mi adzoe le eme. 8Yi vɔ̃m miele, ke yie mahe va mia dzi, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe! 9Makplɔ mi adzoe le eme, matsɔ mi ade asi na ame tutɔwo, eye madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu mi. 10Míatsi yi nu, eye madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu mi le Israel ƒe liƒo dzi, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. 11Dua manye kutu na mi, eye miawo mianye lã anɔ eme o, ke boŋ madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu mi le Israel ƒe liƒo dzi, 12ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa; elabena miezɔ ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu o, eye miewɔ nu ɖe nye sewo nu o, ke boŋ miewɔ nu ɖe dukɔ, siwo ƒo xlã mi godoo la ƒe sewo nu. 13Eye wòva me, esi mele nya gblɔm ɖi la, kasia Pelatya, Benaya vi la ku; tete matsyɔ mo anyi hedo ɣli sesĩe gblɔ bena: Alele, Aƒetɔ Yehowa, Israel ƒe ame mamleawo nèbe, yeatsrɔ̃a?
14Tete Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 15Amevi, nɔviwòwo, nɔviwò aboyomeawo kple Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la, wonye amesiwo ŋu Yerusalemtɔwo le gbɔgblɔm le be: Woamawo le adzɔge tso Yehowa gbɔ, míawoe wotsɔ anyigba la na, be wòanye mía tɔ. 16Eyata gblɔ be: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Meɖo mi ɖe dukɔwo dome ʋĩ, eye mekaka mi ɖe anyigbawo dzi, eye menye kɔkɔeƒe na mi vie le anyigba, siwo dzi mieyi. 17Eyata gblɔ be: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Maƒo mia nu ƒu tso dukɔwo dome, eye maƒo mia nu ƒu tso anyigba, siwo dzi miekaka ɖo la dzi ahatsɔ Israel-nyigba na mi. 18Woayi afima, eye woaɖe eƒe legbawo katã kple eƒe ŋunyɔnuwo katã ɖa le edzi. 19Mana dzi bubu wo, eye maɖe gbɔgbɔ yeye wo me, maɖe kpedzi le dɔ me na wo, eye mana lãkusidzi wo, 20ne woazɔ ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu, eye woalé nye sewo me ɖe asi ahawɔ wo dzi, woanye dukɔ nam, eye manye Mawu na wo. 21Ke amesiwo ƒe dzi dze woƒe legbawo kple woƒe ŋunyɔnuwo yome la, mahe woƒe zɔzɔme ava woƒe ta dzi, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe!
22Tete Kerubiawo ƒo aʋala, eye tasiaɖamfɔawo kpe ɖe wo ŋu, eye Israel ƒe Mawu la ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe le wo ta me. 23Eye Yehowa ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe kɔ eɖokui dzi tso dua me heva no to, si le dua ƒe ɣedzeƒe la dzi. 24Eye gbɔgbɔ la kɔm le ŋutega me ɖada ɖe aboyomeawo gbɔ le Kaldea-nyigba dzi to Mawu ƒe gbɔgbɔ la me, eye ŋutega, si mekpɔ la, dzo le gbɔnye. 25Eye megblɔ Yehowa ƒe nya, siwo katã wòɖe fiãm la, na aboyomeawo.

Title: XEZEKIEL 12
Content:
Alesi woakplɔ ba la ayi la ƒe kpɔdeŋu, kple alesi nyagblɔɖi sia ava me kaba.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, ƒome sẽto me nele, amesiwo ŋku li na, ne woatsɔ akpɔ nui, ke womekpɔa nu o, eye to li na wo, ne woatsɔ ase nui, ke womesea nu o, elabena ƒome sẽto wonye. 3Wò amevi, do mɔzɔgba, eye nadze mɔ le ŋkeke me le wo ŋku me, dze mɔ tso nɔwòƒe yi teƒe bubu le wo ŋku me, ɖewohĩ woakpɔe bena, ƒome sẽto yewonye. 4Tsɔ wò agba la do goe le ŋkeke me abe mɔzɔgba ene, ne woakpɔ, eye nadze mɔ le wo ŋku me le fiẽ, abe alesi aboyomewo dzea mɔe ene. 5Ŋɔ gli le wo ŋku me, eye nato eme ado ɖe egodo. 6Kɔe ɖo abɔta le wo ŋku me, eye ne blukɔ do la, natsɔe adzoe; tsyɔ nu ŋku me, be magakpɔ anyigba la o; elabena ɖe metsɔ wò ɖo dzesi na Israel ƒe aƒe la. 7Eye mewɔ, abe alesi wode se nam ene: Metsɔ nye agba la do goe le ŋkeke me abe mɔzɔgba ene, eye metsɔ asi ŋɔ gli la le fiẽ; esi blukɔ do la, metsɔe dzoe, eye mekɔe ɖo abɔta le wo ŋku me.
8Esi ŋu ke la, Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 9Amevi, ɖe Israel ƒe aƒe, ƒome sẽto la, megblɔ na wò be: Nuka wɔm nele hã oa? 10Gblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Amegã, si le Yerusalem, kple Israel ƒe aƒe blibo, si le eme la tɔe nye nya sia. 11Gblɔ bena: Dzesi menye na mi, alesi mewɔ la, nenema ava me na woe: Woakplɔ woamawo adzoe, eye woayi aboyo me. 12Amegã, si le wo dome la, alé agba ɖe abɔta adzo le blukɔ me, woaŋɔ gli, ne wòato eme adzo, eye atsyɔ nu ŋku me, le esi wòbe, yemele anyigba la kpɔ ge kple ŋku o ta. 13Maɖo ɖɔ nɛ, eye nye mɔ̃ aɖee, makplɔe ayi Babel le Kaldeatɔwo ƒe anyigba dzi, ke makpɔe o, eye afima wòaku ɖo. 14Eye makaka eƒe xɔnametɔ, siwo katã ƒo xlãe godoo, kple eƒe aʋakɔwo katã ahlẽ ɖe yawo katã nu, eye maɖi yi anɔ wo yome. 15Eye ne mekaka wo ɖe dukɔwo dome, eye mehlẽ wo ɖe anyigbawo dzi la, wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. 16Ke makpɔtɔ woƒe ame ʋeea ɖewo ɖi tso yi, dɔwuame kple dɔvɔ̃ si me, ne woaxlẽ woƒe ŋunyɔnuwɔwɔwo katã afia le dukɔwo dome, afisi woayi, ne woawo nadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.
17Tete Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam be: 18Amevi, nɔ ƒoƒom kpakpakpa naɖu wò abolo, eye nano wò tsi le dzodzo nyanyanya kple ŋɔdzi me. 19Eye nagblɔ na dukɔ hahoo la bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ ɖe Yerusalemtɔ, siwo le Israel-nyigba dzi la ŋu enye si: Woaɖu woƒe abolo kple vɔvɔ̃, eye woano woƒe tsi le ŋɔdzi me, elabena woƒe anyigba azu gbegbe, eye woaɖe edzi nuwo katã ɖa le edzinɔlawo katã ƒe nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔwɔ ta. 20Du, siwo me ame le la, azu aƒedo, eye anyigba la azu gbegbe, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.
21Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam be: 22Amevi, nya ka ƒomevi enye ekem gblɔm miele le Israel-nyigba dzi be, ɣeyiɣiawo gbɔ metsɔ o, eye ŋutegawo katã nu tso? 23Eyata gblɔ na wo be: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Matsi nya siawo tɔgbe nu, eye womagagblɔe le Israel azɔ o, ke boŋ gblɔ na wo bena: ɣeyiɣi la kple ŋutegawo katã ƒe nyawo tu aƒe. 24Elabena ŋutega dzodzroa ɖeke kple alakpanyagblɔɖi maganɔ Israel ƒe aƒe la me azɔ o. 25Elabena Yehowa menye, nya, si gblɔm mele la, ava me, eye manɔ anyi eteƒe nadidi o; mi ƒome sẽto, mia ŋɔlie mawɔ nya, si mele gbɔgblɔm la dzi, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 26Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam be: 27Amevi, kpɔ ɖa, Israel ƒe aƒe la le gbɔgblɔm be: Ŋkeke nanewo ŋue wòle ŋutega kpɔm ɖo, eye gbaɖegbe ŋue wòle nya gblɔm ɖi ɖo. 28Eyata gblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Nye nyawo katã maganɔ anyi eteƒe nadidi o. Nya, si megblɔ la, ava me, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: XEZEKIEL 13
Content:
Nyagblɔɖi le aʋatsonyagblɔɖilawo ŋuti.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, gblɔ nya ɖi ɖe Israel ƒe nyagblɔɖilawo, amesiwo le nya gblɔm ɖi la ŋu, eye nagblɔ na amesiwo le nya gblɔm ɖi tso woawo ŋutɔ ƒe dzi me la bena: Mise Yehowa ƒe nya! 3Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Baba na nyagblɔɖila tsibomewo, amesiwo dze woawo ŋutɔ ƒe dzi kple nusi womekpɔ o la yome! 4Israel, wò nyagblɔɖilawo zu abe abeiwo le glikpowo me ene. 5Miexe gbagbãƒewo o, eye mieɖo gli ɖe Israel ƒe aƒe la ŋu, ne wòanɔ te ɖe aʋa nu le Yehowa ƒe ŋkeke la dzi o. 6Nu dzodzroa kpɔm wole, eye alakpanya gblɔm wole ɖi; wo, amesiwo le gbɔgblɔm be: „Yehowa ƒe gbe enye si,“ evɔ wònye Yehowa medɔ wo o hafi, eye wole mɔ kpɔm be, nya la ava me. 7Ɖe menye ŋutega dzodzroa míekpɔ, eye miegblɔ alakpanya ɖi le gbɔgblɔm be; „Yehowa ƒe gbe enye si,“ evɔ wònye nyemeƒo nu hafi o oa? 8Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi mieƒo nu dzodzroa, eye miekpɔ alakpanu la, eyata maƒo ɖe mia dzi, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 9Nye asi ava nyagblɔɖila, siwo kpɔa nu dzodzroa, eye wogblɔa alakpanya ɖi la dzi: womanɔ nye dukɔ ƒe ha me o, womaŋlɔ wo ɖe Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe agbalẽ me o, eye womade Israel-nyigba dzi o, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Aƒetɔ Yehowa. 10Elabena wokplɔ nye dukɔ la trae hele gbɔgblɔm be „ŋutifafa“, evɔ wònye ŋutifafaa ɖeke meli o hafi. Dukɔ la ɖo gli, eye woawo si akalo nɛ. 11Gblɔ na akalosilaawo be: Tsidzadza gbɔna hahaha, tsikpewo adza, eye ahom atu, 12eye gli la amũ! Ɖe womegblɔ na mi emegbe be: Afika akalo, si miesi la, le hã oa? 13Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mana ahom natu le nye dziku me, tsi nadza bababa le nye dɔmedzoe me, eye tsikpewo nadza le nye dziku me, ne woagblẽ nu. 14Mamũ gli, si miesi akalo na la, eye matutui aƒu anyi, ale be eƒe agunu natsi go; amũ, eye miawo miaku ɖe ete, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. 15Matrɔ nye dziku blibo la aƒo ɖe gli la kple amesiwo si akalo nɛ la dzi ahagblɔ na mi be: Glia nu yi, eye amesiwo si akalo nɛ la nu yi, 16woawo nye Israel ƒe nyagblɔɖilawo, amesiwo gblɔ nya ɖi ɖe Yerusalem ŋu, eye wokpɔ ŋutifafa ŋutega nɛ, evɔ wònye ŋutifafa meli o hafi, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe! 17Wò amevi, trɔ ŋgɔ dze wò dukɔ ƒe nyɔnuvi, siwo le nya gblɔm ɖi tso woawo ŋutɔ ƒe dzi me, eye nagblɔ nya ɖi ɖe wo ŋu, 18gblɔ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Baba na amesiwo saa dzoka ɖe alɔnuwo katã, eye wowɔa tatsyɔnu ɖe tawo katã, ɖeviwo kple tsitsiawo tɔ ŋu, ne woatsɔ alé luʋɔwoe; wòlé nye dukɔ ƒe luʋɔ, be woawo ŋutɔ ƒe luʋɔ natsi agbe. 19Mieɖo gum le nye dukɔ la ŋku me le lu asiʋlo ɖeka kple abolo alɔgomedede ɖeka ta, be miawu luʋɔ, siwo medze ku o, eye miaxɔ luʋɔ, siwo dze ku la, ɖe agbe, esime mieka aʋatso na nye dukɔ, si lɔ̃a aʋatsonya sese la. 20Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, matso miaƒe dzoka, siwo mietsɔna ɖea luʋɔwoe abe xevi ene la, le miaƒe alɔnuwo, eye maxɔ luʋɔ, siwo mieɖe abe xevi ene la. 21Mavuvu miaƒe tatsyɔnuawo, eye maɖe nye dukɔ le mia si me, be maganye nuléle anɔ mia si me azɔ o, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. 22Esi mietsɔ alakpa do nuxaxa na ame dzɔdzɔe ƒe dzi, evɔ wònye nyemebe, mado nuxaxa nɛ hafi o, eye mieɖo ŋusẽ ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe asi, be magatrɔ tso eƒe mɔ vɔ̃wo dzi, ne woatsi agbe o la, 23eyata miagakpɔ nu dzodzroa azɔ o, eye miagagblɔ alakpanya ɖi azɔ o, eye maɖe nye dukɔ le mia si me, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.

Title: XEZEKIEL 14
Content:
Womeɖo legbasubɔlawo ƒe biabia gu na wo o.
1Eye ŋutsuwo tso Israel ƒe ame tsitsiwo dome va gbɔnye, eye wobɔbɔ nɔ ŋkunye me. 2Tete Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 3Amevi, ŋutsu siawo lé woƒe legbawo ɖe dzi me, eye wotsɔ woƒe vodadawo ƒe nukikliwo ɖo ŋku me, ɖe mana woabia gbema? 4Eyata ƒo nu kpli wo nagblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ne Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe ŋutsua ɖe lé eƒe legba ɖe dzi me, eye wòtsɔ eƒe vodada ƒe nukikli ɖo ŋku me heva nyagblɔɖila gbɔ la, nye Yehowa ŋutɔ maɖo eŋu ne, evɔ wònye eƒe legbawo sɔ gbɔ hafi; 5ne nye asi natu Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe dzi, wo amesiwo tso woƒe legbawo katã trɔ le yonyeme. 6Eyata gblɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe la bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mitrɔ, mitrɔ tso miaƒe legbawo yome, eye miɖe kɔ ɖa le miaƒe ŋunyɔnuwo katã ŋu! 7Elabena ne Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe amea ɖe, alo amedzro, siwo le Israel la dometɔa ɖe trɔ le yonyeme, elé eƒe legbawo ɖe dzi me, eye wotsɔ eƒe vodada ƒe nukikli ɖo ŋku me heva nyagblɔɖila gbɔ, ne woabia gbem nɛ la, nye Yehowa ŋutɔ maɖo ŋu nɛ. 8Matsɔ nye ŋku aɖo ŋutsu ma ŋu, eye matsɔe awɔ dzesi kple hamelo, eye matsrɔ̃e ɖa le nye dukɔ la dome, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. 9Ke ne woflu nyagblɔɖila ɖe wòƒo nu la, nye Yehowa ye flu nyagblɔɖila ma, eye mado nye asi ɖa ɖe eŋu ahatsrɔ̃e ɖa le nye dukɔ Israel dome. 10Eye woatsɔ woawo ŋutɔ ƒe vodada: alesi gbebiala ƒe vodada le la, nenema nyagblɔɖila hã ƒe vodada anɔ; 11ne Israel ƒe aƒe la magatra le ŋunye, eye woatsɔ woƒe dzidadawo katã agblẽ kɔ ɖo na wo ɖokui azɔ o, ke boŋ woanye nye dukɔ, eye manye woƒe Mawu, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe.
Womagahe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ Yerusalem ɖe megbe le mawuvɔ̃lawo ƒe kukuɖeɖe ɖe eta trɔ hã ŋuti o.
12Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 13Amevi, ne anyigbae ete wo nuvɔ̃ ele ŋunye hetrɔ ʋu le yonyeme, eye medo nye asi ɖa ɖe eŋu heŋe abolo ƒe ziɔdeŋu, eye meɖo dɔwuame ɖe afima, be matsrɔ̃ amegbetɔwo kple lãwo le edzi, 14eye ŋutsu etɔ siawo: Noa, Daniel kple Hiob le edzi la, woaɖe woƒe agbe le woƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ta, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 15Ne meɖo lã wɔadãwo ɖe anyigba dzi, be woaɖe ame le edzi, eye woazu gbegbe, be amea ɖeke magato edzi ayi o le lãwo ta, 16eye ŋutsu etɔ̃ siawo le edzi la, Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Womaɖe ŋutsuvi alo nyɔnuvi o, negbe woawo ɖeɖe ko woaɖe, eye anyigba la azu gbegbe. 17Alo ne meɖo yi ɖe anyigba ma dzi hegblɔ be: Vi, to anyigba dzi yi, eye mebe, matsrɔ̃ amegbetɔwo kple lãwo le edzi, 18eye ŋutsu etɔ̃ siawo le edzi la, Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Womaɖe ŋutsuvi alo nyɔnuvi o, negbe woawo ɖeɖe ko woaɖe. 19Alo ne meɖo dɔvɔ̃ ɖe anyigba ma dzi, eye nye dziku zu ʋu metrɔ kɔ ɖe edzi, be matsrɔ̃ amegbetɔwo kple lãwo le edzi, 20eye Noa, Daniel kple Hiob le edzi la. Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Womaɖe ŋutsuvi alo nyɔnuvia ɖeke o, negbe woawo ŋutɔ ƒe agbe ko woaɖe le woƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ta. 21Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ke ne meɖo yi, dɔwuame, lã wɔadã kple dɔvɔ̃, siwo nye nye tohenu vɔ̃ɖi eneawo ɖa ɖe Yerusalem ŋu, be matsrɔ̃ amegbetɔwo kple lãwo le eme la, 22kpɔ ɖa, ŋutsuviwo kple nyɔnuviwo, siwo tsi agbe la, akpɔtɔ ɖe eme, eye woakplɔ wo adzoe; woava mia gbɔ, eye ne miekpɔ woƒe zɔzɔme kple woƒe nuwɔna la, miafa akɔ na mia ɖokui le dzɔgbevɔ̃e, si mehe va Yerusalem dzi, kple nusiwo katã mena wova edzi la ŋuti. 23Eye woata akɔ na mi, nenye be, miekpɔ woƒe zɔzɔme kple woƒe nuwɔnawo, eye miadze sii be, menye dzodzroe mewɔ nusiawo katã ɖe eŋu ɖo o, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: XEZEKIEL 15
Content:
Weinka ƒe nake viɖe manɔŋu la.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam be: 2Amevi, nukae nye weinka ƒe nake le nake bubuwo katã dome, eye nukae nye weinka le avemetiwo dome? 3Ɖe woatsɔ eƒe ati awɔ naneea, eye ɖe woatsɔe awɔ tsyoti aku nu ɖe eŋua? 4Kpɔ ɖa, wotsɔe na dzo, be wòafiã. Ne dzo fiã eƒe goawo kple eve, eye dzo ƒo domedomee nɛ la, ɖe wògale nane wowɔ mea? 5Kpɔ ɖa, esi wògale blibo la, mele naneke wɔwɔ me o, azɔ esi dzo fiãe, eye wòƒo dzo la, ɖe wòayi nane wɔwɔ me nɔ gea? 6Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Alesi metsɔ weinka ƒe nake de asi na dzo, be wòafiã le avemetiwo dome la, nenema ke mawɔ Yerusalemtɔwoe. 7Matrɔ nye mo ɖe wo ŋu: dzo nu wòsi le, dzo ke afiã wo, eye miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa, nenye be, metrɔ nye mo ɖe wo ŋu. 8Eye mado gbegbe woƒe anyigba, le esi wotrɔ ʋu le yonyeme ta, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe.

Title: XEZEKIEL 16
Content:
Yerusalem ƒe anukwaretɔ manyemanye, tohehe nɛ kple exɔxɔ.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va gbɔnye bena: 2Amevi, ɖe Yerusalem ƒe ŋunyɔnuwo katã fiae. 3Eye gblɔ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ na Yerusalem enye si: Wò dzɔƒe kple dziwòƒe enye Kanaan-nyigba; Amoritɔe nye fofowò, eye Xititɔe nye dawo. 4Gbesigbe wodzi wò la, wometso ƒoƒolika na wò o, eye womele tsi na wò, be ŋuwò nadza o, womesi dze na wò o, eye wometsɔ wò mlɔ tsihe dzi o. 5Ŋkua ɖeke mekpɔ nublanui na wò, ne woawɔ nusiawo dometɔa ɖeke na wò ahakpɔ tawò o, ke boŋ wotsɔ wò ƒu gbe ɖe gbe me, eye wonyɔ ŋu wò agbe le gbesigbe wodzi wò. 6Tete meva to ŋuwò yi, eye mekpɔ wò nèle afɔti dam le wò ʋu me. Eye megblɔ na wò le wò ʋu me be: Atsi agbe! Wò ʋu mee nèle megblɔ na wò be: Atsi agbe! 7Eye mana nasɔ gbɔ abe gbe le gbe me ene! Etsi heka ta, eye neɖo ɖetugbi atiati me; ète no, eye wò ɖa to; ke ènɔ amama heno ƒeƒle. 8Tete meva to ŋuwò yi, eye mekpɔ be, wò srɔ̃ɖeɣi ɖo; mekeke nye aʋala ɖe dziwò, eye metsyɔ nu wò ama, meka atam na wò, eye mebia nu kpli wò nèzu tɔnye; Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 9Mele tsi na wò, meklɔ nu le ŋuwò, eye mesi ami na wò; 10meta avɔ ŋɔŋɔe na wò, eye meɖo lãgbalẽ nyuitɔ ƒe atokota na wò, metsɔ aklala bla ta na wò, eye metsɔ seda wɔ taɖedzi na wò; 11meɖo atsyɔ̃ na wò, meɖe abɔgɛ abɔ na wò, eye mede kɔgɛ kɔ na wò; 12mede ŋɔtigɛ ŋɔti na wò, kple togɛ to na wò, eye metsɔ sikatsyɔnu nyui ɖɔ ɖe ta na wò. 13Edo sika kple klosalo, wò avɔtata nye aklala, seda kple avɔ ŋɔŋɔe, eye wò nuɖuɖu nye wɔ memee, anyitsi kple ami; ale nèdze tugbe eteƒe mekɔ o, eye fiaɖuƒe su asiwò. 14Eye wò ŋkɔ nyɔ le dukɔwo dome le wò tugbedzedze ta, elabena nye atsyɔ̃, si meɖo na wò la, gbɔgblɔ mele eŋu o, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe.
15Ke eɖo dzi ɖe wò tugbedzedze ŋu, eye esi wò ŋkɔ nya ŋuti la, ètsɔ wò gbolowɔwɔ do dzodzoe ɖe amesiame, si va tso me yi la ŋu wòzu etɔ. 16Etsɔ wò avɔwo dometɔa ɖewo wɔ nuxeƒe ŋɔŋɔewoe, eye nèwɔ gbolo le afima, nusi tɔgbe meva eme kpɔ o, eye mele eme va ge akpɔ o. 17Etsɔ nye sika kple nye klosalo ƒe atsyɔ̃nu, siwo metsɔ na wò la, wɔ ŋutsu ƒe nɔnɔmewo, eye nèwɔ gbolo kple wo. 18Etsɔ nye avɔ ŋɔŋɔewo tsyɔ na wo, eye nètsɔ nye ami kple nye dzudzɔʋeʋẽedonu ɖo wo kɔme. 19Eye nusi metsɔ na wò, be naɖu, wɔ memee, ami kple anyitsi la, woawo netsɔ ɖo wo kɔme, ne wòaʋẽ ɖe wo lilili; alea nèwɔ, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe! 20Elé wò ŋutsuvi kple wò nyɔnuvi, siwo nèdzi nam la, hewu na wo, be woaɖu. De wò gbolowɔwɔ mesɔ gbɔ o, 21hafi nègawu vinyeŋutsuwo hetɔ dzoea? 22Le wò ŋunyɔnuwo katã kple wò gbolowɔwɔwo me la mèɖo ŋu wò ɖevimenɔɣi, esime nèɖe ama le ƒeƒle hele afɔti dam le wò ʋu me la o. 23Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Baba na wò, baba na wò! Le wò nu vɔ̃ɖiwo katã wɔwɔ megbe la 24ètu trɔ̃xɔwo na ɖokuiwò, eye nèwɔ nuxeƒewo ɖe kpɔdomeewo katã; 25èwɔ nuxeƒewo ɖe kpɔdomeewo ƒe dzogoewo katã dzi, eye nedo ŋunyɔ wò tugbedzedze; èke ata na amesiwo katã va yina, eye nena wò gbolowɔwɔ sɔ gbɔ ɖe edzi. 26Ewo gbolo kple wò aƒelika Egipte-viwo, amesiwo ŋutsu lekpẽ li na, eye nena wò gbolowɔwɔ sɔ gbɔ ɖe edzi, ne natsɔ ado dziku nam. 27Kpɔ ɖa, mado nye asi ɖa ɖe ŋuwò, eye maka ɖe le wò gome ŋu, eye matso wò ade asi na wò futɔwo, Filistitɔwo ƒe nyɔnuviwo ƒe nyanyrã, amesiwo wò ŋukpenanuwɔwɔwo le ŋu kpem na. 28Ewo gbolo kple Asur-viwo, le esi nu metia ko na wò o ta; ewo gbolo kpli wo, ke nu meti ko na wò o. 29Eye nègawɔ gbolo ɖe dzi kple Kaldea, si nye asitsalawo ƒe anyigba; ke eya hã meli ko na wò o. 30Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Nu te wò dzi ŋu, esi nèwɔ nusiawo katã, abe alesi gbolo ŋukpenanuwɔla wona ene; 31esi nètu trɔ̃xɔwo ɖe kpɔdomeewo ƒe dzogoewo katã dzi, eye nèwɔ nuxeƒewo ɖe ablowo katã me. Ke wòa mèle abe gbolo bubuwo ene, ne nahayi vlo ɖo ge gbolohoa ɖeke o. 32Nyɔnu ahasitɔ, si ɖe ŋutsu bubu ɖe srɔ̃a te, nènye! 33Gbolo bubuwo katã la, ɖe wonaa nu wo, ke wòa èna nu wò ahiãviwo katã; ɖe nèna nu wo, be woatso goawo katã me avawo amatre kpli wò. 34Towo to vovo le wò gbolowɔwɔ me tso nyɔnu bubuwo tɔ gbɔ, womedi ahiã wò o, eye wòa nèxe fe ɖe eta, evɔ wònye wòe woaxe fe na hafi; ale tɔwò to vovo sã.
35Eyata, wò gbolo, se Yehowa ƒe nya! 36Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi nètso wò gbolowɔwɔ kple wò ahiãviwo kpakple wò legba nyɔŋuawo katã, siwo nètso viwòwo ƒe ʋu na la, hewɔ be, wò ŋukpe gbagba ƒo ɖi, eye wò ama dze la, 37eyata maƒo wò ahiãviwo katã nu ƒu, esiwo ƒe nu dze ŋuwò kple esiwo katã nèlɔ̃na kpakple esiwo katã nèlé fui, maƒo wo nu ƒu ɖe ŋuwò tso goawo katã me, eye maɖe ama wò, ne woakpɔ wò ama blibo la. 38Madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò ɖe gbolowo kple nyɔnu hlɔ̃dolawo ƒe se nu, eye mahe dziku kple ŋuʋaʋã ƒe ʋu ava dziwò. 39Matso wò ade asi na wo, eye woagbã wò trɔ̃xɔwo ahamũ wò nuxeƒewo aƒu anyi, woaɖe ava le ŋuwò, eye woaxɔ wò atsyɔ̃nuawo ahagblẽ wò ɖi natsi ama anɔ ƒeƒle. 40Woayɔ amehawo ɖe ŋuwò, eye woaxlã kpe ɖe wò ahadza wò kple woƒe yiwo. 41Woata dzo wò xɔwo, eye woahe to na wò le nyɔnu geɖewo ŋku me; matsi wò gbolowɔwɔ nu, eye magaxe gboloho azɔ o. 42Mana nye dziku nu nafa ɖe ŋuwò, be nye ŋuʋaʋã nadzo le ŋuwò, eye magbɔ ɖe eme, nyemagado dɔmedzoe azɔ o. 43Esi meɖo ŋu wò ɖevimenɔɣi o, ke boŋ nètsɔ nusiawo katã do dziku nam ŋuti la, eyata kpɔ ɖa, mahe wò zɔzɔme ava wò ta dzi, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe: Ɖe mèhewɔ ŋukpenanu sia kpe ɖe wò ŋunyɔnuwo katã ŋu o ɖe!
44Kpɔ ɖa, ne amesiame be, yeado hamelo la, adoe ɖe ŋuwò bena: „Alesi dada le la, nenema vianyɔnu nɔna.“ 45Dawò vinyɔnu kpamkpam nenye, eya amesi gbe srɔ̃a kple viawo; eye nɔvinyɔnu kpamkpam nènye na nɔviwònyɔnuwo, amesiwo gbe wo srɔ̃wo kple wo viwo; Xititɔe nye mia dada, eye Amoritɔe nye mia fofo. 46Dawòe nye Samaria hekpe ɖe vianyɔnu, siwo le wò mia me la ŋu, eye wò tsɛ nye Sodom hekpe ɖe vianyɔnu, siwo le wò ɖusi me la ŋu. 47Ɣeyiɣi kpuia ɖe ko mèzɔ woƒe mowo dzi o, eye mewɔ nu ɖe woƒe ŋunyɔnuwo nu o; tete nèwɔ nu le wò mowo katã dzi wòvloe wu wo to. 48Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Meta ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Ne nɔviwònyɔnu Sodom kple vianyɔnuwo hewɔ, abe alesi mia kple viwònyɔnuwo miewɔ ene fi! 49Kpɔ ɖa, nɔviwònyɔnu Sodom ƒe vodada enye: Dàda kple nuɖuɖu fũ, eye eya kple nɔvianyɔnuwo nɔ agbe vivi bɔkɔɔ; ke mekpe ɖe ame dahewo kple hiãtɔwo ŋu o. 50Woda, eye wowɔ ŋunyɔnu le ŋkunye me, eye esi mekpɔe ko la, meɖe wo ɖa. 51Samaria mewɔ wò nuvɔ̃wo ƒe afã o, eye ewo ŋunyɔnu wui; ale nètsɔ wò ŋunyɔnu, siwo katã nèwɔ la, tso afia na nɔviwònyɔnuwo. 52Eyata wò hã ŋukpe nenɔ dziwò, le esi nexɔ nya ɖe nɔviwònyɔnuwo ta ŋuti, etso wò nuvɔ̃ nyɔŋu, siwo newɔ wu wo la, na be, wo to dzo wu towo. Eyata ŋu nekpe wò, eye wò ŋukpe nenɔ dziwò, le esi nètso afia na nɔviwònyɔnuwo ta.
53Magaɖo wo te, maɖo Sodom kple vianyɔnuwo te kple Samaria kpakple vianyɔnuwo te, eye maɖo wò hã te le wo dome, 54ne wò ŋukpe nanɔ dziwò, eye ŋu nakpe wò le nusiwo katã nèwɔ hetsɔ fa akɔ na wo la ta. 55Nɔviwònyɔnu Sodom kple vianyɔnuwo agaɖo woƒe nɔnɔme tsãtɔ me, Samaria kple vianyɔnuwo agaɖo woƒe nɔnɔme tsãtɔ me, eye mia kple viwònyɔnuwo miagaɖo miaƒe nɔnɔme tsãtɔ me. 56Ɖe nɔviwònyɔnu Sodom ƒe ŋɔdzinya menɔ nuwò me le wò dadaɣi, 57hafi ne woava klo nu le wò vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ dzi, abe alesi nezu vlodonu na Aram-nyɔnuviwo kple Filistitowo ƒe nyɔnuviwo, amesiwo ƒo xlã wò godoo, eye wole alɔme ɖem le ŋuwò le goawo katã me la ene oa? 58Wò ŋukpenanuwɔwɔwo kple wò ŋunyɔnuwo anɔ dziwò, Yehowa ye gblɔe! 59Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi nèdo vlo atam la, eye netu nubabla la, eye mewɔ na wò, abe alesi nèwɔ ene hã la, 60maɖo ŋu nye nu, si mebia kpli wò le wò ɖevimenɔɣi, eye mabia nu mavɔ kpli wò. 61Nenye be, ekplɔ nɔviwònyɔnuwo, esiwo nye xoxo na wò kple esiwo nye ɖevi na wò, eye metsɔ wo wɔ viwònyɔnuwoe, ke menye le wò nubabla la ta o la, ekema àɖo ŋu wò zɔzɔme, eye ŋu akpe wò. 62Mabia nu kpli wò, ne nadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa; 63ne naɖo ŋui, ŋukpe nalé wò, eye wò nu nade ga le ŋukpe ta, nenye be, metsɔ nusiwo katã nèwɔ la, ke wò, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: XEZEKIEL 17
Content:
Adzototo le Dawid ƒe aƒe la ŋuti.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, to adzo, eye nado lo na Israel ƒe aƒe la 3gblɔ bena Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Hɔ̃ gãa ɖe, si ƒe aʋalawo lolo, eƒe aʋalafuwo didi, eye wòto fu ŋɔŋɔe kpoyoo la, va Libanon dzi, eye wòŋe sederti ƒe domee dzoe. 4Èŋe woƒe alɔwo ƒe tametɔ hetsɔ yi nudzralawo ƒe anyigba dzi, eye wòtsɔe do ɖe asitsalawo ƒe du me. 5Eye wotsɔ anyigba dzi nukuwo dometɔ ɖeka ɖaƒã de agble me, eƒãe ɖe tɔ gãwo to abe amuti ene. 6Tete wòdze hezu weinka, si vu dranyi, eƒe zekpẽ mekɔ o, ne eƒe alɔwo nadzɔ ɖe eyama ŋu, eye eƒe kewo natsi ete. Ale wòzu weinka, eye wòɖe ka hevu alɔ. 7Eye hɔ̃ gã bubua ɖe li, eƒe aʋalawo lolo, eye wòto fu kpoyoo; eye kpɔ ɖa, weinka ma bi eƒe kewo ɖe eŋu, eye wòdidi eƒe alɔwo ɖe egbɔ tso kpo, si dzi wodoe ɖo la dzi, ne wòana tsii wòano, 8evɔ wònye agblewɔnu mee wodoe ɖo le tɔ gãwo to, be wòaɖe alɔ, atse ku, eye wòazu weinka nyui hafi. 9Gblɔ be: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ɖe wòadze edzia? De mava aho eƒe kewo, ne woaku, eƒe alɔ fẽwo naƒu, eye woatso eƒe tsetsewo oa? Menye ŋusẽ gã kple dukɔ geɖe wòle tsɔtsɔ ge ava ahoe kple ke o. 10Kpɔ ɖa, wodoe, ke de wòadze edzia? Ne ɣedzeƒeya be ɖe eme la, ɖe maku oa? Kpo, si dzi wòmie do la dzie wòaku ɖo.
11Tete Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 12Gblɔ na ƒome sẽto la bena: Miese nusia gɔmea? Gblɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa, Babel-fia va Yerusalem, eye wòkplɔ eƒe fia kple eƒe amegãwo yi eɖokui gbɔ le Babel. 13Eɖe ame ɖeka le fiaƒome la me, eye wòbia nu kplii heka atam nɛ, ke ekplɔ anyigba dzi bubumewo dzoe; 14ne fiaɖuƒe la natsi to, eye magafɔ eɖokui ɖe dzi o, be wòawɔ eƒe nubabla dzi, eye wòali ke. 15Ke edze aglã ɖe eŋu, eye wòɖo ame ɖe Egipte, ne woana sɔ kple ame geɖewoe. Ɖe wòadze edzi nɛa, eye ɖe amesi wo alea la, asia? Eye esi wònye nubabla wòtu la, ɖe wòasia? 16Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Meta ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Ne menye ɖe woaku ɖe fia, si tsɔe ɖo fia, amesi ƒe atam wòdo vloe, eye wòtu eƒe nubabla la de le Babel o fi! 17Eye ne woƒu kpo ɖe eŋu, eye wotu dzɔlawo ƒe xɔ tsralawo, be woatsrɔ̃ ame geɖewo la, Farao matsɔ aʋakɔ gã kple ameha geɖe akpe ɖe eŋu le aʋa me o. 18Esi wòdo vlo atam la hetu nubabla la, evɔ wònye ena asi ame tso hafi wɔ nusiawo katã la, eyata masi o. 19Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Ne nyemahe nye atam, si wòdo vlo, kple nye nubabla, si wòtu la, ava eƒe ta dzi o fi! 20Maɖo nye ɖo nɛ, eye nye mɔ̃ aɖee, makplɔe ayi Babel, eye mahe nya kplii le afima le ʋu, si wòtrɔ le yonyeme la ta. 21Eƒe aʋawɔla tiatiawo katã, siwo le eƒe aʋalɔgowo katã me la, atsi yi nu, eye ame mamleawo akaka ɖe yawo katã nu, ne miadze sii be, nye Yehowa ye gblɔe.
22Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Nyea matsɔ sederti kɔkɔ ƒe ɖɔmee aɖado; wo tametɔwo ƒe alɔ fẽa ɖe maŋe aɖado ɖe to kɔkɔ gãa ɖe dzi. 23Israel ƒe to kɔkɔ dzi madoe ɖo, adze alɔ, atse ku, eye woazu sederti nyuia ɖe, eye xevi ƒomevi vovovowo katã anɔ ete, eƒe alɔwo ƒe vɔvɔli te woanɔ. 24Eye gbemetiwo katã adze sii be, nye Yehowa ye bɔbɔ ati kɔkɔ la ɖe anyi, eye mekɔ ati tehee la ɖe dzi; nyee na ati mumu la ku, eye ati kuku la dze, nye Yehowa ye ƒo nu, eye mewɔe hã.

Title: XEZEKIEL 18
Content:
Amesiame aku le eya ŋuta ƒe nuvɔ̃ ta.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Nukaŋuti miele lo sia dom le Israel-nyigba dzi bena: „Fofowo ɖu weintsetse hɔhlɔ̃e, eye aɖu nyɔ viwo? 3Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Ne miagado lo sia lé Israel fi! 4Kpɔ ɖa, luʋɔwo katã, tɔnye wonye, fofo kple vi ƒe luʋɔ siaa, tɔnye wonye; luʋɔ, si wɔ nuvɔ̃ la, eyae aku. 5Ne amea ɖe nye ame dzɔdzɔe, eye wòwɔa nu dzɔdzɔe kple nusi le eteƒe, 6meɖua nu le towo dzi o, eye mefɔa mo te ɖe Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe legbawo ŋu o, megblẽa kɔ ɖo na ehavi srɔ̃ o, eye metena ɖe nyɔnu ŋuti le eƒe dzinukpɔɣi o, 7mebaa ame o, egbugbɔa awɔbanu, si wòxɔ ɖe eƒe fe nu la nana, eye meɖua sesẽnu o, enaa eƒe abolo dɔwuitɔwo, eye wòtaa avɔ na amesiwo tsi ƒeƒle, 8meɖia kasa le agbanadodo me o, eye mexɔa deme o, eɖea eƒe asi ɖa tso nu gbegblẽ wɔwɔ me, eye wòtsoa afia na ame kple ehavi ɖe eteƒe, 9ezɔna ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu, eye wòléa nye sewo me ɖe asi hewɔa nuteƒe la, eya nye ame dzɔdzɔe, anɔ agbe kokoko, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 10Eye ne edzi vi sẽŋuta, si kɔa ʋu ɖi, amesi wɔa nusiawo dometɔa ɖe, 11evɔ wònye fofoa mewɔa nusiawo dometɔa ɖeke o hafi; eyama ɖua nu le towo dzi, eye wògblẽa kɔ ɖo na ehavi srɔ̃, 12esẽa ŋuta le ame dahewo kple hiãtɔwo ŋu, eɖua sesẽnu, eye megbugbɔa awɔbanu nana o, efɔa mo te ɖe legbawo ŋu, eye wòwɔa ŋunyɔnu, 13eɖia kasa le agbanadodo me, eye wòxɔa deme la, ɖe wòanɔ agbea? Manɔ agbe o, ke boŋ esi wòwɔa ŋunyɔnu siawo katã ŋuti la, eyata aku, eye eƒe ʋu ava edzi. 14Eye ne edzi vi, eye wòkpɔ nuvɔ̃, siwo katã fofoa wɔna, ke evɔ, eye mewɔa emawo tɔgbe o: 15Meɖua nu le towo dzi o, mefɔa kɔ te ɖe Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe legbawo ŋu o, eye megblẽa kɔ ɖo na ehavi srɔ̃ o, 16mesẽa ŋuta le amea ɖeke ŋu o, mexɔa awɔbanu o, eye meɖua sesẽnu o, enaa eƒe abolo dɔwuitɔwo, eye wòtaa avɔ na amesiwo tsi ƒeƒle, 17eɖea eƒe asi ɖa tso nu gbegblẽ wɔwɔ me, meɖia kasa o, eye mexɔa deme o, ewɔa nye sewo dzi, eye wòzɔna ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu la, eya maku le fofoa ƒe vodadawo ta o, ke boŋ anɔ agbe. 18Ke esi fofoa sea ŋuta le ame ŋu, exɔa sesẽnu le nɔvia si, eye wòwɔa nu manyomanyo le wo ɖeviwo dome la, eyata aku le eƒe vodadawo la. 19Miawo miele gbɔgblɔm be: Nukaŋuti fofo ƒe vodada manɔ via dzi ɖo o hã?
