Ne via wɔa nu dzɔdzɔe kple nusi le eteƒe, eye wòléa nye ɖoɖowo katã me ɖe asi hewɔa wo dzi la, anɔ agbe. 20Amesi wɔa nuvɔ̃ la, eyae aku; fofo ƒe vodada manɔ via dzi o, eye vi ƒe vodada manɔ fofo dzi o; ame dzɔdzɔe ƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ava eya ŋutɔ dzi, eye ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wowɔ ava eya ŋutɔ dzi.
Mawu kpɔa ŋudzedze le vɔ̃wɔla ƒe dzimetɔtrɔ ŋuti.
21Ne ame vɔ̃ɖi trɔ tso eƒe nuvɔ̃, siwo katã wòwɔna la me, eye wòlé nye ɖoɖowo katã me ɖe asi hewoa nu dzodzoe kple nusi le eteƒe la, ana agbe, maku o. 22Womagaɖo ŋu eƒe dzi, siwo katã wòda la o, ke boŋ ana agbe le eƒe nu dzodzoe, siwo wòwɔna la ta. 23Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe ku vivia nunyea? negbe ne etrɔ tso eƒe mɔwo dzi, be wòanɔ agbe la koe! 24Eye ne ame dzɔdzɔe ɖe asi le eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ŋu hewɔa nu gbegblẽ, eye wòwɔa ŋunyɔnu, siwo katã ame vɔ̃ɖi wɔna la, ɖe wòanɔ agbea? Womagaɖo ŋu nu dzɔdzɔe, siwo katã wòwɔ la o, le eƒe go, si wòdze, kple eƒe nuvɔ̃, siwo wòwɔ la ta; woawo ta wòaku ɖo. 25Ke miele gbɔgblɔm be: „Aƒetɔ la ƒe nuwɔna mele eteƒe o.“ Israel ƒe aƒe, misee: Nye nuwɔnae mele eteƒe oa? Ɖe menye miawo boŋ ƒe nuwɔnae mele eteƒe oa? 26Ne ame dzɔdzɔe ɖe asi le eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ŋu, eye wòwɔa nu gbegblẽ la, aku ɖe esia ta; eƒe nu gbegblẽ, si wòwɔna la tae wòaku ɖo. 27Eye ne ame vɔ̃ɖi ɖe asi le eƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi, si wòwɔ ŋu hewɔa nu dzɔdzɔe kple nusi le eteƒe la, axɔ eƒe luʋɔ ɖe agbe. 28Eye ne edze sii, eye wòɖe asi le eƒe dzi, siwo katã wòda ŋu la, anɔ agbe, maku o. 29Israel ƒe aƒe la le gbɔgblɔm be: „Aƒetɔ la ƒe nuwɔna mele eteƒe o.“ Israel ƒe aƒe, nye nuwɔnae mele eteƒe oa? De menye miawo boŋ ƒe nuwɔnae mele eteƒe oa? 30Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Israel ƒe aƒe, madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu mia dome amesiame ɖe eƒe zɔzɔme nu. Miɖe asi le miaƒe dzidadawo katã ŋu, miɖe asi le wo ŋu, ne vodadawo maganye mɔ̃ na mi o! 31Miɖe miaƒe dzi, siwo katã mieda ɖe ŋunye la ɖa, eye miwɔ dzi yeye kple gbɔgbɔ yeye na mia ɖokui. Israel ƒe aƒe, nukaŋuti miehe, yewoaku? 32Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Elabena ame ƒe ku mevivia nunye o. Eyata mitrɔ ta me, ne mianɔ agbe!

Title: XEZEKIEL 19
Content:
Konyifahadzidzi le Yuda dziɖulawo ŋuti.
1Ke wò la to konyifaha ɖe Israel ƒe amegã ŋu 2gblɔ bena: Ameka nye dawo? Dzatanɔ wònye tsyɔ akɔ ɖe dzatawo dome, eye wònyi viawo wotsi le dzataviwo dome 3Enyi viawo dometɔ ɖeka wòtsi, eye wòzu dzatavi; esrɔ̃ nuléle, eye wòɖua amelã. 4Ke esi dukɔwo se eŋkɔ la, woɖo asɔʋe nɛ heɖee, eye wode ŋɔtigae hekplɔ yi Egipte-nyigba dzii. 5Eye esi dada kpɔ be, yelala dzodzro, eye yeƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ nu tsi la, etsɔ viawo dometɔ ɖeka heɖo dzatae. 6Enɔ dzatawo dome, eye wòzu dzatavi; esrɔ̃ nuléle, eye woɖu amelã. 7Egbã woƒe fiasãwo, eɖo aƒedo woƒe duwo, eye eƒe gbeɖeɖe ƒe ɖiɖi na ŋɔdzi lé anyigba kple edzinɔlawo. 8Tete dukɔwo tso ɖe eŋu godoo tso anyigbawo dzi, woɖo ɖɔ ne, eye woɖee le woƒe asɔʋe me. 9Woɖe ŋɔtigae, eye wotsɔe de kpẽ me hekplɔe yi na Babel-fia; wotsɔe de mɔ̃ sesẽ me, ne womagase eƒe gbe le Israel-towo dzi azɔ o.
10Dawò nye weinka wodo ɖe to to abe wò ene, etse fũ, eye wòto aŋgba mlamlamla le tsi geɖe ta. 11Eƒe alo ɖeka lolo hezu dziɖula ƒe fiatikplɔ, eye wòkɔ alɔ gbɔ alɔ dodoawo ta. Esi wokpɔ be, akɔ alea, eye wòto geɖe la, 12wohoe ƒu anyi le dziku me, eye ɣedzeƒeya no tsi le eƒe tsetsewo me; woŋe eƒe alo gã la, eye wòƒu wotɔ dzoe. 13Azɔ wotsɔe do ɖe gbegbe le kuɖinyigba kple anyigba ƒuƒu dzi. 14Eye dzo do tso eƒe alɔwo ƒe zekpẽ me hefiã eƒe tsetsewo, eye alɔ gãa ɖeke megale eŋu ahanye dziɖula ƒe fiatikplɔ o. Konyifaha wònye, eye wòzu konyifaha.

Title: XEZEKIEL 20
Content:
Israel ƒe tomaɖomaɖo tsã kple fifi hã.
1Eye wòva me le ƒe adrelia me le dzinu atɔ̃lia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi be, ŋutsuwo tso Israel ame tsitsiwo dome va gbe bia ge Yehowa se, eye wobɔbɔ nɔ ŋkunye me. 2Tete Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 3Amevi, ƒo nu kple Israel ame tsitsiwo nagblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Nyee miava gbe bia geea? Mefa ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Ne mana miabia gbem ase akpɔ fi! Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 4Màdrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wo oa, amevi, màdrɔ ʋɔnu wo oa? Ɖe wo fofowo ƒe ŋunyɔnuwo fia wo! 5Gblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Gbesigbe metia Israel, eye mekɔ nye asi dzi na Yakob ƒe aƒe ƒe ƒomea, mede ɖokuinye fía wo le Egipte-nyigba dzi, eye mekɔ nye asi dzi na wo hegblɔ bena: Nyee nye Yehowa, mia Mawu la, 6gbemagbe mekɔ nye asi dzi na wo, ne makplɔ wo tso Egipte-nyigba dzi ayi anyigba, si medi da di na wo la dzi, afisi notsi kple anyitsi bɔ ɖo; anyigba nyuitɔ wònye le anyigbawo katã dome. 7Mía dome amesiame neɖe ŋunyɔnu ɖa le ŋku ta, eye migatsɔ Egipte-legbawo gblẽ kɔ ɖo na mia ɖokui o; nye Yehowa ye nye mia Mawu. 8Ke wosẽ to ɖe ŋunye, eye wogbe toɖoɖom; wo dometɔa ɖeke meɖe ŋunyɔnuawo ɖa le ŋku ta o, eye womeɖe asi le Egipte-legbawo ŋu o. Tete meɖo be, matrɔ nye dziku aƒo ɖe wo dzi, eye nye dɔmedzoe nabi avɔ ɖe wo ŋu le Egipte-nyigba dzi. 9Ke nyemewɔe o le nye ŋkɔ la, ne magaɖo gui le dukɔ, siwo dome wole la ŋku me o, amesiwo ŋku me meɖe ɖokuinye fia wo le, ne makplɔ wo tso Egipte-nyigba dzi. 10Ale mekplɔ wo tso Egipte-nyigba dzi heva gbe dzi. 11Mena nye ɖoɖowo wo, eye meɖe nye se, siwo, ne ame wɔ wo dzi la, woana wòanɔ agbe la, fia wo. 12Eye metsɔ nye dzudzɔgbewo hã na wo, ne woanye dzesi anɔ mía kple wo dome, eye woadze sii be, nye Yehowa ye kɔ wo ŋu. 13Ke Israel ƒe aƒe la sẽ to de ŋunye le gbea dzi; womezɔ de nye ɖoɖowo nu o, wodo vlo nye se, siwo, ne ame wɔ wo dzi la, woana wòanɔ agbe la, eye wogblẽ kɔ do na nye dzudzɔgbewo vevie ŋutɔ. Tete meɖo be, matrɔ nye dziku aƒo de wo dzi le gbea dzi, eye matsrɔ̃ wo. 14Ke nyemewɔe o le nye ŋkɔ ta, ne megado gui le dukɔwo ŋku me, amesiwo ŋku me mekplɔ wo dzoe le la o. 15Gake hã mekɔ nye asi dzi ɖe wo ŋu le gbea dzi, be nyemakplɔ wo ayi anyigba, si metsɔ na wo, afisi notsi kple anyitsi bɔ ɖo, eye wònye anyigba nyuitɔ le anyigbawo katã dome la dzi o; 16le esi wodo vlo nye seawo, womezɔ de nye dodowo nu o, eye wogblẽ kɔ ɖo na nye dzudzɔgbewo ta; elabena woƒe dzi dze woƒe legbawo yome. 17Ke nye ŋku kpɔ nublanui na wo, be nyemagblẽ wo o, eye nyematsrɔ̃ wo le gbea dzi o.
18Eye megblɔ na wo viwo le gbea dzi bena: Migazɔ de mia fofowo ƒe ɖoɖowo nu o, migalé woƒe sewo me ɖe asi o, eye migatsɔ woƒe legbawo gblẽ kɔ ɖo na mia ɖokui o! 19Nye Yehowa, ye nye mia Mawu, mizɔ ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu, eye milé nye sewo me ɖe asi, ne miawɔ wo dzi; 20mikɔ nye dzudzɔgbewo ŋu, ne woanye dzesi anɔ mía kpli mi dome, eye wòadze sii be, nye Yehowa yenye mia Mawu. 21Ke wo viwo sẽ to ɖe ŋunye, womezɔ ɖe nye ɖoɖowo nu o, womelé nye sewo me ɖe asi, ne woawɔ wo dzi o, evɔ wònye ne ame wɔ wo dzi la, woana wòanɔ agbe hafi, eye wogblẽ kɔ ɖo na nye dzudzɔgbewo. Tete meɖo be, matrɔ nye dziku aƒo ɖe wo dzi, eye nye dɔmedzoe nabi avɔ de wo ŋu le gbea dzi. 22Ke megagbugbɔ nye asi ɖe megbe, eye nyemewɔe o le nye ŋkɔ ta, ne magado gui le dukɔwo ŋku me, amesiwo ŋku me mekplɔ wo dzoe le la o. 23Gake hã mekɔ nye asi dzi ɖe wo ŋu le gbea dzi, ne makaka wo ɖe dukɔwo dome, eye mahlẽ wo ɖe anyigbawo dzi; 24le esi womewɔ nye sewo dzi o, eye woɖo vlo nye ɖoɖowo, wogblẽ kɔ ɖo na nye dzudzɔgbewo, eye woƒe ŋkuwo le wo fofowo ƒe legbawo yome la. 25Eyata metsɔ ɖoɖo gbegblẽwo kple se, siwo mana woanɔ agbe o la, na wo. 26Eye mena wotsɔ woƒe vɔsanuwo gblẽ kɔ ɖo na wo ɖokui, esime wotsɔ woƒe vi ŋgɔgbeawo katã to dzo mee, ne magblẽ wo, eye ne woadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.
27Eyata, amevi, ƒo nu kple Israel ƒe aƒe la, eye nagblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mia fofowo gado ɖiŋu nam, esime wòtrɔ ʋu le yonyeme. 28Esi mekplɔ wo va anyigba, si ŋu meka atam ɖo be, matsɔ na wo la dzi, eye wokpɔ togbɛ kɔkɔ sia togbɛ kɔkɔ kple ati dodo sia ati dodo la, wosa woƒe akpedavɔwo le afima, eye wohe woƒe vɔsanu kudzinamewo va afima, wodo dzudzɔ ʋeʋẽe le afima, eye woƒo tsi ɖe anyi ɖe afima. 29Tete megblɔ na wo bena: Nuxeƒe ka nye esi mieva? Eyata woyɔa togbɛ be nuxeƒe vaseɖe egbe.
Ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ kple ŋugbedodo.
30Eyata gblɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe la bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mietsɔ mia fofowo ƒe zɔzɔme le kɔ gblẽm ɖo na mia ɖokui, eye miele woƒe ŋunyɔnuwo yome dzem; 31Israel ƒe aƒe, mietsɔ miaƒe legbawo katã gblẽ kɔ ɖo na mia ɖokui, eye mietsɔ miaƒe vɔsanuwo sa vɔe, esime mietsɔ mia viwo to dzo mee vaseɖe egbe tso, hafi nyea mana miabia gbem asea? Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Nyemana miabia gbem ase akpɔ o, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 32Nusi ɖo ta me na mi lã, mava me akpɔ o, esime miele gbɔgblɔm bena: Míanɔ abe dukɔwo kple anyigbawo ƒe ƒomeawo ene, ne míasubɔ ati kple kpe. 33Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe be: Ne nyematsɔ asi sesẽ kple alɔ, si le dzi, kpakple dziku, si wotrɔ ƒo ɖe anyi la, aɖu fia ɖe mia dzi o fi! 34Matsɔ asi sesẽ kple alo, si le dzi, kpakple dziku, si wotrɔ ƒo ɖe anyi la, akplɔ mi tso dukɔwo dome, eye maƒo mia nu ƒu tso anyigba, siwo dzi miekaka ɖo la dzi, 35eye makplɔ mi ayi dukɔwo ƒe gbe dzi, eye gama mahe nya kpli mi le ŋku me kple ŋku me. 36Alesi mehe nya kple mia fofowo le Egipte-nyigba ƒe gbe dzi la, nenema mahe nya kple miawo hãe, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 37Mana miato atikplɔ te ayi, eye makplɔ mi ayi nubabla la ƒe ga mee; 38eye matia aglãdzelawo kple amesiwo trɔ ʋu le yonyeme la, le mia dome; makplɔ wo adzoe tso anyigba, si dzi wonye amedzro le la dzi, ke womade Israel-nyigba dzi o, eye miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.
39Israel ƒe aƒe, ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mia dome amesiame neyi, ne wòaɖasubɔ eƒe legbawo ko; ke emegbe la miava ɖo tom xoxo, eye miagatsɔ miaƒe vɔsanuwo kple miaƒe legbawo agblẽ ka ɖo na nye ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la azɔ o. 40Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la, amesiwo katã le anyigba dzi la, asubɔm le nye to kɔkɔe la, Israel ƒe to kɔkɔ la dzi; gama maxɔ wo le atuu, eye madi woƒe adzɔwo, woƒe vɔsanuwo ƒe gbãtɔwo kpakple woƒe nusiwo katã ŋu woka la le. 41Ne mekplɔ mi tso dukɔwo dome la, maxɔ mi atuu abe dzudzɔ ʋeʋẽe ene, maƒo mia nu ƒu tso anyigba, siwo dzi miekaka ɖo la dzi, eye makɔ ɖokuinye ŋu ɖe mia ŋuti le dukɔwo ŋku me. 42Eye miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa, nenye be, mekplɔ mi va Israel-nyigba, anyigba, si ŋu meka atam ɖo be, matsɔ na mia fofowo la dzi. 43Míado ŋu miaƒe zɔzɔme kple miaƒe nuwɔnawo katã, siwo mietsɔ gblẽ ko ɖo na mia ɖokui la, le afima, eye miava ŋu nyo ge na mia ɖokui le nu vɔ̃ɖi, siwo katã miewɔ la ta. 44Israel ƒe aƒe, miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa, nenye be, mewo na mi le nye ŋkɔ ta, eye menye ɖe miaƒe zɔzɔme vɔ̃ɖiwo kple miaƒe nuwɔna gbegblẽwo nu o, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: XEZEKIEL 21
Content:
Kaldeatɔwo di yi de Yudatɔwo kple Amonitɔwo ŋuti.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, trɔ ŋgɔ dze dziehe gome, dudu nya ƒo ɖe dziehe, eye nagblɔ nya ɖi ɖe ave, si le gbegbe le dziehe la ŋuti. 3Eye nagblɔ na dzieheve la bena: Se Yehowa ƒe gbe, ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mado dzo ɖe mewo, ne wòafiã ati mumuwo katã kple ati ƒuƒuwo katã; womatsi dzo ƒe aɖeawo o, eye ŋkuwo katã me atɔ aka tso dziehe vaseɖe anyiehe; 4eye ŋutilãwo katã adze sii bena, nye Yehowa ye to dzoe; eye tsitsi manɔ eŋu o. 5Tete megblɔ be: Ao, Aƒetɔ Yehowa, wole gbɔgblɔm le ŋunye be: Eyama lo sɔŋ ko wònɔa dodom!
6Tete Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 7Amevi, trɔ ŋgɔ dze Yerusalem, dudu nya ƒo ɖe kɔkɔeƒe la ŋu, eye nagblɔ nya ɖi ɖe Israel-nyigba ŋu 8agblɔ na Israel-nyigba bena: Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, maƒo ɖe dziwò, eye madi nye yi le aku me atsrɔ̃ ame dzɔdzɔe kple ame vɔ̃ɖi siaa le dziwò. 9Esi wònye ame dzɔdzɔe kple ame vɔ̃ɖi siaa mebe, matsrɔ̃ le dziwò la, eyata nye yi ado le aku me ɖe ŋutilãwo katã ŋu tso dziehe vaseɖe anyiehe. 10Eye ŋutilãwo katã adze sii be, nye Yehowa ye di nye yi tso aku me; magatrɔ agbɔ o. 11Ke wò amevi, nɔ hũ ɖem! Nɔ hũ ɖem abe amesi ali le ɖuɖum la ene, eye nanɔ hũ ɖem le vevesese heliheli ta le wo ŋku me. 12Eye ne wova gblɔ na wò be: Nukata nèle hũ ɖem ɖo hã la, ekema ɖo ŋu na wo bena: Le nya la tae, elabena ele eme va ge, dziwo katã alólo gbanaa, eye asiwo katã ado agblɔ, dzi aɖe le amewo katã ƒo, eye klowo katã alólo azu tsi. Kpɔ ɖa, egbɔna, eye wòle eme va ge, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe!
13Tete Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 14Amevi, gblɔ nya ɖi bena: Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Gblɔ be: Yi, yi! Wonyree, eye wosiae. 15Wonyree ɖe amewuwu ŋu, eye ɖe wosiae, be wòanɔ dzo dam kaŋkaŋ. Ɖe míakpɔ dzidzɔa? Vinye ƒe ameƒoti le vlo dom atiwo katã. 16Etsɔe na, be woasia, ne woalée kple asi; wonyre yi la, eye wosiae, be woatsɔ ade asi na amewula. 17Amevi, do ɣli, eye nafa avi, elabena egbɔna ɖe nye dukɔ dzi, egbɔna de Israel ƒe amegãwo katã dzi; woawo kple nye dukɔ siaa la, yi lɔ wonye; eyata ƒo aklito! 18Elabena wodoe kpɔ, ke ne ameƒoti la do vloe ɖe? Esia ya mava me o. Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 19Ke wò amevi, gblɔ nya ɖi, eye naƒo asi kpoloe, elabena yi la adzi ɖe edzi zi eve kple zi etɔ̃; amewuyie, amewuyi gã lae aɖe to ɖe wo. 20Mena yi le dzo dam le miaƒe agbowo katã nu, ne dzi nalólo gbanaa, eye ame tsiaʋawo nasɔ gbɔ; ɖe wowɔe, be woada dzo, eye de wonyree de amewuwu ŋu. 21Dza nu le ɖusi kple mia me afisiafi, si wò nu trɔ ɖo! 22Ekema nye hã maƒo asi kpoloe, eye nye dziku nu afa, nye Yehowa ye gblɔe.
23Tete Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 24Amevi, da mɔ eve na ɖokuiwò, siwo dzi Babel-fia ƒe yi ato ava, anyigba ɖeka dzie woa kple eve la woatso, eye naɖo mɔfianu mɔ sia mɔ ƒe gɔmedzedze ɖo ta du sia du me, 25ne yi nate ŋu ava Amon-viwo ƒe Raba kple Yerusalem, si ŋu woɖo gli ɖo le Yuda. 26Elabena Babel-fia ava tɔ de mɔdzevee nu le mɔawo kple eve ƒe godoƒe, be wòaka afã, adzobo aŋutrɔwo, abla gbe aklama kpakpɛwo ase, eye wòaɖe ŋku de lãklã ŋu. 27Yerusalem ƒe dzidzenu dze ɖusi me nɛ, ne woatu gligbãnu, woake nu ado ɣli, eye woatso ayiboopɛ sesĩe, woatu gligbãnu ɖe eƒe agbowo ŋu, woaƒu kpo, eye woatu dzɔlawo ƒe xɔ tsralawo. 28Eye wòle na wo abe ɖe afã meɖi o ene, elabena eteƒe didi kwasiɖa geɖewo; ke eya aɖo ŋu woƒe vodadawo, ne asi natu wo. 29Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi mieɖo ŋu miaƒe vodadawo, eye miaƒe tosesẽwo dze go, be wokpɔ miaƒe nuvɔ̃wo le miaƒe nuwɔnawo me, esi woɖo ŋku mia dzi la, eyata asi atu mi. 30Wò Israel ƒe amegã, wò ame vɔ̃ɖi, si wodo gui, wò amesi ƒe ŋkeke de le vodadawo ƒe nuwuwu, 31ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Woaɖe tablanu da, eye woade fiakuku ɖi. Maganɔ alea o, ke boŋ woado ame tsɛ ɖe dzi, eye woabɔbɔ amegã ɖe anyi. 32Anyiglãgo, anyiglãgowo ƒe anyiglãgo mawɔ wòe; esia maganɔ anyi o, vaseɖe esime amesi tɔ wònye la, nava, eye màtsɔe nɛ.
33Amevi, gblɔ nya ɖi bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ ɖe Amon-viwo kple wo ƒe alɔmeɖeɖe ŋu enye si: Gblɔ bena: Yi, wò yi, si wodi ɖe amewuwu ŋu, eye wosia wò nèle dzo dam, ne woatsɔ awu amee, 34wò, amesi wokpɔ aʋatso-ŋutega na, eye woka alakpafã na be, wole tsɔ wò ge akpe ɖe ame vɔ̃ɖi, siwo woda nui la ƒe kɔwo ŋu, amesiwo ƒe ŋkeke de le woƒe vodadawo ƒe nuwuwu me. 35Gbugbɔ yi wò aku me! Teƒe, si wowɔ wò le, anyigba, si dzi nẽdzɔ do la, afima madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò le. 36Matrɔ nye dɔmedzoe akɔ de dziwò, maƒlɔ nye dziku ƒe dzo de ŋuwò, eye matsɔ wò ade asi na ame nyanyrãwo kple gbegblẽ ƒe adaŋuawo. 37Dzo afiã wò, wò ʋu asi le anyigba dzi, eye womagaɖo ŋku dziwò azɔ o, elabena nye Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: XEZEKIEL 22
Content:
Yerusalem le nuvɔ̃ kple tohehe nɛ.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, ɖe nebe, yeadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu, yeadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu hlɔ̃dodu laa? Ekema ɖe eƒe ŋunyɔnuwo katã fiae 3gblɔ bena; Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Wò du, si ko ʋu ɖe eɖokui me, ne wò ɣeyiɣi naɖe, eye nèwɔ legbawo, ne natsɔ agblẽ ko ɖo na ɖokuiwò. 4Eda vo to wò ʋu, si nèkɔ ɖe anyi la me, eye nètso wò legba, siwo newɔ la, gblẽ kɔ ɖo na ɖokuiwò, ehe wò ŋkeke va aƒegbɔe, eye nèɖo wo ƒewo ƒe nuwuwu; eyata matsɔ wò awɔ vlodonu na dukɔwo kple alɔmeɖenu na anyigbawo katã. 5Amesiwo le kpuiƒe kple didiƒe la, aɖu fewu le ŋuwò be, wò ŋkɔ gblẽ, eye ʋunyaʋunya bɔ ɖe mewò. 6Kpɔ ɖa, Israel ƒe amegãwo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe le adegbe ƒom ɖe eƒe alɔ ŋu le mewò, ne wòakɔ ʋu ɖi. 7Wodoa vlo fofo kple dada le mewo, wotea amedzro ɖe anyi le mewo, eye wosẽa ŋuta le tsyɔ̃evi kple ahosi ŋu le mewo. 8Eɖoa vlo nye kɔkɔeƒe la, eye negblẽa ko ɖo na nye dzudzɔgbewo. 9Ame gɔmezɔlawo le mewò, ne woakɔ ʋu ɖi, woɖua nu le towo dzi le mewo, eye wowɔa ŋukpenanu le mewo. 10Woɖea ama fofo le mewo, eye woɖea asi nyɔnu, si kpo dzinu la ŋu le mewò. 11Amesiame wɔa ŋunyɔnu ɖe ehavi srɔ̃ ŋu, amesiame wɔa ŋukpenanu kple eƒe tɔyɔvinyɔnu hedoa gu eɖokui, eye amesiame dea asi nɔvianyɔnu, si nye fofoa ƒe vinyɔnu la ŋu. 12Woxɔa zãnu le mewo, ne wòakɔ ʋu ɖi, eɖia kasa, eye nexɔa deme, ẽɖua sesẽnu le nɔviwò si, eye wò ŋku dzona le dzinye. Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 13Kpɔ ɖa, masi akpe ɖe viɖe, siwo nekpɔ, kple hlɔ̃, si wodo le mewo la ŋu. 14Ɖe dzi anɔ ƒowò, eye ŋusẽ anɔ wò asi ŋu le ŋkeke, siwo me mawɔ nu kpli wòa? Nye Yehowa ye ƒo nu, eye mawɔe hã. 15Makaka wò ɖe dukɔwo dome, mahlẽ wò ɖe anyigbawo dzi, eye mana wò ɖiƒoƒo nu natso le ŋuwò, 16eye azu busu me le dukɔwo ŋku me, ne nadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.
17Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 18Amevi, Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la zu aŋuka nam; akɔbli, gaɣi, gayibɔ kple tsumi wonye le kpo me, klosaloŋuka wozu. 19Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi mi katã miezu aŋuka la, eyata mala mi akɔ ɖe Yerusalem. 20Alesi wolɔa klosalo, akɔbli, gayibɔ, tsumi kple gaɣi kɔna ɖe kpo me, ne woaƒlɔ dzo ɖe eŋu wòalólo la, nenema mala mi akɔ ɖi le nye dɔmedzoe kple nye dziku me, eye matsɔ mi ade eme mialólo. 21Maƒo mia nu ƒu, eye maƒlɔ nye dɔmedzoe ƒe dzo ɖe mia ŋu, ne mialólo le eme. 22Alesi wolóloa klosalo le kpo mee la, nenema woalólo mi le emee, eye miadze sii be, nye Yehowa ye trɔ nye dziku ƒo ɖe mia dzi.
23Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 24Amevi, gblɔ nɛ bena: Wòe nye anyigba, si dzi tsi madza ɖo o, eye tsi maƒoe le dzikudoɣi o. 25Eƒe nyagblɔɖilawo ɖoa gbe ɖi le eme, wole abe dzata, si le gbe tem hele nu vuvum ene, woɖua amewo, wolɔa kesinɔnuwo kple nu veviwo dzonɛ, eye wonana ahosiwo sɔgbɔna le eme. 26Eƒe nunɔlawo toa vo ɖe nye se la ŋu, eye wogblẽa kɔ ɖo na nye kɔkɔeƒe la; womedea vovo nu kɔkɔe kple nu makɔmakɔ dome o, eye womefiaa vovototo, si le nu dzadzɛ kple nu madzamadza dome o, wotsyɔa nu ŋku me ɖe nye dzudzɔgbewo, eye wogblẽa kɔ ɖo nam le wo dome. 27Eƒe amegãwo le abe amegãxi lénuwo ene le eme, ne wòakɔ ʋu ɖe anyi, woatsrɔ̃ amewo, eye woakpɔ viɖe. 28Woƒe nyagblɔɖilawo sia akalo ɖe nu ŋu na wo, wokpɔa aʋatso-ŋutega, eye wogblɔ alakpanya ɖi na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi; evɔ wònye Yehowa meƒo nu o hafi. 29Dukɔ hahoo la ɖua sesẽnu, eye wodaa adzo, esẽa ŋuta le ame dahewo kple hiãtɔwo ŋu, eɖua sesẽnu le amedzrowo si hedaa se la dzi. 30Medi ame le wo dome, si aɖo gli, eye wòatsi tre ɖe gbagbãƒe le ŋkunye me ɖe anyigba la nu, ne magagblẽe o, ke nyemekpɔ ɖeke o. 31Eyata metrɔ nye dɔmedzoe ƒo ɖe wo dzi, metso nye dzinu ƒe dzo tsrɔ̃ wòe, eye mehe woƒe zɔzɔme va woƒe ta dzi, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: XEZEKIEL 23
Content:
Israel kple Yuda wowɔ ahasi kple tsrɔ̃subɔlawo.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam be: 2Amevi, nyɔnu eve nɔ anyi, wonye dada ɖeka viwo. 3Wowɔ gbolo le Egipte, woƒe ɖetugbimee wowɔ gbolo le; afima wolé no na wo le, eye afima wofanya akɔnu na wo le. 4Woƒe ŋkɔwo nye: xoxoetɔ nye Ohola, eye nɔvianyɔnu nye Oholiba, wozu tɔnye, eye wodzi ŋutsuviwo kple nyɔnuviwo. Woyɔ Ohola be Samaria, eye Oholiba be Yerusalem. 5Ohola wɔ ahasi le megbe nye, eye wòle kukum ɖe eƒe ahiã viwo dzi, woawo nye Asurtɔ siwo ƒe ŋkɔ nya; 6anyigbanunɔlawo kple amegãwo, siwo le aɖabɛ blɔtɔ me, ɖekakpuivi dzeɖekɛwo sɔŋ wonye, eye wole sɔ dzi. 7Ewɔ gbolo kple Asur-viwo ƒe ame tiatĩawo katã, eye wotsɔ woa kple amesiwo wɔ ahasi la ƒe legbawo katã gblẽ kɔ ɖo na eɖokui. 8Ke meɖe asi le eƒe gbolowɔwɔ tso Egipte ŋu o, elabena woawoe de asi eŋu le eƒe ɖetugbime, wofanya eƒe akɔnu, eye wolɔ woƒe amatrewɔwɔwo trɔ ɖe edzi. 9Eyata metsɔe ɖe asi na eƒe ahiãvi, siwo nye Asur-viwo, amesiwo dzi wòle kukum ɖo. 10Woɖe amae, wokplɔ viaŋutsuwo kple vianyɔnuwo dzoe, eye wowu eya ŋutɔ kple yi, ale be wòzu kpɔdzidze na nyɔnuwo, eye wohe to nɛ. 11Nɔvianyɔnu Oholiba kpɔe, ke le wɔ gbolo wòvloe wui, eye wòwɔ ahasi wu nɔvianyɔnu. 12Eku ɖe Asur-viwo dzi, anyigbanunɔlawo kple amegãwo, amesiwo ŋkɔ nya, eye woɖo atsyɔ̃, wole sɔ dzi, eye wonye ɖekakpuivi dzeɖekɛwo sɔŋ. 13Tete mekpɔ be, egblẽ kɔ ɖo na eɖokui, mɔ ɖeka dzi woa kple eve la wòto. 14Ke egawɔ gbolo ɖe edzi, ekpɔ ŋutsu, siwo wòta ɖe gli ŋu, Kaldeatɔwo ƒe nɔnɔme, si wotsɔ de tae, 15alidziblanu le ali na wo, eye tablanu le ta na wo hedzɔ ɖe anyi, wo katã ƒe nɔnɔme le abe aʋafiawo ene, eye woɖi Babel-viwo, amesiwo de nye Kaldea. 16Eye esi wòkpɔ woƒe ŋku me la, wo nu le dzi nɛ, eye wòdo ame ɖo ɖe wo le Kaldea. 17Tete Babel-viwo va egbɔ le edo ƒe, eye wotsɔ woƒe amatrewɔwɔwo gblẽ ko ɖo nɛ, eye wòtsɔ wo do gu eɖokui; emegbe la woƒe nu gblẽ le eƒe ŋku me. 18Eye esi eƒe gbolowɔwɔ dze go, eye eƒe ama dze la, eƒe nu ti kɔ nam, abe alesi nɔvianyɔnu ƒe nu ti kɔ nam ene. 19Egawɔ gbolo ɖe edzi, eye wòɖo ŋu eƒe ɖetugbimenɔɣi, esime wòwɔ gbolo le Egipte-nyigba dzi. 20Eye wole kukum ɖe eƒe ahiãviwo dzi, amesiwo ƒe ŋutsu le abe tedzi tɔ ene, eye woƒe tsi le abe sɔtsu tɔ ene. 21Eɖo ŋku wò ŋukpenanuwɔwɔ le wò ɖetugbime dzi, esime Egiptetɔwo fanya wò akɔnu, eye wòlé wò ɖetugbimeno.
Tohehe le anukwatre maɖimaɖi ŋuti.
22Eyata Oholiba, ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, made adã ta me na wò ahiãviwo, amesiwo ƒe nu gblẽ le ŋkuwò me la, ɖe ŋuwò, eye mana woatso goawo katã me ava ƒo ɖe dziwò. 23Babel-viwo, Kaldeatɔwo katã, Pekod, Soa kple Koa kpakple Asur-viwo katã kpe ɖe wo ŋu, ɖekakpuivi dzeɖekɛwo, anyigbanunɔlawo kple amegãwo sɔŋ kple aʋafiawo wonye, woƒe ŋkɔ nyɔ, eye wo katã wole sɔ dzi. 24Woatsɔ tasiaɖam kple tasiaɖamfɔ geɖewo ava ƒo ɖe dziwò, woatsɔ akpoxɔnu gã kple via kpakple gakuku adze aʋa ɖe ŋuwò godoo, eye matsɔ ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ ade asi na wo, ne woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò ɖe woƒe se nu. 25Mahe nye ŋuʋaʋã ava dziwò, eye woawɔ nu kpli wò le dziku me: Woakpa ŋɔti kple to na wo, eye viwòwo atsi yi nu; woakplɔ wò ŋutsuviwo kple wò nyɔnuviwo adzoe, eye dzo afiã wò nu susɔeawo. 26Woaɖe avɔ le ŋuwò, eye woalɔ wò atsyɔ̃nuwo adzoe. 27Matsi wò ŋukpenanuwɔwɔ kple wò gbolowɔwɔ tso Egipte-nyigba dzi nu, magafɔ mo te ɖe wo ŋu azɔ o, eye wò ŋku magadze Egipte dzi azɔ o. 28Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, matsɔ wò ade asi na amesiwo nèle fui, eye matsɔ wò ade asi na amesiwo ƒe nu gblẽ le ŋkuwò me. 29Woawɔ nu kpli wò abe ketɔ ene, eye woalɔ wò nuwo katã adzoe ahagblẽ wò ɖi natsi ama kple ƒeƒle, ale be wò ahasiwɔwɔ ƒe ama, wò ŋukpenanuwɔwɔ kple wò gbolowɔwɔ natsi go. 30Nusiawo ava dziwò, le esi nèwɔ gbolo kple dukɔwo, eye nètsɔ woƒe legbawo gblẽ kɔ ɖo na ɖokuiwò ta. 31Nɔviwònyɔnu ƒe afɔ nètsɔ, eyata matsɔ eƒe kplu ade asi na wò. 32Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ano nɔviwònyɔnu ƒe kplu, si ko helolo, eye woɖi nu, ne nazu nu ɖikokoea kple alɔmeɖenu; 33ahamuame kple nuxaxa ayɔ mewo fũ, elabena nɔviwònyɔnu Samaria ƒe kplu enye ŋɔdzi kple mo yaa wɔwɔ ƒe kplu! 34Ànoe ƒiaƒiaƒia ahaɖuɖɔ eƒe gbagbana biɖabiɖa, eye ade abi wò no ŋu; Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Nyee gblɔe! 35Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi neŋlɔm be, eye netsɔm ƒu gbe ɖe megbewò la, eyata wò ŋukpenanuwɔwɔ kple wò gbolowɔwɔ anɔ dziwò.
36Eye Yehowa gblɔ nam bena: Amevi, ɖe nèbe, yeadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu Ohola kple Oholiba? Ekema ɖe woƒe ŋunyɔnuwo fia wo. 37Elabena wowɔ ahasi, eye ʋu le asi ŋu na wo, wotsɔ woƒe legbawo wɔ ahasii, eye wotsɔ wo vi, siwo wodzi nam la, to dzo me, ne woanye nuɖuɖu na wo. 38Nusi wogawɔ ɖe ŋunye la, enye si: Wodo gu nye kɔkɔeƒe la gbemagbe, eye wogblẽ kɔ ɖo na nye dzudzɔgbewo. 39Ne wowu wo viwo na legbawo la, wovaa nye kɔkɔeƒe la gbemagbe ke, ne woagblẽ ko ɖo nɛ; alea wowɔ le nye xɔ me. 40Woɖo ame ɖe ŋutsuwo le didiƒe, be woava, eye esi wodɔ ame ɖe wo wova la, èle tsi, eɖo tù ɖe ŋku, eye newɔ leke, 41èbɔbɔ nɔ ada nyuia ɖe dzi, si ŋgɔ woɖo kplɔ̃ ɖo, eye nètso nye dzudzɔdonu kple nye ami da ɖe edzi. 42Wole ɣli dom hoo le afima, eye woyɔ Salbatɔwo tso gbe dzi kpe ɖe ame gbogboawo ŋu, amesiwo tso alɔnuga de alɔnu na wo, eye woɖo fiakuku nyui ɖe la na wo. 43Eye megblɔ be: Ɖe nyɔnu léayi aganɔ gbolo wɔma? Ɖe woaganɔ ahasi wɔm kpliia? 44Wova egbɔ, abe alesi wovaa gbolo gbɔe ene; alea wova Ohola kple Oholiba, siwo nye nyɔnu wo ŋukpenanuwo la gbɔe. 45Ŋutsu dzɔdzɔewo adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wo ɖe gbolowo kple nyɔnu dohlɔ̃wo ƒe se nu; elabena gbolowo wonye, eye ʋu le asi ŋu na wo. 46Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Woakplɔ amehawo ava ƒu wo, eye woatso wo ade asi na ŋutasesẽ kple nuhaha. 47Amehawo nexlã kpe ɖe wo, eye woadza wo kple woƒe yiwo, woawu woƒe ŋutsuviwo kple nyɔnuviwo, eye woata dzo woƒe xɔwo. 48Matsi ŋukpenanuwɔwɔ nu le anyigba dzi, eye anye nuxlɔ̃me na nyɔnuwo katã, ne womagawɔ ŋukpenanu abe woawo ene o. 49Woahe miaƒe ŋukpenanuwɔwɔ ava mia dzi, eye nuvɔ̃, siwo miewɔ to miaƒe legbawo dzi la, anɔ mia dzi, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Aƒetɔ Yehowa.

Title: XEZEKIEL 24
Content:
Yerusalem ƒe gbegblẽ.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam le ƒe asiekelia me, le dzinu ewolia ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi bena. 2Amevi, ŋlɔ ŋkeke sia tututu ƒe ŋkɔ ɖi; elabena ŋkeke sia dzi Babel-fia ɖe to ɖe Yerusalem. 3Do lo na ƒome sẽto la, eye nagblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Tsɔ gaze ɖo dzoe, tsɔe ɖo dzoe, eye naku tsi ɖe eme! 4Fɔ lãkɔwo de eme, lãkɔ nyuiwo katã, alime kple abɔgba; tso ƒu nyuiawo de eme fũ. 5Tsa alé nyuitɔwo, eye nade nake ete! Na lãkɔwo nafie, eye ƒuawo hã nabi ɖewo me. 6Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Baba na hlɔ̃dodu la, gaze, si lé ɣebia, eye eƒe ɣebia meɖe le eŋu o! Ɖe lãwo le eme kokoko, eye megadzidze nu ɖe edzi hafi o. 7Elabena eƒe ʋu le eme, agakpe ƒeƒle dzi wòkɔe ɖo, menye anyigba dzi wòwɔe ɖo, ne ke natsyɔ edzi o. 8Meka eƒe ʋu dze agakpe ƒeƒle dzi, be nu magatsyɔ ɖee o, ne mahe dziku ava edzi, eye mabia hlɔ̃. 9Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Baba na hlɔ̃dodu la! Nye hã matu nake ɖo gleglegle. 10Ɖe nake geɖe ve, eye nado dzoa, na lãwo nabi, detsia neto, eye ƒuawo nalé ze. 11Na zea natsi dzoa dzi, ne wò axɔ dzo, eye eƒe akɔbli nabiã hẽ, nu makomako, si le eme, nalólo, eye eƒe ɣebia nafiã. 12Woku kutri, ke eƒe ɣebia gbogboawo gbe dodo le eŋu. 13Esi meklɔ ŋuwò, ke wò nu makɔmakɔawo gbe ɖiɖi le ŋuwò le wò ŋukpenanuwɔwɔ makɔmakɔawo ta la, eyata ŋuwò maɖi akpa o, vaseɖe esime nye dziku nu nafa ɖe ŋuwò. 14Nye Yehowa ye ƒo nu, egbɔna, eye mawɔ edzi, nyemadzudzɔ o, nyemakpɔ ame ta o, eye nyemakpɔ nublanui o, ke boŋ woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò ɖe wò zɔzɔme kple wò nuwɔnawo nu, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe.
15Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 16Amevi, mele ku kpatakpata tsɔ ge aɖe nusi vivia wò ŋku nu la ɖa; megaxa nu o, megata avi o, eye wò aɖatsi megado o. 17Ɖe hũ le adza me, eye megawɔ kunu o; bia ta, eye nado atokota ɖe afɔ, megabla nu ɖe wò ge o, eye megaɖu konyifabolo o. 18Eye esi meƒo nu kple dukɔa le ŋdi la, srɔ̃nye ku le fiẽ, eye mewo le ŋdi, abe alesi woɖe se nam ene. 19Tete dukɔ la gblɔ nam bena: Màgblɔ nusi wɔm nèle la gɔme na mi oa? 20Eye meɖo ŋu na wo bena: Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam be: 21Gblɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe la bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, magblẽ kɔ ɖo na nye kɔkɔeƒe la, miaƒe sitsoƒe, si nye miaƒe aɖegbeƒonu, nusi vivia miaƒe ŋkuwo nu kple nusi nye miaƒe luʋɔwo ƒe didi; miaƒe ŋutsuviwo kple miaƒe nyɔnuviwo, siwo miegblẽ ɖe megbe la, atsi yi nu. 22Eye miawɔ pɛpɛpɛ abe nye ene: miabla nu ɖe ge o, eye miaɖu konyifabolo o, 23miaƒe tablanu anɔ ta na mi, eye miaƒe atokotawo atsi afɔ na mi, miaxa nu o, eye miafa avi o, miatsrɔ̃ ɖe miaƒe vodadawo me, eye miaɖe hũ le mia nɔewo dome. 24Xezekiel anye kpɔdzidze na mi, eye ne eva me la, miawɔ pɛpɛpɛ, abe alesi wòwɔ ene, eye miadze sii be, nyee nye Aƒetɔ Yehowa. 25Wò amevi, gbesigbe maɖe woƒe sitsoƒe, woƒe dzidzɔ vevi, nusi vivia woƒe ŋkuwo nu, kple woƒe luʋɔwo ƒe didi, woƒe ŋutsuviwo kple woƒe nyɔnuviwo ɖa la, 26gbemagbe ame asi ava gbɔwò, be yeava to nya na wò. 27Gbemagbe woaʋu nu na mia kple ame sisi la siaa, àƒo nu, eye màzi kpi o. Ale nanye kpɔdzidze na wo, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.

Title: XEZEKIEL 25
Content:
Nyagblɔɖi le Amon-viwo ŋuti.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, trɔ mo ɖe Amon-viwo ŋu, eye nagblɔ nya ɖi ɖe wo ŋu. 3Gblɔ na Amon-viwo bena: Mise Aƒetɔ Yehowa ƒe nya! Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi miele ehẽ dom ɖe nye kɔkɔeƒe la ŋu be, wodo gui, ɖe Israel-nyigba ŋu be, ezu gbegbe, eye ele Yuda ƒe aƒe la ŋu be, eyi aboyo me ŋuti la, 4eyata kpɔ ɖa, matsɔ wò ana ɣedzeƒeviwo nanye wo tɔ, ne woatu woƒe agbadɔ ɖe gbɔwò, eye woatso aƒe ɖe gbɔwò, woaɖu wò kutsetsewo, eye woano wò notsi. 5Mana Raba nazu kposɔwo ƒe gbeɖuƒe, eye Amon-viwo ƒe anyigba nazu akɔtsyɔƒe na alẽwo; eye miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. 6Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi nèƒu akpe, eye nètu afɔ anyi hekpɔ dzidzɔ tso wò dzi blibo me ɖe Israel-nyigba ŋu ɖe fewuɖuɖu me la, 7eyata kpɔ ɖa, mado nye asi ɖa ɖe mia ŋu, eye matsɔ mi awɔ nuhaha na dukɔwo, matsrɔ̃ mi ɖa le dukɔwo dome, miabu le anyigbawo dzi gbidii, eye magblẽ mi, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.
Nyagblɔɖi le Moabitɔwo ŋuti.
8Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi Moab kple Seir wole gbɔgblɔm be, Yuda ƒe aƒe la zu abe dukɔ bubuwo katã ene la, 9eyata kpɔ ɖa, maʋu Moab ƒe abɔta, si nye eƒe duwo, eƒe duwo le goawo katã me, Bet-Yesimot-nyigba ƒe nu vevi, Baal-Meon kple Kiryatayim, 10eye màtsɔe ana ɣedzeƒeviwo akpe ɖe Amon-viwo ƒe anyigba ŋu, ne wòanye wo tɔ, eye ŋku magadze Amon-viwo dzi le dukɔwo dome azɔ o. 11Mahe to na Moab, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.
Nyagblɔɖi le Edomtɔwo ŋuti.
12Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi Edom bia hlɔ̃ Yuda ƒe aƒe la, eye wòɖi fɔ vevie, le esi wòbia hlɔ̃ wo ŋuti la, 13eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mado nye asi ɖa ɖe Edom ŋu, eye matsrɔ̃ amegbetɔwo kple lãwo siaa ɖa le edzi, mana woazu gbegbe, eye woatsi yi nu, tso Teman vaseɖe Deɖan. 14Matsɔ nye hlɔ̃biabia Edom ade asi na nye dukɔ Israel, eye woawo Edom ɖe nye dɔmedzoe kple nye dziku nu, eye wòadze si nye hlɔ̃biabia, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe.
Nyagblɔɖi le Filistitɔwo ŋuti.
15Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi Filistitɔwo wɔ nu ɖe hlɔ̃biabia me, eye wotsɔ fuléle makumaku ɖe dzi me bia hlɔ̃e le fewuɖuɖu me, be woatsrɔ̃ ame la, 16eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, mado nye asi ɖa ɖe Filistitɔwo ŋu, matsrɔ̃ Kretatɔwo, eye mana amesiwo kpɔtɔ ɖe atsiaƒu nu la, nabu gbidii. 17Mabia hlɔ̃ gã wo, eye mahe to na wo le dziku me, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa, nenye be, mebia hlɔ̃ wo.

Title: XEZEKIEL 26
Content:
Nyagblɔɖi le Tiro-du ƒe gbegblẽ ŋuti.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam le ƒe wuiɖekɛlia me le dzinu gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi bena: 2Amevi, esi Tiro le ehẽ dom de Yerusalem ŋu be: Dukɔwo ƒe agbo gbã, eyi de dzinye, eye nu abɔ de asinye, le esi wòzu gbegbe ŋuti la, 3eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Tiro, maƒo de dziwò, eye mana dukɔ geɖewo naho de ŋuwò, abe alesi atsiaƒu nana eƒe tsotsoewo honae ene. 4Magblẽ Tiro ƒe gliwo, eye mamũ eƒe xɔ tsralawo aƒu anyi, makplɔ eƒe anyiglãgowo ɖa, eye mawɔe woazu agakpe ƒeƒle. 5Azu ɖɔsiaƒe le atsiaƒu titina, Aƒetɔ Yehowa be, nyee gblɔe, eye azu nuhaha na dukɔwo; 6eye woatsɔ yi awu eƒe du, siwo le anyigba dzi la me tɔwo, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.
7Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, makplɔ Babel-fia Nebukadnezar, amesi nye fiawo dzi fia, atso anyiehe akpe ɖe sɔwo, tasiaɖamwo kple sɔdolawo, amehawo kple dukɔ geɖe ŋu ava ƒo ɖe Tiro dzi. 8Atsɔ yi awu wò du, siwo le anyigba dzi la me tɔwo, eye woatu dzɔlawo ƒe xɔ tsralawo ɖe ŋuwò, aƒu kpo ɖe ŋuwò, eye wòakɔ akpoxɔnu dzi ɖe ŋuwò. 9Atsɔ eƒe gligbãnuwo atu wò gli, eye wòatsɔ eƒe fiawo agba wò xɔ tsralawo aƒu anyi. 10Eƒe sɔ gbogboawo ƒe ʋuʋudedi abla wò kɔtɔɔ, eye sɔdolawo, tasiaɖamfɔwo kple tasiaɖamwo ƒe hoowɔwɔ ana be, wò gliwo nadzo kpekpekpe, ne ege de wò agbowo me, abe alesi wogena de du gbagbã me ene. 11Eƒe sɔwo ƒe afɔ anyã avuzi le wò kpɔdomeewo katã, awu wò dukɔ kple yi, eye wò ŋusẽ ƒe sɔtiawo amũ adze anyi. 12Woaha wò kesinɔnuwo, eye woada adzo wò adzɔnuwo, woamũ wò gliwo, woagbã wò dzidzɔkpɔxɔwo, eye woalɔ wò kpewo, atiwo kple anyiglãgowo aƒu gbe ɖe atsiaƒu me. 13Matsi wò hadzidziwo ƒe ɖiɖi nu, eye womagase wò kasaŋkuwo ƒe ɖiɖi azɔ o. 14Mawɔ wò nazu agakpe ƒeƒle, ɖɔsiaƒe nazu, eye womagatso wò akpɔ o; Aƒetɔ Yehowa be, nye Yehowa ye gblɔe.
15Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ ɖe Tiro ŋu enye si: Ne amesiwo woda nui, le ŋeŋem, eye wowu amewo le mewo la, wò anyidzedze ƒe didi ana ƒukpowo nadzo kpekpekpe. 16Ƒuta amegãwo katã aɖi le woƒe fiazikpuiwo dzi ɖe anyi, woaɖe woƒe awu ʋlayawo ɖi, eye woaɖe woƒe avɔ ŋɔŋɔewo ɖi; ŋɔdzi anyẽ atsyɔ wo, woabɔbɔ nɔ anyigba, woanɔ dzodzom nyanyanya ɖaa, eye woƒe nu aku de ŋuwò. 17Eye woato konyifaha ɖe ŋuwò agblɔ ɖe ŋuwò bena: Aleke du, si ŋkɔ nya la, tsrɔ̃ hebu le atsiaƒu nu, wò, si mia kple mewo nɔlawo miekpɔ ŋusẽ le atsiaƒu dzi, eye wò ŋɔdzi kaka ɖe ŋuwò nɔlawo katã dome la! 18Azɔ ƒukpowo le dzodzom kpekpekpe le wò anyidzegbe, eye dzidzi ƒo ƒukpowo le atsiaƒu me le wò nuwuwu la. 19Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ne mena nèzu aƒedo abe du, si me amea ɖeke mele o ene, ne mehe tɔɖɔɖɔ va dziwò, eye tsi gãwo nye tsyɔ wò la, 20mana nayi aʋlimetɔ, siwo nye blematɔwo gbɔ; mana nanɔ tsieƒe le blemaƒedo me akpe de amesiwo le aʋli me la ŋu, ale be womagatso aƒe de mewo o, eye magadze le agbagbeawo ƒe anyigba dzi akpɔ o. 21Matsɔ wò awɔ ŋɔdzinui, eye nuwò ayi, woadi wò, ke womagakpɔ wò gbeɖegbeɖe akpɔ o, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: XEZEKIEL 27
Content:
Konyifaha dzidzi le Tiro ŋuti.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, to konyifaha ɖe Tiro ŋu, 3eye nagblɔ na Tiro bena: Wò, si le atsiaƒu to, eye nèle asi tsam kple dukɔwo yi ƒukpo geɖewo dzi, ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Tiro, ele gbɔgblɔm be: „Menyo eteƒe mekɔ o.“ 4Wò anyigba le atsiaƒu titina; tsowòlawo na nènyo eteƒe mekɔ o. 5Senirtɔwo ƒe sesewu wotsɔ kpa wòe, eye Libanon ƒe sederti wotsɔ wɔ abalati ɖe mewòe. 6Wotsɔ Basantɔwo ƒe fɔfɔli kpa wò akɔfawoe, eye wofa nyiɖu ɖe mewò hetsakae kple kpomi, si tso Kititɔwo ƒe ƒukpowo dzi. 7Egiptetɔwo ƒe aklala, si wolɔ̃ ŋɔŋɔe la, nye wò abala, ne wòanye aflaga na wò, aɖabɛ blɔtɔ kple dzĩtɔ tso Elisa-ƒukpowo dzi nye wò agbadɔ. 8Zidonitɔwo kple Arwadtɔwo nye wo ʋukulawo; Tiro, wò ame nyanu, siwo nɔ mewo la, nye wò kuɖɔɖolawo. 9Gebal-ame tsitsiwo kple woƒe aɖaŋuawo nɔ mewo, ne woatre wò ɖuɖuƒewo; atsiaƒu dzi ʋuwo kple wo kulawo nɔ mewo, ne woaɖɔ li adzɔnu na wò. 10Amewo tso Persia, Lud kple Put nye aʋawɔlawo nɔ wò aʋakɔwo dome; wotsɔ akpoxɔnu kple gakuku ku nu ɖe mewò, woawoe ɖo atsyɔ na wò. 11Arwad-viwo kple wò aʋakɔwo le wò gliwo dzi godoo va kpe, eye Gamaditɔwo le wò xɔ tsralawo me; wotsɔ woƒe akpoxɔnuwo ku wò gliwo ŋu godoo va kpe, woawoe na wò nyonyo teƒe mekɔ o.
12Tarsis tsa asi kpli wò le kesinɔnu gbogboawo katã ta; etsɔ klosalo, gayibɔ, gaɣi kple tsumi ƒle wò adzɔnuwoe. 13Yawan, Tubal kple Mesex tsa asi kpli wò, amegbetɔwo kple akɔblinuwo wotsɔ ƒle wò adzɔnuwoe. 14Amesiwo tso Togarma ƒe me la, tsɔ sɔwo, aʋawɔsɔwo kple tedzisɔwo ƒle wò adzɔnuwoe. 15Dedantɔwo tsa asi kpli wò, ƒukpo geɖewo ƒe asitsatsa le asiwò me, eye wodzra nyiɖuwo kple keyi na wò. 16Aram tsa asi kpli wò le wò aɖaŋudɔ gbogboawo ta; etsɔ adzagba, aɖabɛ dzĩtɔ, avɔ ŋɔŋɔe, aklala, soe kple gbloti ƒle wò adzɔnuwoe. 17Yuda kple Israel tsa asi kpli wò; wotsɔ Minitɔwo ƒe lu, ƒo, anyitsi, ami kple lili ƒle wò adzɔnuwoe. 18Damasko tsɔ Xelbontɔwo ƒe wein kple alẽfu ɣi ƒle wò aɖanudɔ gbogboawo kple wò kesinɔnu gbogboawo katãe. 19Wotsɔ Usaltɔwo ƒe wein ƒle wò adzɔnuwoe, wotsɔ gayibɔ tete, kotoklobo kple gbekee ɖɔ li wò adzɔnuwoe. 20Dedan tsɔ sɔkpa kuntru, siwo wotsɔna doa sɔe, tsa asi kpli wò. 21Arabiatɔwo kple Kedar-amegãwo katã nye asitsalawo nɔ asiwò me, wotsɔ alẽviwo, agbowo kple gbɔ̃tsuwo tsa asi kpli wò. 22Asitsalawo tso Saba kple Ragma tsa asi kpli wò; wotsɔ atike nyuitɔ vovovowo, kpe xɔasi vovovowo kple sika ƒle wò adzɔnuwoe. 23Xaran, Kane, Eden kple asitsalawo tso Saba, Asur kple Media blibo la tsa asi kpli wò. 24Wotsɔ atsyɔ̃vɔwo, aɖabɛ blɔtɔ ƒe awu ʋlayawo, avɔ ŋɔŋɔewo, kuntru ŋɔŋɔewo kple atagbi, siwo woƒo fefekae kple asiwo wogbe mligoe la, va tsa asi kpli wò le wò asiwo me. 25Tarsis-ʋuwo he wò adzɔnuwo vɛ na wò, ale be nu bɔ ɖe asiwò, eye nèkpɔ ho fũ le atsiaƒu titina.
26Kuwòlawo ku wò to tɔ gãwo dzi; ɣedzeƒeya gbã wò ɖe atsiaƒu titina! 27Wò kesinɔnuwo, wò asitsanuwo kple wò adzɔnuwo, wò ʋukulawo, wò kuɖɔɖolawo kple amesiwo trea wò ɖuɖuƒewo, kpakple amesiwo ɖɔa li adzɔnu na wò, wò aʋawɔla, siwo katã le mewo, kple wò ameha blibo, si le mewo la, anyrɔ ɖe atsiaƒu titina le wò anyidzegbe. 28Kuɖɔɖolawo ƒe ɣli ana ƒutawo nadzo kpekpekpe, 29atablukulawo katã ado le woƒe ʋuwo me; ʋukulawo kple kuɖɔɖola, siwo katã le atsiaƒu dzi la, aɖi go ɖe gota. 30Wòado aƒa ɖe ŋuwò, eye woaxa nu vevie, wòala kewɔ akɔ ɖe ta me, eye woanɔ togotogoe ƒom le dzowo me. 31Woalũ ta kokoe le tawo, eye woata akpanya, woafa avi ɖe ŋuwò vevie tso dzi me, eye woaxa nu. 32Woato konyifaha ɖe ŋuwò le woƒe nuxaxa me adzi ha ade wò bena: „Ameka le abe Tiro ene? Ɖoɖoe zi le eŋu abe aƒedo ene le atsiaƒu titina. 33Esi wò adzɔnuwo to atsiaƒu dzi va la, eɖi ƒo na dukɔ geɖewo, etso wò kesinɔnu gbogboawo kple wò adzɔnuwo na anyigba dzi fiawo kpɔ hoe. 34Azɔ ègbã gudugudu ɖe tɔ gɔme, eye nete ɖa tso atsiaƒu nu; wò adzɔnuwo kple wò ameha, siwo katã na mewo la nyro!“ 35Ƒukpo dzinɔlawo katã ƒe nu ku ɖe ŋuwò, woƒe fiawo ƒe lãme ble fu, eye woɖo adã lilili. 36Dukɔwo ƒe asitsalawo le tsiã dom ɖe ŋuwò; nuwo yi ŋɔdzitɔe, eye maganɔ anyi akpɔ gbeɖegbeɖe o.

Title: XEZEKIEL 28
Content:
Le Tiro-fia ŋuti.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, gblɔna Tiro-amegã be: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi wò dzi le dadam, eye nele gbɔgblɔm be, Mawu yenye, eye Mawu ƒe nɔƒe yele le atsiaƒu titina, eye nèwɔ wò dzi abe Mawu to ene, evɔ wònye amegbetɔ nènye, eye menye Mawu o la, — 3kpɔ ɖa, ènya nu wu Daniel, nya ɣaɣlaa ɖeke mele vivi me ɖe wò o; 4wò nunya kple wò gɔmesese netsɔ kpɔ kesinɔnui, eye nède sika kple klosalo wò nudzraɖoƒewo; 5wò nunya geɖe kple wò asitsatsa nètso kpo kesinɔnui kpaŋkpaŋ, eye wò dzi de asi dàda me le wò kesinɔnuawo ta — 6eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi. Esi newɔ wò dzi abe Mawu to ene la, 7eyata kpɔ ɖa, makplɔ du bubu me to, siwo nye ŋutasẽlawo aƒu wò dukɔ, woadi yi ɖe wò nunya ƒe nyonyo ŋu, eye woado gu wò atsyɔ̃. 8Woatutu wò ade aʋli me, eye àku abe ame tsiaʋa ene ɖe atsiaƒu titina. 9Ɖe àgblɔ emegbe le wuwòlawo ŋku me be, Mawu yenyea? Amegbetɔ nènye le amesiwo da nu wò la si me, eye menye Mawu o. 10Àku abe bolotɔwo ene ɖe du bubu me towo si me; Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Nyee gblɔe!
11Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 12Amevi, to konyifaha ɖe Tiro-fia ŋu, eye nagblɔ nɛ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ŋkɔsigɛ, si wodzidze wòsɔ, nènye, nunya ba ɖe asiwò, eye wò nyonyo teƒe mekɔ o. 13Ena Mawu ƒe abɔ Eden me, eye wotsɔ kpe xɔasi vovovowo ɖo ŋuwò. Karneol, topas kple yaspis, krisolit, soham kple oniks, safir, ametist kple smaragd; sika wotsɔ ɖo to na wò, eyae wotso do atsiã na wò le gbesigbe wowɔ wò. 14Enye Kerubi keke aʋala me, metsɔ wò ɖo Mawu ƒe to kɔkɔe la dzi, eye nèzɔ dzokpewo dome. 15Dzuƒe menɔ wò zɔzɔme ŋu tso gbesigbe wowɔ wò, vaseɖe esime wokpɔ nu madzɔmadzɔ le ŋuwò o. 16Le wò asitsatsa gbogboawo ta nètso nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ yɔ ɖokuiwò mee, eye nezu nuvɔ̃wɔla; eyata menya wò ɖa le Mawu ƒe to kokoe la dzi, eye metsrɔ̃ wò le dzokpeawo dome, wò Kerubi, si keke aʋala me. 17Wò dzi de asi dada me le wò nyonyo ta, ètsɔ wò nunya de aka le wò atsyɔ̃ ta; eyata matsɔ wò aƒu anyi, eye matsɔ wò ade asi na fiawo, ne woakpɔ wò ʋuu keke wòati wo. 18Etsɔ wò vodada gbogboawo kple wò asitsatsa madzɔmadzɔ gblẽ ko ɖo na wò kɔkɔeƒe la; eyata mena dzo do tso mewo hefiã wò, eye metso wò wo dzowɔe ɖe anyigba dzi le amesiwo katã kpo wò la ŋku me. 19Wò ame nyanyɛwo katã le dukɔwo dome ƒe nu ku ɖe ŋuwò; nuwo yi ŋɔdzitɔe, eye màganɔ anyi akpɔ gbeɖegbeɖe o.
Zidon gbagbã.
20Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 21Amevi, trɔ ŋgɔ de Zidon, eye nagblɔ nya ɖi ɖe eŋu 22gblɔ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Zidon, mele ƒoƒo ge ɖe dziwò, eye makɔ ɖokuinye ŋu le mewo, eye wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa, nenye be, medrɔ̃ ʋɔnui, eye mekɔ ɖokuinye ŋu ɖe eŋuti. 23Maɖo dɔvɔ̃ ɖe eŋu, eye ʋu ano eƒe kpɔdomeewo, amesiwo woda nui la, atsi yi, si tso goawo katã me va ɖe eŋu la nu le eme, eye woadze sii be, nyee nye Aƒetɔ Yehowa. 24Eye ŋu tɔame kple aŋɔka wɔnuveviame maganɔe na Israel ƒe aƒe la tso amesiwo ƒo xlã wo godoo, eye wole vlo dom wo la si me o, ne woadze sii be, nyee nye Aƒetɔ Yehowa. 25Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ne meƒo Israel ƒe aƒe la nu ƒu tso dukɔ, siwo katã dome wokaka ɖo dome la, ekema makɔ ɖokuinye ŋu ɖe wo ŋuti le dukɔwo ŋku me, eye woano woƒe anyigba, si metsɔ na nye dɔla Yakob la dzi. 26Woanɔ edzi bɔkɔɔ, eye woatu xɔwo ahade weingblewo; ne medrɔ̃ ʋɔnu amesiwo katã le vlo dom wo le goawo katã me la, woawo ano anyi bɔkɔɔ, eye wòadze sii be, nye Yehowa ye nye woƒe Mawu.

Title: XEZEKIEL 29
Content:
Le Egipte ŋuti.
1Le ƒe ewolia me, le dzinu ewolia ƒe ŋkeke wuievelia dzi la Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, trɔ ŋgɔ de Egipte-fia Farao, eye nagblɔ nya ɖi ɖe eya kple Egipte blibo la ŋu. 3Ƒo nu gblɔ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Egipte-fia Farao, mele ƒoƒo ge ɖe dziwò, wò lo gã, si tsyɔ akɔ ɖe Nil-tɔsisi titina hele gbɔgblɔm be: „Tɔnyee nye tɔsisi la, eye nyee wɔe.“ 4Matso ƒu aƒo ɖe alɔxatsa me na wò, eye mana wò tɔwo me lãwo nalé ɖe wò tsrokpa ŋu, mahe wò ado goe tso wò to me, eye wò tɔwo me lãwo katã alé ɖe wò tsrokpa ŋu. 5Matsɔ wò aƒu gbe ɖe gbegbe, eye nadze dogba dzi le gbe me, womafɔ wò aƒo ƒu o, eye womaɖi wò o, matsɔ wò awɔ nuɖuɖui na gbemelãwo kple dziƒoxewo. 6Eye Egiptetɔwo katã adze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa, elabena wonye aƒlati na Israel ƒe aƒe la; 7ne wolé wò kple asi la, aŋe avuvu woƒe asi blibo la, eye ne woziɔ ɖe ŋuwò la, àŋe aƒo ɖe woƒe ali me blibo la.
8Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, mahe yi ava dziwò, eye matsrɔ̃ amegbetɔ kple lã le dziwò. 9Eye Egipte-nyigba azu aƒedo kple gbegbe, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. Esi nègblɔ be, ye toe nye Nil-tɔsisi la, eye yee wɔe ŋuti la, 10eyata kpɔ ɖa, maƒo ɖe mia kple wò tɔsisiwo dzi, eye mana Egipte-nyigba nazu gbegbe kple aƒedo, tso Migdol va ke ɖe Siene ɖaseɖe Kus ƒe liƒo dzi. 11Amegbetɔ ƒe afɔ kple lã ƒe afɔ mato edzi o, eye ame manɔ edzi o ƒe blane. 12Mana Egipte-nyigba nazu aƒedo abe anyigba, siwo wogblẽ ene, eye eƒe duwo atsi anyi aƒedoe abe du gbagbã wo ene ƒe blane; makaka Egiptetɔwo ɖe dukɔwo dome, eye mahlẽ wo ɖe anyigbawo dzi.
13Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Le ƒe blane megbe la maƒo Egiptetɔwo nu ƒu tso dukɔwo dome, afisi woka hlẽ ɖo; 14magaɖo Egiptetɔwo te, eye mana woatrɔ agbɔ va Patros-nyigba, si nye wo denyigba la dzi, eye woanye fiaɖuƒe suea ɖe le afima. 15Ano sue le fiaɖuƒewo dome, eye magakɔ ta dzi ɖe dukɔwo ŋu azɔ o, mana woanɔ ʋee, ne womagafanya dukɔwo o. 16Israel ƒe aƒe la magaɖo ŋu ɖe wo ŋu azɔ, ne woaɖo ŋku vodada dzi na wo, nenye be, woku ɖe wo ŋu la o; eye wòadze sii be, nyee nye Aƒetɔ Yehowa.
17Le ƒe blave vɔ adrelia me le dzinu gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi la Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 18Amevi, Babel-fia Nebukadnezar na eƒe aʋakɔ wɔ dɔ sesẽ ɖe Tiro ŋu, tawo katã bebe, eye abɔtawo ɖe bo, ke eya kple eƒe aʋakɔ la mekpɔ fetua ɖeke tso Tiro gbɔ ɖe dɔ, si wòwɔ ɖe eŋu la la o. 19Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, matsɔ Egipte-nyigba ade asi na Babel-fia Nebukadnezar, eye woatɔ eƒe kesinɔnuwo adzoe, aɖe aboyonu, eye wòaha nu; esia anye fetu na eƒe aʋakɔ. 20Matsɔ Egipte-nyigba nɛ wòanye eƒe fetu, si ta wòwɔ dɔ ɖo, elabena nyee wòwɔ dɔ na, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 21Ɣemaɣi la mana Israel ƒe aƒe la nato dzo, eye maʋu nu na wò le wo dome, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.

Title: XEZEKIEL 30
Content:
Nebukadnezar aŋe Egipte ƒe ŋusẽ nu, eye Mawu ado ŋusẽ Nebukadnezar.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, gblɔ nya ɖi gblɔ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mixa nu be: Baba na ŋkeke la! 3Elabena ŋkeke la gogo, Yehowa ƒe ŋkeke la tu aƒe, blukɔdogbe anye dukɔwo ƒe azã la. 4Yi age ɖe Egipte, eye ŋɔdzi alé Kus, nenye be, amewo tsi aʋa le Egipte, wolɔ eƒe kesinɔnuwo dzoe, eye wogbã eƒe agunuwo. 5Kus, Put, Lud kple dukɔ tsakatsakawo katã, Lub kple dzoɖuxɔlɔ̃wo ƒe viwo atsi yi nu akpe ɖe wo ŋu.
6Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi; Egipte ƒe ziɔɖeŋu amũ, eye eƒe ŋusẽ ƒe adegbeƒoƒo ayi to; woatsi yi nu tso Migdol vaseɖe Siene, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 7Woatsi gbegbe le anyigba, siwo wogblẽ la dome, eye eƒe duwo anɔ du gbagbãwo dome. 8Eye wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa, ne medo dzo ɖe Egipte, eye megbã eƒe xɔnametɔwo katã nyanyanya. 9Gbemagbe la ame dɔdɔwo atso gbɔnye aɖo ʋuwo, ne woaɖado vɔ̃ɖi na Kus, si li bɔkɔɔ la, eye ŋɔdzi alé wo le Egipte ƒe ŋkeke la ta; elabena kpɔ ɖa, ele vava ge.
10Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Matsi Egipte ƒe hoowɔwɔ nu to Babel-fia Nebukadnezar dzi. 11Woakplɔ eya kple eƒe dukɔ, si nye dukɔ sẽŋuta la vɛ, ne woagblẽ anyigba la, woadi woƒe yiwo ɖe Egipte ŋu, eye woatsɔ ame tsiaʋawo ayɔ anyigba dzi fũ. 12Mana tɔsisiwo naƒu kplakplakpla; matsɔ anyigba la adzra na ame vɔ̃ɖiwo, eye mana ame tutɔwo nagblẽ anyigba la kple edzi nuwo. Nye Yehowa ye ƒo nu!
13Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Matsrɔ̃ legbawo, eye mana trɔ̃wo nu natso le Nof, amegãa ɖeke maganɔ Egipte-nyigba nu azɔ o, eye makaka ŋɔdzi ɖe Egipte-nyigba dzi. 14Matsrɔ̃ Patros, matɔ dzo Zoan, eye mahe to na No; 15matrɔ nye dziku akɔ ɖe Sin, si nye Egipte ƒe mɔ̃ sesẽ la dzi, eye matsi hoowɔwɔ nu le No. 16Matɔ dzo Egipte: Sin alé ku ŋɔdzitɔe, woagbã No, eye woaxaxa Nof ɖo le ŋdɔkutsu dzatsɛ. 17On kple Pibeset ƒe ɖekakpuiwo atsi yi nu, eye nyɔnuwo ayi aboyo me. 18Ŋkeke ado viviti le Taxpanxes, ne meŋe Egipte ƒe atikplɔ, eye mena eƒe ŋusẽ ƒe adegbeƒoƒo nu tso; blukɔ atsyɔ eya ŋutɔ, eye woade aboyo eƒe duwo. 19Eye mahe to na Egipte, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.
20Le ƒe wuiɖekɛlia me, le dzinu gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkeke adrelia dzi la Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 21Amevi, meŋe alɔ na Egipte-fia Farao, womablae, ne wòahaya o, eye womablae, ne ŋusẽ naɖo eŋu, ne wòalé yi o. 22Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, maƒo ɖe Egipte-fia Farao dzi, eye míaŋe eƒe alɔwo, nyuitɔ kple ŋeŋea, eye mana yi nage le esi. 23Makaka Egiptetɔwo ɖe dukɔwo dome, eye mahlẽ wo ɖe anyigbawo dzi. 24Maɖo ŋusẽ Babel-fia ƒe alo, eye matso nye yi ade asi nɛ; maŋe Farao ƒe alo, eye wòano ŋeŋem le eƒe ŋku me, abe alesi ame tsiaʋa ŋenae ene. 25Mado ŋusẽ Babel-fia ƒe alɔ, ke Farao ƒe alɔ aɖiɖi ɖe anyi, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa, ne metsɔ nye yi de asi na Babel-fia, be wòado ɖe Egipte-nyigba dzi. 26Makaka Egiptetɔwo ɖe dukɔwo dome, eye mahlẽ wo ɖe anyigbawo dzi, ne woadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.

Title: XEZEKIEL 31
Content:
Asiria hã agble be Egipte ene.
1Le ƒe wuiɖekɛlia me, le dzinu etɔ̃lia ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi la Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, gblɔ na Egipte-fia Farao kple eƒe ame gbogboawo bena: Amekae nẽsɔ kplii le wò gãnyenye me? 3Sederti nɔ Libanon ta me, eƒe alɔwo nyo, eye wòdo kpekpekpe, ekɔ, eye eƒe ɖɔmee ɖatɔ alilikpowo. 4Tsiwo na wòtsi, eye agu me tsiwo na wòkɔ, woƒe tɔsisiwo si ƒo xlã ati dodo la, eye woɖe tɔʋuwo ɖo ɖe gbemetiwo katã. 5Eyata wòkɔ wu gbemetiwo katã, eƒe alɔwo sɔ gbɔ, eye wodidi, elabena ekpɔ tsi geɖe, ne wòavu eɖokui. 6Dziƒoxewo katã wɔ atɔ ɖe eƒe alɔwo me, gbemelãwo katã dzi vi ɖe eƒe alɔwo te, eye dukɔ geɖewo le eƒe vɔvɔli te. 7Eƒe lolome nyo, eye eƒe alɔwo didi, elabena eƒe kewo le tsi geɖewo ŋu. 8Sedertiwo medo vɔvɔli ɖe edzi le Mawu ƒe abɔ me o; sesewu mede eƒe alɔwo nu o, eye xetiwo meɖe alɔ abe eya ene o; ati, siwo katã le Mawu ƒe abɔ me la, menyo de enu o. 9Mewɔe wònyo le eƒe alɔ gbogboawo la, ale be Eden-ti, siwo katã le Mawu ƒe abɔ me la, le ŋu ʋãmi.
10Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi wòkɔ alea, eƒe ɖɔmee ɖatɔ alilikpowo, eye wòle dadam le eƒe kɔkɔ ta la, 11eyata màtsɔe ade asi na dukɔwo ƒe ŋusẽtɔ, eye wòawɔ nu kplii; le eƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ta la manyãe ɖa. 12Du bubu me tɔ, siwo nye dukɔ sẽŋutawo la, lae, eye wotsɔe ƒu anyi; eƒe alɔwo dze towo dzi kple baliwo katã me, eye eƒe alɔwo fli ɖe anyigba ƒe gbadza ƒe wo katã; anyigba dzi dukɔwo katã dzo le eƒe vɔvɔli te hegblẽe ɖi. 13Dziƒoxewo katã dze ɖe eƒe zekpẽ, si wolã la dzi, eye gbemelãwo katã mlɔ eƒe alɔwo dzi; 14ne ati, siwo katã le tɔ to, magaƒo adegbe le woƒe koko ta, woƒe ɖɔmee magato alilikpo, eye woƒe ŋusẽtɔ, siwo katã nye tsinolawo la, magaɖo dzi ɖe wo ɖokui ŋu le woƒe gãnyenye me o! Elabena kuviwo wo katã wonye, eye wòayi tsieƒe abe amegbetɔvi, siwo yi aʋli me la ene.
15Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Gbesigbe wòyi tsieƒe la, mena agu me tsiwo xa nu le eta, wogbugbɔ woƒe tɔsisiwo ɖe megbe, be woƒe tsiwo nu tso; Libanon ta ahovɔ le eta, eye gbemetiwo katã yrɔ le eta. 16Eƒe anyidzedze ƒe ɖiɖi na dukɔwo dzo nyanyanya esi mena wòyi tsieƒe kpe ɖe aʋli me yilawo ŋu; eye Eden-tiwo katã, Libanon ƒe ati tiatia nyuitɔwo, siwo katã nye tsinolawo, fa akɔ na wo ɖokui le tsieƒe. 17Woawo hã yi amesiwo woda yii la gbɔ le tsieƒe, amesiwo nye eƒe alɔ nɔ eƒe vɔvɔli te le dukɔwo dome. 18Azɔ Eden-tiwo dometɔ ka nèsɔ kpli le atsyɔ̃ kple lolo gome? Ke woatsɔ wò aƒu tsieƒe akpe ɖe Eden-tiwo ŋu; bolotɔwo dome namlɔ le amesiwo woda yii la gbɔ. Farao kple eƒe ame gbogboawo katã nye esia, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: XEZEKIEL 32
Content:
Egiptetɔwo hã wòayi aʋli me abe dukɔ bubuawo ene.
1Le ƒe wuievelia me, le dzinu wuievelia fe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi la Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, to konyifaha ɖe Egipte-fia Farao ŋu nagblɔ nɛ bena: Wò amesi nye dzata le dukɔwo dome la, nuwò yi! Lo nènye nɔ tɔ me, ètu tsi to ŋɔti me, ètsɔ wò afɔ blu tɔe, eye nènyã avuzi le tɔsisi me. 3Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mana dukɔ, siwo kpe ta, nada ɖɔ na wò, eye woatsɔ nye ɖɔ ahe wò ɖe go. 4Matsɔ wò axlã ɖe anyi, matsɔ wò aƒu gbe ɖe dogba dzi, eye mana dziƒoxewo katã nadze ɖe dziwò, eye anyigba blibo la dzi lãwo naɖu wò aɖi ƒo. 5Matsɔ wò lã ada ɖe towo dzi, eye matsɔ wò kukua ayɔ baliwo me fũ. 6Mana anyigba, si dzi wò tsi gbagba ɖo la, nanɔ wò ʋu vaseɖe towo gbɔ ke, eye nayɔ baliwo me taŋ. 7Ne mena nuwò yi la, matsyɔ nu na dziŋgɔli, eye eƒe ɣletiviwo ata ahovɔ; alilikpo atsyɔ ɣe dzi, eye dzinu magaɖi o. 8Mata ahovɔ na dziƒo ƒe nu keklẽwo katã le tawò, eye mana blukɔ nado ɖe wò anyigba dzi, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 9Mado nuxaxa na dukɔ geɖewo ƒe dzi, ne mehe wò anyidzedze yi dukɔwo dome le anyigba, siwo menya o la dzi. 10Mana dzidzi naƒo dukɔ geɖewo le tawo, eye woƒe fiawo ƒe lãme able fu le tawò, ne menyẽ nye yi le wo ŋku me, eye wo dome amesiame anɔ dzodzom nyanyanya ɣeawokatãɣi le woƒe agbe ta le wò anyidzegbe. 11Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Babel-fia ƒe yi aƒo ɖe dziwò. 12Matsɔ kalẽtɔwo ƒe yi adza wò ame gbogboawo, amesiwo katã nye dukɔ sẽŋutawo; woagblẽ Egipte ƒe atsyɔ̃ dome, eye woatsrɔ̃ eƒe ame gbogboawo katã. 13Matsrɔ̃ eƒe lãwo katã ɖa le tɔ gãwo to, amegbetɔ ƒe afɔ magablu wo azɔ o, eye lãwo ƒe afɔ magablu wo azɔ o. 14Emegbe mana eƒe tsiwo nadze anyi, eye eƒe tɔsisiwo nasi abe ami ene, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe, 15ne medo gbegbe Egipte-nyigba, miegblẽ nusi wo katã le anyigba dzi, eye mewu ame; siwo katã le edzi, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. 16Konyifahae nye esia woadzii; dukɔwo ƒe nyɔnuviwo nedzi konyifaha sia; wòadzi konyifaha sia ɖe Egipte kple eƒe ame gbogboawo katã ŋu, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 17Le ƒe wuievelia me le dzinu la ƒe ŋkeke wuiatɔ̃lia dzi la Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 18Amevi, fa na Egipte ƒe ame gbogboawo, eye mia kple dukɔwo ƒe ŋusẽtɔwo ƒe nyɔnuviwo mido wo de tsieƒe ɖe amesiwo yi aʋli me la gbɔ! 19Ameka nènyo sɔ kplii? Yi naɖamlɔ bolotɔwo gbɔ! 20Woatsi amesiwo woda yii la dome. Wotso yi la ɖe asi; mikplɔ eyama kple eƒe ame gbogboawo katã yii! 21Kalẽtɔwo ƒe ame sesẽwo kple woƒe dzoɖuxɔlɔ̃wo agblɔ le tsieƒe ɖe wo ŋu be: Bolotɔwo, amesiwo woda yii la, va be, woamlɔ afi. 22Asur kple eƒe amehawo katã le afima, woƒe yɔdowo ɖe to ɖee, ame tsiaʋawo soŋ wonye, eye wotsi yi nu. 23Woɖe yɔdo nɛ ɖe aʋli me ƒe dzogoe dzi ke, eye eƒe amehawo ɖe to ɖe eƒe yɔdo; ame tsiaʋawo sɔŋ wonye, eye wotsi yi nu, woawo nye amesiwo de ŋɔdzi agbagbeawo ƒe anyigba dzi. 24Elam le afima, eye eƒe amehawo katã ɖe to ɖe eƒe yɔdo, ame tsiaʋawo sɔŋ wonye, eye wotsi yi nu, wonye bolotɔwo yi tsieƒe, woawoe de ŋɔdzi agbagbeawo ƒe anyigba dzi; azɔ ŋu akpe wo akpe de aʋli me yilawo ŋu. 25Wotsɔ eya kple eƒe amehawo katã mlɔ ame tsiaʋawo dome, woƒe yɔdowo de to ɖee, bolotɔwo sɔŋ wonye, eye woda yi wo, elabena wode ŋɔdzi agbagbeawo ƒe anyigba dzi; azɔ ŋu akpe wo akpe ɖe aʋli me yilawo ŋu; ame tsiaʋawo dome wotsɔ wo mlɔe. 26Mesex kple Tubal kpakple woƒe amehawo katã le afima, eye woƒe yɔdowo ɖe to ɖe wo, bolotɔwo sɔŋ wonye, eye woda yi wo, elabena wode ŋɔdzi agbagbeawo ƒe anyigba dzi. 27Womemlɔ kalẽtɔ, siwo tsi aʋa gbadegbe ke, amesiwo tsɔ woƒe aʋawɔnuwo yi tsieƒe, wotsɔ woƒe yi ziɔ tae, eye woƒe vodadawo lé de woƒe ƒuwo ŋu la gbɔ o, evɔ wònye kalẽtɔawo de ŋɔdzi agbagbeawo ƒe anyigba dzi hafi. 28Woagbã wò hã nyanyanya le bolotɔwo dome, eye àmlɔ amesiwo woda yii la gbɔ. 29Edom kple eƒe fiawo kpakple eƒe amegãwo katã le afima, wotsɔ wo mlɔ amesiwo woda yii la gbɔ, evɔ wònye ŋusẽ le wo ŋu hafi; womlɔ bolotɔwo kple aʋli me yilawo gbɔ. 30Anyiehe amegãwo katã kple Zidonitɔwo katã le afima, woyi ame tsiaʋawo gbɔ, eye ŋukpe lé wo, evɔ wònye woƒe ŋusẽ dzi ŋɔ hafi; azɔ wonye bolotɔwo mlɔ amesiwo woda yii la gbɔ, eye ŋu akpe wo akpe de aʋli me yilawo ŋu. 31Farao akpɔ amesiawo, eye wòafa akɔ na eɖokui le eƒe ame gbogboawo katã ta; amesiwo woda yii enye Farao kple eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 32Mena wòde ŋɔdzi agbagbeawo ƒe anyigba dzi; ke Farao kple eƒe ame gbogboawo katã woamlɔ bolotɔwo dome le amesiwo woda yii la gbɔ, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe.

Title: XEZEKIEL 33
Content:
Le nyagblɔlawo ƒe dɔ ŋuti.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, ƒo nu kple mia deviwo nagblɔ na wo bena: Ne mena yi va anyigbaa ɖe dzi, eye anyigba dzi tɔwo ɖe ame tso wo ɖokui dome tsɔ ɖo gbetakpɔlae, 3ekpɔ yi gbɔna ɖe anyigba la ŋu, eye woku kpẽ xlã nu dukɔ la, 4eye amea ɖe se kpẽa ƒe ɖiɖi, ke mena woxlɔ̃ nui o, eye yi la va ɖee ɖa la, ame ma ƒe ʋu anɔ eya ŋutɔ ƒe ta dzi. 5Ne ese kpẽa ƒe didi, eye mena woxlɔ̃ nui o la, eƒe ʋu anɔ eya ŋutɔ dzi; ke ne ame ma na woxlɔ̃ nui la, ade eƒe agbe. 6Ne gbetakpɔla kpɔ yi gbɔna, ke meku kpẽ o, eye mexlɔ̃ nu dukɔ la o, eye yi va heɖe ame ɖeka ɖa le wo dome la, ame ma ƒe vodada tae woɖee ɖa ɖo, ke mabia eƒe ʋu tso gbetakpɔla la si me. 7Amevi, wòe metsɔ ɖo gbetakpɔla na Israel ƒe aƒe la be, ne èse nyaa ɖe tso nunye me la, naxlɔ̃ nu wo nam. 8Ne megblɔ na ame vɔ̃ɖi be: „Ame vɔ̃ɖi, èle kuku ge,“ ke meƒo nu hexlɔ̃ nu ame vɔ̃ɖi la le eƒe zɔzɔme ŋuti o la, ekema ame vɔ̃ɖi la aku le eƒe vodada ta, ke mabia eƒe ʋu tso asiwò me. 9Ke ne èxlɔ̃ nu ame vɔ̃ɖi la le eƒe zɔzɔme ŋuti, be wòaɖe asi le eŋu, eye wogbe asiɖeɖe le eƒe zɔzɔme ŋu la, ekema aku le eƒe vodada ta, ke wò la èɖe wò agbe.
Mawu ƒe dɔmenyo kple dzɔdzɔenyenye.
10Amevi, gblɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe la bena: Aleke miele gbɔgblɔm be: „Míaƒe dzidadawo kple míaƒe nuvɔ̃wo do agba ɖe mía dzi, eye wona mia nu le yiyim, ɖe míano agbea?“ 11Gblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe be: Ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe ku mevivia nunye o, negbe be, ame vɔ̃ɖi naɖe asi le eƒe zɔzɔme ŋu, ne wòanɔ agbe boŋ ye. Israel ƒe aƒe, miɖe asi le miaƒe zɔzɔme vɔ̃ɖiwo ŋu, miɖe asi le wo ŋu, nukaŋuti miehe, yewoaku ɖo? 12Amevi, gblɔ na mia ɖeviwo bena: Ame dzɔdzɔe ƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye maɖee le gbesigbe wòda ƒu o, eye ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wowu mana wòadze anyi le gbesigbe wòɖe asi le eƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ŋu o; eye ame dzɔdzɔe mate ŋu atsi agbe le gbesigbe wòwɔ nuvɔ̃ o. 13Ne megblɔ na ame dzɔdzɔe be, anɔ agbe kokoko, gake wòɖe asi dziɖoɖo me ɖe eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ŋu, eye wòwɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi la, ekema womagaɖo ŋu eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenyewo katã o, ke boŋ eƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi, si wòwɔ la, eyae ana wòaku. 14Ne megblɔ na ame vɔ̃ɖi be, aku kokoko, gake wòɖe asi le eƒe nuvɔ̃ ŋu, eye wòwɔ nu dzɔdzɔe kple nusi le eteƒe, 15ame vɔ̃ɖi la gbugbɔ awɔbanu na, eɖo nusi wòda adzoe la teƒe, eye wòzɔ ɖe ɖoɖo agbetɔwo nu, be megawɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi azɔ o la, ekema ano agbe kokoko, maku o. 16Womagaɖo ŋu eƒe nuvɔ̃, siwo katã wòwɔ la nɛ o; nu dzodzoe kple nusi le eteƒe lae wòwɔ, eyata anɔ agbe kokoko! 17Ke mia ɖeviwo le gbɔgblɔm be: Aƒetɔ la ƒe nuwɔna mele eteƒe o; evɔ wònye woawo ŋutɔ ƒe nuwɔnae mele eteƒe o hafi. 18Ne ame dzɔdzɔe ɖe asi le eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ŋu hewɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi la, esia tae wòaku ɖo. 19Eye ne ame vɔ̃ɖi ɖe asi le eƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ŋu hewɔ nu dzɔdzɔe kple nusi le eteƒe la, esia tae wòana agbe ɖo. 20Eye ne miele gbɔgblɔm be: Aƒetɔ la ƒe nuwɔna mele eteƒe o hã la, Israel ƒe aƒe, madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu mi ɖe amesiame ƒe zɔzɔme nu!
Nyawo le Yerusalem ƒe gbegblẽ ŋuti.
21Le aboyoɖeɖe mi ƒe ƒe wuiɖekɛlia me, le dzinu ewolia ƒe ŋkeke atɔ̃lia dzi la amea ɖe si tso Yerusalem va gbɔnye gblɔ bena: „Wosi du la!“ 22Eye Yehowa ƒe asi va dzinye le fiẽ, hafi ame sisi la nava, eye wòʋu nu nam, hafi wòva le ŋdi; ale nye nu ʋu, eye nyemegazi kpi azɔ o. 23Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 24Amevi, glikpo dzi vi, siwo le Israel-nyigba dzi la, le gbɔgblɔm be: Abraham la eya ɖeka koliae nɔ anyi, ke exɔ anyigba la wònye etɔ, miawo la míesɔ gbɔ, míawoe wotsɔ anyigba la na, be wòanye mia ta. 25Eyata gblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Miele lã kple ʋu ɖum, mieto mo te ɖe miaƒe legbawo ŋu, eye miele ʋu kɔm ɖi tso, hafi miehe, anyigba la nanye yewo taa? 26Miele dzi ɖom ɖe miaƒe yiwo ŋu, miewɔ ŋunyɔnu, eye amesiame gblẽ kɔ ɖo na ehavi srɔ̃ tso, hafi miebe, anyigba la nanye yewo tɔa? 27Eyata gblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Meta ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Amesiwo le glikpo dzi la, atsi yi nu, matsɔ amesiwo le gbe me la, ana gbemelãwo woaɖu, eye amesiwo le mɔ̃ sesẽwo kple agatowo me la, aku ɖe dɔvɔ̃ si me. 28Mana anyigba la nazu aƒedo kple gbegbe, matsi eƒe ŋusẽ, si ŋu wòle adegbe ƒom ɖo la nu, eye Israel-towo atsi ƒeƒle, ale be amea ɖeke magato wo dzi ayi o. 29Eye woadze sii bena, nyee nye Yehowa, ne mena anyigba la zu aƒedo kple gbegbe le woƒe ŋunyɔnu, siwo katã wowɔ la ta.
Tohehe nyagblɔɖi yeye.
30Amevi, mia ɖeviwo le nu ƒom le ŋuwò le gliwo ŋu kple xɔwo ƒe ʋɔtruwo nu, eye wole gbɔgblɔm le wo nɔewo dome bena: Miva, ne míase gbe, si tso Yehowa gbɔ! 31Woava akpe ta ɖe gbɔwò, eye woabɔbɔ nɔ ŋkuwò me abe nye dukɔ ene ahase wò nyawo, ke womawɔ wo dzi o, hafi boŋ anɔ ŋɔnɔe le nu me na wo, eye woƒe dzi adze viɖe yome. 32Kpɔ ɖa, èle na wo abe ha vivi kple amesi gbe vivi li na, eye wònya kasaŋku ƒoƒo la ene, wòase wò nyawo, ke womawɔ wo dzi o. 33Kpɔ ɖa, ele eme va ge, ne eva me la, wòadze sii be, nyagblɔɖilaa ɖe nɔ yewo dome kpɔ.

Title: XEZEKIEL 34
Content:
Nyagblɔɖi le kplɔla maɖianukwareawo ŋuti.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, gblɔ nya ɖi ɖe Israel ƒe lãkplɔviwo ŋu, lãkplɔviawo ŋue nagblɔ nya ɖo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Baba na Israel ƒe lãkplɔviwo, amesi nyi woawo ŋutɔ ɖokui; ɖe menye lãhawoe lãkplɔviwo nanyi oa? 3Mieno notsi, mietsɔ lãfu wɔ avɔe ta, eye miewu lã damiwo, ke mienyi alẽawo o. 4Miedo ŋusẽ lã kudɔewo o, eye mieyɔ do esiwo ƒe lãme gblẽ o, miebla abi na esiwo ŋe ata o, miegbugbɔ esiwo ka hlẽ la gbɔe o, eye miedi esiwo bu la o, ke boŋ mieɖu amegã ɖe wo dzi kple sesẽ, eye miesẽ ŋuta le wo ŋu. 5Woka hlẽ, elabena kplɔla mele wo nu o, wòzu nuɖuɖu na gbemelãwo katã, eye woka hlẽ. 6Nye alẽwo le tsa glãla tsam le towo katã kple togbɛ kɔkɔwo katã dzi, eye nye alẽwo ka hlẽ ɖe anyigba blibo la dzi; amea ɖeke meli abla wo ta ase alo adi wo o. 7Eyata mi lãkplɔviwo, mise Yehowa ƒe nya! 8Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Esi nye alẽwo zu nuhaha, eye nye alẽwo zu nuɖuɖu na gbemelãwo katã, elabena kplɔlaa ɖeke meli o, eye nye lãkplɔviwo mebiaa nye alẽwo ta sena o, lãkplɔviawo nyi woawo ŋutɔ ɖokui, eye wogbe nye alẽwo nyinyi la, 9eyata mi lãkplɔviwo, mise Yehowa ƒe nya! 10Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, maƒo ɖe lãkplɔviawo dzi, eye mabia nye alẽwo tso wo si me, mana be, womagakpɔ nye alẽwo dzi azɔ o, eye lãkplɔviawo maganyi woawo ŋutɔ ɖokui azɔ o, maɖe nye alẽwo le ve me na wo, be womaganye nuɖuɖu na wo azɔ o.
Aƒetɔ la ŋutɔ akpɔ eƒe alẽha la dzi.
11Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, meli maɖi nye alẽwo, eye malé ŋku ɖe wo ŋu. 12Alesi lãkplɔvi ɖea ŋku ɖe eƒe lãhawo le gbesigbe wòle eƒe alé, siwo ka hlẽ dome la, nenema maɖe ŋku ɖe nye alẽwo, eye maɖi wo aƒo ƒu tso teƒe, siwo katã woka hlẽ ɖo le blukɔ kple tsizidogbe la. 13Makplɔ wo tso dukɔwo dome, eye maƒo wo nu ƒu tso anyigbawo dzi, makplɔ wo ava woƒe anyigba dzi, eye manyi wo le Israel ƒe towo dzi kple bali wo me kpakple anyigba la ƒe amenɔƒewo katã. 14Manyi wo le lãnyiƒe nyuiwo, eye woƒe gbeɖuƒe anɔ Israel ƒe to kɔkɔwo ta me; afima woatsyɔ akɔ ɖo le gbeɖuƒe nyuiwo, eye lãnyiƒe damawo anɔ wo si le Israel-towo dzi. 15Nye ŋutɔ manyi nye alẽwo, eye mana woatsyɔ akɔ anyi ɖi, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 16Madi esiwo bu, eye makplɔ tsiwo ka hlẽ la agbɔe, mabia abi na esiwo ŋe ala, eye maɖo ŋusẽ esiwo ƒe lãme gblẽ, makpɔ esiwo da ami, kple esiwo ƒe lãme sẽ la ta, eye manyi wo, abe alesi dze ene.
17Mi, nye lãhawo, ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu le alẽ kple alẽ dome, le agbo kple gbɔ̃tsu dome. 18Esi miele gbe ɖum le lãnyiƒe nyui la, nu tsɛ ko wònye na mi, hafi mienyã avuzi le miaƒe gbe mamlea dzia? Eye esi miele tsi zɔzrɔ̃e nom la, nu tsɛ ko wònye na nu, hafi mietsɔ afɔ blu mamlea, 19ne nye alẽwo naɖu nusi dzi mienyã avuzi le, eye woano nusi mieblu kple afɔa? 20Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, meli, eye madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu le alẽ dami kple alẽ ɖiku dome. 21Esi mietsɔ axadame kple abɔgba mimi lã kudɔeawo katã ɖo, eye mietu dzo wo, vaseɖe esime mienyã wo do goe la, 22eyata maxɔ na nye alẽwo, eye womaganye nuhaha azɔ o, eye madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu le alẽ kple alẽ dome.
Kplɔla, si ado go tso Dawid ƒe me ŋugbedodo.
23Maɖo kplɔla ɖeka kolia, si nye nye dɔla Dawid la, wo nu, ne wòanyi wo; eya anyi wo, eye wòanye kplɔla ha wo. 24Nye Yehowa manye Mawu na wo, eye nye dɔla Dawid anye amegã le wo dome; nye Yehowa ye gblɔe. 25Mabia ŋutifafa ƒe nu kpli wo, eye matsrɔ̃ lã vɔ̃ɖiwo ɖa le anyigba dzi, ne woanɔ gbegbe aɖe dzi ɖi, eye woatsi avewo me adɔ. 26Mayra woawo kple nye togbɛ ƒe nutowo me, eye mana tsi nadza ɖe edzaɣi, yayra ƒe tsi wòanye. 27Gbemeti atse ku, anyigba awu nu, eye woano woƒe anyigba dzi aɖe dzi ɖi, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa, ne meŋe woƒe kɔkuti, eye meɖe wo tso amesiwo wonye kluvi na la si me. 28Womaganye nuhaha na dukɔwo azɔ o, gbemelã magaɖu wo o, eye woanɔ anyi aɖe dzi ɖi, amea ɖeke maɖo voɖi na wo o. 29Ma na nudodo namie na wo ade ŋkɔ wo ŋu, ne dɔwuame magatsrɔ̃ wo ɖa le anyigba dzi azɔ o, eye dukɔwo magado ŋukpe wo azɔ o. 30Eye wòadze sii be, nye Yehowa, woƒe Mawu la, meli kpli wo, eye woawo, Israel ƒe aƒe la, wonye nye dukɔ, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe! 31Ke miawoe nye nye alẽwo, mi amegbetɔwoe nye nye lãnyiƒe ƒe alẽwo la, eye nyee nye mia Mawu; Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: XEZEKIEL 35
Content:
Nyagblɔɖi le Edom ŋuti.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, trɔ mo de Seir-to la, eye nagblɔ nya ɖi ɖe eŋu 3gblɔ nɛ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Seir-to, mele ƒoƒo ge ɖe dziwò, mado nye asi ɖa ɖe ŋuwo, eye matsɔ wò awɔ gbegbe kple aƒedoe. 4Mado aƒe do wò duwo, eye wò ŋutɔ azu gbegbe, ne nadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. 5Esi nèlé fu ame ɖikaɖika, eye nètsɔ Israel-viwo de asi na yi ie dzɔgbevɔ̃eɣi kple vodadawo ƒe nuwuwu la, 6eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Meta ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Ne nyematsɔ wò awɔ ʋui, eye ʋu nati yowòme o fi! Ʋuhlɔ̃e nèdo, eyata ʋu ati yowòme! 7Matsɔ Seir-to la awɔ aƒedo kple gbegbee, eye matsrɔ̃ amesiwo vana kple amesiwo dzona la ɖa le edzi. 8Matsɔ wò ame tsiaʋawo ayɔ wò towo dzii, eye amesiwo woda yii la, atsi wò togbɛwo dzi, wò baliwo me kple wò gbadzaƒewo katã. 9Matsɔ wò awɔ gbegbee ɖikaa, eye wò duwo atsi anyi aƒedoe, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.
10Esi nèle gbɔgblɔm be, dukɔ eve mawo kple anyigba eve mawo anye ye tɔ, eye yewoe axɔe wòanye yewo tɔ, evɔ wònye Yehowa nɔ afima kpɔ hafi la, 11eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Metà ɖokuinye ƒe agbe: Mawɔ nu kpli wò ɖe wò dɔmedzoe kple wò ŋuʋaʋã nu, abe alesi nele fu wo wɔ ene, eye maɖe ɖokuinye afia le wo dome, ne medrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wò. 12Eye nadze sii be, nye Yehowa mese wò ɖiŋudonya, siwo katã negblɔ ɖe Israel ƒe towo ŋu bena: „Wòzu gbegbe, miawoe wotsɔe na, be miaɖu.“ 13Mietsɔ miaƒe nuwo ƒo adegbe ɖe ŋunye, eye miedudu nya ƒo ɖi bababa ɖe ŋunye mese. 14Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Matsɔ wò awɔ gbegbee, ne dzi nadzo anyigba blibo la. 15Alesi nekpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe anyigba ŋu be, ezu gbegbe la, nenema ke mawo wòe; Seir-to kple Edom blibo la azu gbegbe, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.

Title: XEZEKIEL 36
Content:
Israel ɖeɖe.
1Wò amevi, gblɔ nya ɖi ɖe Israel-towo ŋu gblɔ bena: Mi Israel-towo, mise Yehowa ƒe nya! 2Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi futɔ la le ehẽ dom ɖe mia ŋu be, blematowo zu yewo tɔ la, 3eyata gblɔ nya ɖi gblɔ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi wogblẽ mi, eye wole tsyo dam ɖe mia ŋu le goawo katã me, ne miazu dukɔ susɔeawo tɔ, eye amewo le nu ƒom le mia ŋu hele aɖeɖi ƒom mi la, 4eyata mi Israel-towo, mise Aƒetɔ Yehowa ƒe nya! Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ ɖe towo kple togbɛwo, balimewo kple gbadzaƒewo, glikpo gbagbãwo kple du ƒuƒluwo, siwo zu nuhaha kple alɔmeɖenu na dukɔwo ƒe mamleawo godoo la ŋu enye si: 5Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Matsɔ nye ŋuʋaʋã ƒe dzobibi aƒo nu kple dukɔwo ƒe susɔea kpakple Edom blibo la, amesiwo tsɔ nye anyigba wɔ wo ɖokui tɔe, woƒe dzi le nu kom nyrenyrenyre, eye wole alɔme ɖem, le esi wotsɔe na wòzu nuhaha la ta. 6Eyata gblɔ nya ɖi ɖe Israel-nyigba ŋu, eye nagblɔ ma towo kple togbɛwo, balimewo kple gbadzaƒewo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, meƒo nu le nye ŋuʋaʋã kple nye dziku me bena: Esi mietsɔ dukɔwo ƒe ŋukpedoame la, 7eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mekɔ nye asi dzi heka atam be: Dukɔ, siwo ɖe to ɖe mi godoo la, atsɔ woawo ŋutɔ ƒe ŋukpe!
8Ke mi Israel-towo, miɖe ama, eye mitse ku na nye dukɔ Israel, elabena woƒe gbɔgbɔɣi tu aƒe. 9Elabena kpɔ ɖa, mele mia gbɔ, eye matrɔ ɖe mia ŋu, woade agble ɖe mia dzi, eye woaƒã nu ɖe mia dzi! 10Mana Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la ƒe amewo nasɔ gbɔ ɖe mia dzi, amewo anɔ duwo me, eye woaɖo gli gbagbãwo. 11Mana amegbetɔwo kple lãwo nasɔ gbɔ ɖe mia dzi, woakeke ta, eye wòadzi; mana ame nanɔ mia dzi abe tsã ene, eye mawɔ nyui na mi wu tsã, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. 12Mana amegbetɔwo, nye dukɔ Israel, nazɔ mia dzi, woaxɔ wò, eye nazu woƒe domenyinu, eye magaɖe vi le wo ŋu azɔ o. 13Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Esi wole gbɔgblɔm na mi be, amelãɖula nenye, eye nèɖe vi le wò ŋutɔ wò dukɔ ŋu la, 14eyata màgaɖu amelã azɔ o, eye magaɖe vi le wò dukɔ ŋu azɔ o, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 15Nyemena nagase dukɔwo ƒe vlodoame azɔ o, màgatso dukɔwo ƒe ŋukpedoame azɔ o, eye màgaɖe vi le wò dukɔ ŋu azɔ o, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe.
Dzi yeye ŋugbedodo.
16Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 17Amevi, esi Israel ƒe aƒe la nɔ woƒe anyigba dzi la, wotsɔ woƒe zɔzɔme kple woƒe nuwɔnawo do gui; woƒe zɔzɔ le ŋkunye me abe nyɔnu kpɔdzinu ƒe ʋu ene. 18Eyata metrɔ nye dziku ƒo ɖe wo dzi le ʋu, si wokɔ ɖe anyigba dzi, kple woƒe legba, siwo wotsɔ gblẽ kɔ ɖo nɛ la ta. 19Mekaka wo ɖe dukɔwo dome, eye mehlẽ wo ɖe anyigbawo dzi; woƒe zɔzɔme kple woƒe nuwɔnawo nue medrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wo ɖo. 20Eye esi wova dukɔwo dome la, wodo gu nye ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la, le afisiafi, si woyi, ale be wole gbɔgblɔm le wo ŋu bena: „Yehowa ƒe dukɔe nye esia, eye eƒe anyigba dzi woɖu tso“ 21Tete wòvem le nye ŋkɔ kɔkɔe, si Israel-viwo do gui le dukɔwo dome, afisi woyi la ta. 22Eyata gblɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe la bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Israel ƒe aƒe, menye mia ta mele ewɔm ɖo o, ke boŋ nye ŋkɔ kɔkɔe, si mieɖo gui le dukɔwo dome, afisi míeyi la lae. 23Eye makɔ nye ŋkɔ gã, si wodo gui le dukɔwo dome, esi miawo miedo gui le wo dome la ŋuti, eye dukɔwo adze sii bena, nyee nye Yehowa, ne mekɔ ɖokuinye ŋu le wo ŋku me ɖe mia ŋuti, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 24Makplɔ mi atso dukɔwo dome, eye maƒo mia nu ƒu atso anyigbawo katã dzi ahakplɔ mi ava miaƒe anyigba dzii. 25Mahlẽ tsi dzadzɛ ɖe mia ŋu, ne miaƒe nu makɔmakɔwo katã naɖi le mia ŋu, eye maklɔ miaƒe legbawo katã da le mia ŋu. 26Mana dzi yeye mi, eye maɖe gbɔgbɔ yeye mia me, maɖe kpedzi la le miaƒe dɔ me, eye mana lãkusidzi mi. 27Maɖe nye gbɔgbɔ mia me, eye mana be, miazɔ ɖe nye ɖoɖowo kple nye sewo nu, ne mialé wo me ɖe asi ahawɔ wo dzi. 28Eye mianɔ anyigba, si metsɔ na mia fofowo la dzi, mianye dukɔ nam, eye manye mia Mawu. 29Maɖe mi atso miaƒe nu makɔmakɔwo katã me; mayɔ bli vɛ, mana wòasɔ gbɔ, eye nyemahe dɔwuame ava mia dzi o. 30Mana atikutsetsewo kple agble me nukuwo nasɔ gbɔ, ne miagahe dukɔwo ƒe vlodoame ava mia ɖokui dzi le dɔwuame ta azɔ oa 31Miaɖo ŋu miaƒe zɔzɔme vɔ̃ɖiawo kple miaƒe nuwɔna manyomanyoawo, eye miava ŋu nya ge na mia ŋutɔwo mia ɖokui le miaƒe vodadawo kple miaƒe ŋunyɔnuwo ta. 32Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Menye mia tae mele ewɔm ɖo o, minyae loo! Israel ƒe aƒe, ŋu nekpe mi, eye miaƒe mo netsi dã le miaƒe zɔzɔme ta!
Anyigba nyui la ŋugbedodo.
33Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Gbesigbe makɔ mia ŋu tso miaƒe vodadawo katã me la, mana ame nanɔ duawo me, eye woagaɖo gli gbagbãwo. 34Woade anyigba, si nye gbegbe la, ɖe esi wònye gbegbe le amesiwo katã va tsoa eme yina ŋku me la teƒe; 35eye woagblɔ bena: „Anyigba, si nye gbegbe tsã la, zu abe Eden-bɔ ene, ame le ɖu, siwo nye aƒedo kple gbegbe, eye wogbã wo ƒu anyi tsã la me, eye wozu du sesẽwo.“ 36Eye dukɔ mamlea, siwo ƒo xlã mi godoo la, adze sii bena, nye Yehowa ye tso du, siwo wogbã ƒu anyi, eye mede anyigba, si nye gbegbe la; nye Yehowa ye ƒo nu, eye mawo edzi hã. 37Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Mana Israel ƒe aƒe la naɖe kuku nam ɖe esia hã ta, eye mawɔe na wo: Mana woƒe amewo nasɔ gbɔ abe alẽwo ene. 38Alesi ale, siwo ŋu wokɔ, kple alesi alẽ nɔa Yerusalem le ŋkekenyuieɖuɣii la, nenema amehawo ayɔ du ɖi aƒedo la mee, eye wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.

Title: XEZEKIEL 37
Content:
Israel fe tsitretsitsi.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe asi va dzinye, eye wòtsɔ Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ kplɔm yi ɖada ɖe tagba, si yɔ fũ kple ameƒuwo. 2Ekplɔm towo ŋui godoo, kpɔ ɖa, wosɔ gbɔ le tagba la fũ, eye woƒu kplakplakpla. 3Tete wògblɔ nam be: Amevi, ɖe ƒu siawo agagbɔ agbea? Meɖo ŋu bena: Aƒetɔ Yehowa, wò ŋutɔ ènyae! 4Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Gblɔ nya ɖi ɖe ƒu siawo ŋu gblɔ na wo bena: Mi ƒu ƒuƒuwo, mise Yehowa ƒe nya! 5Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ na ƒu siawo enye si: Made gbɔgbɔ mia me, ne miagbɔ agbe. 6Made lãmeka mia ŋu, eye mana lã naɖo mia ŋu; mafa agbalẽ ɖe mia ŋu, eye made gbɔgbɔ mia me, be miagbɔ agbe, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. 7Eye megblɔ nya ɖi, abe alesi wode se nam ene. Esi megblɔ nya ɖi la, hoowɔwɔ le ɖiɖim, ƒuawo le kpekpem ɖe wo nɔewo nu, eye wo dome ɖesiaɖe va nɔvia gbɔ. 8Eye meɖo ŋku anyi hekpɔ bena, lãmeka dowo ŋu, lã ɖo wo ŋu, eye agbalẽ fa ɖe edzi, ke gbɔgbɔ mekpɔ ɖo wo me haɖe o. 9Tete wògblɔ nam bena: Gblɔ nya ɖi do ɖe gbɔgbɔ, amevi, gblɔ nya ɖi, eye nagblɔ na gbɔgbɔ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Gbɔgbɔ tso ya eneawo gbɔ nava, agbɔ ɖe ame kuku siawo me, ne woagbã agbe! 10Eye megblɔ nya ɖi, abe alesi wode se nam la ene. Tete gbɔgbɔ va ɖo wo me, eye wogbɔ agbe hetso ɖe woƒe afɔwo dzi, aʋakɔ gã nyadria ɖe wonye. 11Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Ƒu siawo nye Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la! Kpɔ ɖa, wole gbɔgblɔm be: „Tsi no le míaƒe ƒuwo me, miaƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ nu yi, eye miebu!“ 12Eyata gblɔ nya ɖi nagblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Nye dukɔ, kpɔ ɖa, mele miaƒe yɔdowo ʋu ge, mana miado atso miaƒe yɔdowo me, eye makplɔ mi ayi miaƒe anyigba dzi. 13Nye dukɔ, miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa, ne meʋu miaƒe yɔdowo, eye mena mieɖo tso miaƒe yɔdowo me. 14Made nye gbɔgbɔ mia me, ne miagbɔ agbe, eye makplɔ mi aɖo miaƒe anyigba dzi, ne miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. Yehowa be: Nyee gblɔe, eye mawɔe hã.
Israel dzadzraɖo.
15Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 16Amevi, tsɔ ati naŋlɔ nu ɖe edzi be: „Yuda kple Israel-vi, siwo wɔ ɖeka kplii la tɔe.“ Eye gatsɔ ati bubu naŋlɔ nu ɖe edzi bena: „Yosef, si nye Efrayim ƒe ali, kple Israel ƒe aƒe blibo, si wɔ ɖeka kplii la tɔe.“ 17Eye natsiã wo ɖe wo nɔewo nu, ne woanye ati ɖeka anɔ asiwò me. 18Eye ne mia ɖeviwo gblɔ na wò bena: Gblɔ gɔme, si le eme na wò na yewo la, 19ekema gblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, matsɔ Yosef ƒe ati, si le Efrayim si, kple Israel-to, siwo wo ɖeka kplii la, atsiã ɖe Yuda ƒe ati nu, eye matsɔ wo awɔ ɖekae, ne woanye ati ɖeka anɔ asinye me. 20Lé ati, siwo dzi neŋlɔ nu ɖo la, ɖe asi le wo ŋku me, 21eye nagblɔ na wo bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, maɖakplɔ Israel-viwo atso dukɔwo dome, afisi woʋu yi, eye maƒo wo nu ƒu atso goawo katã me ava woƒe anyigba dzi. 22Matsɔ wo awɔ dukɔ ɖekae ɖe anyigba dzi le Israel-towo dzi, eye fia ɖeka anye wo katã ƒe fia, womaganye dukɔ eve azɔ o, eye womagamã ɖe fiaɖu ƒe eve me azɔ o. 23Womagatsɔ woƒe legbawo kple woƒe ŋunyɔnuwo kpakple woƒe dzidadawo katã agblẽ kɔ ɖo na wo ɖokui azɔ o, maɖe wo tso woƒe dzidada, siwo katã wotsɔ wɔ nuvɔ̃e la me, eve makɔ wo ŋu, ne woanye nye dukɔ, eye manye Mawu na wo. 24Nye dɔla Dawid anye fia ɖe wo nu, eye kplɔla ɖeka ana wo katã si, woazɔ ɖe nye sewo nu, eye woalé nye ɖoɖowo me ɖe asi ahawɔ wo dzi. 25Woanɔ anyigba, si dzi wo fofowo no, eye metsɔ na nye dɔla Yakob la dzi, woawo kple wo viwo kpakple wo viwo ƒe viwo ana edzi tegbee, eye nye dɔla Dawid anye amegã ɖe wò nu tegbee. 26Mabia ŋutifafa ƒe nu kpli wo, nubabla mavɔ wòanye na wo, malé wo ɖe te, madzi wo ɖe dzi, eye mali nye kɔkɔeƒe la ɖe wo dome tegbee. 27Nye nɔƒe anɔ wo dome, manye woƒe Mawu, eye woawo anye nye dukɔ. 28Eye dukɔwo adze sii be, nye Yehowa ye ko Israel ŋu, ne nye kɔkɔeƒe la le wo dome tegbee.

Title: XEZEKIEL 38
Content:
Nyagblɔɖi le Gog ƒe anyigba la dzidzedze kple eƒe sisi ŋuti.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va nam bena: 2Amevi, trɔ mo ɖe Gog ŋu le Magog-nyigba dzi, amesi nye amegã le Ros, Mesex kple Tubal, eye nagblɔ nya ɖi ɖe eŋu 3gblɔ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Gog, mele ƒoƒo ge ɖe dziwò, wò amesi nye amegã le Ros, Mesex kple Tubal. 4Mable nuwo, eye made ga alɔgo na wò ahakplɔ mia kple wò aʋakɔ blibo la, sɔwo kple sɔdolawo, adzoe, wo katã woɖo atsyɔ̃, ameha gã, si kpla akpoxɔnu gã kple via, eye wo katã wòlé yi ɖe asi. 5Persia, Kus kple Put kpe ɖe wo ŋu, akpoxɔnu kple gakuku le wo katã si, 6hekpe ɖe Gomer kple eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la, Togarma ƒe aƒe, si le anyiehe kekeake kple eƒe aʋakɔ blibo la ŋu; du geɖe kpe ɖe ŋuwò. 7Dzra ɖokuiwò ɖo, mia kple ameha, siwo katã ƒo ƒu ɖe ŋuwò la, misu te, eye nanye woƒe tatɔ.
8Le ɣeyiɣi geɖe megbe la woade se na wò! Le ƒewo ƒe nuwuwu la ayi anyigba, si vo tso yi si me la dzi, dukɔ, si woƒo ƒu tso dukɔ geɖewo dome wole Israel-to, siwo nye gbegbe eteƒe didi la dzi, dukɔ, si wokplɔ tso dukɔwo dome, eye wo katã woli ɖe dzi ɖi. 9Aho ava abe ahom ene, eye ava abe alilikpo ene, anyẽ atsyɔ anyigba la, mia kple wò aʋakɔ blibo la, eye dukɔ geɖewo akpe ɖe ŋuwò.
10Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Gbemagbe la nu aɖo dzi me na wò, eye aɖo tame vɔ̃ɖi 11agblɔ bena: Maho ɖe anyigba, si le nuvo la ŋu eye maƒo ɖe amesiwo li bɔkɔɔ, eye woɖe dzi ɖi la dzi, amesiwo li, eye gli, gameti kple agbo mele wo si o, 12ne naha nu, naɖe aboyo nu, eye nanye wò asi ɖe aƒedo, si me ame le, kple dukɔ, si woƒo ƒu tso dukɔwo dome la dzi, amesiwo si lãwo kple kesinɔnuwo le, eye wole anyigba ƒe ƒoƒoli nu. 13Seba, Dedan kple Tarsis ƒe asitsalawo kpakple woƒe dzatawo katã agblɔ na wò be: Ɖe nèva, be naha nu, eye ɖe neƒo wò amehawo nu ƒu, be naɖe aboyo nu, nalɔ klosalo kple sika ahatsɔ lãwo kple kesinɔnuwo adzoe, eye naxa nu geɖewoa? 14Eyata amevi, gblɔ nya ɖi, eye nagblɔ na Gog bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ne nye dukɔ Israel li heɖe dzi ɖi la, àho ɣemaɣi, 15àtso nɔwòƒe le anyiehe kekeake ava, eye dukɔ geɖe akpe ɖe ŋuwò, wo katã woanɔ sɔ dzi, ameha gã kple aʋakɔ dranyi wòanye; 16eye àho ɖe nye dukɔ Israel ŋu, anyẽ atsyɔ anyigba la abe alilikpo ene; ŋkekeawo ƒe nuwuwu wòava me; Gog, makplɔ wò aƒu nye anyigba, ne dukɔwo nadze sim, ne mekɔ ɖokuinye ŋu ɖe ŋutiwò le wo ŋku me!
17Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi; Wòe nye amesi ŋu meƒo nu le le blema-ŋkekewo me to nye ɖɔla Israel ƒe nyagblɔɖilawo dzi, amesiwo gblɔ nya ɖi ɣemaɣi ƒe geɖe be, wòe wole kpɔkplɔ ge ava ƒu woa? 18Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Ava me le ɣemaɣi be, gbesigbe Gog aho ɖe Israel-nyigba ŋu la, nye dɔmedzoe ade dzi le nye ŋɔti me. 19Nye ŋuʋaʋã kple nye dziku ƒe dzo mee meƒo nu le be, ɣemaɣi la anyigbaʋuʋu gãa ɖe le Israel-nyigba dzi nɔ ge. 20Ƒumelãwo kple dziƒoxewo, gbemelãwo kple nutata, siwo katã tana le anyigba dzi, kpakple amegbetɔ, siwo katã le anyigba dzi la, adzo kpekpekpe le ŋkunye me, towo aŋe adze eme, agakpewo amũ, eye gliwo katã amũ adze anyi. 21Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Mayɔ yi ɖe eŋu le nye towo katã dzi, eye amesiame atsɔ yi ɖe ehavi ŋu. 22Matsɔ dɔvɔ̃ kple ʋu, tsidzadza gãwo kple tsikpewo adrɔ̃ ʋɔnui, eye mana dzo kple aŋɔ nadza ɖe eya kple eƒe aʋakɔ kpakple dukɔ geɖe, siwo kpe ɖe eŋu la dzi. 23Mado gã ɖokuinye, makɔ ɖokuinye ŋu, eye maɖe ɖokuinye afia le dukɔ geɖewo ŋku me, ne woadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa.

Title: XEZEKIEL 39
Content:
Nyagblɔɖi le Gog ƒe matsrɔ̃ ŋuti.
1Amevi, gblɔ nya ɖi ɖe Gog vivi, nu, nagblɔ bena: Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Gog, kpɔ ɖa, mele ƒoƒo ge ɖe dziwò, wò amesi nye amegã le Ros, Mesex kple Tubal! 2Mable nuwo, eye malé wò alɔnu akplɔ wò atso anyiehe kekeake ava Israel-towo dzi. 3Maƒo dati da le mia na wò, eye wò aŋutrɔwo age le ɖusi na wò. 4Mia kple wò aʋakɔ blibo la kple dukɔ, siwo katã kpe ɖe ŋuwò la, miatsi Israel-towo dzi; eye matsɔ wò ana xe ƒonuwo, lã, siwo katã to aʋala, kple gbemelãwo, ne woaɖu. 5Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Dogba dzi natsi, elabena nyee gblɔe. 6Maɖo dzo ɖe Magog kple amesiwo le ƒukpowo dzi bɔkɔɔ la dome, ne wòadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa. 7Maɖe nye ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la afia le nye dukɔ Israel dome, eye nyemana woagado gu nye ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la azɔ o, ne dukɔwo nadze sii be, nye Yehowa ye nye kɔkɔetɔ le Israel.
8Aƒetɔ Yehowa be: Kpɔ ɖa, egbɔna, eye wòle eme va ge; esia nye ŋkeke, si ŋu meƒo nu le. 9Eye Israel-duwo me towo ado ayi aɖado dzo, eye woatso aʋawɔnuwo, akpoxɔnu gã kple via, datiwo kple aŋutrɔwo, kpowo kple akplowo ade dzo; woatsɔ wo ado dzoe ƒe adre sɔŋ. 10Womatsɔ nake atso gbe me vɛ o, eye womafɔe le avewo me hã o, ke boŋ aʋawɔnuwo woatso ado dzoe; woada adzo amesiwo da adzo wo, eye woaha wo halawo, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 11Ɣemaɣi la mana teƒea ɖe Gog ɖe Israel-nyigba dzi, si nye Abarim-bali me la le atsiaƒu ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome; woaxe Abarim-bali la ƒe mo, eye afima woadi Gog kple eƒe amehawo katã ɖo, eye woayɔe be „Gog ƒe amehawo ƒe balime“. 12Israel ƒe aƒe la aɖi wo dzinu adre sɔŋ, ne woakɔ anyigba la ŋu. 13Dukɔ hahoo la aɖi wo, eye woaxɔ ŋkɔ le gbesigbe mede bubu ɖokuinye ŋu, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 14Woaɖe amewo, ne woano tsatsam le anyigba dzi ɖaa, ne woaɖi amesiwo gakpɔtɔ ɖe anyigba la dzi, be woakɔ eŋu; le dzinu adre megbe la woagadzro eme akpɔ. 15Eye ne amesiwo le tsatsam le anyigba dzi la dometɔ ɖeka kpɔ ameƒua ɖe la, ade dzesi egbɔ, vaseɖe esime ameɖilawo natsɔe aɖi ɖe Gog ƒe amehawo ƒe balime. 16Afima woaɖi amehawo ɖo, eye woakɔ anyigba la ŋu.
17Amevi, ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Gblɔ na xe ƒomevi vovovowo katã kpakple gbemelãwo katã bena: Miƒo ta kpli, eye miƒo mia ɖokui nu ƒu tso goawo katã me, ne miava nye vɔsa ŋkekenyuie, si ɖu ge mala na mi la ɖu ƒe, aglotutu gã wònye le Israel-towo dzi, eye miaɖu lã ano ʋu. 18Miaɖu kalẽtɔwo ƒe lã, eye miano anyigba dzi amegãwo ƒe ʋu hekpe ɖe agbowo, alẽviwo, gbɔ̃tsuwo kple nyitsuwo ŋu, wo katã lã damiwo wonye tso Basan, 19eye miaɖu nye vɔsalã, si mewu na mi la ƒe ami woaɖi ƒo na mi, eye miano eƒe ʋu wòamu mi. 20Eye miaɖu sɔwo kple sɔdolawo, kalẽtɔwo kple aʋawɔla ƒomevi vovovowo aɖi ƒo le nye kplɔ̃ ŋu, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe. 21Matsɔ nye ŋutikɔkɔe aɖo dukɔwo dome, eye dukɔwo katã akpɔ nye ʋɔnu, si medrɔ̃, kple nye asi, si metsɔ do wo dzi. 22Israel ƒe aƒe la adze sii bena, nye Yehowa ye nye woƒe Mawu tso gbemagbe heyii. 23Eye dukɔwo nadze si be, Israel ƒe aƒe la ƒe vodadawo ta wonyã wo de gbe ɖo; le esi wòtrɔ ʋu le yonyeme ŋuti la, eyata meɣla nye ŋku me ɖe wo, eye metsɔ wo ɖe asi na woƒe ketɔwo, be wo katã wotsi yi nu. 24Mewɔ na wo le kɔ, si wogblẽ ɖo na wo ɖokui kple woƒe dzidadawo nu, eye meɣla nye ŋku me ɖe wo.
Israel agatrɔ gbɔ.
25Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Azɔ maɖo Yakob te, makpɔ nublanui na Israel ƒe aƒe blibo la, eye maʋã ŋu ɖe nye ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la nu. 26Eye woaŋlɔ woƒe ŋukpewo katã kple go, siwo katã wodze ɖe ŋunye la be, nenye be, wogale woƒe anyigba dzi bɔkɔɔ, eye amea ɖeke medoa voɖi na wo o. 27Ne mekplɔ wo gbɔe tso dukɔwo dome, eye meƒo wo nu ƒu tso woƒe fufuwo ƒe anyigba dzi la, maka ɖokuinye ŋu ɖe wo ŋuti le dukɔ geɖewo ŋku me. 28Eye woadze sii be, nye Yehowa ye nye woƒe Mawu, esi mena woɖe aboyo wo yi dukɔwo dome, eye megaƒo wo nu ƒu ɖe woƒe anyigba dzi, eye nyemegblẽ wo dometɔa ɖeke ɖe afima o ŋuti. 29Eye nyemagaɣla nye ŋku me ɖe wo azɔ o, le esi metrɔ nye gbɔgbɔ kɔ ɖe Israel ƒe aƒe la dzi ta, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe.

Title: XEZEKIEL 40
Content:
Ŋutega kpɔkpɔ le gbedoxɔ yeyea ŋuti. Gbedoxɔ la ƒe xɔxɔnuwo, agboawo kple akpatawo.
1Le aboyoɖeɖe mí ƒe ƒe blave vɔ atɔ̃lia ƒe gɔmedzedzea me, le dzinu la ƒe ŋkeke ewolia dzi, le esi wòsi du la ƒe wuiene megbe la, ŋkeke ma dzi tututu Yehowa ƒe asi va dzinye, eye wòkplɔm yi afimae. 2Ekɔm le Mawu ƒe ŋutega me va dro ɖe to kɔkɔ booa ɖe dzi le Israel-nyigba dzi, eye wòle abe dua ɖee wotso ɖe edzi le dziehe gome ene. 3Esi wòkplɔm va afimae la, kpo ɖa, ŋutsua ɖe le tsi tre ɖe agbo nu, eƒe nɔnɔme le abe akɔbli ene, eye wòlé anazika gbegbe kple dzidzeti ɖe asi. 4Eye ŋutsu la gblɔ nam bena: Amevi, kpɔ nu kple ŋku, se nu kple to, eye nalé ŋku ɖe nusiwo katã mele fiawo ge la ŋu; elabena ɖe wokplɔ wò va afisiae, be woafia nu wò.
