5Ŋusẽ aɖo dziehefia ŋu, eye eƒe aʋafiawo dometɔ ɖeka akpɔ ŋusẽ wu eyama, aɖu fia, eye eƒe fiaɖuƒe alolo. 6Le ƒea ɖewo megbe la woaɖu dzo kple wo nɔewo, eye dziehefia ƒe vinyɔnu ayi anyiebefia gbɔ, ne wòaɖe ŋutifafa aƒe; ke ŋusẽ manɔ eƒe alɔ ŋu o, eye eya kple eƒe alɔ mali ke o, ke boŋ woatsɔ eya kple amesiwo kplɔe ɖo, kple edzila kpakple eƒe dzoɖuxɔlɔ̃ aɖe asi le ɣemaɣi. 7Ke alɔ adze atso eƒe ke me ɖe eteƒe; aho aʋa ahage ɖe anyiehefia ƒe mɔ̃ sesẽwo me, awɔ nu kple wo, eye wòaɖu dzi. 8Aɖe aboyo woƒe mawuwo kple legba kɔkɔwo kpakple nu vevi, siwo wotsɔ klosalo kple sika wɔe la, ayi Egipte, eye wòadzudzɔ nuwɔwɔ kple anyiehefia ƒea ɖewo. 9Aƒo ɖe dziehefia ƒe fiaɖuƒe dzi, ke agagbugbɔ ayi eƒe anyigba dzi.
10Viawo adze aʋa gɔme, eye woaƒo aoakɔ gãa ɖe nu ƒu fu, woava aƒo ɖe anyi ahagbagba ɖi, eye woagawɔ aʋa kplii vaseɖe eƒe mɔ sesẽwo gbɔ. 11Dziehefia anyrã, eye wòaho ãɖawɔ aʋa kple anyiehefia, atsɔ aʋakɔ gãa ɖe adze aʋa ɖe eŋu, eye woatsɔ aʋakɔawo aɖe asi nɛ. 12Ne aʋakɔawo ho la, eƒe dzi ado eɖokui de dzi, atsrɔ̃ ame akpe nanewo, ke maɖu dzi o. 13Elabena anyiehefia agaƒo aʋakɔ nu ƒu wòalolo wu gbãlɔ, eye le ƒea ɖewo megbe la ava kple aʋakɔ gã kple aʋawɔnu gede. 14Le ɣemaɣi la ame geɖewo atso de dziehefia ŋu, eye mia devi sẽŋutawo atso, be woano ŋutega la nava me, ke woadze anyi. 15Anyiehefia ava aƒu kpo, eye wòaxɔ du sesẽ la; dzieheʋakɔ manɔ te o, eye eƒe ame tiatiawo mate ŋu ana te o. 16Amesi ho ɖe eŋu la, awɔ nu alesi dze eŋu, eye amea ɖeke manɔ te ɖe enu o; ava tɔ ɖe anyigba nyo la dzi, eye eƒe asi agblẽ nu. 17Ado ta me be, yeatsɔ yeƒe fiaɖuƒe blibo la ƒe aʋakɔwo vɛ; eye wòaɖu dzo kplii ahatsɔ vianyɔnu nɛ wòaɖe, ne wòagblẽ anyigba la; ke mava me o, eye medze edzi nɛ o. 18Atrɔ ɖe ƒukpewo ŋu, eye wòaxɔ geɖewo; ke aʋafiaa ɖe atsi eƒe vloɖoame la nu, eye magado vloe azɔ o. 19Atrɔ ɖe eƒe anyigba ƒe mɔ̃ sesẽwo ŋu, ke aɖe goglomi adze anyi, eye womagakpɔe azɔ o.
20Emegbe amea ɖe axɔ ɖe ete ƒe, eye wòana nudzɔdzɔxɔlawo natsa le fiaɖuƒe nyo la me; ke woawui le ŋkekea ɖewo megbe, menye le ɖɔmedzoe kple aʋa me o. 21Ame ɖigbɔa ɖe axɔ ɖe efeƒe, amesi ŋu womeɖo fiaɖuƒe la ƒe atsyɔ̃ ɖo o, ke aƒo ɖe anyi le vo me, eye wòatsa numevivinyawo axɔ fiaɖuɖu lae. 22Akplɔ̃ aʋakɔ, siwo gbagba ɖi bibibi la, adzoe abe tɔsisi ene, eye wòatsrɔ̃ wo hekpe ɖe nubabla la ƒe amegã hã ŋu. 23Ne woɖu dzo kplii hã la, awɔ nu ɖe alakpa me, eye wòaho atsɔ ame ʋeea ɖewo aɖu dzii, 24Aƒo ɖe anyigba la ƒe teƒe wɔnuwo le vo me, eye wòawɔ nusi fofoawo; kple tɔgbulawo mewɔ o, ama aboyonu, nuhaha kple kesinɔnu na wo, eye wòaɖo la me ɖe mɔ̃ sesẽwo ŋu ɣeyiɣia ɖewo. 25Atso, aʋakɔ ga ado adã eƒe ŋusẽ kple dzi eteƒe nadidi ʋee, eye dziehefia atsɔ aʋakɔ gã, si teƒe mekɔ o la, aho aʋa de eŋu, ke manɔ te o, elabena woɖo nugbe ɖe eŋu. 26Amesiwo ɖua nu le eƒe agba nu la, awui, woakplɔ eƒe aʋakɔ adzoe abe tɔsisi ene, eye ame geɖewo atsi aʋa. 27Fia eveawo aɖo ta me ɖe gbegblẽ ŋu, eye woagblɔ alakpanya le kplɔ̃ ɖeka ŋu, ke madze edzi na wo o, elabena ɣeyiɣi woɖo na nuwuwu la. 28Atsɔ kesinɔnu geɖe atrɔ yi eƒe anyigba dzi; atsɔ eƒe tame edo nubabla kɔkɔe la ŋu, eye ne ewɔe vɔ la, alrɔ yi eƒe anyigba dzi. 29Le ɣeyiɣi, si woɖo dzi la, agava ƒo ɖe dziehe-nyigba dzi, ke zi evelia manɔ abe zi gbãtɔ ene o. 30Elabena Kititɔwo ƒe ʋuwo aho ɖe eŋu, dzi aɖe le eƒo, eye wòatrɔ ahado dziku ɖe nubabla kɔkɔe la ŋu, eye wòawɔe aɖe goe; eye ne etrɔ yi aƒe la, atsɔ ŋku aɖo amesiwo gblẽ nubabla kɔkɔea ɖi la ŋuti. 31Aɖo aʋakɔ ɖa, wòava gblẽ kɔ ɖo na mɔ̃ sesẽ kɔkɔe la, woatsi gbesiagbe vɔsa nu, eye woaɖo ŋunyɔnu, si teƒe mekɔ o la anyi. 32Atsɔ numevivi able amesiwo to vo ɖe nubablaa ŋu la nui; ke amesiwo dze si woƒe Mawu la, alé dzi ɖe ƒo awɔ nu ade goe. 33Dukɔ la ƒe ame nyanuwo afia nunya ame geɖewo; eye woatsi yi, dzo, gaxɔ kple nuxaxa si me eteƒe nadidi ʋee. 34Le woƒe alɔ ƒe toyiyi me la woaxɔ na wo vie, eye ame geɖewo atsɔ numevivi aku ɖe wo ŋu. 35Nunyalawo dometɔa ɖewo atsi aʋa ne woado wo akpɔ kple dzo, woakɔ wo ŋuti, ne wo me nadza vaseɖe nuwuɣi, si wodo ɖi la.
36Fia la awɔ nusi dze eŋu, ado eɖokui ɖe dzi, eye wòatɔ asi akɔ ɖe mawu sia mawu ŋu, agblɔ ɖiŋudonyawo ɖe mawuwo dzi Mawu la ŋu, eye wòadze edzi nɛ, vaseɖe esime dziku la nu natso, elabena wole nusi woɖo la wó ge. 37Malé ŋku de fofoawo ƒe mawuwo ŋu o, eye malé ŋku de nyɔnuwo ƒe nu malɔ̃nugbɔa kple mawu sia mawu ŋu o, ke boŋ atɔ asi akɔ ɖe nusianu ŋu. 38Asuhɔ mawu, si le mɔ sesẽwo me la, ɖe wo teƒe, eye wòatsɔ sika kple klosalo, kpe xɔesiwo kple nu veviwo asubɔ mawu, si fofoawo menya o. 39Atsɔ mawu tutɔ ƒe dukɔ ade ma sesẽwo me; ade bubu gã amesiwo xɔ ɖe edzi la ŋu, atsɔ wo aɖo amegã ɖe ame geɖewo nu, eye wòamã anyigba woanye fetu na wo.
40Le nuwuɣi la dziehefia akpe kplii; anyiehefia atsɔ tasiaɖamwo sɔɖolawo kple ʋu geɖewo aho ɖe eŋu, eye woava aƒo ɖe anyigbawo dzi bibibi. 41Ava anyigba nyo la dzi, eye ame nanewo atsi aʋa; ke Edom, Moab kple Amon-viwo ƒe ame ŋkutawo asi le enu. 42Ado eƒe asi ɖa ɖe anyigbawo ŋu, eye womaɖe Egipte-nyigba o. 43Egipte ƒe sikanuwo kple klosalonuwo kpakple nu veviwo katã anɔ esi me, eye Libitɔwo kple Kusitɔwo anɔ eye me. 44Ase nya tso ɣedzeƒe kple anyiehe wòado ŋɔdzi nɛ, eye wòaho kple dziku gã, be wòagblẽ ame geɖewo atsrɔ wo. 45Atu eƒe fiasã ƒe agbadɔ ɖe atsyaƒu kple to kɔkɔe nyo la ɖome; ke eƒe nuwuwu aɖo, eye amea ɖeke maxɔ nɛ o.

Title: DANIEL 12
Content:
Wotre nyagblɔdi la ŋu.
1Le ɣemaɣi la amegãwo ƒe tatɔ Mixael, amesi le mia deviwo nu la, ado; xaxaɣi, si meva kpɔ tso esime dukɔwo li vaseɖe ɣemaɣi o la, anɔ anyi; woaɖe wò dukɔ ɣemaɣi, amesiame, si woŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽa me. 2Amesiwo le alo dɔm le anyigba ƒe ke mala dometɔ geɖewo anyɔ: woƒe ɖewo bena agbenɔnɔ mavɔmavɔ, eye bubuwo bena ŋukpe kple ŋunyɔ mavɔmavɔ. 3Nunyalawo aklẽ abe dziŋgɔli ƒe keklẽ ene, eye amesiwo fia dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe mɔ nu ame geɖewo la, abe dzinuviwo ene ɖaa tegbee.
4Ke wò Daniel, dzra nya siawo ɖo, eye natre agbalẽ la bu vaseɖe nuwuɣi; ame geɖewo adzro eme, eye sidzedze adzi ɖe edzi. 5Eye nye Daniel mekpɔ ame bubu eve wole tsitre ɖi, ɖeka le tɔsisi la ƒe go si me, eye evelia le tɔsisi la ƒe go keme. 6Eye wo ɖometɔ ɖeka gblɔ na ŋutsu, si le aklalawu me tsi tre ɖe tɔsisi la ƒe dzigbe gome bena; Ɣeka ɣie nu manyatanuwo ƒe nuwuwu la ase ɖo? 7Tete mese amesi le aklalawu me tsi tre ɖe tɔsisia ƒe dzigbe gome la, kɔ ɖusi kple mia dzi hetà amesi le agbe tegbee la bena: Le ɣeyiɣi ɖeka, ɣeyiɣi eve kple ɣeyiɣi afã megbe, ne dukɔ kɔkɔe la ƒe akpa ɖeka kaka vɔ la, ekema nusiwo katã ava me. 8Mesee, ke nyemese egɔme o, eye megblɔ bena; Nye aƒetɔ, nusiawo ƒe nuwuwu ɖe? 9Eɖo ŋu bena Daniel, heyi, elabena nya siawo le ɣaɣla, eye wotre wo nu vaseɖe nuwuɣi. 10Woatia ame geɖewo, woakɔ wo ŋuti, eye woado wo akpɔ kple dzo; eme vɔ̃ɖiwo awɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi, eye eme vɔ̃ɖiwo katã mase egɔme o, ke nunyalawo ase egɔme. 11Tso ɣeyiɣi, si dzi wotsi gbesiagbe vɔsa nu, eye wodo ŋunyɔnu, si teƒe mekɔ o anyi la, le ŋkeke akpe ɖeke alafa eve kple blaasieke. 12Woayra amesi ɖo dzi, eye ŋkeke akpe ɖeka alafa eta blaetɔ̃ vɔ atɔ̃ ɖo ɖee la. 13Ke wò la heyi, vaseɖe esime nuwuwu naɖo, gbɔ ɖe eme, eye nafɔ le ŋkekeawo ƒe nuwuwu naxɔ wò gome.

Title: HOSEA 1
Content:
Israel le trɔ̃subɔsubɔ kple tohehe nɛ.
1Esia nye Yehowa ƒe gbe, si va na Hosea, Beeri vi, le Yuɖafiawo Uziya, Yotam, Axaz kple Xizkiya ŋɔli kpakple Israel-fia Yerobeam, Yoas vi ŋɔli.
2Esi Yehowa dze nuƒoƒo gome kple Hosea la, Yehowa gblɔ na Hosea bena: Yi naɖe gbolo, ne wòadzi ahasiviwo na wò; elabena anyigba la wɔ gbolo, eye wòtrɔ le Yehowa yome! 3Tete wòyi ɖaɖe Gomer, Diblayim ƒe vinyɔnu, eye wòfɔ tu dzi ŋutsuvi nɛ. 4Eye Yehowa gblɔ nɛ bena: Tsa ŋkɔ nɛ be Yezreel; elabena ekpɔtɔ vie mahe to na Yezreel ƒe hlɔ̃dodo ɖe Yehu ƒe aƒe la ŋu, eye matsi Israel ƒe aƒe ƒe fiaɖuƒe la nu. 5Le ɣemaɣi la maŋe Israel ƒe dati le Yezreel-bali me la. 6Eye wògafɔ fu dzi nyɔnuvi. Tete wógblɔ nɛ bena: Tsa ŋkɔ na be „Amemalɔ̃e,“ elabena nyemagakpɔ nublanui na Israel ƒe aƒe la atsɔe anɔ wo kem ɖaa o. 7Ke makpɔ nublanu: na Yuda ƒe aƒe la, eye maxa na wo to Yehowa, woƒe Mawu la dzi, menye dati, yi kple aʋawɔwɔ, sɔwo kple sɔdolawo matsɔ axa na wo o. 8Esi Amemalɔ̃e ɖi no nu la, egafɔ fu dzi ŋutsuvi. 9Eye wògblɔ bena: Tsɔ ŋkɔ nɛ be „Manyenyedukɔe“, elabena menye nye dukɔ mienye o, eye nye hã nyemanye mia lɔ o.

Title: HOSEA 2
Content:
Mawu le nubabla kple ele dukɔ la gblẽ, eye wogadzrae ɖo.
1Israel-viwo ƒe xexlẽme anɔ abe ƒulake, sĩ mele dzidze kple xexlẽ me o la ene. Eye woava me be, woayɔ wo be „Mawu gbagbe viwo“, ɖe esi wogblɔ na wo he, Manyenyedukɔe mienye la teƒe. 2Yuda-viwo kple Israel-viwo aƒo takpli, eye woaɖo tatɔ ɖeka na wo ɖokui aho aʋa atso anyigba la dzi; elabena Yezreel ƒe ŋkeke la teƒe mekɔ o. 3Miyɔ mia nɔviŋutsu be „Dukɔnye“, eye mia nɔvinyɔnu be „Ame lɔlɔ̃e“.
4Mihe nye kple mia dada, mihe nya kplii; elabena menye srɔ̃nye wonye o, eye menye srɔ̃aŋutsua menye o. Miɖe eƒe gbolowɔwɔ le mo nɛ, eye eƒe ahasiwɔwɔ nage le akɔta nɛ, 5ne magaɖe amae ana wòanɔ abe gbesigbe wòdzii ene, mana wòasɔ kple gbegbe, wòaɖi kuɖinyigba, eye mana tsikɔ nawui wòaku o. 6Nyemakpɔ nublanui na viawo o, elabena ahasiviwo wonye. 7Elabena wo dada wɔ ahasi, eye wo nɔ wɔ ŋukpenanu; elabena egblɔhe: Madze nye ahiãviwo yome, woawoe tsɔa abolo kple tsi, ɖetifu kple anazi, ami kple nunono nam. 8Eyata metso ŋu atɔ kpɔ ɖe eƒe mɔ dzi, eye maɖo gli ɖe edzi, ale be magakpɔ etoƒe o. 9Ati eƒe ahiãviwo yome, ke eƒe asi matu wo o; adi wo, ke makpɔ wo o; eye wòagblɔ be: Matso agbugbɔ yi srɔ̃nye tsãtɔ gbɔ, elabena eme nyo nam tsã wu fifia. 10Medze sii be, nyee na bli, wein kple ami, klosalo kple sika geɖe, siwo ŋu dɔ wòwɔ na Baal lae o. 11Eyata ne azã ɖo edzi la, maɖe bli kple wein ɖa, eye maxɔ nye ɖeti kple nye anazi, si wòtsɔna xea eƒe amae la. 12Maklo nu le eƒe ŋukpeƒe dzi le eƒe ahiãviwo ŋku me, eye amea ɖeke maxɔe le asinye me o. 13Eye matsi eƒe dzidzɔkpɔkpɔwo katã, ŋkekenyuiewo, dzinu yeyewo, dzudzɔgbewo kple takpegbewo katã nu. 14Magblẽ eƒe weinkawo kple aƒe gbotiwo, siwo ŋu wògblɔ le be, nunana wonye na ye, yeƒe ahlãvlwoe na ye la, eye mana woazu ave, ne gbemelãwo naɖu wo! 15Yehowa be: Mahe to nɛ ɖe ŋkeke, siwo wòɖo dzudzɔ na Baalwo, wòɖe woƒe ga ŋɔti kple woƒe kɔsɔkɔsɔ kɔ, eye wodze eƒe ahiãviwo yome heŋlɔ nyea be la ta.
16Eyata, kpɔ ɖa, mable enu akplɔe ayi gbegbe, eye maƒo nu wòade dzi me nɛ. 17Matse eƒe weingble nɛ de afima, eye nuxaxabali me la atrɔ zu mɔkpɔkpɔ ƒe agbo! Adzi ha le afima abe le eƒe ɖetugbimenɔɣi kple ɣeyiɣi, si wòʋu tso Egipte-nyigba dzi la ene. 18Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Le ɣemaɣi la ãyɔm he „srɔ̃nye“, nye mãgayɔm be „nye Baal“ azɔ la. 19Made Baalwo ƒe ŋkɔ ɖa le eƒe nu me, eye woƒe ŋkɔ magava ame ƒe ta me azɔ o. 20Ɣemaɣi la mabla nu kple gbemelãwo, dziƒoxewo kple nusiwo tana le anyigba dzi, maŋe dati kple yi, manyã aʋa ɖa le anyigba dzi, eye mana woanɔ anyi bɔkɔɔ. 21Ànye nye ŋugbetɔ tegbee, eye matsɔ dzɔdzɔenyenye kple ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ amenuveve kple nublanuikpɔkpɔ ana nenye nye ŋugbetɔ: 22ànye nye ŋugbetɔ le nyateƒe me, ne nadze si Yehowa. 23Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Le ɣemaɣi la mase dziƒo ƒe gbe, eye dziƒo ase anyigba ƒe gbe; 24anyigba ase bli, wein kple ami ƒe gbe, eye woawo ase Yezreel ƒe gbe. 25Maƒã wo de anyigba dzi na ɖokuinye, makpɔ nublanui na Amemalɔ̃e, eye magblɔ na Manyenyedukɔe be: Nye dukɔ nènye! eye eya agblɔ be: Nye Mawu nènye!

Title: HOSEA 3
Content:
Mawu le dzigbɔgbɔ blewu agaɖe vi dukɔ la.
1Eye Yehowa gblɔ nam bena: Gayi nalɔ̃ nyɔnu, si ame bubu le lɔlɔ̃m, eye wònye gbolo la, abe alesi Yehowa lɔ̃ Israel-viwo, ke woawo trɔ ɖe mawu tutɔwo ŋu, eye wole weintsetsebolo lɔ̃m la ene.“ 2Tete metso klosalo sekel wuiatɔ̃ kple bli gomer ɖeka kple afã ƒlee. 3Eye megblɔ nɛ bena: Nɔ gbɔnye kpoo eteƒe nadidi, megawɔ gbolo o, eye megaɖe ŋutsu bubua ɖeke o, eye alea nye hã mana na wò. 4Elabena Israel-viwo anɔ anyi eteƒe nadidi, eye fia kple amegã, akpedavɔsa kple legba, kɔmewu kple aklama kpakpɛa ɖeke mana wo si o. 5Emegbe Israel-viwo atrɔ adi Yehowa, woƒe Mawu la, kple woƒe fia Dawid; eye woanɔ dzodzom nyanyanya ava Yehowa kple eƒe dɔmenyo gbɔ le ŋkekeawo ƒe nuwuwu.

Title: HOSEA 4
Content:
Nyahehe ɖe Israel ŋu le eƒe nuvɔ̃ ta.
1Israel-viwo, mise Yehowa ƒe nya, Yehowa le dzre hem kple, anyigbadzitɔwo, elabena nuteƒewɔwɔ, lɔlɔ̃ kple sidzedze Mawu mele anyigba dzi o. 2Wole atam dzodzro kam, eye wole alakpa dam, wole ame wum, wole fi fim, eye wole ahasi wɔm, wole kpɔ dzem, eye hlɔ̃dodo tsiã ɖe wo nɔewo nu. 3Eyata anyigba axa nu, eye nu ati kɔ na edzinɔlawo katã, eye woatsrɔ̃ gbemelãwo, dziƒoxewo kple keke atsiaƒumelãwo ke hã. 4Ɖeko amea ɖeke megawɔ dzre, eye wòaku mo na ame o, elabena wo dukɔ la le abe amesiwo nɔa dzre wɔm; kple nunɔlawo la ene. 5Eyata àdze anyi le ŋkeke me, nunɔla hã adze enyi akpe ɖe ŋuwò le zã me, eye matsrɔ̃ dawò.
6Woatsrɔ̃ nye dukɔ, le esi sidzedze mele esi o ta; elabena èɖo vlo sidzedze, eyata nye hã mado vlo wo be, maganye nunɔla nam o; èŋlɔ wo Mawu ƒe se la he, eyata nye hã maŋlɔ viwòwo be. 7Alesi wosɔ gbɔ ɖe edzii la, nenemae wowɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe ŋunyee; eyata matrɔ woƒe bubu wòazu ŋukpe. 8Nye dukɔ ƒe nuvɔ̃wo nye nuɖuɖu na wo, eye dɔ le wo wum ɖe woƒe vodada ŋu. 9Ava me na nunɔla abe dukɔ la ene; mahe to nɛ le eƒe zɔzɔme ta, eye maɖo eƒe nuwɔnawo teƒe nɛ. 10Ne woɖu nu la, maɖi ƒo na wo o, eye ne wowɔ ahasi la, womadzi ɖe edzi o, elabena wodzudzɔ ŋkuléle ɖe Yehowa ŋu. 11Amatrewɔwɔ, wein kple aha yeye ɖe wòɖoa lã ame. 12Nye dukɔ le gbe biam eƒe atiwo, eye eƒe atizɔti tea nya nɛ. Elabena ahasiwɔgbɔgbɔ kplɔ wo trae, wowɔ ahasi, eye wotrɔ le woƒe Mawu yome. 13Wosa vɔ le towo la me, eye wodo dzudzɔ le togbɛwo dzi, le fɔfɔliwo, sesewuwo kple logowo le, le esi woƒe vɔvɔli nyo ta; eyata miaƒe nyɔnuviwo awɔ gbolo, eye miaƒe tovɔvinyɔnuwo awɔ ahasi. 14Nyemahe to na miaƒe nyɔnuviwo le esi wole gbolo wɔm ta o, eye nyemahe to na miaƒe toyɔvinyɔnuwo le esi wole ahasi wɔm ta o; elabena woawo ŋutɔwo kplɔ ahasitɔwo de kpɔe, eye wosa vɔ kple gbolowo, ale be dukɔ manyanu la dze anyi.
Woxlɔ̃ nu Yuda bena, eva hã nagawɔ nuvɔ̃ o.
15Israel, ne éwɔ gbolo la, Yuda megaɖi fɔ o dzro! Eyata migava Gilgal o, migayi Bet-Awen o, eye migaka atam gblɔ bena: „Miele Yehowa ƒe agbe“ o! 16Elabena Israel dze aglã abe nyinɔ dzeagbo ene; azɔ Yehowa anyii abe alẽvi ene le leƒe gbaoo. 17Efrayim dze xɔlɔ̃ kple legbawo, miɖe kɔ le eŋu! 18Ne wono aha tsu vɔ la, wowɔa ahasi; woƒe amegawo lɔ̃a ŋukpenanuwɔwɔ. 19Ya bla wo kɔtɔɔ, eye ŋukpe lé wo de woƒe vɔsawo ŋu.

Title: HOSEA 5
Content:
Ŋɔdzidodo na fiaɖuƒe eveawo.
1Mi nunɔlawo, misee, Israel ƒe aƒe, ɖo ŋku anyi, eye mi fiaƒemetɔwe miƒu to anyi, elabena mia tɔe nye ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ la! Elabena miawoe nye mɔ̃ na Mizpa, eye miawoe nye ɖɔ woɖo ɖe Tabor dzi 2kpla ʋe goglo le Sitim; ke mahe to na ml katã! 3Menya Efrayim, eye Israel meɣla ɖem o; Efrayim, azɔ èwɔ ahasi, eye Israel, ègblẽ kɔ ɖo na ɖokuiwò. 4Woƒe nuwɔnawo xe mɔ na wo, be womagatrɔ ɖe woƒe Mawu ŋu o, elabena ahasiwɔgbɔgbɔ le wo me, eye womedze si Yehowa o. 5Israel ƒe dàda aɖi ɖase ɖe mo nɛ kem Israel kple Efrayim adze anyi le woƒe vodadawo la, eye Yuda hã adze anyi akpe ɖe wo ŋu. 6Woatsɔ woƒe alẽwo kple nyiwo ayi Yehowa di gee, ke womakpɔe o, elabena eɖe eɖokui ɖa tso wo gbɔ. 7Yehowa yomee wotrɔ nu le, elabena wodzi vi tutɔwo; azɔ dzinu yeye aɖu woawo kple woƒe anyigbawo.
8Miku lãdzo le Gibea, eye miku kpẽ le Rama! Mido aƒa le Bet-Awen be: Benyamin, kpɔ megbewò! 9Efrayim azu gbegbe le tohegbe; nusi megblɔ ɖe Israel ƒe toawo ŋu la, le eteƒe. 10Yuda-amegãwo zu abe amesiwo ŋea liƒo ɖe eme la ene, matrɔ nye dziku akɔ ɖe wo dzi abe tɔɖɔɖɔ ene. 11Wote Efrayim de anyi, eye wotso tohehe bɔbɔe de anyi, le esi wòlɔ̃ dze mawuwo ƒe sewo yome le ta. 12Ke agbagblaʋuie menye na Efrayim, eye ŋɔ ɖunue menye na Yuda ƒe aƒe la.
13Efrayim kpɔ dɔléle, si le eŋu, eye Yuda kpɔ eƒe abiwo; tete Efrayim yii Asur, eye wòdɔ ame do ɖe fia Yareb; ke mate ŋu ada gbe te mia ŋu o, eye mayɔ dɔ miaƒe abiwo o. 14Elabena dzata menye na Efrayim, eye dzatavi menye na Yuda ƒe aƒe; mavuvu nu ahadzo, malé nu adzoe amea ɖeke maxɔe o. 15Magagbugbɔ ayi nɔnyieƒe, vaseɖe esime woafufu ŋku ahadi nye ŋku me; ne wodo xaxa me la, woadi yonyeme mɔ.

Title: HOSEA 6
Content:
Mawu hea to na ame, bena woagatrɔ dzi me.
1Eyata mina míagatrɔ ɖe Yehowa ŋu; elabena eyae vuvu mí, eye agada gbe le mía ŋu, eyae de abi mía ŋu, eye agablae ne mí. 2Agbɔ agbe mí le ŋkeke eve megbe, eye le ŋkeke etɔ̃agbe la afɔ mí ɖe tsitrenu, ne míanɔ agbe le eŋku me. 3Ele dodo ge kokoko abe agudzedze ene, eye ele vava ge na mí abe tsidzadza ene, abe keletsi, si ƒoa anyigba ene.
4Efrayim, nuka mawu wò, eye Yuda, nuka mawɔ wò? Elabena míaƒe lɔlɔ̃ le abe ŋdililikpo kple zãmu, si nu yina le ŋdi ene. 5Eyata meƒo wo to nyagblɔɖilawo dzi, metso nyee numenyawo wu woe, eye nye ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ adze abe kekeli ene. 6Elabena lɔlɔ ƒe nu dze ŋunyie vu akpeɖavɔsa, eye sidzedze Mawu dze ŋunye wu numevɔsa. 7Ke woawo tu nyee nubabla la abe Adam ene, eye wotrɔ ʋu le yonyeme le afima. 8Gilead enye nu tovo wɔlawo ƒe du, eye nu ƒoe. 9Nunɔlawo ƒe ha le abe adzoblasu, siwo de xa ɖi la ene, wowu ame le Sixem-mɔ dzi, eye wowɔ ŋukpenanu. 10Mekpɔ nusi mele gbɔgblɔ me o la, le Israel ƒe aƒe le me; Efrayim tsɔ ahasiwɔwɔ do dɔe le afima, eye Israel do gu eɖokui. 11Yuda, wodo nuŋeɣi ɖi na wò hã, ne megaɖo nye dukɔ te.

Title: HOSEA 7
Content:
Konyifafa le Israel ŋuti.
1Ne mebe, mada gbe le Israel ŋu la, Efrayim ƒe vodadawo kple Samaria ƒe nu vɔ̃di wɔwɔwo dee ta ɖa. Elabena wodaa alakpa, fiafitɔwo dzea kpɔ, eye adzohawo nɔa nu ham le mɔ dzi. 2Womegblɔ le woƒe dzi me kpɔ be, yewoƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔwo kala le ŋku dzi nam o. 3Azɔ woƒe nuwɔwɔwo ɖe to ɖe wo, eye wotsɔ woƒe alakpadada do dzidzɔ na amegãwo 4Ahasitɔwowo katã wonye, wole abe kpo, si me aboloƒola do dzo ɖo ene; ne eblu amɔwɔ la, edzadzɔa dzoa tutu ɖo, vaseɖe esime wòaʋã. 5Le míaƒe fia ƒe ŋkekenyuie dzi la amegãwo tsɔã wein ƒe dzoʋuʋu dea dɔ lã me na wo ɖokui; ebɔa ha kple fewuɖulawo. 6Elabena woƒe dzi le bibim abe kpo ene le woƒe ayedzedze me; woƒe aboloƒola dɔ alɔ̃ le zã blibo la me, eye wòbi le ŋdi flaflafla. 7Wo kalã le bibim abe kpo ene, eye woflã woƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo, woƒe fiawo katã dze anyi, eye wo dometɔa ɖeke meyɔm o.
Gbeƒãɖeɖe tohehe la.
8Efrayim tsaka kple dukɔwo: Efrayim le abe abolo, si woƒo de afi dzi, eye wometrɔe o la ene. 9Du bubu me tɔwo xɔ ŋusẽ le esi, ke medze sii o; eƒe ta ƒo wɔ, ke menyae o. 10Israel ƒe dãda le ɖase dim ɖe mo nɛ kaŋ; ke wometrɔ ɖe Yehowa, woƒe Mawu la ŋu o, eye womedi eyome mɔ le nusiawo katã me o. 11Efrayim le abe ahɔne tsibome, si nunya mele tagba na o la ene: wole Egipte yɔm, eye woyi Asur. 12Ne wonya yi ko la, mada asabu de wo dzi, maɖidi wo ɖe anyi abe dziƒoxewo ene, eye mahe to na wo, abe alesi wotoe na woƒe amehawo ene. 13Baba na wo, elabena wodzo le gbɔnye! Gbegblẽ neva wo dzi, elabena wotrɔ ʋu le yonyeme! Mebe, maɖe wo, ke woawo da alakpa ɖe asinye. 14Womedo ɣli nam le woƒe dzi me o, ke boŋ wofa avi le woƒe abawo dzi; wova kpe ta le bli kple aha yeye ta, eye wotrɔ nu le yonyeme. 15Nyee fia nu wo, eye mede ŋusẽ woƒe alɔwo, ke woɖo ta me vɔ ɖe ŋunye. 16Wotrɔ, ke menye ɖo ta dziƒo o, eye wole abe dati doagblɔ ene; woƒe amegãwo atsi yi nu le woƒe aɖe ƒe nyanyrã la; esia woatsɔ aɖe alɔmee le wo ŋu le Egipte-nyigba dzi.

Title: HOSEA 8
Content:
Futɔ la do ɖe dukɔ, si subɔ legba la dzi.
1Tsɔ kpẽ ɖo nu! Egbɔna Yehowa ƒe aƒe la dzi abe hɔ̃ ene! Elabena wotu nye nubabla la, eye wosẽ to de nye seawo ŋu. 2Wole ɣli dom nam be: Nye Mawu, mi Israel-viwo míedze si wò! 3Israel do vlo nu nyui; futɔ neti eyome! 4Woɖo fiawo, ke metso gbɔnye o; woɖo amegãwo, nyemenye naneke le eŋu o. Wotsɔ woƒe klosalo kple sika wɔ legbawoe, ne woatsrɔ̃.
5Samaria, wò nyivi le ŋu nyɔm, nye dɔmedzoe bi ɖe wo ŋu; ɣekaɣi hafi woate ŋu ana wo ɖokui ŋu nadza? 6Elabena Israel wòdzɔ tso, gbede ye wɔe, eye menye Mawu wònye o; eyata Samaria ƒe nyivi la afli kakɛkakɛ. 7Elabena yae woƒã, eye ahom woaxa, vvoƒe nukuwo mamie o; ahɔ̃liti matse ku o, ne eme hã la, ame tutɔwo aɖui. 8Woami Israel; azɔ woanɔ dukɔwo ɖome abe ze ɖigbɔ ene. 9Elabena woyi Asur; gbetedzi la, eya ɖeka koliae nɔa anyi, ke Efrayim ya na nu eƒe ahiãviwe. 10Ne wogana ahiãnu le ɖukɔwo dome hã la, maƒo wo nu ƒu ɖe wo ŋu, eye woavo vie tso amegãwo ƒe fia ƒe adzɔnana si me.
11Elabena Efrayim ɖi vɔsamlekpuiwo kpaŋkpaŋ, ne wòatsɔ awɔ nutala, eye vɔsamlekpuiawo zu nuvo nɛ. 12Ne meŋlɔ nye se akpe nane nɛ hã la, ebunɛ abe ame tutɔ tɔe wonye ene. 13Wowu nye vɔsalãwo, ne woaɖu lã; woƒe nu medze Yehowa ŋu o Azɔ aɖo ŋu woƒe voɖaɖawo, ahe to na wo le woƒe nuvɔ̃wo ta, eye woagagbugbɔ ayi Egipte. 14Israel ŋlɔ ewɔla he; etu fiasãwo, eye Yuda tso du sesẽwo kpaŋkpaŋ; maɖo dzo ɖe eƒe duwo me, ne wòafiã woƒe fiasãwo.

Title: HOSEA 9
Content:
Dzidzɔ nu va yi vɔ, gake tsɔtsɔke gale.
1Israel, megakpɔ dzidzɔ o, megatso aseye abe ɖukɔwo ene o! Elabena èwɔ gbolo, ètrɔ ʋu le wò Mawu yome, eye nelɔ̃ gbolonunana le lugbɔƒewo katã. 2Lugbɔƒe kple ahafiãƒe manyi wo o, eye aha yeye aflu wo. 3Womatsi Yehowa ƒe anyigba dzi o, ke boŋ Efrayim agbugbɔ ayi Egipte, eye woaɖu nu makɔmakɔ le Asur. 4Womaƒo wein ɖe anyi na Yehowa o, eye woƒe akpedavɔsawo maɖo dzidzɔ nɛ o; kuteƒenuɖuɖu wònye na wo; amesiwo katã ɖui la, agblẽ kɔ ɖo na wo ɖokui; elabena woƒe nuɖuɖu la, woƒe ɖɔ nu koe wòle ɖo, wometsɔe va Yehowa ƒe mee o. 5Nuka miawo le takpegbe kple Yehowa ƒe ŋkekenyuie la dzi? 6Elabena ne wosi le gbegblẽ nu la, Egipte aƒo wo nu ƒu, eye Mof aɖi wo. Dza ato ɖe woƒe klosalonu veviwo dzi, eye aŋɔka amie ɖe woƒe agbaɖɔwo me. 7Tohegbe ɖo, eye teƒeɖogbe ɖɔ, Israel adze sii! Nyagblɔɖila tsi bome, eye amesi si gbɔgbɔ le la, zu tsukunɔ le wò vodada gbogboawo kple fuléle geɖeawo ta. 8Gbetakpɔ la enye Efrayim de nye Mawu ŋu; mɔ̃ka enye nyagblɔɖila le eƒe toƒewo katã, eye fuléle le eƒe Mawu ƒe aƒe me! 9Wogbẽ wòtso me abe le Gibea ŋɔli ene; ado ŋu woƒe vodadawo, eye wòahe to le woƒe nuvɔ̃wo ta.
10Mefɔ Israel le gbegbe abe weintsetse ene, eye mekpɔ mia fofowo abe gbotsetse ŋgɔgbea ene; ke esi wova Baal-Peor la, wotsɔ wo ɖokui na ŋukpenamawu la, eye wozu ŋunyɔnu, abe nusi ŋu woku ɖo la ke ene. 11Efrayim ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe adzo abe xevi ene, vidzidzi kple fulɔfɔa ɖeke manɔ anyi o. 12Ne wobe, yewoanyi wo viwo woatsi la, made vi lewo ŋu, be amegbetɔa ɖeke maganɔ anyi o; elabena baba na woawo ŋutɔ hã, nenye be, medze le wo gba. 13Eye meɖo ŋku anyi kpɔ Efrayim vaseɖe Tiro be: wodoe ɖe lãnyiƒe, ke Efrayim akplɔ viawo ayi na amewula. 14Yehowa, nuka nana wo ma? Na dɔ tsikɔ kple no ƒuƒu kplalɛ wo. 15Wowɔ woƒe nu vɔ̃ɖiwo katã le Gilgal; afima melé fu wo le le woƒe nuwɔna vɔ̃ɖiwo ta; manyã wo atso aƒenye me, eye nyemagalɔ̃ wo azɔ o; woƒe amegãwo katã nye aglãdzelawo. 16Ati ŋɔɖua enye Efrayim, woƒe kewo ayrɔ, eye womatse ku o; ne wobe, yewoadzi vi hã la, mawu woƒe dɔmevi, siwo gbɔ womelɔ̃a nu le o. 17Nye Mawu agbe wo, elabena womeɖo toe o, eye woanɔ tsa glãla tsam le dukɔwo dome.

Title: HOSEA 10
Content:
Ne dzɔdzɔenyenye meli o la, xɔxɔa ɖeke hã mana anyi o.
1Weinka, si vu dranyi, eye wòtse la, enye Israel; alesi wòtsee la, nenema nu wòɖi vɔsamlekpuiwo ɖo; alesi eƒe anyigba nã nui la, nenema nu wòwɔ legbawo ɖo. 2Woƒe dzi dze eve, eyata woakpɔe ɖe enu; agbã woƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo, eye wòagblẽ woƒe legbawo. 3Ekema woagblɔ bena: Fiaa ɖeke mele mía si o; míegbe Yehowa vɔvɔ̃, nukae fia awɔ na mí ma? 4Aɖe gã le nu me na wo, wokaa atam dzodzro, eye woblaa nu kple wo nɔewo, ale be ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ amie abe aɖigbe le boliƒo dzi le agble me ene. 5Ŋɔdzi ɖo Samariatɔwo le Bet-Awen ƒe nyivi la ŋuti; elabena esubɔlawo le nu xam le eta, eye eƒe trɔ̃nuawo le dzodzom nyanyanya, le esi eƒe ŋutikɔkɔe dzo le egbɔ ta. 6Woakplɔ nyivi la ayi Asur atsɔ awɔ nunanae na fia Yareb; ŋukpe alé Efrayim, eye Israel ƒe mo atsi dã ɖe eƒe tameɖoɖo la ŋu. 7Samaria ƒe fia abu abe futukpɔ le tɔ ŋgɔ ene. 8Woatsrɔ̃ nuxeƒe, siwo Israel tsa wɔ nuvɔ̃e la ɖa le Awen, ŋuwo kple aŋɔkawo alo ɖe woƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo dzi, eye woagblɔ na towo bena; Mitsyɔ mía dzi! eye na togbɛwo be: Mimũ dze mía dzi!
9Israel, èwɔ nuvɔ̃ tso Gibea ŋɔli ke. Eya dzi wogale; ɖe ana matu ame vɔ̃ɖiwo le Gibea oa? 10Mahe to na wo ɖe nye didi nu, eye dukɔwo aƒo wo ɖokui nu ƒu ɖe wo ŋu, ne mebe, mahe lo na wo le woƒe vodada eveawo ta. 11Efrayim enye nyivi mamlã, si nu luƒoƒo vivina: Mekpɔ eƒe kɔ nyui la ta vaseɖe fifi, ke azɔ matsi Efrayim ɖe tasiaɖam ŋu, Yuda aŋlɔ agble, eye Yakob adzobo anyigba. 12Miƒã dzɔdzɔenyenye, eye mixa nu kple lɔlɔ̃; mide agble yeye, elabena azã ɖo be, míadi Yehowa, vaseɖe esime wòava, eye wòana dzɔdzɔenyenye nadza ɖe mía dzi. 13Miede nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ ƒe agble, miexa nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔwɔ, eye mieɖu alakpakutsetse; elabena èle dzi ɖom ɖe wò tasiaɖamwo kple wò aʋawɔla gbogboawo ŋu. 14Aʋaɣli aɖi le wò dukɔ la dome, eye woagbã wò mɔ̃ sesẽwo katã, abe alesi Salman gbã Bet-Arbel, eye wòxlã dadawo kple viwo ɖe nu la ene. 15Betel, alea wòle mia wɔ gee le miaƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ vivivo la ta; le ŋɖi kanya asimaɖetsimee la Israel-fia nu ayi.

Title: HOSEA 11
Content:
Mawu le nublanuikpɔkpɔ.
1Esi Israel nɔ ɖevime la, melɔe, eye meyɔ vinye la tso Egipte vɛ. 2Wova wo, ke wotrɔ ʋume ɖe ame: Wosa vɔ na Baalwo, eye wodo dzudzɔ na legbawo. 3Evɔ wònye nyee fia azɔli Efrayim, eye melée ɖe alɔ to hafi; ke womedze sii be, nyee da gbe le wo ŋu o. 4Mede amegbetɔwo ƒe atagbi, si nyee lɔlɔ̃ka la wo he, mena na wo abe amesiwo ɖea kɔkuti le kɔ la ene, eye mena nuɖuɖu wo. 5Womagagbugbɔ ayi Egipte-nyigba dzi o, ke boŋ Asur nenye woƒe fia, elabena wogbe tametɔtrɔ. 6Yi ava woƒe duwo dzi, aŋe woƒe gametiwo, eye wòaɖu nu le woƒe tameɖoɖowo ta. 7Aglãdzedze de ŋunye vivia nye dukɔ nu, eye ne woyɔ wo ɖo ta dzi hã la, wo ɖometɔa ɖeke mefɔa eɖokui dzi o.
8Efrayim, aleke matsɔ wo ana, eye matsa wò Israel ade asi? Aleke mawɔ wò abe Adma ene, eye mawɔ wò abe Zeboim ene? Nye dzi trɔ le menye, eye nye nublanuikpɔkpɔ le fiefiẽm wlɔwlɔwlɔ! 9Nyemawɔ nu le nye dɔmedzoe heliheli me o, eye nyemagagblẽ Efrayim azɔ o, elabena Mawu menye, eye menye amegbetɔ o, kɔkɔelɔ menye le dowòme, eye nyemava le dziku me o. 10Woakplɔ Yehowa ɖo, ne eɖe gbe be dzata ene; elabena ele gbe ɖe ge, eye ɣetoɖoƒeviwo aɖe abla ava. 11Woadzo tso Egipte abe xeviwo ene, eye abe ahɔnewo ene tso Asur-nyigba dzi, eye mana woanɔ woƒe aƒewo me; Yehowa ye gblɔe.

Title: HOSEA 12
Content:
Yakob ƒe agbenɔnɔ enye kpɔɖeŋu na eƒe ɖukɔ.
1Efrayim tsɔ alakpadada ɖe to ɖem, eye Israel ƒe aƒe la tsa amefuflu ɖe to ɖem, ke Yuda gale eɖokui trɔm ɖe tsiƒo agbaƒo na eƒe Mawu, na kɔkɔetɔ nyateƒetɔ la ko. 2Efrayim melɔ̃a nu le ya gbɔ o, eye wòtia ɣedzeƒeya yome; ele alakpadada kple ŋutasesẽ dzim de dzi gbesiagbe, eɖua dzo kple Asur, eye wòɖoa ami ɖe Egipte. 3Yehowa le nya he ge kple Yuda, ahe to na Yakob le eƒe zɔzɔme nu, eye wòaɖo eƒe nuwɔnawo teƒe nɛ. 4Elé nɔvia ƒe afɔkpodzi le dɔ me, eye esi wòɖo ŋutsu me la, ete keme kple Mawu. 5Ete kame kple mawudɔla, eye wòlée, efa avi, eye wòƒo koko nɛ; edo goe le Betel, eye wòƒo nu kplii le afima. 6Yehowa enye Mawu Zebaot, Yehowa enye eŋkɔ. 7Ke wò la trɔ de wò Mawu ŋu; dzra lɔlɔ̃ kple se la do, eye naɖo dzi de wò Mawu ŋu ɖaa!
8Alakpanudanu le Kanaan si, amebaba vivia enu. 9Eye Efrayim gblɔ be: Mekpɔ ho, eye kesinɔnu su asinye, womekpɔ vodadaa ɖeke le nye dɔwɔwɔwo katã ŋu, si nye nuvɔ̃ o. 10Nyee nye Yehowa, wò Mawui, tso Egipte-nyigba dzi ke, magana nanɔ agbadɔ me abe le ŋkekenyuieduɣi ene. 11Meƒo nu kple nyagblɔɖilawo, mede ŋutega gedewo fia, eye mede lowo to nyagblɔdilawo dzi. 12Esi Gilead wɔ nu vɔ̃ɖi la, eyata woatsrɔ̃ wo; esi wotsɔ nyitsuwo sa vɔe le Gilgal la, eyata woatsɔ woƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo ali kae ɖe boliƒo dzi le agble me abe kpewo ene. 13Yakob si yi Aram-nyigba dzi; nyɔnu me Israel subɔ ɖo, eye nyɔnu tae wònyi lã ɖo. 14Ke Yehowa kplɔ Israel tso Egipte to nyagblɔɖilaa ɖe dzi, eye wòna nyagblɔɖilaa ɖe kpe wo dzi. 15Ke Efrayim do dziku nɛ vevie, eyata eƒe Aƒetɔ ahe eƒe hlɔ̃dodo ava edzi, eye wòaɖo eƒe vlodoame teƒe nɛ.

Title: HOSEA 13
Content:
Ɖeɖe tso ku me. Nuvɔ̃ ƒe amegbegblẽ.
1Ne Efrayim ƒo nu la, ŋɔdzi ɖoa ame; eyae nye tatɔ nɔ Israel; ke eɖi fɔ to Baal dzi, eye wòku. 2Ke wogale nuvɔ̃wɔwɔ dzi; wotsɔ woƒe klosalowo kɔ nɔnɔmewoe, eye wotsɔ woƒe aɖaŋu wɔ legbawoe; gbede ƒe dɔwɔwɔ wo katã wonye; woawoe woƒoa nu na, eye vɔsalawo gbugbɔa nu na nyiviwo! 3Eyata woanɔ abe ŋdililikpo kple zãmu, si nu yina le ŋdi ene, abe tsro, si ya kplɔna dzonɛ le lugbɔƒe, kple dzudzɔ, si toa fesre nu ene. 4Ke nyee nyee Yehowa, wò Mawu, tso Egipte-nyigba dzi ke, menye mawua ɖeke kpe ɖe ŋunye o, eye xɔnametɔa ɖeke meli abe nye ene o. 5Melé ŋku ɖe ŋuwò la gbegbe, le kuɖinyigba dzi. 6Esi wokpɔ gbeɖuƒe la, woɖu nu ɖi ƒo; eye esi woɖi ƒo la, woƒe dzi de esi dada me, eye woŋlɔm be. 7Eyata mezu dzata na wo, eye mede xa de mɔ to abe lãkle ene. 8Medze wo dzi abe sisiblisinɔ, si ŋu woɖe vi le la ene, maflo tsrokpa da le woƒe dzi ŋu, maɖu wo abe dzatanɔ ene, eye gbemelãwo avuvu wo.
9Israel, wò gbegblẽ wònye, be nètso de nye, wò xɔnametɔ ŋu. 10Afika wò fia le azɔ, ne wòaxɔ na wò le wò duwo katã me, eye afika wò ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo le, amesiwo ŋu nègblɔ le be: „Na fia kple amegãwom?“ 11Mena fia wò le nye dɔmedzoe me, eye magaxɔe le nye dziku me.
12Wodzi Efrayim ƒe vodadawo goŋgoŋ, eye wotu nu ɖe eƒe nuvɔ̃ nu sesĩe. 13Alé ku abe nyɔnu, si le vi dzim ene; vi manyanu wònye, elabena ne azã de la, metoa vidzimɔ nu o. 14Mava aɖe wo le tsieƒe si me, eye mava axɔ wo aƒle le ku si me! Ku, wò dɔvɔ ɖe? Tsieƒe, wò veve ɖe? Nublanuikpɔkpɔ ɣla ɖe mo nam! 15Elabena ne enye ati tseku le naviawo dome hã la, ɣedzeƒeya aƒo, Yehowa ƒe ahom atu tso gbegbe, ale be eƒe vudowo amie, eye eƒe tsidzɔƒewo aƒu, eye woaha eƒe kesinɔnu veviwo katã.

Title: HOSEA 14
Content:
Israel ƒe dzimetɔtrɔ, Mawu agayra Israel.
1Esi Samaria sẽ to ɖe eƒe Mawu ŋu la, eyata akpɔe ɖe enu; woatsi yi nu, woaxlã woƒe vidzĩewo ɖe nu, eye woadze ƒo le woƒe funɔwo nu.
2Israel, gatrɔ ɖe Yehowa, wò Mawu la ŋu, elabena wò vodadawoe tsɔ wò ƒu anyi. 3Mihe nya ɖe asi, eye mitrɔ ɖe Yehowa ŋu! Migblɔ nɛ he; „Tsɔ vodadawo katã ke, eye wò dɔme neganyo, ekema míana nyitsu, siwo ŋugbe míedo, kple míaƒe nuyiwo la! 4Asur mate ŋu axɔ na mí o, míagado sɔwo o, eye míagayɔ míaƒe asinudɔwɔwɔ be mía Mawu azɔ o, elabena gbɔwò nublanuikpɔkpɔ le na tsyɔ̃eviwe.“
5Mayɔ dɔ woƒe godzedze, eye malɔ̃ wo tso dzi me, elabena nye dɔmedzoe nu fa de wo ŋu. 6Mana na Israel abe zãmu ene, aƒo se abe dzogbenya ene, eye wòato ke abe Libanon ene. 7Eƒe alɔwo ava dranyi, adze ani abe amiti ene, eye wòaʋẽ lilili abe Libanon ene. 8Amewo aganu eƒe vɔvɔli te, eye woaƒã bli; woaƒo se abe weinka ene, eye woaxɔ ŋkɔ abe Libanon ƒe wein ene. 9Efrayim, legbawo ƒe nya kae tsɔ gbɔnye? Mede toe, eye melé ŋku de eŋu. Sesewu dama menye, dzinye nakpɔ wò kutsetsewo le. 10Amesi nye nunyala la, nese nusia gɔme; amesi si gɔmesese le la, nedze sii! Elabena Yehowa ƒe mɔwo dzɔ, ame dzɔdzɔewoe zɔa edzi; ke ame vɔ̃ɖiwo edze anyi; ɖe edzi.

Title: YOEL 1
Content:
Ʋetsuviwo ƒe fuɖename, si nye kpɔdzidze na Aƒetɔ la ƒe vava.
1Esia nye Yehowa ƒe gbe, si va na Yoel, Petuel vi. 2Mi amegã ɖeɖiwo, mise nya sia, eye mi anyigbadzitɔwo katã, miƒu to anyi! Ɖe esia tɔgbe dzɔ le mia ŋɔli alo le mia fofowo ŋɔli kpɔa? 3Mixlẽe fia mia viwo, mia viwo naxlẽe afia wo viwo, eye wo viwo naxlẽe afia wo megbeviwo! 4Nusi ŋɔwo kpɔtɔ ɖi la, ʋetsuviwo ɖui; nusi ʋetsuviwo kpɔtɔ ɖi la, ʋetrawo ɖui, eye nusi ʋetrawo kpɔtɔ ɖi la, abɔwo ɖui. 5Mi ahamulawo, minyɔ, eye mifa avi! Mi weintsunolawo katã, mixa nu ɖe aha yeye ŋu, elabena woɖee le nu me na mi. 6Elabena dukɔa ɖe ho va nye anyigba dzi, ŋusẽ le eŋu, eye wòsɔ gbɔ kpaŋ, eƒe aɖuwo le abe dzatatsu ƒe aɖu ene, eye eƒe tsyo le abe dzatanɔ tɔ ene. 7Egblẽ nye weinkawo, eye wòŋe nye gbɔtiwo, eflo tsro le wo ŋu hetsɔ wo ƒu anyi, eye woƒe kawo fu ɣie.
8Xa nu abe ɖetugbi, si ta akpanya ɖe eƒe ɖetugbimesrɔ̃ ŋu la ene! 9Nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa nu tso le Yehowa ƒe me; nunɔla, siwo subɔa Yehowa la, le konyi fam. 10Agble zu gbegbe, eye anyigba le nu xam, elabena bli gblẽ, aha yeye no ƒiaƒiaƒia, eye ami ƒu kplakplakpla. 11Ŋukpe lé agbledelawo, eye weingbledelawo le nu xam le lu kple ƒo ta, elabena nuŋeŋe nu tso le agble me. 12Weinka ku, eye gboti yrɔ, yevuboɖatiwo ƒu, keke detiwo kple atɔtɔŋutitiwo kpakple agblemetiwo katã ke hã; dzidzɔkpɔkpɔ nu tso, le amegbetɔviwo dome.
Konyifafa kple kukuɖeɖe.
13Mi nunɔlawo, mibla ali dzi, ne miafa konyi! Mi vɔsamlekpui la subɔlawo, mifa avi! Miva miatsi akpanya me adɔ, mi, nye Mawu subɔlawo; elabena nuɖuvɔsa kple nunovɔsa nu tso le mia Mawu ƒe me. 14Miɖo nutsitsidɔ kɔkɔe, eye miɖe gbe ƒã takpegbe! Miƒo ame tsitsiwo kple anyigbadzitɔwo katã nu ƒu ɖe Yehowa, mia Mawu la ƒe me, eye mido ɣli na Yehowa! 15Aleke, ŋkeke la! Elabena Yehowa ƒe ŋkeke la tu aƒe, eye gbegblẽ wònye tso ŋusẽkatãtɔ la gbɔ gbɔna. 16Ɖe wometsi nuɖuɖu nu le mía ŋku me, eye dzidzɔ kple aseyetsotso nu le mía Mawu ƒe me oa? 17Blikuwo lé akpɔ̃ ɖe to me, avawo ɖi ƒuƒlu, eye nuɖzraɖoƒewo mũ; elabena bliwo tsi tonu. 18Lãwo le xɔxlɔ̃m, eye nyihawo le tsa glãla tsam, elabena gbeɖuƒea ɖeke meli na wo o; nu ti kɔ na alẽhawo hã. 19Yehowa, wò yɔm mele; elabena dzo bi lãnyiƒewo ƒe gbewo, eye dzoƒaɖe fia agblemetiwo katã. 20Gbemelãwo hã le xɔxlɔ̃m na wò, elabena toʋuwo mie, eye dzo bi lãnyiƒewo ƒe gbewo.

Title: YOEL 2
Content:
Ʋetsuviwo ƒe fuɖename xexlẽ fia dziyiyi.
1Miku kpẽ le Zion, mido aƒa le nye to kɔkɔe la dzi! Anyigbadzitɔwo katã nedzo nyanyanya, elabena Yehowa ƒe ŋkeke la gbɔna, etu aƒe! 2Viviti kple blukɔdogbe, alilikpo kple tsizidogbe wònye! Alesi agudzedze gbagbana ɖe towo, dzi la, nenema dukɔ gã sẽŋua ɖe avae, si tɔgbe menɔ anyi kpɔ gbeɖe, eye mele anyi nɔ ge le emegbe vaseɖe ƒome, siwo gbɔna la ŋɔli o. 3Dzo le nu ɖum le eŋgɔ, eye dzoƒaɖe le nu fiãm le emegbe; anyigba la le eŋgɔ abe Eɖen-bɔ ene, eye emegbe nye gbegbe ɖeɖe sɔŋ; amea ɖeke masi le enu o. 4Woƒe mo le abe sɔwo ƒe mo ene, eye wole du dzi abe sɔɖolawo ene. 5Wole kpo dim le towo ta me abe tasiaɖamwo ƒe hoowɔwɔ ene; wole zi nyẽm, abe alesi dzo fiãa gbe ƒuƒui ene, eye wodze aʋa abe aʋakɔ gãa ɖe ene. 6Dukɔwo dzo nyanyanya le eŋgɔ, eye mowo katã fu tititi. 7Wole du dzi abe kalẽtɔwo ene, eye wole gli liam abe aʋamewo ene, wo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe lé eƒe mɔ tsɔ, eye womeɖɔa li woƒe toƒewo o. 8Wo dometɔa ɖeke memimi nɔvia ɖo o, amesiame lé eƒe mɔ tsɔ; wode ta aŋutrɔwo me, ke womexɔ abi o. 9Wole tsa glãla tsam le dua me, eye wole du ƒum le gli dzi, woge ɖe xɔwo me, eye wòto fesrenu ge ɖe eme abe fiafitɔ ene. 10Anyigba dzo kpekpekpe le enu, eye dziƒo ʋuʋu; ɣe kple ɣleti do viviti, eye ɣletiviwo ƒe keklẽ nu tsi. 11Yehowa le gbe ɖem le eƒe aʋakɔ ŋgɔ, eƒe aʋakɔ lolo ŋutɔ, eye ame sesẽe nye eƒe gbe dzi wɔla; elabena Yehowa ƒe ŋkeke la tri akɔ, eye ŋɔdzi le eŋu ŋutɔ, amekae ate ŋu anɔ te ɖe enu?
Nuxɔxlɔ̃ hena dzimetɔtrɔ.
12Yehowa be: Azɔ hã la, mitsɔ miaƒe dzi blibo kple nutsitsidɔ, avifafa kple konyifafa trɔ ɖe ŋunye! 13Midze miaƒe dziwo, menye miaƒe awuwo o, eye migatrɔ ɖe Yehowa, mia Mawu la ŋu! Elabena amenuvela kple nublanuikpɔla wònye, egbɔa dzi ɖi blewu, amenuveve bɔ ɖe esi, eye vɔ̃wɔwɔ venɛ. 14Amea ɖe menya nu o, avee, eye wòatrɔ adzo ahagblẽ yayra ɖe megbe, ne woatsɔ asa nuɖuvɔ kple nunovɔ na Yehowa, mia Mawu la. 15Miku kpẽ le Zion, miɖo nutsitsiɖɔ kɔkɔe, eye miɖe gbe ƒã takpegbe! 16Miƒo dukɔ la nu ƒu, eye mikɔ ameha la ŋu, miyɔ amegã ɖeɖiwo vɛ, eye miƒo ɖeviwo kple vi nonowo nu ƒu; ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ neɖo tso eƒe xɔ me, eye ŋugbetɔ nedo tso ŋugbetɔxɔ me. 17Nunɔlawo, amesiwo subɔa Yehowa la, nefa avi le akpata kple vɔsamlekpui la domee agblɔ be: Yehowa, kpɔ nublanui na wò dukɔ, eye megahe ŋukpe va wò domenyinu la dzi, ne dukɔwo nanɔ ahama sim ɖe wo ŋu o. Nukaŋuti woanɔ gbɔgblɔm le dukɔwo dome be: Afika woƒe Mawu le hã?
Yayra yeye ŋugbedodo.
18Tete Yehowa ʋã ŋu ɖe eƒe anyigba la nu, eye wòkpɔ nublanui na eƒe dukɔ la. 19Eye Yehowa ɖo ŋu gblɔ na eƒe dukɔ bena: Kpɔ ɖa, maɖo bli, aha yeye kple ami ɖe mi, ne miaɖu aɖi ƒo, eye nyemagana ŋu nakpe mi le dukɔwo dome azɔ o. 20Maɖe anyiehetɔ la ɖa le mia ŋu, ahanyãe aɖo ɖe kuɖinyigba dzi kple gbegbe, atrɔ ta ade ɣedzeƒeƒu, eye wòatrɔ agɔmegbɔ ade ɣetoɖoƒeƒu, eye wòaƒaƒã anɔ ʋeʋẽm, elabena ewo nu eteƒe mekɔ o. 21Anyigba, megavɔ̃ o, tso aseye, eye nakpɔ dzidzɔ, elabena Yehowa le nu gã wo ge. 22Mi gbemelãwo, migavɔ̃ o, elabena lãnyiƒe ƒe gbewo ade ama; elabena atiwo atse, eye kutsetsewo ado agba ɖe gboti kple weinka dzi. 23Mi Zion-viwo, mitso aseye, ne miakpo dzidzɔ ɖe Yehowa, mia Mawu la ŋu; elabena atso tsidzadza ayra mi, ana adatsi kple keletsi nadza ɖe mia dzi abe tsa ene. 24Lu ayɔ lugbɔƒe fũ, eye aha yeye kple ami ado agbogbo ɖe ahafiãƒe. 25Eye ma ɖo ƒe, siwo ʋetsuviwo kple ʋetrawo, abɔwo kple ŋɔwo ɖu nu la teƒe na mi, woawoe nye nye aʋakɔ gã, si medɔ ɖe mia ŋu. 26Miaɖu nu aɖi ƒo, eye miakafu Yehowa, mia Mawu, amesi wo nukunu ɖe mia ŋu la ƒe ŋkɔ, eye ŋu magakpe nye dukɔ akpɔ gbeɖe o. 27Eye miadze si be, mele Israel dome, nyee nye Yehowa, mia Mawu la, ɖeke mekpe ɖe ŋunye o; eye ŋu magakpe nye dukɔ akpɔ gbeɖe o.

Title: YOEL 3
Content:
Gbɔgbɔ kɔkɔe la kɔkɔ ɖe, anyi.
1Le nusiawo megbe la matrɔ nye gbɔgbɔ la akɔ ɖe ŋutilãwo katã dzi, eye miaƒe ŋutsuviwo kple miaƒe nyonuviwo agblɔ nya ɖi, miaƒe amegã ɖeɖiwo aku drɔ̃ewo, eye miaƒe ɖekakpuiwo akpɔ ŋutegawo. 2Matrɔ nye gbɔgbɔ la akɔ ɖe kluviwo kple kosiviwo hã dzi ɣemaɣi. 3Eye mana nukunuwo nado ɖe dziƒo ŋu kple anyigba dzi: Ʋu, dzo kple dzudzɔbabla kɔtɔɔ. 4Ye ado viviti, eye ɣleti azu ʋu, hafi. Yehowa ƒe ŋkeke gã dziŋɔ la nava ɖo. 5Eye woava me be, woaɖe amesiame, si ayɔ Yehowa ŋkɔ la; elabena xɔname anɔ Zion-to la dzi kple Yerusalem kpakple ame mamlea, siwo Yehowa ayɔ la dome, abe alesi Yehowa do eŋugbee ene.

Title: YOEL 4
Content:
Mawu ƒe tohehe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ futɔwo.
1Elabena kpɔ da, ne medo Yuda kple Yerusalem te le ŋkeke mawo me kple ɣemaɣi la, 2maƒo dukɔwo katã nu ƒu ahakplɔ wo ayi Yosafat ƒe bali la me, eye madrɔ̃ ʋɔnu kpli wo le afima le nye dukɔ kple nye domenyinu Israel ta, elabena wokakae ɖe dukɔwo dome, eye wòmã nye anyigba la. 3Wodzidze nu ɖe nye dukɔ dzi, wotsɔ ŋutsuvi ɖɔ li gboloe, eye wotsɔ nyɔnuvi dze wein heno. 4Mi Tiro, Zidon kple Filistitɔwo ƒe anyigbawo katã, nuka dim miele le ŋunye? Ɖe miebe, yewoaɖo nusi wowɔ mi la teƒe nam loo, alo miawɔ nanem ma? Nye asi atsɔ mahe miaƒe nuwɔwɔ ava miaƒe ta dzi enumake. 5Miawoe lɔ nye klosalo kple nye sika dzoe, eye mietsɔ nye nu xɔasi vevitɔwo yi miaƒe gbedoxɔ wo me; 6eye mietsɔ Yuda-viwo kple Yerusalem-viwo dzra na Helatɔwo, ne miaɖe wo tso woƒe anyigba dzi ayi adzɔge ʋĩ. 7Kpɔ ɖa, manyɔ wo le teƒe, siwo wotsɔ wo ƒle ɖo, eye mahe miaƒe nuwɔwɔ ava miaƒe ta dzi. 8Eye ma tsɔ miaƒe ŋutsuviwo kple miaƒe nyɔnuviwo adzra na Yuda-viwo, eye woawo atsɔ wo adzra na Sabatɔ, siwo nye dukɔ le didiƒe ke; elabena Yehowa ye gblɔe.
Mawu aɖe eƒe dukɔ la, eye wõayrae.
9Miɖe gbe ƒã nya sia le dukɔwo dome be: Mibia akpa ɖe aʋa kɔkɔe ŋu, minyɔ kalẽtɔwo, eye aʋawɔlawo katã neho va! 10Mitsɔ miaƒe agblenuwo tu yiwoẽ, eye mitsɔ miaƒe hɛ gobɛwo tu akplɔwoe! Ame beli negblɔ be: Míawoe nye kalẽawo! 11Mi dukɔwo katã, miƒo zi tso goawo katã me, miva ƒo mia dokui nu ƒu. Yehowa, ɖiɖi wò kalẽtɔwo ɖe anyi ɖe gama! 12Dukɔwo netso, ne woava Yosafat ƒe bali la me; elabena afima mabɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖo adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu dukɔwo katã godoo 13Minyẽ hɛ gobɛwo, elabena nukuwo ɖi! Miva miafanya nu, elabena weinfiãƒe yɔ, eye weinfiãnu gbagba; elabena woƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ do agbogbo. 14Amehawo kplɔ amehawo ɖo gbɔna nyametsobali la me; elabena Yehowa ƒe ŋkeke la tu aƒe le nyametsobali me la, 15Ɣe kple ɣleti ado viviti, eye ɣletiviwo ƒe keklẽ nu atsi. 16Yehowa le gbe ɖem tso Zion, eye wòna wose eƒe gbe tso Yerusalem, ale be dziƒo kple anyigba ʋuʋu. Ke Yehowa enye sitsoƒe na eƒe dukɔ kple mɔ̃ sesẽ na Israel-viwo. 17Eye miadze sii be, nyee nye Yehowa, mia Mawu la, amesi le nye to kɔkɔe Zion dzi; Yerusalem azu kɔkɔeƒe, eye ame tatɔwo magato eme azu o. 18Le ɣemaɣi la towo atsyɔ aha yeye, eye togbɛwo aɖuɖu notsi, tsi ayɔ Yuda-tɔʋuwo katã agbagba, eye tsi adzɔ tso Yehowa ƒe aƒe la me ahade tsi xetiwo ƒe bali la me. 19Egipte azu aƒedo, eye Edom azu gbegbe ƒeƒle, le ŋuta, si wosẽ le Yuda-viwo ŋu, eye wokɔ du maɖifɔ ɖe anyi le woƒe anyigba dzi la ta. 20Ke Yuda anɔ anyi tegbee, eye Yerusalem anɔ dzidzimewo katã me; 21mabia hlɔ̃ woƒe ʋu, si nu nyemebia hlɔ̃ ɖo haɖe o, eye? Yehowa anɔ Zum.

Title: AMOS 1
Content:
Nyagblɔɖi le tohehe na dukɔ, siwo ƒo xlã Israel-viwo ŋuti
1Esia nye Amos, amesi tso alẽnyilawo dome le Tekoa la ƒe nya, si wòkpɔ ɖe Israel ŋu ƒe eve ɖo ŋgɔ na anyigbaʋuʋu le Yuda-fia Uziya ŋɔli kple Israel-fia Yerobeam, Yoas-vi ŋɔli la. 2Eye wògblɔ bena. Yehowa le gbe ɖem tso Zion, eye wòna eƒe gbe le ɖiɖim tso Yerusalem, tete lãkplɔviwo ƒe lãnyiƒe yrɔ, eye Karmel tame; ƒu.
3Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Le Damasko ƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wowɔ etɔ̃ kple eneawo ta la, nyematsɔe akee o; elabena emli galuƒotasiaɖam to Gilead dzi. 4Eyata mada dzo ɖe Xazael ƒe me, eye wòafia Ben-Hadad ƒe fiasãwo. 5Maŋe Damasko ƒe gametiwo, eye amesiwo le nuvɔ̃bali me la kple amesi; lé fiatikplɔ ɖe asi le dzidzɔkpɔxɔwo me la, atsrɔ̃, eye woaɖe aboyo Aram-dukɔ la ayi Kir; Yehowa ye gblɔe!
6Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Le Gaza ƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ etɔ̃ kple eneawo ta, nyematsɔe akee o; elabena woɖe amewo keŋkeŋ, be woakplɔ wo ayi aɖade asi na Edom. 7Eyata mada dzo ɖe Gaza ƒe gliwo dzi, ne wòafiã woƒe fiasãwo. 8Eye matsrɔ̃ Asdodtɔwo kple amesi lé fiatikplɔ ɖe asi le Askalon, matrɔ nye asi ɖe Ekron ŋu, eye Filistitɔwo ƒe susɔea nu ayi; Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe!
9Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Le Tiro ƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi, wɔwɔ etɔ̃ kple eneawo la, nyematsɔe akee o; elabena woɖe aboyo amewo keŋkeŋ ɖade asi na Edom, eye womeɖo ŋu nɔviwo ƒe nubabla la o. 10Eyata mada dzo ɖe Tiro ƒe gliwo dzi, ne wòafiã woƒe fiasãwo.
11Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi. Le Edom ƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ etɔ̃ kple eneawo ta, nyematsɔe akee o; elabena etsɔ yi ti nɔvia yome, eye wòmia ŋku ɖe nublanuikpɔkpɔ dzi na eɖokui, ele nu vuvum ɖaa le dɔmedzoe me, eye wòlé dziku ɖe dɔ me ɖikaa. 12Eyata mada dzo ɖe Teman, ne wòafiã Bozra ƒe fiasãwo.
13Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi. Le Amon-viwo ƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ etɔ̃ kple eneawo ta, nyematsɔe; ake wo o; elabena wodze ƒo le Gilead ƒe funɔwo nu, ne woakeke woƒe anyigba ɖe enu. 14Eyata mado dzo ɖe Raba ƒe gliwo ŋu, ne wòafiã woƒe fiasãwo, ne ɣli ɖi le aʋakpegbe, eye ya tso ʋuɖuʋudu le ahomtugbe. 15Eye Woƒe fia kple eƒe amegãwo siaa wòayi aboyo me; Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: AMOS 2
Content:
Tohehe nyagblɔɖi ɖe Moab, Yuda kple Israel ŋuti.
1Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Le Moab ƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ etɔ̃ kple eneawo ta, nyematsɔe akee o, elabena etsɔ Edom-fia ƒe ƒuwo me akaloe. 2Eyata mada dzo ɖe Moab, ne wòafiã Keriyot ƒe fiasãwo, eye Moab naku le ʋunyarunyawɔwɔ me, ne ɣli ɖi, eye kpẽwo ɖi. 3Matsrɔ̃ ʋɔnudrɔ̃la lé wo dome, eye mawu eƒe amegãwo katã akpe ɖe eŋu; Yehowa ye gblɔe!
4Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Le Yuda ƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ etɔ̃ kple eneawo ta, nyematsɔe akee o; elabena wogbe Yehowa ƒe se, eye womelé eƒe ɖoɖowo me ɖe asi o, ke boŋ wona woƒe alakpalegba, siwo yome wo fofowo dze la, kplɔ wo trae. 5Eyata mada dzo ɖe Yuda, ne wòafia Yerusalem ƒe fiasãwo!
6Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Le Israel ƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ etɔ̃ kple eneawo ta, nyematsɔe akee o; elabena etsɔ ame dzɔdzɔe dzra ɖe ga nu kple hiãtɔ ɖe atokota dodo ɖeka nu. 7Wo amesiwo ƒe ve me le fiefiẽm ɖe kekui, si le ame dahe ƒe ta me la ŋu, woglɔ̃a mɔ na hiãtɔwo, eye vi kple fofoa woyia gbolo ɖeka gbɔ, ne woaɖo gu nye ŋkɔ kɔkɔe la. 8Wodraa afɔ ɖe awɔbavɔ dzi le vɔsamlekpuiwo katã gbɔ, eye wonoa nyadrɔ̃ha le woƒe mawuwo ƒe me. 9Evɔ wònye metsrɔ̃ Amoritɔwo le wo ŋgɔ, amesiwo dzo atsu, abe alesi sederti kɔe ene, eye wosesẽ abe sesewu ene hafi; metsrɔ̃ woƒe tsetsea dzi me kple woƒe ke le to me. 10Mekplɔ mi tso Egipte-nyigba dzi, eye mena miezɔ gbe dzi ƒe blane, ne miaxɔ Amoritɔwo ƒe anyigba. 11Eye meɖo nyagblɔɖilawo tso miaƒe ŋutsuviwo dome kple Mawu ƒe kluwo tso miaƒe ɖekakpuiwo dome Israel-viwo, Yehowa be, ɖe mele alea oa? 12Ke miena wein Mawu ƒe kluwo wono, eye miede se na nyagblɔɖilawo gblɔ be: Migagblɔ nya ɖi o! 13Kpɔ ɖa, mate mi ɖe to me, abe alesi tasiaɖam, si wode lubablae taŋ la, nyẽna ɖe to mee ene 14Sitsoƒe abu ɖe ame ɖablɛ, ŋusẽtɔ mate ŋu awɔ eƒe ŋusẽ ŋu da o, eye kalẽtɔ maɖe eƒe agbe o; 15aŋutrɔdala manɔ te o, afɔ tsɔtsɔe tɔ masi o, eye sɔdola maɖe eƒe agbe o; 16eye amesi nye dzideƒotɔ te kalẽtɔwo dome la, asi amama gbemagbe; Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: AMOS 3
Content:
Tohehe ava Israel dzi tso Mawu gbɔ, abe alesi nyagblɔɖila la gblɔ ene.
1Mise Yehowa ƒe nya, si wògblɔ ɖe mi Israel-viwo, mi ƒome blibo, si wòkplɔ tso Egipte-nyigba dzi la ŋu: 2Miawo koe menya le anyigba dzi ƒomeawo katã dome; eyata mahe to na mi le miaƒe vodadawo katã ta. 3Ne ame eve be, yewoazɔ ma la, ɖe womeɖoa gbe ɖi hafi oa? 4Ne nuléle mesu dzata si o la, ɖe wòxlɔ̃na le ave mea? Ɖe dzatavi ɖea gbe le emlɔƒe, ne mekpɔ lé nu haɖe oa? 5De xevi dzona ɖe mɔ̃ dzi lé anyigba, ne mɔ̃a ɖeke meli nɛ oa? Eye ɖe mɔ̃ fena, ne naneke meɖo eme oa? 6Ɖe wokua kpẽ le du me, eye vɔvɔ̃ gbea amewo ɖoɖoa? De dzɔgbevɔ̃e dzɔna le du me, eye menye Yehowa ye wɔe oa? 7Elabena Yehowa mewɔa naneke, ne meɖe eƒe tameɖoɖo fia eƒe ɖɔla, nyagblɔɖilawo hafi o. 8Ne dzata ɖe gbe la, amekae agbe vɔvɔ̃? Ne Aƒetɔ Yehowa ƒo nu la, amekae agbe nyagbɔgblɔ ɖi?
9Miɖo kpo ɖe fiasãwo ta le Asdod kple ɖe fiasãwo ta le Egipte-nyigba dzi gblɔ bena: Miƒo takpli ɖe Samaria-towo dzi, eye mikpɔ ʋunyaʋunyawɔwɔ geɖe kple ame teteɖeanyi, si le eme la ɖa. 10Yehowa be: Womenya nu dzɔdzɔe wɔwɔ o, eye woli kɔ nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔwɔ kple ŋutasesẽ ɖe woƒe fiasãwo me gleglegle. 11Eyata ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Futɔ ɖe to ɖe wò anyigba godoo, atu ŋusẽ le ŋuwò, eye woaha wò fiasãwo. 12Eyata ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Alesi lãkpɔvi ɖea lã ƒe ata eve kple to kakɛ tsoa dzata ƒe nu mee la, nenema ke woaɖe Israel-vi, siwo bɔbɔ nɔ Samaria le aba ƒe dzogoe dzi kple aba ƒe kuntru dzi lae. 13Aƒetɔ Yehowa, Mawu Zebaot, be: Misee, eye mitsɔe ɖi ɖase na Israel ƒe aƒe la be: 14Gbesigbe mahe to na Israel ƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ la, mahe to na Betel ƒe vɔsamlekpuiwo hã, eye woaŋe vɔsamlekpui la ƒe dzowo woage adze anyi. 15Magbã vuvɔŋɔlixɔ akpe ɖe ɖzomeŋɔlixɔ ŋu, nyiɖuxɔwo atsrɔ̃, eye xɔ gbogboawo nu ayi; Yehowa ye gblɔe!

Title: AMOS 4
Content:
Ŋɔdzidodo na Israel-amegãwo.
1Mise nya sia, mi Basan-nyinɔ, siwo le Samaria-to dzi! Mi amesiwo te ame dahewo ɖe anyi, miegbã hiãtɔwo gudugudu, eye miegblɔ na miaƒe atsuwo bena: Miku aha vɛ míano! 2Aƒetɔ Yehowa tà eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye be: Kpo ɖa, ŋkeke li gbɔna na mi, woaɖe mi kple ƒu, eye woatsɔ ʋã atɔ mia viwo. 3Miato gli ƒe gbagbãƒe, amesiame akpɔ eŋgɔ te, eye miatsɔ miaƒe legbawo axlã ɖe anyi; Yehowa ye gblɔe!
4Miyi Betel, ne miaɖawɔ nu tovo; miyi Gilgal, ne miaɖawɔ nu tovo ɖe edzi! Misa miaƒe vɔwo ŋdi sia ŋdi, eye mitsɔ miaƒe nuwo ƒe ewoliawo ɖeka sa vɔe ŋkeke etɔ̃etɔ̃. 5Mina dzudzɔ nade dzi ɖe abolo ʋaʋã ŋu, ne wòanye akpedavɔsa; miɖe gbe ƒã be, woana nu faa, midee sesĩe, elabena alea vivia mi Israel-viwo nu, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ye gblɔe! 6Medo kuvia miaƒe aɖuwo le miaƒe duwo katã me, eye mena abolokoe wɔ nu le mia nɔƒewo katã; ke miegbe tɔtrɔ ɖe ŋunye, Yehowa ye gblɔe. 7Esi dzinu etɔ̃ susɔ, ne nuŋeɣi naɖo la, mete tsidzadza mi; mena tsi dza, ɖe du ɖeka me, ke nyemena wòdza ɖe evelia me o; tsi dza ɖe agble ɖeka me; ke agble, si me tsi medza ɖo o la me ƒu kplakplakpla. 8Du eve kple du etɔ̃ wole ya mum sagãsagã yi du ɖeka me, be yewoano tsi, ke womeɖi kɔ o; gake miegbe tɔtrɔ ɖe ŋunye, Yehowa ye gblɔe! 9Mena miaƒe bliwo dze heteku, eye wohlɔ̃: ʋetsuviwo ɖu miaƒe abɔwo kple weingblewo, gbotiwo kple amitiwo; ke miegbe tɔtrɔ ɖe ŋunye, Yehowa ye gblɔe! 10Mehe dɔvɔ̃ va mia dzi abe Egipte tɔa ene; mewu miaƒe ɖekakpuiwo kple yi, woha miaƒe sɔwo, eye miaƒe, asaɖa me ʋẽ kũ ɖo ŋɔti me na mi; ke miegbe tɔtrɔ ɖe ŋunye, Yehowa ye gblɔe! 11Metrɔ mi bu anyi, abe alesi Mawu trɔ Sodom kple Gomora bu anyi ene, eye miele abe ati, si woɖe tso dzo me la ene; ke miegbe tɔtrɔ ɖe ŋunye, Yehowa ye gblɔe!
12Eyata Israel, ale mele wɔ wò ge enye si: Esi mele esia wɔ ge wò la, eyata Israel, dzra ɖo naɖakpe kple wò Mawu! 13Elabena eya amesi mè towo, eye wòwɔ ya, etoa amegbetɔ ƒe tamesusuwo nɛ, enana agudzedze zua viviti, eye wòzɔa anyigba ƒe kɔkɔƒewo la ŋkɔ enye Yehowa, Mawu Zebaot!

Title: AMOS 5
Content:
Konyifaha kple dukɔ la yɔyɔ hena dzimetɔtrɔ.
1Israel ƒe aƒe, mise nya sia, elabena mele konyifaha to ge ɖe mia ŋu! 2Israel-ɖetugbi dze anyi, megale fɔfɔ ge o; eɖo baba ɖe eƒe anyigba dzi, amea ɖeke mele efɔ ge ɖe tsitrenu o! 3Elabena ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ne dua ɖe ho kple ame akpe le Israel ƒe aƒe la me la, ame alafa akpɔtɔ, eye ne eho kple ame alafa la, ame ewo akpɔtɔ.
4Elabena ale Yehowa gblɔ na Israel ƒe aƒe la enye si: Midim, ne mianɔ agbe! 5Ke migabia Betel ta se o, migava Gilgal o, eye migayi Beer-Seba o; elabena Gilgal ayi aboyo me, eye Betel atsrɔ̃. 6Midi Yehowa, be mianɔ agbe, ne magadze Yosef ƒe aƒe la dzi, abe dzo ene ahafiãe, eye dzotsilaa ɖeke manɔ anyi na Betel o; 7mi amesiwo trɔ nya dzɔdzɔe wòzu atsa, eye miete dzoe dzɔenyenye ɖe to! 8Eya amesi wo atifieŋu kpakple avũ kple avũtɔ, eye wotsɔ blukɔ wɔ ŋdii, ena ŋkeke do viviti abe zã ene, eye wòyɔ atsiaƒu me tsiwo vɛ hetrɔ wo ƒo ɖe anyigba dzi la ŋkɔ enye Yehowa; 9eya amesi de gbegblẽ ame sesẽ la dome, eye wòhe gbegblẽ va du sesẽ la dzi. 10Wole fu amesi xlɔ̃a nu ame le ʋɔnu, eye wonyɔ ŋu nyateƒetola. 11Esi miefanya ame dahewo kple afɔ, eye miexɔ blidzɔ le wo si la, eyata miatsɔ kpe fufuwo atu xɔe, gake mianɔ wo me o; miade weingble nyowo, gake miano woƒe wein o. 12Elabena menyae be, miaƒe dzidadawo sɔ gbɔ, eye miaƒe nuvowo teƒe mekɔ o, mielé ame dzodzɔewo ɖe ke me, miexɔ zãnu, eye miete ame dahewo ɖe anyi le ʋɔnu! 13Eyata nunyala ƒe nu nede gã le ɣemaɣi, elabena ɣeyiɣi vɔe wònye. 14Midi nyui, eye menye vɔ̃ o, ne mianɔ agbe, eye Yehowa, Mawu Zebaot, nanɔ anyi kpli mi, abe alesi miele gbɔgblɔm ene. 15Milé fu vɔ̃, milɔ̃ nyui, eye mifɔ nya dzɔdzɔe ɖe tsitrenu le ʋɔnu, amea ɖe menya nu o Yehowa, Mawu Zebaot, ave Yosef ƒe ame mamleawo nu.
16Eyata ale Yehowa, Mawu Zebaot, Aƒetɔ la, gblɔ esi: Konyifafa anɔ ablɔwo katã me, eye woana alele dom le kpɔdomeewo katã, woayɔ agbledela ɖe nuxaxa ŋu, eye kuteƒehadzilawo ɖe konyifafa ŋu; 17eye konyifafa anɔ weingblewo katã me, ne meva to dowòme yi, Yehowa ye gblɔe.
18Baba na amesiwo dzrom Yehowa ƒe ŋkeke la le! Viɖe ka Yehowa ƒe ŋkeke la nye na mi? Viviti wònye, menye kekeli o. 19Ele abe ŋutsua ɖe, si si le dzata nu, eye sisiblist va do goe, eye esi wògbɔ va aƒe hetsɔ asi ziɔ ɖe gli ŋu la, da ɖui la ene. 20De menye vivitie nye Yehowa ƒe ŋkeke la, eye menye kekeli oa, ɖe menye blukɔ wònye, eye eme mekɔ oa?
Gota mawusubɔsubɔ ɖeɖe menye naneke o.
21Melé fu miaƒe ŋkekenyuiewo, eye metsri wo, eye nyemaʋẽ miaƒe takpegbewo ase o. 22Elabena ne miesa numevɔ kple nuɖuvɔ nam hã la, womadze ŋunye o, eye nyemanyẽ: kɔ akpɔ miaƒe nyivi damiwo ƒe akpedavɔsawo o. 23Te wò hawo ƒe ɖiɖi ɖe megbe tso gbɔnye, wò saŋkuƒoƒowo le to me vem nam! 24Nya dzɔdzɔe nesi abe tsi ene, eye dzɔdzɔenyenye abe tɔʋu, si memiena o la ene boŋ! 25Israel ƒe aƒe, ɖe miesa akpedavɔ kple nuɖuvɔ nam le gbe dzi le ƒe blaneawo mea? 26Eyata miatsɔ miaƒe legbawo: Miaƒe fia Sakut kple miaƒe mawu Kewan ƒe dzinuvi, si miewɔ na mia ɖokui la; 27eye mana woaɖe aboyo mi agbɔ Damasko ŋu ʋĩ ayii, Yehowa, amesi ŋkɔ nye Mawu Zebaot lae gblɔe!

Title: AMOS 6
Content:
Ŋɔdzidodo na ŋkutatɔwo le Israel kple Yuda le woƒe agbeɖuɖu kple ɖokuidodo ɖe dzi ta.
1Baba na mi amesiwo ɖe dzi ɖe anyi le Zion, kple mi amesiwo le Samaria-towo dzi bɔkɔɔ, mi dukɔwo ƒe ame veviwo dome ŋkutatɔwo, amesiwo gbɔ Israel ƒe aƒe la vana! 2Miyi Kalne, eye milé ŋku ɖe anyi, mitɔ edzi tso afima yi Xamat-gã, eye mihoe ɖe dzi yi Filistitɔwo ƒe Gat be, ɖe eme nyo na wo wu fiaɖuƒe siawo tɔ loo, alo woƒe anyigba lolo wu mia tɔa? 3Mi amesiwo ɖi be, dzɔgbevɔ̃egbe la nate ɖa, eye miele ŋutasesẽ ƒe fiazikpui hem vɛ; 4mi amesiwo mlɔ nyiɖubatiwo dzi, eye miedra ɖe mia mlɔƒewo, mieɖu alẽviwo le lãhawo dome kple nyiviwo le lãkpɔ me; 5mi amesiwo nɔa saŋku ƒom kɔ kple avu, eye mienɔa hã kpam abe Dawid ene; 6mi amesiwo noa wein le vɔsatrewo me, eye miesa ami veviwo, eye Yosef ƒe abixɔxɔ metsɔa fu lã me na mi o! 7Eyata mianɔ ŋgɔ na aboyomewo ayi aboyo me, eye amesiwo dra ɖe aba dzi la ƒe nukoko hahaha nu atso!
8Aƒetɔ Yehowa ta eƒe agbe be: Ale Yehowa, Mawu Zebaot, gblɔ esi: Yakob ƒe dàda le ŋu nyɔm nam, melé fu eƒe fiasãwo, eye matsɔ du la kple eme nuwo ade asi. 9Eye woava me be, ne ŋutsu ewo kpɔtɔ ɖe aƒe ɖeka me la, woaku; 10eye ne woƒe ƒometɔ, amesi be, yeatɔ dzo wo la, va, be yeafɔ ame kukuawo tso aƒea me, eye wòbia amesi kpɔtɔ ɖe xogã me be: Amea ɖe gale gbɔwò hã, eye wòɖo ŋu be: Ɖeke megali o la, agblɔ be. Mia nu, ne womagaɖo ŋku Yehowa ƒe ŋkɔ dzi o.
11Elabena kpɔ, ɖa, Yehowa le se de ge, tete woagbã xɔ gãwo, eye xɔ suewo agba gudugudu 12Ɖe sɔwo ate ŋu aƒu du le agakpe dzia, eye ɖe woatsɔ nyiwo aŋlɔ agble ɖe atsiaƒu dzia? Elabena miawo mietrɔ nya dzɔdzɔe wòzu aɖi, kple dzɔdzɔenyenye ƒe kutsetse wòzu atsa 13Mi amesiwo le dzidzɔ kpɔm le nu maɖinuiwo ŋu, eye miele gbɔgblɔm be: De menye sesẽ mietsɔ to dzo ɖe ta oa? 14Israel ƒe aƒe, ale Yehowa, Mawu Zebaot gblɔ esi: Maɖo dukɔa ɖe ɖa ɖe mia ŋu, ne woaxaxa mi ɖo tso Xamat-nutowo me vaseɖe tɔʋu, si le gbegbe la nu.

Title: AMOS 7
Content:
Ŋutega eve kpɔkpɔ le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃, si ava Israel kple Yerobeam ƒe aƒe dzi ŋuti.
1Eye Aƒetɔ Yehowa na mekpɔ ŋutega, kpɔ ɖa, ewo ʋetsuviwo, esime kelegbewo de asi miemie me; elabena kelegbewo miena, ne wova gbe na fia megbe. 2Eye esi woɖu anyigba dzi gbewo vo keŋkeŋ la, megblɔ bena: Aƒetɔ Yehowa, tsɔe ke dzro! Aleke Yakob ate ŋu anɔ te, esi mele ɖeke me o? 3Tete wòve Yehowa, eye Yehowa gblɔ bena. Mava me o. 4Eye Aƒetɔ Yehowa na mekpɔ ŋutega, kpo ɖa, Aƒetɔ Yehowa yɔ dzo vɛ, be wòatsɔ ahe toe, eye wòfiã to gãwo helé agblewo. 5Eye megblɔ be: Aƒetɔ Yehowa, dzudzɔ dzro! Aleke Yakob ate ŋu anɔ te, esi mele ɖeke me o? 6Tete wòve Yehowa, eye Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ be: Esia hã mava me o.
7Eye wòna mekpɔ ŋutega, kpɔ ɖa, Aƒetɔ la tsi tre ɖe gli, si dzɔ kã la dzi, eye wòlé tsumikpe ɖe asi. 8Tete Yehowa gblɔ nam bena: Amos, nuka kpɔm nele? Meɖo ŋu bena. Tsumikpee Eye Aƒetɔ la gblɔ bena: Kpo ɖa, mada tsumikpe ɖe Israel-duko la dome, eye nyemagatsɔe akee azɔ o. 9Isak ƒe nuxeƒewo azu gbegbe, Israel ƒe kɔkɔefewo azu aƒedo, eye matso yi atso ɖe Yerobeam ƒe aƒe la ŋu.
Amazya tso Amos nu, ke Amos ɖe gbe ƒã tohehe, si ava edzi la nɛ.
10Tete Amazya, amesi nye nunɔla le Betel la, dɔ ame ɖo ɖe Israel-fia Yerobeam, ne woagblɔ nɛ bena: Amos ɖo gbe ɖi ɖe ŋuwò le Israel ƒe aƒe la dome; anyigba la magaɖo dzi atso eƒe nyawo katã o. 11Elabena ale Amos gblɔ esi: Yerobeam aku ɖe yi nu, eye woaɖe aboyo Israel atso eƒe anyigba dzi. 12Eye Amazya gblɔ na Amos, bena: Nukpɔla si yi Yuda-nyigba dzi, gblɔ nya ɖi le gama, ne nakpɔ abolo aɖu le afima. 13Ke megagblɔ nya ɖi le Betel azɔ o; elabena fia ƒe kɔkɔeƒe kple fiaɖuƒe ƒe gbedoxɔ wònye. 14Tete Amos ɖo ŋu gblɔ na Amazya bena: Nyemenye nyagblɔɖila alo nyagblɔɖilawo ƒe vi o, ke boŋ lãkplɔvi kple gbotidola menye. 15Ke Yehowa ɖem le lãhawo yome, eye Yehowa gblɔ nam bena: Yi ɖagblɔ nya ɖi ɖe nye dukɔ Israel ŋu. 16Azɔ se Yehowa ƒe nya! Egblɔ be: Megagblɔ nya ɖi ɖe Israel ŋu o, eye megadudu nyã ƒo ɖi ɖe Isak ƒe aƒe la ŋu o! 17Eyata ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Srɔ̃wò awɔ gbolo le dua me, wò ŋutsuviwo kple wò nyonuviwo atsi yi nu, eye woatsɔ dzidzeka amã wò anyigbae, wò ŋutɔ àku ɖe anyigba makɔmakɔ dzi, eye woaɖe aboyo Israel atso eƒe anyigba dzi.

Title: AMOS 8
Content:
Israel aɖi Mawu ƒe nya yome, gake magakpɔe o.
1Eye Aƒetɔ Yehowa na mekpɔ ŋutega, kpo ɖa, kutsetse ɖiɖiwo yɔ kusia ɖe fũ. 2Eye wògblɔ nam bena: Amos, nuka kpɔm nèle? Meɖo ŋu be: Kutsetse ɖiɖi kusi taŋ. Tete Yehowa gblɔ nam bena: Nye dukɔ Israel ɖiɣi ɖo, nyemagatsɔe akee azɔ o. 3Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Nyɔnu, siwo dzia ha le fiasãwo me la, afa avi gbemagbe, ame kukuwo asɔ gbɔ, eye woazi ɖoɖoe atso wo, aƒu gbe ɖe teƒewo katã.
4Misee, mi amesiwo ƒe ve me le fiefiẽm ɖe ame dahewo ŋu, eye mietsrɔ̃ hiãtɔwo; 5mi amesiwo le gbɔgblɔm be: Gbekagbe gɔ̃ dzinu yeye nu le yiyi ge, ne míadzra bli, eye dzudzɔgbe nu le yiyi ge, ne míaʋu avawo nu ahakpa nudotree sue, míadzi asi ɖe edzi, eye míaŋe nudanu ɖe eme aha amee; 6míaƒle ame dahewo ɖe gã nu kple hiãtɔwo ɖe atokota ɖoɖo ɖeka nu, eye míadzra bli toto ɖe bli ŋutɔ teƒe?
7Yehowa ta nu ɖe Yakob ƒe dada ŋu be: Nyematsɔ woƒe nuwɔnawo katã ake wo akpa gbeɖe o! 8De anyigba maʋuʋu, eye edzinɔlawo katã naxa nu le esia ta oa? Akɔ dzi glodzoo abe Nil, eye wòadze agbo agadze anyi abe Egipte-tɔsisi la ene. 9Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Le ŋkeke ma me la mana ɣe naɖo to le ŋdɔkutsu dzatsɛ, eye viviti nado ɖe anyigba dzi le ŋkeke me. 10Matrɔ miaƒe ŋkekenyuiewo woazu nuxaxa kple miaƒe hawokatã woazu konyifaha, made akpanya aliwo katã, eye tawo katã nazu ta kokoe, mana wòanɔ, abe alesi wofaa konyi na tenuvi ene, eye eƒe nuwuwu anɔ abe ŋkeke vɔ̃e ene.
11Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, ŋkekewo li gbɔna, eye maɖo dɔwuame ɖe anyigba dzi, ke, menye abolodɔ alo tsikɔwuame ɖe tsi ŋu o, ke boŋ ɖe Yehowa ƒe nyawo sese ŋu. 12Woanɔ ya mum tso atsiaƒu nu yi atsiaƒu nu, eye woanɔ tsatsam tso anyiehe yi ɣedzeƒe, ne woadi Yehowa ƒe nya, ke womakpɔe o 13Le ɣemaɣi la tsikɔ awu ɖetugbi dzetugbeewo kple ɖekakpuiwo, eye gbafa aƒo wo; 14wo amesiwo tà Samaria ƒe dzidada, eye wogblɔna bena: „Dan, míetà wò mawu ƒe agbe, eye míetà Beer-Seba-ma!“ Woadze anyi, eye womagafɔ o.

Title: AMOS 9
Content:
Tohehe dziŋɔ ava Israel dzi.
1Eye mekpɔ Aƒetɔ la wòtsi tre ɖe vɔsamlekpui la dzi gblɔ bena: Ŋe kɔ le sɔtiawo nu, ne kpuiawo nadzo kpekpekpe, eye nagbã wo ɖe wo katã ƒe ta dzi! Matsɔ yi awu wo viwoe, wo dometɔa ɖeke masi o, eye amea ɖeke makpɔtɔ o. 2Ne woyi tsieƒe ke hã la, nye asi ahe wo tso afima, eye ne wolia dziƒo la, maɖiɖi wo ɖe anyi tso afima. 3Ne wobe ɖe Karmel ta me la, maɖi wo le afima ahe wo agbɔe, eye ne wosia ɖem ɖe atsiaƒu gɔme la, madɔ da woaɖu wo le afima. 4Eye ne wodze woƒe futɔwo ŋgɔ yi aboyo me la, madɔ yi woawu wo le afima; matso nye ŋku aɖo wo ŋu ɖe vɔ̃ me, eye menye ɖe nyui me o. 5Aƒetɔ, Yehowa Zebaot, amesi ka asi anyigba ŋu wòlólo gbanaa, eye edzinɔlawo katã xa nu, ede dzi glodzoo abe Nil ene, eye wòdze eme abe Egipte-tɔsisi ene; 6eya amesi tu eƒe dziƒoxɔ ɖe dzi me, eye wòɖo eƒe xɔ goba gɔme anyi ɖe anyigba dzi, eya amesi yɔ atsiaƒu me tsiwo hetsɔ ƒo ɖe anyigba dzi la ŋkɔ enye Yehowa!
7Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: De mi Israel-viwo, miele nam abe Kusiviwo ene oa? De nyemekplɔ Israel tso Egipte-nyigba dzi, Filistitowo tso Kaftor, eye Aramtɔwo tso Kir oa? 8Kpo ɖa, Aƒetɔ Yehowa ƒe ŋku le fiaduƒe wonuvɔ̃ sia ŋu, eye matsrɔ̃e ɖa tso anyigba dzi; ke ɖeko nyematsrɔ̃ Yakob ƒe aƒe la keŋkeŋ o, Yehowa ye gblɔe. 9Elabena made se, eye woaʋuʋu Israel ƒe aƒe la le dukɔwo katã dome, abe alesi woʋuʋua asɔe, eye blikua ɖeke megena ɖe anyigba o ene. 10Nye dukɔ ƒe nuvɔ̃wɔlawo katã aku ɖe yi nu, wo amesiwo le gbɔgblɔm bena: Dzɔgbevɔ̃e la matu mí o, eye maɖi kpe mí o.
Ɣeyiɣi nyuia ɖe ŋugbedodo na Israel.
11Le ɣemaɣi la mafɔ Dawid ƒe agbadɔ gbagbã la de tsitrenu, eye matre eƒe gbagbãƒewo, mafɔ eƒe glikpowo ɖe tsitrenu, eye matui abe tsã ene; 12ne woaxɔ Edom ƒe ame mamleawo kple dukɔ, siwo katã ŋu woyɔ nye ŋkɔ ɖo la, woanye wo tɔ; Yehowa, amesi le nusiawo wɔ ge lae gblɔe. 13Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Kpɔ ɖa, ŋkeke li gbɔna, eye woanɔ agbleŋɔŋlɔ dzi ahade asi na nuŋeɣi, woanɔ weinfiafiã dzi ahade asi na nuƒãɣi, towo atsyɔ aha yeye, eye togbɛwo katã aƒo beke. 14Magaɖo nye dukɔ Israel te, eye woatso du zuaƒedowo anɔ wo me, woade weingblewo anɔ wo me wein, eye woatɔ abɔwo aɖu wo me kutsetsewo. 15Made woƒe agunu to ɖe woƒe anyigba dzi, eye womagaho wo tso woƒe anyigba, si mena wo la dzi o, Yehowa, wò Mawue gblɔe!

Title: OBADYA 1
Content:
Gbeƒãɖeɖe tohehe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃.
1Obadya ƒe ŋutega. Ale Aƒetɔ Yehowa gblɔ ɖe Edom ŋu enye si: Míese nya tso Yehowa gbɔ, eye woɖo du ɖe dukɔwo dome be: Mitso, ne míaho aʋa ɖe wo ŋu! 2Kpɔ ɖa, mawɔ wò sue le dukɔwo dome, eye maɖi gbɔ wò vevie. 3Wò dzi ƒe dàda ble wò, wò amesi le agatowo me, eye nètso aƒe ɖe kɔkɔƒewo, wò amesi le gbɔgblɔm le wò dzi me be: Ameka atutum aƒu anyi? 4Ne èyi dzi ʋĩ abe hɔ̃ ene, eye nèwɔ ato ɖe dzinuviwo dome hã la, matutu wò aƒu anyi tso afima, Yehowa ye gblɔe. 5Nenye fiawo kple adzodalawoe ƒo ɖe dziwò le zã la, ɖe womafi nu alesi ko asu wo nu oa? Ke aleke wòa nèhetsrɔ̃e! Nenye weinxalawoe ƒo ɖe dziwò la, ɖe womakpɔtɔ ɖe ɖi oa? 6Aleke womehedzro Esau me, eye wotsa le eƒe kesinɔnuwo mee o! 7Wò dzoɖuxɔlɔ̃wo katã nyã wò vaseɖe liƒo dzi ke, xɔ̃wòwo ble wò, eye wokpe dziwò; wò aboloɖulawo ɖo mɔ̃ ɖe tewò, ke mèdze sii o. 8Yehowa be: De nyematsrɔ̃ nunyalawo ɖa le Edom kple gɔmesese ɖa le Esau ƒe towo dzi gbemagbe oa? 9Teman, dzi aɖe le wò kalẽtɔwo ƒo, ne woatsɔ amewuwu atsrɔ̃ amesiame ɖa le Esau ƒe towo dzi.
10Le ŋuta, si nesẽ le noviwò Yakob ŋu ŋuti la, ŋukpe anyẽ atsyɔ wò, eye woatsrɔ̃ wò ɖa tegbee. 11Gbemagbe èle eteƒe; esi amedzrowo ɖe aboyo eƒe aʋakɔwo ɖzoe gbemagbe, du bubu me towo ge ɖe eƒe agbowo me, eye wodzidze nu ɖe Yerusalem dzi la, wò hã ènye wo dometɔ ɖeka. 12Ke megafɔ ŋku ɖe nɔviwò dzi le eƒe ŋkeke la dzi, le eƒe dzogbevɔ̃egbe o, megakpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe Yuda-viwo ŋu le woƒe tsotsrɔ̃gbe o, eye megake wò nu baa le xaxagbe o. 13Megage ɖe nye ɖukɔ ƒe agbo me le, eƒe dzɔgbevɔ̃egbe o, megafɔ ŋku ɖe eƒe gbegblẽ dzi le eƒe dzɔgbevɔ̃egbe o, eye megado wò asi ɖa ɖe eƒe kesinɔnuwo ŋu le eƒe dzogbevɔ̃egbe o. 14Megatsi tre ɖe mɔ dzevee nu natsrɔ̃ eƒe ame sisiwo o, eye megaɖe aboyo eƒe ame mamleawo le xaxagbe o! 15Elabena Yehowa ƒe ŋkeke la tu aƒe na dukɔwo katã; alesi nèwɔ la, nenema woawo wò, eye wò nuwɔwɔwo ava wò ta dzi. 16Alesi mieno aha le nye to kɔkɔe dzii la, nenema dukɔwo katã anɔ enono dzii ɖaa; woanoe aɖuɖɔ egɔme ƒiaƒiaƒia, eye woanɔ abe amesiwo medzo kpɔ o la ene.
17Ke xɔname anɔ Zion-to dzi, anye kɔkɔeƒe, eye Yakob ƒe aƒe la axɔ woƒe domenyinu. 18Yakob ƒe aƒe la anye dzo, eye Yosef ƒe aƒe la anye dzoƒaɖe, ke Esau ƒe aƒe la anye gbe ƒuƒu; woafiãe wòabi, ale be amea ɖeke makpɔtɔ na Esau ƒe aƒe la o; elabena Yehowa ye gblɔe. 19Dziehetɔwo axɔ Esau ƒe towo, eye bali me nɔlawo ado Filistitɔwo ƒe anyigba, woaxɔ Efrayim-tagba kple Samaria-tagba, eye Benyamin axɔ Gilead; 20eye Israel-viwo ƒe aʋakɔ, siwo woɖe aboyoe la, ado Kanaanitɔwo ƒe anyigba vaseɖe Zarpat, eye Yerusalem ƒe aboyome, siwo le Sefarad la, ado dzieheduwo. 21Xɔnametɔwo ava Zionto la dzi, ne woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu Esau ƒe towo, eye fiaɖuƒe la anye Yehowa to.

Title: YONA 1
Content:
Nyagblɔɖila la yɔyɔ, eƒe tomaɖomaɖo kple tohehe nɛ.
1Eye Yehowa ƒe gbe va na Yona, Amitai vi, bena: 2Tso, nayi Niniwe, du gã la me, eye nagblɔ nya ɖi ɖe eŋu; elabena woƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ va ŋkunye me. 3Ke Yona tso, be yeasi le Yehowa ŋku me ayi Tarsis. Eye esi wòva Yafo, eye wòkpɔ ʋua ɖe, si le Tarsis yi ge la, exe fe, eye wòɖoe, be yeasi atso Yehowa ŋku me ayi Tarsis kpli wo.
4Ke Yehowa lɔ ya gãa ɖe trɔ ɖe atsiaƒu la dzi, eye ahom sesẽa ɖe tu ɖe atsiaƒu dzi, ale be ʋu la ɖi be, yeagbã. 5Tete ʋukulawo vɔ̃, eye wo dome amesiame do ɣli yɔ eƒe mawu, eye wotsɔ ʋua me nuwo ƒu gbe ɖe ƒu me, ne woazu wodzoe, ke Yona ya yi ɖe ʋua gɔme, eye wòmia anyi do alɔ̃ yi me ʋĩ. 6Tete ʋumefia te ɖe eŋu gblɔ nɛ bena: Alɔ̃ dɔm wòa nèlea? Fɔ nayɔ wò Mawu! Amea ɖe menya nu o Mawu aɖo ŋku mía dzi, be míagatsrɔ̃ o hĩ. 7Eye wogblɔ na wo nɔewo bena: Mina míadzidze nu, ne míakpɔ amesi ta dzɔgbevɔ̃e sia dza de mía dzi ɖo la! Tete wodzidze nu, eye nudzidze la dze Yona dzi. 8Eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Gblɔ nusi ta dzɔgbevɔ̃e sia dzo ɖe mía dzi ɖo la na mí! Do ka wɔla nènye, eye afika nètso? Mia de ɖe, eye dukɔ ka me nètso? 9Eɖo ŋu na wo bena: Hebritɔ menye, eye mevɔ̃a Yehowa, dziƒo Mawu la, amesi wɔ atsiaƒu kple anyigba ƒuƒui. 10Tete ŋutsuawo vɔ̃ ŋutɔ, eye wogblɔ nɛ bena: Nukae nèhewɔ ma? Elabena wonyae be, Yehowa nu wòsi le; elabena etoe na wo tsã. 11Eye wogblɔ nɛ bena; Nuka míawɔ wò, be atsiaƒu la nadze kɔ anyi le mía ŋu godoo? Elabena ƒu la ƒe nyanyrã nu le sesẽm ɖe dzi. 12Eɖo ŋu na wo be: Mikɔm ƒu gbe ɖe ƒua me, ekema ƒua adze anyi le mia ŋu godoo; elabena menyae be, tanyee ahom gã sia va mia dzi ɖo.
13Tete ŋutsuawo ku ʋua, be woatrɔ ayi gota, ke womete ŋui o, elabena atsiaƒu da nyrã ɖe edzi hekpe wo. 14Eye woyɔ Yehowa gblɔ bena: Ao, Yehowa, megana míatsrɔ̃ le ŋutsu sia ƒe agbe ta o, eye megatsɔ̃ ʋu maɖifɔ ɖo mía dzi o; elabena Yehowa nènye, eye nusi dze ŋuwò la, nèwɔna. 15Eye wokɔ Yona ƒu gbe ɖe ƒua me; tete ƒu la dzudzɔ agbodzedze. 16Tete ŋutsuawo vɔ̃ Yehowa ŋutɔ, wosa vɔ na Yehowa, eye woɖe adzɔgbe.

Title: YONA 2
Content:
Yona do gbe ɖa, eye woɖee.
1Eye Yehowa dɔ ƒumelã gãa ɖe, be wòaɖami Yona; eye Yona nɔ lã la ƒe dɔ me ŋkeke etɔ̃ kple zã etɔ̃. 2Tete Yona do gbe ɖa na Yehowa, eƒe Mawu la, le lã la ƒe dɔ me 3gblɔ bena, Meyɔ Yehowa le nye xaxa me, eye wòtɔ nam; medo ɣli tso tsieƒe ƒe ƒodo me, eye nèse nye gbe. 4Etsɔm ƒu gbe ɖe to gɔme, le atsiaƒu titina, tsi sisiwo ɖe to ɖem, eye wò tsi kpakpawo katã kple wò tsi tsotsoewo to tanye yi. 5Megblɔ be, wonyãm ɖa le ŋkuwò me, ɖe magakpɔ wò gbedoxɔ kɔkɔe la akpɔa? 6Tsiwo ɖe to ɖem de keke nye luʋɔ gbɔ; tɔ gɔme le ŋunye godoo, eye avawo xatsa ɖe ta nam. 7Mede towo ƒe agunu ke, eye anyigba do gameti ɖe nunye ɖikaa, ke èhe nye agbe tso do me, Yehowa, nye Mawu! 8Esi nu te nye luʋɔ ŋu le menye la, meɖo ŋku Yehowa dzi, eye nye gbedoɖoɖa ɖo gbɔwò le wò gbedoxɔ kokoe la me. 9Amesiwo subɔa yakanu dzodzrowo la, gblẽa woƒe amenuveve ɖi. 10Ke nye la matsɔ akpedagbe asa vɔ na wò, eye mawɔ adzɔgbe, si meɖe la dzi. Xɔname enye Yehowa tɔ! 11Eye Yehowa ɖe se nalãla be, wòaɖadzɔ Yona ɖegota.

Title: YONA 3
Content:
Nyagblɔɖila la gblɔ dzimetɔtrɔ ŋutinya dziŋɔa ɖe na Niniwetɔwo.
1Tete Yehowa ƒe gbe va na Yona zi evelia bena: 2Tso, nayi Niniwe, ɖu gã la me, eye naɖe gbe ƒã nya, si gblɔ ge mala na wò la nɛ. 3Tete Yona tso yi Niniwe ɖe Yehowa ƒe nya la nu. Niniwe enye du gãa ɖe le Mawu ŋku me, eye eƒe didime enye ŋkeke etɔ̃ ƒe mɔzɔzɔ. 4Eye Yona zɔ ŋkeke ɖeka ƒe mɔ le dua me heɖe gbe ƒã gblɔ bena: Esusɔ ŋkeke blane, ne Niniwe natsrɔ̃! 5Tete Nimwetɔwo xɔ Mawu dzi se, wodo kpo, be woatsi nu adɔ, eye woata akpanya, tso tsitsiawo dzi vaseɖe ɖeviawo dzi. 6Esi nya la ɖe Niniwe-fia gbɔ la, etso le eƒe fiazikpui dzi, eɖe eƒe awu ʋlaya ɖi, eye wòta akpanya hebɔbɔ nɔ dzowɔ me. 7Eye wòna wodo kpo gblɔ le Niniwe ɖe fia kple eƒe amegãwo ƒe se nu bena: Amegbetɔwo kple lãwo, nyiwo-kple alẽwo megade naneke nu me o; womegaɖu gbe alo ana tsi o, 8ke boŋ amegbetɔwo kple lãwo siaa nata akpanya, woayɔ Mawu sesĩe, eye amesiame naɖe asi le eƒe mɔ vɔwo kple nu vɔ̃ɖi, si le edome la ŋuti. 9Amea ɖe menya nu o Mawu atrɔ ta me, avee, eye eƒe dɔmedzoe heliheli la nu afa, be miatsrɔ̃ o hĩ! 10Eye esi Mawu kpɔ, alesi wowɔ, be woɖe asi le woƒe mɔ vɔwo ŋu la, vɔ̃, si Mawu gblɔ be, yeawɔ wo la vee, eye mewɔe o.

Title: YONA 4
Content:
Yona mekpɔ ŋudzedze le nublanuikpɔkpɔ na Niniwetɔwo ŋuti o; eyata woka ŋku me nɛ.
1Ke esia medze Yona ŋu o, eye dzi kui vevie. 2Eye wòdo gbe ɖa na Yehowa gblɔ bena: Oo, Yehowa, esia ŋu pɛ mebu, esime mele mía de; eyata medo ŋgɔ be, masi ayi Tarsis; elabena menyae be, Mawu amenuvela kple nublanuikpɔla nenye, egbɔa dzi ɖi blewu, dɔmenyo bɔ ɖe asiwò, eye vɔ̃wɔwɔ vea wò. 3Eyata Yehowa, xɔ nye agbe le asinye! Elabena enyo nam be, maku wu esi manɔ, agbe. 4Eye Yehowa gblɔ be: Ɖe nèle dɔmedzoe dom ɖe eteƒea?
5Tete Yona do le dua me ɖabɔbɔ nɔ dua ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome, eye wòtu agbadɔ ɖe afima hebɔbɔ no eƒe vɔvɔli te, ne yeakpɔ nusi le dzɔdzɔ ge ɖe dua dzi. 6Eye Yehowa Mawu dɔ treklɔnu wòva mie ɖe Yona ta me, ne wòado vɔvɔli ɖe edzi ahafa eƒe dzikudodo nu nɛ; tete Yona kpo dzidzɔ le treklɔnu la ŋu ŋutɔ. 7Ke esi agu dze le ŋkeke evelia dzi la, Mawu do ŋɔ wòva du treklɔnu la woku. 8Esi ɣe dze la, Mawu do ɣedzeƒeya xɔdzo ɖa, eye ɣe ɖu Yona ƒe ta, ale be nu te eŋu belibeli. Tete wodi ku na eɖokui gblɔ bena: Ne meku la, enyo wu esi manɔ agbe.
9Eye Mawu gblɔ na Yona bena: Ɖe nèle dziku dom ɖe eteƒe le treklɔnu la taa? Eɖo ŋu bena: Tɔnye dzɔ be, mado dziku, vaseɖe esime maku. 10Tete Yehowa gblɔ be: Treklɔnu, Si ŋu medze agbagba le o, mekpɔ edzi wòtsi o, emie le zã ɖeka me, eye woku le zã ɖeka me la ƒe nu le vewòm, — 11ɖe du gã Niniwe, si me amewo le wu ame akpe alafa ɖeka blave, siwo menya nuka enye ɖusi kple mia hekpe ɖe lã geɖewo ŋu la ƒe nu mavem oa?

Title: MIXA 1
Content:
Yuda kple Israel-fiaduƒe gbegblẽ le trɔ̃subɔsubɔ ta.
1Esia nye Yehowa ƒe nya, si va na Mixa, Moresitɔ la, eye wò-kpɔ ɖe Samaria kple Yerusalem ŋu le Yuda-fia Yotam, Axaz kple Xizkiya ŋɔli.
2Mi dukɔwo katã, misee, anyigba kple edzl nuwo, miƒu to anyi! Aƒetɔ Yehowa nye ɖasefo ɖe mia ŋu, Aƒetɔ la tso eƒe gbedoxɔ kɔ: kɔe la me! 3Elabena kpɔ ɖa, Yehowa atso le enɔƒe ahaɖi ɖe anyi, eye wòatsa le anyigba ƒe gkɔkɔƒewo. 4Towo alólo le ete abe anyĩgba le dzo nu ene, eye gbadzaƒewo aɖe dzoglo, abe alesi tsi sina tsoa aganu wònɔna ene. 5Yakob ƒe dzidadawo kple Israel ƒe aƒe ƒe nuvɔ̃wo tae nusiawo katã dzɔ ɖo. Yakob ƒe dzidada ɖe? Ɖe menye eya nye Samaria oa? Yuda ƒe nuxeƒe ɖe? Ɖe menye eyae nye Yerusalem oa? 6Eyata matsɔ Samaria awɔ anyiglãgoe ɖe gbe me kple weingbledeƒee, malɔ eƒe kpewo aƒu gbe ɖe abu me, eye maɖi ƒeƒle eƒe agunu. 7Woagbãwoƒe aklama kpakpɛwo katã, woatɔ dzo woƒe gbolonunanawo katã, eye matsrɔ̃ woƒe legbawo katã; elabena gboloho wotsɔ ƒo wo nu ƒui, eye gboloho woagazu.
8Eyata mafa konyi, mafa avi, eye maɖe ƒeƒle anɔ yiyim; mafa konyi abe amegãxiwo ene, eye maxa nu abe golowo ene. 9Elabena gbedada mele eƒe ƒoƒowo ŋu o; elabena eva Yuda ke, eye wòde nye dukɔ ƒe agbo nu vaseɖe Yerusalem ke. 10Migado bobloe le Gat o; migafa avi le Ako o, eye mlgaƒo togotogoe le ke me le Bet-Leafra o! 11Mi Safirtɔwo, miɖe ama miaʋu adzo; Zaanantɔwo mele dzodzo ge o; mifa konyi le Bet-Haezel, elabena mia gbɔe wòdze aʋa ɖo! 12Dzidzi aƒo Ma-rotfɔwo le woƒe dzɔgbenyuie ta, elabena dzɔgbevɔ̃e ɖi tso Yehowa ghɔ ɖe Yerusalem ƒe agbowo dzi. 13Laxistɔwo, mitsi sɔwo ɖe tasiaɖamwo ŋu! Elabena wòe nye Zion-nyɔnuvl ƒe nuvɔ̃ gãtɔ, eye gbɔwòe wokpɔ Israel ƒe dzidadawo le. 14Eyata àklã ɖa tso Moreset-Gat ŋu; Axsib-xɔwo aflu Israel-fiawo. 15Mi Maresatɔwo, magakplɔ nugblẽla aƒu mi, eye Israel ƒe bubumewo aɖe Adulam ke. 16Lũ ta kokoe le viwò, siwo ghɔ mèlɔ̃a nu le o la ta; wò ta nebebe tegblẽ abe akagã tɔ ene, elabena wokplɔ wo dzoe le gbɔwò.

Title: MIXA 2
Content:
Vɔ̃ na nu madzɔmadzɔ wɔla, siwo kpɔa dzidzɔ le aʋatsokaka ŋuti.
1Baba na amesiwo ɖoa dzɔ-gbevɔ̃e ɖe ta me, eye wobua nu vɔ̃ɖl wɔwɔ ŋu le woƒe abawo dzi! Ne agu dze la, wowɔnɛ, elabena ŋusẽ le wo si, 2Ne agble dzro wo la, woxɔnɛ; ne xɔ dzro wo la, wodaa adzoe, eye woɖua sesẽnu le aƒe kple aƒetɔ si, le ŋu-tsu kple eƒe domenyinu si. 3Eyata ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Meɖo tame vɔ̃ ɖe ƒome sia ŋu, miaɖe ta le eme o, eye miadzɔ kã anɔ yiyim o, elabena ɣeyiɣi vɔ̃ɖi wònye. 4Ɣemaɣi la woado lo ɖe mia ŋu, eye woadzi konyifaha agblɔ bena: Wogblẽ ml keŋkeŋ, wodzidze nye ɖukɔ ƒe anyigba, eye wome-gagbughɔe na ml o; womã míaƒe agblewo na amesiwo ɖe aboyo ml. 5„Eyata wò amea ɖeke mada dzidzeka ɖe eƒe anyigba ŋu le Yehowa ƒe amehawo dome o.“
6Wole gbɔgblɔm be: Migagblɔ nya o, migagblɔ nya siawo tɔgbe o, vlodoame nu metso o, 7Nya kae nye esia gblɔm Yakob ƒe aƒe la le be: „Ɖe Yehowa mesea dziku dona o, eye esia nye eƒe nuwɔna?“ Ɖe nye nyawo mefa na ame dzɔdzɔewo oa? 8Ke gbaɖegbe ke nye ɖukɔ dze aglã hezu ketɔ: Mieɖe awu ʋlaya le amesiwo ɖe dzi ɖi bɔkɔɔ va tso me yina la ƒe awuwo dzi, abe aʋae miegbɔ tso ene. 9Mienyã nye ɖukɔ ƒe nyɔnuwo ɖa le woƒe xɔ, siwo gbɔ womelɔ̃a nu le o la me, eye miexɔ atsyɔ̃ le wo viwo si ɖikaa. 10Mitso miadzo! Elabena afi menye mia nɔƒe o; le nu makɔmakɔ wɔwó ta woatsɔ gbegblẽ, si teƒe mekɔ o la, agblẽ mi. 11Ne amea ɖe le ya yome lelele, eye wòɖa alakpa be: „Magblɔ nya na mi le wein kple aha muame ŋu“ la, eya anye nyagblɔla asɔe na dukɔ sia.
12Maƒo Yakob nu ƒu blibo, eye makplɔ Israel ƒe ame mamleawo ɖe du; maƒo wo nu ƒu ɖe lãkpɔ me abe alẽwo ene, abe lãha le lãnyiƒe titina ene; eye afima agblẽ kple amegbetɔwo. 13Gligbãla aho adze wo ŋgɔ, woagbãe ato agbo nu age ɖe eme, eye woagado, woƒe fia adze wo ŋgɔ, eye Yehowa anɔ wo nu.

Title: MIXA 3
Content:
Tohehe, si ava Israel ƒe amegãwo dzi.
1Eye megblɔ bena: Mi Yakob ƒe tatɔwo kple Israel ƒe aƒe me amegãwo, ɖe menye mlaƒe dɔ wònye be, miadze si se la oa? 2Mi amesiwo léa fu nyui, eye mielɔ̃a vɔ̃, mievuvua agbalẽ lewo ŋu kple lã le woƒe ƒuwo ŋu. 3Mi amesiwo ɖua nye ɖukɔ ƒe lã, miefloa agbalẽ lewo ŋu, eye miegbãa woƒe ƒuwo; mieflia wo dea ze abe lã ene, eye abe lã le kutu me ene. 4Emegbe woado ɣli ayɔ Yehowa, ke matɔ na wo o, eye wòaɣla ŋku me ɖe wo ɣemaɣl le woƒe nuwɔua vɔ̃ɖlwo ta. 5Ale Yehowa gblɔ ɖe nyagblɔɖilawo ŋu, wo amesiwo kplɔa nye ɖukɔ tranae, eye ne woƒe aɖu kpɔ nu le ɖuɖum la, woɖoa boblo ŋutl-fafa, ke wotsɔa aʋa ɖe amesi mena nu wo, be woaɖu o ŋu la, enye si: 6Eyata zã ghɔna ɖoɖo ge na ml, miakpɔ ŋutega o; blukɔ le dodo ge na mi, miaka afã o; ɣe aɖo to ɖe nyagblɔɖilawo, eye ŋke-ke anyɔ tsiɖitsiɖi ɖe wo. 7Ŋu-kpe alé nukpɔlawo, bokɔnɔwo ƒe mo atsi ɖã, eye wo katã woabla nu ɖe ge, elabena Mawu megale nya ŋu ɖom azɔ o. 8Ke nye la, ŋusẽ kple Yehowa ƒe gbɔgbɔ, dzɔdzɔenyenye kple dzideƒo yɔm fũ, ne magblɔ Yakob ƒe dzidadawo kple Israel ƒe nuvɔ̃wo nɛ.
Yerusalem gbegblẽ gbɔgblɔdi.
9Misee, mi Yakob ƒe aƒe ƒe ta-tɔwo kple mi Israel ƒe aƒe ƒe amegãwo, mi amesiwo nyɔa ŋu se la, eye mieglɔ̃a nu dzɔdzɔewo katã; 10mi amesiwo tsɔa fʋu tsoa Zion kple nu vɔ̃ɖi wɔwɔ tsoa Yerusalem. 11Woƒe tatɔwo drɔ̃a ʋɔnu le zãnunana ta, woƒe nunɔ-lawo fiaa nu ame le fetu ta, eye woƒe nyagblɔɖilawo gblɔa nya ɖl le ga ta; woziɔna ɖe Yehowa ŋu nɔa gbɔgblɔm be: Ɖe Yehowa mele mia dome oa? Dzɔgbevɔ̃ea ɖeke mele mia, dzi va ge o. 12Eyata le mia ta woade Zion abe agble ene, Yerusalem azu glikpo, eye gbedoxɔ ƒe to azu togbɛ toave.

Title: MIXA 4
Content:
Le Mesia ƒe fiaɖuƒe ŋuti.
1Eye wòava me le ŋkeke mlɔeawo me be, Yehowa ƒe aƒe ƒe to la akɔ ta aghɔ towo ŋu, eye wòaƒo togbɛwo ta, eye anyigba dzi dukɔwo aƒo zi ɖe eŋu. 2Eye ɖukɔ geɖewo atso agblɔ bena: „Mina míayi Yehowaƒe to la kple Yakob ƒe Mawu ƒe aƒe la gbɔ, ne wòafia eƒe mɔwo mí, eye míazɔ eƒe toƒewo!“ Elabena nufiame atso Zion, eye Yehowa ƒe nya atso Yerusalem. 3Adrɔ̃ ʋɔnu na ɖukɔ geɖewo, eye wòatso nya me na anyigba dzi ɖukɔ geɖewo vaseɖe didiƒe ke. Woatsɔ woƒe yiwo atu agblenuwoe, eye woatsɔ woƒe akplɔwo atu hɛ gohɛwoe; dukɔ magatsɔ yi ɖe dukɔ ŋu azɔ o, eye womagasrɔ̃ aʋawɔwɔ azɔ o. 4Eye wo dome amesiame abɔbɔ nɔ anyi ɖe eƒe weinka kple eƒe gboti te bɔkɔɔ; elabena Yehowa Zehaotƒe nue gblɔe, 5Elabena ne ɖukɔ-wo katã dometɔ ɖesiaɖe le zɔzɔm le eƒe mawu ƒe ŋkɔ me hã la, míawo ya míazɔ le Yehowa, mía Mawu la ƒe ŋkɔ me ɖaa tegbee.
Woagaƒo Israel nu ƒu, eye woaɖee le tohehe nɛ megbe.
6Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Le ɣemaɣi la maƒo abutɔlawo nu ƒu, eye makplɔ amesiwo kaka hlẽ, kple amesiwo dzi mehe gbegblẽ vɛ la, ɖe du. 7Mana abutɔlawo nazu ame susɔeawo, eye amesiwo wonyã yi didiƒee, nazu dukɔ sesẽ, eye Yehowa aɖu fia ɖe wo nu le Zion-to la dzi tso fifia ɖaseɖe mavɔ me. 8Ke wò lãhawo ƒe xɔ tsrala, wò Zion-nyɔnuvi ƒe toghɛ, dziɖuɖu tsãtɔ asu asiwò, Yerusalem-nyɔnuvl ƒe fiaɖuƒe asu asiwò.
9Azɔ nukaŋutl nẽle aƒa ɖom ale? Ɖe fiaa ɖeke megale me-wò o, eye adaŋudela bu ɖe wò, ale be nẽle ku lém abe nyɔnu, si le vi ɖzim la enea? 10Zion-nyɔnuvi; ƒo togotogoe nalé ku abe uyɔnu, si le vi ɖzim la ene! Elabena ele na wò be, naʋu le ɖua me aɖanɔ gbedadaƒo, eye naɖe Babel ke; afima woaɖe wò le, eye afima Yehowa axɔ wò le wò fu-tɔwo si me le. 11Ekema ɖukɔ geɖewo aƒo takpli ɖe ŋuwò agblɔ bena: „Wogblẽ kɔ ɖo nɛ, eye míaƒe ŋkuwo aɖl ƒo ɖe Zion ŋu!“ 12Ke womenyaa Yehowa ƒe: susuwo o, eye womedzea si eƒe tameɖoɖowo be, eli kɔ wo abe lubabla ɖe lugbɔƒe ene o. 13Zion-nyɔnuvi, tso nafanya nu! Elabena mana wò dzo nanye gayibɔ, eye wò afɔkli nanye akɔbli, ne nagbã dukɔ geɖewo gudugudu, eye nakɔ aboyonuwo ŋu na Yehowa kple woƒe kesinɔnuwo ŋu na anyigba blibo la dzi Aƒetɔ.
14Azɔ kuko ŋuti na ɖokuiwò; elabena woaƒu kpo ɖe ŋuwò, eye woatsɔ ati aƒo to me na Israel ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la.

Title: MIXA 5
Content:
Le Kristo ƒe dziƒe kple eƒe fiaɖuƒe ŋuti.
1Ke wò Betlexem Efrata, esi nènye suetɔ le Yuda ƒe ƒomeawo dome hã la, mewò Israel ƒe dziɖula le dzɔdzɔ ge atso nam, amesi dzɔɣi tso tititi le gbaɖegbe ʋĩ ke.
2Eyata atsɔ wo aɖe asi vaseɖe ɣeyiɣi, si funɔa ɖe nadzi vi; emegbe nɔviawo ƒe mamlea atrɔ agbɔ akpe ɖe Israel-viwo ŋu. 3Ado ahatsɔ Yehowa ƒe ŋusẽ kple eƒe Mawu, Yehowa ŋkɔ ƒe gãnye-nye anyi woe, eye woanɔ anyi bɔkɔɔ, elabena alolo azɔ vaseɖe anyigba ƒe mlɔenu. 4Eyama anye gŋutifafa. Eye ne Asur va míaƒe anyigba ɖzi, eye wòbe, yeaɖo afɔ mlaƒe fiasãwo me la, míadɔ lã-kplɔvi adre kple amegã enyi ɖe eŋu. 5Woatsɔ yi agblẽ Asur ƒe anyigba la, eye woadi yi agblẽ Nimrod ƒe anyigba la; woaɖe mi tso Asur si me, ne eva míaƒe anyigba dzi, eye wòbe, yeaɖo afɔ míaƒe llƒowo dzi la. 6Yakob ƒe ame mamleawo anɔ ɖukɔ geɖewo dome, abe Yehowa ƒe zãmu kple tsiɖzadza ɖe gbe dzi, si mekpɔa amea ɖeke sinu o, eye melalaa amegbelɔvia ɖeke o la ene. 7Eye Yakob ƒe ame mamleawo anɔ anyigba ɖzi dukɔwo me le ɖukɔ geɖewo dome abe dzata le gbemelãwo dome ene, abe dzatavi le alẽhawo dome, si, ne eto wo dome la, enyãa avuzi le nu dzi, eye wòvuvua nu, ke xɔnametɔa ɖeke menɔa anyi o la ene. 8Wò alɔ aɖe ɖzl ɖe wò ketɔwo ŋu, eye woatsrɔ̃ wò futɔwo katã!
9Ale Yehowa gblɔ esi: Ɣemaɣi la matsrɔ̃ wò sɔwo ɖa le dowòme, eye magblẽ wò tasiaɖamwo. 10Matsrɔ̃ wò anyigba ɖzl duwo, eye magbã wò mɔ̃ sesẽwo katã aƒu anyi. 11Matsrɔ̃ dzokawo le asiwò, eye gbesalawo maganɔ asiwò azɔ o. 12Matsrɔ̃ wò aklama kpakpɛwo kple aƒeliwo ɖa le ɖo-wòme, eye magaɖe ta agu na wò aslnudɔwɔwɔwo azɔ o. 13Maho wò Aserawo ɖa le dowòme, eye magblẽ wò duwo. 14Eye mabia hlɔ̃ ɖukɔ, siwo gbe toɖoɖo la, le dɔmedzoe kple dziku me.

Title: MIXA 6
Content:
Dukɔ la ƒe akpemadamada.
1Mise nya, si gblɔm Yehowa le: Tso nahe nya kple towo, eye togbɛwo nase wò gbe! 2Mi towo kple anyigba ƒe agunu sesẽwo, mise Yehowa ƒe dzrenya! Elabena dzre le Yehowa kple eƒe ɖukɔ la dome, eye wòle ʋɔnu yi ge kple Israel. 3Nye dukɔ, nukae mewɔ wò, eye fu kae meɖe na wò ma? Ɖo ŋu nam! 4Nyee kplɔ wò tso Egipte-nyigba dzi, mexɔ wò ƒle tso kluvinyenyeƒe me, eye medɔ Mose, Aron: kple Miryam woɖze ŋgɔwò ɖe! 5Nye ɖukɔ, ɖo ŋu tame, si Moab-fia Balak ɖo, kple alesi Bileam, Beor vi la, ɖo eŋu nɛ; ɖo ŋu nya, siwo dzɔ tso Sitim vaseɖe Gilgal, ne nadze si Yehowa ƒe dɔmenyo!
Numeme, si dzea Mawu ŋu.
6Nukae matsɔ ɖe asi ado ɖe Yehowa ŋku me, eye made ta agu ɖe Mawu ɖziƒoʋĩtɔ la ŋku me? Ɖe matsɔ enumevɔsa kple nyivi, siwo xɔ ƒe ɖeka la, ɖe asi ado ɖe eŋku mea? 7Ɖe agbo akpewo kple amitɔʋu akpe nanewo adze Yehowa ŋua? Ɖe matsɔ vinye ŋgɔgbea ana ɖe nye dzidadawo ta kple nye dɔmevi ana ɖe nye luʋɔ ƒe nuvɔ̃wo taa? 8Amegbetɔ, egblɔ nusi nyo la na wò; nusi ko dim Yehowa le tso asiwò la, enye be, nawɔ nusi le eteƒe, nalɔ̃ dɔmenyowɔwɔ, eye uabɔbɔ ɖokuiwò ɖe anyi ahazɔ le wò Mawu ŋku me. 9Yehowa le du la yɔm; amesi vɔ̃a wò ŋkɔ la, nunyalae; milé to ɖe ameƒoti kple amesi ɖoe ɖa la ŋu!
Nuku manyomanyoa ɖe ŋeɣi.
10Ɖe kesinɔnu madzɔmadzɔ kple nudotree nyaŋui, si ŋu fi-ƒode le la, gale ame vɔ̃ɖi ƒe me koa? 11Ɖe matso afia na ame, ne nuɖanu madzɔmaɖzɔ li, eye nudakpe amebatɔ le akplo mea? 12Elabena woƒe kesinɔtɔwo yɔ fũ kple ŋulasesẽ, duametɔwo ka aʋatso, eye alakpaɖe le nu me na wo. 13Eyata nye hã maƒo wò vevie, eye magblẽ dowòme le wò nuvɔ̃wo la. 14Àɖu nu, ke màɖi ƒo o, eye ɖɔ anɔ wuwòm ɖaa; ne èdzra nu ɖo la, ɖeke makpɔtɔ o, eye ne ɖe susɔ la, matsɔe ade asi na yi. 15Àƒã nu, ke màŋe nu o; ãɖa ami, ke mãkpɔ ami asi o; àfiã aha, ke mãkpɔ wein ano o. 16Miewɔ nu ɖe Omri ƒe ɖoɖowo kple Axab ƒe aƒe ƒe nuwɔnawo katã ŋu, eye miezɔ ɖe woƒe adaŋudedewo nu, ne matsɔ wò awɔ gbegbee, duametɔwo nazu tsiãdonu, eye nye dukɔ ƒe ɖzu uauɔ mia dzi.

Title: MIXA 7
Content:
Mawuvɔ̃la ʋeea ɖewo koe gali.
1Baba nam! Elabena ezu nam, abe alesi kutsetsegbeɣi kple weiuxaɣl nu yinae ene: weintsetsea ɖeke meli, ne woaɖu o, eye nye ve me le fiefiẽm ɖe kutsetse ŋgɔgbea ŋu. 2Nuteƒewɔlawo nu yi le anyigba ɖzi, eye ame dzɔdzɔea ɖeke megale amegbetɔwo dome o; wo kalã wode xa ɖe ʋu ŋu, eye woɖo ɖɔ na wo nɔewo. 3Vɔ̃ɖiwɔwɔ sɔ alɔ me na wo; amegã dia nu, ʋɔnudrɔ̃la drɔ̃a ʋɔuu le fetu ta, eye dumegãwo gblɔa nusi le wo dzrom; ale woblua afɔ na nya. 4Ame nyuitɔ le wo dome le abe ŋu ene, eye nuteƒewɔla vɔ̃ɖi wu aŋɔka. Le wò gbetakpɔlawo ƒe ŋkekea dzi la tohehe ava na wò; azɔ tɔtɔ aɖo wo dome. 5Migaxɔ miaƒe zɔhɛ ɖzl se o, eye migaɖo dzi ɖe mia xɔlɔ̃ kutsimea ŋu o; kpɔ wò aɖe dzi le nyɔnu, si le akɔwònu la ghɔ. 6Ŋutsuvi aɖe alɔme le fofoa ŋu, eye nyɔnuvi atso ɖe dada ŋu; lɔ̃xoyɔvinyɔnu atso ɖe lɔ̃xoa ŋu, eye ŋutsu ƒe aƒemetɔwo anye eƒe futɔwo.
Mawu ƒe amenuveve ŋugbedodo le tohehe megbẽ.
7Ke nye la matsa ŋu na Yehowa, eye makpɔ Mawu, nye xɔnametɔ sinu; nye Mawu ase nye gbe. 8Nye futɔ, meganɔ dzidzɔ kpɔm ɖe ŋunye, o; elabena ne medze anyi la, magafɔ, eye ne mebɔbɔ nɔ viviti me la, Yehowa ye nye nye kekeli. 9Mado dzi atsɔ Yehowa ƒe dziku, elabena mewɔ nuvɔ̃ ɖe eŋu, vaseɖe esime wòadrɔ̃ nye nya ahatso nam; akplɔm aɖo ɖe kekeli nu, eye makpɔ eƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye kple ŋku. 10Nye ketɔ, amesi le gbɔgblɔm nam be: Afika Yehowa, wò Mawu, le hã la, akpɔe, eye ŋukpe alée. Nye ŋku aɖi ƒo ɖe eŋu, emegbe woafanyae abe ba le kpɔdomee ene.
